Genesis24:32 Kwoguo mũndũ ũcio agĩthiĩ nyũmba, naake Labani akĩaũra ngamĩĩra mĩrigo, agĩcihe rũũa na irio ciacio, agĩcooka akĩreehera ndungata ĩyo ya Aburahamu na andũ arĩa maarĩ nayo maaĩ ma gwĩthamba magũrũ." 
Genesis24:33 Irio ciareehwo, mũndũ ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndingĩrĩa itaambĩĩte kuuga bata ũrĩa ũndeehete.”Labani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Aria.”" 
Genesis24:34 Naake akiuga atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndĩ ndungata ya Aburahamu." 
Genesis24:35 MWATHANI nĩaraathimĩĩte mwathi wakwa mũno, na akamũtongia mũno. Nĩamũheete ndũũru cia ng'ondu, mbũri, ng'ombe, betha, thahabu, ndungata cia arũme na cia andũ a nja, ngamĩĩra na ndigiri." 
Genesis24:36 Sara, mũtumia wa mũnene wakwa e mũkũrũ nĩamũciarĩire kaana ga kahĩĩ na mũnene ũcio wakwa nĩakĩheete mũũrũwe ũcio indo ciake ciothe." 
Genesis24:37 Mũnene wakwa nĩanjĩhĩtithirie akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Ndũkaanathuurĩre mũrũ wakwa mũtumia gatagatĩinĩ ka airĩĩtu arĩa me bũrũri wa Kanaani kũrĩa ndũũraga." 
Genesis24:38 No rĩĩrĩ, thiĩ kũrĩ andũ a nyũmba ya baaba na kũrĩ andũ aitũ, ũthuurĩre mũrũ wakwa mũtumia.’" 
Genesis24:39 Na niĩ ngĩũria mũnene wakwa atĩrĩ, ‘Ĩ mũirĩĩtu ũcio angĩrega tũũke naake?’" 
Genesis24:40 Naake akĩnjookeria atĩrĩ, ‘MWATHANI ũrĩa ndũũraga njathĩkagĩra nĩegũtũma mũraika atwarane nawe na akũhe ũhootani wonere mũrũ wakwa mũtumia kuuma kũrĩ andũ aitũ, na andũ a nyũmba ya baaba." 
Genesis24:41 No mwĩhĩtwa ũyũ ndũgaakũrĩa, ũngĩgaathiĩ kũrĩ andũ aitũ marege gũkũnengera mũirĩĩtu.’" 
Genesis24:42 “Ũũmũũthĩ rĩrĩa njũkire gĩthimainĩ nĩhoire atĩrĩ, ‘Wee, MWATHANI Ngai wa mũnene wakwa Aburahamu, ndakũhooya ũhe ũhootani ũndũinĩ ũrĩa ndĩreeka." 
Genesis24:43 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, ndĩ haaha gĩthimainĩ, reke gũtuĩke atĩ mũirĩĩtu ũrĩa ũgũũka gũtaha maaĩ, ndĩmwĩre ũũ: ndagũthaitha he maaĩ kuuma ndigithũinĩ yaku nyue,’" 
Genesis24:44 naake anjĩĩre atĩrĩ, ‘Nyua, o na ngamĩĩra ciaku nĩngũcitahĩra,’ reke ũcio atuĩke mũtumia ũrĩa MWATHANI athuurĩire mũrũ wa mũnene wakwa." 
Genesis24:45 O na itarĩĩkĩĩtie kũhooya na ngoro, Rebeka ooka akuuĩĩte ndigithũ ya gũtaha maaĩ na kĩande, aikũrũka ataha maaĩ gĩthimainĩ. Na niĩ ndamwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Ndagũthaitha he maaĩ nyue.’" 
Genesis24:46 Naake ainamĩrĩria ndigithũ yake kuuma kĩande narua, anjĩĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Nyua, o na ngamĩĩra ciaku nĩngũcihe.’ Kwoguo ndanyua, o na ahe ngamĩĩra ciakwa." 
Genesis24:47 Ndakĩmũũria atĩrĩ, ‘Thooguo nũũ?’ Naake anjĩĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Baaba nĩ Bethueli mũrũ wa Nahori na Milika.’ Ndagĩcooka ndamwĩkĩra gĩcũhĩ iniũrũ na bangiri mooko." 
Genesis24:48 Thuutha ũcio ndainamĩrĩra ndathaathaiya MWATHANI, o we Ngai wa mũnene wakwa Aburahamu, ũrĩa ũndongoreetie ngakinya kwa mũndũ matarainie na mũnene wakwa, kũrĩa nyoneete mũirĩĩtu wa gũtuĩka mũtumia wa mũũriũ wa mũnene wakwa." 
Genesis24:49 Rĩu-rĩ, angĩkorwo nĩmũgwathĩkĩra mũnene wakwa mũmwĩke ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire, njĩĩraai; akorwo ti ũguo, njĩĩraai, nĩngũmenya ũrĩa ngwĩka.”" 
Genesis24:50 Nao Labani na Bethueli makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ũhoro ũcio uumĩĩte kwĩ MWATHANI, na ithuĩ tũtirĩ ũndũ tũngĩtua." 
Genesis24:51 Rebeka nĩ we ũyũ; muoe mũthiĩ agatuĩke mũtumia wa mũrũ wa mũnene waku ta ũguo MWATHANI oigĩĩte.” 
Genesis24:52 Rĩrĩa ndungata ĩyo ya Aburahamu yaiguire ũguo, ĩkĩinamĩrĩra ĩgĩthaathaiya MWATHANI." 
Genesis24:53 Ĩgĩcooka ĩkĩruta mathaga ma betha na ma thahabu na nguo, ĩkĩhe Rebeka. O na nyina wa Rebeka, na mũrũ wa nyina na Rebeka nĩmaaheirwo iheeo cia goro." 
Genesis24:54 Ndungata ĩyo ya Aburahamu o hamwe na andũ arĩa maarĩ nayo magĩkĩrĩa irio, makĩnyua na makĩraara kũu. Mookĩra rũũciinĩ ĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “Rekeei njooke kwĩ mũnene wakwa.”" 
Genesis24:55 No mũrũ wa nyina na Rebeka o na nyina makiuga atĩrĩ, “Reke mũirĩĩtu aikarange na ithuĩ ta matukũ ikũmi ũguo, acooke athiĩ.”" 
Genesis24:56 Nayo ndungata ĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Tigaai gũtũma tũikare, amu MWATHANI nĩatũmĩĩte hootane. Rekeei njooke kwĩ mũnene wakwa.”" 
Genesis24:57 Nao makiuga atĩrĩ, “Reke twĩte mũirĩĩtu tũigue ũrĩa ekuuga.”" 
Genesis24:58 Magĩgĩĩta Rebeka makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩũkwenda gũthiĩ na mũndũ ũyũ?”Naake agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ.”" 
Genesis24:59 Magĩkĩreka Rebeka, o hamwe na ndungata ya mũndũ wa nja ĩrĩa yamũtungatagĩra, mathiĩ na ndungata ya Aburahamu na andũ arĩa mookĩĩte nayo." 
Genesis24:60 Nao makĩraathima Rebeka na ciugo ici:“Mwarĩ wa maitũ, ũrotuĩka nyina wa andũ ngiri na ngiri! Njiarwa ciaku irohootaga matũũra ma thũ ciacio!”" 
Genesis24:61 Rebeka hamwe na ndungata ciake cia airĩĩtu magĩkĩĩhaarĩria, magĩikarĩra ngamĩĩra mathiĩ na ndungata ya Aburahamu, makĩambĩrĩria rũgendo." 
Genesis24:62 Na rĩĩrĩ, Isaaka aakoreetwo oima “Gĩthimainĩ Kĩa Ũrĩa Wĩ Muoyo Ũrĩa Ũnyonaga,” tondũ aikaraga mwena wa kĩanda wa Kanaani." 
Genesis24:63 Kĩhwaĩinĩ nĩoimĩrire agĩthiĩ gũceeranga mĩgũndainĩ, na atiira maitho akĩona ngamĩĩra igĩũka." 
Genesis24:64 Rĩrĩa Rebeka aatiirire maitho akĩona Isaaka, akiuma ngamĩĩra igũrũ," 
Genesis24:65 akĩũria ndungata ya Aburahamu atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũũrĩa wĩ mũgũnda ũrooka gũtũtũnga-rĩ, nũũ?”Nayo ndungata ĩkĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ mũnene wakwa.” Rebeka agĩkĩoya gĩtambaya, akĩĩhumbĩra ũthiũ." 
Genesis24:66 Ndungata ĩgĩkĩĩra Isaaka maũndũ moothe marĩa yekĩĩte. 
Genesis24:67 Isaaka agĩgĩtwara Rebeka hemainĩ ĩrĩa nyina Sara aatũũraga, agĩtuĩka mũtumia wake. Isaaka nĩendire Rebeka, na agĩkĩniinĩrwo ihooru rĩa gũkuĩrwo nĩ nyina." 
Genesis25:1 Aburahamu nĩahikirie mũtumia ũngĩ wetagwo Ketura. 
Genesis25:2 Naake nĩamũciarĩire Zimirani, Jokishani, Medani, Midiani, Ishibaku na Shua." 
Genesis25:3 Jokishani aarĩ ithe wa Sheba na Dedani, nacio njiarwa cia Dedani ciarĩ Aasiria, Aletushi na Aleumi." 
Genesis25:4 Naake Midiani aarĩ ithe wa Efa, Eferi, Hanoku, Abida, na Elidaha. Acio oothe maarĩ njiarwa cia Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Aburahamu nĩatigĩire Isaaka indo ciothe iria aarĩ nacio. No rĩĩrĩ, ciana cia atumia aake a kũigwo nĩaciheire iheeo," 
Genesis25:6 na arĩ o muoyo, nĩaciĩrire ciume kũrĩ Isaaka ithiĩ mwena wa irathĩro." 
Genesis25:7 (7-8) Aburahamu aakuire e wa mĩaka igana na mĩrongo mũgwanja na ĩtaano (175). 
Genesis25:8 Ciana ciake Isaaka na Ishumaeli nĩciamũthikire ngurungainĩ ya Makipela, mũgũndainĩ warĩ mwena wa irathĩro wa Mamure ũrĩa warĩ wa Efironi mũrũ wa Zoharu ũrĩa Mũhiti." 
Genesis25:9 Nĩ mũgũnda ũrĩa Aburahamu aagũrĩĩte kuuma kũrĩ Ahiti. Kũu nĩkuo Aburahamu na mũtumia wake Sara maathikirwo. 
Genesis25:10 Thuutha wa Aburahamu gũkua, Ngai nĩaraathimire mũũrũwe Isaaka. Hĩndĩ ĩyo Isaaka aatũũraga hakuhĩ na gĩthima kĩrĩa gĩetagwo, “Gĩthima kĩa Ũrĩa Wĩ Muoyo Ũrĩa Ũnyonaga.”" 
Genesis25:11 Ciana cia Ishumaeli mũrũ wa Aburahamu ũrĩa aaciarĩirwo nĩ Hagari ũrĩa warĩ Mũmisiri na warĩ ndungata ya Sara 
Genesis25:12 nĩcio ici kũringana na ũrĩa ciaciarĩĩtwo irũmanĩrĩire: Nebaiothi, Kedari, Adibeli, Mibisamu," 
Genesis25:13 Mishima, Duma, Masa," 
Genesis25:14 Hadadi, Tema, Jeturu, Nafishi, na Kedema." 
Genesis25:15 Acio nĩ o maarĩ maithe ma mĩhĩrĩga ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ. Na rĩĩrĩ, marĩĩtwa maao maaheirwo matũũra maao na kambĩ ciao." 
Genesis25:16 Ishumaeli agĩkua aarĩ wa mĩaka igana na mĩrongo ĩtatũ na mũgwanja (137). 
Genesis25:17 Njiarwa icio cia Ishumaeli ciatũũraga kuuma Havila nginya Shuru, mwena wa irathĩro wa Misiri, njĩrainĩ ya gũthiĩ Asiria. Ciaikaraga kũraaya na njiarwa icio ingĩ cia Aburahamu." 
Genesis25:18 Ici nĩcio njiarwa cia Isaaka mũrũ wa Aburahamu: 
Genesis25:19 Aburahamu nĩ we warĩ ithe wa Isaaka. Isaaka arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna akĩhikia Rebeka mwarĩ wa Bethueli (Mũaramea wa kuuma Mesopotamia), na aarĩ mwarĩ wa nyina na Labani." 
Genesis25:20 Rebeka aarĩ thaata, na kwoguo Isaaka akĩmũhoera. Naake MWATHANI akĩigua mahooya maake, Rebeka akĩgĩa nda." 
Genesis25:21 Nda ĩyo yarĩ ya mahatha, na mbere ya ataanaciara, ciana icio ikĩgianĩra nda. Naake nĩeyũririe atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ gĩgũtũma ũndũ ta ũyũ wĩkĩke harĩ niĩ?” Nĩagĩthiire kũũria MWATHANI amwĩre gĩtũmi." 
Genesis25:22 MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ,“Thĩinĩ waku wĩ na ndũũrĩrĩ igĩrĩ; ũgũciara andũ a mĩhĩrĩga ĩĩrĩ megũtũũra mang'eng'anaga.Ũmwe nĩagaakorwo e na hinya gũkĩra ũcio ũngĩ, na ũrĩa mũkũrũ nĩagaatungatĩra ũrĩa mũnyiinyi.”" 
Genesis25:23 Nĩagĩkinyĩrĩirwo nĩ ihinda rĩa gũciara, naake agĩciara tũhĩĩ twa mahatha." 
Genesis25:24 Ka mbere kaarĩ gatuune, na mwĩrĩ wothe kaarĩ na guoya ta arĩ nguo, na kwoguo gagĩĩtwo Esau." 
Genesis25:25 Nako ga keerĩ gaaciarirwo kenyiitĩrĩire thũng'wainĩ ya Esau, nako gagĩgĩĩtwo Jakubu. Magĩciarwo Isaaka aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtandatũ." 
Genesis25:26 Tũmwana tũu twerĩ nĩtwakũrire, na Esau agĩtuĩka mũgwĩmi njoorua, na aatũũraga agwĩmaga, no Jakubu aarĩ mũndũ mũkiri, na aatũũraga mũciĩ." 
Genesis25:27 Isaaka nĩendeete Esau, amu nĩakenagio nĩkũrĩa nyama cia nyamũ iria Esau aagwĩmaga, no Rebeka eendeete Jakubu." 
Genesis25:28 Mũthenya ũmwe Jakubu akĩruga gĩtoero, Esau nĩokire oimĩĩte kũgwĩma, ahũũtĩĩte." 
Genesis25:29 Agĩkĩĩra Jakubu atĩrĩ, “Tareke nũme irio icio ciaku nduune ũguo, tondũ ndĩ mũhũũtu.” (Nĩkĩo gĩatũmire eetwo Edomu.)" 
Genesis25:30 Naake Jakubu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “No wambire kũnyenderia ũrigithaathi waku.”" 
Genesis25:31 Naake Esau akiuga atĩrĩ, “Rĩu na ndĩ hakuhĩ gũkua-rĩ, ũrigithaathi ũcio ũngĩng'una na kĩ?”" 
Genesis25:32 Jakubu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Amba wĩhĩte atĩ nĩũkũnyenderia ũrigithaathi waku.”Esau nĩehĩtire, agĩkĩenderia Jakubu ũrigithaathi wake." 
Genesis25:33 Naake Jakubu akĩmũhe mũgate na gĩtoero, akĩrĩa na akĩnyua, agĩcooka agĩĩthiĩra. Ũguo nĩguo Esau aanyararire ũrigithaathi wake." 
Genesis26:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani nĩkwagĩire na ng'aragu ĩngĩ tiga ĩrĩa yarĩ kuo hĩndĩ ya Aburahamu. Isaaka nĩathiire Gerari kũrĩ Abimeleki mũthamaki wa Afilisiti." 
Genesis26:2 MWATHANI nĩoimĩrĩire Isaaka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ndũgaathiĩ Misiri; ikara bũrũri ũrĩa ngũkwĩra ũikare." 
Genesis26:3 Tũũra gũũkũ bũrũri ũyũ na nĩndĩkoragwo hamwe nawe na ngũraathimage. Bũrũri ũyũ wothe nĩngũkũhe o hamwe na njiarwa ciaku. Nĩngũhingia kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ndeerĩire thooguo Aburahamu. 
Genesis26:4 Nĩngaakũhe njiarwa nyingĩ o ta njata cia matuinĩ, na nĩngaacihe bũrũri ũyũ wothe. Ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe nĩikaanjĩĩra ndĩciraathime ta ũrĩa ndaathimĩĩte njiarwa ciaku." 
Genesis26:5 Nĩngaakũraathima, amu Aburahamu nĩanjathĩkĩire na agĩathĩkĩra maathani na mawatho maakwa moothe.”" 
Genesis26:6 Kwoguo Isaaka agĩtũũra Gerari. 
Genesis26:7 Rĩrĩa andũ a kũu mooririe ũhoro wa mũtumia wake, akiuga atĩ nĩ mwarĩ wa nyina, amu nĩetigagĩra kuuga atĩ nĩ mũtumia wake, tondũ andũ a kũu nĩmangĩamũũragire nĩguo mooe Rebeka, amu aarĩ mũthaka mũno." 
Genesis26:8 Isaaka aikaranga kũu, Abimeleki mũthamaki wa Afilisiti nĩacũũthĩrĩirie na ndirica akĩona Isaaka agĩthaaka na mũtumia wake Rebeka." 
Genesis26:9 Abimeleki nĩatũmanĩire Isaaka akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Tuuge nĩ mũtumia waku? Woigire atĩ nĩ mwarĩ wa maitũguo nĩkĩ?”Naake Isaaka agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Ndeciiririe ndoiga atĩ nĩ mũtumia wakwa, nĩngũũragwo.”" 
Genesis26:10 Naake Abimeleki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ atĩa ũguo ũtwĩkĩĩte? Nĩ ũhũthũ mũndũ ũmwe wakwa angĩrakoreetwo akomeete na mũtumia waku, na ũgĩtũreeherere mahĩtia.”" 
Genesis26:11 Abimeleki nĩakaanirie andũ oothe akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ o wothe ũgeeka mũndũ ũyũ kana mũtumia wake ũũru, nĩakooragwo.”" 
Genesis26:12 Isaaka nĩahandire irio kũu bũrũri ũcio, na mwaka ũcio akĩgetha maita igana ma iria aahandĩĩte amu MWATHANI nĩamũraathimire," 
Genesis26:13 na akĩgĩa na indo nyingĩ agĩtonga mũno. 
Genesis26:14 Tondũ aarĩ na ndũũru cia ng'ondu, ng'ombe o na ndungata nyingĩ, Afilisiti nĩmaamũiguĩrĩire ũiru." 
Genesis26:15 Nĩmaagĩthikire ithima ciothe iria cienjeetwo nĩ ndungata cia ithe Aburahamu e muoyo. 
Genesis26:16 Abimeleki agĩkĩĩra Isaaka atĩrĩ, “Uma bũrũri witũ amu nĩũgĩĩte na hinya gũtũkĩra.”" 
Genesis26:17 Kwoguo Isaaka akiuma kũu agĩthiĩ akĩamba hema gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Gerari kũrĩa aikarangire kwa ihinda. 
Genesis26:18 Isaaka nĩathikũririe ithima iria cienjeetwo hĩndĩ ya ithe Aburahamu, nĩ gũkorwo nĩciathikĩĩtwo nĩ Afilisiti Aburahamu arĩĩkia gũkua, na agĩcihe marĩĩtwa o marĩa ciaheetwo nĩ ithe." 
Genesis26:19 No rĩĩrĩ, ndungata cia Isaaka cienja gĩthima gĩtuambainĩ," 
Genesis26:20 arĩithi a Gerari makĩgĩa ngarari na arĩithi a Isaaka, makiuga atĩrĩ, “Maaĩ maya nĩ maitũ.” Kwoguo Isaaka agĩtua gĩthima kĩu “Ngarari.”" 
Genesis26:21 Ndungata cia Isaaka nĩcienjire gĩthima kĩngĩ, na o na kĩu gĩkĩgĩa ngarari na kwoguo agĩgĩtua, “Ũthũ.”" 
Genesis26:22 Nĩoimire kũu agĩthiĩ akĩenja gĩthima kĩngĩ, na kĩu gĩtiagĩire ngarari, na kwoguo agĩgĩtua “Wĩyathi.” Nĩoigire atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI nĩatũheete wĩyathi tũtũũre gũũkũ, na nĩtũgũgĩtheerema.”" 
Genesis26:23 Isaaka nĩoimire kũu akĩambata Beerisheba. 
Genesis26:24 Ũtukũ o ro ũcio MWATHANI nĩamuumĩrĩire akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ Ngai wa thooguo Aburahamu; tiga gwĩtigĩra ndĩ hamwe nawe, na nĩngũkũraathima, na ngũhe njiarwa nyingĩ nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa ndeerĩire ndungata yakwa Aburahamu.”" 
Genesis26:25 Isaaka agĩgĩaka kĩgongoona hau, agĩthaathaiya MWATHANI na akĩamba hema o ho. Na rĩĩrĩ, ndungata ciake ikĩenja gĩthima kĩngĩ." 
Genesis26:26 Abimeleki nĩoimire Gerari e na mũmũtaari wetagwo Ahuzathu na mũnene wa thigari wetagwo Fikoli magĩthiĩ kuona Isaaka. 
Genesis26:27 Isaaka agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Muoka kũrĩ niĩ nĩkĩ o rĩrĩa mũmeneete na nĩmwanyingatire kuuma bũrũri wanyu?”" 
Genesis26:28 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũmenyeete wega atĩ MWATHANI arĩ hamwe nawe, na kwoguo tũgagĩciiria atĩ nĩ wega ithuĩ nawe tũthondeke kĩrĩĩkanĩro," 
Genesis26:29 atĩ ndũgaatwĩka ũũru o ta ũrĩa ithuĩ tũtaagwĩkire ũũru. Twagwĩkire wega na tũkĩreka ũthiĩ na thaayũ. Wee nĩũraathimĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI.” 
Genesis26:30 Isaaka agĩkĩmarugĩra, makĩrĩa na makĩnyua." 
Genesis26:31 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ kĩrooko tene magĩthondeka kĩrĩĩkanĩro na makĩĩhĩta. Isaaka agĩcooka akĩmoigĩra ũhoro, magĩtigana na thaayũ." 
Genesis26:32 Mũthenya o ro ũcio ndungata cia Isaaka igĩũka ikĩmwĩra ũhoro wa gĩthima kĩrĩa cienjeete ikiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩtuoneete maaĩ.”" 
Genesis26:33 Naake agĩtua gĩthima kĩu “Mwĩhĩtwa.” Hau nĩ ho itũũra rĩa Beerisheba rĩarutire rĩĩtwa rĩarĩo. 
Genesis26:34 Na rĩĩrĩ, Esau akinyia mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna, nĩahikirie airĩĩtu eerĩ Ahiti; ũmwe eetagwo Judithi mwarĩ wa Beeri, na ũcio ũngĩ Basemathi mwarĩ wa Eloni." 
Genesis26:35 Atumia acio nĩmaanyamaaririe Isaaka na Rebeka. 
Genesis27:1 Rĩrĩa Isaaka aakũrire akĩũra maitho, nĩetire Esau, mũũrũwe ũrĩa mũkũrũ, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũũriũ!”Naake akĩmwĩtĩka, “Ĩ niĩ ũyũ haaha.”" 
Genesis27:2 Isaaka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Rĩu nĩngũrire, na ndiũĩ rĩrĩa ingĩkua." 
Genesis27:3 Ũgwĩka ũguo-ĩ, woe ũta na mĩguĩ, ũthiĩ gĩthakainĩ ũnyiitĩre nyamũ ĩmwe," 
Genesis27:4 ũũke ũndugĩre irio iria nyendeete, ũndeehere ndĩe, nĩguo ngũraathime itanakua.”" 
Genesis27:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Isaaka aaragĩria mũũrũwe Esau, Rebeka nĩathikagĩrĩria. Kwoguo rĩrĩa Esau aathiire kũgwĩma," 
Genesis27:6 Rebeka akĩĩra Jakubu atĩrĩ, “Ndaigua thooguo akĩĩra Esau atĩrĩ," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Thiĩ ũndeehere nyamũ ũndugĩre, na wona ndarĩa, ngũraathime, ndĩ mbere ya MWATHANI, itanakua.’" 
Genesis27:8 Rĩu, mũũriũ, thikĩrĩria ũrĩa ngũkwĩra." 
Genesis27:9 Thiĩ rũũruinĩ ũnyiite tũũri twĩrĩ tũnoru, ndĩtũthondeke irio iria thooguo eendeete mũno," 
Genesis27:10 nĩguo ũmũtwarĩre arĩe nĩ geetha akũraathime atanakua.” 
Genesis27:11 No Jakubu akĩĩra nyina atĩrĩ, “Mũrũ wa maitũ Esau nĩarĩ guoya mwĩrĩ no niĩ ndirĩ." 
Genesis27:12 Baaba ahota kũũhuutia amenye atĩ nĩkũmũheenia ndĩramũheenia; ndĩkĩĩreehere kĩrumi handũ ha kĩraathimo.” 
Genesis27:13 Naake nyina akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mũũriũ, ĩka ũrĩa ndĩrakwĩra, thiĩ ũndeehere tũũri tũu; kĩrumi kĩrĩa kĩngĩkũnyiita reke kĩĩnyiite arĩ niĩ.”" 
Genesis27:14 Kwoguo agĩthiĩ agĩtũnyiita agĩtwarĩra nyina, naake nyina akĩruga irio iria ithe eendeete." 
Genesis27:15 Agĩcooka akĩoya nguo iria njega mũno cia Esau iria we aigĩĩte nyũmba, akĩhumba Jakubu," 
Genesis27:16 na akĩmũhumba njũũa cia tũũri tũu, kũrĩa gũtaarĩ guoya mooko na ngingo." 
Genesis27:17 Agĩcooka akĩmũnengera irio iria aathondekeete wega, hamwe na mũgate aarugĩĩte." 
Genesis27:18 Jakubu agĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ ithe akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Baaba!”Naake ithe akĩmũcookeria, “Ĩ niĩ ũyũ haaha. Wee nĩ we ũ, mũũriũ?”" 
Genesis27:19 Naake Jakubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ Esau mũũrũguo wa irigithaathi; nĩnjĩkĩĩte ũrĩa ũnjĩĩrire. Ndagũthaitha ũkĩra ũikare thĩ ũrĩe nyama ici ndakũreehere, nĩ geetha ũndaathime.”" 
Genesis27:20 Naake Isaaka akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mũũriũ, kaĩ waciona narua atĩa?”Naake Jakubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI Ngai waku nĩwe wahotithia gũciona.”" 
Genesis27:21 Isaaka agĩkĩĩra Jakubu atĩrĩ, “Mũũriũ, takuhĩrĩria ngũhuutie, menye na ma kana nĩ we Esau.”" 
Genesis27:22 Jakubu agĩgĩkuhĩrĩria ithe, naake amũhuutia akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũgambo waku ũraiguĩka ta arĩ wa Jakubu, no mooko maaku nĩ ma Esau.”" 
Genesis27:23 No ndamenyire atĩ nĩ Jakubu amu mooko maake maarĩ na guoya ta ma Esau. Atanamũraathima 
Genesis27:24 nĩamũririe rĩngĩ atĩrĩ, “Nĩ ma wee nĩ we mũrũ wakwa Esau?”Naake agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ, nĩ niĩ.”" 
Genesis27:25 Naake Isaaka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ndeehere nyama icio ndĩe, na ndarĩĩkia kũrĩa ngũraathime.” Jakubu agĩkĩmũreehere, akĩrĩa o na akĩmwĩkĩrĩra ndibei akĩnyua." 
Genesis27:26 Ithe agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũũriũ, kuhĩrĩria ũmumunye.”" 
Genesis27:27 Agĩkĩmũkuhĩrĩria amũmumunye, naake Isaaka akĩnungĩra nguo ciake. Agĩkĩmũraathima akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ,“Mũnungo wa mũrũ wakwa no ta mũnungo wa mũgũnda ũrĩa MWATHANI araathimĩĩte." 
Genesis27:28 Ngai arokũheaga ime rĩrĩa riumaga igũrũ, na aronoria mĩgũnda yaku! Arokũhe irio nyingĩ na ndibei nyingĩ!" 
Genesis27:29 Ndũũrĩrĩ irotuĩka ndungata ciaku, na andũ marokũinamagĩrĩra.Ũroathaga andũ aanyu oothe, na ciana cia maitũguo irokũinamagĩrĩra.Arĩa marĩkũrumaga maronyiitagwo nĩ kĩrumi, na arĩa marĩkũraathimaga maroraathimagwo!”" 
Genesis27:30 Na rĩĩrĩ, Isaaka arĩĩkia kũraathima Jakubu, na Jakubu oima o ro ũguo, mũrũ wa nyina Esau agĩkinya oimĩĩte kũgwĩma." 
Genesis27:31 O naake akĩruga irio njega agĩtwarĩra ithe. Akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Baaba, ndagũthaitha ũkĩra ũikare thĩ, ũrĩe nyama iria ndakũreehere nĩ geetha ũndaathime.”" 
Genesis27:32 Isaaka akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ we ũ?”Naake agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ Esau, mũũrũguo wa irigithaathi.”" 
Genesis27:33 Isaaka akĩambĩrĩria kũinaina mwĩrĩ wothe, agĩkĩũria atĩrĩ, “Ũcio ũũragire nyamũ andeehere-rĩ, nũũ? Ndamĩrĩa o rĩu ũtanooka, na ndamũraathima. Na rĩĩrĩ, egũtũũra e mũraathime.”" 
Genesis27:34 Esau aigua ũguo, akĩrĩra na marũrũ maingĩ akiuga atĩrĩ, “Baaba, o na niĩ ndaathima!”" 
Genesis27:35 No Isaaka akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũrũ wa maitũguo ooka, aheenia, ooya kĩraathimo gĩaku.”" 
Genesis27:36 Esau akiuga atĩrĩ, “Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo riita rĩa keerĩ kũheenia. Na nĩkĩo eetagwo Jakubu. Nĩakuuire ũrigithaathi wakwa, na rĩu ningĩ nĩakuua kĩraathimo gĩakwa. Ndũndigĩirie kĩraathimo o na kĩmwe?”" 
Genesis27:37 Naake Isaaka agĩcookeria Esau atĩrĩ, “Nĩndamũtua mũgwathi, na ndatua andũ aao oothe ndungata ciake, na ndamũhe irio na ndibei. Rĩu mũũriũ, ndirĩ ũndũ ingĩgwĩkĩra!”" 
Genesis27:38 Esau agĩgĩthaitha ithe akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Baaba, kaĩ ũrĩ wa kĩraathimo o kĩmwe? Baaba, o na niĩ ndaathima!” Agĩkĩambĩrĩria kũrĩra." 
Genesis27:39 Naake ithe Isaaka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ,“Ũroaga gũkaagĩa ime rĩa kuuma igũrũ, o na kana mũgũnda mũnoru." 
Genesis27:40 Ũgũtũũra ũrũaga, na ũtungatagĩra mũrũ wa maitũguo.No rĩrĩa ũkaamũremera, nĩũkeeyohora kuuma mookoinĩ maake.”" 
Genesis27:41 Esau nĩamenire Jakubu tondũ wa kĩraathimo kĩrĩa ithe amũraathimire nakĩo. Nĩakĩĩĩrire atĩrĩ, “Matukũ ma gũcakaya nĩ ũndũ wa gĩkuũ kĩa baaba me hakuhĩ; thuutha ũcio nĩngooraga Jakubu.”" 
Genesis27:42 No rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa Rebeka aamenyire mũbango wa mũũrũwe Esau, agĩĩta Jakubu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũrũ wa maitũguo Esau nĩarenda gũkũũraga ehoorerie maraakara." 
Genesis27:43 Kwoguo mũrũ wakwa thikĩrĩria ũrĩa ngũkwĩra. Thiĩ narua kwĩ mũrũ wa maitũ Labani bũrũriinĩ wa Harani," 
Genesis27:44 ũikarange naake kuo kwa ihinda nginya rĩrĩa mang'ũrĩ ma mũrũ wa maitũguo magaathira," 
Genesis27:45 na ariganĩrwo nĩ ũrĩa wamwĩkire. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩngaatũma mũndũ ooke akũiyĩre. Bata wa njũrwo nĩ aariũ aakwa eerĩ mũthenya o ro ũmwe, nĩ ũrĩkũ?”" 
Genesis27:46 Rebeka agĩkĩĩra Isaaka atĩrĩ, “Niĩ nĩnogeetio nĩ atumia aya a Esau a mũhĩrĩga wa Ahiti. O naake Jakubu angĩhikia Mũhiti, niĩ no gũkua.”" 
Genesis28:1 Isaaka agĩgĩĩta Jakubu, akĩmũraathima na akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ndũkaanahikie mũirĩĩtu Mũkanaani." 
Genesis28:2 Ũkĩra ũthiĩ Mesopotamia kwa guukaguo Bethueli, woe mũirĩĩtu ũmwe wa maamaguo Labani ũmũhikie." 
Genesis28:3 Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe arokũraathima na akũhe njiarwa nyingĩ, nĩ geetha ũgaatuĩka ithe wa ndũũrĩrĩ nyingĩ." 
Genesis28:4 Arokũraathima o hamwe na njiarwa ciaku o ta ũrĩa aaraathimire Aburahamu. Bũrũri ũyũ ũtũũraga, o ũyũ Ngai aaheire Aburahamu, ũrotuĩka waku!”" 
Genesis28:5 Isaaka agĩgĩtũma Jakubu Mesopotamia kwa Labani, ũrĩa warĩ mũrũ wa Bethueli ũrĩa Mũaramea, mũrũ wa nyina na Rebeka nyina wa Jakubu na Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Esau agĩkĩmenya atĩ Isaaka nĩaraathimĩĩte Jakubu na akamũtũma Mesopotamia agacarie mũtumia kuo. O na nĩamenyire atĩ rĩrĩa Isaaka aamũraathimire nĩamwathire akĩmwĩra atĩ ndakaanahikie mũtumia Mũkanaani. 
Genesis28:7 Ningĩ nĩonire atĩ Jakubu nĩathĩkĩire ithe na nyina, na nĩathiĩte Mesopotamia." 
Genesis28:8 Esau agĩkĩmenya atĩ atumia aake Akanaani matiendeetwo nĩ ithe. 
Genesis28:9 Kwoguo nĩathiire kwa Ishumaeli mũrũ wa Aburahamu akĩhikia mwarĩ wetagwo Mahalathu, ũrĩa warĩ mwarĩ wa nyina na Nebaiothi." 
Genesis28:10 Jakubu agĩkiuma Beerisheba, akĩerekera Harani." 
Genesis28:11 Nĩgwatukire e njĩra, agĩkinya handũ akĩraara ho. Nĩoire ihiga, agĩĩtiira narĩo mũtwe agĩkoma." 
Genesis28:12 Naake nĩarootire akĩona ngathĩ yoimĩĩte thĩ ĩgakinya igũrũ, nao araika makaambataga na magaikũrũkaga nayo." 
Genesis28:13 Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩonire MWATHANI arũũgamĩĩte hakuhĩ naake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI, Ngai wa Aburahamu na Isaaka; nĩngaakũhe wee mwene, o hamwe na njiarwa ciaku, bũrũri ũyũ ũkomeete." 
Genesis28:14 Njiarwa ciaku nĩikaingĩha o ta rũkũngũ rwa thĩ, na nĩikaaramia bũrũri mĩena yothe. Nĩngaaraathima ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe na ũndũ waku na njiarwa ciaku." 
Genesis28:15 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, ngũtũũrania nawe na ngũgitagĩre kũrĩa guothe ũrĩthiaga, na nĩngaagũcookia gũũkũ bũrũriinĩ ũyũ; amu ndigaagũtiganĩria nginya rĩrĩa ngaahingia maũndũ macio moothe ndakwĩrĩra.”" 
Genesis28:16 Jakubu ookĩra nĩoigire atĩrĩ, “Ti itherũ, MWATHANI arĩ handũ haaha, na ndirooĩ ũguo!”" 
Genesis28:17 Nĩaiguire guoya akiuga atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ handũ haaha nĩhakũmakania-ĩ! No mũhaka haaha hakorwo nĩ nyũmba ya Ngai; na nĩ kĩhingo gĩa gũtoonya igũrũ.”" 
Genesis28:18 Jakubu nĩokĩrire rũũciinĩ tene, akĩoya ihiga rĩrĩa eetiirĩĩte mũtwe narĩo, akĩrĩhanda rĩrĩ rĩa kĩririkano, agĩcooka akĩrĩitĩrĩria maguta akĩrĩamũrĩra Ngai." 
Genesis28:19 Naake agĩtua handũ hau Betheli (No itũũra rĩrĩa rĩarĩ ho mbere rĩetagwo Luzi). 
Genesis28:20 Jakubu nĩehĩtire mbere ya MWATHANI akiuga atĩrĩ, “Angĩkorwo nĩũrĩkoragwo hamwe na niĩ na ũmenyerere rũgendoinĩ rũũrũ ndĩrathiĩ, na ũheage irio na nguo," 
Genesis28:21 na ũkaanjookia mũciĩ kwa baaba na thaayũ, wee, MWATHANI, ũgaatuĩka Ngai wakwa." 
Genesis28:22 Ihiga rĩĩrĩ rĩa kĩririkano ndahanda haaha, rĩgaatuĩka nyũmba yaku ya gũthaathaĩrio, na nĩngaakũhe gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩa indo ciothe iria ũkaahe.”" 
Genesis29:1 Jakubu nĩathiire na mbere na rũgendo o nginya agĩkinya bũrũri wa andũ a mwena wa irathĩro. 
Genesis29:2 Aacũũthĩrĩria akĩona gĩthima kũu werũinĩ, na nĩhaarĩ na ndũũru ithatũ cia ng'ondu ciakomeete hau hakuhĩ nakĩo. Ndũũru icio ciaheagwo maaĩ kuuma gĩthimainĩ kĩu, na nĩgĩakunĩkĩĩtwo na ihiga inene mũno." 
Genesis29:3 Rĩrĩa ndũũru ciothe ciacookanĩrĩra, arĩithi nĩmeeheragia ihiga, magacihe maaĩ, magacooka magagĩkunĩka na ihiga rĩu." 
Genesis29:4 Jakubu akĩũria arĩithi atĩrĩ, “Andũ aya, muumĩĩte kũ?”Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Tuumĩĩte Harani.”" 
Genesis29:5 Naake akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩmũũĩ Labani mũcũkũrũ wa Nahori?”Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ, nĩtũmũũĩ.”" 
Genesis29:6 Naake akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ Mwega?”Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ, nĩ mwega, o na ũũrĩa nĩ mwarĩ Rakeli ũrooka na ng'ondu.”" 
Genesis29:7 Jakubu agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Rĩu nĩ mũthenya, na mathaa ma mahiũ gũcookanĩrĩrio ti makinyu; kaĩ mũtangĩcihe maaĩ mũcooke mũthiĩ mũgacirĩithie?”" 
Genesis29:8 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ũguo tũtingĩĩka nginya mahiũ moothe mooke haaha, ihiga rĩeherio, tũcooke tũhe mahiũ maaĩ.”" 
Genesis29:9 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jakubu agĩthiaga o na mbere kwaria nao, Rakeli agĩkinya na ng'ondu cia ithe amu nĩ we wacirĩithagia." 
Genesis29:10 Rĩrĩa Jakubu oonire Rakeli e na ng'ondu cia maamawe Labani, agĩthiĩ gĩthimainĩ, akĩeheria ihiga, agĩcihe maaĩ." 
Genesis29:11 Agĩcooka akĩmumunya Rakeli na akĩambĩrĩria kũrĩra nĩgũkena. 
Genesis29:12 Jakubu akĩĩra Rakeli atĩrĩ, “Thooguo nĩ maama; niĩ ndĩ mũrũ wa Rebeka.”Rakeli agĩgĩteng'era akĩĩra ithe ũhoro ũcio." 
Genesis29:13 Ithe aigua ũhoro ũcio wa Jakubu mũrũ wa mwarĩ wa nyina, agĩteng'era akĩmũtũnga, akĩmũhĩmbĩria akĩmũmumunya, agĩcooka akĩmũtwara mũciĩ. Jakubu akĩĩra Labani maũndũ moothe marĩa meekĩkĩĩte," 
Genesis29:14 naake Labani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩ ma wee na niĩ tũrĩ a mũthiimo ũmwe.” Jakubu agĩgĩikara kũu mweri ũmwe." 
Genesis29:15 Labani nĩerire Jakubu atĩrĩ, “Ti wega ũndutagĩre wĩra o ro ũguo tũhũ atĩ tondũ nĩtũtarainie. Ũkwenda ngũrĩhe mũcaara ũigana atĩa?”" 
Genesis29:16 Na rĩĩrĩ, Labani nĩarĩ na airĩĩtu eerĩ, ũrĩa mũkũrũ eetagwo Lea, na ũrĩa mũnyiinyi Rakeli." 
Genesis29:17 Lea aarĩ na maitho macici, no Rakeli aarĩ mwega na mũthaka." 
Genesis29:18 Jakubu nĩendeete Rakeli, kwoguo akiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũkũrutĩra wĩra mĩaka mũgwanja nawe ũnjĩtĩkĩrie hikie Rakeli, mwarĩguo ũrĩa mũnyiinyi.”" 
Genesis29:19 Labani agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kaba ngũnengereete Rakeli gũkĩra kũnengera mũndũ ũngĩ; ikara gũũkũ na niĩ.”" 
Genesis29:20 Jakubu nĩakĩrutire wĩra mĩaka mũgwanja nĩ geetha anengerwo Rakeli, na mĩaka ĩyo akĩona ta arĩ o matukũ manyiinyi amu nĩamwendeete." 
Genesis29:21 Jakubu agĩkĩĩra Labani atĩrĩ, “Ihinda nĩithiru; nengera mwarĩguo ndĩmũhikie.”" 
Genesis29:22 Kwoguo Labani agĩthondeka iruga rĩa ũhiki, na agĩĩta andũ a kũu oothe." 
Genesis29:23 No ũtukũ agĩtwarĩra Jakubu Lea handũ ha Rakeli, na Jakubu agĩkoma naake." 
Genesis29:24 (Labani nĩaheanire ndungata yake ya mũirĩĩtu yetagwo Zilipa kũrĩ mwarĩ Lea ĩmũtungatagĩre.) 
Genesis29:25 Kwarooka gũkĩa, Jakubu akĩona atĩ aanengereetwo Lea, agĩkĩũria Labani atĩrĩ, “Ũranjĩkire ũũ nĩkĩ? Na githĩ ndikũrutĩire wĩra nĩ ũndũ wa Rakeli? Ũraheenirie nĩkĩ?”" 
Genesis29:26 Naake Labani akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ti mũtugo gũũkũ kũnengerana mũirĩĩtu ũrĩa mũnyiinyi ahike mbere ya ũrĩa mũkũrũ." 
Genesis29:27 Eterera kiumia gĩa gũkũngũĩra ũhiki gĩthire, ngũnengere Rakeli angĩkorwo nĩũkũndutĩra wĩra mĩaka ĩngĩ mũgwanja.”" 
Genesis29:28 Jakubu nĩetĩkĩrire, na kiumia gĩa gũkũngũĩra ũhiki gĩathira, Labani akĩmũnengera mwarĩ Rakeli atuĩke mũtumia wake." 
Genesis29:29 (Labani nĩaheanire ndungata yake ya mũirĩĩtu yetagwo Biliha kũrĩ mwarĩ Rakeli ĩmũtungatagire.) 
Genesis29:30 Jakubu nĩakomire na Rakeli, na akĩmwenda gũkĩra Lea. Agĩcooka akĩrutĩra Labani wĩra mĩaka ĩngĩ mũgwanja." 
Genesis29:31 MWATHANI oona atĩ Rakeli aarĩ mwende gũkĩra Lea, agĩgĩtũma Lea agĩe ciana, naake Rakeli atuĩke thaata." 
Genesis29:32 Lea nĩagĩire nda agĩciara kaana ga kahĩĩ. Agĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI nĩoneete mathĩĩna maakwa, na rĩu mũthuuri wakwa nĩekũnyenda.” Kwoguo agĩgatua Reubeni." 
Genesis29:33 Nĩagĩire nda rĩngĩ agĩciara kaana ga kahĩĩ. Akiuga atĩrĩ, “Tondũ MWATHANI nĩaiguĩte atĩ nĩmeneetwo, nĩaheete kaana gaaka ga kahĩĩ o nako.” Kwoguo agĩgatua Simeoni." 
Genesis29:34 Nĩagĩire nda rĩngĩ na agĩciara kaana ga kahĩĩ. Akiuga atĩrĩ, “Rĩu mũthuuri wakwa nĩekũnyiitithanio na niĩ amu nĩndĩmũciarĩire tũhĩĩ tũtatũ.” Kwoguo agĩgatua Levi." 
Genesis29:35 Nĩagĩire nda rĩngĩ na agĩciara kaana kangĩ ga kahĩĩ. Akiuga atĩrĩ, “Rĩu nĩngũgooca MWATHANI.” Kwoguo agĩgatua Juda. Agĩcooka agĩtiga kũgĩa ciana." 
Genesis30:1 No rĩĩrĩ, Rakeli ndakoreetwo aciarĩire Jakubu mwana o na ũmwe, agĩkĩiguĩra mwarĩ wa nyina ũiru, agĩkĩĩra Jakubu atĩrĩ, “He ciana kana ngue!”" 
Genesis30:2 Jakubu nĩaraakaririo nĩ Rakeli akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ arĩ niĩ ndĩ ithenya rĩa Ngai ũrĩa ũkũgirĩĩtie gũciara?”" 
Genesis30:3 Naake Rakeli akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ndungata ĩno yakwa ya mũirĩĩtu ĩgwĩtwo Biliha-rĩ, mĩoe ũkome nayo ĩnjiarĩre kaana nĩguo o na niĩ ndĩgĩtuĩke nyina wa kaana na ũndũ wayo.”" 
Genesis30:4 Nĩakĩnengerire mũthuuriwe Biliha ndungata ĩyo yake ĩtuĩke mũtumia wake, Naake agĩkoma nayo." 
Genesis30:5 Naake Biliha akĩgĩa nda agĩciarĩra Jakubu kaana ga kahĩĩ. 
Genesis30:6 Naake Rakeli akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ngai nĩanduĩrĩire wega. Nĩaiguĩte mahooya maakwa na agakĩĩhe kahĩĩ;” kwoguo agĩgatua Dani." 
Genesis30:7 Naake Biliha akĩgĩa nda rĩngĩ agĩciarĩra Jakubu kaana ga keerĩ ga kahĩĩ. 
Genesis30:8 Rakeli akiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩndũĩte mbaara nditũ na mwarĩ wa maitũ, no nĩndĩmũhooteete;” kwoguo agĩtua kaana kau Nafutali." 
Genesis30:9 Rĩrĩa Lea oonire atĩ nĩatigĩĩte kũgĩa ciana, akĩnengera Jakubu ndungata ĩrĩa yake ya mũirĩĩtu yetagwo Zilipa ĩtuĩke mũtumia wake." 
Genesis30:10 Naake Zilipa agĩciarĩra Jakubu kaana ga kahĩĩ. 
Genesis30:11 Naake Lea akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ndĩ na mũnyaka;” kwoguo agĩgatua Gadi." 
Genesis30:12 Naake Zilipa agĩciarĩra Jakubu kaana kangĩ ga kahĩĩ. 
Genesis30:13 Naake Lea akiuga atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ ndĩ na gĩkeno-ĩ! Rĩu atumia marĩnjĩtaga gũkena;” kwoguo agĩgatua Asheri." 
Genesis30:14 Hĩndĩ ya magetha ma ngano, Reubeni nĩathiire mũgũnda akĩona matunda mahaana nathi agĩtwarĩra nyina Lea. Naake Rakeli akĩĩra Lea atĩrĩ, “Ndagũthaitha ta he matunda mamwe ma mũũrũguo.”" 
Genesis30:15 No Lea akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩ ta kuuga ndũiganĩĩtwo nĩ kũnduunya mũthuuri? Rĩu ningĩ ũrenda gũkuua matunda ma mũrũ wakwa?”Naake Rakeli akiuga atĩrĩ, “Wona wahe matunda ma mũũrũguo, nĩũgũkoma na Jakubu ũtukũ wa ũũmũũthĩ.”" 
Genesis30:16 Hwaĩinĩ rĩrĩa Jakubu oimaga mũgũnda, Lea akĩmũtũnga akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũtukũ wa ũũmũũthĩ ũgũkoma na niĩ, amu nĩngũgũrire na matunda marĩa mahaana nathi ma mũrũ wakwa.” Naake Jakubu agĩkoma naake ũtukũ ũcio." 
Genesis30:17 Naake Ngai akĩigua mahooya ma Lea, naake Lea akĩgĩa nda agĩciarĩra Jakubu kaana ga kahĩĩ ga gataano." 
Genesis30:18 Naake Lea akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ngai nĩanengereete kĩheeo gĩakwa tondũ nĩndanengerire mũthuuri wakwa ndungata yakwa ya mũirĩĩtu;” kwoguo agĩgatua Isakaru." 
Genesis30:19 Lea nĩacookire akĩgĩa nda rĩngĩ agĩciarĩra Jakubu kaana ga kahĩĩ ga gatandatũ. 
Genesis30:20 Akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ngai nĩaheete kĩheeo kĩega. Rĩu mũthuuri wakwa nĩekũnjĩtĩkĩra tondũ nĩndĩmũciarĩire twana twa tũhĩĩ tũtandatũ;” kwoguo agĩgatua Zebuluni." 
Genesis30:21 Thuuthainĩ nĩacookire agĩciara kairĩĩtu agĩgatua Dina. 
Genesis30:22 Ngai nĩakĩririkanire Rakeli; akĩmũcookeria mahooya maake agĩtũma ahote kũgĩa na ciana. 
Genesis30:23 Nĩagĩire nda agĩciara kaana ga kahĩĩ. Akiuga atĩrĩ, “Rĩu Ngai nĩehereetie gĩconoko gĩakwa na ũndũ wa kũũhe kaana ga kahĩĩ." 
Genesis30:24 MWATHANI arohe kaana kangĩ ga kahĩĩ;” kwoguo agĩgatua Josefu. 
Genesis30:25 Thuutha wa Rakeli gũciara Josefu, Jakubu akĩĩra Labani atĩrĩ, “Reke thiĩ nĩ geetha njooke mũciĩ na bũrũri witũ." 
Genesis30:26 He atumia aakwa na ciana iria ngĩĩte nacio nĩ ũndũ wa gũgũtungatĩra, ndĩthiĩre. Wee nĩũũĩ ũrĩa ngũtungatĩire.”" 
Genesis30:27 No Labani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Reke njuge nĩmenyithĩĩtio nĩ MWATHANI atĩ nĩandaathimĩĩte nĩ ũndũ waku." 
Genesis30:28 Gweta mũcaara waku na nĩngũkũrĩha.” 
Genesis30:29 Jakubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Wee mwene nĩũũĩ ũrĩa ngũtungatĩire, na nĩũũĩ ũrĩa mahiũ maaku maingĩhĩĩte ngĩmarĩithia." 
Genesis30:30 Amu itanooka, mahiũ maaku matiarĩ maingĩ no rĩu nĩmaingĩhĩĩte mũno na MWATHANI nĩakũraathimĩĩte kũrĩa guothe ndĩrathiaga. No rĩĩrĩ, niĩ ngaagĩthũkũmĩra mũciĩ wakwa rĩ?”" 
Genesis30:31 Labani akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũkwenda ngũrĩhe kĩ?”Jakubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndirĩ mũcaara ngwenda; no nĩngũthiĩ na mbere gũkũrĩithĩria wetĩkĩra rĩciiria rĩĩrĩ." 
Genesis30:32 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, reke thiĩ rũũruinĩ rwaku ũũmũũthĩ nyamũre ng'ondu ciothe irĩ maara, na iria irĩ rumbĩ na iria ciothe irĩ mbirũ, nacio mbũri nyamũre iria ciothe irĩ maara, na iria njũgũ, ndĩcieherie. Ũcio nĩguo mũcaara ũrĩa ngwenda." 
Genesis30:33 Thuuthainĩ rĩrĩa ũgooka kũrora mũcaara wakwa nĩũkeeyonera kana ndĩ mwĩhokeku. Ũngĩkangora ndĩ na mbũri ĩtarĩ maara kana njũgũ kana ng'ondu ĩtarĩ mbirũ, ũkaamenya atĩ nĩyakũiywo.”" 
Genesis30:34 Labani agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Nĩndeetĩkĩra. Tũgwĩka ũguo woiga.”" 
Genesis30:35 No rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũcio Labani akĩeheria thenge iria ciarĩ manyaga, na iria maara, na mĩgoma yothe ĩrĩa yarĩ njũgũ na ĩrĩa maara, mbũri ciothe ciarĩ manyaga agĩcieheria o hamwe na ng'ondu ciothe ciarĩ mbirũ, icio agĩcinengera aariũ aake macirĩithagie." 
Genesis30:36 Naake agĩthiĩ rũgendo rwa thikũ ithatũ nacio kũndũ kũraaya aciehererie Jakubu. Jakubu agĩtigĩirwo mahiũ macio mangĩ ma Labani amarorage. 
Genesis30:37 Jakubu agĩcaria thanju cia mũtĩ wa mũribaana, na wa mũroothi, na wa mũarimaũ, agĩciũnũra mĩcoro mĩerũ, agĩtũma handũ hamwe harĩa heerũ ha thĩinĩ wa thanju icio honeke." 
Genesis30:38 Agĩcooka agĩcikia mbere ya mahiũ harĩa maathiaga kũnyua maaĩ. Aacikirie hau nĩ tondũ mahiũ maahaicanaga mathiĩ kũnyua maaĩ. 
Genesis30:39 Kwoguo mahiũ maahaicanĩra thanjuinĩ icio, maaciaraga tũũri twĩ na manyaga, na twĩ njũgũ, na twĩ maara." 
Genesis30:40 Jakubu nĩamũranirie mbũri na ng'ondu na akĩroria moothiũ maacio mwena ũrĩa mahiũ ma Labani marĩa maarĩ manyaga na marĩa maarĩ njũgũ na marĩa maarĩ maara maarĩ. Ũguo nĩguo Jakubu aathondekire mahiũ maake, na akĩmaamũrania na ma Labani." 
Genesis30:41 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa mahiũ marĩa me na hinya marahaicana, Jakubu aigaga thanju icio mbere yamo harĩa maanyuagĩra maaĩ nĩ geetha mahaicanĩre gatagatĩ ga thanju icio." 
Genesis30:42 No ndaigaga thanju icio rĩrĩa marĩa matarĩ hinya marahaicana. Kwoguo mahiũ ma Labani magĩkorwo arĩ marĩa matarĩ hinya, namo ma Jakubu magĩkorwo arĩ marĩa me na hinya." 
Genesis30:43 Jakubu agĩgĩtonga mũno na njĩra ĩyo, akĩgĩa mahiũ maingĩ, ndungata, ngamĩĩra na ndigiri." 
Genesis31:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jakubu nĩaiguire atĩ aariũ a Labani nĩmoigaga atĩrĩ, “Jakubu nĩakuuĩĩte indo ciothe iria ciarĩ cia baaba. Ũtonga ũyũ wake wothe uumĩĩte harĩ indo iria baaba aarĩ nacio.”" 
Genesis31:2 O na nĩonire atĩ Labani ndamwendeete ta ũrĩa aamwendeete mbere. 
Genesis31:3 MWATHANI nĩakĩĩrire Jakubu atĩrĩ, “Cooka bũrũriinĩ wa maithe maaku, o kũu kũrĩ andũ aanyu, na nĩndĩkoragwo ndĩ hamwe nawe.”" 
Genesis31:4 Kwoguo Jakubu agĩtũmanĩra Rakeli na Lea akĩmeera matũngane werũinĩ kũrĩa mahiũ maake maarĩ. 
Genesis31:5 Nĩameerire atĩrĩ, “Nĩndĩroona atĩ thooguo ndanyendeete ta ũrĩa aranyendeete; no rĩĩrĩ, Ngai wa baaba nĩakoreetwo hamwe na niĩ." 
Genesis31:6 Inyuĩ nĩmũũĩ atĩ ndũũraga ndungatagĩra ithe wanyu na hinya wakwa wothe. 
Genesis31:7 No rĩĩrĩ, ithe wanyu nĩaheeneetie na akagarũra mũcaara wakwa maita ikũmi, no Ngai ndarĩ aamwĩtĩkĩria anjĩke ũũru." 
Genesis31:8 Ithe wanyu angĩanjĩĩrire atĩrĩ, ‘Mbũri ciothe iria irĩciaragwo i njũgũ nĩcio mũcaara waku,’ mbũri ciothe ciaciaraga tũũri twĩ njũgũ. Anjĩĩra atĩ, ‘Iria i manyaga nĩ ciaku,’ mahiũ moothe maaciaraga tũũri twĩ manyaga." 
Genesis31:9 Kwoguo Ngai nĩatuunyĩĩte ithe wanyu mahiũ maake akaahe. 
Genesis31:10 “Mahinda marĩa mahiũ maahaicanaga, nĩndagĩire na kĩrooto ngĩona thenge iria ciahaicaga mbũri ciarĩ na manyaga, njũgũ na mbuu." 
Genesis31:11 Naake mũraika wa Ngai akĩnjĩĩra kĩrootoinĩ atĩrĩ, ‘Jakubu!’ Na niĩ ngiuga atĩrĩ, ‘Ĩ niĩ ũyũ haaha!’" 
Genesis31:12 ‘Tarora wone! Thenge ciothe iria irahaica i na manyaga, njũgũ na mbuu. Ndĩratũma gwĩkĩke ũguo nĩ tondũ nĩnyoneete ũrĩa Labani aragwĩka." 
Genesis31:13 Nĩ niĩ Ngai ũrĩa wakuumĩrĩire Betheli harĩa wamũrire ihiga rĩa kĩririkano na ũndũ wa kũrĩitĩrĩria maguta, o harĩa wehĩtĩire mbere yakwa. Rĩu wĩhaarĩrie ũcooke kũrĩa waciarĩirwo.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Nao Rakeli na Lea makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ tũtirĩ kĩndũ tũtigĩĩtie kũgaya kuuma kũrĩ ithe witũ." 
Genesis31:15 Rĩu githĩ ndatuonaga ta tũrĩ ndũũrĩrĩ? Amu aatwendirie na akĩhũthĩra mbeeca ciothe iria aarĩhirwo nĩ ũndũ witũ. 
Genesis31:16 Ũtonga ũyũ wothe Ngai atuunyĩĩte ithe witũ nĩ witũ na ciana ciitũ. Ũrĩa wothe Ngai akwĩrĩĩte wĩke, ĩka.”" 
Genesis31:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jakubu nĩahaarĩirie gũthiĩ, akĩhaicia ciana ciake na atumia aake ngamĩĩra igũrũ;" 
Genesis31:18 agĩcooka akiumagaria mahiũ maake moothe o hamwe na indo ciothe iria aathũkũmĩĩte Mesopotamia, nĩ geetha acooke bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani kũrĩ ithe Isaaka." 
Genesis31:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Labani aathiĩte kwenja ng'ondu ciake guoya, naake Rakeli akĩiya ngai cia mũciĩ cia ithe." 
Genesis31:20 Jakubu nĩaheenirie Labani, tondũ ndamũmenyithirie atĩ nĩekwenda gũthiĩ." 
Genesis31:21 Agĩkĩoya indo ciake ciothe, akĩũra, akĩringa rũũĩ rwa Farati, akĩerekera bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Gileadi." 
Genesis31:22 Mũthenya wa gatatũ Labani nĩerirwo atĩ Jakubu nĩorire. 
Genesis31:23 Naake akĩoya andũ akĩmũrũmĩrĩra mĩthenya mũgwanja o nginya akĩmũkinyĩra bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa wĩ irĩma wa Gileadi. 
Genesis31:24 No rĩĩrĩ, Ngai nĩoimĩrĩire Labani kĩrootoinĩ ũtukũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Menyerera ndũkaae kwĩra Jakubu ũndũ mwega kana mũũru o na ũrĩkũ.”" 
Genesis31:25 Labani nĩakinyĩrire Jakubu aambĩĩte hema yake kĩrĩmainĩ, naake Labani na andũ aake makĩamba yao bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ irĩma wa Gileadi." 
Genesis31:26 Labani nĩoririe Jakubu atĩrĩ, “Nĩ atĩa ũguo wĩkĩĩte, ũkaheenia, ũgakuua airĩĩtu aakwa ta atumia matahĩĩtwo mbaarainĩ?" 
Genesis31:27 Wathiire na hitho, ũkĩheenia nĩkĩ, ũkĩrega kũũnjĩĩra nĩ geetha nguumagarie na nyĩmbo gũkĩhũũragwo tamburini na inanda?" 
Genesis31:28 O na ndwarekire mumunye airĩĩtu aakwa na ciana ciao ndĩmoigĩre ũhoro? Wee nĩwekire ũndũ wa ũrimũ! 
Genesis31:29 Niĩ ndĩ na hinya wa gũgwĩka ũũru; no rĩĩrĩ, ũtukũ Ngai wa thooguo nĩarangaanirie na kĩrooto aranjĩĩra atĩ ndigakwĩre ũndũ o wothe mwega kana mũũru." 
Genesis31:30 Nĩnjũũĩ wathiire nĩ tondũ nĩwaiguaga wĩrirĩirie gũcooka kwanyu, no rĩĩrĩ, wakĩiyire ngai ciakwa cia mũciĩ nĩkĩ?”" 
Genesis31:31 Jakubu nĩamũcookeirie atĩrĩ, “Nĩndetigĩrire nĩ tondũ ndeciiririe atĩ wahota kũnduunya airĩĩtu aaku." 
Genesis31:32 No rĩĩrĩ, wona mũndũ wĩ na ngai ciaku, nĩekũũragwo. Kĩndũ kĩrĩa ndĩ nakĩo gĩaku, kĩgwete rĩu haaha mbere ya andũ aakwa na aaku.” No rĩĩrĩ, Jakubu ndamenyaga atĩ Rakeli nĩaiyĩte ngai cia ithe." 
Genesis31:33 Labani nĩagĩtoonyire gũcaria ngai ciake thĩinĩ wa hema ya Jakubu, ya Lea, na cia ndungata iria igĩrĩ cia airĩĩtu, no ndacionire. Nĩacookire agĩtoonya thĩinĩ wa hema ya Rakeli." 
Genesis31:34 Rakeli nĩ we woeete ngai cia mũciĩ cia ithe, agaciĩkĩra matandĩkoinĩ ma ngamĩĩra, agaciikarĩra. Labani nĩouruuririe hema yothe, no ndacionire." 
Genesis31:35 Rakeli nĩerire ithe atĩrĩ, “Baaba, ndũkaae kũndaakarĩra, amu ndingĩhota kũrũũgama mbere yaku tondũ ndĩ na mweri.” Labani agĩgĩcicaria, no ndacionire." 
Genesis31:36 Jakubu nĩatetirie Labani e na maraakara akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ihĩtia rĩakwa-rĩ, nĩ rĩrĩkũ? Rĩĩhia rĩakwa rĩrĩa rĩtũmĩĩte ũndeng'erie-rĩ, nĩ rĩrĩkũ?" 
Genesis31:37 Nĩwouruuria indoinĩ ciakwa ciothe, nĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩkũ kĩa nyũmba gĩaku wona? Kĩige haaha mbere ya andũ aakwa na andũ aaku nĩ geetha matũtuithanie." 
Genesis31:38 Mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ tũtũũraga nawe; mbũri na ng'ondu ciaku itirĩ ciahuna, na ndirĩ ndarĩa ndũrũme o na ĩmwe kuuma mahiũinĩ macio." 
Genesis31:39 Ng'ondu ĩngĩoragirwo nĩ nyamũ cia gĩthaka, nĩndakũrĩhaga, na ndiakũreehagĩra nguonie atĩ ti mahĩtia maakwa. Kĩrĩa kĩngĩaiyirwo mũthenya kana ũtukũ, wanjĩĩraga ngũrĩhe." 
Genesis31:40 Na rĩĩrĩ, maita maingĩ nĩndathĩĩnĩkaga mũthenya nĩ ũndũ wa ũrugarĩ, na ũtukũ nĩ ũndũ wa heho, o na toro wakwa nĩworire." 
Genesis31:41 Mĩaka ĩyo mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ ngoreetwo gwaku-rĩ, mĩaka ikũmi na ĩna ndarutire nĩguo hikie airĩĩtu aaku eerĩ, na mĩaka ĩtandatũ nĩ ũndũ wa mahiũ maaku, na mũcaara wakwa ũũgarũranĩĩtie maita ikũmi." 
Genesis31:42 Korwo Ngai wa maithe maakwa, na nĩ we Ngai wa Aburahamu na Ngai wa Isaaka, ndakoragwo e hamwe na niĩ-rĩ, ũngĩanyingatire itarĩ kĩndũ. No Ngai nĩonire mathĩĩna maakwa na wĩra ũrĩa ndutĩĩte, na nĩkĩo hwaĩ aragũkaanirie.”" 
Genesis31:43 Labani nĩacookeirie Jakubu atĩrĩ, “Airĩĩtu aya nĩ aarĩ aakwa, ciana ciao nĩ ciakwa, na mahiũ maya nĩ maakwa. Indo ici ciothe ũroona haaha nĩ ciakwa. No ũũmũũthĩ ũyũ-rĩ, nĩ atĩa ingĩĩka airĩĩtu aya aakwa na ciana ici maciarĩĩte?" 
Genesis31:44 Ũka tũthondeke kĩrĩĩkanĩro. Reke tũcookanĩrĩrie mahiga kĩrũndo magũtũririkanagia kĩrĩĩkanĩro giitũ.” 
Genesis31:45 Kwoguo Jakubu akĩoya ihiga akĩrĩhanda rĩtuĩke rĩa kũmaririkania. 
Genesis31:46 Agĩcooka akĩĩra andũ aake moonganie mahiga. Nao makĩũngania mahiga makĩmacookanĩrĩria kĩrũndo, magĩcooka makĩrĩĩra hau hakuhĩ na mahiga macio." 
Genesis31:47 Labani nĩatuire handũ hau Jegari Sahadutha, naake Jakubu akĩhatua Galeedi." 
Genesis31:48 Labani nĩoigire atĩrĩ, “Kĩrũndo gĩĩkĩ kĩa mahiga gĩgũkorwo kĩrĩ gĩa gũtũririkanagia ithuerĩ.” Nĩkĩo handũ hau haatuirwo Galeedi." 
Genesis31:49 Ningĩ Labani nĩerire Jakubu atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI aroikaraga atũcũũthĩrĩirie twarĩĩkia gũtigana.” Nĩkĩo handũ hau heetirwo Mizipa." 
Genesis31:50 Labani nĩathiire na mbere na mĩario akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ũngĩgaathĩĩnia airĩĩtu aya aakwa kana ũhikie atumia angĩ, o na angĩkorwo ndigaakorwo ngĩmenya, ririkanaga atĩ Ngai nĩaratuona." 
Genesis31:51 Gĩĩkĩ nĩ kĩrũndo kĩa mahiga marĩa ndacookanĩrĩria gatagatĩ gaakwa nawe, na rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo ihiga rĩa kĩririkano." 
Genesis31:52 Kĩrũndo gĩĩkĩ kĩa mahiga, na ihiga rĩĩrĩ rĩa kĩririkano nĩciagũtũririkanagia atĩ niĩ ndikaanacihĩtũke njũke ngũthoorie, nawe ndũkaanacihĩtũke ũũke ũthoorie." 
Genesis31:53 Ngai wa Aburahamu na Ngai wa Nahori nĩagaatũtuithania.” Naake Jakubu akĩĩhĩta na rĩĩtwa rĩa Ngai ũrĩa ithe Isaaka aathaathayagia atĩ nĩekũhingia mwĩhĩtwa ũcio. 
Genesis31:54 Jakubu nĩarutire igongoona kĩrĩmainĩ, na agĩĩtĩra andũ aao iruga, na marĩĩkia kũrĩa makĩraara kũu kĩrĩmainĩ." 
Genesis31:55 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ kĩrooko tene, Labani akĩmumunya aarĩ aake na ciana ciao na akimoigĩra ũhoro, agĩcooka akĩmatiga, akĩinũka." 
Genesis32:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jakubu athianga na mbere na rũgendo rwake, nĩatũngirwo nĩ araika." 
Genesis32:2 Aamoona nĩoigire atĩrĩ, “Ĩno nĩ mbũtũ ya ita ya Ngai!” Kwoguo handũ hau akĩhatua Mahanaimu." 
Genesis32:3 Jakubu nĩatũmire andũ mbere mathiĩ kũrĩ mũrũ wa nyina Esau bũrũriinĩ wa Edomu 
Genesis32:4 makamwĩre atĩrĩ: “Ndungata yaku Jakubu ĩroiga atĩrĩ, ‘Ndĩratuũraga ũgeniinĩ kwa Labani." 
Genesis32:5 Ndĩ na ng'ombe, ndigiri, mbũri, ng'ondu, na ndungata. Rĩu ndĩragũtũmanĩra, wee mwathi wakwa, nĩ geetha njĩtĩkĩrĩke nĩ we.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 Rĩrĩa andũ arĩa Jakubu aatũmĩĩte maacookire nĩmaamwĩrire atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũraathiire kũrĩ mũrũ wa maitũguo Esau, na nĩarooka gũgũtũnga e na andũ magana mana (400).”" 
Genesis32:7 Jakubu agĩkĩigua guoya na agĩĩtigĩra; agĩkĩgayania andũ arĩa aarĩ nao, o hamwe na ng'ondu, mbũri, ng'ombe, na ngamĩĩra ikundi igĩrĩ." 
Genesis32:8 Agĩĩka ũguo eeciiragia atĩ, Esau angĩrũa na gĩkundi kĩmwe, kĩu kĩngĩ nĩgĩkũgĩa na mweke wa gwĩthara." 
Genesis32:9 Naake Jakubu nĩahoire atĩrĩ, “Ngai wa guuka Aburahamu, na Ngai wa baaba Isaaka taathikĩrĩria! Wee, MWATHANI, nĩ we wanjĩĩrire atĩ njooke bũrũriinĩ witũ kũrĩ andũ aitũ, na nĩũkanjĩka wega." 
Genesis32:10 Niĩ ndungata yaku ndiagĩrĩirwo nĩ ũtugi wothe na maũndũ moothe ma kwĩhokeka marĩa ũnjĩkĩĩte. Ndaringire rũũĩ rwa Jorodani ndĩ o na mũthĩĩgi tu, na rĩu ndacooka na ikundi igĩrĩ." 
Genesis32:11 Ndakũhooya ũngitĩre harĩ mũrũ wa maitũ Esau, amu nĩndĩramwĩtigĩra, tondũ ahota gũũka atũtharĩkĩre, atũniine ithuothe, o hamwe na atumia na ciana." 
Genesis32:12 No wee nĩwanjĩĩrire atĩ nĩũkaanjĩka wega, na atĩ nĩũkaahe njiarwa nyingĩ ta mũthanga wa iriainĩ ũrĩa ũtangĩtarĩka nĩ ũndũ wa kũingĩha.”" 
Genesis32:13 Ũtukũ ũcio agĩkĩraara hau, na agĩthuura kĩheeo gĩa kũhe mũrũ wa nyina Esau kuuma harĩ mahiũ maake." 
Genesis32:14 Agĩthuura mbũri cia mĩgoma magana meerĩ na thenge mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ, ng'ondu magana meerĩ na ndũrũme mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ," 
Genesis32:15 ngamĩĩra cia gũkamwo mĩrongo ĩtatũ na tũcaũ twacio, ng'ombe mĩrongo ĩna na ndeegwa ikũmi, na ndigiri cia mĩgoma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na cia njamba ikũmi." 
Genesis32:16 Nĩacigayanirie ndũũru na akĩĩra ndungata ikarora rũũru rũmwe. Nĩerire ndungata atĩrĩ, “Thiĩi mbere yakwa na mũtigaakorwo mũtukanĩĩtie ndũũru, rũmwe rũkorwo rwĩ mbere ya rũrĩa rũngĩ.”" 
Genesis32:17 Nĩerire ndungata ĩrĩa yarĩ na rũũru rwa mbere atĩrĩ, “Wona mwacemania na Esau mũrũ wa maitũ akũũrie atĩrĩ, ‘Mũnene wanyu nĩ ũrĩkũ? Mwathiĩ kũ? Mahiũ maya me mbere nĩ ma ũ?’" 
Genesis32:18 Mũmũcookerie atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ ma ndungata yaku Jakubu. Amatũmĩĩte me kĩheeo kũrĩ mũnene wake Esau. Jakubu we mwene arĩ o haaha thuutha witũ.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 O na ndungata ya rũũru rwa keerĩ, o na ya rwa gatatũ, o na icio ingĩ ciothe ciarũũgamĩrĩire ndũũru agĩciĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwĩre Esau atĩrĩ mwatũngana naake," 
Genesis32:20 ‘Ĩĩ, ndungata yaku ĩrĩ o haaha thuutha witũ.’ ” Jakubu eĩraga atĩrĩ, “Ngũmũhooreria na iheeo icio igũthiĩ mbere, na tuonana hiihi nĩekũnjohera.”" 
Genesis32:21 Mahiũ macio ma kũheanwo agĩkiuga mathiĩ mbere, naake akĩraara hau aambĩĩte hema ũtukũ ũcio." 
Genesis32:22 Ũtukũ o ro ũcio Jakubu nĩokĩrire akĩoya atumia aake eerĩ, ndungata iria igĩrĩ cia airĩĩtu, na ciana ciake ikũmi na ũmwe, makĩringa rũũĩ rwa Jaboku." 
Genesis32:23 Aamaringia nĩacookire akĩringia indo icio ingĩ ciake ciothe," 
Genesis32:24 nowe agĩtigwo thuutha e wiki.Na rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ agĩũka akĩgiana na Jakubu nginya o hakuhĩ rũũciinĩ." 
Genesis32:25 Na rĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio oonire atĩ ndehota Jakubu makĩgiana, akĩmũgũtha gĩtinainĩ gĩa kũgũrũ, nakuo kũgũrũ gũgĩthenyũka." 
Genesis32:26 Mũndũ ũcio nĩerire Jakubu atĩrĩ, “Reke thiĩ tondũ nĩkũraakĩa.”Naake Jakubu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ndingĩreka ũthiĩ ũtandaathimĩĩte.”" 
Genesis32:27 Mũndũ ũcio nĩakĩmũũririe atĩrĩ, “Wĩtagwo atĩa?”Naake Jakubu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Njĩtagwo Jakubu.”" 
Genesis32:28 Naake mũndũ ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ndũgũcooka gwĩtwo Jakubu, ũrĩĩtagwo Isiraeli; tondũ ũgiyanĩĩte na Ngai na ũkagiyana na andũ, na ũkahootana.”" 
Genesis32:29 Jakubu nĩakĩmwĩrire atĩrĩ, “Ndagũthaitha, njĩĩra wĩtagwo atĩa.”Naake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ũrenda kũmenya rĩĩtwa rĩakwa nĩkĩ?” Mũndũ ũcio nĩagĩcookire akĩraathima Jakubu." 
Genesis32:30 Jakubu nĩoigire atĩrĩ, “Nĩnyonanĩĩte ũthiũ kwa ũthiũ na Ngai, na ndĩ o muoyo.” Kwoguo agĩtua handũ hau Penieli." 
Genesis32:31 Riũa rĩarathire Jakubu akiuma Penieli, na nĩathuaga nĩ ũndũ wa harĩa aagũthĩĩtwo gĩtinainĩ gĩa kũgũrũ." 
Genesis32:32 Nginyagia ũũmũũthĩ andũ a Isiraeli matirĩaga mĩkiha ĩrĩa ĩ gĩtinainĩ gĩa kũgũrũ, amu mĩkiha ĩyo nĩ yo Jakubu aaringĩĩtwo." 
Genesis33:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jakubu agĩtiira maitho, akĩona Esau agĩũka e na andũ magana mana (400). Kwoguo akĩgayanĩria Lea na Rakeli o na ndũngata iria igĩrĩ cia airĩĩtu, o mũndũ ciana ciake." 
Genesis33:2 Ndũngata icio igĩrĩ cia airĩĩtu na ciana ciacio igĩtongoria, Lea na ciana ciake makĩrũmĩrĩra, naake Rakeli na Josefu makĩrigia." 
Genesis33:3 Jakubu we mwene agĩthiĩ mbere yao, akĩinamagĩrĩra akĩhuutagia thĩ maita mũgwanja, nginya agĩkuhĩrĩria mũrũ wa nyina." 
Genesis33:4 No rĩĩrĩ, Esau agĩteng'era kũmũtũnga, akĩmũnyiita, akĩmũhĩmbĩria na akĩmũmumunya. Nao eerĩ makĩrĩranĩra." 
Genesis33:5 Rĩrĩa Esau ainamũkire akĩona atumia na ciana akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Andũ aya wĩ nao-rĩ, nĩ a?”Naake Jakubu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mwathi wakwa! Ici nĩ ciana iria Ngai andaanahĩire nacio, akaahe nĩ ũndũ wa wega wake.”" 
Genesis33:6 Nacio ndungata iria cia airĩĩtu na ciana ciacio igĩũka hakuhĩ, ikĩinamĩrĩra." 
Genesis33:7 Naake Lea na ciana ciake o taguo magĩũka hakuhĩ, makĩinamĩrĩra. Mũthiainĩ Rakeli na Josefu o nao magĩũka hakuhĩ, makĩinamĩrĩra." 
Genesis33:8 Naake Esau nĩoririe atĩrĩ, “Ikundi iria ingĩ ndĩracemanirie nacio-rĩ, ũrendaga kuonania atĩa nacio?”Naake Jakubu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Iraarĩ cia gũtũma njĩtĩkĩrĩke nĩwe.”" 
Genesis33:9 No Esau akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũrũ wa maitũ, niĩ ndĩ na indo cia kũigana; ikara na iria wĩ nacio.”" 
Genesis33:10 Naake Jakubu akiuga atĩrĩ, “Aaca, ndagũthaitha. Angĩkorwo nĩnjĩtĩkĩrĩkĩĩte nĩwe, amũkĩra kĩheeo gĩakwa. Ngũkwĩra na ma atĩ kuona ũthiũ waku no ta kuona ũthiũ wa Ngai, amu nĩwanyamũkĩra na wendo mũnene." 
Genesis33:11 Ndagũthaitha amũkĩra kĩheeo kĩu ngũreeheire; Ngai nĩanjiguĩrĩire tha akaahe kĩrĩa gĩothe ingĩenda.” Jakubu agĩkĩringĩrĩria Esau nginya agĩĩtĩkĩra. 
Genesis33:12 Esau agĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũthiĩ, na nĩ niĩ ngũgũtongoria.”" 
Genesis33:13 No Jakubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Wee nĩũũĩ atĩ ciana itirĩ na hinya, na ningĩ mbũri na ng'ombe iria irongithia no niĩ ndĩracirora. Ingĩhanyũkio, o na angĩkorwo no mũthenya ũmwe tu, ciothe no gũkua." 
Genesis33:14 Ndagũthaitha, mwathi wakwa, thiaga mbere yakwa, na niĩ njũkage o kahora, ndwaranĩĩte na mahiũ na ciana o nginya ngaagũkora Edomu.”" 
Genesis33:15 Esau agĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “Kĩreke ngũtigĩre andũ amwe a arĩa ndĩ nao.”Naake Jakubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Hatirĩ bata, amu kĩrĩa ngwendaga no gwĩtĩkĩrĩka nĩwe.”" 
Genesis33:16 Kwoguo mũthenya o ro ũcio Esau agĩcooka Edomu. 
Genesis33:17 No Jakubu agĩthiĩ Sukothu, agĩaka nyũmba yake kuo, na agĩakĩra mahiũ maake ciugũ; nĩkĩo kũndũ kũu gwetirwo Sukothu." 
Genesis33:18 Jakubu, oimĩĩte Mesopotamia, nĩakinyire na thaayũ itũũrainĩ rĩa Shekemu bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani, na agĩaka kambĩ yake hakuhĩ na itũũra rĩu." 
Genesis33:19 Handũ hau aakire, aahagũrire mbeeca cia betha igana rĩmwe kuuma kũrĩ njiarwa cia Hamori ithe wa Shekemu." 
Genesis33:20 Nĩakire kĩgongoona hau na agĩgĩtua Ngai, Ngai wa Isiraeli." 
Genesis34:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũmwe Dina, mwarĩ wa Jakubu na Lea, nĩathiire gũceerera airĩĩtu a Kanaani." 
Genesis34:2 Rĩrĩa Shekemu mũrũ wa Hamori ũrĩa warĩ Mũhivi aamuonire, akĩmũnyiita na hinya agĩkoma naake. Na rĩĩrĩ, Hamori nĩ we warĩ mũnene bũrũri ũcio." 
Genesis34:3 Na rĩĩrĩ, Shekemu nĩaguucĩrĩirio mũno nĩ mũirĩĩtu ũcio o nginya akĩigua amwendeete, na akĩgeria kũmuuha." 
Genesis34:4 Kwoguo Shekemu akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ, “Nĩngwenda ũũrie ithe wa mũirĩĩtu ũyũ eetĩkĩre mwarĩ atuĩke mũtumia wakwa.”" 
Genesis34:5 Jakubu nĩaiguire atĩ Shekemu nĩathaahĩĩtie mwarĩ, no tondũ aariũ aake maarĩ rũũru, agĩkirĩrĩria nginya magĩũka." 
Genesis34:6 Hamori, ithe wa Shekemu, ookire kwaria na Jakubu" 
Genesis34:7 rĩrĩa aariũ a Jakubu moimaga rũũru. Rĩrĩa maiguire ũhoro ũcio, makĩmaka na makĩraakara mũno nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo Shekemu eekĩĩte. Shekemu nĩarumĩĩte andũ a Isiraeli tondũ wa gũkoma na mwarĩ wa Jakubu kĩa hinya." 
Genesis34:8 Hamori akĩĩra Jakubu atĩrĩ, “Mũrũ wakwa Shekemu nĩendeete mwarĩguo; ndagũthaitha ũreke amũhikie." 
Genesis34:9 Nĩtũiguithanĩrie atĩ nĩtũrĩhikagia airĩĩtu aanyu, na inyuĩ mũkahikia airĩĩtu aitũ." 
Genesis34:10 No mũtũũranagie na ithuĩ gũũkũ bũrũriinĩ witũ, mũikarage o harĩa mũngĩenda, mũhũũrage mbiacara mũtegwĩtigĩra, na mwĩgĩĩre na indo cianyu.”" 
Genesis34:11 Naake Shekemu akĩĩra Jakubu na aariũ a nyina na Dina atĩrĩ, “Njĩtĩkĩraai na nĩngũmũraacĩria kĩrĩa gĩothe mũkwenda." 
Genesis34:12 Njĩĩraai iheeo iria ciothe mũkwenda, na mwĩtie rũraacio rũnene o ta ũrĩa mũngĩenda; nĩngũmũnengera o kĩrĩa gĩothe mũgwĩtia, mwanjĩtĩkĩria ndĩmũhikie.”" 
Genesis34:13 Na rĩĩrĩ, tondũ Shekemu nĩekĩĩte Dina, mwarĩ wa ithe wao, ũndũ wa gĩconoko, aariũ acio a Jakubu nĩmaacookeirie Shekemu na ithe Hamori na ũhinga" 
Genesis34:14 makĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ tũtingĩreka mwarĩ wa baaba ahikio nĩ mũndũ ũtarĩ mũruu; ũndũ ta ũcio ũngĩkorwo ũrĩ wa gũtũconorithia." 
Genesis34:15 Ithuĩ tũngĩĩtĩkĩra amũhikie angĩkorwo nĩmũkwamba kũhaanana na ithuĩ; arũme aanyu oothe maambe marue ta ithuĩ. 
Genesis34:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩtũgwĩtĩkĩra mũhikagie airĩĩtu aitũ, na ithuĩ tũhikagie aanyu, na tũgĩtũũranie na inyuĩ tũtuĩke andũ amwe." 
Genesis34:17 Mwaga kũrua, tũkuoya mũirĩĩtu witũ twĩthiĩre.”" 
Genesis34:18 Ciugo icio ciao nĩciakenirie Hamori na mũũrũwe Shekemu. 
Genesis34:19 Shekemu ndateire ihinda ateekĩĩte ũguo eerirwo, amu nĩendeete mwarĩ wa Jakubu. Shekemu nĩ we waheetwo gĩtĩĩo mũno mũciĩ kwao." 
Genesis34:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, Hamori na mũũrũwe Shekemu nĩmaathiire kĩhingoinĩ gĩa itũũra, makĩarĩria andũ itũũra rĩu makĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Genesis34:21 “Andũ aya nĩ araata aitũ; rekeei matũũrage gũũkũ na mathiage o harĩa mangĩenda. Bũrũri ũyũ nĩ mũnene wa kũmaigana o nao. Rekeei tũhikagie airĩĩtu aao, nao mahikagie aitũ." 
Genesis34:22 No rĩĩrĩ, andũ aya megwĩtĩkĩra gũtũũrania na ithuĩ, angĩkorwo nĩtũkũruithia arũme aitũ oothe ta ũrĩa o maruĩĩte." 
Genesis34:23 Na githĩ mahiũ maao na indo iria ingĩ ciothe ciao itigũtuĩka ciitũ? Kĩrekeei tũiguithanĩrie atĩ no matũũranie na ithuĩ.” 
Genesis34:24 Andũ oothe a itũũra rĩu makĩiguithanĩria ũhoroinĩ ũcio Hamori na Shekemu moigire; arũme oothe magĩkĩrua. 
Genesis34:25 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya wa gatatũ, na nĩrĩo arũme acio oothe meehĩirwo nĩ ruwo, aariũ eerĩ a Jakubu, nĩ o Simeoni na Lawi, arĩa maarĩ a nyina ũmwe na Dina, makĩoya hiũ ciao cia njora, magĩtoonya itũũrainĩ andũ aakuo materĩgĩrĩire, makĩũraga arũme oothe." 
Genesis34:26 O na nĩmooragire Hamori na Shekemu, magĩcooka makĩruta Dina nyũmba gwa Shekemu, magĩĩthiĩra." 
Genesis34:27 Thuutha wa kũũraganwo, aariũ acio angĩ a Jakubu magĩũka magĩtaha indo itũũrainĩ rĩu nĩguo marĩhĩrie ũndũ wa thoni ũrĩa mwarĩ wa ithe wao eekĩĩtwo." 
Genesis34:28 Nao magĩkuua ng'ondu, mbũri, ng'ombe, ndigiri, na indo iria ingĩ ciarĩ itũũrainĩ rĩu o na iria ciarĩ mĩgũndainĩ." 
Genesis34:29 Maakuuire indo ciothe cia bata, magĩtaha atumia oothe na ciana, na magĩkuua indo ciothe iria ciarĩ nyũmba." 
Genesis34:30 Naake Jakubu nĩerire Simeoni na Lawi atĩrĩ, “Rĩu inyuĩ nĩmwandeehera thĩĩna; Akanaani, Aperizi, na andũ oothe a bũrũri nĩmekũũmena. Andũ acio mangĩcookanĩrĩra manjũkĩrĩre, niĩ na andũ aakwa oothe no kũniinwo tũngĩniinwo tondũ ndirĩ na andũ aingĩ.”" 
Genesis34:31 No o makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ tũtingĩĩtĩkĩra mwarĩ wa maitũ atuuo mũmaraaya.”" 
Genesis35:1 Ngai nĩerire Jakubu atĩrĩ, “Ũkĩra ũthiĩ Betheli ũgatũũre kuo. Na rĩĩrĩ, wakinya kũu, ũnjakĩre kĩgongoona, niĩ Ngai ũrĩa wakuumĩrĩire rĩrĩa woragĩra mũrũ wa maitũguo Esau.”" 
Genesis35:2 Kwoguo Jakubu akĩĩra andũ a mũciĩ wake, o hamwe na arĩa oothe maarĩ naake, atĩrĩ, “Eheriai ngai ng'eni iria mwĩ nacio; mwĩtheriei na mwĩhumbe nguo theru." 
Genesis35:3 Nĩtũkuuma gũũkũ tũthiĩ Betheli ngaakĩre Ngai kĩgongoona. Ngai ũcio nĩ we wandeithirie rĩrĩa ndarĩ na thĩĩna na no we ũtũũraga hamwe na niĩ kũrĩa guothe thiaga.” 
Genesis35:4 Kwoguo makĩnengera Jakubu ngai ng'eni iria maarĩ nacio na icũhĩ iria ciarĩ matũ maao. Naake, agĩcithika rungu rwa mũgandi ũrĩa warĩ hakuhĩ na Shekemu." 
Genesis35:5 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa Jakubu na aariũ aake moohire rũgendo mathiĩ, Ngai agĩtũma andũ a matũũra marĩa mamarigicĩirie manyiitwo nĩ guoya, magĩkĩaga kũmarũmĩrĩra." 
Genesis35:6 Jakubu na andũ aake nĩmaathiire magĩkinya Luzi bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani. Luzi rĩu gwĩtagwo Betheli 
Genesis35:7 Nĩakire kĩgongoona kũu, agĩgĩĩta kũndũ kũu Ngai wa Betheli, amu kũu nĩkuo Ngai aamuumĩrĩire rĩrĩa ooragĩra mũrũ wa nyina." 
Genesis35:8 Naake Debora, mũreri wa Rebeka, agĩkua, agĩthikwo rungu rwa mũgandi warĩ mwena wa na kĩanda wa Betheli. Kwoguo mũtĩ ũcio ũgĩĩtwo “Mũgandi wa Maithori.”" 
Genesis35:9 Rĩrĩa Jakubu aacookire kuuma Mesopotamia, Ngai nĩamuumĩrĩire rĩngĩ akĩmũraathima." 
Genesis35:10 Ngai nĩamwĩrire atĩrĩ, “Wee wĩtagwo Jakubu, no kuuma rĩu ũrĩĩtagwo Isiraeli.” Kwoguo Ngai akĩmũtua Isiraeli." 
Genesis35:11 Ngai akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe. Ciarana; nĩũgaatuĩka ithe wa ndũũrĩrĩ nyingĩ, o na ithe wa athamaki." 
Genesis35:12 Nĩngũkũhe bũrũri ũyũ ũrĩa ndaheire Aburahamu na Isaaka, o na thuuthainĩ nĩngaũhe njiarwa ciaku.”" 
Genesis35:13 Thuutha wa ũguo, Ngai akĩmũtiga." 
Genesis35:14 Naake Jakubu akĩhanda ihiga rĩa kĩririkano hau Ngai aamwarĩirie, akĩrĩitĩrĩria ndibei na maguta, akĩrĩamũra." 
Genesis35:15 Kwoguo agĩtua handũ hau Betheli. 
Genesis35:16 Jakubu na andũ aake nĩmoimire Betheli. Na rĩĩrĩ, marĩ o haraaya na Efiratha, ihinda rĩa Rakeli rĩa kũheeo mwana nĩrĩakinyire, naake akĩgĩa na thĩĩna wa gũciara." 
Genesis35:17 Rĩrĩa ruwo rwa gũcĩara rwarĩ rũnene biũ, mũtumia ũrĩa wamũciarithagia akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Rakeli, ndũgeetigĩre, waheeo kahĩĩ kangĩ.”" 
Genesis35:18 No rĩĩrĩ, Rakeli nĩgũkua aakuaga, no atanatuĩkana, agĩtua kaana kau Benoni, no ithe agĩgatua Benjamini." 
Genesis35:19 Rakeli akua aathikirwo mũkĩrainĩ wa njĩra ya gũthiĩ itũũrainĩ rĩa Efiratha, rĩrĩa rĩu rĩĩtagwo Bethilehemu." 
Genesis35:20 Jakubu nĩahandire ihiga rĩa kĩririkano, na nginya ũũmũũthĩ ihiga rĩu rĩtũire rĩonanagia mbĩĩrĩra ya Rakeli." 
Genesis35:21 Jakubu nĩathiire na mbere na rũgendo, akĩamba hema yake mwena ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa mũnaara wa Ederi." 
Genesis35:22 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa Jakubu aatũũraga bũrũriinĩ ũcio, Reubeni nĩakomire na Biliha ũrĩa warĩ mũtumia wa kũigwo wa ithe, na ithe akĩmenya ũndũ ũcio.Jakubu aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ikũmi na eerĩ." 
Genesis35:23 Aariũ a Lea maarĩ: Reubeni (irigithaathi rĩa Jakubu), Simeoni, Lawi, Juda, Isakaru, na Zebuluni." 
Genesis35:24 Nao aariũ a Rakeli maarĩ: Josefu na Benjamini. 
Genesis35:25 Nao aariũ a Biliha ndungata ya Rakeli ya mũirĩĩtu maarĩ Dani na Nafutali. 
Genesis35:26 Nao aariũ a Zilipa ndungata ya Lea ya mũirĩĩtu maarĩ Gadi na Asheri. Aariũ acio a Jakubu maaciarĩirwo Mesopotamia. 
Genesis35:27 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jakubu nĩathiire Mamure, hakuhĩ na Heburoni, kũrĩ ithe Isaaka. Heburoni nĩkuo Aburahamu na Isaaka maatũũraga tene marĩ ageni." 
Genesis35:28 Isaaka aakuire e wa mĩaka igana na mĩrongo ĩnaana (180). 
Genesis35:29 Aakuire e mũkũrũ mũno, na agĩthikwo nĩ aariũ aake Esau na Jakubu." 
Genesis36:1 Ici nĩcio njiarwa cia Esau ũrĩa wĩtagwo na rĩĩtwa rĩngĩ Edomu. 
Genesis36:2 Esau aahikĩĩtie atumia Akanaani na nĩ o: Ada, mwarĩ wa Eloni ũrĩa Mũhiti; na Oholibama, mwarĩ wa Ana mũrũ wa Zibeoni ũrĩa Mũhivi;" 
Genesis36:3 na Basemathi mwarĩ wa Ishumaeli na nĩ mwarĩ wa nyina na Nebaiothi. 
Genesis36:4 Ada aaciarire Elifazi, Basemathi agĩciara Reueli," 
Genesis36:5 naake Oholibama agĩciara Jeushi, Jalamu na Kora. Aariũ acio oothe a Esau maaciarĩirwo bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani." 
Genesis36:6 Na rĩĩrĩ, Esau nĩakĩoire atumia aake, ciana ciake na andũ oothe a mũciĩ wake, o hamwe na mahiũ maake na indo ciothe iria aathũkũmĩĩte bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani, akĩeherera mũrũ wa nyina Jakubu, agĩthiĩ bũrũri ũngĩ." 
Genesis36:7 Oimire kuo nĩ tondũ kũrĩa we na Jakubu maatũũraga gũtiamaiganaga; maarĩ na mahiũ maingĩ, na matingĩakĩhotire gũthiĩ na mbere gũikara hamwe." 
Genesis36:8 Kwoguo Esau agĩtũũra bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ irĩma wa Edomu. 
Genesis36:9 Ici nĩcio njiarwa cia Esau, ithe wa Aedomu:" 
Genesis36:10 (10-13) Mũtumia wa Esau ũrĩa wetagwo Ada aamũciarĩire mũũriũ ũmwe wetagwo Elifazi. Naake Elifazi aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ataano: Temani, Omari, Zefo, Gatamu na Kenazi. Naake Timina, ũrĩa warĩ mũtumia wa kũigwo wa Elifazi, agĩciara Amaleki.Mũtumia wa Esau ũrĩa wetagwo Basemathi aamũciarĩire o mũũriũ ũmwe wetagwo Reueli. Naake Reueli aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana: Nahathu, Zera, Shama na Miza." 
Genesis36:11 Naake mũtumia wa Esau ũrĩa wetagwo Oholibama, ũrĩa warĩ mwarĩ wa Ana mũrũ wa Zibeoni, aamũciarĩire aariũ atatũ: Jeushi, Jalamu na Kora." 
Genesis36:12 Ici nĩcio mbarĩ iria cioimire harĩ Esau. Mũrũ wa Esau wa mbere ũrĩa wetagwo Elifazi nĩ we warĩ ithe wa mbarĩ ya Temani, Omari, Zefo, Kenazi," 
Genesis36:13 Kora, Gatamu, na Amaleki. Mbarĩ icio ciothe cioimĩĩte harĩ mũtumia wa Esau ũrĩa wetagwo Ada." 
Genesis36:14 Mũrũ wa Esau ũrĩa wetagwo Reueli nĩ we warĩ ithe wa mbarĩ ya Nahathu, Zera, Shama, na Miza. Mbarĩ icio ciothe cioimĩĩte harĩ mũtumia wa Esau ũrĩa wetagwo Basemathi." 
Genesis36:15 Ici nĩcio mbarĩ cia Esau na mũtumia wake Oholibama, mwarĩ wa Ana: Jeushi, Jalamu, na Kora." 
Genesis36:16 Mbarĩ icio ciothe cioimĩĩte harĩ Esau. 
Genesis36:17 (20-21) Andũ arĩa maatũũraga bũrũri wa Edomu kĩambĩrĩria magayanĩĩtio na mĩhĩrĩga ĩrĩa yarĩ ndĩra cia njiarwa ici cia Mũhori wetagwo Seiru: Lotani, Shobali, Zibeoni, Ana, Dishoni, Ezeri na Dishani." 
Genesis36:18 Lotani aarĩ ithe wa mbarĩ ya Hori na ya Hemani. (Lotani aarĩ na mwarĩ wa nyina wetagwo Timina) 
Genesis36:19 Shobali aarĩ ithe wa mbarĩ ya Alivani, Manahathu, Ebali, Shefo, na ya Onamu." 
Genesis36:20 Zibeoni aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Aia na Ana. (Ũyũ nĩ Ana ũrĩa wonire ithima cia maaĩ mahiũ werũinĩ akĩrĩithia ndigiri cia ithe.) 
Genesis36:21 Ana aarĩ ithe wa Dishoni na mũirĩĩtu wetagwo Oholibama. 
Genesis36:22 Dishoni aarĩ ithe wa mbarĩ ya Hemudani, Eshibani, Ithirani, na ya Cherani." 
Genesis36:23 Ezeri nĩ we warĩ ithe wa mbarĩ ya Bilihani, Zaavani, na ya Akani." 
Genesis36:24 Dishani aarĩ ithe wa mbarĩ ya Uzu na ya Arani. 
Genesis36:25 (29-30) Ĩno nĩ yo mĩhĩrĩga ya Ahori arĩa me bũrũriinĩ wa Edomu: Lotani, Shobali, Zibeoni, Ana, Dishoni, Ezeri, na Dishani." 
Genesis36:26 (31-39) Gũtaanagĩa athamaki bũrũriinĩ wa Isiraeli, athamaki aya nĩ o maathanaga bũrũriinĩ wa Edomu kũringana na ũrĩa marũmanĩrĩire:Bela mũrũ wa Beori wa kuuma itũũra rĩa DinihabaJobabu mũrũ wa Zera wa kuuma itũũra rĩa BoziraHushamu wa kuuma bũrũri wa AtemaniHadadi mũrũ wa Bedadi wa kuuma itũũra rĩa Avithi(nĩ we wahootire Amidiani mbaarainĩ ĩrĩayarũĩirwo bũrũriinĩ wa Moabi)Samula wa kuuma itũũra rĩa MasirekaShaulu wa kuuma itũũra rĩa Rehobothu, rũũĩinĩ rwa FaratiBaali Hanani mũrũ wa AkiboruHadadi wa kuuma itũũra rĩa Pau (mũtumia wake eetagwo Mehetabeli, mwarĩ wa Matiredi na mũcũkũrũ wa Mezahabu)." 
Genesis36:26 (31-39) Gũtaanagĩa athamaki bũrũriinĩ wa Isiraeli, athamaki aya nĩ o maathanaga bũrũriinĩ wa Edomu kũringana na ũrĩa marũmanĩrĩire:Bela mũrũ wa Beori wa kuuma itũũra rĩa DinihabaJobabu mũrũ wa Zera wa kuuma itũũra rĩa BoziraHushamu wa kuuma bũrũri wa AtemaniHadadi mũrũ wa Bedadi wa kuuma itũũra rĩa Avithi(nĩ we wahootire Amidiani mbaarainĩ ĩrĩayarũĩirwo bũrũriinĩ wa Moabi)Samula wa kuuma itũũra rĩa MasirekaShaulu wa kuuma itũũra rĩa Rehobothu, rũũĩinĩ rwa FaratiBaali Hanani mũrũ wa AkiboruHadadi wa kuuma itũũra rĩa Pau (mũtumia wake eetagwo Mehetabeli, mwarĩ wa Matiredi na mũcũkũrũ wa Mezahabu)." 
Genesis36:27 (40-43) Esau nĩ we warĩ ithe wa mĩhĩrĩga ĩno ya Aedomu: Timina, Aliva, Jethethi, Oholibama, Ela, Pinoni, Kenazi, Temani, Mibizari, Magidieli, na Iramu. Kũrĩa o mũhĩrĩga watũũraga gwetanagio na rĩĩtwa rĩaguo." 
Genesis37:1 Jakubu nĩathiire na mbere gũtũũra bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani ũrĩa ithe aathaamĩire," 
Genesis37:2 na rũũrũ nĩruo rũgano rwa mũciĩ wa Jakubu.Josefu e mũndũ wa mĩaka ikũmi na mũgwanja aarĩithagia ng'ondu na mbũri cia ithe e hamwe na aariũ a ithe, na aariũ a atumia a kũigwo a ithe, nĩ o Biliha na Zilipa. Na rĩĩrĩ, Josefu nĩacuukaga aariũ a ithe meeka ũũru." 
Genesis37:3 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jakubu nĩendeete Josefu makĩria ma ũrĩa eendeete aariũ acio angĩ aake, tondũ aamũciarĩĩte e mũkũrũ. Nĩamũtumĩire nguo ndaaya ng'emie." 
Genesis37:4 No rĩĩrĩ, aariũ a ithe moona atĩ ithe nĩendeete Josefu makĩria ma ũrĩa aameendeete, nĩmaathũũrire Josefu ũguo atĩ matiamwaragĩria wega." 
Genesis37:5 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe Josefu nĩarootire, na akĩĩra aariũ a ithe kĩrooto kĩu, nao magĩkĩrĩrĩria kũmũthũũra." 
Genesis37:6 Aameerire atĩrĩ, “Tathikĩrĩriai ũrĩa ndĩrarootire:" 
Genesis37:7 ithuothe tũroohaga itĩĩa cia ngano twĩ mũgũnda, na rĩĩrĩ, gĩtĩĩa gĩakwa kĩrarũũgama kĩĩhandĩĩte, nacio cianyu iragĩthiũrũrũkĩria irakĩinamĩrĩra.”" 
Genesis37:8 Nao aariũ a ithe makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũgwĩciiria atĩ nĩũgũtuĩka mũthamaki ũtwathage?” Magĩkĩmũmena makĩria nĩ ũndũ wa irooto ciake, o na nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa aamacuukaga." 
Genesis37:9 Ningĩ Josefu nĩarootire rĩngĩ, naake akĩĩra aariũ a ithe kĩrooto kĩu. Aameerire atĩrĩ, “Ndĩrarootire, ndĩroona riũa, mweri, na njata ikũmi na ĩmwe inyinamĩrĩire.”" 
Genesis37:10 O na nĩerire ithe kĩrooto kĩu na ithe akĩmũkũũma akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Kĩu nĩ kĩrooto kĩa mũthemba ũrĩkũ? Ũgwĩciiria atĩ maitũguo, aariũ a thooguo, o na niĩ tũgũũka tũkũinamĩrĩre?”" 
Genesis37:11 Aariũ a ithe nĩmaamũiguĩrĩire ũiru, no ithe nĩaikarire agĩciiragia ũhoro ũcio wothe." 
Genesis37:12 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe aariũ a ithe na Josefu nĩmaathiĩte gũkuhĩ na Shekemu kũrĩithia mahiũ ma ithe. 
Genesis37:13 Jakubu akĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ, “Nĩngwenda ũthiĩ Shekemu kũrĩa aariũ a thooguo mararĩithia.”Josefu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ nĩngũthiĩ.”" 
Genesis37:14 Ithe akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Thiĩ ũkarore kana aariũ a thooguo marĩ o ro ho o wega o hamwe na mbũri; ũcooke ũũke ũnjĩĩre.” Kwoguo ithe akĩmũtũma kuuma gĩtuamba kĩa Heburoni.Josefu nĩakinyire Shekemu," 
Genesis37:15 na rĩrĩa oorũũraga kũu werũinĩ, mũndũ ũmwe akĩmuona akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ ũracaria?”" 
Genesis37:16 Naake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ndĩracaria aariũ a baaba mararĩithia gũũkũ. No ũnjĩĩre kũrĩa marĩ?”" 
Genesis37:17 Naake mũndũ ũcio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩmoimĩĩte gũũkũ. Njiguire makiuga atĩ megũthiĩ Dothani.” Kwoguo Josefu agĩthiĩ gũcaria aariũ a ithe, akĩmakora Dothani." 
Genesis37:18 Nao makĩmuona arĩ haraaya, na atanakinya harĩ o, magĩcookania ndundu mamũũrage." 
Genesis37:19 Maakĩĩranire atĩrĩ, “Ũrĩa mũrooti ũrĩa." 
Genesis37:20 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, rekeei tũmũũrage tũmũikie irima rĩmwe rĩa marima maya. Tũcooke tũthiĩ tuuge atĩ arĩirwo nĩ nyamũ ya gĩthaka, tũkĩone irooto ciake igaatuĩka atĩa.”" 
Genesis37:21 Rĩrĩa Reubeni aiguire ũrĩa moigaga agĩkĩgeria kũmũhonokia, akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Rekeei tũtige kũmũũraga." 
Genesis37:22 Mũikiei irima gũũkũ werũinĩ e muoyo.” Oigire ũguo o akĩenda kũmũhonokia acooke amũcookerie ithe. 
Genesis37:23 Josefu akinya harĩa aariũ a ithe maarĩ, makĩmũruta nguo yake ĩrĩa ndaaya ng'emie," 
Genesis37:24 magĩcooka makĩmuoya makĩmũikia irima rĩa gĩthima kĩahũĩte maaĩ. 
Genesis37:25 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa maarĩaga makĩona gĩkundi kĩa Aishumaeli me rũgendoinĩ rwa kuuma Gileadi maroreete Misiri. Ngamĩĩra ciao nĩciakuuĩĩte indo nungi wega o hamwe na ũũkĩ wa manemane." 
Genesis37:26 Juda agĩkĩĩra aariũ a ithe atĩrĩ, “ Tũkuona uumithio ũrĩkũ, tworaga mũrũ wa baaba na twage kuumbũra?" 
Genesis37:27 Rekeei tũmwendie kũrĩ Aishumaeli aya. Rekeei tũtige kũmũũraga amu we nĩ mũrũ wa baaba, na tũrĩ a mũthiimo ũmwe.” Aariũ a ithe nĩmaiguithanĩirie naake." 
Genesis37:28 Rĩrĩa ahũũri mbiacara a kuuma Midiani maahĩtũkagĩra hau, aariũ a ithe makĩmũguucia kuuma irima makĩmwendia kũrĩ Aishumaeli icunjĩ cia betha mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ, nao makĩmũkuua makĩmũtwara Misiri." 
Genesis37:29 Rĩrĩa Reubeni aacookire irimainĩ rĩa gĩthima agĩkora Josefu ndarĩ ho, agĩtembũranga nguo ciake nĩ ũndũ wa kĩeha." 
Genesis37:30 Agĩcooka kũrĩ aariũ a ithe akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ngũrora na kũ, na mwanake ndarĩ irimainĩ?”" 
Genesis37:31 Nao magĩthĩnja mbũri, makĩrinda nguo ĩrĩa ya Josefu thakameinĩ ya mbũri ĩyo." 
Genesis37:32 Magĩcooka magĩtwarĩra ithe nguo ĩyo makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nguo ĩno tũroonire-rĩ, hiihi nĩ ya mũũrũguo?”" 
Genesis37:33 Nĩamĩmenyire na agĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ ĩno nĩ nguo yake! Nyamũ ya gĩthaka nĩ yo ĩramũrĩire. Nĩ ma rĩu Josefu ndarĩ ho!”" 
Genesis37:34 Jakubu nĩatembũrangire nguo ciake nĩ kĩeha, na akĩyoha nguo ya ikũnia njohero agĩcakaĩra mũũrũwe matukũ maingĩ." 
Genesis37:35 Ciana ciake ciothe cia aanake na cia airĩĩtu nĩciageririe kũmũũmĩrĩria, nowe akĩrega kũũmĩrĩrio agĩciĩra atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ngaikũrũka kũrĩa akuũ mathiaga o ngĩcakayagĩra mũrũ wakwa.” Kwoguo agĩthiĩ na mbere gũcakaĩra mũũrũwe Josefu." 
Genesis37:36 Na rĩĩrĩ, Amidiani makinya Misiri meendirie Josefu kũrĩ Potifaru, ũmwe wa atongoria a mũthamaki wa Misiri, warĩ mũnene wa arangĩri." 
Genesis38:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, ihinda rĩu Juda agĩtiga aariũ a ithe agĩthiĩ kwĩ mũndũ wetagwo Hira, warĩ wa kuuma itũũra rĩa Adulamu." 
Genesis38:2 Na e kũu nĩonanire na mũirĩĩtu Mũkanaani mwarĩ wa Shua, akĩmũhikia." 
Genesis38:3 Mũirĩĩtu ũcio nĩamũciarĩire kaana ga kahĩĩ agĩgatua Eri. 
Genesis38:4 Nĩacookire akĩgĩa nda rĩngĩ agĩciara kaana ga kahĩĩ agĩgatua Onani. 
Genesis38:5 Thuutha ũcio agĩciara kaana kangĩ ga kahĩĩ agĩgatua Shela. Kahĩĩ kau gagĩciarwo Juda aarĩ Akizibu. 
Genesis38:6 Na rĩĩrĩ, Juda nĩagũrĩire mũũriũ wa irigithaathi Eri mũtumia wetagwo Tamaru." 
Genesis38:7 Mĩtugo ya Eri yarĩ mĩũru, na ĩgĩkĩraakaria MWATHANI, na kwoguo MWATHANI akĩmũũraga." 
Genesis38:8 Juda nĩakĩĩrire mũrũ wa nyina na Eri ũrĩa wetagwo Onani atĩrĩ, “Thiĩ ũgakome na mũtumia ũcio ũratigirwo nĩ mũrũ wa maitũguo, nĩ geetha mũrũ wa maitũguo agĩe na njiarwa.”" 
Genesis38:9 No rĩĩrĩ, Onani nĩamenyire atĩ ciana icio itigaatuĩka ciake, na kwoguo rĩrĩa akoma na mũtumia ũcio wa mũrũ wa nyina, agaita hinya wake thĩ nĩ geetha mũrũ wa nyina ndakaanagĩe na njiarwa." 
Genesis38:10 Ũndũ ũcio eekaga nĩwaraakaririe MWATHANI, o naake MWATHANI akĩmũũraga." 
Genesis38:11 Juda agĩkĩĩra Tamaru mũtumia wa mũũrũwe atĩrĩ, “Cooka gwa thooguo nginya rĩrĩa mũũriũ wakwa Shela akaagimara.” Aamwĩrire ũguo tondũ nĩetigagĩra o naake Shela ahota kũũragwo ta aariũ a nyina. Kwoguo Tamaru agĩcooka gwa ithe." 
Genesis38:12 Thuutha wa matukũ manyiinyi mũtumia wa Juda ũrĩa warĩ mwarĩ wa Shua agĩkua. Na rĩĩrĩ, Juda aaniina matukũ ma gũcakaya, we na mũraata wake wetagwo Hira wa kuuma Adulamu makĩerekera Timina kũrĩa ng'ondu ciake cienjagĩrwo." 
Genesis38:13 Tamaru nĩerirwo nĩ mũndũ atĩ ithe wa mũthuuriwe eerekeire Timina kwenja ng'ondu ciake. 
Genesis38:14 Kwoguo Tamaru akĩruta nguo iria eehumbĩĩte cia kuonania atĩ we aarĩ mũtumia wa ndigwa, agĩĩkĩra ingĩ, agĩcooka akĩĩhumbĩra ũthiũ na cuka, agĩthiĩ kĩhingoinĩ kĩa Enaimu, itũũra rĩarĩ njĩrainĩ ya gũthiĩ Timina. Eekire ũguo nĩ ũndũ nĩamenyaga wega atĩ Shela, mũũriũ ũrĩa mũnyiinyi biũ wa Juda, nĩatuĩkĩĩte mũgima, na nĩagirĩĩtio amũhikie." 
Genesis38:15 Rĩrĩa Juda aamuonire, eeciiririe atĩ nĩ mũmaraaya, amu Tamaru nĩehumbĩrĩĩte ũthiũ." 
Genesis38:16 Nĩagĩthiire harĩ we mũkĩrainĩ wa njĩra akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũka ngakome nawe.” (Akĩmwĩra ũguo ndamenyaga atĩ nĩ mũtumia wa mũũrũwe.)Naake akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũkũũhe kĩ nĩguo ũkome na niĩ?”" 
Genesis38:17 Naake Juda akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũneana kabũri kamwe kuuma rũũruinĩ rwakwa ũreeherwo.”Naake Tamaru akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩngwĩtĩkĩra angĩkorwo nĩũkũũnengera kĩndũ gĩa gwĩkũũra kĩrĩa ngũikara nakĩo nginya rĩrĩa ũkaaneana kabũri kau.”" 
Genesis38:18 Naake Juda akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũkwenda ngũnengere kĩ ũikare nakĩo nginya hĩndĩ ĩyo?”Naake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ndigĩra gĩcũhĩ kĩu kĩ na rĩĩtwa rĩaku na kĩrengeeri gĩakĩo, na rũthanju rũu ũkuuĩĩte.” Naake Juda akĩmũnengera, agĩkoma na Tamaru, naake akĩgĩa nda." 
Genesis38:19 Nĩakĩinũkire mũciĩ akĩruta cuka ũrĩa ehumbĩrĩĩte naguo ũthiũ, na akĩruta nguo icio eekĩrĩĩte, agĩĩkĩra nguo iria eehumbaga cia kuonania atĩ we aarĩ mũtumia wa ndigwa." 
Genesis38:20 Rĩrĩa Juda aatũmire Hira atwarĩre mũtumia ũcio kabũri, naake amũnengere indo icio aamũtigĩire, Hira ndamuonire." 
Genesis38:21 Nĩoririe andũ amwe a kũu Enaimu atĩrĩ, “Mũmaraaya ũrĩa ũraarĩ haaha mũkĩrainĩ wa njĩra-rĩ, e kũ?”Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Haaha hatirĩ haakorwo mũmaraaya.”" 
Genesis38:22 Nĩagĩcookire kũrĩ Juda akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ndinamuona, na andũ a kũu manjĩĩrire atĩ hau hatirĩ haakorwo mũmaraaya.”" 
Genesis38:23 Juda agĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “Reke aikare na indo icio, amu tũtikwenda andũ matũthekerere. Niĩ nĩndĩrakũnengerire kabũri gaaka ũmũtwarĩre, no ndũnamũkora.”" 
Genesis38:24 Mĩeri ĩtatũ yathira, Juda aakĩĩrwo atĩrĩ, “Tamaru, ũrĩa mũtumia wa mũũrũguo, atũũraga ahũũraga ũmaraaya na rĩu e na nda.”Juda akiuga atĩrĩ, “Muumiei nja agacinwo!”" 
Genesis38:25 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa oimagio nja, agĩgĩtũmanĩra ithe wa mũthuuriwe akeerwo atĩrĩ, “Nda ĩno ndĩ nayo nĩ ya mũndũ ũrĩa mwene indo ici. Rora gĩcũhĩ gĩĩkĩ kĩ na rĩĩtwa na kĩrengeeri gĩakĩo, o na rũthanju, wone nĩ cia ũ.”" 
Genesis38:26 Juda agĩcimenya agĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũtumia ũyũ ndahĩtĩĩtie, nĩ niĩ hĩtĩĩtie. Nĩndaagire kũmũnengera mũrũ wakwa Shela amũhikie.” Juda ndacookire gũkoma naake rĩngĩ." 
Genesis38:27 Ihinda rĩake rĩa kũgĩa mwana rĩakinya, nĩkwamenyekire atĩ egũciara mahatha." 
Genesis38:28 Na rĩrĩa aaciaraga, kaana kamwe gakĩruta guoko; naake mũtumia ũrĩa wamũciarithagia akĩoya karũrigi gatuune agĩkooha guoko akiuga atĩrĩ, “Gaaka nĩ ko irigithaathi.”" 
Genesis38:29 No kahĩĩ kau gagĩcookia guoko na thĩinĩ, mũrũ wa nyina akiuma mbere. Naake mũtumia ũcio wamũciarithagia akiuga atĩrĩ, “Tuuge ũguo nĩguo wee ũkũhatĩkana ũkoima!” Gagĩtuuo Perezu." 
Genesis38:30 Naake mũrũ wa nyina agĩcooka agĩciarwo e na rũrigi rũtuune guoko, agĩtuuo Zera." 
Genesis39:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, Aishumaeli maatwarire Josefu Misiri makĩmwenderia Potifaru, ũmwe wa atongoria a mũthamaki wa Misiri, warĩ mũnene wa arangĩri." 
Genesis39:2 MWATHANI aarĩ hamwe na Josefu, na nĩagĩtũmire agaacĩre. Agĩtũũra kwa mũnene ũcio wake Mũmisiri," 
Genesis39:3 ũrĩa o naake wonaga atĩ MWATHANI aarĩ hamwe na Josefu, na nĩagĩtũmaga ũrĩa wothe Josefu eekaga ũgaacire." 
Genesis39:4 Kwoguo Potifaru nĩakenirio nĩ Josefu, na agĩkĩmũtua wa kũmũtungatagĩra we mwene, o na akĩmũtua mũnene wa mũciĩ wake na wa indo ciake ciothe." 
Genesis39:5 Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo, MWATHANI akĩraathima mũciĩ o hamwe na indo cia Mũmisiri ũcio iria ciarĩ mũciĩ na iria ciarĩ mĩgũndainĩ nĩ ũndũ wa Josefu." 
Genesis39:6 Kwoguo Potifaru akĩnengera Josefu wĩra wa kũrũmbũyania na indo ciake ciothe; we ndarĩ ũndũ aarũmbũyanagia naguo tiga o irio cia nda yake.Josefu aarĩ mũndũ wonekaga e na kĩũga kĩega, na aarĩ mũthaka." 
Genesis39:7 Thuutha wa matukũ manyiinyi, mũtumia wa mwathi wake, akĩambĩrĩria kwĩrirĩria Josefu, agĩkĩmwĩra atĩ akome naake." 
Genesis39:8 No Josefu akĩrega akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwathi wakwa, ndarũmbũyanagia na ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ wa mũciĩ tondũ ndĩ gũũkũ. Nĩanduĩte nũmbũyanagie na indo ciake ciothe." 
Genesis39:9 Niĩ-rĩ, ndĩ na ũnene wothe mũciĩinĩ ũyũ o ta ũrĩa we mwene e naguo, na ndarĩ kĩndũ o na kĩmwe angirĩĩtie tiga o wee wiki tondũ wĩ mũtumia wake. Rĩu-rĩ, no njĩke ũndũ wa waganu ta ũcio, na ndiĩhie mbere ya Ngai?”" 
Genesis39:10 Na rĩĩrĩ, o na gũtuĩka mũtumia ũcio nĩaringagĩrĩria Josefu mũthenya o mũthenya, Josefu ndeetĩkĩrire kũmũkuhĩhĩria kana gũkoma naake." 
Genesis39:11 No rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũmwe Josefu nĩathiire nyũmba kũruta wĩra wake, na kũu nyũmba thĩinĩ gũtiarĩ mũruti ũngĩ wa wĩra." 
Genesis39:12 Mũtumia ũcio akĩmũnyiita nguo, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũka ũkome na niĩ.” No Josefu akĩũra akiuma nja, agĩtiga mũtumia ũcio anyiitĩĩte nguo ĩyo yake." 
Genesis39:13 Rĩrĩa mũtumia ũcio oonire atĩ Josefu nĩora atiga nguo yake," 
Genesis39:14 agĩĩta ndungata ciake iria ciamũtungatagĩra kũu nyũmba agĩciĩra atĩrĩ, “Taroraai muone ũrĩa Mũhibirania ũrĩa mũthuuri wakwa aatũreeheire gũũkũ mũciĩ atũnyararĩĩte! Atoonya gwakwa, ageria kũũnyiita na hinya, na niĩ ndathanda mbu." 
Genesis39:15 Aigua ndathanda mbu, oora oima nja, andiga nyiitĩĩte nguo yake.”" 
Genesis39:16 Mũtumia ũcio agĩkĩiga nguo ĩyo nginya rĩrĩa mũnene wa Josefu ookire. 
Genesis39:17 Agĩkĩmũhe ũhoro ũcio ta ũũ: “Ndungata ĩrĩa ya Mũhibirania wareehire gũũkũ, ĩgũũkĩĩte kũrĩa ngomaga gũũthaakia." 
Genesis39:18 Rĩrĩa thandire mbu, yora yoima nja yandiga nyiitĩĩte nguo ĩno ya yo.”" 
Genesis39:19 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa mũnene wa Josefu aiguire ũhoro ũcio aaheirwo nĩ mũtumia wake, akĩraakara mũno." 
Genesis39:20 Agĩkĩnyiita Josefu akĩmũikia njeera kũrĩa oohwo a mũthamaki maikagio, agĩikara kuo." 
Genesis39:21 No MWATHANI aarĩ hamwe na Josefu, agĩkĩmũraathima, na kwoguo mũrangĩri wa njeera nĩakenirio nĩ Josefu." 
Genesis39:22 Mũnene wa njeera agĩgĩtua Josefu mũnene wa oohwo acio angĩ oothe, na mũrori wa maũndũ moothe marĩa meekagwo kũu njeera." 
Genesis39:23 Mũnene wa njeera ndabataragio nĩkũrora ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũrĩa wehokeirwo Josefu, amu MWATHANI aarĩ hamwe na Josefu, na nĩatũmaga agaacĩre maũndũinĩ moothe marĩa eekaga." 
Genesis40:1 Thuutha ũcio, mũtwarĩri mũthamaki wa Misiri gĩa kũnyua na mũnene wa arugi mĩgate makĩhĩtĩria mũthamaki." 
Genesis40:2 Mũthamaki nĩaraakaririo nĩ anjaama acio eerĩ," 
Genesis40:3 akĩmaikia njeera ĩrĩa yarĩ nyũmba kwa mũnene wa arangĩri, o kũrĩa Josefu aarĩ." 
Genesis40:4 Mũnene wa arangĩri agĩgĩtua Josefu wa kũmatungatagĩra, nao magĩgĩikara njeera kwa ihinda inene." 
Genesis40:5 Na rĩĩrĩ, ũtukũ ũmwe me kũu njeera mũtwarĩri mũthamaki wa Misiri gĩa kũnyua na mũmũrugĩri mĩgate nĩmaarootire o mũndũ kĩrooto gĩake, na o kĩrooto kĩarĩ na ũrĩa kĩoigaga." 
Genesis40:6 Rĩrĩa Josefu ookire kũrĩ o kĩrooko, akĩona andũ acio eerĩ me na kĩeha," 
Genesis40:7 akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũroonekana mwĩ na kĩeha ũguo nĩkĩ?”" 
Genesis40:8 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Tũrarootire o mũndũ kĩrooto gĩake, na gũũkũ gũtirĩ mũndũ wa gũtũtaũrĩra irooto icio.”Naake Josefu akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Na githĩ Ngai ti we ũheanaga ũhoti wa gũtaũra irooto? Ndamũthaitha tanjĩĩraai irooto icio.”" 
Genesis40:9 Mũnene wa atwarĩri mũthamaki gĩa kũnyua akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Kĩrootoinĩ gĩakwa ndĩroonire mũthabibũ mbere yakwa" 
Genesis40:10 wĩ na honge ithatũ. Rĩrĩa ũrarutire mahuti, kĩro kĩroimĩra, na imanjika cia thabibũ irerua." 
Genesis40:11 Ndĩranyiitĩĩte gĩkombe kĩa mũthamaki na mooko, na kwoguo ndirooya thabibũ icio ndĩracihihĩra gĩkombeinĩ kĩu gĩake ndĩramũnengera.”" 
Genesis40:12 Josefu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Kĩrooto kĩu kĩroiga ũũ: honge icio ithatũ nĩ mĩthenya ĩtatũ." 
Genesis40:13 Thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ, mũthamaki nĩegũkuohera, akũrekererie, na agũcookie wĩrainĩ waku. Ũrĩmũnengagĩra gĩkombe gĩake o ta ũrĩa wamũnengagĩra rĩrĩa warĩ mũmũtwarĩri gĩa kũnyua." 
Genesis40:14 Na rĩĩrĩ, maũndũ maaku maagĩra-rĩ, ndagũthaitha ũkandirikana ũnjiguĩre tha, ũnjarĩrĩrie kũrĩ mũthamaki nĩ geetha ndutwo gũũkũ njeera." 
Genesis40:15 Amu niĩ, nĩkũiywo ndaiyirwo kuuma bũrũri wa Ahibirania, na o na gũũkũ Misiri ndirĩ ũndũ ndeekĩĩte wa gũtũma njikio njeera.”" 
Genesis40:16 Rĩrĩa mũnene wa arugi mĩgate aiguire mũtaũrire wa kĩrooto kĩu warĩ mwega, akĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ, “Na niĩ nĩndĩrarootire ũũ: Ndĩrakuuĩĩte ikabũ ithatũ cia mĩgate na mũtwe." 
Genesis40:17 Gĩkabũ kĩrĩa kĩraarĩ igũrũ biũ nĩkĩo kĩraarĩ na mĩgate ya mĩthemba yothe ya kũrĩĩo nĩ mũthamaki, nacio nyoni nĩkũrĩa irarĩaga mĩgate ĩyo.”" 
Genesis40:18 Naake Josefu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Kĩrooto kĩu gĩaku kĩroiga ũũ: ikabũ icio ithatũ nĩ mĩthenya ĩtatũ." 
Genesis40:19 Thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ, mũthamaki nĩegũkũrekereria, no aathane ũtinio mũtwe! Acooke agũcuurie mũtĩinĩ, nacio nyoni irĩe nyama cia mwĩrĩ waku.”" 
Genesis40:20 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya wa gatatũ kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo warĩ wa gũkũngũĩra gũciarwo kwa mũthamaki, naake agĩgĩthondekera njaama ciake ciothe iruga. Agĩcooka akĩrekereria mũnene wa amũtwarĩri gĩa kũnyua na mũnene wa amũrugĩri mĩgate makĩreehwo mbere ya njaama ciake." 
Genesis40:21 Naake agĩcookia mũnene wa amũtwarĩri gĩa kũnyua wĩra ũrĩa warĩ wake," 
Genesis40:22 no mũnene wa amũrugĩri mĩgate akĩmũcuuria mũtĩ igũrũ. Gwekĩkire o ta ũrĩa Josefu aamataũrĩire irooto ciao. 
Genesis40:23 No rĩĩrĩ, mũnene ũcio wa atwarĩri mũthamaki gĩa kũnyua ndacookire kũririkana Josefu; aariganĩirwo nĩ we biũ." 
Genesis41:1 Thuutha wa mĩaka ĩĩrĩ, mũthamaki nĩarootire, akĩona arũũgamĩĩte rũteereinĩ rwa rũũĩ rwa Nailo," 
Genesis41:2 na kũu rũũĩinĩ gũkiumĩra ng'ombe mũgwanja nyoroku na noru, ikĩambĩrĩria kũrĩa nyeki." 
Genesis41:3 Nĩhaacookire hakiumĩra ng'ombe ingĩ mũgwanja hĩnju mũno o nginya ikoimĩria mahĩndĩ. Nacio ikĩrũũgama hau haarĩ ng'ombe icio ingĩ rũteereinĩ rwa rũũĩ," 
Genesis41:4 ikĩrĩa ng'ombe iria ciarĩ nyoroku na noru. Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki akĩgurumũka kuuma toro. 
Genesis41:5 Nĩacookire akĩhĩtwo nĩ toro rĩngĩ akĩroota kĩrooto kĩngĩ kĩahaanaga ta ũũ: nĩonire ngira mũgwanja cia ngano njega mũno ciyũire ngano ikũrĩĩte kamũtĩinĩ kamwe ka ngano. 
Genesis41:6 Thuutha wacio nĩacookire akĩona ngira ingĩ mũgwanja, hinyaru na icinĩĩtwo nĩ rũhuuho rwa werũ, igĩkũra." 
Genesis41:7 Ngira icio mũgwanja hinyaru ikĩmeria iria ciarĩ njega na njiyũru. Mũthamaki akĩgurumũka kuuma toro, na akĩmenya atĩ nĩkũroota aarootaga." 
Genesis41:8 Na rĩĩrĩ, rũũciinĩ nĩamakĩĩte, na kwoguo agĩtũmana gũgeetwo ago oothe na andũ arĩa oothe oogĩ a Misiri. Agĩkĩmeera irooto icio ciake, no gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wahotire kũmũtaũrĩra ũrĩa cioigaga." 
Genesis41:9 Naake mũnene wa atwarĩri mũthamaki gĩa kũnyua akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ, “Ũũmũũthĩ nĩndaririkana mahĩtia maakwa." 
Genesis41:10 Rĩrĩa niĩ na mũnene wa akũrugĩri mĩgate twakũraakarĩĩtie ũgĩtũikia njeera kwa mũnene wa arangĩri-rĩ," 
Genesis41:11 ũtukũ ũmwe, ithuerĩ nĩtwarootire o mũndũ kĩrooto kĩarĩ na ũrĩa kĩoigaga." 
Genesis41:12 Kũu twarĩ, nĩkwarĩ Mũhibirania mwĩthĩ, warĩ ndungata ya mũnene wa arangĩri. Twamwĩra irooto icio ciitũ nĩatũtaũrĩire ũrĩa cioigaga o mũndũ kũringana na kĩrooto gĩake." 
Genesis41:13 Na o ta ũrĩa aatũtaũrĩire noguo gwatuĩkire; nĩwanjokirie wĩrainĩ wakwa, no mũnene wa akũrugĩri mĩgate ũgĩathana aitwo.”" 
Genesis41:14 Mũthamaki nĩatũmanĩire Josefu ageetwo, naake agĩkĩreehwo narua mũno kuuma njeera. Arĩĩkia kwenja nderu na gwĩkĩra nguo ingĩ, agĩũka mbere ya mũthamaki." 
Genesis41:15 Mũthamaki agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ndĩrarootire, na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũhoteete gũtaũra ũrĩa kĩrooto kĩu kĩroigaga. Nĩnjĩrĩĩtwo atĩ wee ũngĩigua ũrĩa mũndũ arooteete, no ũmũtaũrĩre.”" 
Genesis41:16 Josefu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ti niĩ ndaũraga, no Ngai nĩegũkũhe ũtaũri mwega.”" 
Genesis41:17 Mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ, “Ndĩrarootire ndĩroona ndũũgamĩĩte rũteereinĩ rwa rũũĩ rwa Nailo," 
Genesis41:18 nacio ng'ombe mũgwanja noru na nyoroku iroimĩra rũũĩinĩ, irambĩrĩria kũrĩa nyeki." 
Genesis41:19 Thuutha ũcio, ng'ombe ingĩ mũgwanja hĩnju o nginya mahĩndĩ makoimĩra, nacio iroimĩra. Niĩ ndirĩ ndoona ng'ombe ta icio bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri." 
Genesis41:20 Ng'ombe iria hĩnju irooka irarĩa icio iraarĩ noru. 
Genesis41:21 No rĩĩrĩ, o na ciacirĩa, gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩramenyire atĩ nĩirĩĩte tondũ iraarĩ njũru o ta ũrĩa irahaanaga itanacirĩa. Hĩndĩ ĩyo ndĩragurumũka kuuma toro."
