Genesis41:22 Ningĩ nĩndĩrarootire ndĩroona ngira mũgwanja njega cia ngano i njiyũru igikũra kamũtĩinĩ kamwe ka ngano. 
Genesis41:23 Ndĩracooka ndĩroona ngira ingĩ mũgwanja nyũmanĩrĩru, hinyaru na icinĩĩtwo nĩ rũhuuho rwa werũ, igĩkũra." 
Genesis41:24 Ngira icio iraarĩ hinyaru irameria icio iraarĩ njega. Nĩnjĩrĩĩte ago irooto icio na gũtirĩ o na ũmwe ũhoteete kũndaũrĩra ũrĩa iroiga.” 
Genesis41:25 Josefu akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ, “Irooto icio cierĩ iraaria ũhoro ũmwe, Ngai nĩakũguũrĩirie ũrĩa egwĩka." 
Genesis41:26 Ng'ombe icio noru mũgwanja nĩ mĩaka mũgwanja, na o na ngira icio mũgwanja njega no mĩaka mũgwanja; cierĩ iroiga o ũndũ ũmwe." 
Genesis41:27 Ng'ombe icio hĩnju i na mahĩndĩ moimĩru iracookire iroimĩra, o hamwe na ngira icio ingĩ mũgwanja hinyaru na icinĩĩtwo nĩ rũhuuho rwa werũ, nĩ mĩaka mũgwanja ya ng'aragu." 
Genesis41:28 No ta ũrĩa ngwĩrire; Ngai nĩakũguũrĩirie ũrĩa egwĩka. 
Genesis41:29 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, nĩgũgũkorwo na mĩaka mũgwanja ya bũũthi thĩinĩ wa bũrũri wothe wa Misiri," 
Genesis41:30 no thuutha wa ũguo nĩgũgaakorwo na mĩaka ĩngĩ mũgwanja ya ng'aragu, na mĩaka yothe ya bũũthi nĩkaariganĩra, amu ng'aragu nĩgaathũũkia bũrũri wothe wa Misiri." 
Genesis41:31 Mĩaka ĩyo ya bũũthi ĩkaariganĩra o biũ, tondũ ng'aragu ĩrĩa ĩgooka ĩgaakorwo ĩ nene mũno." 
Genesis41:32 Ũhoro wa gũcookera kĩrooto gĩaku na njĩra ĩngĩ nĩwakuonania atĩ ũcio nĩ ũndũ Ngai ahaarĩirie, na nĩegũtũma wĩkĩke o narua." 
Genesis41:33 “Kwoguo no mũhaka ũthuure mũndũ mũũgĩ na wĩ na ũmenyo ũmũtue mũrori wa bũrũri. 
Genesis41:34 Ningĩ no mũhaka ũthuure anjaama angĩ akuoyaga gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe gĩa ithaano kĩa magetha ma bũrũri wa Misiri mĩaka ĩyo mũgwanja ya bũũthi. 
Genesis41:35 Meere moonganie irio icio ciothe mĩaka ĩyo ya bũũthi ĩrooka, na ũmaathe maciige matũũrainĩ na macirangagĩre." 
Genesis41:36 Irio icio igaakorwo irĩ mũthiithũ wa andũ a bũrũri wa mĩaka ĩyo ĩngĩ mũgwanja ya ng'aragu ĩrĩa ĩgooka bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri. Weka ũguo andũ matikaahũũta.” 
Genesis41:37 Mũthamaki na njaama ciake magĩkĩigua ũhoro ũcio ũrĩ mwega. 
Genesis41:38 Naake mũthamaki agĩgĩciĩra atĩrĩ, “Gũtirĩ hĩndĩ tũkoona mũndũ ũngĩ mwega gũkĩra Josefu, mũndũ wĩ na roho wa Ngai thĩinĩ wake.”" 
Genesis41:39 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ, “Ngai nĩakuoneetie maũndũ macio, kwoguo hatirĩ nganja gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩ wĩ na ũũgĩ na ũmenyo gũgũkĩra." 
Genesis41:40 Nĩngũgũtua mũrori wa bũrũri wakwa, na andũ aakwa oothe marĩĩkaga ũrĩa wathana. Gũũkũ gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩ ũgũkorwo e mũnene gũgũkĩra tiga o niĩ." 
Genesis41:41 Rĩu nĩndagũtua barũũthi wa bũrũri wothe wa Misiri.” 
Genesis41:42 Mũthamaki wa Misiri akĩruta gĩcũhĩ kĩ na rĩĩtwa rĩake kĩara, agĩgĩĩkĩra Josefu kĩara. Agĩcooka akĩmũhumba nguo njega ya gataani, na akĩmwĩkĩra mũgathĩ wa thahabu ngingo." 
Genesis41:43 Agĩcooka akĩmũhe ngaari ya mbarathi ya kũmũũkua ĩrĩa yarĩ ya keerĩ kuuma harĩ ya mũthamaki wa Misiri, na amũrangĩri magĩthiĩ mbere yake makĩanagĩrĩra atĩrĩ, “Eheraai njĩra! Eheraai njĩra!” Ũguo nĩguo Josefu aatuirwo barũũthi wa bũrũri wothe wa Misiri." 
Genesis41:44 Ningĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri, na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũkooya guoko na igũrũ kana akinyũkie wee ũteetĩkĩrĩĩte.”" 
Genesis41:45 Mũthamaki wa Misiri agĩcooka akĩmũhe rĩĩtwa Zafenathi Panea, na akĩmũhe Asenathi, mwarĩ wa Potifera mũthĩnjĩri ngai itũũrainĩ rĩa Heliopoli atuĩke mũtumia wake. Ũguo nĩguo Josefu aatuĩkire barũũthi bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri." 
Genesis41:46 Josefu aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ rĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie gũtungata mũthamaki wa Misiri. Josefu agĩkiuma kũu kwa mũthamaki wa Misiri, agĩthiũrũrũka bũrũri wothe wa Misiri." 
Genesis41:47 Mĩakainĩ ĩyo mũgwanja ya bũũthi, bũrũri ũgĩkorwo na irio nyingĩ mũno." 
Genesis41:48 Naake Josefu nĩacicookanagĩrĩria agaciiga matũũrainĩ marĩa manene. Aigaga o itũũrainĩ irio cia kuuma mĩgũndainĩ ĩrĩa yarĩ hakuhĩ narĩo. 
Genesis41:49 Nĩkwagĩire na irio nyingĩ o nginya Josefu akĩremwo nĩgũcithima rĩngĩ; ciarĩ nyingĩ o ta mũthanga wa iriainĩ. 
Genesis41:50 Mbere ya ng'aragu, Josefu nĩaciarĩirwo aariũ eerĩ nĩ mũtumia ũcio wake wetagwo Asenathi." 
Genesis41:51 Wa mbere aaciarwo nĩoigire atĩrĩ, “Ngai nĩatũmĩĩte ndiganĩrwo nĩ mĩnyamaarĩko yakwa yothe na ndiganĩrwo nĩ andũ aitũ.” Kwoguo akĩmũtua Manase." 
Genesis41:52 Wa keerĩ aaciarwo akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ngai nĩaheete ciana ndĩ bũrũriinĩ wa mathĩĩna maakwa.” Kwoguo akĩmũtua Efiraimu." 
Genesis41:53 Mĩaka mũgwanja ya bũũthi bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri nĩyathirire 
Genesis41:54 na mĩaka mũgwanja ya ng'aragu ĩkĩambĩrĩria o ta ũrĩa Josefu oigĩĩte. Mabũrũri marĩa mangĩ moothe nĩmaagĩire na ng'aragu, no rĩĩrĩ, Misiri guothe kwarĩ na irio." 
Genesis41:55 Rĩrĩa Amisiri maambĩrĩirie kũhũũta, nĩmaakaĩire mũthamaki wa Misiri amahe irio, naake akĩmeera atĩ mathiĩ kwĩ Josefu na meeke o ũrĩa ekũmeera." 
Genesis41:56 Ng'aragu ĩgĩkĩneneha bũrũri wothe wa Misiri, na kwoguo Josefu akĩhingũra makũmbĩ moothe, akĩambĩrĩria kwenderia andũ a Misiri irio." 
Genesis41:57 Andũ nĩmookaga Misiri kuuma thĩ yothe kũgũra irio kuuma kũrĩ Josefu, amu ng'aragu nĩyaneneheete kũndũ guothe." 
Genesis42:1 Rĩrĩa Jakubu aamenyire atĩ Misiri nĩkwarĩ na irio, akĩĩra aariũ aake atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ kĩratũma mũcũũthanĩrĩrie?" 
Genesis42:2 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, nĩnjiguĩte atĩ Misiri kwĩ na irio; ũkĩraai mũthiĩ kuo mũgatũgũrĩre irio nĩguo tũtigaagĩkue nĩ ng'aragu.”" 
Genesis42:3 Kwoguo aariũ a ithe na Josefu ikũmi magĩikũrũka Misiri kũgũra irio. 
Genesis42:4 No Jakubu ndeetĩkĩrire gũtũma Benjamini mũrũ wa nyina na Josefu, amu nĩetigagĩra ndakaae kuona ũgwati." 
Genesis42:5 Kwoguo aariũ a Jakubu magĩthiĩ kũgũra irio hamwe na andũ arĩa angĩ, amu o nakuo Kanaani nĩkwarĩ na ng'aragu." 
Genesis42:6 Josefu nĩ we warĩ barũũthi wa bũrũri wothe wa Misiri; nĩ we wendagĩria andũ a kuuma thĩ yothe irio. Kwoguo aariũ a ithe magĩũka harĩ we, makĩinamĩrĩra makĩhuutithia moothiũ maao thĩ." 
Genesis42:7 Josefu aamoona nĩamamenyire, no akĩmeerigithia, akĩmeeka o ta ageni. Akĩmooria atĩrĩ ta ekũmatetia, “Muumĩĩte kũ?”Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Tuumĩĩte Kanaani, tũgooka kũgũra irio.”" 
Genesis42:8 O na gũtuĩka Josefu nĩamamenyire, o matiamũmenyire." 
Genesis42:9 Nĩaririkanire irooto iria aarooteete ciamakoniĩ, akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ-rĩ, mũrĩ athigaani; mũũkĩĩte gũtuĩria harĩa bũrũri witũ ũtarĩ na hinya.”" 
Genesis42:10 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Aaca, mwathi witũ, ithuĩ, ndungata ciaku, tũũkĩĩte kũgũra irio." 
Genesis42:11 Ithuothe tũrĩ a ithe ũmwe; tũrĩ andũ ehokeku. Mwathi witũ, ithuĩ tũtirĩ athigaani.”" 
Genesis42:12 Naake Josefu akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Aaca! Mũũkĩĩte gũtuĩria harĩa bũrũri witũ ũtarĩ na hinya.”" 
Genesis42:13 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ithuothe tũrĩ aariũ ikũmi na eerĩ a ithe ũmwe; twĩ aariũ a mũthuuri ũmwe wa bũrũri wa Kanaani. Mũũriũ wa baaba ũrĩa mũnyiinyi atigĩĩtwo mũciĩ e na baaba, na ũmwe ndarĩ ho, nĩakuire.”" 
Genesis42:14 Naake Josefu akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ-rĩ, mũrĩ athigaani o ta ũguo ndamwĩra." 
Genesis42:15 Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩngũmũgeria na njĩra ĩno: ngwĩhĩta na rĩĩtwa rĩa mũthamaki wa Misiri atĩ mũtikuuma gũũkũ mũrũ wa thooguo ũcio mũnyiinyi atarĩ haaha." 
Genesis42:16 Ũmwe wanyu no nginyagia athiĩ amũgĩĩre, na inyuĩ nĩmũkũrangĩrwo nginya ma ya ũhoro ũcio mũraaria ĩmenyeke. Akorwo ti ũguo, ngwĩhĩta na mũthamaki wa Misiri atĩ mũrĩ athigaani.”" 
Genesis42:17 Nĩacookire akĩmaikia njeera mĩthenya ĩtatũ. 
Genesis42:18 Mũthenya wa gatatũ Josefu akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Tondũ niĩ ndĩ mũndũ ũtĩĩĩte Ngai, nĩngũmuohera mweka o ũndũ ũyũ ũmwe." 
Genesis42:19 Angĩkorwo mũrĩ andũ ehokeku, ũmwe wanyu nĩegũtigwo njeera kũu muuma, acio angĩ maatwarĩre andũ acio aanyu ahũũtu irio icio mũgũrĩĩte." 
Genesis42:20 Mwakinya mũcooke mũndeehere mũrũ wa thooguo ũcio mũnyiinyi. Ũndũ ũcio nĩũkoonania atĩ ũhoro ũcio mwarĩĩtie nĩ wa ma, na ndikaamũũragithia.”Nĩmeetĩkĩrire ũhoro ũcio" 
Genesis42:21 na magĩkĩĩrana atĩrĩ, “Nĩ ma tũrathĩĩnĩka nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa twekire mũrũ wa baaba; tuonire e na thĩĩna mũnene mũno rĩrĩa aatũthaithaga tũmũteithie, no tũtiamũthikĩrĩirie. Kĩu nĩkĩo gĩtũmĩĩte tũkorwo twĩ thĩĩnainĩ mũnene ũũ.”" 
Genesis42:22 Naake Reubeni akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Na githĩ ndiamwĩrire mũtige gwĩka kamwana kau ũndũ mũũru mũkĩrega kũnjigua? Rĩu nĩkũrĩha tũrarĩha gĩkuũ gĩake.”" 
Genesis42:23 Josefu nĩamenyire ũguo moigaga, no o matiamenyire atĩ nĩamenya tondũ makĩmwarĩria nĩgũtaũrĩrwo aataũragĩrwo." 
Genesis42:24 Josefu akĩmatiga agĩthiĩ kũrĩra. Rĩrĩa aiguire no ahote kwaria rĩngĩ, agĩcooka, agĩthuura Simeoni akĩmuohithia meroreire." 
Genesis42:25 Josefu agĩathana atĩ aariũ a ithe maiyũrĩrio irio makũnia maao, na mbeeca cia o mũndũ icookio ikũniainĩ rĩake, na maheeo rĩĩgu. Na ũguo nĩguo gwekirwo." 
Genesis42:26 Magĩkĩigĩrĩra ndigiri ciao irio icio maagũrĩĩte, magĩthiĩ." 
Genesis42:27 Na rĩĩrĩ, arĩ harĩa maararagĩrĩra, ũmwe wao agĩtumũra ikũnia rĩake ahe ndigiri yake gĩa kũrĩa, akĩona mbeeca ciake o hau mũromoinĩ wa ikũnia." 
Genesis42:28 Naake akĩĩra aariũ a ithe atĩrĩ, “Nĩndĩracookeirio mbeeca ciakwa. Ĩ ici haaha ikũniainĩ rĩakwa!” Nao magĩtuĩka nda, makĩũrania atĩrĩ me na guoya, “Ũũ nĩ atĩa Ngai atwĩkĩĩte?”" 
Genesis42:29 Maakinya bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani kũrĩ ithe wao Jakubu, makĩmwĩra maũndũ moothe marĩa maatũnganĩĩte namo ta ũũ:" 
Genesis42:30 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, barũũthi wa Misiri-rĩ, aratũtetirie agĩtwĩraga atĩ twĩ athigaani a bũrũri wake." 
Genesis42:31 Na ithuĩ tũramwĩra atĩ tũtirĩ athigaani tũrĩ andũ ehokeku. 
Genesis42:32 Twaciarirwo tũrĩ aariũ ikũmi na eerĩ a ithe ũmwe. Mũũriũ ũmwe wa baaba nĩakuire, na ũrĩa mũnyiinyi biũ atigĩĩtwo Kanaani e na baaba." 
Genesis42:33 Naake mũndũ ũcio aratwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩngũmenya kana ũhoro ũcio mũraaria nĩ wa ma na njĩra ĩno: ũmwe wanyu egũtigwo gũũkũ na niĩ; acio angĩ megũkuua irio matwarĩre andũ a mĩciĩ yanyu arĩa me na ng'aragu." 
Genesis42:34 Mũcooke mũndeehere mũrũ wa thooguo ũcio mũnyiinyi. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩngaamenya atĩ mũrĩ andũ ehokeku, mũtirĩathigaani. Nĩngaamũcookeria mũrũ wa ithe wanyu, na no mũgĩikare gũũkũ mũrute wĩra wa wonjoria.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa moonoragia irio kuuma makũniainĩ, o mũndũ akĩona mbeeca ciake ikũniainĩ rĩake. Maaciona, oothe hamwe na ithe wao makĩmaka." 
Genesis42:36 Ithe wao akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ mũrenda nde ciana ciakwa ciothe? Josefu ndarĩ ho; Simeoni ndarĩ ho, na rĩu mũrenda gũkuua Benjamini! Niĩ nĩ niĩ ndĩranyariirika!”" 
Genesis42:37 Naake Reubeni akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ, “Wona ndaaga gũgaagũcookeria Benjamini-rĩ, ũkooraga aariũ aakwa eerĩ. Mwĩtĩkĩrie atwarane na ithuĩ, na nĩngaamũcookia harĩ we.”" 
Genesis42:38 No Jakubu akiuga atĩrĩ, “Aaca, mũtigũthiĩ na mũrũ wakwa; mũrũ wa nyina nĩakuire, na no ũyũ wiki rĩu ndigĩirwo. Ahota gũtũnga mũtino mwĩ njĩra, na kĩeha gĩake kĩnjũrage nĩ ũndũ nĩngũrire.”" 
Genesis43:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, ng'aragu bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani nĩyanenehire makĩria." 
Genesis43:2 Rĩrĩa andũ a mũciĩ wa Jakubu maarĩire irio iria ciarutĩĩtwo Misiri makĩniina, Jakubu akĩĩra aariũ aake atĩrĩ, “Cookaai Misiri mũgatũgũrĩre tũirio tũngĩ.”" 
Genesis43:3 No Juda akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũcio aatũkaanirie agĩtwĩra atĩ tũtigeetĩkĩrio kũmuona twaga gũthiĩ na mũrũ wa baaba." 
Genesis43:4 Rĩu angĩkorwo nĩũgwĩtĩkĩra tũthiĩ hamwe na mũrũ wa baaba, nĩtũgũthiĩ kũmũgũrĩra irio." 
Genesis43:5 Angĩkorwo ndũgwĩtĩkĩra ũguo, tũtigũthiĩ amu mũndũ ũcio aatwĩrire atĩ tũtigeetĩkĩrio kũmuona tũtarĩ naake.”" 
Genesis43:6 Naake Jakubu akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mwakĩnjĩkire ũũru ũguo nĩkĩ na ũndũ wa kũmwĩra atĩ mwĩ na mũrũ ũngĩ wa thooguo?”" 
Genesis43:7 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũcio aatũũragia ciũria itũkoniĩ na iria ikonainie na mũciĩ witũ ta ũũ: ‘Ĩ thooguo-rĩ, arĩ o muoyo?’ Nĩmũrĩ mũrũ wa thooguo ũngĩ? No mũhaka tũngĩamũcookeirie ciũria ciake. Tũngĩakĩmenyire na kĩ atĩ nĩegũtwĩra tũgaathiĩ na mũrũ wa baaba?”" 
Genesis43:8 Naake Juda akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ, “Njĩtĩkĩria thiĩ na kamwana na nĩtũgũthiĩ o ro rĩu nĩ geetha ithuĩ ithuothe nginya ciana iria nyiinyi tũtigaakue nĩ ng'aragu." 
Genesis43:9 Nĩ niĩ ngũkarũũgamĩrĩra, na nĩ niĩ ũkooria. Ndaaga gũgaacooka nako, nĩ niĩ ũkooria." 
Genesis43:10 Korwo tũtiahũthĩrĩirie ũhoro ũyũ, tũngĩthiĩte kuo maita meerĩ na tũgacooka.”" 
Genesis43:11 Naake ithe wao akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Angĩkorwo no gũthiire ũguo-rĩ, mũgwĩka ũguo-ĩ, muoe maciaro marĩa meega biũ ma bũrũri mũtwarĩre barũũthi ũcio marĩ ta kĩheeo, nĩ mo: indo nungi wega, kaũũkĩ, ũbaani, ũũkĩ wa manemane, njoothi, na roothi." 
Genesis43:12 Nĩngĩ mũkuue mbeeca maita meerĩ, tondũ no mũhaka mũcookie iria mwacookeirio makũniainĩ, amu no gũkorwo nĩ mahĩtia haagĩire." 
Genesis43:13 Oyai mũrũ wa thooguo mũthiĩ. 
Genesis43:14 Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe arotũma mũndũ ũcio amũiguĩre tha, amũnengere Benjamini, na mũrũ wa thooguo ũcio ũngĩ. No haakwa mwene-rĩ, angĩkorwo no mũhaka ciana ciakwa i njũre-rĩ, nĩcinjũre.”" 
Genesis43:15 Kwoguo aariũ acio a ithe ũmwe makĩoya iheeo, na mbeeca maita meerĩ, makiumagara maroreete Misiri me hamwe na Benjamini, magĩĩtwara kwĩ Josefu." 
Genesis43:16 Rĩrĩa Josefu oonire Benjamini e hamwe nao, akĩĩra ndungata ĩrĩa yarũũgamĩrĩire mũciĩ wake atĩrĩ, “Oya andũ aya ũmatware gwakwa mũciĩ, amu irio cia mĩaraho ngũrĩanĩra nao; kwoguo thĩnjithia na ũtabaarĩre.”" 
Genesis43:17 Ndungata ĩgĩgĩĩka ũguo yerirwo, ĩgĩgĩtwara aariũ acio a ithe ũmwe kwa Josefu mũciĩ." 
Genesis43:18 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa maatwaragwo kwa Josefu, maarĩ na guoya. Meeciiragia atĩrĩ, “Tũratwarwo na gũũkũ nĩ ũndũ wa mbeeca iria twacookeirio makũniainĩ maitũ hĩndĩ ya mbere. Egũcooka atũũkĩrĩre o rĩmwe, atũtuunye ndigiri ciitũ, atũtue ndungata ciake.”" 
Genesis43:19 Kwoguo magĩgĩthiĩ harĩ ndungata ĩrĩa yarangagĩra kĩhingo kĩa mũciĩ wa Josefu makĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ," 
Genesis43:20 “Mwathi witũ, tuokire gũũkũ rĩa mbere kũgũra irio," 
Genesis43:21 na harĩa twaraarĩrĩire tũkĩinũka, twatumũra makũnia maitũ, o mũndũ agĩkora mbeeca ciake ciothe mũromoinĩ wa ikũnia. Rĩu mbeeca icio nĩtwacireehe," 
Genesis43:22 na tuoka na mbeeca ingĩ cia kũgũra irio ingĩ. Ithuĩ tũtiũĩ nũũ wacookirie mbeeca icio makũniainĩ maitũ.” 
Genesis43:23 Ndungata ĩyo ĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Tigaai gwĩtigĩra na mũtikaigue guoya. Ngai wanyu, o we Ngai wa ithe wanyu, no mũhaka akorwo nĩ we wekĩrire mbeeca icio makũniainĩ maanyu. Niĩ nĩndaamũkĩrire irĩhi rĩanyu.” Agĩcooka akĩmareehere Simeoni." 
Genesis43:24 Ndungata ĩyo ĩgĩtoonyia aariũ acio a ithe ũmwe nyũmba, ĩkĩmahe maaĩ magĩĩthamba magũrũ, na ĩkĩhe ndigiri ciao gĩa kũrĩa." 
Genesis43:25 Nao makĩhaarĩria iheeo cia kũnengera Josefu ooka hĩndĩ ya mĩaraho, amu nĩmeerirwo atĩ nĩmekũrĩanĩra naake." 
Genesis43:26 Josefu akinya mũciĩ, makĩmũtwarĩra iheeo, na makĩmũinamĩrĩra makĩhuutia thĩ na moothiũ maao." 
Genesis43:27 Akĩmooria ũrĩa maatariĩ, agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũthuuri ũcio mũkũrũ ithe wanyu, ũcio mwaheire ũhoro wake-rĩ, arĩ o ro ho? No mwega?”" 
Genesis43:28 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ, ndungata ĩyo yaku, ti baaba, ĩrĩ o ho, na no njega.” Makĩmũturĩria maru makĩmũinamĩrĩra." 
Genesis43:29 Rĩrĩa Josefu oonire mũrũ wa nyina Benjamini akiuga atĩrĩ, “Kwoguo ũyũ nĩ we mũrũ wa thooguo ũrĩa mũnyiinyi biũ ũrĩa mwaheete ũhoro wake? Mũũriũ, Ngai arokũraathima!”" 
Genesis43:30 Josefu agĩcooka akĩehera hau o hĩndĩ ĩyo amu ngoro yake nĩyaiyũrirwo nĩ gĩkeno nĩ ũndũ wa mũrũ wa nyina, akĩigua ta angĩita maithori. Agĩgĩtoonya nyũmba yake ya toro akĩrĩrĩra kuo." 
Genesis43:31 Agĩcooka agĩĩthamba ũthiũ, akiuma eyũmĩrĩirie ndakaarĩre, akiuga atĩ maheeo irio." 
Genesis43:32 Josefu agĩtwarĩrwo ciake handũ mwanya, na aariũ a ithe haao mwanya, na Amisiri arĩa maarĩanĩire nao haao mwanya, amu warĩ ũndũ wĩ mũgiro wa Amisiri kũrĩanĩra na Ayahudi." 
Genesis43:33 Aariũ a ithe na Josefu maikarĩĩte mang'ethanĩire na Josefu, na maikarĩĩte kũringana na ũrĩa maarũmanĩrĩire kuuma ũrĩa mũkũrũ nginya ũrĩa mũnyiinyi. Rĩrĩa moonire ũrĩa maikarĩĩte, makĩrorana magegeete." 
Genesis43:34 Maaheirwo irio kuuma meethainĩ ya Josefu, na Benjamini aaheirwo maita mataano ma acio angĩ. Nao makĩrĩa, makĩnyua, na magĩkenanĩra na Josefu." 
Genesis44:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Josefu nĩathire ndungata ĩrĩa yarũũgamĩrĩire mũciĩ wake atĩrĩ, “Ĩkĩrĩra andũ aya irio o iria mangĩhota gũkuua makũniainĩ maao, na mbeeca cia o mũndũ ciĩkĩrwo mũromoinĩ wa ikũnia rĩake." 
Genesis44:2 Ningĩ gĩkombe kĩrĩa gĩakwa kĩa betha, ũgĩĩkĩre mũromoinĩ wa ikũnia rĩa ũcio mũnyiinyi hamwe na mbeeca cia irio ciake.” Ndungata ĩyo ĩgĩgĩĩka o ta ũguo yerirwo." 
Genesis44:3 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ rũũciinĩ tene makĩĩrwo no makĩinũke na ndigiri ciao. 
Genesis44:4 Na rĩĩrĩ, matathiĩte kũraaya mũno na itũũra, Josefu akĩĩra ndungata ĩrĩa yarũũgamĩrĩire mũciĩ wake atĩrĩ, “Teng'eria andũ acio, wamakinyĩra ũmoorie atĩrĩ, ‘Mũrĩhĩĩte wega na ũũru nĩkĩ?" 
Genesis44:5 Mũiyĩte gĩkombe kĩa betha kĩa mũnene wakwa nĩkĩ? Nĩkĩo anyuaga nakĩo, na nokĩo aragũraga nakĩo. Nĩmwĩkĩĩte ũũru mũno.’ ”" 
Genesis44:6 Rĩrĩa ndungata ĩyo yamakinyĩrĩire, ĩgĩcookera ciugo icio." 
Genesis44:7 Nao makĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũthuuri ũyũ, ũrenda kuuga atĩa na ciugo icio? Tũkwĩhĩta atĩ gũtirĩ ũndũ ta ũcio twĩkĩĩte." 
Genesis44:8 Wee nĩũũĩ atĩ nĩtũracookirie kuuma Kanaani mbeeca iria tuonire mĩromoinĩ ya makũnia maitũ. Tũngĩkĩiya betha kana thahabu kuuma kwa mwathi waku nĩkĩ? 
Genesis44:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, kĩngĩkorwo kĩ na ũmwe witũ, nĩekũũragwo na ithuĩ acio angĩ tũtuĩke ngombo cia mwathi witũ.”" 
Genesis44:10 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ, nĩndeetĩkĩra ũguo mwoiga; no rĩĩrĩ, ũrĩa ũgũkorwo na gĩkombe, no we ũgũtuĩka ngombo yakwa, acio angĩ no mathiĩ.”" 
Genesis44:11 Magĩkĩruta makũnia maao na ihenya makĩmaiga thĩ, na o mũndũ akĩohora rĩake." 
Genesis44:12 Ndungata ya Josefu ĩgĩgĩcaria na kinyi, yambĩrĩirie na ikũnia rĩa ũrĩa mũkũrũ nginya rĩa ũrĩa mũnyiinyi, nakĩo gĩkombe gĩkĩoneka ikũniainĩ rĩa Benjamini." 
Genesis44:13 Aariũ a ithe magĩtarũranga nguo ciao nĩ ũndũ wa kĩeha, magĩcooka makĩigĩrĩra mĩrigo yao ndigiri igũrũ, magĩcooka itũũrainĩ." 
Genesis44:14 Rĩrĩa Juda na aariũ a ithe maakinyire kwa Josefu, Josefu aarĩ o kuo. Nao makĩmũinamĩrĩra." 
Genesis44:15 Naake akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ atĩa ũguo mwĩkĩĩte? Mũtiramenyaga atĩ mũndũ wĩ ta hau ndĩ no amenye aragũra?”" 
Genesis44:16 Naake Juda akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ rĩu tũkwaria tuuge atĩa? O na tũngĩhota gũcookanĩria nawe atĩa? Tũngĩhota gwĩkũũra na kĩ? Ngai nĩaguũrĩĩtie mahĩtia maitũ, na kwoguo to o ro ũcio gĩkombe kĩoneka ikũniainĩ rĩake ũgũtuĩka ngombo yaku; nĩ ithuothe.”" 
Genesis44:17 No Josefu akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Aaca, ũguo niĩ ndingĩĩka! No ũrĩa uuma na gĩkombe ũgũtuĩka ngombo yakwa. Acio angĩ aanyu no mũthiĩ na wega gwĩ ithe wanyu.”" 
Genesis44:18 Juda agĩthiĩ harĩ Josefu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwathi wakwa, ndagũthaitha reke ngũhe ũhoro na ndũkaaraakare nĩ ũndũ wakwa, niĩ ndungata yaku; wee ũhaana ta mũthamaki wa Misiri we mwene." 
Genesis44:19 Mwathi wakwa, wee nĩwatũũririe atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩmũrĩ thooguo kana mũrũ wa thooguo ũngĩ?’" 
Genesis44:20 Nĩtwagũcookeirie atĩrĩ, ‘Ĩĩ, nĩtũrĩ na ithe witũ na nĩ mũkũrũ, na nĩtũrĩ na mũrũ wa baaba ũrĩa mũnyiinyi, ũrĩa waciarĩirwo baaba e mũkũrũ. Mũrũ wa nyina na mũũriũ ũcio wa baaba nĩakuire, na ũcio no we wiki wa nyina ũtigarĩĩte; ithe nĩamwendeete mũno.’" 
Genesis44:21 Mwathi wakwa, wee nĩwatwĩrire tũmũreehe gũũkũ nĩguo ũmuone," 
Genesis44:22 no ithuĩ tũgĩkwĩra atĩ kamwana kau gatingĩtiga ithe; kangĩmũtiga, no gũkua angĩkua." 
Genesis44:23 Nĩwagĩtwĩrire atĩrĩ, ‘Ndikaamwĩtĩkĩria mũnyone rĩngĩ mwaga gũũka na mũrũ wa thooguo ũcio mũnyiinyi.’" 
Genesis44:24 “Rĩrĩa twacookire kũrĩ ithe witũ nĩtwamwĩrire ũguo woigire. 
Genesis44:25 Nĩacookire agĩtwĩra tũũke tũgũre tũirio tũngĩ," 
Genesis44:26 na ithuĩ tũkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Ithuĩ tũtigũthiĩ amu tũtiĩtĩkĩrio kuona mũndũ ũcio mũrũ wa baaba ũrĩa mũnyiinyi atarĩ hamwe na ithuĩ. Angĩkorwo nĩtũgũthiĩ na mũrũ wa baaba ũrĩa mũnyiinyi, nĩtũgũthiĩ.’" 
Genesis44:27 Ithe witũ aatwĩrire atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩmũũĩ atĩ mũtumia wakwa Rakeli aanjiarĩire aariũ eerĩ tu." 
Genesis44:28 Ũmwe wao nĩandigire, na no mũhaka akorwo aarĩirwo nĩ nyamũ cia gĩthaka, amu kuuma rĩrĩa aathiire ndirĩ ndamuona." 
Genesis44:29 Rĩu mwaruta ũyũ harĩ niĩ, athiĩ oone mũtino, kĩeha kĩrĩa mũkũnjĩkĩra nĩgĩkũnjũraga, ndĩ mũkũrũ ũguo ndĩ mũkũrũ.’" 
Genesis44:30 “Mwathi wakwa, rĩu ndakĩinũka kwĩ baaba, kamwana gaaka gatarĩ na ithuĩ, na muoyo wake nĩ ko wĩnyiitĩrĩire," 
Genesis44:31 no gũkua egũkua oona gatarĩ hamwe na ithuĩ. Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩ mũkũrũ ũguo atĩ kĩeha kĩrĩa tũngĩkĩmwĩkĩra no kĩmũũrage." 
Genesis44:32 Ũndũ ũngĩ nĩ atĩ, niĩ nĩndeheanire kũrĩ ithe witũ nduĩke mũrũũgamĩrĩri wako. Nĩndamwĩrire atĩ ndaaga gũcooka nako, ngaacookererwo nĩ kĩrumi muoyo wakwa wothe." 
Genesis44:33 Mwathi wakwa, rĩu ndagũthaitha ũreke njikare gũũkũ ndĩ ngombo yaku handũ ha kamwana gaaka; reke kainũke hamwe na aariũ aya angĩ a ithe." 
Genesis44:34 Niĩ-rĩ, ndakĩhota atĩa gũthiĩ kũrĩ we itarĩ na kamwana gaaka? Ndingĩenda kuona ũũru ũrĩa ũngĩnyiita baaba.”" 
Genesis45:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Josefu akĩremwo nĩkwĩyũmĩrĩria ndungata ciake i hau; kwoguo agĩciatha ciume kũu nyũmba. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩ o na ũmwe warĩ hamwe na Josefu rĩrĩa eemenyithirie aariũ a ithe." 
Genesis45:2 Josefu nĩagirĩkire oigĩrĩirie o nginya Amisiri makĩigua me nja, o na ũhoro ũcio ũgĩkinyĩrio mũthamaki wa Misiri gwake." 
Genesis45:3 Josefu agĩkĩĩra aariũ a ithe atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ Josefu. Baaba-rĩ, arĩ o ro muoyo?” Rĩrĩa aariũ a ithe maiguire ũguo, makĩmaka, makĩremwo nĩgũcookia." 
Genesis45:4 Josefu agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ndamũthaitha ũkaai hakuhĩ.” Mathiĩ hakuhĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ mũrũ wa ithe wanyu Josefu ũrĩa mwendirie Misiri." 
Genesis45:5 Rĩu mũtigaakĩigue ũũru kana mwĩmene atĩ tondũ nĩmwanyendirie gũũkũ; nĩ Ngai wandũmire mbere yanyu nĩguo ngaahonokia mĩoyo ya andũ. 
Genesis45:6 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ, mwaka ũyũ tũrĩ rĩu, nĩ wa keerĩ gũkorwo kwĩ na ng'aragu bũrũriinĩ, na nĩharĩ na mĩaka ĩngĩ ĩtaano gũtegũkorwo maciimba kana magetha." 
Genesis45:7 Ngai nĩ we wandũmire njũke gũũkũ mbere yanyu ndĩmũhonokie na njĩra ĩno ya magegania, nĩguo ti itherũ inyuĩ eene hamwe na njiarwa cianyu mũtũũre muoyo." 
Genesis45:8 Kwoguo ti inyuĩ mwandũmire njũke gũũkũ; nĩ Ngai wandũmire. Nĩanduire mũnjaama ũrĩa mũnene mũno wa mũthamaki wa Misiri. Nĩ niĩ mũrori wa mũciĩ wake wothe, na nĩ niĩ njathaga Misiri guothe." 
Genesis45:9 “Rĩu cookaai kũrĩ baaba narua mũmwĩre mũũrũwe Josefu ekuuga atĩrĩ, ‘Ngai nĩanduire mwathi wa Misiri guothe; ikũrũka narua ũũke na ndũgaikare." 
Genesis45:10 Woka ũrĩtũũraga mwena wa Gosheni, na ũrĩkoragwo ũrĩ hakuhĩ na niĩ wee mwene, ciana ciaku, na ciana cia ciana ciaku, o hamwe na ng'ondu ciaku, mbũri ciaku, ng'ombe ciaku, o na indo ciothe iria wĩ nacio." 
Genesis45:11 Ũngĩkorwo wĩ Gosheni-rĩ, nĩngũhota gũkũmenyerera, amu nĩgũgũkorwo kũrĩ na mĩaka ĩngĩ ĩtaano ya ng'aragu; ndigũkĩenda wee ũhũũte, kana andũ aaku, o na kana mahiũ maaku.’ ”" 
Genesis45:12 Josefu nĩathiire na mbere akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Rĩu inyuothe, nginyagia o nawe mũrũ wa maitũ Benjamini, nĩmuona atĩ nĩ niĩ Josefu ndĩramwarĩria." 
Genesis45:13 Gĩthiĩi mwĩre baaba ũrĩa niĩ ndĩ na ũhoti gũũkũ Misiri, na mũmwĩre maũndũ moothe marĩa mwĩyoneire. Mũcooke mũmũreehe gũũkũ narua.”" 
Genesis45:14 Nĩacookire akĩhĩmbĩria mũrũ wa nyina Benjamini na akĩambĩrĩria kũrĩra; o naake Benjamini akĩmũhĩmbĩria akĩrĩraga. 
Genesis45:15 O akĩrĩraga, akĩhĩmbĩria aariũ acio angĩ a ithe, akĩmamumunya ũmwe kwa ũmwe. Thuutha wa ũguo, aariũ a ithe makĩambĩrĩria kwaranĩria naake." 
Genesis45:16 Rĩrĩa ũhoro wakinyire kwa mũthamaki wa Misiri atĩ aariũ a ithe na Josefu nĩmookĩĩte, mũthamaki wa Misiri na njaama ciake nĩmaakenire." 
Genesis45:17 Naake mũthamaki wa Misiri akĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ, “Ĩra aariũ a thooguo maigĩrĩre nyamũ ciao mĩrigo macooke bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani." 
Genesis45:18 Mooe ithe wanyu o na andũ a mĩciĩ yao, mooke gũũkũ. Nĩngũmahe mwena ũrĩa mwega biũ wa Misiri, na nĩmekũgĩa na irio nyingĩ cia kũrĩa bũrũriinĩ ũyũ." 
Genesis45:19 Meere mathiĩ na makaari ma mbarathi kuuma Misiri magakuue atumia aao o na twana tũrĩa tũniini, na mooke na ithe wanyu." 
Genesis45:20 Matikaae gũtindanĩrĩra na indo ciao, amu mwena ũrĩa mwega biũ wa Misiri nĩ wao.”" 
Genesis45:21 Aariũ acio a Jakubu magĩĩka ũguo meerirwo. Josefu nĩamaneire makaari ma mbarathi ta ũguo mũthamaki aathanĩĩte, na akĩmatuma rĩĩgu." 
Genesis45:22 Ningĩ nĩamaheire nguo cia gũcenjania, no akĩhe Benjamini icunjĩ cia betha magana matatũ, na nguo ithaano cia gũcenjania." 
Genesis45:23 Nĩatũmĩire ithe ndigiri ikũmi ikuuĩĩte indo iria njega mũno cia Misiri, ndigiri ingĩ ikũmi ikuuĩĩte irio, mĩgate, na rĩĩgu wa gũkaarĩĩo nĩ ithe." 
Genesis45:24 Agĩkiugĩra aariũ a ithe ũhoro, na maatua gũthiĩ akĩmeera atĩ matikaanegenanie njĩrainĩ." 
Genesis45:25 Nao magĩkiuma Misiri magĩcooka mũciĩ kũrĩ ithe wao Jakubu bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani. 
Genesis45:26 Magĩkĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ, “Josefu arĩ o muoyo! Nĩ we wathanaga bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri!” Jakubu nĩamakire na ndameetĩkirie." 
Genesis45:27 No mamwĩra ũhoro wothe ũrĩa Josefu aameerĩĩte, na oona makaari ma mbarathi marĩa Josefu aatũmĩĩte ma kũmũkuua mamũtware Misiri, akĩmakũka." 
Genesis45:28 Agĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũrũ wakwa Josefu arĩ o muoyo! Niĩ ndirĩ ũndũ ũngĩ ngũbatario nĩguo! No mũhaka thiĩ ngamuone itanakua.”" 
Genesis46:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jakubu agĩkĩoya indo ciake ciothe, akĩnyiita rũgendo, na akinya Beerisheba akĩrutĩra Ngai wa ithe, Isaaka, magongoona." 
Genesis46:2 Ũtukũ Ngai nĩamwarĩirie na kĩoneki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Jakubu, Jakubu!”Naake Jakubu agĩĩtĩka atĩrĩ, “Ĩ niĩ ũyũ haaha.”" 
Genesis46:3 Naake Ngai agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ Ngai wa thooguo. Atĩrĩĩrĩ, ndũkaae gwĩtigĩra gũikũrũka Misiri, amu nĩngaatũma rũciaro rwaku rũtuĩke rũũrĩrĩ rũnene." 
Genesis46:4 Nĩngũthiĩ hamwe nawe Misiri, na nĩngaacookia njiarwa ciaku gũũkũ bũrũri ũyũ. Ningĩ Josefu nĩagaakorwo arĩ hamwe nawe ũgĩkua.”" 
Genesis46:5 Jakubu agĩkĩnyiita rũgendo kuuma Beerisheba, nao aariũ aake makĩmuoya we mwene, ciana ciao iria niini, o na atumia aao, makĩmahaicia makaariinĩ marĩa mũthamaki wa Misiri aatũmĩĩte ma kũmũkuua." 
Genesis46:6 Magĩgĩkuua mahiũ maao na indo iria maagĩĩte nacio kũu Kanaani, magĩthiĩ Misiri. Jakubu agĩkĩoya rũciaro rwake ruothe," 
Genesis46:7 ũguo nĩkuuga: aariũ aake, aarĩ aake, ciana cia aariũ aake, na cia aarĩ aake, agĩthiĩ nao." 
Genesis46:8 Andũ a mũciĩ wa Jakubu arĩa maathiire naake Misiri nĩ: mũũrũwe wa irigithaathi Reubeni 
Genesis46:9 na aariũ aake Hanoku, Palu, Hezironi, na Karimi." 
Genesis46:10 Simeoni na aariũ aake Jemueli, Jamini, Ohadi, Jakini, Zoharu, na Shaulu ũrĩa warĩ mũũriũ wa mũtumia Mũkanaani." 
Genesis46:11 Lawi na aariũ aake Gerishoni, Kohathu, na Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Juda na aariũ aake Shela, Perezu, na Zera. (Aariũ acio angĩ a Juda Eri na Onani maakuĩrĩire Kanaani.) Perezu na aariũ aake Hezironi na Hamulu." 
Genesis46:13 Isakaru na aariũ aake Tola, Pua, Jashubu, na Shimuroni." 
Genesis46:14 Zebuluni na aariũ aake Seredi, Eloni, na Jahaleeli." 
Genesis46:15 Acio nĩ o aariũ a Jakubu arĩa aaciarĩirwo nĩ Lea bũrũriinĩ wa Mesopotamia, na nĩarĩ na mwarĩ wetagwo Dina. Andũ acio mĩrongo ĩtatũ na atatũ nĩ o moimĩĩte harĩ Lea." 
Genesis46:16 Nao arĩa angĩ nĩ Gadi na aariũ aake Zefoni, Hagi, Shuni, Eziboni, Eri, Arodi, na Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Asheri na aariũ aake Imuna, Ishiva, Ishivi, Beria, na mwarĩ wa nyina wao Sera. Beria aarĩ na aariũ eerĩ Heberi na Malikieli." 
Genesis46:18 Andũ acio ikũmi na atandatũ nĩ o maarĩ rũciaro rwa Jakubu rwa kuuma harĩ Zilipa, ndungata ya mũirĩĩtu ĩrĩa Labani aaheete mwarĩ Lea." 
Genesis46:19 Mũtumia wa Jakubu ũrĩa wetagwo Rakeli aamũciarĩire aariũ eerĩ Josefu na Benjamini. 
Genesis46:20 Na rĩĩrĩ, Josefu e bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri nĩagĩire na aariũ eerĩ Manase na Efiraimu, arĩa aaciarĩirwo nĩ Asenathi mwarĩ wa Potifera mũthĩnjĩri ngai itũũrainĩ rĩa Heliopoli." 
Genesis46:21 Naake Benjamini na aariũ aake Bela, Bekeri, Ashibeli, Gera, Naamani, Ehi, Roshi, Mupimu, Hupimu, na Aradi." 
Genesis46:22 Andũ acio ikũmi na ana nĩ o rũciaro rwa Jakubu kuuma harĩ Rakeli. 
Genesis46:23 Naake Dani aarĩ na mũũriũ wetagwo Hushimu. 
Genesis46:24 Naake Nafutali na aariũ aake Jahazeeli, Guni, Jezeri, na Shilemu." 
Genesis46:25 Andũ acio mũgwanja nĩ o njiarwa cia Jakubu kuuma harĩ Biliha, ndungata ya mũirĩĩtu ĩrĩa Labani aaheete mwarĩ Rakeli." 
Genesis46:26 Andũ oothe a rũciaro rwa Jakubu arĩa maathiire Misiri maarĩ mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na atandatũ, matataranĩirio na atumia a aariũ aake." 
Genesis46:27 Naake Josefu nĩaciarĩirwo aariũ eerĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri, magakĩhinga andũ mĩrongo mũgwanja a mũciĩ wa Jakubu arĩa mookire Misiri." 
Genesis46:28 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jakubu nĩerire Juda athiage mbere akeere Josefu amatũnge Gosheni. Maakinya Gosheni," 
Genesis46:29 Josefu akĩoya ngaari yake ya mbarathi, agĩthiĩ Gosheni gũtũnga ithe. Maatũngana, Josefu akĩhĩmbĩria ithe na mooko meerĩ, akĩrĩra kwa ihinda inene." 
Genesis46:30 Naake Jakubu agĩkĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ, “Rĩu, o na ingĩkua, nĩndakuona na ndamenya atĩ ũrĩ o muoyo.”" 
Genesis46:31 Josefu agĩkĩĩra aariũ a ithe na andũ acio angĩ a mũciĩ wao atĩrĩ, “No mũhaka thiĩ ngeere mũthamaki wa Misiri atĩ aariũ a baaba na andũ a mũciĩ wa baaba oothe arĩa maratũũraga bũrũri wa Kanaani nĩmooka kũrĩ niĩ." 
Genesis46:32 Ngũmwĩra atĩ inyuĩ mũrĩ arĩithi, amu mũkoragwo na ng'ombe, na nĩmũoka na ndũũru cianyu cia mbũri, ng'ondu, ng'ombe, o hamwe na indo iria ingĩ cianyu ciothe." 
Genesis46:33 Mũthamaki wa Misiri aamwĩta amũũrie mũrutaga wĩra ũrĩkũ," 
Genesis46:34 mũmwĩre atĩrĩ, ‘Ithuĩ ndungata ciaku tũtũire tũrĩithagia ũtũũro witũ wothe o ta ũrĩa maithe maitũ meekaga.’ Mwamwĩra ũguo nĩekũreka mũtũũre mwena wa Gosheni.” Josefu aameerire ũguo tondũ Amisiri nĩmathũire arĩithi." 
Genesis47:1 Kwoguo Josefu akĩoya aariũ a ithe ataano agĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Baaba na aariũ a baaba nĩmooka kuuma Kanaani na mahiũ maao, na indo ciao ciothe, na rĩu me mwena wa Gosheni.”" 
Genesis47:2 Agĩcooka akĩmenyithania aariũ acio ataano a ithe kũrĩ mũthamaki. 
Genesis47:3 Mũthamaki wa Misiri agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũrutaga wĩra ũrĩkũ?”Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mwathi witũ, ithuĩ tũrĩ arĩithi o ta ũrĩa maithe maitũ maarĩ." 
Genesis47:4 Tũthaamĩire bũrũriinĩ ũyũ nĩ tondũ bũrũri wa Kanaani wĩ na ng'aragu nene mũno, o nginya gũkaaga nyeki ya mahiũ maitũ. Twagũthaitha twĩtĩkĩrie tũikare mwena wa Gosheni.”" 
Genesis47:5 Naake mũthamaki wa Misiri akĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ, “Rĩu tondũ thooguo na aariũ a thooguo nĩmooka kũrĩ we-rĩ," 
Genesis47:6 bũrũri wa Misiri nĩ wao; kwoguo reke maikare Gosheni, mwena ũrĩa mwega mũno wa bũrũri. Angĩkorwo gatagatĩinĩ kaao nĩharĩ na andũ ehoti, matue a kũrĩithagia mahiũ maakwa.”" 
Genesis47:7 Josefu nĩacookire agĩtoonyia ithe Jakubu, akĩmũmenyithania na mũthamaki. Naake Jakubu akĩraathima mũthamaki wa Misiri." 
Genesis47:8 Mũthamaki wa Misiri nĩamũũririe atĩrĩ, “Wĩ wa mĩaka ĩigana?”" 
Genesis47:9 Naake Jakubu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mĩaka ĩrĩa ndũire njũrũũraga nĩ igana na mĩrongo ĩtatũ. Nĩ mĩaka mĩnyiinyi na ya mĩtangĩko mĩingĩ, ĩtaigana mĩaka ĩrĩa mĩingĩ maithe maakwa maatũire moorũũraga.”" 
Genesis47:10 Jakubu akĩraathima mũthamaki wa Misiri, akĩmuugĩra ũhoro, agĩcooka agĩthiĩ." 
Genesis47:11 Josefu nĩagĩthiire akĩhe ithe na aariũ a ithe ũtũũro bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri, akĩmahe mwena ũrĩa mwega mũno wa bũrũri hakuhĩ na itũũra rĩa Ramesese, o ta ũrĩa aathĩĩtwo nĩ mũthamaki." 
Genesis47:12 Josefu nĩaheaga ithe irio, na aariũ a ithe, na andũ oothe a mũciĩ wa ithe, nginyagia arĩa anyiinyi biũ." 
Genesis47:13 Ng'aragu nĩyanenehire o nginya kũndũ guothe gũkĩaga irio, na andũ a Misiri na a Kanaani makĩaga hinya nĩ ũndũ wa ng'aragu." 
Genesis47:14 Na rĩĩrĩ, Josefu nĩonganirie mbeeca ciothe cia bũrũri wa Misiri na bũrũri wa Kanaani iria ciagũraga irio. Aaciũnganagia ciothe agacitwara kwa mũthamaki." 
Genesis47:15 Rĩrĩa mbeeca ciothe cia bũrũri wa Misiri na bũrũri wa Kanaani ciathirire, andũ oothe a Misiri magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Josefu makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mbeeca ciitũ nĩthiru, tũhe irio! Twagĩkua atĩa ũtwĩroreire!”" 
Genesis47:16 Naake Josefu agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Angĩkorwo mbeeca cianyu nĩthiru-rĩ, thiĩi mũreehe mahiũ ndĩmũkũũranĩrie na irio.”" 
Genesis47:17 Nĩmaakĩreeheire Josefu mahiũ maao, naake akĩmakũũrania na irio. Mahiũ macio maarĩ mbarathi, ng'ondu, mbũri, ng'ombe, na ndigiri. Mwaka ũcio wothe aamaheire irio, nao makĩmũreehere mahiũ maao moothe." 
Genesis47:18 Mwaka ũyũ ũngĩ nĩmookire kũrĩ we makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ, tũtirĩ ũndũ tũgũkũhitha. Mbeeca ciitũ nĩthiru, na mahiũ maitũ moothe nĩmatuĩkĩĩte maaku, rĩu ithuĩ, tũtirĩ kĩndũ tũtigarĩĩtie tũngĩkũhe tiga o mĩĩrĩ iitũ na ithaka ciitũ." 
Genesis47:19 Tũgũgĩkua nĩkĩ ũtwĩroreire? Tũnengere irio ũtũgũre hamwe na ithaka ciitũ. Ithuĩ eene tũgĩtuĩke ngombo cia mũthamaki, o nacio ithaka ciitũ ituĩke ciake. Tũhe irio cia kũrĩa o na mbegũ cia kũhanda mĩgũndainĩ iitũ nĩguo tũtigaakue bũrũri ũtigwo ũtheri.”" 
Genesis47:20 Kwoguo Josefu akĩgũrĩra mũthamaki wa Misiri ithaka ciothe. Amisiri oothe nĩmeendirie ithaka ciao ciothe amu ng'aragu nĩyanenehire mũno; naguo bũrũri wothe ũgĩgĩtuĩka wa mũthamaki. 
Genesis47:21 Nao andũ oothe arĩa maarĩ Misiri, kuuma mwena ũmwe nginya ũrĩa ũngĩ, magĩtuĩka ngombo cia mũthamaki." 
Genesis47:22 Ithaka iria ataagũrire no cia athĩnjĩri Ngai ciiki, tondũ o nĩmaaheagwo mũcaara nĩ mũthamaki. Mũcaara ũcio nĩguo maarĩaga, kwoguo matiendirie ithaka ciao." 
Genesis47:23 Josefu agĩkĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ, “Rĩu nĩmũkuona atĩ nĩndĩmũgũrĩĩte hamwe na ithaka cianyu mũgatuĩka a mũthamaki. Haaha harĩ mbegũ, cihandeei mĩgũndainĩ yanyu." 
Genesis47:24 Magetha maakinya, mũrĩnengagĩra mũthamaki gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe gĩa ithaano. Magethainĩ macio mangĩ nĩ ho mũrĩrutaga mbegũ cia kũhanda, na irio cia kũrĩĩo mĩciĩinĩ yanyu.”" 
Genesis47:25 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwathi witũ, wee nĩwatũhonokia; nĩũtwĩkĩĩte maũndũ meega, nĩtũgũtuĩka ngombo cia mũthamaki.”" 
Genesis47:26 Kwoguo Josefu akĩhĩtũkia watho bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri atĩ irio ciagethwo, gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe gĩa ithaano kĩrĩkoragwo gĩ kĩa mũthamaki. Watho ũcio ũtũũraga kuo nginyagia ũũmũũthĩ. Ithaka cia athĩnjĩri Ngai nocio itaatuĩkire cia mũthamaki." 
Genesis47:27 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩtũũra bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri mwena wa Gosheni, nao magĩkĩgĩa na ũtonga mũingĩ na ciana nyingĩ." 
Genesis47:28 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jakubu aikarire mĩaka ikũmi na mũgwanja bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri, na kwoguo nĩakinyirie mĩaka igana na mĩrongo ĩna na mũgwanja (147)." 
Genesis47:29 Ihinda rĩake rĩa gũkua rĩakuhĩrĩria, nĩetire mũũrũwe Josefu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Angĩkorwo nĩnjĩtĩkĩrĩkĩĩte nĩ we-rĩ, toonyia guoko gwaku cieroinĩ ciakwa wĩhĩte atĩ ndũgaathika Misiri." 
Genesis47:30 Ndakua, ũkaanguua ũndute bũrũri wa Misiri, ũgaathike kũrĩa aabaaba mathikĩĩtwo.”Naake Josefu agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Nĩngeeka o ta ũguo woiga.”" 
Genesis47:31 Naake Jakubu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Wĩhĩte.” Naake Josefu akĩĩhĩta. Jakubu agĩcookia ngaatho arĩ o hau ũrĩrĩinĩ wake." 
Genesis48:1 Thuutha ũcio, Josefu nĩerirwo atĩ ithe nĩ mũrũaru. Agĩkĩoya aariũ aake eerĩ Manase na Efiraimu, agĩthiĩ kuona ithe Jakubu." 
Genesis48:2 Rĩrĩa Jakubu eerirwo atĩ mũũrũwe Josefu nĩokĩĩte kũmuona, akĩyũmĩrĩria agĩikara thĩ ũrĩrĩinĩ." 
Genesis48:3 Jakubu agĩkĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ, “Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩanyumĩrĩire ndĩ Luzi bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani, akĩndaathima." 
Genesis48:4 Aanjĩĩrire atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩngaakũhe ciana nyingĩ, na njiarwa ciaku nĩigaatuĩka ndũũrĩrĩ nyingĩ. Bũrũri ũyũ nĩngaũhe njiarwa ciaku ũtuĩke wacio tene na tene.’" 
Genesis48:5 “Aariũ aaku eerĩ Efiraimu na Manase, arĩa waciarĩirwo gũũkũ bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri itanooka, nĩ aakwa, o ta ũrĩa Reubeni na Simeoni marĩ aakwa." 
Genesis48:6 Ũngĩgaaciarĩrwo aariũ angĩ thuutha wa acio, magaatuĩka aaku; makaagaĩrwo igai rĩao meetanĩĩtio na Efiraimu na Manase." 
Genesis48:7 Ndĩreeka ũguo tondũ wa maitũguo Rakeli. Ndĩ na kĩeha ngiuga atĩ aakuĩrĩire bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani, gũkuhĩ na Efiratha, rĩrĩa ndacookaga kuuma bũrũri wa Mesopotamia. Ndamũthikire kũu mũkĩrainĩ wa njĩra ya gũthiĩ Efiratha.” (Rĩu Efiratha ĩĩtagwo Bethilehemu.)" 
Genesis48:8 Rĩrĩa Jakubu oonire aariũ a Josefu akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Aya nĩ a?”" 
Genesis48:9 Naake Josefu akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ, “Aya nĩ aariũ aakwa, arĩa Ngai aheete ndĩ gũũkũ Misiri.”Naake Jakubu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ndagũthaitha mareehe harĩ niĩ, nĩ geetha ndĩmaraathime.”" 
Genesis48:10 Maitho ma Jakubu nĩmaambĩrĩirie kũũra nĩ ũndũ wa gũkũra, na kwoguo ndaakĩonaga wega. Josefu agĩkĩreehe tũmwana tũu harĩ we, naake agĩtũhĩmbĩria, na agĩtũmumunya." 
Genesis48:11 Jakubu agĩkĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndieciiragia atĩ nĩngaakuona rĩngĩ, no Ngai nĩatũmĩĩte nyone o na ciana ciaku.”" 
Genesis48:12 Naake Josefu akĩeheria ciana icio kuuma cieroinĩ cia ithe Jakubu, akĩinamĩrĩra mbere yake akĩhuutithia ũthiũ thĩ." 
Genesis48:13 Josefu agĩcooka akĩnyiita Efiraimu na guoko kwa ũrĩo, na Manase na guoko kwa ũmotho, akĩmareehareehe hakuhĩ na Jakubu. Akĩiga Efiraimu mwena wa ũmotho wa Jakubu, naake Manase mwena wa ũrĩo." 
Genesis48:14 No rĩĩrĩ, Jakubu agĩkĩrania mooko, akĩigĩrĩra Efiraimu guoko gwake kwa ũrĩo mũtwe, o na akorwo ti we warĩ irigithaathi, nakuo kwa ũmotho agĩkũigĩrĩra mũtweinĩ wa Manase, o na akorwo nĩ we warĩ mũkũrũ." 
Genesis48:15 Agĩcooka akĩraathima Josefu akiuga atĩrĩ:“Ngai ũrĩa maithe maakwa Aburahamu na Isaaka maatungatagĩra, o we Ngai ũrĩa ũtũire andongoragia nginyagia ũũmũũthĩ, aroraathima tũmwana tũũtũ!" 
Genesis48:16 Mũraika ũrĩa ũhonokeetie kuuma mĩtinoinĩ yothe, arotũraathima!Rĩĩtwa rĩakwa na rĩa maithe maakwa Aburahamu na Isaaka, marotũũrio na ũndũ wa tũmwana tũũtũ!Tũmwana tũũtũ tũrogĩa na ciana nyingĩ na njiarwa nyingĩ!”" 
Genesis48:17 Rĩrĩa Josefu oonire ithe aigĩrĩire guoko gwake kwa ũrĩo mũtweinĩ wa Efiraimu, ndakenire. Kwoguo akĩoya guoko gwa ithe akweherie mũtweinĩ wa Efiraimu, akũigĩrĩre mũtweinĩ wa Manase." 
Genesis48:18 Josefu akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ, “Baaba, ti ũguo! Kamwana gaaka nĩ ko ka irigithaathi; igĩrĩra guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo mũtweinĩ wako.”" 
Genesis48:19 No Ithe akĩrega akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩnjũũĩ, mũũriũ, nĩnjũũĩ. Atĩrĩĩrĩ, o na njiarwa cia Manase no igaatuĩka rũũrĩrĩ rũnene, no mũrũ wa nyina ũyũ mũnyiinyi nĩakaaneneha kũmũkĩra, na njiarwa ciake nĩigaatuĩka ndũũrĩrĩ nene.”" 
Genesis48:20 Kwoguo agĩkĩmaraathima mũthenya ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ, “Andũ a Isiraeli nĩmakaagwetaga marĩĩtwa maanyu makĩraathimana, makoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Ngai arogũtua ta Efiraimu na Manase.’ ” Kwoguo Jakubu agĩkĩiga Efiraimu mbere ya Manase." 
Genesis48:21 Ningĩ Jakubu akĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndĩ hakuhĩ gũkua, no Ngai nĩarĩkoragwo hamwe na inyuĩ, na nĩakaamũcookia bũrũriinĩ wa maithe maanyu." 
Genesis48:22 Wee, no ti aariũ a thooguo, nĩ we ndahe rũgongo rwa Shekemu, rũrĩa rũnoru, rũrĩa ndatuunyire Aamori ndĩ na rũhiũ rwakwa rwa njora na ũta.”" 
Genesis49:1 Ningĩ Jakubu agĩĩta aariũ aake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Cookanĩrĩraai hamwe ndĩmwĩre maũndũ marĩa mũgaatũngana namo thuuthainĩ." 
Genesis49:2 “Aariũ a Jakubu cookanĩrĩraai hamwe mũigue; tegeraai ithe wanyu Isiraeli matũ. 
Genesis49:3 “Wee Reubeni-rĩ, nĩ we irigithaathi rĩakwa, na hinya wakwa; nĩ we mwana wa mbere wa hinya wakwa.Nĩ we mũũriũ wakwa ũrĩa mwĩtĩi na ũrĩ hinya gũkĩra aariũ arĩa angĩ oothe aakwa." 
Genesis49:4 Wee wagaagĩĩte o ta maaĩ me irũtũinĩ; ndũrĩ hĩndĩ ũgaakĩra arĩa angĩ, amu nĩwakomire na mũtumia wakwa wa kũigwo,ũgĩkĩgwatia ũrĩrĩ wa thooguo thaahu." 
Genesis49:5 “Simeoni na Lawi nĩ a nyina ũmwe; mahũthagĩra indo cia mbaara makaruta ngũĩ. 
Genesis49:6 Niĩ-rĩ, ndingĩnyiitanĩra nao mĩarioinĩ yao ya hitho, o na ndingĩthiĩ mĩcemanioinĩ yao;amu nĩmooragire andũ nĩ ũndũ wa maraakara,na makĩonjia ndeegwa nĩ ũndũ wa kũmaramara kwao." 
Genesis49:7 Maraakara maao maronyiitwo nĩ kĩrumi, amu nĩ mooru mũno; mang'ũrĩ maao maronyiitwo nĩ kĩĩgau, amu me wĩĩ mũno;ngaamahurunja bũrũri wothe wa Isiraeli, na ndĩmanyaagie kũrĩ andũ aakuo." 
Genesis49:8 “Wee Juda-rĩ, aariũ a thooguo nĩmagaagũkumia.Nĩũkaanyiita thũ ciaku ngingo.Aariũ a thooguo nĩmagaakũinamĩrĩra." 
Genesis49:9 “Juda ahaana ta mũrũũthi, ũrĩa ũũragaga gĩa kũrĩa, ũgacooka kĩmaamoinĩ kĩaguo, ũkeyaragania ũgakoma.Gũtirĩ o na ũ ũgeragia kũũkĩria." 
Genesis49:10 Mũthĩĩgi wa ũnene, nĩ Juda ũgũtũũra aũnyiitĩĩte, na njiarwa ciake nĩcio igũtũũra ciathanaga.Andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ nĩmakaamũreehera iheeo, na mainamĩrĩre mbere yake menyiihĩĩtie." 
Genesis49:11 Oohaga njaũ yake ya ndigiri mũthabibũinĩ, amĩohagĩrĩra mũthabibũinĩ ũrĩa mwega biũ.Ahũũraga nguo ciake iria ndaaya na ndibei ĩrĩa nduune ta thakame." 
Genesis49:12 Maitho maake nĩ matuune nĩ ũndũ wa kũnyua ndibei, namo magego maake nĩ meerũ nĩ ũndũ wa kũnyua iria." 
Genesis49:13 “Zebuluni agaatũũra ndeereinĩ cia iria; ndeere ciake nĩcio igaatuĩka icukĩro cia meeri; mũhaka wake ũgaakorwo Sidoni. 
Genesis49:14 “Isakaru ahaana ndigiri ĩremeetwo nĩgũũkĩra nĩ ũrĩa ĩkuuithĩĩtio mĩrigo mĩritũ. 
Genesis49:15 No rĩĩrĩ, nĩonaga atĩ handũ ha kũhuurũka nĩ heega, na akoona bũrũri wĩ mwega.Kwoguo nĩainamagĩrĩra akuue mũrigo, agakĩrutithio wĩra na hinya ta ngombo." 
Genesis49:16 “Dani nĩagaatha andũ aao, o ta mĩhĩrĩga ĩyo ĩngĩ ya Isiraeli." 
Genesis49:17 Dani agaatuĩka ta nyoka ĩ mũkĩrainĩ wa njĩra; agaatuĩka ta nyoka ĩ thumu ĩ mũkĩrainĩ wa gacĩra, ĩrĩa ĩrũmaga mbarathi ndiira, naake ũrĩa ũkuuĩĩtwo nĩ mbarathi ĩyo akagua thĩ na ngara." 
Genesis49:18 “Njetereire ũhonokio waku, MWATHANI." 
Genesis49:19 “Gadi nĩagaatharĩkĩrwo nĩ ikundi cia atuunyani, no nĩagaaciũkĩrĩra aciteng'erie." 
Genesis49:20 “Mĩgũnda ya Asheri-rĩ, nĩgaakũraga irio njega; nĩakaarĩmaga irio ingĩrĩĩo nĩ mũthamaki." 
Genesis49:21 “Nafutali ahaana thwariga ĩratũũhatũũha, ĩrĩa ĩciaraga tũthwariga tũthaka mũno." 
Genesis49:22 “Josefu ahaana ta rũhonge rũrĩa rũciaraga wega; ahaana ta rũhonge rũrĩa rũciaraga wega rwĩ rũteereinĩ rwa gĩthima; honge ciake itaambaga rũthingo igũrũ. 
Genesis49:23 Thũ ciake nĩciamũtharĩkĩire i na ũũru mũingĩ mũno, ikĩmũteng'eria i na ũta na mĩguĩ." 
Genesis49:24 No ũta wake ũgĩikara wĩgaathĩĩte, namo mooko maake magĩĩkĩrwo hinyanĩ mooko ma Ngai wa Jakubu Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Hinya, o we Mũrĩithi na Mũgitĩri wa Isiraeli." 
Genesis49:25 Nĩ Ngai wa thooguo ũrĩgũteithagia; Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩ we ũrĩkũraathimaga na iraathimo cia mbura kuuma igũrũ, cia maaĩ marĩa me rungu rwa thĩ,na cia ng'ombe nyingĩ na ciana nyingĩ." 
Genesis49:26 Ningĩ nĩarĩkũraathimaga na iraathimo cia irio na mahũa, cia irĩma cia tene na tene, na cia indo njega ciumĩĩte ithũngũriinĩ cia aagu na aagu.Iraathimo icio iroikara mũtweinĩ wa Josefu; iroikara thiithiinĩ wa ũrĩa wamũranirio na aariũ a ithe." 
Genesis49:27 “Benjamini naake ahaana ta njũũi njũru mũno; rũũciinĩ na hwaĩinĩ ooragaga na akarĩa.” 
Genesis49:28 Ĩyo nĩ yo mĩhĩrĩga ĩrĩa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ya Isiraeli, na maũndũ macio nĩ mo ithe aameerire rĩrĩa amaraathimaga o mũndũ na kĩraathimo kĩrĩa kĩmwagĩrĩire." 
Genesis49:29 Jakubu agĩcooka agĩatha aariũ aake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Rĩu njerekeire gũkua. Ndakua, mũgaathika hamwe na maithe maakwa ngurungainĩ ĩrĩa ĩ mũgũndainĩ wa Efironi ũrĩa Mũhiti." 
Genesis49:30 Ngurunga ĩyo ĩ Makipela, mwena wa irathĩro wa Mamure bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani. Aburahamu aagũrire ngurunga ĩyo na mũgũnda ũcio kuuma kũrĩ Efironi irĩ cia gũthikanwo." 
Genesis49:31 Kũu nĩkuo Aburahamu na mũtumia wake Sara maathikirwo; nokuo Isaaka na mũtumia wake Rebeka maathikirwo, na nokuo ndathikire Lea." 
Genesis49:32 Mũgũnda ũcio na ngurunga ĩyo ciagũrirwo kuuma kũrĩ Ahiti.” 
Genesis49:33 Rĩrĩa Jakubu aarĩĩkirie kwarĩria aariũ aake, agĩkoma, agĩtuĩkana." 
Genesis50:1 Naake Josefu agĩkĩĩgũithia harĩ ithe akĩrĩraga, akĩmũmumunya." 
Genesis50:2 Agĩcooka agĩatha mandagĩtaarĩ marĩa maamutungatagĩra moomithie mwĩrĩ wa ithe. 
Genesis50:3 Maaniinire matukũ mĩrongo ĩna kũũmithia mwĩrĩ ũcio. Matukũ mĩrongo ĩna no mo maagĩrĩire gwĩka ũguo. Nao andũ a Misiri maamũcakaĩire matukũ mĩrongo mũgwanja. 
Genesis50:4 Matukũ ma gũcakaya mathira, Josefu akĩĩra anjaama a mũthamaki atĩrĩ, “Angĩkorwo nĩnjĩtĩkĩrĩkĩĩte nĩ inyuĩ-rĩ, ndamũthaitha mũthiĩ mũkeere mũthamaki atĩrĩ," 
Genesis50:5 ‘Baaba atanakua nĩanjĩĩrire ndĩhĩte atĩ ngaamũthika mbĩĩrĩrainĩ ĩrĩa aathondekeete bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani. Kwoguo ndagũthaitha reke thiĩ ngathike baaba, njooke njũke.’ ”" 
Genesis50:6 Naake mũthamaki agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Thiĩ ũgathike thooguo ta ũguo aakwĩhĩtithirie.”" 
Genesis50:7 Kwoguo Josefu akĩambata gũthika ithe. Anjaama oothe a mũthamaki, anene a mũciĩ wa mũthamaki, na atongoria oothe a Misiri magĩthiĩ na Josefu." 
Genesis50:8 O na andũ a mũciĩ wa Josefu, aariũ a ithe, na andũ acio angĩ a nyũmba ya ithe, oothe nĩmaathiire hamwe naake. No ciana ciao iria nyiinyi, ng'ondu, mbũri, na ng'ombe ciatigirwo mwena wa Gosheni." 
Genesis50:9 Ningĩ nĩathiire na thigari ciakuuĩĩtwo nĩ ngaari cia mbarathi, na ingĩ ciahaicĩĩte mbarathi; maarĩ andũ gĩkundi kĩnene mũno." 
Genesis50:10 Na rĩĩrĩ, makinya kĩhuuhĩroinĩ kĩa Atadi mwena wa irathĩro wa Jorodani, nĩmaacakaire maanĩrĩire ihinda iraaya, naake Josefu agĩcakaĩra ithe matukũ mũgwanja." 
Genesis50:11 Rĩrĩa andũ a Kanaani moonire andũ acio magĩcakaya me Atadi, moigire atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ andũ a Misiri me na macakaya manene-ĩ!” Kĩu nĩkĩo gĩatũmire handũ hau heetwo Abeli Miziraimu." 
Genesis50:12 Kwoguo aariũ a Jakubu makĩmwĩka o ta ũrĩa aameerĩĩte. 
Genesis50:13 Magĩgĩkuua mwĩrĩ wake makĩũtwara Kanaani makĩũthika ngurungainĩ ya mũgũnda ũrĩa warĩ Makipela, mwena wa irathĩro wa Mamure, mũgũndainĩ ũrĩa Aburahamu aagũrĩĩte kuuma kũrĩ Efironi ũrĩa Mũhiti, ũtuĩke wa gũthikanagwo." 
Genesis50:14 Josefu arĩĩkia gũthika ithe, agĩcooka Misiri o hamwe na aariũ a ithe na andũ arĩa angĩ oothe maathiĩte hamwe naake gũthika ithe." 
Genesis50:15 Thuutha wa gĩkuũ gĩa ithe, aariũ a ithe na Josefu makiuga atĩrĩ, “To gũkorwo Josefu atũũraga atũmeneete na rĩu nĩegũkĩĩrĩhĩria ũũru ũrĩa twamwĩkire?”" 
Genesis50:16 Kwoguo magĩtũma ndũmĩrĩri kũrĩ Josefu makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Baaba atanakua," 
Genesis50:17 aatwĩrire tũkwĩre atĩrĩ, ‘Ndagũthaitha ohera aariũ a thooguo ngero ĩrĩa maakũgerire rĩrĩa maakũhĩtĩirie.’ Rĩu ithuĩ ndungata cia Ngai wa thooguo twagũthaitha ũtuohere ngero ĩrĩa twakũgerire.” Josefu nĩarĩrire aanyiita ndũmĩrĩri ĩyo." 
Genesis50:18 Aariũ a ithe o eene nĩmaacookire magĩũka makĩĩgũithia mbere yake makĩhuutithia ũthiũ thĩ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ, twĩ ndungata ciaku.”" 
Genesis50:19 No Josefu akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Tigaai gwĩtigĩra, ndingĩĩkĩra ithenyainĩ rĩa Ngai." 
Genesis50:20 Inyuĩ mwaciirĩĩte mũnjĩke ũũru, no rĩĩrĩ, Ngai agĩtũma ũndũ mwega woneke, nĩ geetha gũtuĩke o ta ũũ gũtariĩ ũũmũũthĩ nĩguo andũ aingĩ mahonokio matũũre muoyo." 
Genesis50:21 Kwoguo inyuĩ mũtiagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩtigĩra. Niĩ nĩngũmũmenyerera o hamwe na ciana cianyu.” Kwoguo akĩmoomĩrĩria o rĩngĩ na akĩmahooreria. 
Genesis50:22 Josefu nĩathiire na mbere gũtũũra bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri hamwe na andũ a mũciĩ wa ithe, na aakuire e wa mĩaka igana na ikũmi." 
Genesis50:23 Josefu nĩatũũrire nginya akĩona ciana cia Efiraimu, o na ciana cia ciana cia Efiraimu, o na nginya akĩamũkĩra ciana cia Makiri mũrũ wa Manase thĩinĩ wa andũ aao." 
Genesis50:24 Josefu nĩerire aariũ a ithe atĩrĩ, “Niĩ, ndĩ hakuhĩ gũkua, no Ngai nĩ ma nĩekũmũmenyerera na nĩakaamũtongoria amũrute bũrũriinĩ ũyũ, amũtware bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa eerĩire Aburahamu na mwĩhĩtwa atĩ nĩakaahe Isaaka na Jakubu.”" 
Genesis50:25 Josefu nĩacookire akĩĩra andũ aake atĩrĩ, “Mwĩhĩteei atĩ rĩrĩa Ngai akaamũtongoria amũtware bũrũriinĩ ũcio, nĩmũgaakuua mahĩndĩ maakwa mũthiĩ namo.”" 
Genesis50:26 Josefu aakuĩrĩire Misiri e wa mĩaka igana na ikũmi. Mwĩrĩ wake nĩmaaũmithirie makĩwĩkĩra ithandũkũ. 
Exodus1:1 Marĩĩtwa ma aariũ a Jakubu arĩa maathiire Misiri hamwe naake, o mũndũ agĩthiĩ na andũ a mũciĩ wake, nĩ mo maya:" 
Exodus1:2 Reubeni, Simeoni, Lawi, Juda," 
Exodus1:3 Isakaru, Zebuluni, Benjamini," 
Exodus1:4 Dani, Nafutali, Gadi, na Asheri." 
Exodus1:5 Andũ acio oothe maarĩ njiarwa cia Jakubu, na maarĩ mĩrongo mũgwanja. No mũũrũwe Josefu hĩndĩ ĩyo aarĩ Misiri." 
Exodus1:6 Na rĩĩrĩ, Josefu agĩkua, o hamwe na aariũ a ithe, na rũciaro rũu ruothe." 
Exodus1:7 No njiarwa ciao, nĩcio andũ a Isiraeli, igĩciarana ikĩgĩa na hinya na ikĩingĩha mũno, o nginya ikĩiyũra bũrũri wa Misiri." 
Exodus1:8 Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩkwagĩire mũthamaki ũngĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri, ũtooĩ Josefu." 
Exodus1:9 Naake akĩĩra andũ aake atĩrĩ, “Andũ aya a Isiraeli nĩ aingĩ mũno, o na nĩmatũkĩrĩĩtie hinya." 
Exodus1:10 Kũngiuma mbaara, mahota kũnyiitana na thũ ciitũ mahũũrane na ithuĩ, na moore kuuma bũrũriinĩ. Kwoguo no mũhaka tũmathiĩ na wara, tũcarie njĩra ya kũgiria maingĩhe.”" 
Exodus1:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, andũ a Misiri makĩmaigĩra anyabaara akũmahinyĩrĩria na mawĩra maritũ; magĩgĩakĩra mũthamaki wa Misiri matũũra ma kũigwo indo marĩa meetagwo Pithomu na Ramesese." 
Exodus1:12 No o ũrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maahinyagĩrĩrio, noguo moongererekaga na magathiĩ na mbere kũhunja bũrũriinĩ. Nao andũ a Misiri magĩkĩambĩrĩria gwĩtigĩra andũ a Isiraeli." 
Exodus1:13 Kwoguo makĩrutithia andũ a Isiraeli wĩra na hinya mũno," 
Exodus1:14 o na makĩmaritũhĩria ũtũũro mũno na ũndũ wa kũmarutithia wĩra wa hinya wa gũthondeka thimiti na maturubaarĩ, na kũruta mawĩra ma mĩthemba yothe mĩgũndainĩ yao matekũmaiguĩra tha." 
Exodus1:15 Mũthamaki wa Misiri agĩcooka akĩarĩria Shifira na Pua, atumia Ahibirania a gũciarithania, akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Exodus1:16 “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mwathiĩ gũteithĩrĩria atumia a Ahibirania gũciara-rĩ, angĩkorwo nĩ kahĩĩ gaaciarwo, mũgakooraga, no angĩkorwo nĩ kairĩĩtu, mũtigakooragage.”" 
Exodus1:17 No atumia acio a gũciarithania nĩmaatĩĩĩte Ngai; matiigana gwĩka ũrĩa mũthamaki wa Misiri aamaathĩĩte. Handũ ha gwĩka ũguo, nĩmaarekagĩrĩria twana twa tũhĩĩ tũtũũre muoyo." 
Exodus1:18 Kwoguo mũthamaki agĩtũmanĩra atumia acio a gũciarithania akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩkĩ kĩratũma mũrekererie twana twa tũhĩĩ tũtũũre muoyo?”" 
Exodus1:19 Atumia acio a gũciarithania magĩcookeria mũthamaki atĩrĩ, “Atumia a Ahibirania matihaana ta atumia a Amisiri, nĩ amu o me hinya na moohokaga tũtakinyĩĩte.”" 
Exodus1:20 (20-21) Nĩ ũndũ wa gũkorwo atumia acio aciarithania nĩmaatĩĩĩte Ngai, Ngai nĩameekire wega agĩtũma magĩe na mĩciĩ yao eene. Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩthiĩ na mbere kuongerereka na kũgĩa na hinya." 
Exodus1:21 Naake mũthamaki agĩgĩatha andũ aake oothe akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Kaana o goothe ga kahĩĩ karĩciaragwo nĩ Ahibirania no mũhaka mũgagaikia rũũĩ rwa Nailo, no tũirĩĩtu mũkareka tũtũũre muoyo.”" 
Exodus2:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ ũmwe wa mũhĩrĩga wa Lawi nĩahikirie mũirĩĩtu wa mũhĩrĩga o ro ũcio," 
Exodus2:2 naake mũtumia ũcio agĩciara kaana ga kahĩĩ. Rĩrĩa oonire ũrĩa kaana kau kaarĩ gathaka, agĩkahitha mĩeri ĩtatũ." 
Exodus2:3 Rĩrĩa aaremirwo nĩgũthiĩ na mbere gũkahitha, akĩoya gĩkabũ gĩathondekeetwo na ithanjĩ, agĩgĩthinga na rami nĩguo gĩtigatonyie maaĩ. Agĩcooka agĩkomia kaana kau thĩinĩ wa gĩkabũ kĩu, agĩkĩiga ithanjĩinĩ rũteereinĩ rwa rũũĩ." 
Exodus2:4 Naake mwarĩ wa nyina na kaana kau akĩrũũgama haraaya nĩguo oone ũrĩa gũgũtuĩka igũrũ rĩako. 
Exodus2:5 Na rĩĩrĩ, mwarĩ wa mũthamaki agĩikũrũka gwĩthamba rũũĩinĩ, nacio ndungata ciake cia airĩĩtu ciaceerangaga mwenainĩ wa rũũĩ. O rĩmwe mwarĩ ũcio wa mũthamaki akĩona gĩkabũ kĩu gatagatĩ ga ithanjĩ, agĩtũma ndungata ĩmwe yake ya mũirĩĩtu ĩgakĩgĩĩre." 
Exodus2:6 Rĩrĩa mwarĩ ũcio wa mũthamaki akĩhingũrire, akĩona kaana ga kahĩĩ, nako kaana nĩkũrĩra kaarĩraga. Agĩkaiguĩra tha akiuga atĩrĩ, “Kaana gaaka nĩ kamwe ga twana twa Ahibirania.”" 
Exodus2:7 Naake mwarĩ wa nyina na kaana kau akĩũria mwarĩ wa mũthamaki atĩrĩ, “Nĩũkwenda thiĩ ngagwĩtĩre mũtumia Mũhibirania nĩguo akũrerere kaana gaaka?”" 
Exodus2:8 Naake mwarĩ wa mũthamaki akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ.” Kwoguo mũirĩĩtu ũcio agĩthiĩ agĩĩta nyina wa kaana kau." 
Exodus2:9 Naake mwarĩ wa mũthamaki akĩĩra mũtumia ũcio atĩrĩ, “Oya kaana gaaka ũthiĩ ũnderere, na nĩndĩrĩkũheaga mũcaara.” Mũtumia ũcio agĩkĩoya kaana kau, agĩkarera." 
Exodus2:10 Thuuthainĩ kaana kau gaakũrakũra, agĩgatwarĩra mwarĩ wa mũthamaki, nako gagĩtuĩka mũũriũ wake. Agĩgatua Musa, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩ amu ndakarutire maaĩinĩ.” Ningĩ rĩĩtwa rĩĩri nĩrĩĩtanagio na Seiru, bũrũri ũrĩa thuuthainĩ wacookire gũtũũrwo nĩ njiarwa cia Esau." 
Exodus2:11 Na rĩĩrĩ, Musa atuĩka mũndũ mũgima, mũthenya ũmwe nĩoimagarire agĩthiĩ gũceerera andũ aao, nĩ o Ahibirania, akĩona ũrĩa maarutithagio wĩra wa hinya. O na ningĩ nĩonire Mũmisiri akĩhũũra ũmwe wa Ahibirania aao." 
Exodus2:12 Naake Musa akĩrora mwena na mwena, akĩona atĩ hatirĩ mũndũ wamuonaga, akĩũraga Mũmisiri ũcio, na akĩhitha mwĩrĩ wake mũthangainĩ." 
Exodus2:13 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũcio ũngĩ oimagara, agĩkora Ahibirania eerĩ makĩgiana. Akĩũria ũrĩa warĩ na mahĩtia atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ kĩratũma ũgie Mũhibirania ũrĩa ũngĩ?”" 
Exodus2:14 Naake mũndũ ũcio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nũũ ũgũtuĩte mũnene witũ na mũtũtuithania? Anga nĩũkwenda kũnjũraga ta ũrĩa ũrooragire Mũmisiri?” Musa agĩgĩĩtigĩra, akĩĩĩra na ngoro atĩrĩ, “Ti itherũ andũ nĩmarĩĩkĩĩtie kũmenya ũrĩa ndĩreekire.”" 
Exodus2:15 (15-16) Rĩrĩa mũthamaki aiguire ũrĩa gwekĩkĩĩte, akĩgeria kũũragithia Musa, no Musa akĩũra agĩthiĩ gũtũũra bũrũriinĩ wa Midiani.Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũmwe rĩrĩa Musa aikarĩĩte thĩ gĩthimainĩ, airĩĩtu mũgwanja a mũthĩnjĩri Ngai wa Midiani wetagwo Jethero magĩũka gũtaha maaĩ, na kũiyũria mĩharatĩ nĩ geetha ũhiũ wa ithe wao ũnyue maaĩ." 
Exodus2:16 No arĩithi magĩũka makĩmaingata. Naake Musa akĩrũũgama akĩmateithĩrĩria, na akĩnyuithia ũhiũ wao maaĩ." 
Exodus2:17 Rĩrĩa airĩĩtu acio maacookire kũrĩ ithe wao, akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ arĩ atĩa ũũmũũthĩ mwacooka tene ũguo?”" 
Exodus2:18 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ Mũmisiri watũteithũra kuuma kũrĩ arĩithi, o na atũtahĩra maaĩ anyuithia ũhiũ witũ.”" 
Exodus2:19 Naake ithe akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũcio arĩ ha? Mũmũtigire nĩkĩ? Thiĩi mũkamwĩte nĩ geetha arĩanĩre na ithuĩ.”" 
Exodus2:20 Kwoguo Musa agĩĩtĩkĩra gũtũũra kũu, naake Jethero akĩmũhe mũirĩĩtu wake wetagwo Zipora amũhikie." 
Exodus2:21 Naake Zipora agĩciarĩra Musa kaana ga kahĩĩ karĩa aatuire Gerishomu amu oigire atĩrĩ, “Ndĩ mũgeni bũrũriinĩ ũyũ.”" 
Exodus2:22 Thuutha wa mĩaka mĩingĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri agĩkua. Nao andũ a Isiraeli no macaayaga marĩ ũkomboinĩ na magakaya mateithio. Nakĩo kĩrĩro kĩao gĩgĩkinyĩra Ngai," 
Exodus2:23 akĩigua mũcaayo wao, na akĩririkana kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩake na Aburahamu, Isaaka, na Jakubu." 
Exodus2:24 Naake Ngai akĩona ũkombo wa andũ a Isiraeli, agĩitĩka kũmarũmbũiya." 
Exodus3:1 Mũthenya ũmwe, rĩrĩa Musa arĩithagia ũhiũ wa mũthoni we Jethero, mũthĩnjĩri Ngai wa Midiani, nĩatwarire ũhiũ mwena ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa werũ o kinya agĩkinya kĩrĩmainĩ, kĩrĩa gĩtheru gĩa Sinai." 
Exodus3:2 Arĩ kũu, mũraika wa MWATHANI nĩamuumĩrĩire arĩ rũrĩrĩmbĩinĩ rwa mwaki rwoimaga gatagatĩ ga kĩhinga. Naake Musa aacũũthĩrĩria, akĩona atĩ kĩhinga nĩgĩakanaga, no gĩtiahĩaga." 
Exodus3:3 Naake Musa akĩĩĩra na ngoro atĩrĩ, “Ũyũ nĩ ũndũ wa magegania, reke nguhĩrĩrie nyone nĩ kĩĩ kĩratũma kĩhinga kĩage kũhĩa.”" 
Exodus3:4 Rĩrĩa MWATHANI oonire Musa agĩkuhĩrĩria kĩhinga, akĩmwĩta kuuma gatagatĩ ga kĩhinga akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Musa! Musa!”Naake agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Ĩ niĩ ũyũ haaha.”" 
Exodus3:5 Ngai akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Ndũgakuhĩrĩrie; ruta iraatũ ciaku nĩ amu hau ũrũngiĩ nĩ handũ hatheru.”" 
Exodus3:6 Agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ Ngai wa maithe maaku, Ngai wa Aburahamu, Isaaka, na Jakubu.” Musa agĩkĩĩhumbĩra ũthiũ nĩ amu nĩetigĩrire kũrora Ngai." 
Exodus3:7 MWATHANI agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩndĩkĩĩtie kuona mĩnyamaaro ya andũ aakwa arĩa me Misiri, na ngaigua kĩrĩro kĩao atĩ mahonokio kuuma kũrĩ anyabaara arĩa mamahinyagĩrĩria. Nĩnjũũĩ mathĩĩna marĩa marĩ namo," 
Exodus3:8 na kwoguo nĩnjikũrũkĩĩte ndĩmahonokie kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Misiri. Ngũmaruta bũrũri wa Misiri ndĩmatware bũrũriinĩ mwariĩ, mwega na mũnoru, kũrĩa rĩu gũtũirwo nĩ Akanaani, Ahiti, Aamori, Aperizi, Ahivi, na Ajebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Ti itherũ kĩrĩro kĩa andũ a Isiraeli nĩkĩnginyĩire, na nĩnyoneete ũrĩa andũ a Misiri maramahinyĩrĩria." 
Exodus3:10 Rĩu nĩngũgũtũma kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri nĩ geetha ũgatongorie andũ aakwa moime bũrũriinĩ ũcio.” 
Exodus3:11 No Musa akĩũria Ngai atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndĩkĩrĩ ũ atĩ nĩguo thiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri nĩguo ngatongorie andũ a Isiraeli ndĩmarute kuo?”" 
Exodus3:12 Naake Ngai akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũkorwo hamwe nawe; na rũũrũ nĩruo rũũri rwa kuonania atĩ nĩ niĩ ndagũtũma: waruta andũ kuuma Misiri, nĩmũgaathaathayĩria kĩrĩmainĩ gĩĩkĩ.”" 
Exodus3:13 No Musa agĩcookeria Ngai atĩrĩ, “Ndathiĩ kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli ndĩmeere atĩ, ‘Ngai wa maithe maanyu nĩ we wandũma kũrĩ inyuĩ’ nao manjũũrie atĩrĩ, ‘Rĩĩtwa rĩake nĩ rĩrĩkũ?’ Ngaameera atĩa?”" 
Exodus3:14 Naake Ngai akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “NĨ NIĨ ŨRĨA WE.” Ũũ nĩguo ũkaameera: ũrĩa wĩtagwo, “NĨ NIĨ, nĩ we wandũma kũrĩ inyuĩ.”" 
Exodus3:15 Ningĩ Ngai akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Ĩra andũ a Isiraeli atĩ, ‘MWATHANI, Ngai wa maithe maanyu, o we Ngai wa Aburahamu, Isaaka, na Jakubu, nĩ we wandũma kũrĩ inyuĩ.’ Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo rĩĩtwa rĩakwa kinya tene; na ũguo nĩguo njiarwa ciothe irĩnjĩtaga." 
Exodus3:16 Thiĩ ũcookanĩrĩrie atongoria oothe a Isiraeli ũmeere atĩ, niĩ MWATHANI, o niĩ Ngai wa maithe maanyu, o niĩ Ngai wa Aburahamu, Isaaka, na Jakubu, nĩnguumĩrĩire. Meere atĩ nĩnjũkĩĩte kũrĩ o, na nĩnyoneete maũndũ marĩa andũ a Misiri marameeka." 
Exodus3:17 Nĩnduĩte atĩ nĩngũmaruta moime mĩnyamaaroinĩ ĩrĩa marathĩĩnio nayo bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri, ndĩmatware bũrũri mwega na mũnoru; bũrũri wa Akanaani, Ahiti, Amori, Aperizi, Ahivi, na wa Ajebusi." 
Exodus3:18 “Nao nĩmagaathikĩrĩria ũrĩa ũkaameera. Ningĩ nĩũgaacooka ũthiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri ũrĩ hamwe na atongoria a Isiraeli ũmwĩre atĩrĩ, ‘MWATHANI, o we Ngai wa Ahibirania nĩeyonanĩĩtie kũrĩ ithuĩ; tondũ wa ũguo twĩtĩkĩrie tũthiĩ werũinĩ rũgendo rwa mĩthenya ĩtatũ nĩguo tũkarutĩre MWATHANI, Ngai witũ magongoona.’" 
Exodus3:19 No rĩĩrĩ, nĩnjũũĩ atĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri ndemũreka mũthiĩ o tiga ahatĩrĩirio eeke ũguo." 
Exodus3:20 No nĩngaahũthĩra hinya wakwa herithie bũrũri wa Misiri na ũndũ wa gwĩka maũndũ ma kũguoyohia kuo. Thuutha wa maũndũ macio, mũthamaki nĩakamwĩtĩkĩria mũthiĩ." 
Exodus3:21 “Nĩngaatũma andũ a Misiri matĩĩe andũ a Isiraeli, nĩguo rĩrĩa andũ aakwa makoima Misiri, matikaanathiĩ mooko matheri." 
Exodus3:22 Mũtumia Mũisiraeli o wothe nĩagaathiĩ kũrĩ Mũmisiri ũrĩa marigainie, o na kũrĩ mũgeni o wothe ũrĩ nyũmba ya Mũmisiri ũcio, ameetie nguo, indo cia betha, o na cia thahabu. Indo icio mũgaaciĩkĩra aariũ na aarĩ aanyu, na kwoguo mũgĩkuue ũtonga wa andũ a Misiri.”" 
Exodus4:1 Ningĩ Musa agĩcookeria MWATHANI atĩrĩ, “Andũ a Isiraeli mangĩrega kũnjĩtĩkia na gũthikĩrĩria ũrĩa ngũmeera-rĩ, ngeeka atĩa mangĩnjĩĩra atĩ wee ndwanyumĩrĩire?”" 
Exodus4:2 Kwoguo MWATHANI agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ kĩu ũnyiitĩĩte?”Naake Musa akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ mũthĩĩgi.”" 
Exodus4:3 MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Taũikie thĩ.” Rĩrĩa Musa aikirie mũthĩĩgi ũcio thĩ, ũgĩtuĩka nyoka, naake akĩmĩũrĩra." 
Exodus4:4 No MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Inamĩrĩra ũmĩnyiite gitong'oe.” Musa agĩkĩinamĩrĩra akĩmĩnyiita, nayo ĩgĩtuĩka mũthĩĩgi rĩngĩ." 
Exodus4:5 MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũguo nĩguo ũgeeka nĩguo andũ a Isiraeli meetĩkie atĩ MWATHANI, o we Ngai wa maithe maao, o we Ngai wa Aburahamu, Isaaka, na Jakubu nĩakuumĩrĩire.”" 
Exodus4:6 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩarĩria Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Taikia guoko gwaku gĩthũriinĩ gĩaku.” Naake Musa agĩikia guoko gwake gĩthũriinĩ gĩake; rĩrĩa aakũrutire, gũgĩkorwo kũrũarĩĩte mũrimũ mũũru wa ngoothi, gũkeerũha o ta ira." 
Exodus4:7 MWATHANI akĩmwĩra rĩngĩ atĩrĩ, “Tacookia guoko gwaku gĩthũriinĩ gĩaku.” Naake agĩĩka o ta ũguo, na rĩrĩa aakũrutire, gũgĩkorwo gwĩ kũgima o ta mwĩrĩ ũrĩa ũngĩ." 
Exodus4:8 MWATHANI agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mangĩkaaga gũgwĩtĩkia o na kana marege kũigua ũira wa kĩama kĩa mbere, nĩmageetĩkia ũira wa kĩama kĩu gĩa keerĩ." 
Exodus4:9 Mangĩkĩrega gwĩtĩkia o na ũira wa ciama icio cierĩ, kana marege gũthikĩrĩria ũrĩa ũkaameera-rĩ, nĩũgaathiĩ ũtahe maaĩ rũũĩinĩ rwa Nailo ũmaite thĩ. Maaĩ macio nĩmagaatuĩka thakame.”" 
Exodus4:10 No Musa akĩĩra MWATHANI atĩrĩ, “Mwathi wakwa, tiga kũndũma. Niĩ ndirĩ mũndũ mwaria, o na ndirĩ ndatuĩka mwaria kuuma tene, o na kuuma rĩrĩa wambĩrĩirie kwaria na niĩ. Mwarĩrie wakwa nĩ wa kahora, na nĩndondoiraga.”" 
Exodus4:11 MWATHANI agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nũũ ũheaga mũndũ hinya wa kwaria? Nũũ ũtũmaga mũndũ atuĩke gĩtaigua kana aremwo nĩkwaria? Nũũ ũmũheaga ũhoti wa kuona kana agatũma atuĩke gĩtumuumu? Githĩ ti niĩ, MWATHANI?" 
Exodus4:12 Rĩu gĩthiĩ! Nĩngũgũteithĩrĩria kwaria na nĩngũgũtaara ũrĩa ũkuuga.” 
Exodus4:13 No Musa agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Mwathi wakwa, ndagũthaitha tũma mũndũ ũngĩ.”" 
Exodus4:14 MWATHANI agĩkĩraakarĩra Musa akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Githĩ mũrũ wa maitũguo Harũni ũrĩa Mũlawii ndarĩ ho? Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ no ahote kwaria wega. O na nĩarooka gũgũtũnga, na akuona nĩegũkena." 
Exodus4:15 Mwarĩrie na ũmũtaare ũrĩa ekuuga; nĩngũmũteithĩrĩria inyuĩ eerĩ kwaria na ndĩmũtaare ũrĩa mũgwĩka. 
Exodus4:16 Nĩ we ũgũtuĩka wa kwaragĩria andũ handũ haaku, nawe ũgĩtuĩke ta Ngai harĩ we ũmwĩrage ũrĩa ekuuga." 
Exodus4:17 Oya mũthĩĩgi ũyũ ũthiĩ naguo, amu nĩũkaaringa ciama naguo.”" 
Exodus4:18 Naake Musa agĩcooka kũrĩ Jethero, mũthoni we akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ndagũthaitha ũnjĩtĩkĩrie njooke kũrĩ andũ aitũ arĩa marĩ Misiri, nĩ geetha ngarore kana marĩ o muoyo.” Jethero akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Thiĩ na thaayũ.”" 
Exodus4:19 Naake Musa arĩ o kũu bũrũriinĩ wa Midiani, MWATHANI nĩamwarĩirie akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Cooka Misiri nĩ amu arĩa oothe meendaga gũkũũraga nĩmarĩĩkĩĩtie gũkua.”" 
Exodus4:20 Kwoguo Musa agĩkĩoya mũtumia wake na aariũ aake, akĩmahaicia ndigiri, akĩnyiita rũgendo rwa gũcooka Misiri. Aathiire akuuĩĩte mũthĩĩgi ũrĩa Ngai aamwĩrĩĩte akuue." 
Exodus4:21 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Warĩĩkia gũcooka bũrũri wa Misiri-rĩ, ũtigĩrĩre nĩwaringa mbere ya mũthamaki wa Misiri ciama ciothe iria ngũheete hinya wa kũringa. No nĩngũũmia ngoro yake nĩguo agirie andũ mathiĩ." 
Exodus4:22 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũkaamwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘MWATHANI ekuuga ũũ: Isiraeli nĩ mũũriũ wakwa wa irigithaathi." 
Exodus4:23 Ndakwĩra atĩ ũreke mũũriũ wakwa athiĩ nĩ geetha agaathaathaiye. Ũngĩrega kũmwĩtĩkĩria athiĩ, nĩngũũraga mũũrũguo wa irigithaathi.’ ”" 
Exodus4:24 Na rĩĩrĩ, marĩ handũ maambĩĩte hema njĩrainĩ magĩthiĩ Misiri-rĩ, MWATHANI nĩatũngire Musa na akĩgeria kũmũũraga." 
Exodus4:25 (25-26) Zipora agĩkĩoya kahiga kahaanaga rũenji, akĩruithia mũũriũ nako, agĩcooka akĩhuutia magũrũ ma Musa na gakonde kau. Nĩ ũndũ wa irua rĩu akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Ti itherũ wee wĩ mũthuuri wa thakame!” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio MWATHANI agĩkĩhonokia muoyo wa Musa." 
Exodus4:26 Na rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie kwĩra Harũni atĩrĩ, “Thiĩ werũinĩ ũgatũnge Musa.” Kwoguo agĩthiĩ akĩmũtũnga kĩrĩmainĩ gĩtheru, akĩmũmumunya." 
Exodus4:27 Naake Musa agĩgĩtaarĩria Harũni ũhoro wothe ũrĩa MWATHANI aamũheete rĩrĩa aamwĩrire acooke Misiri. O na ningĩ nĩamũtaarĩirie ũhoro wa ciama iria MWATHANI aamwathĩĩte aringe. 
Exodus4:28 Kwoguo Musa na Harũni magĩgĩthiĩ Misiri, na makĩũngania atongoria oothe a andũ a Isiraeli." 
Exodus4:29 Harũni akĩmahe ũhoro wothe ũrĩa MWATHANI eerĩĩte Musa, naake Musa akĩringa ciama andũ meroreire." 
Exodus4:30 Nao andũ magĩĩtĩkia. Rĩrĩa maiguire atĩ MWATHANI nĩokĩĩte kũmarora, na nĩoneete mĩnyamaaro yao, makĩinamĩrĩria mĩtwe magĩthaathaiya." 
Exodus5:1 Musa na Harũni magĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI, Ngai wa Isiraeli, ekuuga atĩrĩ, ‘Reke andũ aakwa mathiĩ, nĩ geetha makagĩe na thigũkũ ya kũngumia werũinĩ.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 No mũthamaki akĩũria atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI nũũ atĩ nĩguo ndĩmũthikĩrĩrie na njĩtĩkĩrie andũ a Isiraeli mathiĩ? MWATHANI ũcio niĩ ndimũũĩ, na ndigwĩtĩkĩria andũ a Isiraeli mathiĩ.”" 
Exodus5:3 Nao Musa na Harũni magĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Ngai wa Ahibirania nĩeyonithanĩĩtie kũrĩ ithuĩ; twagũthaitha ũtwĩtĩkĩrie tũthiĩ rũgendo rwa mĩthenya ĩtatũ werũinĩ tũkarutĩre MWATHANI Ngai witũ magongoona. Twaga gwĩka ũguo, nĩegũtũniina na mĩrimũ kana mbaara.”" 
Exodus5:4 No mũthamaki akĩũria Musa na Harũni atĩrĩ, “Mũrenda gũtigithia andũ wĩra wao nĩkĩ? Thiĩi mwĩre ngombo icio icooke wĩrainĩ wacio!" 
Exodus5:5 Inyuĩ andũ aya nĩmũingĩhĩĩte gũkĩra andũ a Misiri, na rĩu mũrenda gũtiga kũruta wĩra!”" 
Exodus5:6 Mũthenya o ro ũcio, mũthamaki agĩatha akabuurũ arĩa maarĩ Amisiri na anyabaara arĩa maarĩ Aisiraeli akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Exodus5:7 “Mũtigaacooke kũhe andũ rũũa rwa ngano rwa gũthondeka maturubaarĩ naruo; kuuma rĩu rekeei mathiage gwĩcarĩria o eene. 
Exodus5:8 No mũigana wa maturubaarĩ marĩa marĩthondekaga ũrĩkoragwo ũrĩ o ta wa mbere. Mũtikaamanyiihĩrie o na haniini, nĩ amu nĩmagũũtarĩĩte na nĩkĩo marandĩrĩra atĩ ndeke mathiĩ makarutĩre Ngai wao magongoona!" 
Exodus5:9 Nĩmaheeo wĩra mũritũ makĩria ũrĩa makoragwo makĩruta nĩguo matigaacooke kũrũmbũyania na ũhoro wa maheeni.” 
Exodus5:10 Kwoguo akabuurũ na anyabaara magĩthiĩ kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli makĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũthamaki ekuuga atĩ ndegũcooka kũmũhe rũũa rwa ngano rĩngĩ." 
Exodus5:11 Mũrĩthiaga mũkarũcaria o kũrĩa mũngĩhota kũruona, na mũmenye atĩ wĩra wanyu ndũkũnyiihanyiihio o na haniini.”" 
Exodus5:12 Kwoguo andũ magĩkĩũrũũra Misiri guothe gũcaria rũũa. 
Exodus5:13 Nao akabuurũ no maamahatagĩrĩria mathondeke o mũthenya mũigana wa maturubaarĩ o ta ũrĩa maathondekaga hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maaheagwo rũũa. 
Exodus5:14 Nao akabuurũ a Misiri makĩhũũra anyabaara a andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maigĩĩte marũũgamagĩrĩre wĩra makĩmooragia atĩrĩ, “Nĩkĩ kĩratũma mwage gũthondeka mũigana wa maturubaarĩ ta ũrĩa mũrathondekaga mbere?”" 
Exodus5:15 Anyabaara acio a andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩthiĩ magĩkaĩra mũthamaki makiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũthamaki, nĩkĩ kĩratũma ũtũĩke maũndũ ta maya, ithuĩ ndungata ciaku?" 
Exodus5:16 Tũtiraheeo rũũa, na no tũrathwo tũthondeke maturubaarĩ! Ningĩ no tũrahũũrwo, o na gũtuĩka andũ aaku nĩ o me na mahĩtia.”" 
Exodus5:17 No mũthamaki akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ mũrĩ igũũta na mũtirenda kũruta wĩra; nĩkĩo mũranjũũria ndĩmwĩtĩkĩrie mũthiĩ mũkarutĩre MWATHANI magongoona." 
Exodus5:18 Rĩu cookaai mũkarute wĩra! Gũtirĩ rũũa mũkũheeo, na no mũhaka mũthondeke mũigana wa maturubaarĩ o ta wa mbere.”" 
Exodus5:19 Anyabaara acio a andũ a Isiraeli magĩkĩona atĩ maarĩ thĩĩnainĩ rĩrĩa meerirwo atĩ o mũthenya no mũhaka mathondekage mũigana wa maturubaarĩ o ta ũrĩa marathondekaga mbere ĩyo. 
Exodus5:20 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa moimaga kwa mũthamaki magĩtũngana na Musa na Harũni arĩa maameetereire." 
Exodus5:21 Nao makĩĩra Musa na Harũni atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI nĩoneete ũrĩa mwĩkĩĩte, na hatirĩ nganja nĩekũmũherithia nĩ ũndũ wa gũtũma mũthamaki na njaama ciake itũthũũre. Nĩmũrĩkĩĩtie kũmahe kĩĩgwatio gĩa gũtũũraga.”" 
Exodus5:22 Musa agĩkĩhũgũkĩra MWATHANI rĩngĩ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI, nĩkĩ kĩratũma wĩke andũ aaku ũũru? Nĩkĩ gĩatũmire ũndũme gũũkũ?" 
Exodus5:23 Kuuma rĩrĩa ndathiire kũrĩ mũthamaki kũmwarĩria thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩaku, no gwĩka eekaga andũ aya ũũru, nawe ndũrĩ ũndũ wĩkĩĩte wa kũmakũũra!”" 
Exodus6:1 No MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Rĩu nĩũkuona ũrĩa ngwĩka mũthamaki wa Misiri. Ngũmũhatĩrĩria nginya areke andũ aakwa mathiĩ; ti itherũ ngũmũhinyĩrĩria ndũme amaingate moime bũrũriinĩ wake.”" 
Exodus6:2 Ningĩ Ngai akĩarĩria Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI." 
Exodus6:3 Nĩndoimĩrĩire Aburahamu, Isaaka, na Jakubu, ta Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe, no ndiemenyithanirie kũrĩ o na rĩĩtwa rĩakwa rĩtheru ‘MWATHANI.’" 
Exodus6:4 Ningĩ nĩndathondekire kĩrĩĩkanĩro nao atĩ nĩngaamahe bũrũri wa Kanaani, o bũrũri ũrĩa maatũũraga ta ageni." 
Exodus6:5 Rĩu nĩnjiguĩte mũcaayo wa andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maigĩĩtwo ũkomboinĩ nĩ andũ a Misiri, na ngakĩririkana kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩakwa." 
Exodus6:6 Kwoguo ĩra andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI, na nĩngũmũruta ndĩmũrekererie kuuma ũkomboinĩ wa andũ a Misiri. Nĩngũtambũrũkia guoko gwakwa kwĩ hinya ndĩmareehere iherithia inene, na nĩngũmũhonokia." 
Exodus6:7 Nĩngũmũtua andũ aakwa, na niĩ nduĩke Ngai wanyu. Nĩmũkaamenya atĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI Ngai wanyu rĩrĩa ngaamũruta kuuma ũkomboinĩ wa Misiri." 
Exodus6:8 Na nĩngũmũtwara bũrũri ũrĩa ndehĩtire atĩ nĩngaahe Aburahamu, Isaaka, na Jakubu; nĩngũmũhe ũtuĩke wanyu kĩũmbe. Niĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI.’ ”" 
Exodus6:9 No Musa eera andũ a Isiraeli maũndũ macio, makĩrega kũmũthikĩrĩria, nĩ amu nĩmakuĩte ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa ũkombo wao mũũru." 
Exodus6:10 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ," 
Exodus6:11 “Thiĩ wĩre mũthamaki wa Misiri areke andũ a Isiraeli moime bũrũri wake.” 
Exodus6:12 No Musa agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “O andũ a Isiraeli makĩrege gũũthikĩrĩria, no mũthamaki wa Misiri ũgwĩtĩkĩra gũũthikĩrĩria, o niĩ mũndũ ũtooĩ kwaria?”" 
Exodus6:13 No MWATHANI agĩatha Musa na Harũni akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ĩraai andũ a Isiraeli o na mũthamaki wa Misiri, atĩ nĩndamwatha mũtongorie andũ a Isiraeli moime bũrũri wa Misiri.”" 
Exodus6:14 Reubeni, ũrĩa warĩ irigithaathi rĩa Jakubu aarĩ na aariũ ana: Hanoku, Palu, Hezironi, na Karimi. Acio nĩ o maarĩ maithe ma mbarĩ iria ciĩtanĩĩtio na marĩĩtwa maao." 
Exodus6:15 Simeoni aarĩ na aariũ atandatũ: Jemueli, Jamini, Ohadi, Jakini, Zoharu, na Shaulu, ũrĩa warĩ mũũriũ wa mũtumia Mũkanaani. Acio nĩ o maarĩ maithe ma mbarĩ iria ciĩtanĩĩtio na marĩĩtwa maao." 
Exodus6:16 Lawi aarĩ na aariũ atatũ: Gerishoni, Kohathu, na Merari. Acio nĩ o maarĩ maithe ma mbarĩ iria ciĩtanĩĩtio na marĩĩtwa maao. Lawi aatũũrire mĩaka igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩtatũ na mũgwanja (137)." 
Exodus6:17 Gerishoni aarĩ na aariũ eerĩ: Libini, na Shimei, na maarĩ na njiarwa nyingĩ." 
Exodus6:18 Kohathu aarĩ na aariũ ana: Amuramu, Iziharu, Heburoni, na Uzieli. Kohathu aatũũrire mĩaka igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩtatũ (133)." 
Exodus6:19 Naake Merari aarĩ na aariũ eerĩ: Mahali, na Mushi. Icio nĩcio mbarĩ cia Lawi na njiarwa ciacio." 
Exodus6:20 Na rĩĩrĩ, Amuramu akĩhikia taatawe wetagwo Jokebedi, ũrĩa wamũciarĩire Harũni na Musa. Amuramu aatũũrire mĩaka igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩtatũ na mũgwanja (137)." 
Exodus6:21 Iziharu aarĩ na aariũ atatũ: Kora, Nefegu, na Zikiri." 
Exodus6:22 O naake Uzieli aarĩ na aariũ atatũ: Mishaeli, Elizafani, na Sithiri." 
Exodus6:23 Na rĩĩrĩ, Harũni akĩhikia Elisheba, mwarĩ wa Aminadabu, ũrĩa warĩ mwarĩ wa nyina na Nahashoni, naake akĩmũciarĩra: Nadabu, Abihu, Eleazaru, na Ithamaru." 
Exodus6:24 Kora aarĩ na aariũ atatũ: Asiru, Elikana, na Abiasafu; acio nĩ o maarĩ maithe ma nyũmba cia mbarĩ ya Kora." 
Exodus6:25 Naake Eleazaru, mũrũ wa Harũni, akĩhikia mũirĩĩtu ũmwe wa Putieli, naake mũirĩĩtu ũcio akĩmũciarĩra Finehasi. Acio nĩ o maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba na mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Lawi." 
Exodus6:26 Harũni na Musa nĩ o MWATHANI eerire atĩrĩ, “Umiai andũ a Isiraeli bũrũri wa Misiri kũringana na mĩhĩrĩga yao.”" 
Exodus6:27 No o meerire mũthamaki wa Misiri arekererie andũ a Isiraeli. 
Exodus6:28 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa MWATHANI aarĩirie Musa bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri," 
Exodus6:29 aamwĩrire atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI; ĩra mũthamaki wa Misiri ũhoro wothe ũrĩa ngũkwĩra.”" 
Exodus6:30 No Musa agĩcookeria MWATHANI atĩrĩ, “Wee nĩũũĩ atĩ niĩ ndiũĩ kwaria; mũthamaki wa Misiri angĩgĩĩthikĩrĩria atĩa?”" 
Exodus7:1 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũgũtua ta Ngai harĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri, naake Harũni mũrũ wa maitũguo arĩaragia ta mũnabii waku." 
Exodus7:2 Wee ũrĩĩraga Harũni maũndũ moothe marĩa ndĩrĩgwathaga, naake akeera mũthamaki wa Misiri nĩguo arekererie andũ a Isiraeli moime bũrũri wake." 
Exodus7:3 (3-4) No nĩngũũmia mũthamaki wa Misiri ngoro, na ndarĩmũthikĩrĩria, o na ndathiĩ na mbere gwĩka maũndũ ma kũguoyohia bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri. Ningĩ nĩngũreehithĩria Misiri na iherithia rĩnene, na ndongorie mĩhĩrĩga ya andũ aakwa yume bũrũri ũcio." 
Exodus7:4 Andũ a Misiri nĩmagaakĩmenya atĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI, rĩrĩa ngaamatambũrũkĩria guoko gwakwa ndĩmahũũre, na ndute andũ a Isiraeli bũrũriinĩ wao.”" 
Exodus7:5 Nao Musa na Harũni magĩgĩĩka o ũrĩa MWATHANI aamaathĩĩte. 
Exodus7:6 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maarĩirie mũthamaki wa Misiri, Musa aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩnaana, naake Harũni aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩnaana na ĩtatũ." 
Exodus7:7 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa na Harũni atĩrĩ," 
Exodus7:8 “Mũthamaki wa Misiri angĩmwĩra mũringe kĩama nĩguo mwonanie atĩ mũrĩ a ma-rĩ, wee Musa ĩra Harũni ooe mũthĩĩgi wake aũikie thĩ mbere ya mũthamaki, naguo nĩũgũtuĩka nyoka.”" 
Exodus7:9 Kwoguo Musa na Harũni magĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki magĩĩka o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aamaathĩĩte. Harũni agĩikia mũthĩĩgi wake thĩ mbere ya mũthamaki na njaama ciake, naguo ũgĩtuĩka nyoka." 
Exodus7:10 Mũthamaki agĩgĩĩta andũ aake arĩa oogĩ na ago, nao makĩhũthĩra ũgo wao magĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Harũni eekĩĩte." 
Exodus7:11 Magĩgĩikia mĩthĩĩgi yao thĩ, nayo ĩgĩtuĩka nyoka. No mũthĩĩgi wa Harũni ũkĩmeria mĩthĩĩgi yao." 
Exodus7:12 O na gwatuĩka ũguo, mũthamaki wa Misiri akĩũmia ngoro, na o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI oigĩĩte, akĩrega gũthikĩrĩria Musa na Harũni." 
Exodus7:13 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Mũthamaki nĩomĩĩtie ngoro mũno, na nĩaregeete kũreka andũ mathiĩ." 
Exodus7:14 Kwoguo thiĩ ũmũtũnge kĩrooko hĩndĩ ĩrĩa arathiĩ rũũĩinĩ rwa Nailo, na ũkuue mũthĩĩgi ũrĩa wagarũrũkĩĩte ũgatuĩka nyoka, ũmweterere hũgũrũrũinĩ cia rũũĩ." 
Exodus7:15 Nawe ũkĩmwĩre atĩrĩ, ‘MWATHANI, o we Ngai wa Ahibirania, nĩ we ũndũmĩĩte kũrĩ wee ngwĩre ũreke andũ aake mathiĩ, nĩ geetha makamũthaathaĩrie werũinĩ. No rĩĩrĩ, nginyagia rĩu nĩũregeete gũthikĩrĩria." 
Exodus7:16 MWATHANI egũkiuga atĩ ũndũ ũrĩa ũgũkũmenyithia atĩ we nĩ we MWATHANI nĩ atĩ, nĩngũgũtha maaĩ ma rũũĩ na mũthĩĩgi ũyũ nyiitĩĩte na guoko gwakwa, namo nĩmekũgarũrũka matuĩke thakame." 
Exodus7:17 Nacio thamaki nĩigũkua, naruo rũũĩ rũnunge mũno ũguo atĩ andũ a Misiri matihota kũnyua maaĩ maaruo.’ ”" 
Exodus7:18 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Ĩra Harũni ooe mũthĩĩgi wake atambũrũkie guoko gwake igũrũ rĩa njũũĩ ciothe cia Misiri, mĩtaro yakuo, o na maria maakuo. Maaĩ moothe megũtuĩka thakame, bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri kũgĩe thakame nginyagia indoinĩ ciothe cia mbaaũ kana cia mahiga.”" 
Exodus7:19 Musa na Harũni magĩgĩĩka o ta ũrĩa maathĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI. Harũni akĩoya mũthĩĩgi wake na igũrũ akĩgũtha maaĩ ma rũũĩ rwa Nailo, mũthamaki wa Misiri na njaama ciake meroreire; namo maaĩ moothe rũũĩinĩ makĩgarũrũka magĩtuĩka thakame." 
Exodus7:20 Nacio thamaki iria ciarĩ rũũĩ igĩkua, naruo rũũĩ rũkĩnunga ũũru mũno o nginya andũ a Misiri makĩremwo nĩkũnyua maaĩ maaruo. Ningĩ gũkĩgĩa thakame bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri." 
Exodus7:21 No ago a Misiri magĩĩka o ta ũguo na ũgo wao; kwoguo mũthamaki wa Misiri agĩthiĩ na mbere kũũmia ngoro, akĩrega gũthikĩrĩria Musa na Harũni o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI oigĩĩte." 
Exodus7:22 Handũ ha ũguo, aahũndũkire akĩinũka gwake mũciĩ, o na ũndũ ũcio ndaigana kũwĩkĩra ngoro." 
Exodus7:23 Nao andũ oothe a Misiri makĩenja hũgũrũrũinĩ cia rũũĩ nĩguo moone maaĩ ma kũnyua nĩ amu matingĩahotire kũnyua maaĩ ma rũũĩ rwa Nailo. 
Exodus7:24 Na rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI arĩĩkia kũgũtha rũũĩ rwa Nailo ũguo, gũkĩniina mĩthenya mũgwanja." 
Exodus8:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Thiĩ kwa mũthamaki ũmwĩre, MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ, ‘Reke andũ aakwa mathiĩ nĩ geetha magaathaathaiye." 
Exodus8:2 No rĩĩrĩ, ũngĩrega kũmareka mathiĩ-rĩ, nĩngũherithia bũrũri waku na kũũiyũria ciũra." 
Exodus8:3 Rũũĩ rwa Nailo rũkũiyũra ciũra iria igũũka nginya nyũmba gwaku o na nginya nyũmba yaku ya toro, o na gĩtandainĩ gĩaku, na nginya nyũmbainĩ cia njaama ciaku o na cia andũ aaku, o na nginya itoonye mariikoinĩ maaku ma gũcinĩra irio, o na indoinĩ ciaku cia gũkimĩra mũtu." 
Exodus8:4 Ciũra icio irĩkũrũũgagĩrĩra igatamba mwĩrĩ waku, mĩĩrĩ ya andũ aaku, o na ya njaama ciaku ciothe.’ ”" 
Exodus8:5 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Ĩra Harũni atambũrũkie guoko gwake kũnyiitĩĩte mũthĩĩgi wake igũrũ rĩa njũũĩ, mĩtaro, o na maria, atũme ciũra igĩe bũrũri wothe wa Misiri.”" 
Exodus8:6 Kwoguo Harũni agĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake igũrũ rĩa maaĩ moothe na cio ciũra ikiumĩra ikĩiyũra bũrũri wothe wa Misiri. 
Exodus8:7 No ago magĩĩka o ta ũguo na ũgo wao, magĩtũma ciũra ciumĩre bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri." 
Exodus8:8 Mũthamaki wa Misiri agĩgĩĩta Musa na Harũni akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thaithaai MWATHANI anjehererie ciũra ici o na aciehererie andũ aakwa, na nĩngwĩtĩkĩria andũ aanyu mathiĩ, nĩ geetha makarutĩre MWATHANI magongoona.”" 
Exodus8:9 Musa akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũkena ngĩgũthaithanĩrĩra. No njĩĩra nĩ ihinda rĩrĩkũ ngũgũthaithanĩrĩra, na thaithanĩre njaama ciaku, o na andũ aaku nĩguo ciũra iniinwo ikweherere, na ciehere nyũmbainĩ ciaku itigare o rũũĩinĩ rwa Nailo.”" 
Exodus8:10 Naake mũthamaki agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Thaithanĩra rũũciũ.” Musa akiuga atĩrĩ, “Reke gũtuĩke o ũguo woiga, nĩ geetha ũmenye atĩ gũtirĩ ũngĩ ũhaana ta MWATHANI Ngai witũ." 
Exodus8:11 Ciũra nĩigũkweherera, na cieherere nyũmba ciaku, o na njaama ciaku, o na andũ aaku; gũtirĩ igaatigara o tiga thĩinĩ wa rũũĩ rwa Nailo.”" 
Exodus8:12 Kwoguo Musa na Harũni magĩkiuma kwa mũthamaki, naake Musa agĩthaitha MWATHANI eeherie ciũra icio o ta ũrĩa aiguithanĩirie na mũthamaki" 
Exodus8:13 Naake MWATHANI agĩĩka ũrĩa Musa aamũũrĩĩtie, nacio ciũra iria ciarĩ nyũmbainĩ, o na kũu nja, o na mĩgũndainĩ igĩkua." 
Exodus8:14 Nao andũ a Misiri magĩcicookereria irũndo nene, o nginya bũrũri ũkĩnunga nĩ ũndũ wacio." 
Exodus8:15 No rĩrĩa mũthamaki oonire atĩ ciũra nĩirĩĩkĩĩtie gũkua, akĩũmia ngoro rĩngĩ, na o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI oigĩĩte, akĩrega gũthikĩrĩria Musa na Harũni." 
Exodus8:16 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Ĩra Harũni atambũrũkie mũthĩĩgi wake agũthe rũkũngũ rwa thĩ, naruo nĩrũkũgarũrũka rũtuĩke rwagĩ bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri.”" 
Exodus8:17 Kwoguo Harũni agĩgĩtambũrũkia mũthĩĩgi wake akĩgũtha rũkũngũ rwa thĩ, naruo rũkũngũ ruothe thĩinĩ wa Misiri rũgĩtuĩka rwagĩ, naruo rwagĩ rũu rũkĩũmbĩrĩra andũ o na nyamũ." 
Exodus8:18 Nao ago makĩgeria gwĩka o ta ũguo na ũgo wao atĩ matũme rwagĩ rũgĩe, no makĩremwo. Naruo rwagĩ rũu rwaiyũire kũndũ guothe." 
Exodus8:19 Nao ago acio makĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ, “Ngai nĩ we wĩkĩĩte ũũ!” No mũthamaki akĩũmia ngoro, na o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI oigĩĩte, akĩrega gũthikĩrĩria Musa na Harũni." 
Exodus8:20 MWATHANI agĩkĩarĩria Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Rũũciũ rũũciinĩ rooka gũkĩra, weterere mũthamaki agĩthiĩ rũũĩinĩ, ũmwĩre MWATHANI oiga atĩrĩ, ‘Reke andũ aakwa mathiĩ nĩ geetha magaathaathaiye." 
Exodus8:21 Waga kũreka mathiĩ-rĩ, nĩngũkũherithia na gũkũreehithĩria mĩrumbĩ ya ngi ikũũmbĩrĩre na ciũmbĩrĩre njaama ciaku o na andũ aaku, na itoonye thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ciaku, ciyũre nyũmba cia andũ a Misiri, na bũrũri kũiyũrwo nĩcio." 
Exodus8:22 No nĩngũgitĩra mwena wa Gosheni, kũrĩa andũ aakwa matũraga, nĩ geetha kũu gũtikaagĩe ngi. Ngwĩka maũndũ macio nĩguo ũmenye atĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI ndĩraruta wĩra bũrũriinĩ ũyũ." 
Exodus8:23 Na njĩra ĩyo, nĩnguonania ngũũrani gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ aakwa na andũ aaku. Nakĩo kĩama kĩu gĩgeekĩka rũũciũ.’ ”" 
Exodus8:24 Naake MWATHANI agĩĩka o ro ũguo; gũgĩũka mĩrumbĩ mĩnene ya ngi thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya mũthamaki, o na thĩinĩ wa nyũmba cia njaama ciake, o na bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri. Bũrũri wothe ũgĩthũũkangio nĩ ngi icio." 
Exodus8:25 Mũthamaki agĩgĩĩta Musa na Harũni akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thiĩi mũkarutĩre Ngai wanyu magongoona o gũũkũ bũrũriinĩ ũyũ.”" 
Exodus8:26 No Musa akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Gũtingĩkorwo arĩ wega gwĩka ũguo, nĩ amu indo iria tũkũrutĩra MWATHANI Ngai witũ magongoona, nĩ indo irĩ thaahu kũrĩ andũ a Misiri. Twakĩruta magongoona ma indo irĩ thaahu andũ a Misiri makĩonaga-rĩ, githĩ matigũgĩtũhũũra na mahiga?" 
Exodus8:27 No mũhaka tũthiĩ rũgendo rwa mĩthenya ĩtatũ werũinĩ, tũkarutĩre MWATHANI Ngai witũ magongoona o ta ũrĩa atwathĩĩte.”" 
Exodus8:28 Kwoguo mũthamaki agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũreka mũthiĩ mũkarutĩre MWATHANI Ngai wanyu magongoona werũinĩ, angĩkorwo mũtigũthiĩ kũraaya mũno. O na niĩ hoeraai.”" 
Exodus8:29 Naake Musa agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Ndarĩĩkia gũthiĩ o ũguo, nĩngũhooya MWATHANI atĩ rũũciũ ngi ici igaakorwo ikwehereire, na ciehereire njaama ciaku, na andũ aaku. No rĩĩrĩ, no mũhaka ũmenye ndũgatũheenie rĩngĩ na ũtũgirie tũthiĩ tũkarutĩre MWATHANI igongoona.”" 
Exodus8:30 Musa agĩkiuma harĩ mũthamaki na akĩhooya MWATHANI. 
Exodus8:31 Naake MWATHANI agĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Musa aamũũririe, akĩehereria mũthamaki mĩrumbĩ ĩyo ya ngi, o na agĩciehereria njaama cia mũthamaki, na andũ aake; gũtirĩ o na ĩmwe yatigarire." 
Exodus8:32 No o na hĩndĩ ĩyo, mũthamaki akĩũmia ngoro rĩngĩ, na akĩrega gwĩtĩkĩria andũ mathiĩ." 
Exodus9:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Thiĩ kwa mũthamaki ũmwĩre MWATHANI Ngai wa Ahibirania ekuuga atĩrĩ, ‘Reke andũ aakwa mathiĩ, nĩ geetha magaathaathaiye." 
Exodus9:2 Amu wamagiria rĩngĩ mathiĩ," 
Exodus9:3 nĩngũkũherithia na ũndũ wa kũreehithĩria ũhiũ waku, ũguo nĩ ta kuuga: mbarathi ciaku, ndigiri, ngamĩĩra, ng'ombe, ng'ondu na mbũri ciaku, mũrimũ mũũru mũno." 
Exodus9:4 Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩngwamũrania ũhiũ wa Aisiraeli na wa Amisiri, nĩ geetha gũtikaagĩe nyamũ o na ĩmwe ĩgũkua kuuma ũhiũinĩ wa Aisiraeli." 
Exodus9:5 Niĩ MWATHANI, nĩnduĩte atĩ, rũũciũ nĩguo ngeeka ũndũ ũcio.’ ”" 
Exodus9:6 Mũthenya ũrĩa warũmĩrĩire, MWATHANI agĩĩka o ta ũrĩa oigĩĩte; ũhiũ wothe wa Amisiri ũgĩkua, no gũtirĩ nyamũ o na ĩmwe ya ũhiũ wa Aisiraeli yakuire." 
Exodus9:7 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthamaki ooria ũrĩa gwekĩkĩĩte, akĩmenyithio atĩ gũtirĩ nyamũ o na ĩmwe ya ũhiũ wa Aisiraeli yakuĩte. No we akĩũmia ngoro, akĩrega gwĩtĩkĩria andũ mathiĩ." 
Exodus9:8 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩarĩria Musa na Harũni akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Hakũraai ngundi ciigana ũna cia mũhu kuuma riiko, naake Musa aũhurunje aũroreetie na igũrũ mũthamaki akĩyonagĩra." 
Exodus9:9 Naguo mũhu ũcio nĩũgũtuĩka rũkũngũ rũceke rũiyũre bũrũri wothe wa Misiri, na nĩrũgũtũma kũndũ guothe andũ o na nyamũ manyiitwo nĩ mahũha marĩtũrĩkaga ironda.”" 
Exodus9:10 Kwoguo Musa na Harũni makĩoya mũhu kuuma riiko, makĩrũũgama mbere ya mũthamaki. Naake Musa akĩũminja na igũrũ, naguo ũgĩtuĩka mahũha maatũrĩkaga ironda mĩĩrĩinĩ ya andũ o na ya nyamũ."
