Exodus9:11 Nao ago matingĩahotire kũrũũgama mbere ya Musa, tondũ o nao maiyũrirwo nĩ mahũha o ta Amisiri arĩa angĩ oothe." 
Exodus9:12 No MWATHANI agĩtũma mũthamaki oomie ngoro, akĩrega gũthikĩrĩria Musa na Harũni, o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI oigĩĩte." 
Exodus9:13 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Rũũciũ rũũciinĩ tene ũgaathiĩ ũrũũgame mbere ya mũthamaki, ũmwĩre atĩ MWATHANI, Ngai wa Ahibirania ekuuga atĩrĩ, ‘Reke andũ aakwa mathiĩ nĩ geetha magaathaathaiye." 
Exodus9:14 Nĩ amu ihinda rĩĩrĩ to njaama ciaku na andũ aaku ngũherithia, no o nawe mwene nĩngũkũherithia, nĩguo ũmenye atĩ gũtirĩ ũngĩ ta niĩ thĩinĩ wa thĩ yothe." 
Exodus9:15 Nĩ amu-rĩ, ingĩatambũrũkirie guoko gwakwa ngũhũũre na mũrimũ wee mwene o na andũ aaku-rĩ, rĩu mũngĩrĩ aniine o biũ." 
Exodus9:16 No kĩrĩa gĩtũmĩĩte ngũtũũrie muoyo nĩguo nguonie hinya wakwa, nĩ geetha ngumo yakwa ĩtaambe thĩ yothe." 
Exodus9:17 Wee no gwĩtũũgĩria ũretũũgĩria mbere ya andũ aakwa, ũgakĩmagiria mathiĩ." 
Exodus9:18 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, rũũciũ mathaainĩ o ta maya, nĩngoiria mbura nene mũno ya mbembe, ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ yonwo bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri, kuuma hĩndĩ ĩrĩa wambĩrĩirie gũtũũrwo nginyagia rĩu." 
Exodus9:19 Kwoguo-rĩ, athana ũhiũ waku na kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩ nja gĩtoonyio handũ hagitĩirwo, nĩ amu mbura ya mbembe ĩkũũrĩra andũ oothe arĩa megũkorwo nja ĩmoorage, o ũndũ ũmwe na nyamũ ciothe irĩa itegũkorwo itoonyeetio handũ hagitĩirwo.’ ”" 
Exodus9:20 Anjaama amwe a mũthamaki nĩmeetigĩrire nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo MWATHANI oigire, nao magĩgĩtoonyia ngombo ciao o na ũhiũ wao handũ haagitĩirwo." 
Exodus9:21 No arĩa mataathikĩrĩirie ũguo MWATHANI oigire, maatigire ngombo ciao o na ũhiũ wao nja." 
Exodus9:22 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Tambũrũkia guoko gwaku ũkũroreetie na igũrũ, na mbura ya mbembe nĩkuura bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri. Ĩkuurĩra andũ, nyamũ, o na mĩmera yothe ĩrĩa ĩ mĩgũndainĩ.”" 
Exodus9:23 Kwoguo Musa akĩambararia mũthĩĩgi wake aũroreetie na igũrũ; naake MWATHANI akĩreehithia marurumĩ na mbura ya mbembe, nacio heni ĩkĩgũtha thĩ. MWATHANI agĩkiurithia" 
Exodus9:24 mbura nene mũno ya mbembe, ĩtukanĩĩte na heni ciathiaga o na mbere kũhenũka. Mbura ĩyo nĩyo yarĩ mbura nene mũno itarĩ yoneka bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri kuuma hĩndĩ ĩrĩa bũrũri ũcio wambĩrĩirie gũtũũrwo." 
Exodus9:25 Mbura ĩyo ya mbembe ĩgĩkĩhũũra kĩndũ gĩothe kĩrĩa gĩtaarĩ kĩgitĩre bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri, o hamwe na andũ na nyamũ. Ĩkĩhũũra mĩmera yothe ĩrĩa yarĩ mĩgũndainĩ." 
Exodus9:26 Kũrĩa gũtoirire mbura ya mbembe no mwena wa Gosheni kũrĩa Aisiraeli matũũraga. 
Exodus9:27 Mũthamaki agĩtũmanĩra Musa na Harũni. Rĩrĩa mookire akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ihinda rĩĩrĩ nĩnjĩhĩĩtie; MWATHANI nĩekĩĩte ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire, no niĩ na andũ aakwa nĩtũhĩtĩĩtie." 
Exodus9:28 Thaithaai MWATHANI! Tũtikwenda rĩngĩ mbura ĩno ya mbembe na marurumĩ! Rĩu nĩngũmũrekereria mũthiĩ; mũtigũikara gũũkũ rĩngĩ.” 
Exodus9:29 Naake Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ndarĩĩkia kuuma nja ya itũũra o ũguo, nĩngũtambũrũkia mooko maakwa kũrĩ MWATHANI ndĩmũhooe. Marurumĩ o na mbura ya mbembe nĩigũthira, nĩguo ũmenye atĩ MWATHANI nĩwe mwene thĩ." 
Exodus9:30 No nĩnjũũĩ atĩ o na rĩu wee hamwe na njaama ciaku mũtitĩĩĩte MWATHANI Ngai.” 
Exodus9:31 Ũguta na mbaarĩ nĩcio ciathũũkirio nĩ gũkorwo mbaarĩ yarĩ ngũrũ, naguo ũguta warĩ na kĩro." 
Exodus9:32 No ngano ndĩathũũkirio, tondũ ndĩarĩ ngũrũ." 
Exodus9:33 Musa agĩkiuma nja ya itũũra akĩeherera mũthamaki, agĩtambũrũkĩria MWATHANI mooko akĩmũhooya. Namo marurumĩ na mbura ya mbembe igĩthira, o nayo mbura ĩgĩtiga kuura." 
Exodus9:34 No rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa mũthamaki oonire atĩ mbura ya mbembe na marurumĩ nĩciathira, akĩĩhia o rĩngĩ; we mwene o hamwe na njaama ciake magĩkĩrĩrĩria kũũmia ngoro." 
Exodus9:35 Mũthamaki oomirie ngoro o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI oigĩĩte na kanua ka Musa, akĩrega Aisiraeli mathiĩ." 
Exodus10:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Thiĩ kwĩ mũthamaki, nĩ amu nĩndũmĩĩte we na njaama ciake moomie ngoro, nĩ geetha nyonanie ciama ici ciakwa gatagatĩinĩ kaao." 
Exodus10:2 Ningĩ njĩkĩĩte ũguo nĩ geetha mũkaahota kũhe ciana cianyu na ciana cia ciana cianyu ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa njĩkĩĩte Misiri, na ciama iria ningĩĩte gatagatĩinĩ kaao, nĩguo inyuothe mũmenye atĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI.”" 
Exodus10:3 Kwoguo Musa na Harũni magĩthiĩ kwa mũthamaki makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI, Ngai wa Ahibirania ekuuga atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ nginya rĩ ũgũtũũra ũregeete kwĩnyiihia mbere yakwa? Reke andũ aakwa mathiĩ nĩ geetha magaathaathaiye." 
Exodus10:4 Wathiĩ na mbere kũmagiria mathiĩ, rũũciũ nĩngaareehithia ngigĩ gũũkũ bũrũriinĩ waku." 
Exodus10:5 Ikaahumbĩra thĩ ũguo atĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ ũkaahota kuona tĩĩri. Ningĩ nĩikaarĩa kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩtaathũũkangirio nĩ mbura ya mbembe, o na irĩe mĩtĩ yothe ĩrĩa ĩtigarĩĩte" 
Exodus10:6 Nacio nĩikaiyũra nyũmba ciaku, na nyũmba cia njaama ciaku ciothe, o hamwe na cia andũ aaku oothe. Ũndũ ũcio ũgũkorwo ũrĩ mũũru gũkĩra maũndũ moothe marĩa maithe maanyu maanoona.’ ” Musa agĩkĩhũndũka, akĩehera harĩ mũthamaki." 
Exodus10:7 Nacio njaama cia mũthamaki ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ egũtũũra atũthĩĩnagia nginya rĩ? Reke andũ a Isiraeli mathiĩ magathaathaiye MWATHANI Ngai wao. Kaĩ ũtaroona ũrĩa bũrũri wa Misiri wanangĩkĩĩte?”" 
Exodus10:8 Kwoguo Musa na Harũni magĩkĩreehwo rĩngĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki, naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “ Thiĩi mũgathaathaiye MWATHANI Ngai wanyu. No rĩĩrĩ, njĩĩraai nĩ a megũthiĩ?”" 
Exodus10:9 Naake Musa agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “ Tũgũthiĩ ithuothe, hamwe na ciana ciitũ na atongoria aitũ. Tũgũthiĩ na aariũ na aarĩ aitũ, mbũri, ng'ondu, o na ng'ombe ciitũ, amu no mũhaka tũgĩe na thigũkũ ya gũtĩĩa MWATHANI.”" 
Exodus10:10 Naake mũthamaki akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ndehĩta na MWATHANI atĩ gũtirĩ hĩndĩ ingĩĩtĩkĩra mũthiĩ na atumia aanyu na ciana cianyu! Ti itherũ nĩmũciirĩire gwĩka ũũru." 
Exodus10:11 Aaca! Gũtingĩhoteka ũguo! Arũme oiki nĩmathiĩ magathaathaiye MWATHANI, angĩkorwo ũguo nĩguo mũkwenda.” Arĩĩkia kuuga ũguo, Musa na Harũni makĩingatwo mbere ya mũthamaki." 
Exodus10:12 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Tambũrũkĩria bũrũri wa Misiri guoko gwaku, nĩguo ngigĩ ciũke bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri irĩe mĩmera yothe, na kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩatigirio nĩ mbura ya mbembe.”" 
Exodus10:13 Kwoguo Musa akĩambararia mũthĩĩgi wake, naake MWATHANI agĩtũma rũhuuho rũhuruutane ruumĩĩte mwena wa irathĩro mũthenya wothe na ũtukũ wothe. Gũkĩrooka gũkĩa rũhuuho rũu nĩrwareeheete ngigĩ." 
Exodus10:14 Nacio ngigĩ icio igĩũka irĩ mĩrumbĩ mĩingĩ mũno ĩkĩiyũra bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri. Ciarĩ nyingĩ ũguo atĩ gũtirĩ kwagĩa mĩrumbĩ ta ĩyo, na gũtirĩ hĩndĩ gũkaagĩa ĩngĩ ta yo rĩngĩ." 
Exodus10:15 Ciahumbĩrire thĩ yothe ikĩmĩkunĩkĩra o biũ, na ikĩrĩa mĩtĩ yothe bũrũriinĩ, o na matunda ma mĩtĩ marĩa maatigĩĩtio nĩ mbura ya mbembe. Gũtiatigarire gathangũ o na kamwe karuru mũtĩinĩ o wothe kana mũmera o wothe bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri." 
Exodus10:16 Mũthamaki agĩgĩĩta Musa na Harũni na ihenya akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩnjĩhĩirie MWATHANI Ngai wanyu, o na ngamũhĩtĩria." 
Exodus10:17 Kĩnjohereei rĩĩhia rĩakwa riita o rĩĩrĩ rĩmwe tu, na mũhooe MWATHANI Ngai wanyu anjehererie itũhũũhũ rĩĩrĩ.”" 
Exodus10:18 Musa akĩehera harĩ mũthamaki, agĩthiĩ akĩhooya MWATHANI." 
Exodus10:19 Naake MWATHANI akĩgarũra rũhuuho rwa mwena wa irathĩro, rũkĩhuruutana mũno na mwena wa ithũĩro, rũkĩoya ngigĩ icio rũgĩcihuruuta rũgĩciikia Iriainĩ Ituune. Gũtirĩ ngigĩ o na ĩmwe yatigirwo bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri." 
Exodus10:20 No MWATHANI akĩũmia ngoro ya mũthamaki akĩrega gwĩtĩkĩria Aisiraeli mathiĩ. 
Exodus10:21 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Tambũrũkia guoko gwaku ũkũroreetie na igũrũ, nĩ geetha bũrũri wothe wa Misiri ũgĩe nduma ndumanu ĩngĩhuutĩka na guoko.”" 
Exodus10:22 Musa agĩgĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake akũroreetie igũrũ, naguo bũrũri wothe wa Misiri ũkĩgĩa nduma ndumanu mũno kwa ihinda rĩa mĩthenya ĩtatũ." 
Exodus10:23 Gũtirĩ mũndũ wahotaga kuona ũrĩa ũngĩ, o na kana akoima nyũmba gwake ihindainĩ rĩu rĩothe. No andũ a Isiraeli maarĩ na ũtheri kũrĩa maikaraga." 
Exodus10:24 Mũthamaki agĩgĩĩta Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Thiĩi mũgathaathaiye MWATHANI; o na atumia aanyu no mathiĩ hamwe na inyuĩ, o ũndũ ũmwe na ciana cianyu. No rĩĩrĩ, ng'ondu cianyu, mbũri, o na ng'ombe no mũhaka itigwo gũũkũ.”" 
Exodus10:25 No Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “No mũhaka ũgĩtũhe nyamũ cia kũrutwo magongoona, o hamwe na cia kũrutwo magongoona ma njino, tũgacirutĩre MWATHANI Ngai witũ." 
Exodus10:26 Ũhiũ witũ no mũhaka tũthiĩ naguo; gũtirĩ nyamũ o na ĩmwe ya ũhiũ witũ ĩgũtigwo. Ithuĩ eene nĩ ithuĩ tũgwĩthuurĩra kĩrĩa tũkwenda gĩa gũthaathaiya MWATHANI Ngai witũ nakĩo. Na rĩĩrĩ, tũtarĩ tũrakinya kuo tũtirĩ hĩndĩ tũngĩmenya nyamũ iria irĩbatarania kũmũrutĩra igongoona.”" 
Exodus10:27 No MWATHANI akĩũmia ngoro ya mũthamaki, naake akĩrega kũmeetĩkĩria mathiĩ." 
Exodus10:28 Mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Njeherera! Menyerera tũtikaanoonane rĩngĩ! Rĩrĩa tũkoonana rĩngĩ no ũgaakua!”" 
Exodus10:29 Naake Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩwoiga wega; ndũgaacooka kũnyona rĩngĩ.”" 
Exodus11:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũtũmĩra mũthamaki wa Misiri na andũ aake iherithia rĩngĩ rĩmwe tu, na thuutha ũcio nĩekũmũrekereria mũthiĩ. Ti itherũ rĩrĩa arĩmũrekereria mũthiĩ, nĩkũmũingata arĩmũingata muume kuo." 
Exodus11:2 Rĩu kĩarĩrie andũ a Isiraeli ũmeere meetie andũ arĩa marigainie nao indo cia thahabu o na cia betha.” 
Exodus11:3 Naake MWATHANI agĩtũma andũ a Isiraeli meetĩkĩrĩke nĩ andũ a Misiri. O na njaama cia mũthamaki na andũ oothe a Misiri nĩmoonaga Musa arĩ mũndũ wa bata mũno. 
Exodus11:4 Musa agĩkĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI ekuuga ũũ: ‘Ũtukũ gatagatĩ nĩngũtuĩkanĩria Misiri," 
Exodus11:5 na marigithaathi moothe ma tũhĩĩ bũrũriinĩ ũyũ wa Misiri nĩmegũkua, kuuma irigithaathi rĩa mũthamaki rĩrĩa rĩngĩgaikarĩra gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũthamaki, nginya irigithaathi rĩa ndungata ya mũndũ wa nja ĩrĩa ĩthĩaga na gĩthĩi. O namo marigithaathi ma mahiũ moothe nĩmegũkua." 
Exodus11:6 Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩgũgũkorwo na kĩrĩro kĩnene mũno bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri, gĩtarĩ gĩakorwo kuo, o na gĩtagaakorwo kuo hĩndĩ ĩngĩ." 
Exodus11:7 No rĩĩrĩ, ngui o na ĩmwe ndĩkaararamĩra andũ a Isiraeli kana nyamũ ciao, nĩ geetha mũmenye atĩ niĩ MWATHANI, nĩnjĩkagĩra ngũũrani gatagatĩ ka andũ a Misiri na andũ a Isiraeli.’ ”" 
Exodus11:8 Musa akĩrĩĩkia na kuuga atĩrĩ, “Njaama ici ciothe ciaku nĩigooka kũrĩ niĩ inyinamĩrĩre, ithaithe njoe andũ aakwa tũthiĩ. Thuutha wa ũguo nĩngoimagara thiĩ.” Na rĩĩrĩ, Musa akĩehera harĩ mũthamaki arĩ na maraakara maingĩ mũno." 
Exodus11:9 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Mũthamaki no egũthiĩ na mbere kwaga gũgũthikĩrĩria, nĩ geetha thiĩ o na mbere kũringa ciama nyingĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri.”" 
Exodus11:10 Musa na Harũni maaringire ciama icio ciothe mbere ya mũthamaki, no MWATHANI akĩũmia ngoro yake, akĩrega gwĩtĩkĩria andũ a Isiraeli moime bũrũri wake." 
Exodus12:1 MWATHANI akĩarĩria Musa na Harũni marĩ o kũu bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Exodus12:2 “Mweri ũyũ nĩguo ũgaatuĩka mweri wanyu wa mbere wa mwaka. 
Exodus12:3 Ĩra andũ oothe a Isiraeli atĩ: Mũthenya wa ikũmi wa mweri ũyũ wakinya-rĩ, o mũndũ nĩageecarĩria gatũrũme kũringana na ũrĩa mũciĩ wake ũigana." 
Exodus12:4 Angĩkorwo mũciĩ wa mũndũ nĩ mũniini ũguo atĩ ndũngĩhota kũniina gatũrũme goothe, no ũnyiitane na mũciĩ wa mũndũ ũrĩa ũrigainie naguo, ũgayane gatũrũme kamwe kũringana na mũigana wa andũ, na kũringana na ũrĩa o mũndũ angĩhota kũrĩa." 
Exodus12:5 Gatũrũme kau no mũhaka mũgathuure kuuma rũũruinĩ rwa ng'ondu kana rwa mbũri, nako gakorwo gatarĩ na kaũũgũ, na gatakĩrĩĩtie mwaka ũmwe." 
Exodus12:6 Mũkaiga tũtũrũme tũu nginya hwaĩinĩ wa mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri ũyũ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ oothe a Isiraeli magaatũthĩnja." 
Exodus12:7 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ makooya thakame ĩmwe ya tũtũrũme tũu, mamĩhake buremuinĩ na mwana wa na rũgongo wa mĩrango ya nyũmba iria tũtũrũme tũu tũkaarĩrwo." 
Exodus12:8 Nyama ciatuo ikaahĩĩhio ũtukũ o ro ũcio, na irĩanĩrio na nyeni ndũrũ na mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia." 
Exodus12:9 Mũtikaanarĩe nyama o na ĩmwe ya tũtũrũme tũu ĩrĩ njĩthĩ kana ĩtherũkĩĩtio na maaĩ; mũgaatũrĩa tũhĩĩhĩĩtio tuothe, nginya mũtwe, na magũrũ, o na nyama cia nda." 
Exodus12:10 Na mũtikaanatigie gĩcunjĩ o na kĩmwe kĩraare nginya rũũciinĩ; kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩgaatigara, no mũhaka gĩgaacinwo." 
Exodus12:11 Mũkĩrĩa nyama icio mũgaakorwo mũhaana ũũ: mũgaacirĩa na ihenya, na mũkorwo mwĩhumbĩĩte ta andũ mehaarĩirie gũthiĩ rũgendo, mwĩkĩrĩĩte iraatũ magũrũ, na mĩtirima yanyu ĩrĩ mooko. Ĩno nĩ thigũkũ ya Bathaka ya MWATHANI." 
Exodus12:12 “Ũtukũ ũcio nĩngaatuĩkania bũrũri wothe wa Misiri ngiũragaga marigithaathi moothe ma tũhĩĩ ma Amisiri, o na marigithaathi moothe ma nyamũ, na herithie ngai ciothe cia Misiri. Niĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI." 
Exodus12:13 Nayo thakame ĩrĩa ĩgaakorwo ĩrĩ buremuinĩ cia mĩrango ya nyũmba ĩgaakorwo ĩrĩ kĩmenyithia gĩa kũmenyithania nyũmba iria mũrĩ. Ndoona thakame ĩyo, nĩngaamwagarara na ndikaamwĩka ũũru rĩrĩa ngaakorwo ngĩherithia andũ a Misiri." 
Exodus12:14 Nĩmũgaakũngũyagĩra mũthenya ũcio ũrĩ ta thigũkũ nyamũre ya kũmũririkanagia ũrĩa niĩ, MWATHANI, ndamwĩkĩire. Ũkũngũagĩreei matukũinĩ moothe marĩa magooka.”" 
Exodus12:15 Ningĩ MWATHANI akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mĩthenya mũgwanja no mũhaka mũrĩage mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia. Mũthenya wa mbere wa mĩthenya ĩyo no nginya mweheragie kuuma nyũmbainĩ cianyu ndaawa yothe ya kũimbia mĩgate, nĩ amu mĩthenyainĩ ĩyo mũgwanja mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩrĩaga mĩgate ĩĩkĩrĩĩtwo ndaawa ya kũimbia, nĩarĩingatagwo kuuma harĩ andũ a Isiraeli." 
Exodus12:16 Mũthenyainĩ wa mbere na wa mũgwanja nĩmũrĩũnganaga nĩ ũndũ wa gũthaathaiya. Gũtirĩ wĩra ũrĩrutagwo mĩthenyainĩ ĩyo yerĩ, tiga o wa kũhaarĩria irio." 
Exodus12:17 Menyagĩrĩraai thigũkũ ĩyo, nĩ amu mũthenya ũcio nĩguo ndarutire mĩhĩrĩga yanyu kuuma bũrũri wa Misiri. Kwoguo no mũhaka mũkũngũagĩre mũthenya ũcio ũrĩ ta thigũkũ matukũ moothe marĩa magooka." 
Exodus12:18 Mũtikaarĩage mĩgate mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia kuuma hwaĩinĩ wa mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri wa mbere, nginya hwaĩinĩ wa mũthenya wa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ũmwe." 
Exodus12:19 (19-20) Gũtikaanooneke ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩgate nyũmbainĩ cianyu mĩthenya ĩyo mũgwanja. Mũndũ o wothe ũkaarĩa mũgate wĩ na ndaawa ya kũimbia akaingatwo kuuma harĩ andũ a Isiraeli, e mũgeni, kana e Mũisiraeli.”" 
Exodus12:20 Musa agĩgĩĩta atongoria oothe a Isiraeli akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mwĩthuurĩreei o mũndũ gatũrũme agathĩnje, nĩguo andũ a mĩciĩ yanyu makũngũĩre Bathaka." 
Exodus12:21 Mũcooke muoe mathangũ ma hithobu, mũmatobokie thakameinĩ ĩrĩa ĩrĩ mbakũriinĩ. Nayo thakame ĩyo mũmĩhake buremuinĩ o na mwana wa na rũgongo wa mĩrango ya nyũmba cianyu. Na rĩĩrĩ, gũtikaagĩe mũndũ o na ũmwe ũkuuma nyũmba nginya rũũciinĩ." 
Exodus12:22 Nĩ amu MWATHANI nĩegũtuĩkania Misiri akĩũragaga Amisiri, na rĩrĩa arĩona thakame ĩyo ĩrĩ buremuinĩ na igũrũ wa mĩrangoinĩ, nĩarĩagarara nyũmba cianyu na ndarĩtĩkĩria mũraika wa gĩkuũ aingĩre nyũmba cianyu amũũrage." 
Exodus12:23 Mawatho macio mũmarũmagĩrĩre inyuĩ o hamwe na ciana cianyu nginya tene. 
Exodus12:24 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa mũgaakinya bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa MWATHANI aamwĩrĩire, mũgeekaga ũndũ ũyũ." 
Exodus12:25 Rĩrĩa ciana cianyu ikaamũũria atĩrĩ, ‘Gĩtũmi kĩa ũndũ ũyũ-rĩ, nĩ kĩrĩkũ?’" 
Exodus12:26 Mũgaacicookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ igongoona rĩa Bathaka ya MWATHANI, nĩ amu nĩagararire nyũmba cia andũ a Isiraeli bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri, rĩrĩa ooragire Amisiri, no agĩtũhonokia.’ ”Nao andũ a Isiraeli makĩinamĩrĩra magĩthaathaiya." 
Exodus12:27 Magĩcooka magĩthiĩ magĩĩka o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aathĩĩte Musa na Harũni. 
Exodus12:28 Na rĩĩrĩ, ũtukũ gatagatĩ MWATHANI akĩũraga aariũ oothe a marigithaathi bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri, aambĩrĩirie na irigithaathi rĩa mũthamaki rĩrĩa rĩngĩaikarĩire gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũthamaki, nginya irigithaathi rĩa mũndũ ũrĩa woheetwo njeera, o na marigithaathi moothe ma njamba ma mahiũ." 
Exodus12:29 Naake mũthamaki agĩũkĩra ũtukũ arĩ hamwe na njaama ciake ciothe, o na andũ oothe a Misiri. Nakuo gũkĩgĩa na kĩrĩro kĩnene bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri, amu gũtirĩ nyũmba o na ĩmwe ĩtaakuĩte mũndũ." 
Exodus12:30 Na rĩĩrĩ, ũtukũ o ro ũcio mũthamaki agĩtũmanĩra Musa na Harũni akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũkĩraai muume gũũkũ, inyuĩ na andũ aanyu a Isiraeli! Umaai bũrũri wakwa; thiĩi mũgatungatĩre MWATHANI o ta ũrĩa mworĩĩtie." 
Exodus12:31 Oyai ng'ondu cianyu, mbũri, o na ng'ombe, mũthiĩ! Hoeraai kĩraathimo o na niĩ!”" 
Exodus12:32 Nao andũ a Misiri makĩhĩkahĩka andũ a Isiraeli moime bũrũriinĩ makĩmeeraga atĩrĩ, “Mwarega gũthiĩ nĩmũgũtũma tũkue ithuothe.”" 
Exodus12:33 Kwoguo andũ a Isiraeli makĩiyũria mbakũri ciao cia gũkandĩra mũtu mũkande ũtaarĩ mwĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia, magĩcioha na nguo, magĩcikuua na ciande." 
Exodus12:34 Andũ acio a Isiraeli nĩmeekĩĩte ũrĩa Musa ameerĩĩte, amu nĩmeetĩĩtie andũ a Misiri indo cia betha, thahabu, o na nguo." 
Exodus12:35 MWATHANI nĩatũmire andũ a Isiraeli meetĩkĩrĩke nĩ andũ a Misiri, magĩkĩmahe o kĩrĩa meetirie. Na njĩra ĩyo andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩkuua ũtonga wa andũ a Misiri." 
Exodus12:36 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩkiumagara kuuma Ramesese meerekeire Sukothu. Nao maarĩ ta arũme ngiri magana matandatũ (600,000), atumia na ciana mategũtarwo." 
Exodus12:37 Ningĩ gĩkundi kĩnene kĩa andũ angĩ nĩkĩoimagaranirie hamwe nao, o na makiumagara na ng'ondu, mbũri, na ng'ombe nyingĩ." 
Exodus12:38 Nao makĩruga mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia na mũtu ũrĩa mũkande maakuuĩĩte kuuma Misiri. Maingatĩĩtwo Misiri na ihenya ũguo atĩ matingĩahotire kũhaarĩria irio ciao, kana meekĩre mũtu ũcio ndaawa ya kũimbia." 
Exodus12:39 Ihinda rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maikarire Misiri rĩarĩ mĩaka magana mana ma mĩrongo ĩtatũ (430). 
Exodus12:40 Mũthenya ũrĩa mĩaka ĩyo magana mana ma mĩrongo ĩtatũ yathirire, mĩhĩrĩga yothe ya andũ a MWATHANI ĩkiuma Misiri." 
Exodus12:41 Ũtukũ ũcio MWATHANI ndahingire riitho nĩ geetha amarute kuuma bũrũri wa Misiri. Ũtukũ ũcio Aisiraeli oothe maraaraga matahingĩĩte riitho nĩ ũndũ wa MWATHANI njiarwainĩ ciao ciothe. 
Exodus12:42 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa na Harũni atĩrĩ, “Maya nĩ mo mawatho makoniĩ Bathaka: gũtirĩ mũgeni ũrĩrĩaga Bathaka." 
Exodus12:43 No rĩĩrĩ, ngombo o yothe ĩrĩa mwĩgũrĩire no ĩrĩe, angĩkorwo nĩmũkwamba kũmĩruithia." 
Exodus12:44 Gũtirĩ muumi na njĩra kana mũruti wĩra wa kũrĩhwo ũrĩmĩrĩaga. 
Exodus12:45 Ningĩ Bathaka yothe ĩrĩrĩagĩrwo thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ĩrĩa ĩhaarĩirio. Mũtikaanamiumie nja ya nyũmba ĩyo, o na kana muunange ihĩndĩ o na rĩmwe rĩa nyamũ ĩyo." 
Exodus12:46 No mũhaka andũ oothe a Isiraeli makũngũagĩre thigũkũ ĩyo. 
Exodus12:47 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũrũũrĩrĩ ũratũũrania na inyuĩ angĩenda gũkũngũĩra Bathaka atĩĩye MWATHANI-rĩ, no mũhaka mũruithie arũme oothe a nyũmba yake. Thuutha wa ũguo agagĩtuuo o ta mũndũ ũciarĩirwo bũrũri wanyu. No gũtirĩ mũndũ mũrũme ũtarĩ mũruu ũrĩmĩrĩaga." 
Exodus12:48 Mawatho macio no mo marĩhũthagĩrwo harĩ mũndũ wanyu, na harĩ mũrũũrĩrĩ ũratũũrania na inyuĩ.”" 
Exodus12:49 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩĩka o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aathĩĩte Musa na Harũni. 
Exodus12:50 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya o ro ũcio, MWATHANI akĩruta mĩhĩrĩga yothe ya andũ a Isiraeli bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri." 
Exodus13:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ," 
Exodus13:2 “Nyamũrĩra marigithaathi moothe ma njamba. Irigithaathi o rĩothe rĩa njamba thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli, rĩrĩ rĩa mũndũ kana nyamũ, nĩ rĩakwa.”" 
Exodus13:3 Naake Musa akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ, “Ririkanagaai mũthenya ũyũ. Mũthenya ũyũ nĩguo mwoimire ũkomboinĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri. Noguo mũthenya ũrĩa MWATHANI aamũrutire kuo na hinya wake mũnene. Mũthenya ũyũ mũtikaanarĩe mũgate mwĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia." 
Exodus13:4 Ũũmũũthĩ mweriinĩ ũyũ wa mbere ũrĩa wĩtagwo Abibu nĩguo mwoimagara kuuma Misiri. 
Exodus13:5 Na rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI nĩakaamũkinyia bũrũriinĩ wa Akanaani, Ahiti, Aamori, Ahivi, o na Ajebusi, ũrĩa eehĩtire atĩ nĩakaamũhe. Rĩrĩa mũgaakinya bũrũriinĩ ũcio mwega na mũnoru, mũgaakũngũagĩra thigũkũ ĩno mweriinĩ o ro ũyũ." 
Exodus13:6 Mũkaarĩaga mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩthenya mũgwanja. Mũthenya wa mũgwanja mũgaakoragwo na thigũkũ ya gũtĩĩa MWATHANI. 
Exodus13:7 Mĩthenyainĩ ĩyo mũgwanja mũkaarĩaga o mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia. Gũtikaanooneke mĩgate mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia, o na kana ndaawa ya kũimbia bũrũriinĩ wanyu wothe." 
Exodus13:8 Na rĩĩrĩ, thigũkũ ĩkĩambĩrĩria-rĩ, mũgaataaragĩria ciana cianyu atĩ maũndũ maya mũrameeka nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa MWATHANI aamwĩkĩire mũkiuma Misiri." 
Exodus13:9 Ũndũ ũyũ ũrĩkoragwo ũrĩ kĩririkano; ũrĩkoragwo ũrĩ ta kĩndũ kĩohereirwo mookoinĩ maanyu kana moothiũinĩ maanyu. Ũrĩmũririkanagia mũthiage na mbere gũthooma watho wa MWATHANI, amu MWATHANI aamũrutire Misiri na hinya wake mũnene." 
Exodus13:10 Kwoguo tũũraai mũkũngũagĩra thigũkũ ĩno, o ihinda rĩayo rĩakinya mwaka o mwaka." 
Exodus13:11 “Na rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI nĩakaamũkinyia bũrũriinĩ wa Akanaani, ũrĩa eehĩtire nĩakaahe maithe maanyu. Aamũhe bũrũri ũcio," 
Exodus13:12 mũkaamwamũragĩra marigithaathi moothe. Marigithaathi moothe ma njamba ma mahiũ maanyu nĩ ma MWATHANI. 
Exodus13:13 No rĩĩrĩ, irigithaathi o rĩothe rĩa njamba rĩa ndigiri nĩmũkaarĩkũũraga na gatũrũme. Mũngĩkorwo mũtikwenda kũrĩkũũra-rĩ, mũkaariunangaga ngingo. O namo marigithaathi moothe ma tũhĩĩ ma andũ aanyu no mũhaka mũmakũũrage." 
Exodus13:14 Matukũinĩ marĩa magooka ciana cianyu ingĩkaamũũria maũndũ maya moigĩĩte atĩa, mũgaacicookeria atĩrĩ, ‘MWATHANI aahũthĩrire hinya wake mũnene agĩtũruta Misiri, kũrĩa twatũire tũrĩ ngombo." 
Exodus13:15 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki wa Misiri oomirie ngoro akĩrega gũtũrekereria, MWATHANI nĩoragire marigithaathi moothe ma njamba, ma andũ o na ma mahiũ, bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri. Ũndũ ũcio nĩguo ũtũmaga tũrutĩre MWATHANI magongoona ma marigithaathi moothe ma njamba, no tũgakũũra aariũ aitũ oothe arĩa marigithaathi." 
Exodus13:16 Ũndũ ũyũ ũrĩkoragwo ũrĩ kĩririkano; ũrĩkoragwo ũrĩ ta kĩndũ kĩohereirwo mookoinĩ maitũ na moothiũinĩ maitũ. Ũrĩtũririkanagia atĩ MWATHANI aatũrutire Misiri na ũndũ wa hinya wake mũnene.’ ” 
Exodus13:17 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa mũthamaki wa Misiri eetĩkĩririe andũ mathiĩ, Ngai ndamagereirie bũrũri wa Afilisiti, o na gũtuĩka njĩra ĩyo nĩ yo yarĩ nguhĩ. Amu Ngai oigire atĩrĩ, “Ndikwenda andũ aya mericũkwo macooke Misiri mangĩona atĩ nĩmekũgĩa na mbaara.”" 
Exodus13:18 Handũ ha ũguo, Ngai aamagereirie njĩra ya werũinĩ gũkuhĩ na Iria Ituune. Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩkiumagara meyoheete indo ciao cia mbaara." 
Exodus13:19 Naake Musa agĩkuua mahĩndĩ ma Josefu agĩthiĩ namo, o ta ũrĩa Josefu eerĩĩte andũ a Isiraeli mehĩte atĩ nĩmageeka, rĩrĩa oigire atĩrĩ, “Rĩrĩa Ngai akaamũhonokia-rĩ, mũgaakuua mahĩndĩ maakwa mũmarute gũũkũ.”" 
Exodus13:20 Nao andũ a Isiraeli makiuma Sukothu, magĩthiĩ makĩamba hema ciao Ethamu rũteereinĩ rwa werũ." 
Exodus13:21 Na rĩĩrĩ, mahinda ma mũthenya MWATHANI aamatongoragia arĩ gĩtugĩinĩ gĩa itu nĩ geetha amoonererie njĩra, namo mahinda ma ũtukũ aamatongoragia arĩ gĩtugĩinĩ kĩa mwaki akamamũrĩkagĩra njĩra, nĩ geetha mahotage gũthiĩ mũthenya na ũtukũ." 
Exodus13:22 Gĩtugĩ kĩu gĩa itu gĩakoragwo mbere ya andũ mũthenya hĩndĩ ciothe, nakĩo kĩa mwaki gĩakoragwo mbere yao ũtukũ." 
Exodus14:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ," 
Exodus14:2 “Ĩra andũ a Isiraeli magarũrũke maambe hema ciao mbere ya itũũra rĩa Pi Hahirothu, gatagatĩ ka Migidoli na Iria Ituune, gũkuhĩ na itũũra rĩa Baali Zefoni." 
Exodus14:3 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo mũthamaki wa Misiri egwĩciiria atĩ andũ a Isiraeli nĩkũũrũũra marorũũra bũrũriinĩ, na werũ nĩũmahingĩrĩirie." 
Exodus14:4 Nĩngũtũma oomie ngoro amũrũmĩrĩre, naguo ũhootani wakwa igũrũ rĩa mũthamaki wa Misiri na mbũtũ yake ya ita nĩũkũndeehere gĩtĩĩo. Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Misiri makĩmenye atĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI.” Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩĩka o ta ũrĩa meerirwo." 
Exodus14:5 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki wa Misiri eerirwo atĩ andũ acio nĩmaarĩĩkĩĩtie kũũra, we hamwe na njaama ciake makĩĩricũkwo, makiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩ atĩa tweka? Twareka andũ a Isiraeli mathiĩ matige gũtũtungatĩra?”" 
Exodus14:6 Kwoguo mũthamaki agĩkĩhaarĩria ngaari yake ya mbarathi o hamwe na mbũtũ yake ya ita. 
Exodus14:7 Agĩkiumagara na ngaari ciake ciothe cia mbarathi, hamwe na ngaari cia mbarathi magana matandatũ iria njega mũno, irĩ na anene aacio." 
Exodus14:8 Naake MWATHANI akĩũmia ngoro ya mũthamaki wa Misiri, agĩthingata andũ a Isiraeli arĩa moimagaraga marangĩirwo nĩ MWATHANI." 
Exodus14:9 Nayo mbũtũ ya ita ya Misiri, hamwe na mbarathi ciothe, ngaari cia mbarathi, o na atwari aacio, ĩgĩteng'eria andũ a Isiraeli, ĩkĩmakorerera maambĩĩte hema ciao hũgũrũrũinĩ cia Iria Ituune hakuhĩ na Pi Hahirothu, mang'etheire Baali Zefoni." 
Exodus14:10 Rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli moonire mũthamaki na mbũtũ yake ya ita mamoimĩĩte thuutha-rĩ, magĩĩtigĩra mũno, magĩkaĩra MWATHANI amateithie." 
Exodus14:11 Magĩcooka makĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Kũu Misiri nĩ mbĩĩrĩra gũtaarĩ nĩguo ũtũrute kuo tũũke tũkuĩre gũũkũ werũinĩ? Tarora ũrĩa wĩkĩĩte na ũndũ wa gũtũruta Misiri!" 
Exodus14:12 Githĩ ũũ tiguo twakwĩrĩĩte tũtaanoima kuo atĩ no ũgeekĩka? Twakwĩrire ũtigane na ithuĩ ũreke tũthiĩ na mbere gũtungatĩra andũ a Misiri. Nĩkũngĩarĩ wega ithuĩ gũthiĩ na mbere gũtungatĩra andũ a Misiri gũkĩra gũkuĩra gũũkũ werũinĩ.” 
Exodus14:13 Naake Musa akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Tigaai gwĩtigĩra! Mwĩyũmĩrĩriei, na nĩmũkuona maũndũ marĩa MWATHANI egwĩka nĩguo amũhonokie ũũmũũthĩ. Andũ aya a Misiri mũroona ũũmũũthĩ mũtigaacooka kũmoona rĩngĩ." 
Exodus14:14 MWATHANI nĩ we ũkũmũrũĩrĩra, na inyuĩ mũtirĩ na bata wa gwĩka ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ.”" 
Exodus14:15 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Nĩkĩ kĩratũma ũngaĩre? Ĩra andũ a Isiraeli mathiĩ na mbere." 
Exodus14:16 Oya mũthĩĩgi waku na igũrũ ũũtambũrũkie igũrũ rĩa iria, namo maaĩ nĩmekwĩgayania nĩ geetha andũ a Isiraeli mahote gũtuĩkanĩria iriainĩ rĩu gatagatĩ makinyĩĩte thĩ nyũmũ." 
Exodus14:17 Nĩngũũmia ngoro cia andũ a Misiri nĩ geetha matoonye iriainĩ mamarũmĩrĩre, na nĩngũkĩgĩa na gĩtĩĩo nĩ ũndũ wa ũhootani wakwa igũrũ rĩa mũthamaki, mbũtũ yake ya ita, ngaari ciake cia mbarathi, o na andũ aake a gũcitwarithia." 
Exodus14:18 Ndarĩĩkia kũmahoota, andũ a Misiri nĩmekũmenya atĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI.”" 
Exodus14:19 Naake mũraika wa Ngai, ũrĩa watongoragia mbũtũ ya ita ya andũ a Isiraeli akĩehera mbere yao agĩcooka thuutha wao. O nakĩo gĩtugĩ gĩa itu kĩrĩa kĩamatongoragia gĩkĩehera mbere yao gĩkĩrũũgama thuutha wao," 
Exodus14:20 gatagatĩ ka mbũtũ ya ita ya andũ a Misiri na mbũtũ ya ita ya andũ a Isiraeli. Itu rĩu rĩgĩtũma kũgĩe nduma mwena wa andũ a Misiri, no rĩkĩhe andũ a Isiraeli ũtheri, na kwoguo andũ acio matiigana gũkuhaanĩrĩria ũtukũ ũcio wothe." 
Exodus14:21 Naake Musa agĩgĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake igũrũ wa iria, naake MWATHANI agĩtũma iria rĩcookio na thuutha nĩ rũhuuho rwarĩ na hinya mũno rwoimĩĩte mwena wa irathĩro. Rũhuuho rũu rũkĩhuruutana ũtukũ wothe rũgĩtũma iria rĩtuĩke thĩ nyũmũ. Namo maaĩ makĩgayũkana," 
Exodus14:22 nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩtuĩkanĩria iriainĩ magereire thĩ nyũmũ, namo maaĩ makĩĩhanda ta thingo mĩena yerĩ." 
Exodus14:23 Nao andũ a Misiri makĩmarũmĩrĩra na ihenya, magĩtoonya iriainĩ hamwe na mbarathi ciao, ngaari ciao cia mbarathi, o na arĩa maacitwarithagia." 
Exodus14:24 Na rĩĩrĩ, ruoro rũtanatema, MWATHANI agĩcũũthĩrĩria mbũtũ ĩyo ya andũ a Misiri arĩ gĩtugĩinĩ kĩu kĩa mwaki na itu, akĩmeekĩra guoya." 
Exodus14:25 Agĩtũma magũrũ ma ngaari icio cia mbarathi maremerere, o nginya magĩcitwara na thĩĩna mũno. Andũ acio a Misiri makiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũũreei tweherere andũ aya a Isiraeli nĩ amu MWATHANI nĩ we ũramarũĩrĩra!”" 
Exodus14:26 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Tambũrũkia guoko gwaku igũrũ rĩa iria, namo maaĩ nĩmekũhumbĩra andũ a Misiri, ngaari ciao cia mbarathi, o hamwe na atwari aacio.”" 
Exodus14:27 Kwoguo Musa agĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake igũrũ rĩa iria, na gũgĩkĩa, maaĩ magĩcooka o ũrĩa maarĩ mbere. Andũ a Misiri makĩgeria kũũra moime maaĩinĩ, no MWATHANI akĩmathinĩkania iriainĩ." 
Exodus14:28 Maaĩ magĩgĩcooka makĩhumbĩra ngaari cia mbarathi, atwarithia aacio, o hamwe na mbũtũ yothe ya Misiri ĩrĩa yarũmĩrĩire andũ a Isiraeli iriainĩ; gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wao watigarire." 
Exodus14:29 No andũ a Isiraeli magĩtuĩkanĩria iriainĩ magereire thĩ nyũmũ, namo maaĩ mehandĩĩte ta thingo mĩena yerĩ." 
Exodus14:30 Mũthenya ũcio MWATHANI agĩkĩhonokia andũ a Isiraeli kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Misiri, nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩkĩona ciimba cia andũ a Misiri ciaraganĩĩte hũgũrũrũinĩ cia iria." 
Exodus14:31 Rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli moonire ũndũ ũcio mũnene wekĩĩtwo andũ a Misiri nĩ MWATHANI, magĩĩtigĩra MWATHANI, na makĩmwĩhoka, o na makĩĩhoka ndungata yake Musa." 
Exodus15:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Musa na andũ a Isiraeli akĩinĩra MWATHANI rwĩmbo rũũrũ, akiuga atĩrĩ,Nĩngũinĩra MWATHANI amu nĩagĩĩte na ũhootani mũnene; nĩaikĩĩtie mbarathi iriainĩ o hamwe na acitwarithia." 
Exodus15:2 MWATHANI nĩ we hinya na ũhoti wakwa; nĩ we ũhonokeetie.Nĩ we Ngai wakwa, na nĩndĩrĩmũgoocaga. No we Ngai wa baaba, na nĩndĩrĩmũtũũgagĩria." 
Exodus15:3 MWATHANI nĩ njamba ya ita; MWATHANI nĩrĩo rĩĩtwa rĩake. 
Exodus15:4 “Ngaari cia mbarathi cia mũthamaki o na mbũtũ ciake cia ita nĩaciikĩĩtie iriainĩ; njaama ciake iria njoorua nĩihindĩkanĩĩte Iriainĩ Ituune. 
Exodus15:5 Ithikĩĩtwo nĩ maaĩ ma kũndũ kũriku, igakĩrika nginya o gĩtina ta ihiga." 
Exodus15:6 “Guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo, wee MWATHANI, kwĩ hinya mũno; guoko kũu gwaku kwa ũrĩo, MWATHANI, nĩgũthuthangaga thũ." 
Exodus15:7 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa ũhoti waku wĩ mũnene, nĩũkurumanagia thũ ciaku, ũgatũma mathũgũta maaku mooneke, magacicina o ta itira cia rũũa rwa ngano." 
Exodus15:8 Na ũndũ wa mĩhũũmũ yaku, maaĩ nĩmaacookanĩrĩirio magĩtuĩka hĩba, makĩrũũgama makĩĩhanda o ta rũthingo; kũrĩa kũriku mũno iriainĩ maaĩ maanyiitithanirio magĩtuĩka ta ihiga." 
Exodus15:9 Nayo thũ ĩkiuga atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩngũmathingata na ihenya ndĩmanyiite; nĩngũgayania ũtonga wao, na nguue ũrĩa wothe ngwenda; nĩngũcomora rũhiũ rwakwa, ndĩmaniine na guoko gwakwa.’" 
Exodus15:10 Wee MWATHANI watũmire rũhuuho rwaku rũhuruutane, nao andũ a Misiri makĩhumbĩrwo nĩ maaĩ;makĩrikĩra maaĩinĩ maarĩ na hinya, o ta ũrĩa kĩgera kĩa bũrũbũrũ kĩrikagĩra maaĩinĩ." 
Exodus15:11 “Nĩ ngai ĩrĩkũ gatagatĩinĩ ka ngai ĩkĩhaana ta we, MWATHANI? Nĩ ĩrĩkũ ĩkĩhaana ta we,we ũrĩ ũthingu wa magegania? Nĩ ĩrĩkũ ĩngĩhota kũringa ciama na gwĩka ciĩko irĩ hinya ta ciaku?" 
Exodus15:12 Watambũrũkirie guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo, thĩ nayo ĩkĩmameria." 
Exodus15:13 Tondũ wa ũtugi waku, nĩwatongoririe andũ arĩa wakũũrire, ũkĩmatongoria na hinya waku nginya bũrũriinĩ waku mũtheru." 
Exodus15:14 Ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe nĩciiguĩte ũhoro ũcio ikainaina nĩ guoya, nao Afilisiti makaiyũrwo nĩ kĩmako." 
Exodus15:15 O nao anene a Edomu nĩmagegearĩĩte, nacio njamba cia ita cia Moabi igakĩinaina, nao andũ oothe a Kanaani magakua ngoro." 
Exodus15:16 Nĩmakinyĩrĩirwo nĩ kĩmako o na guoya nĩ ũndũ wa kuona hinya waku, wee MWATHANI; magagĩikara o ta mahiga matekwĩnyagunyia, o nginya andũ aaku makahĩtũka; o andũ acio wohorire kuuma ũkomboinĩ." 
Exodus15:17 Ũkaamatwara ũmahande kĩrĩmainĩ gĩaku, o handũ harĩa wee MWATHANI ũthuurĩĩte hatuĩke gĩikaro gĩaku, o harĩa arĩ ho Hekaarũ ĩrĩa wakĩĩte wee mwene." 
Exodus15:18 Wee MWATHANI, nĩ we ũgũtũũra ũthamakaga tene na tene.”" 
Exodus15:19 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩtuĩkania iria magereire thĩ nyũmũ. No rĩrĩa ngaari cia mbarathi cia andũ a Misiri ciathiire ikĩrika iriainĩ irĩ hamwe na andũ arĩa macitwarithagia, MWATHANI agĩcookania maaĩ makĩmahumbĩra." 
Exodus15:20 Naake Miriamu, mwarĩ wa nyina na Harũni, akĩoya tamburini, nao atumia arĩa angĩ oothe makĩmuuma thuutha na tamburini ciao makĩinaga.Na rĩĩrĩ, Miriamu aarĩ mũnabii." 
Exodus15:21 Miriamu agĩkĩmakũĩra atĩrĩ:“Inĩraai MWATHANI, amu nĩagĩĩte na ũhootani ũrĩ riiri, nĩaikĩĩtie mbarathi iriainĩ o hamwe na acitwarithia.”" 
Exodus15:22 Musa agĩgĩtongoria andũ a Isiraeli kuuma Iriainĩ Ituune, magĩkinya werũinĩ wa Shuri. Magĩthiĩ rũgendo rwa mĩthenya ĩtatũ matuĩkanĩirie werũinĩ no mationire maaĩ." 
Exodus15:23 Na rĩrĩa maakinyire handũ heetagwo Mara, makĩremwo nĩkũnyua maaĩ marĩa maarĩ ho tondũ maarĩ marũrũ mũno. Nĩkĩo gĩatũĩĩte handũ hau heetwo Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Nao andũ magĩtetia Musa makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Tũkũnyua kĩ?”" 
Exodus15:25 Musa agĩthaitha MWATHANI, naake MWATHANI akĩmwonia kamũtĩ karĩa Musa aikirie maaĩinĩ macio, namo makĩagĩra. Hau nĩ ho MWATHANI aamahereire mawatho marĩa marĩrũmagĩrĩra, na no ho aamagereirie" 
Exodus15:26 akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Angĩkorwo nĩmũrĩnjathĩkagĩra na kĩyo, na mwĩkage maũndũ marĩa nyonaga maagĩrĩire, na mwathĩkĩre mawatho maakwa, ndirĩ hĩndĩ ngaamũherithia na mĩrimũ o yothe ĩrĩa ndareheire andũ a Misiri. Amu nĩ niĩ MWATHANI ũrĩa ũmũhonagia.”" 
Exodus15:27 Nao magĩkinya Elimu, kũrĩa kwarĩ na ithima ikũmi na igĩrĩ cia maaĩ na mĩtĩ mĩrongo mũgwanja ya mĩkĩndũ, magĩkĩamba hema ciao hau hakuhĩ na maaĩ." 
Exodus16:1 Naguo mũingĩ wothe wa Isiraeli ũkĩnyiita rũgendo ũũmĩĩte Elimu, na mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩtaano wa mweri wa keerĩ kuuma rĩrĩa woimire Misiri, ũgĩkinya werũinĩ wa Sini, ũrĩa wĩ gatagatĩ ka Elimu na Sinai." 
Exodus16:2 Ũrĩ kũu werũinĩ, ũgĩtetia Musa na Harũni" 
Exodus16:3 ũkĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Naarĩ korwo MWATHANI nĩgũtũũraga atũũragĩire Misiri; kũu nĩtũaikaraga thĩ tũkarĩa nyama o na irio cia mĩthemba ĩngĩ o ta ũrĩa tũngĩahotire. No rĩu inyuĩ mwatũreehire werũinĩ ũyũ mũtũniinĩre kuo ithuothe na ng'aragu.”" 
Exodus16:4 Naake MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũmuurĩria irio ciume igũrũ ta mbura; andũ nĩmariumagaraga makoongania irio cia kũigana o mũthenya. Na njĩra ĩyo nĩndĩkĩmagerie nĩguo nyone kana nĩmarĩrũmagĩrĩra watho wakwa kana aaca." 
Exodus16:5 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya wa ĩtandatũ maathondeka iria mainũkia, nĩirĩkorwo ituĩkĩĩte maita meerĩ ma iria moonganagia o mũthenya.”" 
Exodus16:6 Kwoguo Musa na Harũni makĩĩra andũ oothe a Isiraeli atĩrĩ, “Hwaĩinĩ ũyũ nĩguo mũkũmenya atĩ MWATHANI nĩ we wamũrutire bũrũri wa Misiri." 
Exodus16:7 Naguo rũũciinĩ nĩmũkoona riiri wa MWATHANI, nĩ amu nĩaiguĩte ũrĩa mũmũteteetie. Amu ithuĩ tũkĩrĩ kĩ nĩguo mũtũtetie?”" 
Exodus16:8 Ningĩ Musa akiuga atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI nĩ we ũrĩmũheaga nyama cia kũrĩa o hwaĩinĩ, na mĩgate ya kũmũigana o rũũciinĩ, tondũ nĩaiguĩte ũrĩa mũmũteteetie. Rĩrĩa mũgũtũtetia, nĩ MWATHANI mũkoragwo mũgĩtetia.”" 
Exodus16:9 Musa akĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ, “Ĩra andũ oothe a Isiraeli mooke marũũgame mbere ya MWATHANI, nĩ amu nĩaiguĩte mateta maao.”" 
Exodus16:10 Rĩrĩa Harũni aaragĩria andũ oothe a Isiraeli, makĩĩhũgũra na werũinĩ, na rĩĩrĩ, riiri wa MWATHANI ũkĩoneka ituinĩ." 
Exodus16:11 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ," 
Exodus16:12 “Nĩnjiguĩte mateta ma andũ a Isiraeli. Aria nao ũmeere atĩrĩ, hwaĩinĩ marĩrĩaga nyama, na rũũciinĩ makarĩa mĩgate o ĩrĩa mangĩhota, nĩguo mamenye atĩ niĩ MWATHANI, nĩ niĩ Ngai wao.”" 
Exodus16:13 Na rĩĩrĩ, hwaĩinĩ gũgĩũka gĩkundi kĩnene gĩa tũmakia arũme, tũkĩiyũra hau maambĩĩte hema, na rũũciinĩ gũgĩkorwo kũrĩ na ime rĩgũĩte rĩkarigiicĩria handũ hau maambĩĩte hema." 
Exodus16:14 Ime rĩu rĩarĩĩkia gũitĩka, hagĩkorwo harĩ na kĩndũ gĩceke na gĩthathaũku kĩaiyũrĩĩte kũu werũinĩ kĩahaanaga mbaa." 
Exodus16:15 Rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli moonire kĩndũ kĩu, matiamenyaga nĩ kĩĩ, nao magĩkĩambĩrĩria kũũrania o eene atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ gĩĩkĩ?”Naake Musa akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ici nĩcio irio iria MWATHANI amũheete mũrĩe." 
Exodus16:16 Naguo ũrĩa MWATHANI aathanĩĩte mwĩkage nĩ atĩ mũũnganagie irio ici o mũndũ kũringana na ũrĩa angĩhota kũrĩa; ũnganagĩriai andũ arĩa mũrĩ nao hemainĩ cianyu o mũndũ kiro igĩrĩ.” 
Exodus16:17 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩĩka o ro ũguo; amwe makoonganagia nyingĩ, na o arĩa angĩ niini." 
Exodus16:18 No rĩĩrĩ, macithima, makoona atĩ arĩa moonganĩĩtie nyingĩ matirĩ na nyingĩ makĩria, na arĩa moonganĩĩtie niini matianyiihĩirwo; o mũndũ aakoragwo oonganĩĩtie o iria angĩahotire kũigania." 
Exodus16:19 Naake Musa akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ o wothe ndagaatigagie irio icio nĩguo agaacirĩa rũũciũ.”" 
Exodus16:20 No rĩĩrĩ, amwe aao matiigana kũmũthikĩrĩria; maatigagia irio icio nginya rũũciinĩ. No rũũciinĩ kĩrĩa maakoragwo matigĩĩtie gĩakoragwo kĩiyũire igunyũ na gĩkabutha. Naake Musa akĩraakara nĩ ũndũ wao." 
Exodus16:21 O rũũciinĩ, o mũndũ oonganagia o kĩrĩa angĩaiganirie, nĩ gũkorwo rĩrĩa riũa rĩara kĩrĩa gĩakoragwo gĩtigarĩĩte thĩ no gũtweka gĩatwekaga." 
Exodus16:22 Mũthenya wa ĩtandatũ moonganagia irio icio maita meerĩ ma irĩa moonganagia mĩthenya ĩyo ĩngĩ; o mũndũ oonganagia kiro inya. Na rĩĩrĩ, atongoria a mũingĩ nĩmookire makĩĩra Musa ũhoro ũcio," 
Exodus16:23 Musa akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI aathanĩĩte atĩ rũũciũ nĩ mũthenya mũtheru wa kũhuurũka, ũrĩa wamũrĩirwo MWATHANI. Ũũmũũthĩ rugaai kĩrĩa mũkwenda kũruga, o na mũtherũkie kĩrĩa mũkwenda gũtherũkia. Kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩgũtigara, mwĩigĩreei nĩ ũndũ wa rũũciũ.”" 
Exodus16:24 O ta ũrĩa Musa aamaathire, makĩiigĩra irio iria ciatigarire kinya mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ. Na rĩĩrĩ, citiabuthire o na kana ikĩgĩa igunyũ." 
Exodus16:25 Musa akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Rĩai irio icio ũũmũũthĩ, amu ũũmũũthĩ nĩguo thabatũ ya MWATHANI, mũthenya wa kũhuurũka wamũrĩirwo MWATHANI; ũũmũũthĩ mũtingĩciona kũu nja ya hema." 
Exodus16:26 Mũrĩũnganagia irio icio mĩthenya ĩtandatũ, no mũthenya wa mũgwanja, mũthenya ũrĩa arĩ guo wa thabatũ, itirĩkoragwo kuo.”" 
Exodus16:27 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya wa mũgwanja andũ amwe magĩthiĩ kũũngania, no mationire kĩndũ." 
Exodus16:28 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Mũgũtũũra mũregeete gwathĩkĩra maathani na mawatho maakwa nginya rĩ?" 
Exodus16:29 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, niĩ MWATHANI, nĩndĩmũheete mũthenya wa kũhuurũka, na nĩ ũndũ ũcio, mũthenya wa ĩtandatũ hĩndĩ ciothe nĩndĩrĩmũheaga irio cia kũigana mĩthenya ĩĩrĩ. O mũndũ nĩaikarage gwake mũciĩ mũthenya wa mũgwanja na ndakoimage kuo.”" 
Exodus16:30 Kwoguo andũ magĩkĩhuurũka mũthenya wa mũgwanja. 
Exodus16:31 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩĩta irio icio Mana. Nacio ciatariĩ ta tũbegũ tũniini twa rangi mwerũ, na ciacamaga ta mĩthuguiti ĩthondekeetwo na ũũkĩ." 
Exodus16:32 Naake Musa akiuga atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI nĩatwathĩĩte atĩ tũige mana mamwe, nĩ geetha njiarwa ciitũ ikoona irio iria MWATHANI aatũheaga tũrĩ werũinĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aatũrutire Misiri.”" 
Exodus16:33 Ningĩ Musa akĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ, “Oya nyũngũ, ũmĩĩkĩre kiro igĩrĩ cia mana, ũmaige mbere ya MWATHANI mamenyagĩrĩrwo nĩ ũndũ wa njiarwa ciitũ.”" 
Exodus16:34 Naake Harũni agĩgĩĩka o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aathĩĩte Musa, agĩkĩmaiga mbere ya Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro nĩguo mamenyagĩrĩrwo." 
Exodus16:35 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩkĩrĩa mana macio mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna, o nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maakinyire bũrũri wa Kanaani kũrĩa maatũũrire." 
Exodus16:36 (Hĩndĩ ĩyo gĩthimi gĩa kĩndũ kĩũmũ kĩarĩ ta kiro mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ.) 
Exodus17:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũingĩ wothe wa Isiraeli ũgĩthiĩ na mbere na rũgendo ũũmĩĩte werũinĩ wa Sini, naguo ũgaakiumaga handũ hamwe ũgathiĩ harĩa hangĩ, o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aawathaga. Naguo ũkĩamba hema handũ heetagwo Refidimu, no ho hatiarĩ na maaĩ ma kũnyua." 
Exodus17:2 Andũ magĩtetia Musa makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Tũhe maaĩ ma kũnyua.”Naake Musa akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩkĩ kĩratũma mũtete? Nĩkĩ gĩgũtũma mũgerie MWATHANI?”" 
Exodus17:3 No andũ magĩkĩnyoota mũno magĩthiĩ na mbere gũtetia Musa, makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Watũrutire Misiri nĩ ũndũ kĩ? Watũrutire kuo ũũke ũtũũragĩre gũũkũ na nyoota, ithuĩ, ciana ciitũ, o na ũhiũ witũ?”" 
Exodus17:4 Kwoguo Musa agĩthaitha MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ngũgĩĩka atĩa na andũ aya? Matigairie haniini kũũhũũra na mahiga.”" 
Exodus17:5 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Oya atongoria amwe a andũ a Isiraeli ũthiĩ nao mũhĩtũke andũ, na ũkuue mũthĩĩgi ũrĩa wagũthire rũũĩ rwa Nailo naguo." 
Exodus17:6 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, nĩngũthiĩ ndũũgame mbere yaku ihigainĩ kũu kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Sinai. Wee nawe ũgũthe rwaro rwa ihiga, na nĩrũkuuma maaĩ, nĩguo andũ manyue.” Naake Musa agĩĩka o ta ũguo atongoria acio a Isiraeli makĩyonagĩra." 
Exodus17:7 Naake Musa agĩĩta handũ hau Masa, na Meriba, nĩ ũndũ andũ a Isiraeli nĩmaateteete, na ningĩ nĩmaageririe MWATHANI rĩrĩa mooririe atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI arĩ hamwe na ithuĩ kana aaca?”" 
Exodus17:8 Nao Aamaleki magĩũka magĩtharĩkĩra andũ a Isiraeli kũu Refidimu. 
Exodus17:9 Naake Musa akĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ, “Tũthuurĩre andũ, rũũciũ mũgaathiĩ makarũe na Aamaleki. Nĩngaarũũgama kĩrĩma igũrũ nyiitĩĩte mũthĩĩgi ũrĩa Ngai aanjĩĩrire nguue.”" 
Exodus17:9 Naake Musa akĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ, “Tũthuurĩre andũ, rũũciũ mũgaathiĩ makarũe na Aamaleki. Nĩngaarũũgama kĩrĩma igũrũ nyiitĩĩte mũthĩĩgi ũrĩa Ngai aanjĩĩrire nguue.”" 
Exodus17:10 Joshua agĩgĩĩka o ũrĩa Musa aamwathire, agĩthiĩ kũhũũrana na Aamaleki, naake Musa, Harũni, na Huri magĩthiĩ kĩrĩmainĩ igũrũ." 
Exodus17:10 Joshua agĩgĩĩka o ũrĩa Musa aamwathire, agĩthiĩ kũhũũrana na Aamaleki, naake Musa, Harũni, na Huri magĩthiĩ kĩrĩmainĩ igũrũ." 
Exodus17:11 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa rĩothe Musa aambararia guoko gwake na igũrũ, andũ a Isiraeli makahootana, no rĩrĩa agũithia mooko, Aamaleki makaambĩrĩria kũhootana." 
Exodus17:12 Rĩrĩa mooko ma Musa maanogire-rĩ, Harũni na Huri makĩmũreehere ihiga agĩikarĩra nao makĩmũnyiita mooko maambararĩĩtie na igũrũ, ũmwe akanyita guoko kũmwe na ũrĩa ũngĩ kũrĩa kũngĩ, o nginya riũa rĩgĩthũa." 
Exodus17:13 Na njĩra ĩyo Joshua agĩkĩhoota Aamaleki o biũ. 
Exodus17:13 Na njĩra ĩyo Joshua agĩkĩhoota Aamaleki o biũ. 
Exodus17:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Aandĩka ũhootani ũyũ ibukuinĩ, nĩ geetha ũtuĩke wa kũririkanagwo. Ningĩ ĩra Joshua atĩ nĩngaaniina Aamaleki mathire biũ matikaanacooke kũririkanwo.”" 
Exodus17:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Aandĩka ũhootani ũyũ ibukuinĩ, nĩ geetha ũtuĩke wa kũririkanagwo. Ningĩ ĩra Joshua atĩ nĩngaaniina Aamaleki mathire biũ matikaanacooke kũririkanwo.”" 
Exodus17:15 Naake Musa agĩaka kĩgongoona, agĩgĩĩta atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI nĩ we Bendera yakwa.”" 
Exodus17:16 Akiuga atĩrĩ, “Oya bendera ya MWATHANI igũrũ! MWATHANI e gũtũũra arũaga na Aamaleki nginya tene na tene!”" 
Exodus18:1 Naake Jethero, ũrĩa warĩ mũthĩnjĩri Ngai wa Midiani na mũthoni we wa Musa, akĩigua ũrĩa wothe Ngai eekĩire Musa na andũ a Isiraeli rĩrĩa aamarutire Misiri." 
Exodus18:2 Jethero nĩ we waikaraga na Zipora mũtumia wa Musa, arĩĩkia gũcookio Midiani nĩ Musa kuuma Misiri." 
Exodus18:3 O na nĩatũire na aariũ a Musa eerĩ Gerishomu na Eliezeri. (Musa oigĩĩte atĩrĩ, “Ndũũrĩĩte bũrũri ũtarĩ witũ ndĩ mũgeni.” Nĩkĩo atuĩte mũũriũ ũmwe wake Gerishomu." 
Exodus18:4 Ningĩ no oigĩĩte atĩ, “Ngai wa baaba nĩ we wandeithirie na akĩhonokia ndikaae kũũragwo nĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri.” Nĩkĩo atuĩte mũũriũ ũcio ũngĩ Eliezeri.)" 
Exodus18:5 Naake Jethero agĩtwarĩra Musa mũtumia wake Zipora na aariũ aake eerĩ werũinĩ kũrĩa aambĩĩte hema kĩrĩmainĩ gĩtheru. 
Exodus18:6 Jethero nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie gũtũmanĩra Musa atĩ nĩmarooka," 
Exodus18:7 kwoguo Musa akiumagara, agĩthiĩ gũtũnga mũthoni we, agĩkĩmũinamĩrĩra, o na akĩmũmumunya. Nao magĩkĩũrania o mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ ũhoro wake, magĩcooka magĩtoonya hemainĩ ya Musa." 
Exodus18:8 Musa agĩgĩtaarĩria mũthoni we ũrĩa wothe MWATHANI eekĩĩte mũthamaki na andũ a Misiri, nĩguo ahonokie andũ a Isiraeli. O na ningĩ nĩamũtaarĩirie mathĩĩna moothe marĩa mooneete njĩrainĩ na ũrĩa MWATHANI aamahonokeetie." 
Exodus18:9 Naake Jethero agĩkena nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ moothe meega marĩa MWATHANI eekĩĩte andũ a Isiraeli, nĩ ũndũ nĩamahonokeetie kuuma mookoinĩ ma andũ a Misiri." 
Exodus18:10 Jethero agĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI arogaathwo ũcio ũmũhonokeetie kuuma mookoinĩ ma andũ a Misiri o na ma mũthamaki wa Misiri." 
Exodus18:11 Rĩu nĩndamenya atĩ MWATHANI nĩ mũnene gũkĩra ngai ciothe, amu nĩahonokirie andũ aake kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Misiri arĩa maamanyararaga.”" 
Exodus18:12 Thuutha ũcio Jethero akĩreehe indo cia kũrutĩrwo Ngai igongoona rĩa njino, na magongoona marĩa mangĩ. Naake Harũni hamwe na atongoria oothe a Isiraeli magĩũka kũrĩanĩra irio icio theru na mũthoni we wa Musa, o na mathaathaiye Ngai." 
Exodus18:13 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ Musa agĩikara thĩ atuithanie andũ maciira, naake agĩgĩtinda na mĩhang'o ĩyo kuuma rũũciinĩ o nginya hwaĩinĩ." 
Exodus18:14 Rĩrĩa mũthoni we oonire maũndũ moothe marĩa Musa eekagĩra andũ, akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ maũndũ marĩkũ maya ũreekĩra andũ? Nĩkĩ kĩratũma wĩke maũndũ maya ũrĩ wiki, nao andũ magatinda marũũgamĩĩte magũthiũrũrũkĩirie kuuma rũũciinĩ nginya o hwaĩinĩ?”" 
Exodus18:15 Naake Musa agĩcookeria mũthoni we atĩrĩ, “No mũhaka njĩke ũguo, amu andũ aya mookaga kũrĩ niĩ gũtuĩria wendi wa Ngai." 
Exodus18:16 Rĩrĩa andũ eerĩ maagĩa na ciira, mookaga kũrĩ niĩ, ngamatuithania, na ngamamenyithia maathani o na mawatho ma Ngai.”" 
Exodus18:17 Mũthoni we agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ndũreeka ũndũ ũyũ na njĩra ĩrĩa yagĩrĩire." 
Exodus18:18 Nĩũkwĩnogia o na ũnogie andũ aya, amu ũndũ ũyũ nĩũgũkũritũhĩra mũno, na ndũngĩhota kũwĩka wĩ wiki." 
Exodus18:19 Rĩu kĩnjĩtĩkĩrie ngũtaare, na Ngai arokoragwo hamwe nawe. Ti itherũ nĩkwagĩrĩire ũrũũgamagĩrĩre andũ aya mbere ya Ngai na ũmũtwaragĩre maciira maao." 
Exodus18:20 Ningĩ ũmarutage maathani na mawatho ma Ngai na ũmaataaragĩrie ũrĩa maagĩrĩirwo nĩgũtũũra o na gwĩkaga. 
Exodus18:21 Wĩthuurĩre thĩinĩ wa andũ aya, andũ amwe ehoti, matĩĩĩte Ngai, ehokeku na matangĩhakwo, ũmatue atongoria a andũ. Nao matongoragie ikundi cia andũ ngiri, igana, mĩrongo ĩtaano, o na ikũmi." 
Exodus18:22 Reke andũ acio matuithanagie andũ maciira mahinda moothe. Nĩmakũreehagĩre maciira marĩa maritũ, no maciira marĩa maniini nĩmamatuithanagie arĩ o. Weka ũguo, nĩũkũhũthĩrwo nĩ wĩra, nĩ ũndũ nĩmarĩteithanagia wĩra ũcio nawe." 
Exodus18:23 Weka ũguo, o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI egũgwatha, ndũgũcooka kũnoga, nao andũ aya oothe marĩinũkaga maciira maao matuithanĩĩtio.”" 
Exodus18:24 Kwoguo Musa akĩigua mataaro ma mũthoni we," 
Exodus18:25 agĩthuura andũ ehoti kuuma andũinĩ oothe a Isiraeli, akĩmatua atongoria a ikundi cia andũ ngiri, igana, mĩrongo ĩtaano, o na ikũmi." 
Exodus18:26 Nao andũ acio magagĩtuithanagia andũ maciira mahinda moothe, namo maciira marĩa maritũ magatwaragĩra Musa, no marĩa maniini magatuithania o eene." 
Exodus18:27 Musa agĩkiugĩra mũthoni we ũhoro, naake mũthoni we akĩinũka." 
Exodus19:1 (1-2) Nao andũ a Isiraeli makiumagara kuuma Refidimu, naguo mũthenya wa mbere wa mweri wa ĩtatũ kuumagia hĩndĩ ĩrĩa moimire Misiri, magĩkinya werũinĩ wa Sinai. Nao makĩamba hema ciao kũng'ethera kĩrĩma gĩa Sinai." 
Exodus19:2 Naake Musa akĩambata kĩrĩmainĩ agatũngane na Ngai.Naake MWATHANI akĩmwĩta arĩ kĩrĩmainĩ kĩu akĩmwĩra athiĩ eere andũ a Isiraeli, o acio njiarwa cia Jakubu, atĩrĩ," 
Exodus19:3 “Nĩmweyoneire maũndũ marĩa ndeekire andũ a Misiri, na mũkĩĩyonera ũrĩa ndamũkuuire inyuĩ o ta ũrĩa rwĩgĩ rũkuuaga tũcui twayo na mathagu, ngĩmũreehe kũrĩ niĩ." 
Exodus19:4 Kwoguo rĩu, angĩkorwo nĩmũkũnjathĩkĩra na mũmenyagĩrire kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩakwa, nĩmũgũtuĩka andũ aakwa. Nĩ gũkorwo thĩ yothe nĩ yakwa, no inyuĩ mũgũtuĩka andũ aakwa athuure," 
Exodus19:5 ndĩmũtue andũ aakwa aamũre na mũndungatagĩre ta athĩnjĩri Ngai.” Icio nĩcio ciugo iria ũkwĩra andũ a Isiraeli. 
Exodus19:6 Kwoguo Musa agĩikũrũka agĩĩta atongoria a andũ a Isiraeli, akĩmeera maũndũ moothe marĩa MWATHANI aamwathĩĩte." 
Exodus19:7 Nao andũ oothe magĩcookanĩria hamwe atĩrĩ, “Maũndũ macio moothe MWATHANI oigĩĩte nĩtũrĩmeekaga.” Naake Musa akĩĩra MWATHANI ũrĩa andũ moigire." 
Exodus19:8 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũũka kũrĩ we ndĩ ituinĩ itumanu nĩguo andũ maigue ngĩaria nawe, na nĩguo makwĩhoke kuuma rĩu gũthiĩ na mbere.”" 
Exodus19:9 Musa agĩkĩĩra MWATHANI ũrĩa andũ maacooketie. Naake MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Thiĩ kũrĩ andũ ũmeere metherie ũũmũũthĩ na rũũciũ, nĩ ũndũ wa gũthaathaiya. No mũhaka mathambie nguo ciao" 
Exodus19:10 na makorwo mehaarĩirie mũthenya wa ĩtatũ. Mũthenya ũcio nĩngaikũrũka kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Sinai, andũ oothe makĩnyonaga." 
Exodus19:11 Nawe nĩũgeekĩra mũhaka ũthiũrũrũkĩrie kĩrĩma gĩothe nĩ geetha andũ matikaae kũhĩtũka. Ũcooke wĩre andũ memenyerere matikaambate kĩrĩmainĩ o na kana magĩkuhĩrĩrie. Mũndũ o wothe ũkaahuutia kĩrĩma no mũhaka akooragwo. 
Exodus19:12 Gũtikaanagĩe na mũndũ ũkaamũhuutia na mooko; akaahũũrwo na mahiga kana arathwo na mĩguĩ. Ũguo nĩguo mũgeeka mũndũ o na nyamũ; mũtikaanareke mũndũ ũcio atũũre muoyo, o na nyamũ ĩyo. Rĩrĩa karumbeeta gakaahuuhwo, nĩguo andũ makaambata kĩrĩma igũrũ.”" 
Exodus19:13 Naake Musa agĩkiuma kĩrĩmainĩ, akĩĩra andũ metherie na mathambie nguo ciao." 
Exodus19:14 Naake Musa akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mwĩthagathageei nĩ ũndũ wa mũthenya wa gatatũ, na mũtigakomane na atumia.”" 
Exodus19:15 Na rĩĩrĩ, rũũciinĩ rwa mũthenya wa gatatũ gũkĩgĩa ngwa o na heni, narĩo itu itumanu rĩkĩoneka kĩrĩma igũrũ, na mũgambo mũnene mũno wa karumbeeta ũkĩiguuo. Nao andũ oothe arĩa maarĩ kambĩinĩ makĩinaina nĩ guoya." 
Exodus19:16 Naake Musa agĩgĩtongoria andũ akĩmoimia nja ya hema magatũũngane na MWATHANI, nao makĩrũũgama magũrũinĩ ma kĩrĩma." 
Exodus19:17 Na rĩĩrĩ, kĩrĩma gĩothe gĩa Sinai kĩahumbĩrĩĩtwo nĩ ndoogo, amu MWATHANI nĩaikũrũkĩĩte e thĩinĩ wa mwaki, agaikara igũrũ rĩakĩo. Nayo ndoogo ĩyo ĩgĩtooga yambatĩĩte na igũrũ o ta ya icua inene, nao andũ oothe makĩinaina mũno." 
Exodus19:18 Naguo mũgambo wa karumbeeta ũgĩkĩrĩrĩria kũneneha. Naake Musa aaria, Ngai aamũcookagĩria arĩ thĩinĩ wa marurumĩ." 
Exodus19:19 Naake MWATHANI agĩikũrũka igũrũ wa kĩrĩma gĩa Sinai o gacũmbĩrĩ, agĩĩta Musa aambate o kũu gacũmbĩrĩ ga kĩrĩma; naake Musa agĩkĩambata ho." 
Exodus19:20 Naake MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ikũrũka ũgakaanie andũ matikaae kũhĩtũka mũhaka mooke manjũũthĩrĩrie; mangĩĩka ũguo, aingĩ aao nĩmegũkua." 
Exodus19:21 O na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa mekũnguhĩrĩria nĩmetherie, kwaga ũguo nĩngũmaherithia.”" 
Exodus19:22 Musa akĩĩra MWATHANI atĩrĩ, “Andũ matingĩambata kĩrĩmainĩ gĩĩkĩ amu we mwene nĩwatwathire tũtuage kĩrĩma gĩĩkĩ atĩ nĩ gĩtheru na tũthondeke mũhaka gũgĩthiũrũrũkĩria.”" 
Exodus19:23 Naake MWATHANI agĩcookeria Musa atĩrĩ, “Ikũrũka, ũgĩĩre Harũni mũũke naake. No rĩĩrĩ, ndũkaareke athĩnjĩri Ngai o na andũ arĩa angĩ makĩre mũhaka maambate kũrĩ niĩ; mangĩĩka ũguo nĩngũmaherithia.”" 
Exodus19:24 Kwoguo Musa agĩikũrũka kũrĩ andũ akĩmeera ũrĩa MWATHANI oiga. 
Exodus20:1 Naake Ngai akĩaria ciugo ici akiuga atĩrĩ," 
Exodus20:2 “Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI Ngai waku ũrĩa wakũrutire bũrũri wa Misiri, uume nyũmbainĩ ya ũkombo." 
Exodus20:3 “Ndũkaanathaathaiye ngai ingĩ tiga niĩ. 
Exodus20:4 “Ndũkaanethondekere mĩhianano ya kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩrĩ kũrĩa igũrũ, kana kĩrĩ gũũkũ thĩ, kana kĩrĩ maaĩinĩ marĩa me rungu rwa thĩ." 
Exodus20:5 Ndũkaanainamĩrĩre mũhianano o wothe o na kana ũũthaathaiye, nĩ amu niĩ MWATHANI Ngai waku ndĩ Ngai ũteendeete kũigananio na ngai ĩngĩ. Nĩherithagia arĩa mathũire, o na ciana ciao, o nginya rũciaro rwa gatatũ na rwa kana." 
Exodus20:6 Ningĩ nĩnjiguagĩra andũ ngiri na ngiri tha arĩa manyendeete na makaigua maathani maakwa. 
Exodus20:7 “Ndũkaanagwete rĩĩtwa rĩakwa na itherũ nĩ gũkorwo niĩ MWATHANI Ngai waku nĩherithagia mũndũ o wothe ũgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩakwa na itherũ. 
Exodus20:8 “Menyagĩrĩra mũthenya wa Thabatũ ũwamũrage. 
Exodus20:9 Rutaga wĩra waku wothe mĩthenya ĩtandatũ. 
Exodus20:10 Mũthenya wa mũgwanja nĩ mũthenya wa kũhuurũka ũrĩa wamũrĩirwo MWATHANI Ngai waku. Mũthenya ũcio ndũkaanarute wĩra wee mwene, mũũrũguo, mwarĩguo, ndungata yaku ya mũndũ mũrũme kana ya mũndũ wa nja, ũhiũ waku, o na kana mũgeni ũrĩa ũrĩ gwaku mũciĩ." 
Exodus20:11 Amu niĩ MWATHANI, ndoombire igũrũ, thĩ, iria rĩrĩa inene, o na indo ciothe iria irĩ kuo mĩthenya ĩtandatũ, no mũthenya wa mũgwanja ngĩhuurũka. Kwoguo niĩ MWATHANI, nĩndaraathimire mũthenya ũcio wa Thabatũ ngĩwamũra." 
Exodus20:12 “Tĩĩa thooguo na maitũguo, nĩ geetha ũtũũre matukũ maingĩ bũrũri ũrĩa niĩ, MWATHANI Ngai waku, ngũkũhe." 
Exodus20:13 “Ndũkaanooragane. 
Exodus20:14 “Ndũkaanatharanie. 
Exodus20:15 “Ndũkaanaiye. 
Exodus20:16 “Ndũkaanaigĩrĩre mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ kĩgeenyo. 
Exodus20:17 “Ndũkaanerirĩrie nyũmba ya mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ, o na ndũkaanerirĩrie mũtumia wake, ndungata yake ya mũndũ mũrũme kana ya mũndũ wa nja, ndeegwa yake, ndigiri yake, kana o kĩndũ gĩake o gĩothe.”" 
Exodus20:18 Rĩrĩa andũ maiguire marurumĩ, heni na mũgambo wa tũrumbeeta, na makĩona kĩrĩma kĩu gĩgĩtooga, magĩĩtigĩra na makĩinaina. Magĩkĩrũũgama o haraaya" 
Exodus20:19 makĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Aria na ithuĩ arĩ we na nĩtũkũigua; reke Ngai atige kwaria na ithuĩ tũtigaakue.”" 
Exodus20:20 Naake Musa akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Tigaai gwĩtigĩra; amu Ngai ookĩĩte o kũmũgeria, na gũtũma mũthiĩ na mbere kũmwathĩkĩra nĩ geetha mũtikaae kwĩhia.”" 
Exodus20:21 Nao andũ magĩthiĩ na mbere kũrũũgama o haraaya, na no Musa wathiire hakuhĩ na itu rĩu itumanu harĩa Ngai aarĩ." 
Exodus20:22 Ningĩ MWATHANI agĩatha Musa eere andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ: Inyuĩ eene nĩmweyonera atĩ nĩndamwarĩria ndĩ igũrũ matuinĩ. 
Exodus20:23 Mũtikaanethondekere ngai ingĩ cia betha o na kana cia thahabu cia gũthaathayanĩrio na niĩ. 
Exodus20:24 Thondekeraai kĩgongoona mũgĩake na tĩĩri na igũrũ rĩakĩo mũrute ng'ondu na ng'ombe cianyu irĩ magongoona ma njino na thaayũ. Handũ o hoothe harĩa ndĩrĩmũamũragĩra hatuĩke ha gũũthaathayagĩria, hau nĩ ho ndĩrĩũkaga ngamũraathima." 
Exodus20:25 Mũngĩthondekera kĩgongoona kĩa mahiga-rĩ, mũtikaanagĩake na mahiga ma gũacũhio, amu mwamacũhia na mũcumaarĩ mũtingĩnjakĩra kĩgongoona namo." 
Exodus20:26 Ningĩ mũtikaananjakĩre kĩgongoona kĩrĩ na ngathĩ, mũngĩgeeka ũguo nĩmũkeeyonania njaga mũkĩhaica ngathĩ icio." 
Exodus21:1 “Na rĩĩrĩ, mawatho maya marũmĩrĩire nĩ mo ũkũhe andũ a Isiraeli:" 
Exodus21:2 Ũngĩgũra ngombo ya Mũhibirania, reke ĩgũtungatĩre mĩaka ĩtandatũ, na mwaka wa mũgwanja ũmĩrekererie ĩthiĩ ĩtarĩ na kĩndũ ĩkũrĩha." 
Exodus21:3 Angĩkorwo ndĩahikanĩĩtie hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yatuĩkire ngombo yaku, ndĩagĩrĩirwo nĩgũthiĩ na mũtumia ĩkiuma gwaku, no angĩkorwo nĩyahikanĩĩtie hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yatuĩkire ngombo yaku, no ĩthiĩ na mũtumia wayo ĩkiuma gwaku." 
Exodus21:4 Mũnene wa ngombo ĩyo angĩmĩhe mũtumia, naake mũtumia ũcio amĩciarĩre aanake kana airĩĩtu, mũtumia ũcio na ciana icio marĩtuĩkaga a mũnene wayo na ngombo ĩyo ĩgaathiĩ ĩrĩ iiki." 
Exodus21:5 No ngombo ĩyo ĩngiuga atĩ nĩyendeete mũnene wayo, mũtumia wayo, o na ciana ciayo, na atĩ ndĩkwenda kũrekererio," 
Exodus21:6 hĩndĩ ĩyo mũnene wayo no akĩmĩtware handũ harĩa hathaathayagĩrio na amĩĩre ĩrũũgame mũrangoinĩ kana gĩtugĩinĩ kĩa mũrango. Naake mũnene wayo amĩtũre gũtũ na mũkuha, nayo ngombo ĩyo ĩgĩtũũre ĩmũtungatagĩra matukũ maayo moothe." 
Exodus21:7 “Mũndũ angĩendia mwarĩ agatuĩke ngombo-rĩ, ngombo ĩyo ya mũirĩĩtu ndĩkaarekererio ta ũrĩa ngombo cia arũme ciĩkagwo." 
Exodus21:8 Angĩkorwo ngombo ĩyo ya mũirĩĩtu yendeetio kũrĩ mũndũ wendaga kũmĩtua mũtumia wayo na gũkorwo mũndũ ũcio ndaramĩenda-rĩ, ngombo ĩyo no ĩgĩkũũrwo nĩ ithe wayo; no mũnene wayo ndangĩmĩenderia andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ nĩ ũndũ nĩamĩheeneetie." 
Exodus21:9 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ angĩgũrĩra mũũrũwe ngombo ya mũndũ wa nja-rĩ, aagĩrĩirwo nĩkũmĩĩka o ta ũrĩa eekaga aarĩ aake." 
Exodus21:10 Mũndũ angĩhikia mũtumia wa keerĩ-rĩ, ndakaananyiihanyiihĩrie ũrĩa wa mbere irio, nguo, kana ihooto iria araarĩ nacio mbere." 
Exodus21:11 Angĩaga kũhingĩria mũtumia ũcio maũndũ macio matatũ, mũtumia ũcio no arekererio athiĩ atekũrĩha kĩndũ." 
Exodus21:12 “Mũndũ angĩgũtha ũrĩa ũngĩ akue-rĩ, o naake no mũhaka ooragwo." 
Exodus21:13 No angĩkorwo amũũraga na mũtino atekwenda, nĩngũmũthuurĩra kũrĩa mũndũ ũcio angĩũrĩra na agĩkorwo atarĩ ũgwatiinĩ." 
Exodus21:14 No mũndũ angĩraakara na oorage mũndũ akĩendaga-rĩ, no mũhaka ooragwo o na angĩkorwo oorĩire kĩgongoonainĩ gĩakwa atĩ nĩguo ndakooragwo." 
Exodus21:15 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩgũtha ithe kana nyina, no mũhaka ooragwo." 
Exodus21:16 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩnyiita mũndũ akamwendie kana akamũige e ta ngombo yake, no mũhaka ooragwo." 
Exodus21:17 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩruma ithe kana nyina, no mũhaka ooragwo." 
Exodus21:18 (18-19) “Ningĩ andũ eerĩ mangĩtetania na ũmwe agũthe ũrĩa ũngĩ na ihiga kana ngundi no ndamũũrage-rĩ, mũndũ ũcio ndakaae kũherithio. No mũndũ ũcio ũgũthĩĩtwo angĩkorwo nĩegũikara gĩtandainĩ na thuutha ahote gũũkĩra na gwĩtwara agĩĩtirimagia na mũtirima-rĩ, mũndũ ũcio wamũgũthĩĩte no mũhaka amũrĩhe ihinda rĩrĩa ateete na acooke amũtungate nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa akaahona." 
Exodus21:19 “Ningĩ mũndũ angĩoya rũthanju agũthe ngombo yake ya mũndũ mũrũme kana ya mũndũ wa nja, nayo ĩkue hau hau-rĩ, mũndũ ũcio no mũhaka aherithio." 
Exodus21:20 No ngombo ĩyo ĩngĩaga gũkua handũinĩ ha mũthenya ũmwe kana ĩĩrĩ, mũndũ ũcio ndaagĩrĩirwo nĩkũherithio, amu ngombo ĩyo nĩ yake." 
Exodus21:21 “Ningĩ arũme mangĩkorwo makĩrũa, na hiihi magũthe mũtumia e mũritũ na matũme ahune, no we mwene aage gũtiihio-rĩ, mũndũ ũcio ũngĩkorwo amũgũthĩĩte no mũhaka arute irĩhi rĩrĩa mũthuuri wa mũtumia ũcio angĩĩtia, na rĩringaine na ũrĩa atuithania magaathĩrĩirie." 
Exodus21:22 No rĩĩrĩ, angĩkorwo mũtumia ũcio nĩatiihĩĩtio-rĩ, no mũhaka muoyo uumage muoyo," 
Exodus21:23 riitho riumage riitho, igego riumage igego, guoko kuumage guoko, kũgũrũ kuumage kũgũrũ," 
Exodus21:24 ihĩa riumage ihĩa, kĩronda kiumage kĩronda, o na itiihia riumage itiihia." 
Exodus21:25 “Mũndũ angĩringa ngombo yake ya mũndũ mũrũme kana ya mũndũ wa nja riitho, narĩo rĩthũũke-rĩ, no mũhaka arekererie ngombo ĩyo ĩĩthiĩre, naguo ũndũ ũcio ũgĩtuĩke irĩhi rĩa riitho rĩu." 
Exodus21:26 Angĩgũtha ngombo yake ya mũndũrũme kana ya mũndũ wa nja igego, narĩo rĩgũũke, no mũhaka amĩrekererie ĩĩthiĩre, naguo ũndũ ũcio ũgĩtuĩke irĩhi rĩa igego rĩu." 
Exodus21:27 “Na rĩĩrĩ, ndeegwa ĩngĩtheecanga mũndũ na hĩa akue-rĩ, ndeegwa ĩyo no mũhaka ĩhũũrwo na mahiga yũragwo, na nyama ciayo itikaarĩo; no mwene ndeegwa ĩyo ndakaaherithio." 
Exodus21:28 No angĩkorwo ndeegwa ĩyo nĩramenyereete gũtheecanga andũ na hĩa, na mwene yo akorwo nĩaramenyithĩĩtio ũhoro ũcio na ndamĩhingĩre, nayo ĩgĩcooke yũrage mũndũ-rĩ, ndeegwa ĩyo no mũhaka ĩhũũrwo na mahiga yũragwo, o naake mwene yo no mũhaka ooragwo." 
Exodus21:29 Na rĩĩrĩ, mwene yo angĩĩtĩkĩrio kũrĩha irĩhi nĩ geetha ahonokie muoyo wake, no mũhaka arĩhe kĩrĩa gĩothe angĩtuĩrwo." 
Exodus21:30 Ndeegwa ĩyo ĩngĩtheecanga kahĩĩ kana kairĩĩtu na hĩa ĩkoorage-rĩ, watho o ro ũcio noguo ũngĩrũmĩrĩrwo." 
Exodus21:31 Ningĩ ndeegwa ĩyo ĩngĩũraga ngombo ya mũndũ mũrũme kana ya mũndũ wa nja-rĩ, mwene ndeegwa ĩyo no mũhaka arĩhe mwene ngombo ĩyo icunjĩ cia betha mĩrongo ĩtatũ, nayo ndeegwa ĩyo ĩhũũrwo na mahiga yũragwo." 
Exodus21:32 “Ningĩ mũndũ angĩkunũra irima kana eenje irima na aage kũrĩkunĩka, nayo ndeegwa kana ndigiri ĩgwe irimainĩ rĩu-rĩ," 
Exodus21:33 mwene irima rĩu no mũhaka arĩhe nyamũ ĩyo, nayo nyamũ ĩyo ĩkuĩte ĩtuĩke yake." 
Exodus21:34 Ningĩ ndeegwa ya mũndũ ĩngĩũraga ndeegwa ya mũndũ ũngĩ-rĩ, andũ acio eerĩ no mũhaka meendie ndeegwa ĩrĩa ĩ muoyo, magayane mbeeca icio, na magayane nyama cia ndeegwa ĩyo yũragĩĩtwo." 
Exodus21:35 No angĩkorwo nĩkũĩkaine atĩ ndeegwa ĩyo nĩramenyereete gũtheecangana na hĩa, na mwene yo ndamĩhingagĩra-rĩ, no mũhaka arĩhe mũndũ ũcio ũngĩ na ndeegwa ĩngĩ, nayo ĩyo ĩkuĩte ĩtuĩke yake." 
Exodus22:1 “Na rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ angĩiya ndeegwa kana ng'ondu amĩthĩnje kana amĩendie-rĩ, no mũhaka arĩhe ndeegwa ithaano nĩ ũndũ wa ndeegwa ĩyo, na arĩhe ng'ondu inya nĩ ũndũ wa ng'ondu ĩyo." 
Exodus22:2 (2-4) Mũndũ ũcio no mũhaka arĩhe kĩrĩa aiyĩte. Mũndũ ũcio angĩkorwo nĩ mũthĩĩni, nĩendio atuĩke ngombo nĩ geetha kĩrĩa aiyĩte kĩrĩhĩke. Ningĩ nyamũ ĩrĩa aiyĩte, ĩrĩ ndeegwa, ndigiri, o na kana ng'ondu, ĩngĩoneka gwake ĩ muoyo-rĩ, no mũhaka arĩhe nyamũ igĩrĩ nĩ ũndũ wa nyamũ ĩyo.“Na rĩĩrĩ, mũici angĩnyiitwo agĩtua nyũmba ũtukũ, na agũthwo akue-rĩ, gũtingĩgĩa na irĩhi nĩ ũndũ wa mũici ũcio kũũragwo. No ũndũ ũcio ũngĩĩkĩka mũthenya, mũndũ ũcio egũtuuo mũũragani." 
Exodus22:3 “Mũndũ angĩrĩithia mũgũnda wene, kana arĩithie mũgũnda wene wa mĩthabibũ, kana arekererie nyamũ yake ĩrĩe irio iria irĩ mũgũnda wa mũndũ ũngĩ, no mũhaka arĩhe irio icio na irio iria njega mũno irĩ mũgũnda wake kana irĩ mũgũnda wake wa mĩthabibũ." 
Exodus22:4 “Mũndũ angĩakia mwaki mũgũndainĩ wake, naguo mwaki ũcio ũcine rũgiri rwa mĩigua, ũtambe nginya mũgũndainĩ wa mũndũ ũngĩ ũcine ngano ĩrĩa ĩrakũra kana ĩrĩa ĩtinĩĩtio ĩkoohwo itĩĩa-rĩ, mũndũ ũcio wakĩĩtie mwaki ũcio no mũhaka arĩhe hathara ĩyo." 
Exodus22:5 “Mũndũ angĩnengera ũrĩa ũngĩ mbeeca kana indo ciake amũigĩre, nacio icooke ciiywo irĩ nyũmba gwake-rĩ, mũici angĩnyiitwo no mũhaka arĩhe maita meerĩ maacio." 
Exodus22:6 No mũici angĩaga kũnyiitwo, mwene nyũmba no mũhaka atwarwo handũ harĩa hathaathayagĩrio, anyue muuma nĩ geetha oonanie atĩ ndaiyĩte indo cia mũndũ ũcio ũngĩ." 
Exodus22:7 “Ciirainĩ o wothe ũkoniĩ indo, irĩ ndeegwa, ndigiri, ng'ondu, nguo, o na kana kĩndũ kĩngĩ o gĩothe kĩngĩkorwo kĩũrĩĩte-rĩ, andũ arĩa marauga indo icio nĩ ciao, no mũhaka matwarwo handũ harĩa hathaathayagĩrio, na mũndũ ũrĩa Ngai ekuonania atĩ nĩ we wĩ na mahĩtia, no mũhaka arĩhe mũndũ ũcio ũngĩ maita meerĩ." 
Exodus22:8 “Mũndũ angĩtĩkĩra kũhithio nĩ mũndũ ũngĩ ndigiri, ndeegwa, ng'ondu, o na kana nyamũ ĩngĩ o yothe, nayo nyamũ ĩyo ĩkue, ĩtiihio, o na kana ĩtahwo, na kwage mũira wa ũndũ ũcio-rĩ," 
Exodus22:9 mũndũ ũcio ũrahithĩĩtio, no mũhaka atwarwo handũ harĩa hathaathayagĩrio anyue muuma atĩ ndaiyĩte nyamũ ya mũndũ ũcio ũngĩ. Naake mwene no mũhaka eetĩkĩre muuma ũcio na hatingĩkorwo na kũrĩhania." 
Exodus22:10 No nyamũ ĩyo ĩngĩiywo ĩ gwake-rĩ, no mũhaka arĩhe mwene." 
Exodus22:11 Ningĩ ĩngĩrĩĩo nĩ nyamũ cia gĩthaka, mũndũ ũcio nĩonanie matigari matuĩke ũira, na ndakaarĩhe nyamũ ĩyo ĩrĩĩtwo nĩ nyamũ cia gĩthaka." 
Exodus22:12 “Mũndũ angĩgwatio nyamũ nĩ mũndũ ũngĩ, nayo ĩtiihio kana ĩkue atarĩ ho-rĩ, mũndũ ũcio ũgwatĩĩtio no mũhaka amĩrĩhe." 
Exodus22:13 No mwene angĩkorwo arĩ ho-rĩ, mũndũ ũcio ndangĩmĩrĩha. Angĩkorwo nyamũ ĩyo nĩyagũkombora, mbeeca iria ĩrutĩirwo cia kũmĩkombora nĩirĩĩkĩĩtie kũmĩrĩha." 
Exodus22:14 “Mũndũ mũrũme angĩheenereria mũirĩĩtu gathirange ũtoorĩĩtio, akome naake-rĩ, no mũhaka amũraacĩrie amũhikie atuĩke mũtumia wake." 
Exodus22:15 No rĩĩrĩ, ithe wa mũirĩĩtu ũcio angĩrega kũmũheana kũrĩ mũndũ ũcio, no mũhaka mũndũ ũcio arĩhe ithe wa mũirĩĩtu ũcio mbeeca o ta iria ingĩraacĩrio mũirĩĩtu gathirange." 
Exodus22:16 “Mũtikaanareke mũndũ wa nja mũrogi atũũre muoyo. 
Exodus22:17 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩkoma na nyamũ no mũhaka ooragwo. 
Exodus22:18 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũkaarutĩra ngai ĩngĩ o yothe igongoona tiga o niĩ MWATHANI, no mũhaka ooragwo." 
Exodus22:19 “Mũtikaanahĩtĩrie mũgeni kana mũmũhinyĩrĩrie, amu o na inyuĩ mwarĩ ageni bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri." 
Exodus22:20 Mũtikaananyamaarie mũtumia wa ndigwa kana mwana wa ngoriai. 
Exodus22:21 Mũngĩmanyamaaria nao mangaĩre-rĩ, ndirĩ hĩndĩ itakaigua gũkaya kwao." 
Exodus22:22 Nĩngaraakara na ndĩmũũragithie mbaarainĩ. Nao atumia aanyu matuĩke a ndigwa, na ciana cianyu itigwo itarĩ na maithe." 
Exodus22:23 “ Ũngĩkombera mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ wa andũ aakwa arĩa athĩĩni mbeeca, tiga kũmũrandũra kana ũmwĩtie uumithio wa mbeeca icio." 
Exodus22:24 Ũngĩthiĩ na nguo ya mũndũ ũngĩ ĩrĩ kĩndũ gĩa kũrũũgamĩrĩra thiirĩ atĩ nĩguo arĩmĩkũũra, no mũhaka ũmũcookerie riũa rĩtanathũa." 
Exodus22:25 Ĩyo no yo nguo ĩrĩa arĩ nayo ya kwĩhumbĩra nĩguo aigue ũrugarĩ. Mũndũ ũcio arĩkĩĩhumbĩra na kĩ? Mũndũ ũcio angĩngaĩra, nĩndĩrĩmũiguaga amu ndĩ tha." 
Exodus22:26 “Ndũkaanacambie Ngai, o na ndũkaanarume mũtongoria wa andũ aanyu." 
Exodus22:27 “Ndũkaanagonderere kũũndutĩra maciaro ma ngano, ndibei, o na maguta maaku ma mĩtamaiyũ rĩrĩa magetha maamo makinya.“ No mũhaka mũũheage aariũ aanyu a marigithaathi." 
Exodus22:28 Ningĩ no mũhaka mũũheage marigithaathi ma ng'ombe na ma ng'ondu cianyu. Mũrekage marigithaathi ma njamba magaikara na maanyina mĩthenya mũgwanja, naguo mũthenya wa ĩnaana mũkandutĩra." 
Exodus22:29 “Inyuĩ mũrĩ andũ aakwa, kwoguo mũtikaanarĩe nyama cia nyamũ o na ĩrĩkũ yũragĩĩtwo nĩ nyamũ cia gĩthaka; no mũhaka mũmĩikagĩrie ngui." 
Exodus23:1 “Ndũkaanameemerekie ndeto cia mũhuuhu, o na ndukaanateithĩrĩrie mũndũ mwĩhia na njĩra ya kũheana ũira wa maheeni." 
Exodus23:2 Ningĩ ndũkaanarũmĩrĩre mũingĩ atĩ ũgeeke ũũru hamwe naguo, kana ũheane ũira wa gũthũũkia waragania atĩ nĩguo ũnyiitanĩre na mũingĩ." 
Exodus23:3 Ningĩ ndũkaanathuutũkanie mũndũ mũthĩĩni ciirainĩ wake. 
Exodus23:4 “Ũngĩona ng'ombe kana ndigiri ya thũ yaku yũrĩĩte-rĩ, no mũhaka ũmũcookerie." 
Exodus23:5 Ningĩ ũngĩona ndigiri ya mũndũ ũkũmeneete ĩgũĩte ĩkaremererwo nĩ mũrigo wayo, mũteithĩrĩrie kũmĩũkĩria; tiga kũmũhĩtũka o ro ũguo." 
Exodus23:6 “Ndũkaanarege kũrũmĩrĩra waragania rĩrĩa mũthĩĩni egũciirithio. 
Exodus23:7 Ehagĩrĩra thitango yothe ya maheeni, na ndũkaanooragithie mũndũ ũtarĩ na mahĩtia na mũthingu, amu nĩngaatuĩra mũndũ o wothe, wĩkaga waganu ta ũcio." 
Exodus23:8 Ndũkaanamũkĩre ihaki, amu ihaki rĩhingaga andũ maitho makaremwo nĩkuona waragania na rĩkoogomia ciira wa arĩa mateehĩĩtie." 
Exodus23:9 “Ndũkaanahinyĩrĩrie mũndũ mũgeni; wee nĩũũĩ ũrĩa mũgeni aiguaga, amu o na inyuĩ mwarĩ ageni bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri." 
Exodus23:10 “Handaga irio bũrũriinĩ waku handũinĩ ha mĩaka ĩtandatũ, na ũgethage kĩrĩa ũrĩkũraga mĩaka ĩyo." 
Exodus23:11 No rĩĩrĩ, mwaka wa mũgwanja nĩũrĩrekaga ũhuurũke, na ndũkaagethage kĩndũ o gĩothe gĩgũkũra kuo. Ũrĩĩkaga ũguo nĩ geetha andũ arĩa athĩĩni moonage gĩa kũrĩa, na kĩrĩa matigia nacio nyamũ cia gĩthaka ikarĩaga. Ĩkaga o ro ũguo mũgũndainĩ waku wa mĩthabibũ o na wa mĩtamaiyũ." 
Exodus23:12 “Rutaga wĩra waku mĩthenya ĩtandatũ, no mũthenya wa mũgwanja ndũkaarutage wĩra, nĩ geetha ngombo ciaku, na ageni arĩa makurutagĩra wĩra, mahuurũkage, o na nyamũ ciaku nacio ikahuurũka." 
Exodus23:13 “Athĩkagĩra maũndũ moothe marĩa niĩ MWATHANI ngwĩrĩĩte. Ndũkaanahooe ngai ingĩ, kana ũgwete marĩĩtwa maacio na kanua gaaku." 
Exodus23:14 “No mũhaka ũkũngũyagĩre thigũkũ ya kũndĩĩya maita matatũ thĩinĩ wa mwaka. 
Exodus23:15 Hĩndĩ ya mweri wa Abibu, mweri ũrĩa mwoimire bũrũri wa Misiri, nĩũrĩkũngũagĩra Thigũkũ ya Mĩgate Ĩtarĩ Mĩĩkĩre Ndaawa ya Kũimbia o ta ũrĩa ndĩmwathĩĩte. Mĩthenya mũgwanja ya thigũkũ ĩyo, ndũkaanarĩe mũgate o na ũmwe wĩkĩrĩĩtwo ndaawa ya kũimbia. Na ningĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ndakaanooke gũũthaathaiya arĩ mooko matheri." 
Exodus23:16 “Thigũkũ ĩrĩa ĩngĩ ũrĩkũngũagĩra nĩ ya Magetha ma Mbere ma irio iria ũhandĩĩte mũgũndainĩ waku.“Ningĩ ũkũnguagĩre Thigũkũ ya Ithũnũ mwaka ũgĩthiĩ gũthira hĩndĩ ĩrĩa wagetha maciaro kuuma mũgũndainĩ waku wa thabibũ o na wa matunda. 
Exodus23:17 O mwaka, thigũkũinĩ icio ithatũ, arũme oothe no mũhaka mookage gũũthaathaiya niĩ MWATHANI Ngai wanyu." 
Exodus23:18 “Ndũkaanandutĩre mũgate mwĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia rĩrĩa ũkũndutĩra igongoona rĩa nyamũ, o na kana ũreke maguta ma nyamũ iria ndutĩirwo igongoona hĩndĩ ya thigũkũ icio maraare nginya rũũciinĩ." 
Exodus23:19 “O mwaka no mũhaka ũreehage magetha marĩa meega mũno ma mbere ma irio cia mĩgũnda yaku nyũmbainĩ ya MWATHANI Ngai waku.“Na ningĩ ndũkaanaruge koori na iria rĩa nyina. 
Exodus23:20 “Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩngũrekia mũraika mbere yanyu amũgitagĩre mũrĩ rũgendoinĩ na amũkinyie kũndũ kũrĩa ndĩmũthondekeire." 
Exodus23:21 Mũthikagĩrĩriei na mũmwathĩkagĩre. Mũtikaamũremere, amu nĩ niĩ ndĩmũrekeetie na gũtirĩ hĩndĩ angĩmwohera mwamũremera." 
Exodus23:22 Mwamwathĩkĩra na mwĩkage ũrĩa wothe ndĩrĩmwathaga, nĩndĩrĩhũũranaga na thũ cianyu ciothe." 
Exodus23:23 Rĩrĩa mũraika wakwa akaamũtongoria amũkinyie bũrũri wa Aamori, Ahiti, Aperizi, Akanaani, Ahivi, o na wa Ajebusi na ndĩmaniine-rĩ," 
Exodus23:24 mũtikaanainamĩrĩre ngai ciao kana mũcithaathaiye, o na ningĩ mũtikaanarũmĩrĩre ndini ciao. Nĩmũgaathũũkangia ngai ciao na muunange itugĩ ciao cia mahiga iria mathaathayagia." 
Exodus23:25 Angĩkorwo nĩmũrĩthaathayagia niĩ MWATHANI Ngai wanyu, nĩndĩrĩmũraathimaga na irio na maaĩ, na ngeeheria mĩrimũ gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu." 
Exodus23:26 Bũrũriinĩ wanyu-rĩ, gũtirĩ mũtumia ũkaahuna kana athaate. Nĩngaamũhe ũtũũro mũraihu." 
Exodus23:27 “Nĩngaatũma andũ arĩa makaamũũkĩrĩra manjĩtigĩre; ndũme hagĩe kĩrigiicano gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ arĩa mũrarũa nao, o na ndũme thũ cianyu imũhuutatĩre ciũre." 
Exodus23:28 Ningĩ nĩngaarekia magi mbere yanyu maingate Ahivi, Akanaani, o na Ahiti, mamweherere." 
Exodus23:29 No rĩĩrĩ, ndikaamaingata mamweherere mwakainĩ o ro ũmwe; ingĩĩka ũguo bũrũri watigwo ũtarĩ andũ, nacio nyamũ cia gĩthaka ciingĩhe mũno imũnyariire." 
Exodus23:30 Handũ ha gwĩka ũguo, ngamaingata kahora kahora, nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũgaakorwo mũrĩ aingĩ a kũhota kũgaya bũrũri ũcio." 
Exodus23:31 Mũhaka wa bũrũri wanyu ngaũrutia Iriainĩ Ituune, ndĩũkinyie iriainĩ rĩa Mediteraneani, na ndĩũrutie werũinĩ, ndĩũkinyie rũũĩinĩ rwa Farati; amu nĩngaamũhe hinya wa kũhoota andũ arĩa matũũraga bũrũri ũcio, na mũkaamaingataga o ũrĩa mũgaakorwo mũgĩthiĩ na mbere." 
Exodus23:32 Mũtikaanagĩe kĩrĩĩkanĩro o na kĩrĩkũ nao kana na ngai ciao. 
Exodus23:33 Mũtikaanameetĩkĩrie maikare bũrũriinĩ wanyu, nĩguo matikaanatũme mũnjĩhĩrie, amu mũngĩgaatungatĩra ngai ciao, ũndũ ũcio ũgaakorwo ũrĩ mũtego harĩ inyuĩ.”" 
Exodus24:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Ambata ũũke kĩrĩmainĩ harĩ niĩ, mũũke na Harũni, Nadabu, Abihu, o na atongoria arĩa mĩrongo mũgwanja a Isiraeli, na mũinamĩrĩre mũũthathaiye mũrĩ o haraihu." 
Exodus24:2 Wee ũrĩ wiki hatarĩ o na ũmwe wa acio angĩ, no we ũgũũka hakuhĩ na niĩ; andũ matikaae kwambata kĩrĩmainĩ.”" 
Exodus24:3 Naake Musa agĩthiĩ akĩĩra andũ ũhoro wothe ũrĩa MWATHANI aamũheete o na maathani maake. Nao andũ oothe magĩcookia hamwe atĩrĩ, “Ũrĩa wothe MWATHANI oigĩĩte nĩtũgwĩka.”" 
Exodus24:4 Naake Musa akĩandĩka ciugo ciothe cia MWATHANI. Agĩũkĩra rũũciinĩ tene agĩaka kĩgongoona magũrũinĩ ma kĩrĩma kĩu na akĩhanda itugĩ ikũmi na igĩrĩ, kũringana na mĩhĩrĩga ĩrĩa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ya andũ a Isiraeli." 
Exodus24:5 Agĩcooka akĩrekia aanake amwe a andũ a Isiraeli, makĩrutĩra MWATHANI magongoona ma njino, na makĩruta ndeegwa imwe ituĩke magongoona ma thaayũ." 
Exodus24:6 Naake Musa akĩoya nuthu ya thakame ya nyamũ icio akĩmĩĩkĩra mbakũriinĩ, na nuthu ĩrĩa ĩngĩ akĩmĩminjaminjĩria kĩgongoona." 
Exodus24:7 Agĩcooka akĩoya ibuku rĩa kĩrĩĩkanĩro, akĩrĩthoomera andũ aanĩrĩire. Nao andũ makiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũgwathĩkĩra MWATHANI na twĩke ũrĩa wothe aathanĩĩte.”" 
Exodus24:8 Musa agĩkĩoya thakame ĩrĩa yarĩ mbakũriinĩ akĩmĩminjaminjĩria andũ akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ĩno nĩ yo thakame ya kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa MWATHANI aarĩĩkanĩra na inyuĩ gĩkoniĩ ũhoro ũcio wothe.”" 
Exodus24:9 Nao Musa, Harũni, Nadabu, Abihu, o na atongoria arĩa mĩrongo mũgwanja a Isiraeli makĩambata kĩrĩmainĩ" 
Exodus24:10 makĩyonera Ngai wa Isiraeli; harĩa aakinyĩĩte na magũrũ maake haahaanaga ta haarĩĩtwo mahiga ma goro ma rangi wa mburuu na haathereete o ta matu. 
Exodus24:11 No we Ngai ndaigana gwĩka atongoria acio a Isiraeli ũũru; moonire Ngai, magĩcooka kũrĩa na kũnyua." 
Exodus24:12 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Ambata ũũke harĩ niĩ kĩrĩmainĩ wetangĩrĩre ho, na nĩngũkũhe ihengere igĩrĩ cia mahiga iria irĩ na mawatho na maathani moothe marĩa nyaandĩkĩĩte nĩ ũndũ wa gũtaara andũ.”" 
Exodus24:13 Kwoguo Musa na Joshua ũrĩa wamũteithagĩrĩria makĩĩhaarĩria, naake Musa akĩambata kĩrĩmainĩ kĩu gĩtheru." 
Exodus24:13 Kwoguo Musa na Joshua ũrĩa wamũteithagĩrĩria makĩĩhaarĩria, naake Musa akĩambata kĩrĩmainĩ kĩu gĩtheru." 
Exodus24:14 Naake agĩtiga eera atongoria atĩrĩ, “Tweterereei haaha o nginya rĩrĩa tũrĩcooka. Harũni na Huri marĩ hamwe na inyuĩ; nĩ ũndũ ũcio, mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩgĩa na ciira nĩathiĩ kũrĩ o.”" 
Exodus24:15 Musa agĩkĩambata kĩrĩmainĩ kĩu, narĩo itu rĩgĩkĩhumbĩra." 
Exodus24:16 Naguo riiri wa MWATHANI ũkĩiyũra kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Sinai, narĩo itu rĩu rĩgĩikara rĩkĩhumbĩrĩĩte mĩthenya ĩtandatũ, na mũthenya wa mũgwanja MWATHANI arĩ ituĩinĩ agĩĩta Musa." 
Exodus24:17 Naguo riiri wa MWATHANI wonekaga nĩ andũ a Isiraeli ũhaana ta mwaki mũnene ũrĩ gacũmbĩrĩ ga kĩrĩma. 
Exodus24:18 Naake Musa akĩingĩra ituĩnĩ akĩambata kĩrĩmainĩ, agĩikara kũu mũthenya na ũtukũ, mĩthenya mĩrongo ĩna." 
Exodus25:1 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ," 
Exodus25:2 “Arĩria andũ a Isiraeli ũmeere maahothere. Nawe wamũkĩre kĩrĩa gĩothe mũndũ o wothe ekũigua na ngoro yake akĩenda kũũhothera. 
Exodus25:3 Nayo mĩhothi ĩrĩa ũkwamũkĩra kuuma kũrĩ o nĩ: thahabu, betha, icango;" 
Exodus25:4 gataani ĩrĩa njega; guoya wa rangi wa mburuu, babũ, na mũtuune, na nguo ithondekeetwo na guoya wa mbũri;" 
Exodus25:5 na njũũa cia ndũrũme itobokeetio rangiinĩ igatuunĩha; njũũa iria njega; mbaaũ cia mũgaa; 
Exodus25:6 maguta ma gwakia mataawa; na mahuti manungi wega ma gwĩkĩrwo magutainĩ ma kwamũrana o na ma gwĩkĩrwo ũbaaniinĩ; 
Exodus25:7 tũhiga twa goro twa rangi mũtũũne, o na tũhiga tũngĩ twa goro twa gũtheecererwo ebodiinĩ ya Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene o na nguoinĩ yake ya gĩthũri." 
Exodus25:8 No mũhaka andũ maathondekere gĩikaro gĩtheru gĩa gũikaraga nĩ geetha ndũũre gatagatĩinĩ kaao. 
Exodus25:9 Gĩikaro kĩu kĩamũre, o na indo cia gwĩkĩrwo kuo thĩinĩ, ũgĩthondeke kũringana na mũbango ũrĩa ngũkuonia." 
Exodus25:10 “Thondeka ithandũkũ rĩa mbaaũ cia mũgaa, na rĩkorwo na ũraihu wa cenitimita igana rĩa ikũmi, na wariĩ wa cenitimita mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ithathatũ, na kĩrũũgamo cenitimita mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ithathatũ." 
Exodus25:11 Nawe ũrĩhumbĩre thĩinĩ na na nja na thahabu ya gũturwo ĩrĩa therie mũno, na ũrĩrigiicĩrie mĩena yothe mũgũkũ wa thahabu mĩthiainĩ yarĩo ya igũrũ." 
Exodus25:12 Ningĩ ũrĩthondekere icũhĩ inya cia kũrĩkuua cia thahabu, ũciĩkĩre magũrũinĩ mana maarĩo, igĩrĩ mwena ũmwe na igĩrĩ mwena ũrĩa ũngĩ." 
Exodus25:13 Ũcooke ũthondeke mĩtĩ mĩraaya ya mĩgaa ya kũrĩkuua na ũmĩhumbĩre na thahabu," 
Exodus25:14 ũcooke ũmĩharũkie icũhĩinĩ icio irĩ mĩenainĩ ya ithandũkũ rĩu. 
Exodus25:15 Mĩtĩ ĩyo mĩraaya no mũhaka ĩtigagwo icũhĩinĩ na ndĩkaae kũrutagwo. 
Exodus25:16 Ningĩ ũcooke ũige thĩinĩ wa ithandũkũ rĩu ihengere igĩrĩ cia mahiga iria ngũkũnengera, iria ciandĩkĩĩtwo maathani." 
Exodus25:17 “Ningĩ ũthondeke gĩkunĩko gĩa thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno, gĩkorwo kĩrĩ na ũraihu wa cenitimita igana rĩa ikũmi, na wariĩ wa cenitimita mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ithathatũ." 
Exodus25:18 Na ũthondeke ciũmbe igĩrĩ irĩ mathagu, ũcithondeke na thahabu," 
Exodus25:19 inyiitanĩĩte na gĩkunĩko kĩu, kĩũmbe kĩmwe gĩikare mũthia ũmwe wa gĩkunĩko kĩu, nakĩo kĩrĩa kĩngĩ mũthia ũcio ũngĩ." 
Exodus25:20 Nacio ciũmbe icio ikorwo iroranĩĩte na itambũrũkĩĩtie mathagu maacio makahumbĩra gĩkunĩko kĩu. 
Exodus25:21 Ũcooke ũige ihengere igĩrĩ cia mahiga thĩinĩ wa ithandũkũ na ũigĩrĩre gĩkunĩko kĩu igũrũ warĩo. 
Exodus25:22 Hau nĩ ho ndĩrĩcemanagĩria nawe, na ndĩ igũrũ wa gĩkunĩko kĩu, o hau gatagatĩinĩ ga ciũmbe icio igĩrĩ irĩ mathagu iria irĩ igũrũ wa ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa kĩrĩĩkanĩro nĩndĩrĩkũheaga mawatho maakwa moothe nĩ ũndũ wa andũ a Isiraeli." 
Exodus25:23 “Ningĩ ũthondeke meetha ya mbaaũ cia mũgaa, ĩkorwo na ũraihu wa cenitimita mĩrongo ĩnaana na inyaanya, na wariĩ wa cenitimita mĩrongo ĩna na inya, na kĩrũũgamo cenitimita mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ithathatũ." 
Exodus25:24 Ũcooke ũmĩhumbĩre na thahabu ya gũturwo ĩrĩa therie mũno na ũmĩthiũrũrũkĩrie mĩena yothe mũgũkũ wa thahabu. 
Exodus25:25 Na ũmĩĩkĩre karũbaaũ gaceke ka wariĩ wa mirimita mĩrongo mũgwanja na ithaano mĩena yothe, nako karũbaaũ kau gaceke ũkahumbĩre na thahabu guothe." 
Exodus25:26 Ningĩ meetha ĩyo ũmĩthondekere icũhĩ inya cia thahabu cia kũmĩkuua ũciĩkĩre koonainĩ ciayo inya harĩa magũrũ mayo marĩ. 
Exodus25:27 Icũhĩ icio cia kũharũkio mĩtĩ ĩrĩa mĩraaya ya gũkuua meetha ĩyo ũciĩkĩre hakuhĩ na karũbaaũ kau gaceke. 
Exodus25:28 Nayo mĩtĩ ĩyo mĩraaya ũmĩthondeke na mũtĩ wa mũgaa na ũmĩhumbĩre na thahabu. 
Exodus25:29 Ũcooke ũthondeke thaani, ikombe, ndigithũ, na mbakũri nĩ ũndũ wa meetha ĩyo cia kũhũthĩrwo nĩ ũndũ wa magongoona ma ndibei. Indo icio ciothe ũcithondeke na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno." 
Exodus25:30 Meetha ĩyo ũmĩige mbere ya Ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro. Na rĩĩrĩ, igũrũ rĩayo ũnjigagĩre mĩgate mĩtheru ĩrĩa ndutĩirwo." 
Exodus25:31 “Ningĩ ũcooke ũthondeke mũtĩ wa gũcuuria mataawa na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno. Gĩtina kĩaguo o na mũtĩ waguo ikorwo irĩ cia thahabu ya gũturwo; mahũa maguo ma kũũgemia na thundo ciaguo, ciothe ithondekwo inyiitaine naguo." 
Exodus25:32 Naguo mũtĩ ũcio ũgĩe na honge ithathatũ ciumĩĩte mĩenainĩ yaguo, o mwena honge ithatũ." 
Exodus25:33 O rũhonge hakorwo na mahũa ma kũũgemia mahaana ihũa rĩa mũroothi, namo makorwo na mahũa matatũ ma kũgemia na thundo ithatũ." 
Exodus25:34 Naguo mũtĩ ũcio wa kũhangĩrwo mataawa ũkorwo na mahũa mana ma kũgemia mahaana ihũa rĩa mũroothi, namo makorwo na mahũa na thundo." 
Exodus25:35 Ningĩ o mũhuro wa honge igĩrĩ igĩrĩ hakorwo na thundo ĩmwe. 
Exodus25:36 Nacio thundo na honge ciacio, o na mũtĩ ũcio wa kũhangĩrwo mataawa ikorwo inyiitanĩĩte irĩ kĩndũ kĩmwe ithondekeetwo na thahabu ya gũturwo ĩrĩa therie mũno." 
Exodus25:37 Ũcooke ũthondekere mũtĩ ũcio mataawa mũgwanja, ũmaige ũguo atĩ ũtheri wamo nĩũmũrĩkaga hau mbere." 
Exodus25:38 Nayo mĩĩhato yaguo, na thaani cia mũrarĩ wa ndambĩ ciaguo ũcithondeke na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno." 
Exodus25:39 Mũtĩ ũcio wa kũhangĩrwo mataawa hamwe na indo ciaguo ciothe ithondekwo na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno ya ũritũ wa kiro mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ithaano. 
Exodus25:40 Na ũmenyerere ũcithondeke ta ũrĩa ndĩrakuonia gũũkũ kĩrĩmainĩ. 
Exodus26:1 “Ningĩ ũthondeke Hema ĩrĩa nyamũre, Hema ya gũtũnganwo na itambaya ikũmi ithondekeetwo na gataani ĩrĩa njega ĩtumĩĩtwo na guoya wa rangi wa mburuu, babũ, na mũtuune. Na ũgemie itambaya icio na mĩcoro ya ciũmbe iria irĩ mathagu ĩtumĩĩtwo nĩ mũndũ mũũhĩgĩrĩru wĩrainĩ ũcio." 
Exodus26:2 Itambaya icio no mũhaka ikorwo ciiganaine o gĩtambaya gĩkorwo kĩrĩ na ũraihu wa mita ikũmi na igĩrĩ, na wariĩ wa mita igĩrĩ." 
Exodus26:3 Itambaya ithaano ũcinyitithanie hamwe ituĩke kĩmwe, na wĩke o ro ũguo na icio ingĩ ithaano." 
Exodus26:4 Ũcooke ũthondeke ciana na gĩtambaya kĩa rangi wa mburuu, ũcitumĩrĩre mĩthiainĩ ya itambaya icio inyiitithanĩĩtio." 
Exodus26:5 Ũtumĩrĩre ciana mĩrongo ĩtaano gĩtambayainĩ kĩmwe, o na ũtumĩrĩre ciana ingĩ mĩrongo ĩtaano mwenainĩ wa gĩtambaya kĩu kĩngĩ gĩa keerĩ, nacio ciana icio ciikare iringaine." 
Exodus26:6 Ũcooke ũthondeke ngathĩka mĩrongo ĩtaano cia thahabu cia kũnyiitithania itambaya icio, nĩguo hema ĩyo ya gũtũnganwo ĩtuĩke kĩndũ o ro kĩmwe." 
Exodus26:7 “Ningĩ ũthondekere Hema ĩyo kĩandarũũa gĩa kũmĩhumbĩra, ũgĩthondeke na itambaya ikũmi na kĩmwe ithondeetwo na guoya wa mbũri." 
Exodus26:8 Ciothe ũcithondeke ciiganaine irĩ na ũraihu wa mita ikũmi na ithatũ na wariĩ wa mita igĩrĩ. 
Exodus26:9 Ũcooke ũtumanĩrĩrie ithaano ituĩke kĩndũ kĩmwe, nacio icio ingĩ ithathatũ ũcitumanĩrĩrie ituĩke kĩndũ kĩmwe. Nakĩo gĩtambaya gĩa gatandatũ ũgĩkũnje mwena wa na mbere wa Hema." 
Exodus26:10 Ningĩ ũtumĩrĩre ciana mĩrongo ĩtaano mũthiainĩ wa itambaya cia mbere, na ingĩ mĩrongo ĩtaano mũthiainĩ wa itambaya icio ingĩ." 
Exodus26:11 Ũcooke ũthondeke ngathĩka mĩrongo ĩtaano cia gĩcango ũciĩkĩre cianainĩ icio nĩ geetha ũnyiitithanie itambaya icio nĩguo hema ĩyo ĩtuĩke kĩndũ kĩmwe. 
Exodus26:12 Nakĩo kĩnuthu gĩa gĩtambaya kĩrĩa gĩgũtigara ũgĩcuurie na mwena wa na thuutha wa Hema ĩyo. 
Exodus26:13 Nacio cenitimita mĩrongo ĩtaano iria igũtigara o mwena nĩ ũndũ wa itambaya icio kũraiha-rĩ, ũcicuurie mĩenainĩ ya gĩikaro kĩu nĩguo ikĩhumbĩre." 
Exodus26:14 “Na ũthondekere hema ĩyo ciandarũũa igĩrĩ cia kũmĩhumbĩra; kĩmwe kĩa njũũa cia ndũrũme itobokeetio rangiinĩ mũtuune igatunĩha, na kĩrĩa kĩngĩ kĩa njũũa irĩa njega gĩa kũigĩrĩrwo igũrũ rĩa kĩu kĩngĩ." 
Exodus26:15 “Ningĩ ũthondekere Hema ĩyo mbaaũ cia mũgaa cia kũmĩrũũgamia. 
Exodus26:16 O rũbaaũ rũkorwo rũrĩ na ũraihu wa mita inya na wariĩ wa cenitimita mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ithathatũ," 
Exodus26:17 na o rũbaaũ rũgĩe na ihoce igĩrĩ cia gũcinyiitithania. Mbaaũ ciothe cia Hema ĩyo igĩe na ihoce icio. 
Exodus26:18 Ũthondeke mbaaũ mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ cia mwena wa na kĩanda wa Hema ĩyo," 
Exodus26:19 na ũcithondekere njikarĩro mĩrongo ĩna cia betha, o rũbaaũ rũgĩe na njikarĩro igĩrĩ cia kũnyiitĩrĩra ihoce cierĩ." 
Exodus26:20 Ningĩ mwena wa na rũgongo wayo ũũthondekere mbaaũ mĩrongo ĩrĩ 
Exodus26:21 na njikarĩro mĩrongo ĩna cia betha, o rũbaaũ rũgĩe na njikarĩro igĩrĩ." 
Exodus26:22 Ningĩ mwena wa na thuutha wa Hema ĩyo, nĩguo mwena wa na ithũĩro, ũthondekere mbaaũ ithathatũ," 
Exodus26:23 na ũthondekere mbaaũ igĩrĩ cia koona. 
Exodus26:24 Mbaaũ icio cia koona ikorwo inyiitithanĩĩtio gĩtinainĩ na ithiĩ inyiitithanĩĩtio o ro ũguo nginya igũrũ. Nacio mbaaũ icio cierĩ cia koona cierĩ igaathondekwo o ro ũguo. 
Exodus26:25 Kwoguo hagaakorwo na mbaaũ inyaanya na njikarĩro ikũmi na ithathatũ cia betha, o rũbaaũ rũrĩ na njikarĩro igĩrĩ." 
Exodus26:26 “Ningĩ ũcooke ũthondeke mĩgamba ikũmi na ĩtaano ya mũtĩ wa mũgaa, ĩtaano yayo ĩtuĩke ya kũnyiita mbaaũ cia mwena ũmwe wa Hema ĩyo," 
Exodus26:27 ĩngĩ ĩtaano ya kũnyiita cia mwena ũrĩa ũngĩ, na ĩyo ĩngĩ ĩtaano ya kũnyiita mbaaũ cia mwena wa na thuutha ũrĩa ũroreete na ithũĩro." 
Exodus26:28 Naguo mũgamba wa gatagatĩ, ũrĩa ũgwĩkĩrwo gatagatĩ ka mbaaũ icio, ũtuĩkanĩrie gatagatĩ gaacio kuuma mũthia ũmwe wa Hema ĩyo kinya ũrĩa ũngĩ." 
Exodus26:29 Ũcooke ũhumbĩre mbaaũ icio na thahabu na ũciharũkie icũhĩ cia thahabu cia kũharũkio mĩgamba ĩyo ĩrĩa o nayo ũkũmĩhumbĩra na thahabu. 
Exodus26:30 Na ũmenyerere ũthondeke Hema ĩyo ta ũrĩa ndĩrakuonia gũũkũ kĩrĩmainĩ. 
Exodus26:31 “Ningĩ ũtume mbathiya ya kũhakania, ũmĩtume na guoya wa rangĩ wa mburuu, babũ, na mũtuune, na gataani ĩrĩa njega, na ũmĩgemie na mĩcoro ya ciũmbe iria irĩ mathagu." 
Exodus26:32 Ũcooke ũmĩcuurie itugĩinĩ inya cia mũtĩ wa mũgaa ihumbĩrĩĩtwo na thahabu, na ciĩkĩrwo tũhocio twa thahabu, icooke irũũgamio njikarĩroinĩ inya cia betha."
