Numbers8:16 Nĩndĩyoeire Alawii matuĩke aakwa kĩũmbe handũinĩ ha aariũ oothe a marigithaathi a andũ a Isiraeli. 
Numbers8:17 Rĩrĩa ndooragire marigithaathi moothe ma andũ a Misiri, nĩndaamũrire aariũ oothe a marigithaathi ma Aisiraeli, o na ma mahiũ matuĩke maakwa." 
Numbers8:18 Rĩu nĩndooya Alawii handũinĩ ha marigithaathi moothe ma Aisiraeli. 
Numbers8:19 Nĩndamanenganĩra kũrĩ Harũni na aariũ aake marĩ kĩheeo kuuma kũrĩ Aisiraeli, marutagĩre Aisiraeli wĩra Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo, na mamagitagĩre kuuma harĩ mũthiro ũrĩa ũngĩmanyiita mangĩkuhĩrĩria Handũ Harĩa Hatheru.”" 
Numbers8:20 Kwoguo Musa, Harũni na andũ oothe Aisiraeli makĩamũra Alawii o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aathĩĩte Musa." 
Numbers8:21 Alawii magĩgĩĩtheria, na magĩthambia nguo ciao, naake Harũni akĩmaamũrĩra MWATHANI marĩ kĩheeo kĩa mwanya. O na ningĩ nĩarutire igongoona rĩa kũmatheria." 
Numbers8:22 Andũ magĩgĩĩka Alawii maũndũ moothe marĩa Ngai aathĩĩte Musa mameeke. Kwoguo Alawii magĩĩtĩkĩrio kũruta wĩra thĩinĩ wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo marũũgamĩrĩirwo nĩ Harũni na aariũ aake. 
Numbers8:23 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ," 
Numbers8:24 “Mũlawii arĩambagĩrĩria kũruta wĩra Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo e wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtaano," 
Numbers8:25 na akinyia mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtaano akahuurũka. 
Numbers8:26 Thuutha wa ũguo no ateithagĩrĩrie Alawii arĩa angĩ mawĩrainĩ maao thĩinĩ wa Hema, no ndakaarutage wĩra o na ũmwe e wiki. Ũguo nĩguo wagĩrĩirwo nĩkũbanga wĩra wa Alawii.”" 
Numbers9:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI nĩarĩirie Musa werũinĩ wa Sinai mweriinĩ wa mbere wa mwaka wa keerĩ kuuma andũ a Isiraeli moima Misiri. Aamwĩrire atĩrĩ," 
Numbers9:2 (2-3) “Mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna mweriinĩ ũyũ, kwambĩrĩria riũa rĩgĩthũa, andũ a Isiraeli no mũhaka makũngũĩre Bathaka kũringana na mawatho maayo moothe na mũtaratara wayo.”" 
Numbers9:3 Kwoguo Musa akĩĩra andũ makũngũĩre Bathaka," 
Numbers9:4 nao magĩĩka ũguo riũa rĩgĩthũa mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri wa mbere werũinĩ wa Sinai. Andũ magĩgĩĩka maũndũ moothe o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aathĩĩte Musa. 
Numbers9:5 No nĩkwarĩ na andũ amwe maarĩ na thaahu nĩ ũndũ nĩmaahuutĩĩtie kĩimba, na matingĩakĩhotire gũkũngũĩra Bathaka mũthenya ũcio. Nao magĩthiĩ kwĩ Musa na Harũni" 
Numbers9:6 makĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ twĩ na thaahu nĩ ũndũ nĩtũrahuutĩĩtie kĩimba, no rĩĩrĩ, nĩ kĩĩ gĩkũgiria o na ithuĩ tũrutĩre MWATHANI iheeo ciitũ twĩ hamwe na Aisiraeli arĩa angĩ ihindainĩ rĩrĩa rĩtuĩtwo?”" 
Numbers9:7 Naake Musa akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Etereraai nginya rĩrĩa ndĩrĩamũkĩra mataaro kuuma kũrĩ MWATHANI.”" 
Numbers9:8 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa 
Numbers9:9 eere andũ a Aisiraeli atĩrĩ, “Rĩrĩa mũndũ o wothe wanyu, kana wa rũciaro rwanyu agaakorwo arĩ na thaahu nĩ ũndũ wa kũhuutia kĩimba kana arĩ rũgendoinĩ, na no arenda gũkũngũĩra Bathaka," 
Numbers9:10 mũndũ ũcio nĩetagĩrĩre akaamĩkũngũĩra thuutha wa mweri ũmwe hwaĩinĩ wa mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna mweriinĩ wa keerĩ. Akaamĩkũngũĩra na mũgate ũtarĩ mwĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia na nyeni ndũrũ. 
Numbers9:11 Mũtigaatigie irio o na niini nginya rũũciinĩ, na mũtikoinage ihĩndĩ o na rĩmwe rĩa nyamũ ĩyo. Bathaka nĩkũngũagĩrwo kũringana na mũtaratara wayo wothe." 
Numbers9:12 No rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ o wothe ũtarĩ na thaahu, na ndathiĩte rũgendo, ũrĩagaga gũkũngũĩra Bathaka, ndarĩcookaga gũtuĩka ũmwe wa andũ aakwa, amu nĩagire kũũndutĩra iheeo ihinda rĩrĩa rĩamũre. No mũhaka acookagĩrĩrwo nĩ meehia maake." 
Numbers9:13 “Mũrũũrĩrĩ ũrĩa ũtũũranagia na inyuĩ angĩenda gũkũngũĩra Bathaka, no mũhaka amĩkũngũĩre kũringana na mawatho na mũtaratara wayo. Watho no o ro ũmwe kũrĩ Aisiraeli na kũrĩ andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ.”" 
Numbers9:14 (15-16) Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũrĩa Hema ya gũtũnganwo yakirwo, itu rĩgĩũka rĩkĩmĩhumbĩra. Ũtukũ itu rĩu rĩahaanaga ta mwaki." 
Numbers9:15 O hĩndĩ ĩrĩa itu rĩu rĩehera igũrũ wa Hema ĩyo, andũ a Isiraeli makaambũra hema ciao magathiĩ magaciamba harĩa itu rĩu rĩngĩathiire rĩrũũgame." 
Numbers9:16 Andũ maambũraga hema ciao maathwo nĩ MWATHANI, na magacooka magathiĩ magaciamba maathwo nĩ we. Ihinda rĩrĩa rĩothe itu rĩngĩarũũgamire igũrũ wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo, maikaraga kambĩ o ro ĩyo." 
Numbers9:17 O na itu rĩngĩaikarire igũrũ wa Hema matukũ maingĩ, andũ a Isiraeli matioinaga watho wa MWATHANI, na matiathiaga na mbere." 
Numbers9:18 Mahinda mamwe itu nĩrĩaikaraga Hema igũrũ mĩthenya ĩtarĩ mĩingĩ; no rĩĩrĩ, maakoragwo me kambĩ kana magĩthiĩ kũringana na watho wa MWATHANI." 
Numbers9:19 Mahinda mamwe itu rĩaikaraga kuuma hwaĩinĩ nginya rũũciinĩ, na maathaamaga o rĩrĩa itu rĩngĩeherire. Itu rĩa kũũrĩrĩra, nao magakũũrĩrĩra." 
Numbers9:20 O na angĩkorwo nĩ mĩthenya ĩĩrĩ, mweri, mwaka, o na kana makĩria ma mwaka, matingĩathire na mbere ihindainĩ rĩrĩa rĩothe itu rĩakoragwo rĩ igũrũ wa Hema; no itu rĩakũũrĩrĩra, nao magakũũrĩrĩra." 
Numbers9:21 Maambaga na makaambũra hema ciao magĩathĩkĩra mawatho marĩa MWATHANI aamaathaga ahũthĩrĩĩte Musa. 
Numbers10:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ," 
Numbers10:2 “Thondeka tũrumbeeta twĩrĩ na betha ndure twakũhũthagĩrwo gwĩta andũ macookanĩrĩre hamwe o na kũmeeraga mathaamie kambĩ ciao. 
Numbers10:3 Rĩrĩa tũrumbeeta twerĩ twahuuhwo mũno, andũ oothe makoongana harĩ we mũromoinĩ wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo." 
Numbers10:4 Rĩrĩa karumbeeta kamwe tu kahuuhwo, hĩndĩ ĩyo no atongoria a mĩhĩrĩga oiki marĩũnganaga harĩ we." 
Numbers10:5 Rĩrĩa tũrumbeeta twahuuhwo haniini, mĩhĩrĩga ĩrĩa yakĩĩte kambĩ ciayo mwena wa irathĩro ĩkaambĩrĩria rũgendo." 
Numbers10:6 Rĩrĩa twahuuhwo haniini riita rĩa keerĩ mĩhĩrĩga ĩrĩa ĩ mwena wa na kĩanda ĩkaambĩrĩria rũgendo. Kwoguo kũrĩhuuhagwo tũrumbeeta haniini twa kwĩra andũ matharie kambĩ," 
Numbers10:7 no gwĩta andũ oothe moongane hamwe, tũrumbeeta tũrĩhuuhagwo na hinya." 
Numbers10:8 Tũrumbeeta tũrĩhuuhagwo nĩ aariũ a Harũni, arĩa athĩnjĩri Ngai.“Watho ũyũ ngũgweta ũrĩrũmagĩrĩrwo mahinda moothe marĩa magooka." 
Numbers10:9 Rĩrĩa mũgũthiĩ mbaara mũrĩ bũrũriinĩ wanyu, mũkĩĩgitĩra kuuma harĩ thũ ĩrĩa ĩmũũkĩrĩire, huuhagaai tũrumbeeta twa kuonania atĩ kwĩ na mbaara. Niĩ MWATHANI Ngai wanyu nĩndĩrĩmũteithagia na ndĩmũhonokagie kuuma kũrĩ thũ cianyu." 
Numbers10:10 O na hĩndĩ ya ikeno ta mĩthenya ya karũũgamo ka mweri na ya thigũkũ iria ingĩ nyamũre, mũhuuhage tũrumbeeta twanyu mũkĩruta magongoona maanyu ma njino na ma thaayũ. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩndĩrĩmũririkanaga. Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI Ngai wanyu.”" 
Numbers10:11 Mũthenya wa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ mweriinĩ wa ĩĩrĩ mwakainĩ wa ĩĩrĩ kuuma rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli moimire Misiri, itu rĩrĩa rĩakoragwo igũrũ wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo rĩkĩoywo na igũrũ," 
Numbers10:12 nao andũ a Isiraeli makĩnyiita rũgendo kuuma werũinĩ wa Sinai, narĩo itu rĩgĩthiĩ rĩkĩrũũgama werũinĩ wa Parani." 
Numbers10:13 Maambĩrĩirie rũgendo rwao rwa mbere o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aathanĩĩte ahũthĩrĩĩte Musa. 
Numbers10:14 Rĩrĩa rĩothe maathaamaga, maathiaga marũmanĩrĩire na mũtaratara. Arĩa maatongoragio nĩ bendera ya mũhĩrĩga wa Juda nĩ o maambagĩrĩria rũgendo. Maathiaga marĩ ikundi ikundi matongoreetio nĩ Nahashoni mũrũ wa Aminadabu." 
Numbers10:15 Nethaneli mũrũ wa Zuaru nĩ we warĩ mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru," 
Numbers10:16 naake Eliabu mũrũ wa Heloni nĩ we warĩ mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Zebuluni. 
Numbers10:17 Thuutha ũcio, Hema ĩkaambũrwo, mbarĩ ya Gerishoni na mbarĩ ya Merari iria ciamĩkuuaga nacio ikaambĩrĩria rũgendo." 
Numbers10:18 Arĩa maatongoragio nĩ bendera ya mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni makarũmĩrĩra. Maathiaga marĩ ikundi ikundi matongoreetio nĩ Elizuru mũrũ wa Shedeuru. 
Numbers10:19 Naake Shelumieli mũrũ wa Zurishadai nĩ we warĩ mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Simeoni," 
Numbers10:20 naake Eliasafu mũrũ wa Deueli nĩ we warĩ mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi. 
Numbers10:21 Nao Alawii a mbarĩ ya Kohathu makarũmĩrĩra makuuĩĩte indo iria nyamũre. Magĩkinya kambĩ ĩyo ĩngĩ maakoraga Hema yambĩĩtwo rĩngĩ. 
Numbers10:22 Arĩa maatongoragio nĩ bendera ya mũhĩrĩga wa Efiraimu makarũmĩrĩra. Maathiaga marĩ ikundi ikundi matongoreetio nĩ Elishama mũrũ wa Amihudi. 
Numbers10:23 Gamalieli mũrũ wa Pedahuzuri nĩwe warĩ mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Manase," 
Numbers10:24 naake Abidani mũrũ wa Gideoni nĩ we warĩ mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini. 
Numbers10:25 Andũ a mũthia maakoragwo marĩ andũ a gĩkundi kĩrĩa gĩatongoragio nĩ bendera ya mũhĩrĩga wa Dani. Maakoragwo mahaana ta thigari cia kũrangĩra ikundi icio ingĩ mwena wa na thuutha. Maathiaga marĩ ikundi ikundi matongoreetio nĩ Ahiezeri mũrũ wa Amishadai. 
Numbers10:26 Pagieli mũrũ wa Okirani nĩ we warĩ mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Asheri," 
Numbers10:27 naake Ahira mũrũ wa Enani nĩ we warĩ mũnene wa mũhĩrĩga wa Nafutali. 
Numbers10:28 Ũcio nĩguo mũtaratara ũrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maathiaga naguo, marũmanĩrĩire me ikundi ikundi, o hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe maambũraga hema ciao makanyiita rũgendo." 
Numbers10:29 Musa nĩerire Hobabu mũrũ wa mũthoniwe Jethero ũrĩa warĩ Mũmidiani atĩrĩ, “Tũnyiitĩĩte rũgendo twerekeire kũrĩa MWATHANI oigire atĩ nĩagaatũhe. Nĩerĩire Aisiraeli maũndũ meega, kwoguo ũka tũthiĩ nawe na nĩtũkaagayana maũndũ macio meega nawe.”" 
Numbers10:30 Hobabu agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Aaca, niĩ ngũcooka bũrũri witũ kũrĩ andũ aitũ.”" 
Numbers10:31 Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ndagũthaitha ndũgatũtige. Wee nĩwe ũũĩ kũrĩa tũgũthiĩ tũgĩakaga kambĩ gũũkũ werũinĩ, na no ũgĩtuĩke mũtuonereria." 
Numbers10:32 Wona wathiĩ na ithuĩ, nĩtũrĩgayanaga nawe iraathimo ciothe iria MWATHANI arĩtũheaga.”" 
Numbers10:33 Rĩrĩa moimire kĩrĩmainĩ gĩtheru gĩa Sinai, magĩthiĩ rũgendo rwa mĩthenya ĩtatũ. Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI rĩakoragwo hingo ciothe rĩrĩ mbere yao rĩkĩmacarĩria handũ ha gwaka kambĩ." 
Numbers10:34 Magĩthaama kuuma o kambĩ, itu rĩa MWATHANI rĩakoragwo igũrũ wao mũthenya." 
Numbers10:35 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ o yothe rĩrĩa Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro rĩngĩambĩrĩirie gũthiĩ, Musa oigaga atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI, arahũka; hurunja thũ ciaku, na arĩa makũmeneete marokũũrĩra!”" 
Numbers10:36 Na o harĩa rĩngĩarũũgamire, oigaga atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI, cooka harĩ andũ ngiri nyingĩ a Isiraeli.”" 
Numbers11:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ makĩambĩrĩria gũtetia MWATHANI nĩ ũndũ wa mathĩĩna maao. Rĩrĩa MWATHANI aiguire ũguo akĩraakara, akĩrekeria andũ mwaki, naguo ũgĩcina ndeere imwe cia kambĩ." 
Numbers11:2 Nao andũ magĩkaĩra Musa, naake Musa akĩhooya MWATHANI, naguo mwaki ũcio ũkĩhora." 
Numbers11:3 Kwoguo handũ hau hagĩtuuo Tabera, nĩ ũndũ mwaki wa MWATHANI nĩwakanire gatagatĩinĩ kaao." 
Numbers11:4 Nĩkwarĩ na andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ maatwaranaga nao. Andũ acio nĩmaagĩire na thuti ya nyama, o nao Aisiraeli makĩambĩrĩria gũteta makiugaga atĩrĩ, “Naarĩ korwo twĩ na nyama!" 
Numbers11:5 Twĩ Misiri nĩtwarĩaga thamaki na tũtiarĩhaga, o na nĩtwarĩaga kiukamba, meeroni, itũngũrũ cia riki, itũngũrũ cia ndũire, o hamwe na itũngũrũ cia thumu." 
Numbers11:6 No rĩu, hinya witũ nĩ mũthiru, na tũtirĩ na kĩndũ o na kĩ gĩa kũrĩa tiga o mana maya mũthenya o mũthenya.”" 
Numbers11:7 (Mana maahaanaga ta tũbegũ tũniini twa rangi wĩ gatagatĩ ka mwerũ na yerũũ. 
Numbers11:8 (8-9) Mana maagũaga kambĩ ũtukũ me hamwe na ime. Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ rũũciinĩ, andũ magathiĩ makĩmoonganagia, makamathĩa na ithĩi kana makamahũũrĩra ndĩrĩinĩ magatuĩka mũtu, magacooka makaũtherũkia makaruga keeki iria ciacamaga ta mĩgate irugĩĩtwo na maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ.)" 
Numbers11:9 Musa nĩaiguire andũ oothe magĩteta marũũgamĩĩte o andũ mũromoinĩ wa hema yao. Musa agĩkĩona ũhoro ũcio ũrĩ mũũru amu MWATHANI nĩaraakarĩĩte nĩ ũndũ wao. 
Numbers11:10 Musa agĩkĩũria MWATHANI atĩrĩ, “Ũnjĩkĩĩte ũũru ũguo nĩkĩ? Ũnjiguĩrĩire ũũru nĩkĩ? Wanengerire mũrigo ũyũ wa kũroraga andũ aya oothe nĩkĩ?" 
Numbers11:11 Niĩ ti niĩ ndamoombire kana ngĩmaciara nĩguo ũnjĩĩre ndĩmakuue ta ũrĩa mũreri wa mwana akuuaga mwana wa rũkenge ndĩmatware bũrũri ũrĩa werĩire maithe maao. 
Numbers11:12 Ngũruta kũ nyama cia kũhe andũ aya oothe tondũ marandĩrĩra makiugaga atĩ ndĩmahe nyama marĩe? 
Numbers11:13 Ndingĩhota kũrora andũ aya oothe ndĩ nyiiki; mũrigo ũcio nĩ mũritũ mũno harĩ niĩ! 
Numbers11:14 No angĩkorwo nĩ ũguo ũkũnjĩka-rĩ, njiguĩra tha ũnjũrage angĩkorwo nĩnjĩtĩkĩrĩkĩĩte nĩ we, nĩ geetha ndige kuona ngĩrĩa thĩĩna mũingĩ ũũ.”" 
Numbers11:15 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Cookanĩrĩria andũ mĩrongo mũgwanja arĩa maheetwo gĩtĩĩo nĩ andũ, na moĩkaine nĩ atongoria, ũndeehere Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo ũmeere marũũgame hamwe nawe." 
Numbers11:16 Nĩngũikũrũka njaranĩrie nawe hau, na njoe roho ũmwe ũrĩa ngũheete ndĩmahe na nĩmũrĩkĩnyiitanagĩra nao mũrigo wa andũ aya, nĩguo ndũgakĩukuuage ũrĩ wiki." 
Numbers11:17 Rĩu ĩra andũ atĩrĩ, ‘Mwĩtheriei nĩ ũndũ wa rũũciũ, amu nĩmũkaarĩa nyama. MWATHANI nĩaiguĩte mũkĩrĩra mũkiugaga atĩ naarĩ korwo no muone nyama mũrĩe, na atĩ nĩ kaba rĩrĩa mwarĩ Misiri. Kwoguo MWATHANI nĩakaamũhe nyama, na no mũhaka mũgaacirĩa." 
Numbers11:18 Mũtigaacirĩa mũthenya ũmwe, kana mĩthenya ĩĩrĩ, kana mĩthenya ĩtaano, kana ikũmi kana mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ;" 
Numbers11:19 mũgaacirĩa mweri ũmwe nginya ciume na maniũrũ, o nginya mũcinyire. Gũgwĩkĩka ũguo tondũ nĩmũregeete MWATHANI ũrĩa ũrĩ haaha hamwe na inyuĩ na mũkamũtetia mũkĩmwĩraga atĩ nĩ kaba mũtangĩoimire Misiri.’ ”" 
Numbers11:20 Musa akĩĩra MWATHANI atĩrĩ, “Ndongoreetie andũ ngiri magana matandatũ; acio nĩ o ũroiga atĩ nĩũkũmahe nyama mweri ũmwe?" 
Numbers11:21 No kuoneke ndũũru cia ng'ombe na cia mbũri mathĩnjĩrwo nĩguo imaigane? Thamaki iria ciothe irĩ iriainĩ ingĩũnganio no imaigane?” 
Numbers11:22 MWATHANI agĩkĩũria Musa atĩrĩ, “Hinya wakwa nĩũrĩ mũhaka? Nĩũkuona kana ciugo ciakwa nĩikũhinga kana itikũhinga!”" 
Numbers11:23 Kwoguo Musa akiuma agĩthiĩ akĩra andũ ciugo icio cia MWATHANI. Agĩcooka agĩcookanĩrĩria atongoria mĩrongo mũgwanja a mũingĩ, akĩmatwara makĩrũũgama mathiũrũrũkĩirie Hema." 
Numbers11:24 Naake MWATHANI agĩikũrũka e ituinĩ akĩmwarĩria, akĩruta roho ũmwe ũrĩa warĩ thĩinĩ wa Musa akĩwĩkĩra thĩinĩ wa atongoria acio mĩrongo mũgwanja. Rĩrĩa roho aatoonyire thĩinĩ wao, makĩambĩrĩria kũratha moohoro kwa ihinda iniini." 
Numbers11:25 Atongoria eerĩ, Elidadi na Medadi, nĩmaathuurĩĩtwo, no matiathiire Hemainĩ; maikarire o kambĩ. Me kũu kambĩinĩ roho nĩatoonyire thĩinĩ wao, makĩambĩrĩria kũratha moohoro." 
Numbers11:26 Mũndũ ũmwe mwĩthĩ nĩateng'erire kũrĩ Musa akĩmwĩra ũrĩa Elidadi na Medadi meekaga. 
Numbers11:27 Na rĩĩrĩ, Joshua mũrũ wa Nuni, ũrĩa kuuma e mũndũ mũnyiinyi aatũire ateithagĩrĩria Musa, ũcio akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Mwathi wakwa, magirie!”" 
Numbers11:27 Na rĩĩrĩ, Joshua mũrũ wa Nuni, ũrĩa kuuma e mũndũ mũnyiinyi aatũire ateithagĩrĩria Musa, ũcio akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Mwathi wakwa, magirie!”" 
Numbers11:28 Naake Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ ũgũkĩnjiguĩra ũiru? Naarĩ korwo MWATHANI no ahe andũ aake oothe roho wake agĩtũme oothe marathe moohoro!”" 
Numbers11:29 Thuutha wa ũguo, Musa na atongoria acio magĩcooka kambĩ." 
Numbers11:30 Na rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI nĩatũmire rũhuuho rũhuruutane kuuma iriainĩ, naruo rũkĩreehe tũmakia arũme tũmbũkĩĩte kĩndũ ta mita ĩmwe kuuma thĩ. Tuokire tũkĩũmba handũ ha ta kiromita ĩmwe gũthiũrũrũkĩria kambĩ." 
Numbers11:31 Kwoguo mũthenya ũcio andũ magĩtinda magĩtũngania, na ũtukũ na mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ; gũtirĩ mũndũ wonganirie tũmakia arũme twĩ na ũritũ ũnyiihĩire kiro ngiri ĩmwe. Nĩmaagĩtwanĩkire gũthiũrũrũkĩria kambĩ nĩguo tũũme." 
Numbers11:32 Na rĩĩrĩ, marĩ o na nyama nyingĩ ũguo cia kũrĩa-rĩ, MWATHANI nĩaraakaririo nĩ o, agĩgĩtũma kũgĩe mũthiro kũu gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ acio." 
Numbers11:33 Kwoguo handũ hau hagĩĩtwo Kibirothu Hataava (ũguo nĩkuuga “Mbĩĩrĩra cia Thuti”), amu hau nĩ ho maathikire andũ arĩa maagĩĩte na thuti ya nyama." 
Numbers11:34 Kuuma hau andũ magĩthiĩ Hazerothu, magĩaka kambĩ." 
Numbers12:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Miriamu na Harũni nĩmaaririe ũũru nĩ ũndũ wa Musa gũkorwo ahikĩĩtie mũtumia Mũethiopia" 
Numbers12:2 makiuga atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ MWATHANI aarĩĩtie ahũthĩrĩĩte Musa tu? Githĩ ndaarĩĩtie atũhũthĩrĩĩte o na ithuĩ?” Naake MWATHANI akĩigua ũguo moigire." 
Numbers12:3 (Musa aarĩ mũndũ mũhooreri gũkĩra mũndũ ũngĩ o wothe gũũkũ thĩ.) 
Numbers12:4 Na rĩĩrĩ, o rĩmwe MWATHANI akĩarĩria Musa, Harũni, na Miriamu akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ atatũ ũkaai Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo.” Nao magĩgĩthiĩ kuo," 
Numbers12:5 naake MWATHANI agĩikũrũka e thĩinĩ wa itu, akĩrũũgama mũromoinĩ wa Hema, agĩĩta Harũni na Miriamu. Nao eerĩ magĩkiumĩra hau mbere," 
Numbers12:6 naake MWATHANI akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Tathikĩrĩriai ũrĩa ngũmwĩra! Rĩrĩa he na anabii gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu-rĩ, nĩndĩĩmenyithanagia kũrĩ o na cioneki, na nĩndĩmaaragĩria na irooto." 
Numbers12:7 No rĩĩrĩ, ũguo tiguo gũkoragwo gũtariĩ rĩrĩa ngwaria na ndungata yakwa Musa; nĩndĩmwĩhokeire andũ aakwa oothe a Isiraeli." 
Numbers12:8 Twaranagĩria ũthiũ kwa ũthiũ; tũkaaranĩria wega, no ti na thimo; o na nĩanyoneete ũrĩa ndariĩ. Mũraagire gwĩtigĩra kwaria ũũru igũrũ wa ndungata yakwa Musa nĩkĩ?”" 
Numbers12:9 MWATHANI agĩkĩraakario nĩ o, agĩgĩthiĩ." 
Numbers12:10 Rĩrĩa itu rĩeheraga Hema igũrũ, Miriamu akĩnyiitwo nĩ mũrimũ mũũru wa ngoothi, mwĩrĩ wake ũkĩerũha o ta ira. Rĩrĩa Harũni aamũrorire akĩona atĩ nĩanyiitĩĩtwo nĩ mũrimũ mũũru wa ngoothi," 
Numbers12:11 akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Mwathi wakwa, ndũkaae gũtũherithia nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩhia riitũ rĩrĩa twĩkĩĩte na ũrimũ." 
Numbers12:12 Ndũkaareke ahaane ta kĩhuno kĩrĩa gĩciaragwo kĩrĩ na ũũgũ.” 
Numbers12:13 Naake Musa agĩkaĩra MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ngai, ndagũthaitha, mũhonie.”" 
Numbers12:14 MWATHANI akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Korwo nĩ ithe ũmũtuĩrĩire mata ũthiũ-rĩ, githĩ to aikare na gĩconoko kĩu mĩthenya mũgwanja? Kwoguo reke aikio nja ya kambĩ mĩthenya mũgwanja, na thuutha wa ũguo no agĩcookio kambĩinĩ.”" 
Numbers12:15 Miriamu agĩgĩikio nja ya kambĩ mĩthenya mũgwanja, na andũ matiathiire na mbere na rũgendo nginya rĩrĩa aacookirio thĩinĩ wa kambĩ." 
Numbers12:16 Thuutha wa ũguo makiuma Hazerothu, magĩthiĩ magĩaka kambĩ werũinĩ wa Parani." 
Numbers13:1 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ," 
Numbers13:2 “Thuura mũtongoria ũmwe kuuma harĩ o mũhĩrĩga, ũmatũme magathigaane bũrũri wa Kanaani ũrĩa ngũhe andũ a Isiraeli.”" 
Numbers13:3 (3-15) Musa nĩagĩathĩkĩire ũguo eerirwo nĩ MWATHANI, agĩgĩtũma atongoria kuuma werũinĩ wa Parani ta ũũ:" 
Numbers13:4 Acio nĩ o athigaani arĩa Musa aatũmire magathigaane bũrũri wa Kanaani. Nĩagarũrire rĩĩtwa rĩa Hoshea mũrũ wa Nuni akĩmũtua Joshua. 
Numbers13:4 Acio nĩ o athigaani arĩa Musa aatũmire magathigaane bũrũri wa Kanaani. Nĩagarũrire rĩĩtwa rĩa Hoshea mũrũ wa Nuni akĩmũtua Joshua. 
Numbers13:5 Musa akĩmatũma nĩameerire atĩrĩ, “Wona mwoima haaha, mwambate na rũgongo mũtoonye werũinĩ wĩ mwena wa na kĩanda wa bũrũri wa Kanaani, mũcooke mwambate nginya bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ irĩma." 
Numbers13:6 Mũrore bũrũri ũcio ũrĩa ũtariĩ, mũone kana andũ aakuo me na hinya kana matirĩ, na mũrore kana nĩ aingĩ kana ti aingĩ." 
Numbers13:7 Ningĩ mũrore kana bũrũri ũcio matũũraga nĩ mwega kana ti mwega, na mũrore kana matũũra marĩa matũũraga nĩmairigĩre na thingo cia hinya kana timairigĩre," 
Numbers13:8 Ningĩ mũrore kana tĩĩri nĩ mũnoru kana ti mũnoru, na mũrore kana kwĩ mĩtitũ kana gũtirĩ. Na rĩĩrĩ, mũone atĩ nĩmwareehe matunda mamwe ma marĩa makũraga kuo.” (Ihinda rĩu rĩarĩ kĩmera kĩrĩa thabibũ ciambagĩrĩria kwĩrua.)" 
Numbers13:9 Nĩmaakĩambatire na rũgongo magĩthigaana bũrũri kuuma werũinĩ wa Zini ũrĩa wĩ mwena wa na kĩanda wa bũrũri ũcio nginya Rehobu, hakuhĩ na itoonyero rĩa Hamathu mwena wa rũgongo." 
Numbers13:10 Maambire magĩthiĩ werũinĩ wĩ mwena wa na kĩanda wa bũrũri ũcio magĩkinya Heburoni, kũrĩa mbarĩ cia Ahimani, Sheshai na Talimai, iria ciarĩ njiarwa cia rũruka rwa imũndũ nene cietagwo Anaki ciatũũraga. (Itũũra rĩa Heburoni rĩakirwo mĩaka mũgwanja mbere ya itũũra rĩa Zoani rĩrĩa rĩrĩ Misiri.)" 
Numbers13:11 Nao magĩkinya gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Eshikoli, magĩtua rũhonge rwa mũthabibũ rwarĩ na thabibũ kĩmanjĩka kĩmwe, iria andũ eerĩ maacuuhirie na mũtĩ magĩcikuuanĩra nĩ ũndũ wa kũritũha. O na no maakuuire makongomanga mamwe o hamwe na ngũyũ." 
Numbers13:12 (Kũndũ kũu nĩmaagũtuire gĩtuamba kĩa Eshikoli nĩ ũndũ wa kĩmanjĩka gĩa thabibũ kĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maatũire kuo.) 
Numbers13:13 Andũ acio marĩĩkia gũthigaana bũrũri ũcio mĩthenya mĩrongo ĩna, magĩcooka" 
Numbers13:14 kũrĩ Musa, Harũni, na andũ oothe a Isiraeli arĩa maarĩ Kadeshi werũinĩ wa Parani. Magĩkĩmeera ũrĩa mooneete, na makĩmoonia matunda marĩa maareeheete." 
Numbers13:15 Makĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Nĩtwathigaanire bũrũri ũrĩa watũtũmire tũgathigaane, na bũrũri ũcio nĩ mwega na mũnoru, na maya nĩmo matunda maguo." 
Numbers13:16 No rĩĩrĩ, andũ arĩa matũũraga kuo me na hinya, na matũũra maao nĩ manene mũno na makairigĩrwo wega na thingo cia hinya. O na nĩtũroonire njiarwa cia imũndũ iria nene kuo." 
Numbers13:17 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ arĩa meetagwo Aamaleki maikaraga werũinĩ wa mwena wa na kĩanda wa bũrũri ũcio, nao Ahiti, Ajebusi na Aamori maikaraga bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma, nao Akanaani maikaraga hũgũrũrũinĩ cia iria rĩa Mediteraneani o na hũgũrũrũinĩ cia rũũĩ rwa Jorodani.”" 
Numbers13:18 No rĩĩrĩ, Kalebu agĩkiria andũ arĩa maatetagia Musa akiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũmookĩrĩreei tũmatuunye bũrũri ũcio, nĩ ũndũ twĩ na hinya mũiganu wa kũmahoota.”" 
Numbers13:19 No andũ arĩa maathiĩte na Kalebu makiuga atĩrĩ, “Aaca, tũtirĩ na hinya mũiganu wa kũmatharĩkĩra; andũ arĩa me kũu me na hinya gũtũkĩra.”" 
Numbers13:20 Kwoguo magĩkĩhe Aisiraeli oothe ũhoro wa maheeni ũkoniĩ bũrũri ũcio maathiĩte gũthigaana makĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Bũrũri ũcio o na ndũkũraga irio cia kũigana andũ arĩa matũũraga kuo. Andũ arĩa tũroonire kuo nĩ araihu mũno," 
Numbers13:21 o na nĩtũroonire imũndũ nene kuo, iria irĩ njiarwa cia Anaki. Tũrĩ harĩ cio tũreyonaga tũrĩ anyiinyi o ta ndaahi, na noguo o nacio iratuonaga tũtariĩ.”" 
Numbers14:1 Ũtukũ ũcio andũ oothe makĩraara makĩrĩra nĩ kĩeha. 
Numbers14:2 Magĩgĩtetia Musa na Harũni makĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kaba tũngĩakuĩrĩire Misiri kana gũũkũ werũinĩ." 
Numbers14:3 Nĩkĩ kĩratũma MWATHANI atũtware bũrũriinĩ ũcio? Tũgũthiĩ kũũragĩrwo mbaarainĩ, nao atumia aitũ na ciana ciitũ matahwo. Githĩ ti kaba tũcooke Misiri?”" 
Numbers14:4 Magĩkĩĩrana atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũthuureei mũtongoria tũcooke Misiri!”" 
Numbers14:5 No rĩĩrĩ, Musa na Harũni makĩinamĩrĩra makĩhuutithia moothiũ maao thĩ mbere ya andũ oothe." 
Numbers14:6 Naake Joshua mũrũ wa Nuni na Kalebu mũrũ wa Jefune, amwe a arĩa maarĩ athigaani, magĩtarũranga nguo ciao nĩ ũndũ wa kĩeha." 
Numbers14:6 Naake Joshua mũrũ wa Nuni na Kalebu mũrũ wa Jefune, amwe a arĩa maarĩ athigaani, magĩtarũranga nguo ciao nĩ ũndũ wa kĩeha." 
Numbers14:7 Makĩĩra andũ oothe atĩrĩ, “Bũrũri ũcio tũrathiĩte gũthigaana nĩ mwega mũno." 
Numbers14:8 Angĩkorwo MWATHANI nĩakeneetio nĩ ithuĩ-rĩ, nĩegũtũtwara na atũhe bũrũri ũcio mwega na mũnoru." 
Numbers14:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, mũtigookĩrĩre MWATHANI, o na mũtigeetigĩre andũ arĩa matũũraga bũrũriinĩ ũcio. Nĩtũkũmahoota narua, tondũ MWATHANI arĩ hamwe na ithuĩ, na nĩahooteete ngai iria imagitagĩra. Kwoguo tigaai gwĩtigĩra.”" 
Numbers14:10 Andũ oothe nĩmeendaga kũmahũũra na mahiga, no o rĩmwe makĩona ũtheri mũnene wa riiri wa MWATHANI ũkengeete igũrũ wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo." 
Numbers14:11 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Andũ aya megũtũũra maameneete nginya rĩ? Megũtũũra maagĩĩte kũnjĩĩhoka nginya rĩ, o na gũtuĩka nĩningĩĩte ciama nyingĩ gatagatĩinĩ kaao?" 
Numbers14:12 Nĩngũmatũmĩra mũthiro ũmaniine, no rĩĩrĩ, wee nĩngũgũtua ithe wa rũũrĩrĩ rũnene na rwĩ na hinya kũmakĩra!”" 
Numbers14:13 No Musa akĩĩra MWATHANI atĩrĩ, “Nĩ we warutire andũ aya Misiri na hinya waku. Rĩu andũ a Misiri maigua ũrĩa wĩkĩĩte andũ aaku," 
Numbers14:14 nĩmekwĩra andũ arĩa matũũraga bũrũriinĩ ũyũ. Andũ aya nĩmaiguĩte atĩ wee MWATHANI ũrĩ hamwe na ithuĩ, na nĩwonekaga wega rĩrĩa itu rĩaku rĩarũũgama igũrũ witũ, na nĩũthiaga mbere iitũ wĩ thĩinĩ wa itu mũthenya, naguo ũtukũ wĩ thĩinĩ wa gĩtugĩ kĩa mwaki." 
Numbers14:15 Rĩu-rĩ, ũngĩkĩũraga andũ aaku oothe, ndũũrĩrĩ iria cianaigua ngumo yaku ikuuga atĩrĩ," 
Numbers14:16 ‘MWATHANI araniinĩire andũ aake werũinĩ nĩ tondũ nĩararemirwo nĩkũmakinyia bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa aameerĩire atĩ nĩakaamahe.’ 
Numbers14:17 Kwoguo, MWATHANI, ndakũhooya ũtuonie hinya waku na ũhingie ũrĩa weranĩire rĩrĩa woigire atĩrĩ," 
Numbers14:18 ‘Niĩ MWATHANI ndihiũhaga kũraakara, ndĩ tha nyingĩ, ndĩ mwĩhokeku, na nĩnjohanagĩra meehia o na mahĩtia. No rĩĩrĩ, ndikaaga kũherithia ciana na ciana cia ciana nginya rũciaro rwa gatatũ na rwa kana, nĩ ũndũ wa meehia ma aciari aacio.’" 
Numbers14:19 Rĩu, MWATHANI, ngũgĩkũhooya nĩ ũndũ wa wendo waku mũnene na ũtagarũrũkaga wohere andũ aya meehia maao, o ta ũrĩa ũtũire ũmoohagĩra kuuma rĩrĩa moimire Misiri.”" 
Numbers14:20 MWATHANI agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũmoohera ta ũguo woria." 
Numbers14:21 No rĩĩrĩ, nĩngwĩranĩra atĩ o ta ũrĩa ndũũraga muoyo, na ta ũrĩa riiri wakwa ũiyũrĩĩte thĩ," 
Numbers14:22 gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wa aya ũgũtũũra nginya agaakinya bũrũri ũcio. Nĩmooneete ũtheri mũnene wa riiri wakwa ũgĩkenga, o na nĩmooneete ciama iria ndaringire Misiri o na werũinĩ, no nĩmagereetie gũkirĩrĩria gwakwa maita maingĩ, na nĩmaregeete kũnjathĩkĩra." 
Numbers14:23 Matigaatoonya bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa ndeerĩire maithe maao. Gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wa arĩa mameneete ũkaawona. 
Numbers14:24 No rĩĩrĩ, tondũ Kalebu ndungata yakwa arĩ na muorooto ũngĩ, na nĩakoreetwo e mwĩhokeku harĩ niĩ, nĩngaamũkinyia bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa aathiĩte gũthigaana, nacio njiarwa ciake nĩikeenyiitĩra bũrũri" 
Numbers14:25 ũrĩa Aamaleki na Akanaani matũũraga ituambainĩ ciaguo. Rũũciũ-rĩ, mũgaacooka na thuutha mũthiĩ werũinĩ mũroreete na njĩra ya gũthiĩ Iriainĩ Ituune.”" 
Numbers14:26 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa na Harũni atĩrĩ," 
Numbers14:27 “Andũ aya aaganu megũtũũra mandetagia nginya rĩ? Nĩnjiganĩĩtie mateta maao! 
Numbers14:28 Kĩmeere atĩrĩ, ‘O ta ũrĩa niĩ MWATHANI ndũũraga muoyo, ngũmwĩka o ta ũrĩa mũũrĩĩtie." 
Numbers14:29 Mũgũkua, nacio ciimba cianyu ciaragane werũinĩ ũyũ wothe. Atĩrĩĩrĩ, nĩ ũndũ wa kũndetia, gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wanyu kũũma mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ gũthiĩ na igũrũ ũgaatoonya bũrũri ũcio." 
Numbers14:30 Nĩndamwĩrĩire atĩ nĩngaareka mũtũũre kuo, no gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wanyu ũgaatũũra kuo tiga o Kalebu mũrũ wa Jefune na Joshua mũrũ wa Nuni." 
Numbers14:30 Nĩndamwĩrĩire atĩ nĩngaareka mũtũũre kuo, no gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wanyu ũgaatũũra kuo tiga o Kalebu mũrũ wa Jefune na Joshua mũrũ wa Nuni." 
Numbers14:31 Mwoigire atĩ ciana cianyu nĩigaatahwo, no rĩĩrĩ, nĩngaacitwara bũrũriinĩ ũcio mwaregire, na nĩũgaatuĩka mũciĩ wacio." 
Numbers14:32 No inyuĩ mũgũkuĩra gũũkũ werũinĩ. 
Numbers14:33 Ciana cianyu igũtũũra irĩithagia gũũkũ werũinĩ mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna, na igũtũũra ithĩĩnĩkaga nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa mũtarĩ ehokeku nginya mũndũ wanyu wa mũthia akue." 
Numbers14:34 Mũkũherithio nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maanyu mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna, o mwaka ũrũũgamagĩrĩrwo nĩ mũthenya ũmwe wa mĩthenya ĩrĩa mĩrongo ĩna mwahũthĩrire mũgĩthigaana. Nĩmũkũmenya nũũ mũũkĩrĩire." 
Numbers14:35 Ngwĩhĩta atĩ ũguo nĩguo ngũmwĩka inyuĩ andũ aya aaganu mũũnganĩĩte mũũnjũkĩrĩre. Inyuothe mũgũkuĩra gũũkũ werũinĩ. Ũguo nĩguo niĩ MWATHANI ndoiga.’ ” 
Numbers14:36 (36-37) Andũ arĩa Musa aatũmĩĩte mathiĩ magathigaane na maacooka makĩreehere andũ oothe ũhoro wa maheeni ũkoniĩ bũrũri ũcio magĩgĩtũma andũ mookĩrĩre MWATHANI, oothe maareehithĩirio mũrimũ nĩ MWATHANI ũkĩmaniina." 
Numbers14:37 Kuuma harĩ andũ acio oothe maatũmĩĩtwo magathigaane, no Joshua mũrũ wa Nuni na Kalebu mũrũ wa Jefune mataakuire." 
Numbers14:37 Kuuma harĩ andũ acio oothe maatũmĩĩtwo magathigaane, no Joshua mũrũ wa Nuni na Kalebu mũrũ wa Jefune mataakuire." 
Numbers14:38 Rĩrĩa Musa eerire andũ a Aisiraeli ũrĩa MWATHANI oigĩĩte, nĩmaacakaire mũno." 
Numbers14:39 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ rũũciinĩ tene makĩambĩrĩria gũthiĩ gũtharĩkĩra bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ irĩma makiugaga atĩrĩ, “Rĩu nĩtwĩhaarĩirie gũthiĩ kũrĩa MWATHANI aatwĩrĩire. Nĩtwĩtĩkĩrĩĩte atĩ nĩtwĩhĩĩtie.”" 
Numbers14:40 No Musa akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ kĩragiria mwathĩkĩre MWATHANI? O na mwathiĩ mũtihootana!" 
Numbers14:41 Tigaai gũthiĩ tondũ MWATHANI ndarĩ hamwe na inyuĩ, na kwoguo thũ cianyu nĩkũmũhoota." 
Numbers14:42 Mwang'ethanĩra na Aamaleki na Akanaani, nĩmũgũkuĩra mbaarainĩ. MWATHANI ndegũkorwo hamwe na inyuĩ tondũ nĩmwagĩĩte kũmũrũmĩrĩra.”" 
Numbers14:43 No rĩĩrĩ, andũ acio makiuga no megũthiĩ, magĩkĩambata nginya bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa wĩ irĩma, o na gũtuĩka Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI rĩtioimire kambĩ, o na Musa we mwene." 
Numbers14:44 Nao Aamaleki na Akanaani arĩa maatũũraga bũrũriinĩ ũcio wĩ irĩma makĩmookĩrĩra makĩmahũũra, makĩmatindĩka nginya Horoma." 
Numbers15:1 MWATHANI nĩaheire Musa 
Numbers15:2 mawatho maya makũrũmagĩrĩrwo nĩ andũ a Isiraeli marĩ bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa eerekeire kũmahe: 
Numbers15:3 ndeegwa, ndũrũme, ng'ondu, kana mbũri no ĩrutĩrwo MWATHANI igongoona rĩa njino, kana igongoona rĩa mwĩhĩtwa, kana kĩheeo gĩa kũruta na kwĩyendera kana kĩheeo o gĩothe kĩa iria mũrutaga thigũkũinĩ cianyu; mũtararĩko wa magongoona macio ma irio nĩũkenagia MWATHANI." 
Numbers15:4 (4-5) Mũndũ o wothe ũkũrutĩra MWATHANI ng'ondu kana mbũri ĩrĩ igongoona rĩa njino, no mũhaka amĩreehanagĩrie na kiro ya mũtu ũtukanĩĩtio na maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ rita ĩmwe irĩ igongoona rĩa mũtu, na rita ĩmwe ya ndibei." 
Numbers15:5 Angĩkorwo nĩ ndũrũme ĩkũrutwo igongoona-rĩ, arĩmĩreehanagĩria na mũtu kiro igĩrĩ ũtukanĩĩtio na rita ĩmwe na nuthu ya maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ irĩ igongoona rĩa mũtu," 
Numbers15:6 na rita ĩmwe na nuthu ya ndibei. Mũtararĩko wa igongoona rĩu nĩũkenagia MWATHANI. 
Numbers15:7 Angĩkorwo nĩ ndeegwa ĩkũrutĩrwo MWATHANI igongoona rĩa njino, kana rĩa kũhingia mwĩhĩtwa, kana rĩa thaayũ-rĩ," 
Numbers15:8 arĩmĩreehanagĩria na mũtu kiro ithatũ ũtukanĩĩtio na rita igĩrĩ cia maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ wa igongoona rĩa mũtu," 
Numbers15:9 na rita igĩrĩ cia ndibei. Mũtararĩko wa igongoona rĩu nĩũkenagia MWATHANI. 
Numbers15:10 “Indo icio nĩcio irĩrutagwo gũkĩrutwo igongoona rĩa ndeegwa, ndũrũme, ng'ondu, kana mbũri." 
Numbers15:11 O ũrĩa nyamũ cia igongoona ciongerereka, noguo o nacio indo icio ingĩ cia igongoona irĩongererekaga." 
Numbers15:12 Mũisiraeli o wothe no mũhaka eekage ũguo rĩrĩa ekũruta igongoona rĩa irio, rĩrĩ mũtararĩko ũrĩa ũkenagia MWATHANI." 
Numbers15:13 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũrũũrĩrĩ ũratũũrania na inyuĩ kwa ihinda, kana ũtũũranagia na inyuĩ, angĩruta igongoona rĩa irio rĩrĩ rĩa mũtararĩko ũrĩa ũkenagia MWATHANI, nĩarũmagĩrĩre mũtaratara o ro ũcio." 
Numbers15:14 Mahinda moothe marĩa megũũka-rĩ, inyuĩ o hamwe na andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa matũũranagia na inyuĩ mũrĩrumagĩrĩra mawatho o mamwe, amu inyuĩ nao nĩmũiganaine mbere ya MWATHANI." 
Numbers15:15 Inyuĩ Aisiraeli na andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa mũtũũranagia nao mũrĩkoragwo na watho na mũtaratara o ro ũmwe.” 
Numbers15:16 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ," 
Numbers15:17 “Arĩria andũ a Isiraeli ũmeere atĩrĩ, mwakinya bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa ngũmũtwara," 
Numbers15:18 mũkaarĩaga irio imwe cia bũrũri ũcio, na iria ingĩ mũkarutĩra MWATHANI irĩ kĩheeo kĩa mwanya." 
Numbers15:19 Mwaruga mĩgate, mũgate wa mbere kũrugwo na mũtũ wa ngano ya mũgethano mũkaaũrutagĩra MWATHANI ũrĩ kĩheeo kĩa mwanya. Mũgate ũcio mũkaaũrutaga o ta ũrĩa mũkaarutaga igongoona rĩa ngano mwamĩhũũra." 
Numbers15:20 Mahinda moothe marĩa megũũka, kĩheeo kĩu kĩa mwanya kĩrĩheagwo MWATHANI kuuma mĩgateinĩ ĩrĩa mwaruga." 
Numbers15:21 “No rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ atekwenda no aage kũhingia mawatho mamwe ma macio MWATHANI aaheire Musa." 
Numbers15:22 Ningĩ matukũinĩ ma thuutha mũingĩ no wage gwĩka maũndũ moothe marĩa MWATHANI aathanire ahũthĩrĩĩte Musa. 
Numbers15:23 Angĩkorwo mahĩtia macio meekirwo nĩ andũ matekũmenya, maagĩrĩirwo nĩkũruta gateegwa karĩ igongoona rĩa njino, rĩrĩa arĩ mũtararĩko ũrĩa ũkenagia MWATHANI, hamwe na igongoona rĩrĩa rĩagĩrĩire rĩa mũtu na rĩa ndibei, na moongerere thenge ĩmwe ĩrĩ igongoona rĩa meehia." 
Numbers15:24 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai arute igongoona rĩa kũhoroheria andũ oothe, nao makĩoherwo tondũ maahĩtirie matekũmenya, na nĩmarutĩĩte igongoona rĩa meehia rĩrutĩirwo MWATHANI na ũndũ wa gũcinwo." 
Numbers15:25 Andũ oothe a Isiraeli, na andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa matũũranagia nao, makĩoherwo tondũ meehirie marĩ oothe." 
Numbers15:26 “Mũndũ angĩĩhia atekũmenya-rĩ, arĩrutaga mbũri ya mũgoma ya mwaka ũmwe ĩrĩ igongoona rĩa meehia." 
Numbers15:27 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai arute igongoona rĩa kũmũhoroheria kĩgongoonainĩ, naake mũndũ ũcio akĩoherwo meehia maake." 
Numbers15:28 Aisiraeli na andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa matũũranagia nao arĩa marĩĩhagia matekũmenya, marĩrũmagĩrĩra watho o ro ũmwe." 
Numbers15:29 No rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩĩhagia akĩmenyaga, arĩ Mũisiraeli kana mũrũũrĩrĩ, nĩarumĩĩte MWATHANI, na no mũhaka ooragwo." 
Numbers15:30 Arĩũragagwo nĩ ũndũ nĩareganĩĩte na ũrĩa MWATHANI oigire, na akoina watho wa MWATHANI akĩendaga. We mwene nĩwe ũrĩcookagĩrĩrwo nĩ mahĩtia maake.”" 
Numbers15:31 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maarĩ werũinĩ nĩmaakorire mũndũ akiuna ngũ mũthenya wa Thabatũ. 
Numbers15:32 Nao makĩmũtwara kũrĩ Musa, Harũni, na kũrĩ mũingĩ wothe," 
Numbers15:33 agĩikara arangĩirwo, tondũ gũtiamenyekaga wega ũrĩa aagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩkwo." 
Numbers15:34 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũcio no mũhaka ooragwo; mũingĩ wothe ũkũmũtwara nja ya kambĩ ũmũhũũre na mahiga nginya akue.”" 
Numbers15:35 Kwoguo mũingĩ wothe ũkĩmũruta nja ya kambĩ, ũkĩmũhũũra na mahiga nginya agĩkua, o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aathĩĩte Musa." 
Numbers15:36 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Musa 
Numbers15:37 eere a andũ a Aisiraeli atĩrĩ, “Thondekaai ciohe cia ndigi, na mwĩkĩre kamũkanda ka rangi wa mburuu harĩ o kĩohe, mũcitumĩrĩre koonainĩ cia nguo cianyu, na mũtũũre mwĩkaga ũguo nginya tene." 
Numbers15:38 Mwaciona-rĩ, nĩmũrĩririkanaga maathani maakwa moothe na mũkamaathĩkĩra; kwoguo mũtirĩreganaga na niĩ mũkarũmĩrĩra wendi wanyu na merirĩria maanyu." 
Numbers15:39 Na njĩra ĩyo, nĩmũrĩririkanaga na mũgaathĩkĩra maathani maakwa moothe, na mũgĩtũũre mũrĩ aakwa kũna." 
Numbers15:40 Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI Ngai wanyu, ũrĩa wamũrutire bũrũri wa Misiri nduĩke Ngai wanyu. Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI.”" 
Numbers16:1 (1-2) Na rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ wetagwo Kora mũrũ wa Iziharu, wa mũhĩrĩga wa Lawi, wa mbarĩ ya Kohathu, nĩokĩrĩire Musa. Nĩanyiitirwo mbaru nĩ Dathani na Abiramu aariũ a Eliabu, na Oni mũrũ wa Pelethi a mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni, na atongoria angĩ a Isiraeli magana meerĩ na mĩrongo ĩtaano moĩkaine wega, na maathuurĩĩtwo nĩ mũingĩ." 
Numbers16:2 Andũ acio nĩmoonganire mbere ya Musa na Harũni makĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Rĩu nĩmũtororeetie! Mũingĩ wothe nĩ wa MWATHANI, na MWATHANI arĩ hamwe na ithuĩ ithuothe. Wee Musa-rĩ, ũgĩĩtũũgĩrĩĩtie igũrũ rĩa andũ a MWATHANI nĩkĩ?”" 
Numbers16:3 Musa aigua ũguo, akĩĩgũithia thĩ akĩhooya." 
Numbers16:4 Agĩcooka akĩĩra Kora na andũ arĩa maamũrũmĩrĩire atĩrĩ, “Rũũciũ rũũciinĩ MWATHANI nĩagaatuonia mũndũ wake nĩ ũrĩkũ; nĩakaareka mũndũ wake ũrĩa athuurĩĩte, amũkuhĩrĩrie kĩgongoonainĩ." 
Numbers16:5 (6-7) Rũũciũ rũũciinĩ-rĩ, wee hamwe na arũmĩrĩri aaku mũkooya tũnyũngũ twa gũcinĩra ũbaani mwĩkĩre makara marakana, na ũbaani, mũcooke mũtũtware kĩgongoonainĩ. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩtũkoona nĩ ũrĩkũ witũ MWATHANI athuurĩĩte. Inyuĩ Alawii nĩ inyuĩ mũtororeetie!”" 
Numbers16:6 Musa agĩgĩthiĩ na mbere kwĩra Kora atĩrĩ, “Tathikĩrĩriai inyuĩ Alawii!" 
Numbers16:7 Mũkuona arĩ ũndũ mũnyiinyi gũkorwo mũthuurĩĩtwo nĩ Ngai wa Isiraeli kuuma kũrĩ mũingĩ wothe nĩ geetha mũmũkuhagĩrĩrie, mũrutage wĩra wanyu Hemainĩ ya MWATHANI, na mũtungatagĩre andũ oothe?" 
Numbers16:8 MWATHANI nĩamwĩtĩkĩrĩĩtie mwĩ hamwe na Alawii arĩa angĩ oothe mũgĩe na gĩtĩĩo kĩu, na rĩu nĩkwenda mũrenda o na inyuĩ gũtuĩka athĩnjĩri Ngai a MWATHANI!" 
Numbers16:9 Kwoguo rĩrĩa wee hamwe na arũmĩrĩri aaku mũrateta nĩ ũndũ wa Harũni, nĩ MWATHANI mũrarũa naake.”" 
Numbers16:10 Musa nĩatũmanire Dathani na Abiramu aariũ a Eliabu mageetwo, no o makiuga atĩrĩ, “Tũtigũũka!" 
Numbers16:11 Kaĩ arĩ ũndũ mũnyiinyi gũtũruta bũrũri ũrĩa warĩ mwega na mũnoru ũũke ũtũũragĩre gũũkũ werũinĩ? Rĩu ũrenda gũtwĩneneheria nĩkĩ? 
Numbers16:12 Ndũtũtwarĩĩte bũrũriinĩ mwega na mũnoru, ndũtũheete igai rĩa ithaka, o na mĩgũnda ya mĩthabibũ. Nĩgũtũheenia ũratũheenia. Tũtigũũka!”" 
Numbers16:13 Musa nĩaraakarire mũno, agĩkĩĩra MWATHANI atĩrĩ, “Ndũkaamũkĩre igongoona o na rĩmwe rĩrĩa andũ aya mekũreehe. Niĩ hatirĩ o na ũmwe wao hĩtĩirie, o na ndioeete ndigiri o na ĩmwe yao.”" 
Numbers16:14 Musa agĩkĩĩra Kora atĩrĩ, “Rũũciũ no mũhaka wee hamwe na arũmĩrĩri aaku magana meerĩ na mĩrongo ĩtaano mũgooka Hemainĩ ya MWATHANI ya gũtũnganwo; o naake Harũni nĩagaakorwo ho." 
Numbers16:15 Inyuothe o mũndũ akooya kanyũngũ gaake ga gũcinĩra ũbaani, eekĩre ũbaani, acooke agatware kĩgongoonainĩ.”" 
Numbers16:16 Kwoguo o mũndũ akĩoya kanyũngũ gaake ga gũcinĩra ũbaani, agĩĩkĩra makara marakana, na ũbaani, magĩthiĩ makĩrũũgama mũromoinĩ wa Hema marĩ hamwe na Musa na Harũni." 
Numbers16:17 Kora agĩgĩcookanĩrĩria mũingĩ wothe hau nja ya Hema ya gũtũnganwo, makĩng'ethanĩra na Musa na Harũni. O rĩmwe riiri wa MWATHANI ũkiumĩrĩra mũingĩ," 
Numbers16:18 naake MWATHANI akĩarĩria Musa na Harũni akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Numbers16:19 “Eheraai harĩ mũingĩ ũyũ nĩguo ndĩũniine o rĩmwe.” 
Numbers16:20 No Musa na Harũni makĩĩgũithia thĩ makĩhuutithia moothiũ maao thĩ makiuga atĩrĩ, “Ũũi Ngai, o wee kĩhumo kĩa ũtũũro wothe, kaĩ mũndũ ũmwe eehia ũraakaragĩra mũingĩ wothe?”" 
Numbers16:21 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ," 
Numbers16:22 “Ĩra mũingĩ wehere ciikaroinĩ cia Kora, Dathani, na Abiramu.”" 
Numbers16:23 Musa agĩgĩũkĩra agĩthiĩ kwa Dathani na Abiramu, nao atongoria a andũ a Isiraeli makĩmũrũmĩrĩra." 
Numbers16:24 Akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ, “Ndamũthaitha eheraai ciikaroinĩ cia andũ aya aaganu, na mũtikaahuutie kĩndũ o na kĩmwe kĩao, kana mũniinanĩrio hamwe nao nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maao.”" 
Numbers16:25 Andũ magĩkĩehera ciikaroinĩ cia Kora, Dathani, na Abiramu.Dathani na Abiramu nĩmoimĩĩte makarũũgama mĩromoinĩ ya ciikaro ciao me hamwe na atumia aao na ciana ciao." 
Numbers16:26 Musa agĩkĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ, “Nĩmũkũmenya atĩ nĩ MWATHANI ũndũmĩĩte njĩke maũndũ maya moothe, no ti mwĩĩro wakwa niĩ mwene ũtũmĩĩte ndĩmeeke na njĩra ĩno:" 
Numbers16:27 Andũ aya makua gĩkuũ kĩa ndũire matarĩ na iherithia kuuma kwĩ MWATHANI, hĩndĩ ĩyo ti MWATHANI ũndũmĩĩte." 
Numbers16:28 No rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI eeka ũndũ ũtarĩ waiguĩka, nayo thĩ ĩhingũke ĩmamerie hamwe na indo ciao ciothe mathiĩ me muoyo kũrĩa akuũ mathiaga, nĩmũkũmenya atĩ nĩmaregeete MWATHANI.”" 
Numbers16:29 Na rĩĩrĩ, arĩĩkia kwaria o ro ũguo, thĩ harĩa Dathani na Abiramu maarĩ ĩgĩatũka" 
Numbers16:30 ĩkĩmameria hamwe na atumia aao na ciana ciao, o hamwe na arũmĩrĩri a Kora oothe na indo ciao." 
Numbers16:31 Kwoguo makĩmerio nĩ thĩ me muoyo, magĩthiĩ kũrĩa akuũ mathiaga. Thĩ nĩyacookire ĩgĩtumana me na kũu thĩinĩ, makĩaga gũcooka kuoneka." 
Numbers16:32 Andũ oothe a Isiraeli arĩa maarĩ hakuhĩ na hau makĩũra rĩrĩa maiguire kĩrĩro kĩao. Magĩkĩanĩrĩra makiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũũreei thĩ ndĩgatũmerie o na ithuĩ!”" 
Numbers16:33 Ningĩ mwaki ũkiuma kũrĩ MWATHANI ũgĩũka ũgĩcina andũ arĩa magana meerĩ na mĩrongo ĩtaano arĩa maacinĩĩte ũbaani. 
Numbers16:34 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ," 
Numbers16:35 “Ĩra Eleazaru mũrũ wa Harũni mũthĩnjĩri Ngai eeherie tũnyũngũ twa gũcinĩra ũbaani kuuma hau haacinĩirwo andũ acio ahurunje makara marĩa me thĩinĩ watuo kũndũ kũngĩ, tondũ tũnyũngũ tũu nĩ tũtheru." 
Numbers16:36 Twatuĩkire tũtheru rĩrĩa twarutĩirwo MWATHANI kĩgongoonainĩ. Kwoguo oya tũu twa andũ acio mooragwo nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maao, ũtũture tũtuĩke tũthaani, ũtũtue kĩndũ gĩa kũhumbĩra kĩgongoona. Natuo tũgĩtuĩke kĩmenyithia harĩ andũ a Isiraeli.”" 
Numbers16:37 Kwoguo Eleazaru mũthĩnjĩri Ngai akĩoya tũnyũngũ tũu twa gĩcango agĩtũturithia tũgĩtuĩka tũthaani twa kũhumbĩra kĩgongoona. 
Numbers16:38 Tũthaani tũu twarĩ twa kũririkanagia andũ a Isiraeli atĩ mũndũ ũtarĩ wa mbarĩ ya Harũni ndakaanathiĩ gũcinĩra MWATHANI ũbaani kĩgongoonainĩ. Mũndũ angĩgaathiĩ, akaaniinwo o ta Kora na andũ aake. Ũndũ ũcio wekirwo kũringana na ũrĩa MWATHANI aathĩĩte Eleazaru ahũthĩrĩĩte Musa." 
Numbers16:39 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ andũ oothe magĩtetia Musa na Harũni makiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩmũrooragire andũ amwe a MWATHANI.”" 
Numbers16:40 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa oothe maacemanirie matetie Musa na Harũni, meehũgũra na kũrĩa Hema ya gũtũnganwo yarĩ makĩona ĩhumbĩrĩĩtwo nĩ itu, na riiri wa MWATHANI ũgĩkenga." 
Numbers16:41 Naake Musa na Harũni magĩthiĩ makĩrũũgama mbere ya Hema ĩyo," 
Numbers16:42 naake MWATHANI akĩarĩria Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ," 
Numbers16:43 “Ehereraai andũ aya, ndĩmaniine o rĩmwe!”Nao eerĩ makĩĩgũithia thĩ magĩturumithia moothiũ maao thĩ." 
Numbers16:44 Naake Musa akĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ, “Oya kanyũngũ gaaku ga gũcinĩra ũbaani, wĩkĩre mwaki kuuma kĩgongoonainĩ, ũcooke ũwĩkĩre ũbaani, ũthiĩ narua ũkahoroherie andũ. Ĩka ũguo narua, amu nĩharĩ maraakara moimĩĩte kwĩ MWATHANI, tondũ mũthiro nĩwambĩrĩirie.”" 
Numbers16:45 Harũni nĩagĩĩkire ũguo eerirwo nĩ Musa, akĩoya kanyũngũ ga gũcinĩra ũbaani, agĩthiĩ narua gatagatĩinĩ ka mũingĩ. Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa oonire atĩ mũthiro nĩwambĩrĩirie, agĩĩkĩra ũbaani mwakiinĩ, akĩambĩrĩria kũhoroheria mũingĩ." 
Numbers16:46 Ũndũ ũcio ũgĩkĩrũũgamia mũthiro ũcio, naake agĩgĩtigwo arũũgamĩĩte gatagatĩ ka andũ arĩa maarĩ muoyo na arĩa maakuĩte." 
Numbers16:47 Mũigana wa andũ arĩa maakuire warĩ ngiri ikũmi na inya, na magana mũgwanja (14,700) gũtatarĩĩtwo arĩa maakuire hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Kora ookĩrĩire Musa." 
Numbers16:48 Mũthiro watiga gũthiĩ na mbere, Harũni agĩcooka harĩ Musa mũromoinĩ wa Hema." 
Numbers17:1 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ," 
Numbers17:2 “Ĩra andũ a Isiraeli makũnengere mĩthĩĩgi, ũnengerwo mũthĩĩgi ũmwe kuuma kũrĩ mũtongoria wa o mũhĩrĩga wa ĩrĩa ikũmi na ĩrĩ ya andũ a Isiraeli. O mũthĩĩgi, ũwandĩke rĩĩtwa rĩa mwene guo," 
Numbers17:3 no rĩĩtwa rĩa Harũni ũrĩandĩke mũthĩĩgiinĩ wa mũtongoria wa mũhĩrĩga wa Lawi. Gũgũkorwo na mũthĩĩgi o ũmwe kuuma kũrĩ o mũtongoria wa mũhĩrĩga. 
Numbers17:4 Ũcooke ũtware mĩthĩĩgi ĩyo Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo, ũmĩige mbere ya Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro harĩa ndũnganaga nawe." 
Numbers17:5 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthĩĩgi wa mũndũ ũrĩa thuurĩĩte nĩũgũthundũka. Na njĩra ĩyo nĩngũniina gũteta kũrĩa andũ a Isiraeli matũũraga magũtetagia.”" 
Numbers17:6 Musa akĩarĩria Aisiraeli, na o mũtongoria wao akĩmũnengera mũthĩĩgi wake, agĩkĩnengerwo mĩthĩĩgi ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ, na mũthĩĩgi wa Harũni warĩ hamwe na ĩyo ĩngĩ." 
Numbers17:7 Musa akĩiga mĩthĩĩgi ĩyo Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo mbere ya Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI. 
Numbers17:8 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ, Musa agĩtoonya Hemainĩ, agĩkora mũthĩĩgi wa Harũni ũrĩa warũũgamĩrĩire mũhĩrĩga wa Lawi ũthundũkĩĩte. Warutĩĩte njahĩrĩra, ĩkagĩa na kĩro, nakĩo gĩgaciara matunda meeru ma ndoothi!" 
Numbers17:9 Musa agĩkĩruta mĩthĩĩgi ĩyo yothe kuuma Hemainĩ, akĩmĩonia andũ oothe a Isiraeli. Magĩkĩona ũrĩa gwekĩkĩĩte, na o mũtongoria akĩoya mũthĩĩgi wake." 
Numbers17:10 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Cookia mũthĩĩgi wa Harũni mbere ya Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro. Mũthĩĩgi ũcio ũrĩkoragwo hau wĩ wa kũririkanagia Aisiraeli arĩa matetaga atĩ nĩmegũkua maaga gũtiga kũndetia.”" 
Numbers17:11 Musa agĩgĩĩka o ũrĩa MWATHANI aamwĩrire. 
Numbers17:12 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ nĩtwagĩthira!" 
Numbers17:13 Angĩkorwo o na mũndũ angĩkuhĩrĩria Hema nĩegũkua-rĩ, ithuothe nĩtwakua!”" 
Numbers18:1 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ, “Wee, aariũ aaku, na Alawii nĩ inyuĩ mũrĩcookagĩrĩrwo nĩ ũũru ũrĩa ũngĩoneka mũgĩtungata Hemainĩ yakwa ya gũtũnganwo; no rĩĩrĩ ũũru ũrĩa ũngĩoneka mũgĩtungata ta athĩnjĩri Ngai, nĩ we na aariũ aaku ũrĩcookagĩrĩra." 
Numbers18:2 Reehe andũ a nyũmba yanyu, nĩ o andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Lawi marutithanagie wĩra nawe, magũteithagĩrĩrie rĩrĩa wee na aariũ aaku mũratungata Hemainĩ ĩyo." 
Numbers18:3 Wĩra wao ũrĩkoragwo ũrĩ gũgũtungata o na kũmenyagĩrĩra Hema, no matikaanahuutanie na indo cia Handũ Harĩa Hatheru o na kana kĩgongoona. Mangĩgeeka ũguo, wee hamwe nao nĩmũgaakua." 
Numbers18:4 Marĩrutithanagia wĩra na inyuĩ makĩrutaga wĩra wothe ũrĩa ũmakoniĩ Hemainĩ. No mũndũ wa mũhĩrĩga ũngĩ ndakaanarutithanie wĩra na inyuĩ. 
Numbers18:5 Wee mwene na aariũ aaku-rĩ, mũrĩrutaga wĩra wothe ũrĩa ũkonainie na Handũ Harĩa Hatheru na kĩgongoona, nĩ geetha maraakara maakwa matikaanakinyĩre andũ a Isiraeli rĩngĩ." 
Numbers18:6 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, nĩ niĩ thuurĩĩte Alawii, andũ a nyũmba yanyu, kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli ngamaheana kũrĩ inyuĩ ta kĩheeo. Nĩndĩmaamũrĩĩte nĩ geetha matungatage Hemainĩ." 
Numbers18:7 No rĩĩrĩ, wee na aariũ aaku nĩ inyuĩ mũrĩrutaga wĩra wa ũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũrĩa ũkonainie na kĩgongoona o na Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno. Wĩra ũcio ũrĩkoragwo ũrĩ wanyu, tondũ nĩndĩmũheete kĩheeo kĩa ũthĩnjĩri Ngai. No mũndũ wa mũhĩrĩga ũngĩ ũrĩa ũgaakuhĩrĩria indo icio theru nĩakooragwo.”" 
Numbers18:8 MWATHANI agĩthiĩ na mbere akĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ, “Nĩndakũhe iheeo cia mwanya iria irutagwo nĩ andũ a Isiraeli, no magongoona ma njino itaanakũhe. Indo icio nĩwe na njiarwa ciaku ndahe hingo ciothe." 
Numbers18:9 Iheeo iria theru mũno irutagwo no iticinagwo kĩgongoonainĩ, nĩ ciaku. Iheeo icio nĩ: magongoona ma mũtu, magongoona ma meehia, na magongoona ma kũrĩhĩra meehia. Iheeo ciothe iria ndutagĩrwo irĩ iheeo theru nĩ ciaku na aariũ aaku." 
Numbers18:10 Iheeo icio irĩrĩagĩrwo Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno, na no arũme oiki mangĩcirĩa; mwagĩrĩirwo nĩkuonaga iheeo icio nĩ theru." 
Numbers18:11 “O na kĩheeo kĩngĩ o gĩothe kĩa mwanya andũ a Isiraeli mangĩndutĩra nĩ gĩaku. Ndakũhe wee mwene, aariũ aaku, na aarĩ aaku hingo ciothe. Mũndũ o wothe wa nyũmba yaku ũtarĩ na thaahu no akĩrĩe." 
Numbers18:12 “Maciaro moothe ma mbere marĩa meega mũno heagwo o mwaka nĩ Aisiraeli ma maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ, ndibei na ngano, nĩ we ndahe;" 
Numbers18:13 moothe nĩ maaku. Mũndũ o wothe wa mũciĩ waku ũtarĩ na thaahu no amarĩage. 
Numbers18:14 “Kĩndũ o gĩothe nyamũrĩirwo thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli na mwĩhĩtwa ũtangiugũkwo nĩ gĩaku. 
Numbers18:15 “Marigithaathi moothe ma andũ na ma nyamũ marĩa ndutagĩrwo nĩ Aisiraeli nĩ maaku. No rĩĩrĩ, nĩũrĩamũkagĩra irĩhi rĩa gũkũũra marigithaathi ma andũ na ma nyamũ iria irĩ thaahu kuuma kũrĩ eene mo." 
Numbers18:16 Na rĩĩrĩ, marigithaathi ma andũ marĩkũũragwo nĩ eene mo marĩ ma mweri ũmwe; marĩkũũragwo na icunjĩ ithaano cia betha, kũringana na gĩthimi kĩrĩa kĩiguanĩirwo." 
Numbers18:17 No rĩĩrĩ, marigithaathi ma ng'ombe, ng'ondu, na ma mbũri matirĩkũũragwo nĩ eene mo, nĩ matheru. Ũrĩminjaminjagĩria thakame yamo kĩgongoona igũrũ, namo maguta maamo ũkamacina na mwaki ta igongoona marĩ mũtararĩko mwega ũrĩa ũngenagia." 
Numbers18:18 Nyama ciamo nĩ ciaku, o ta ũrĩa gĩthũri na kũgũrũ kwa ũrĩo gwa thuutha kwa igongoona rĩa mwanya i ciaku." 
Numbers18:19 “Magongoona moothe ma mwanya marĩa andũ a Isiraeli mandutagĩra nĩ maaku wee mwene, aariũ aaku, na aarĩ aaku, hingo ciothe. Kĩu nĩ kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩtangĩgarũrwo ndathondeka nawe o hamwe na njiarwa ciaku.”" 
Numbers18:20 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ, “Wee ndũkaagĩa na igai, o na kana ũgae mũgũnda bũrũriinĩ ũcio. Niĩ nĩ niĩ igai rĩaku gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ a Isiraeli." 
Numbers18:21 “Nao Alawii nĩndamahe gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩrĩa ndutagĩrwo nĩ Aisiraeli. Rĩu nĩrĩo igai rĩao nĩ ũndũ wa gũtungata Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo. 
Numbers18:22 Andũ acio angĩ a Isiraeli matigaakuhagĩrĩrie Hema matikaae kwĩhia meyũragithie. 
Numbers18:23 Alawii nĩ o marĩmenyagĩrĩra Hema na nĩ o marĩcookagĩrĩrwo nĩ ũũru wothe wayo. Watho ũcio nĩ wa gũtũũra ũrũmagĩrĩrwo nĩ inyuĩ na njiarwa cianyu. Alawii matikaagĩa na igai gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ a Isiraeli," 
Numbers18:24 nĩ ũndũ nĩndĩmaheete gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩrĩa Aisiraeli mandutagĩra kĩrĩ kĩheeo kĩa mwanya. Nĩkĩo ndoigire nĩ ũndũ wao atĩ matikaagaĩrwo ithaka thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli.” 
Numbers18:25 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa 
Numbers18:26 eere Alawii atĩrĩ, “Mwanengerwo nĩ Aisiraeli gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩrĩa MWATHANI amũheete gĩtuĩke igai rĩanyu, mũrutagĩre MWATHANI gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kuuma harĩ kĩo kĩrĩ kĩheeo kĩa mwanya." 
Numbers18:27 Kĩheeo kĩu kĩa mwanya kĩrĩkoragwo gĩtariĩ ta igongoona rĩrĩa arĩmi marutaga rĩa ngano ya mũgethano na ndibei ya mũhihano. 
Numbers18:28 Ũguo nĩguo o na inyuĩ mũrĩrutagĩra MWATHANI kĩheeo kĩa mwanya kuuma harĩ icunjĩ ciothe cia ikũmi iria mũrĩnengagĩrwo nĩ Aisiraeli. Mũrĩnengagĩra Harũni mũthĩnjĩri Ngai kĩheeo kĩu kĩa mwanya. 
Numbers18:29 Mũrĩmũrutagĩra kuuma indoinĩ iria njega mũno mwanengerwo. 
Numbers18:30 Mwaruta gĩcunjĩ kĩrĩa kĩega mũno-rĩ, matigari mwĩigagĩre o ta ũrĩa mũrĩmi eigagĩra matigari arĩĩkia kũruta igongoona." 
Numbers18:31 Wee o hamwe na andũ a mũciĩ waku no mũrĩagĩre matigari o kũndũ guothe amu nĩ mũcaara wanyu nĩ ũndũ wa ũtungati wanyu hemainĩ. 
Numbers18:32 Mũtirĩkoragwo mwĩhĩĩtie mwacirĩa mwambĩĩte kũrutĩra MWATHANI gĩcunjĩ kĩrĩa kĩega mũno. No mũmenyerere mũtikaanathaahie iheeo icio theru cia Aisiraeli na ũndũ wa kũrĩa kĩndũ o na kĩmwe mbere ya kĩrĩa kĩega mũno kũrutĩrwo MWATHANI; mũngĩkaarĩa mbere nĩmũkooragwo.” 
Numbers19:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa na Harũni," 
Numbers19:2 mahe Aisiraeli mawatho maya. Meereei mamũreehere moori nduune ĩtarĩ na kaũũgũ kana karooro, na ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ yaguucia mũraaũ," 
Numbers19:3 mũmĩnengere Eleazaru mũthĩnjĩri Ngai. Moori ĩyo yumio nja ya kambĩ ĩthĩnjĩrwo ho we arĩ ho. 
Numbers19:4 Naake Eleazaru ooe thakame ĩmwe ya yo amĩminjaminje na kĩara maita mũgwanja mwena wa na mbere wa Hema. 
Numbers19:5 Nayo moori ĩyo yothe: rũũa, nyama, thakame, na mara icinwo mũthĩnjĩri Ngai akĩyonagĩra." 
Numbers19:6 Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio ooe ngũ cia mũtĩ wa mũtarakwa, mathangũ ma hithobu, na ndigi cia rangi mũtuune aciikie mwakiinĩ ũcio moori ĩyo ĩracinwo naguo." 
Numbers19:7 Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai acooke athambie nguo ciake, ethambe mwĩrĩ, acooke atoonye kambĩ. No rĩĩrĩ, egũikara e na thaahu nginya o hwaĩinĩ." 
Numbers19:8 O naake mũcini wa moori ĩyo athambie nguo ciake, ethambe mwĩrĩ, no aikare e na thaahu nginya o hwaĩinĩ." 
Numbers19:9 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ ũtarĩ na thaahu ahakũre mũhu wa moori ĩyo, athiĩ aũige handũ hatarĩ na thaahu nja ya kambĩ, aũigĩre mũingĩ wa Isiraeli ũrĩ wa kũhaarĩria maaĩ ma kũniina thaahu. Rĩu nĩrĩo igongoona rĩa kweheria meehia." 
Numbers19:10 Naake mũndũ ũrĩa ũkũhakũra mũhu wa moori ĩyo athambie nguo ciake, no aikare e na thaahu nginya o hwaĩinĩ. Watho ũcio ũtuĩke wa kũrũmagĩrĩrwo hingo ciothe nĩ Aisiraeli na andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa matũũranagia nao." 
Numbers19:11 “Mũndũ angĩhuutia kĩimba kĩa mũndũ arĩikaraga e na thaahu mĩthenya mũgwanja. 
Numbers19:12 Mũndũ ũcio arĩĩtheragia na maaĩ ma gwĩtheria mũthenyainĩ wa gatatũ na wa mũgwanja, thuutha ũcio agagĩtuĩka mũtheru. Angĩaga gwĩtheria mũthenya wa gatatũ na wa mũgwanja, ndarĩthiragwo nĩ thaahu ũcio." 
Numbers19:13 Mũndũ ũhuutĩĩtie kĩimba kĩa mũndũ akaaga gwĩtheria, arĩikaraga arĩ na thaahu tondũ ndaitĩrĩirio maaĩ ma gwĩtheria. No athaahie Hema ya MWATHANI, na aagĩrĩirwo no kũingatwo kuuma harĩ andũ a Ngai." 
Numbers19:14 “Mũndũ angĩkuĩra thĩinĩ wa hema, wothe wĩ thĩinĩ wa hema ĩyo, kana ũngĩtoonya kuo arĩikaraga arĩ na thaahu mĩthenya mũgwanja." 
Numbers19:15 Kĩndũ o gĩothe gĩ kũu thĩinĩ gĩtarĩ gĩkunĩke o nakĩo nĩkĩrĩnyiitagwo nĩ thaahu. 
Numbers19:16 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ o wothe e na kũu nja angĩhuutia mũndũ ũũragĩĩtwo kana ũkuĩte gĩkuũ kĩa ndũire, kana ahuutie ihĩndĩ rĩa mũndũ kana mbĩĩrĩra, arĩikaraga na thaahu mĩthenya mũgwanja." 
Numbers19:17 “Nĩ geetha mũndũ ũcio athaahũrwo, kũrĩrũmagwo mũhu wa moori ĩrĩa yacinirwo ya kweheria meehia, ũgeekĩrwo thĩinĩ wa kĩndũ ta mbakũri, ũgacooka ũkoongererwo maaĩ." 
Numbers19:18 Naake mũndũ ũtarĩ na thaahu akooya mathangũ ma hithobu, akamatobokia maaĩinĩ macio akaminjaminjĩria hema, o na indo ciothe i kũu hemainĩ. O na akaminjaminjĩria andũ arĩa moima kuo na mũndũ ũrĩa ũhuutĩĩtie ihĩndĩ rĩa mũndũ, kana mũndũ ũũragĩĩtwo, kana mũndũ ũkuĩte gĩkuũ kĩa ndũire, kana mbĩĩrĩra." 
Numbers19:19 Mũndũ ũtarĩ na thaahu arĩminjaminjagĩria maaĩ macio ũrĩa wĩ na thaahu mũthenya wa ĩtatũ na wa mũgwanja. Mũthenya wa mũgwanja akamũtheria biũ, naake mũndũ ũcio ũrĩ na thaahu agathambia nguo ciake, ageethamba mwĩrĩ, na hwaĩinĩ agathirwo nĩ thaahu." 
Numbers19:20 “Mũndũ ũnyiitĩĩtwo nĩ thaahu akaaga gwĩtheria arĩikaraga arĩ na thaahu, tondũ ndaitĩrĩirio maaĩ ma kũmũtheria. No athaahie Hema ya MWATHANI, na aagĩrĩirwo no kũingatwo kuuma harĩ andũ a Ngai." 
Numbers19:21 Mũgũtũũra mũrũmagĩrĩra watho ũcio matukũ moothe marĩa magooka. Na rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩminjaminjanagĩria maaĩ ma gũtherania, o naake nĩathambagie nguo ciake; mũndũ o wothe ũrĩhuutagia maaĩ macio arĩikaraga arĩ na thaahu nginya o hwaĩinĩ." 
Numbers19:22 Kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩrĩa mũndũ wĩ na thaahu angĩhuutia nĩkĩrĩnyiitagwo nĩ thaahu, na mũndũ ũngĩ o wothe ũngĩhuutia kĩndũ kĩu arĩikaraga na thaahu nginya o hwaĩinĩ.”" 
Numbers20:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, mweriinĩ wa mbere, mũingĩ wothe wa Isiraeli ũgĩkinya werũinĩ wa Zini, ũkĩamba hema Kadeshi, na wĩ kũu Miriamu agĩkua na agĩthikwo o kuo." 
Numbers20:2 Kũu maambire hema gũtiarĩ maaĩ, na kwoguo andũ makĩũngana harĩ Musa na Harũni" 
Numbers20:3 makĩambĩrĩria gũteta makiugaga atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kaba tũngĩakuanĩire na Aisiraeli arĩa angĩ mbere ya Hema ya MWATHANI." 
Numbers20:4 Mwatũreehire gũũkũ werũinĩ ũyũ tũkuĩre kuo na mahiũ maitũ? 
Numbers20:5 Nĩkĩ gĩatũmire mũtũrute Misiri mũtũreehe kũndũ gũũkũ gwa thĩĩna? Gũũkũ ti kũndũ kũngĩkũra kĩndũ ta ngano, ngũyũ, thabibũ, kana makongomanga, o na gũtirĩ maaĩ ma kũnyua!”" 
Numbers20:6 Musa na Harũni magĩkĩehera harĩ andũ magĩthiĩ makĩrũũgama mũromoinĩ wa Hema, magĩcooka makĩinamĩrĩra makĩhuutithia moothiũ maao thĩ. Naguo riiri wa MWATHANI ũkĩmoimĩrĩra." 
Numbers20:7 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ," 
Numbers20:8 “Oya mũthĩĩgi ũrĩa ũrĩ hau mbere ya Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro, ũcooke mwĩ na Harũni mũcookanĩrĩrie andũ hamwe. Ũrĩ hau mbere ya andũ oothe wĩre ihiga riume maaĩ. Na njĩra ĩyo ũkĩrute maaĩ ihigainĩ, andũ manyue o hamwe na mahiũ maao.”" 
Numbers20:9 Naake Musa agĩgĩthiĩ, akĩoya mũthĩĩgi o ta ũguo aathĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI." 
Numbers20:10 Musa na Harũni magĩcookanĩrĩria mũingĩ wothe hau hakuhĩ na ihiga, naake Musa akĩwĩra atĩrĩ, “Tathikĩrĩriai inyuĩ akararia aya! Atĩrĩĩrĩ, no mũhaka tũmũrutĩre maaĩ kuuma ihigainĩ rĩĩrĩ?”" 
Numbers20:11 Musa agĩcooka akĩoya mũthĩĩgi ũrĩa na igũrũ akĩgũtha ihiga naguo maita meerĩ, narĩo rĩkiuma maaĩ maingĩ, nao andũ na mahiũ moothe makĩnyua." 
Numbers20:12 No rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa na Harũni atĩrĩ, “Tondũ mũtiinanjĩtĩkia nĩguo muonie andũ a Isiraeli atĩ ndĩ mũtheru, mũtikũmatongoria nginya bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa ndameerĩire.”" 
Numbers20:13 Ũndũ ũcio wekĩkĩire Meriba, kũrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maatetirie MWATHANI, naake akĩmoonia atĩ nĩ mũtheru." 
Numbers20:14 Na rĩĩrĩ, me Kadeshi Musa agĩtũma anjaama kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Edomu makamwĩre atĩrĩ, “Ĩno nĩ ndũmĩrĩri kuuma kũrĩ andũ aanyu a mũhĩrĩga wa Isiraeli. Atĩrĩĩrĩ, wee nĩũũĩ ũrĩa tũnyamaarĩkĩĩte," 
Numbers20:15 na ũrĩa maithe maitũ maathiire Misiri, na tũgĩgĩtũũra kuo ihinda iraaya. Andũ a Misiri nĩmaatwĩkire maũndũ mooru o ta ũria meekire maithe maitũ." 
Numbers20:16 Nĩtwagĩkaĩire MWATHANI atũteithie, naake agĩtũigua. Agĩgĩtũtũmĩra mũraika ũrĩa watũtongoririe, agĩtũruta Misiri. Rĩu twĩ gũũkũ Kadeshi, itũũra rĩrĩa rĩrĩ mũhakainĩ wa bũrũri waku." 
Numbers20:17 Ndagũthaitha twĩtĩkĩrie tũtuĩkanĩrie bũrũri waku. Tũtigũkĩrĩra mĩgũndainĩ kana kũrĩa kwĩ mĩthabibũ, o na tũtikũnyua maaĩ ma ithima cianyu. Tũkũgerera barabara nene nginya tũkoima bũrũri waku.”" 
Numbers20:18 No andũ a Edomu makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mũtigũtuĩkanĩria bũrũri witũ! Wona mwageria gwĩka ũguo, tũkũmũũkĩrĩra tũmũhũũre.”" 
Numbers20:19 Nao Aisiraeli makĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ tũkũgerera o ro barabara ĩrĩa nene tu. Ithuĩ kana mahiũ maitũ tũngĩnyua maaĩ maanyu, nĩtũkũmũrĩha. Kĩrĩa ithuĩ tũrenda no gũtuĩkania.”" 
Numbers20:20 Nao andũ a Edomu makĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Mũtigũtuĩkanĩria gũũkũ.” Makiumagara na ita rĩa andũ aingĩ na rĩ na hinya gũtharĩkĩra andũ a Isiraeli." 
Numbers20:21 Tondũ andũ a Edomu nĩmaagiririe Aisiraeli matuĩkanĩrie bũrũri wao, Aisiraeli magĩkĩgerera njĩra ĩngĩ." 
Numbers20:22 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũingĩ wothe wa Isiraeli nĩwoimire Kadeshi, ũgĩthiĩ ũgĩkinya kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Hori," 
Numbers20:23 mũhakainĩ wa Edomu. Me kũu MWATHANI akĩarĩria Musa na Harũni akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Numbers20:24 “Harũni ndegũtoonya bũrũri ũrĩa ndeerĩire Aisiraeli, nĩegũkua tondũ inyuerĩ nĩmwangararirie mwĩ Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Oya Harũni na mũũrũwe Eleazaru wambate nao kĩrĩma igũrũ kĩa Hori. 
Numbers20:26 Mwĩ kũu kĩrĩmainĩ ũrute Harũni nguo ciake cia ũthĩnjĩri Ngai, ũciĩkĩre mũũrũwe Eleazaru. Harũni egũkuĩra kũu kĩrĩmainĩ.”" 
Numbers20:27 Musa agĩgĩĩka ũguo eerirwo nĩ MWATHANI; magĩkĩambata kĩrĩma kĩa Hori, andũ oothe mameroreire." 
Numbers20:28 Musa akĩruta Harũni nguo ciake cia ũthĩnjĩri Ngai, agĩciĩkĩra Eleazaru. Harũni agĩgĩkuĩra kũu kĩrĩma igũrũ, naake Musa na Eleazaru makĩharũrũka." 
Numbers20:29 Nao andũ oothe a Isiraeli maamenya atĩ Harũni nĩ mũkuũ, makĩmũcakaĩra matukũ mĩrongo ĩtatũ." 
Numbers21:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Mũkanaani warĩ Mũthamaki wa Aradi, watũũraga werũinĩ wĩ mwena wa na kĩanda, aigua atĩ Aisiraeli maagereire njĩra ya Atharimu, akĩmookĩrĩra agĩtaha amwe aao." 
Numbers21:2 Nao Aisiraeli makĩĩhĩta makĩĩra MWATHANI atĩrĩ, “Watũhotithia kũhoota andũ a matũũra maya, tũkũmaananga biũ o hamwe na andũ oothe a mo, tuonanie nĩtwakwamũrĩra.”" 
Numbers21:3 MWATHANI agĩkĩmaigua, akĩmahotithia kũhoota andũ a Kanaani. Aisiraeli magĩkĩmananga biũ o hamwe na matũũra maao. Nĩkĩo handũ hau haatuirwo Horoma." 
Numbers21:4 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩkiuma kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Hori magĩthiĩ na njĩra ĩrĩa yerekeire Iria Ituune, nĩguo mathiũrũrũke bũrũri wa Edomu. No rĩĩrĩ andũ nĩmaaremirwo nĩgũkirĩrĩria," 
Numbers21:5 magĩkĩambĩrĩria gũtetia Ngai hamwe na Musa makiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ gĩatũmire mũtũrute bũrũri wa Misiri, mũtũreehe tũkuĩre gũũkũ werũinĩ kũndũ gũtarĩ irio kana maaĩ? Tũtingĩhota kũũmĩrĩria kũrĩa rĩngĩ irio ici itarĩ kĩene.”" 
Numbers21:6 Na rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI agĩkĩreehithĩria andũ acio nyoka i na thumu na andũ aingĩ a Isiraeli makĩrũmwo nĩcio magĩkua." 
Numbers21:7 Andũ magĩgĩũka kũrĩ Musa makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũreehirie rĩrĩa tũratetirie MWATHANI o hamwe nawe. Gĩthaithe MWATHANI eeherie nyoka ici. Kwoguo Musa akĩmathaithanĩrĩra.”" 
Numbers21:8 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa athondeke nyoka ĩkũhenia amĩĩkĩre gĩtugĩ igũrũ, nĩ geetha mũndũ o wothe warũmwo nĩ nyoka, amĩcũũthĩrĩria akahona." 
Numbers21:9 Musa agĩgĩthondeka nyoka ya gĩcango, akĩmĩĩkĩra gĩtugĩ igũrũ, naake mũndũ o wothe warũmwo nĩ nyoka, acũũthĩrĩria nyoka ĩyo ya gĩcango akahona." 
Numbers21:10 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ a Isiraeli nĩmaathiire na mbere, makinya Obothu magĩaka kambĩ." 
Numbers21:11 Moima kũu Obothu magĩthiĩ na mbere, makinya maganjo ma Abarimu, marĩa marĩ werũinĩ ũrĩa wĩ mwena wa irathĩro wa bũrũri wa Amoabi, magĩaka kambĩ kuo." 
Numbers21:12 Moima kũu magĩthiĩ nginya gĩtuambainĩ gĩa Zeredi magĩaka kambĩ kuo. 
Numbers21:13 Kuuma kũu magĩthiĩ magĩaka kambĩ mwena wa na rũgongo wa rũũĩ rwa Arinoni, rũrĩa rũrĩ werũinĩ ũrĩa ũthiĩte nginya mũhakainĩ wa Aamori. (Rũũĩ rwa Arinoni nĩruo rwarĩ mũhaka wa Amoabi na Aamori.)" 
Numbers21:14 Nĩkĩo kwandĩkĩĩtwo Ibukuinĩ rĩa Mbaara cia MWATHANI atĩrĩ, “... itũũra rĩa Wahebu thĩinĩ wa Sufa, na ituamba; rũũĩ rwa Arinoni," 
Numbers21:15 na kĩharũrũka kĩa ituamba iria ithiĩte kuuma itũũra rĩa Ari, nginya mũhakainĩ wa Amoabi.”" 
Numbers21:16 Moima kũu magĩthiĩ nginya kũndũ gwetagwo Ithima, kũrĩa MWATHANI eerire Musa atĩrĩ, “Cookanĩrĩria andũ hamwe ndĩmahe maaĩ.”" 
Numbers21:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Aisiraeli makĩina rwĩmbo rũũrũ:“Wee gĩthima gĩĩkĩ therũka; na nĩtũkũmakũngũĩra na rwĩmbo. 
Numbers21:18 Gĩthima kĩrĩa kĩenjirwo nĩ anene o hamwe na atongoria a andũ, magĩgĩthikũria na mĩthĩĩgi yao na thanju ciao.”Magĩgĩthiĩ na mbere makiuma kũu werũinĩ magĩkinya Matana;" 
Numbers21:19 moima kũu magĩthiĩ nginya Nahalieli moima Nahalieli magĩthiĩ Bamothi," 
Numbers21:20 na moima Bamothi magĩthiĩ gĩtuamba kĩrĩa kĩrĩ bũrũri wa Amoabi mũhuro wa kĩrĩma kĩa Pisiga, kĩrĩa kĩroreete werũinĩ." 
Numbers21:21 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩtũma anjaama kũrĩ mũthamaki Sihoni wa Aamori makamwĩre atĩrĩ;" 
Numbers21:22 “Twĩtĩkĩrie tũtuĩkanĩrie bũrũriinĩ waku; tũtikũgerera mĩgũndainĩ kana kũrĩa kwĩ mĩthabibũ, o na tũtikũnyua maaĩ ithimainĩ cianyu tũkũgerera o barabarainĩ ĩrĩa nene o nginya tũkoima bũrũriinĩ waku.”" 
Numbers21:23 No mũthamaki Sihoni akĩgiria andũ a Isiraeli kũhĩtũkĩra bũrũriinĩ wake. Agĩgĩcookanĩrĩria thigari ciake ciothe agĩcitwara Jahazu werũinĩ, agĩũkĩrĩra Aisiraeli." 
Numbers21:24 No rĩĩrĩ, Aisiraeli makĩũragĩra Aamori aingĩ mbaarainĩ ĩyo, na makĩmatuunya bũrũri wao kuuma rũũĩ rwa Arinoni mwena wa na rũgongo nginya rũũĩ rwa Jaboku, ũguo nĩkuuga nginya kwa Aamoni, amu mũhaka wa Aamoni warĩ mũrangĩre na hinya mũno." 
Numbers21:25 Kwoguo andũ a Isiraeli magĩkĩĩnyiitĩra matũũra moothe ma Aamori, o nginya itũũra rĩa Heshiboni na matũũra marĩa marĩthiũrũkiĩirie, magĩtũũra kuo." 
Numbers21:26 Heshiboni nĩrĩo rĩarĩ itũũra rĩrĩa inene rĩa mũthamaki Sihoni wa Aamori, ũrĩa warũĩte na mũthamaki wa mbere wa Moabi akĩmũtuunya bũrũri wake wothe o nginya rũũĩinĩ rwa Arinoni." 
Numbers21:27 Kwoguo nĩkĩo aini mainaga atĩrĩ,“Ũkaai Heshiboni, itũũra inene rĩa mũthamaki Sihoni! Itũũra rĩu rĩa Sihoni nĩrĩakwo rĩngĩ na rĩĩkĩrwo hinya." 
Numbers21:28 Amu thigari cia Sihoni nĩcioimire itũũra rĩa Heshiboni ihaana ta mwaki, ikĩananga Ari itũũra rĩa Moabi na ikĩharagania irĩma cia Arinoni ya na rũgongo." 
Numbers21:29 Kaĩ inyuĩ Amoabi mwĩ thĩĩna-ĩ! Inyuĩ arĩa mũthaathayagia Kemoshu nĩmũniinĩĩtwo! Ngai ĩyo yanyu nĩtũmĩĩte arũme moorĩre kwene, Nao atumia matahwo nĩ Sihoni, mũthamaki wa Aamori." 
Numbers21:30 Njiarwa ciao nĩiniinĩĩtwo, kuuma itũũra rĩa Heshiboni nginya Diboni, kuuma itũũra rĩa Nashimu nginya Nofa gũkuhĩ na Medeba.”" 
Numbers21:31 Kwoguo Aisiraeli magĩtũũra bũrũri wa Aamori. 
Numbers21:32 Naake Musa agĩtũma andũ magathigaane itũũra rĩa Jazeri. Aisiraeli magĩthiĩ makĩrĩnyiita o hamwe na matũũra marĩa marĩthiũrũkĩirie, na makĩingata Aamori arĩa maatũũraga kuo." 
Numbers21:33 Na rĩĩrĩ, Aisiraeli makĩhũndũka magĩthiĩ na barabara ya gũthiĩ Bashani, naake mũthamaki Ogu wa Bashani akiumagara na mbũtũ ciake akamatharĩkĩre me Edirei." 
Numbers21:34 No MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Ndũkaae kũmwĩtigĩra, nĩngũkũhotithia kũmũhoota, o hamwe na andũ aake oothe, na bũrũri wake. Ũkũmwĩka o ta ũrĩa wekire Sihoni mũthamaki wa Aamori, ũrĩa wathanaga Heshiboni.”" 
Numbers21:35 Kwoguo Aisiraeli makĩũraga Ogu, aariũ aake, na andũ aake oothe; gũtirĩ mũndũ maatigaririe, magĩcooka magĩtũũra bũrũri ũcio wake." 
Numbers22:1 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩthiĩ na mbere, na maakinya gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Moabi, mwena wa irathĩro wa rũũĩ rwa Jorodani, mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa Jeriko, magĩaka kambĩ kuo." 
Numbers22:2 Na rĩĩrĩ, Balaki mũrũ wa Ziporu, mũthamaki wa Amoabi, aigua ũrĩa Aisiraeli meekĩĩte Aamori, na ũrĩa Aisiraeli maarĩ aingĩ," 
Numbers22:3 we na andũ aake oothe magĩĩtigĩra. 
Numbers22:4 Amoabi makĩĩra atongoria a Amidiani atĩrĩ, “Mũingĩ ũyũ nĩũkũniina indo ciothe iria itũthiũrũrũkĩirie, o ta ũrĩa ndeegwa ĩniinaga nyeki mĩgũndainĩ.” Kwoguo mũthamaki Balaki mũrũ wa Ziporu" 
Numbers22:5 agĩtũma anjaama kũrĩ Balaamu mũrũ wa Beori, ũrĩa hĩndĩ ĩyo warĩ Pethoru, gũkuhĩ na rũũĩ rwa Farati bũrũriinĩ wa Amawi, akeerwo atĩrĩ, “Ngwenda gũkũmenyithia atĩ harĩ rũũrĩrĩ rũgima ruumĩĩte bũrũri wa Misiri; nĩ andũ aingĩ mũno, na marenda gũtũtũũnya bũrũri witũ." 
Numbers22:6 Ũka ũnumĩre andũ aya amu marĩ na hinya kũngĩra. Ũngĩĩka ũguo, hiihi ndahota kũmahoota na ndĩkĩmarutũrũre kuuma bũrũriinĩ. Niĩ nĩnjũũĩ atĩ mũndũ ũrĩa waraathima, nĩaraathimagwo, na ũrĩa waruma, nĩanyiitagwo nĩ kĩrumi.”" 
Numbers22:7 Kwoguo atongoria a Amoabi na a Amidiani magĩkuua mbeeca cia kũmũhe nĩguo arumane, magĩthiĩ kwĩ Balaamu makĩmũhe ndũmĩrĩri ya Balaki." 
Numbers22:8 Balaamu akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Raaraai gũũkũ, na rũũciũ nĩngaamwĩra ũrĩa MWATHANI ekũnjĩĩra.” Nao anene acio a Amoabi magĩkĩraarania na Balaamu." 
Numbers22:9 Na rĩĩrĩ, ũtukũ ũcio Ngai akĩũria Balaamu atĩrĩ, “Andũ aya maraarĩrĩire gwaku nĩ a?”" 
Numbers22:10 Naake Balaamu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Balaki mũrũ wa Ziporu, mũthamaki wa Amoabi, nĩwe ũmatũmĩĩte mooke maanjĩĩre" 
Numbers22:11 atĩ harĩ andũ mookĩĩte kuuma bũrũri wa Misiri, na nĩ aingĩ mũno. Arenda ngamarume nĩguo amahũũre amaingate kũu.”" 
Numbers22:12 Naake Ngai akĩĩra Balaamu atĩrĩ, “Ndũgaathiĩ nao; ndũkaarume andũ a Isiraeli amu nĩaraathime.”" 
Numbers22:13 Kwarooka gũkĩa Balaamu agĩthiĩ kũrĩ anene acio maatũmĩĩtwo nĩ Balaki akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Cookaai bũrũriinĩ wanyu amu MWATHANI nĩangirĩĩtie tũthiĩ na inyuĩ.”" 
Numbers22:14 Nao magĩgĩcooka kwao makĩĩra Balaki atĩ Balaamu nĩarega gũũka nao. 
Numbers22:15 O rĩngĩ Balaki agĩtũma atongoria aingĩ makĩria, na maheetwo gĩtĩĩo gũkĩra a mbere." 
Numbers22:16 Magĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ Balaamu makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “ Balaki arakwĩra ũũ: Ndagũthaitha hatikaagĩe ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ wa gũkũgirĩrĩria gũũka kũrĩ niĩ!" 
Numbers22:17 Nĩngũkũhe kĩheeo kĩnene, na njĩke ũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũkũnjĩĩra. Ndagũthaitha ũka ũnumĩre andũ aya!”" 
Numbers22:18 No Balaamu agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “O na Balaki angĩĩhe mũciĩ wake ũiyũrĩĩte betha na thahabu, ndingĩregana na uuge wa MWATHANI Ngai wakwa, ndingĩwongerera kana ndĩũnyiihanyiihie." 
Numbers22:19 No rĩĩrĩ, ndamũthaitha raarĩrĩraai gũũkũ o na inyuĩ, nĩguo menye kana harĩ ũndũ ũngĩ MWATHANI ekũnjĩĩra.”" 
Numbers22:20 Naake Ngai akĩĩra Balaamu ũtukũ atĩrĩ, “Angĩkorwo andũ aya nĩ we maiyĩrĩĩte, ũkĩra ũthiĩ nao, no rĩĩrĩ, wĩke o ro ũrĩa ngũkwĩra.”" 
Numbers22:21 Kwarooka gũkĩa, Balaamu akĩhaarĩria ndigiri yake, agĩthiĩ na atongoria a Amoabi." 
Numbers22:22 No rĩĩrĩ, Ngai akĩraakara nĩ ũndũ wa Balaamu gũthiĩ. Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa aathiaga ahaicĩĩte ndigiri atwaranĩĩte na ndungata ciake igĩrĩ, mũraika wa MWATHANI akĩrũũgama njĩrainĩ amũrigĩrĩrie gũthiĩ." 
Numbers22:23 Rĩrĩa ndigiri yonire mũraika wa MWATHANI arũũgamĩĩte njĩrainĩ anyiitĩĩte rũhiũ rwa njora, ĩkiuma njĩrainĩ ĩgĩtoonya mũgũnda. Naake Balaamu akĩhũũra ndigiri akĩmĩcookia njĩrainĩ." 
Numbers22:24 Ningĩ mũraika akĩrũũgama harĩa njĩra yacekeheire gatagatĩinĩ ka mĩgũnda ĩĩrĩ ya mĩthabibũ, na o mũgũnda warĩ na rũthingo rwa mahiga." 
Numbers22:25 Rĩrĩa ndigiri yonire mũraika ĩkĩĩgiritania na rũthingo, ĩkĩhinyanĩrĩria kũgũrũ kwa Balaamu na rũthingo. Naake Balaamu akĩmĩgũtha rĩngĩ." 
Numbers22:26 Ningĩ mũraika wa MWATHANI agĩthiĩ mbere, akĩrũũgama handũ haceke hataarĩ handũ hangĩhĩtũkĩrwo." 
Numbers22:27 Hĩndĩ ĩyo, ndigiri yona mũraika wa MWATHANI, ĩgĩkoma. Balaamu agĩkĩraakara, akĩmĩgũtha na rũthanju rwake." 
Numbers22:28 Naake MWATHANI akĩhe ndigiri ũhoti wa kwaria, nayo ĩkĩũria Balaamu atĩrĩ, “Nĩ atĩa ngwĩkĩĩte? Wangũtha maita macio matatũ nĩkĩ?”" 
Numbers22:29 Naake Balaamu akĩmĩcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ tondũ nĩũnduĩte kĩrimũ! Korwo nyuma na rũhiũ rwa njora, no gũkũũraga ingĩakũũraga.”" 
Numbers22:30 Nayo ndigiri ĩkĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Githĩ to niĩ ndigiri ĩrĩa ĩtũire ĩgũkuuaga ũtũũro waku wothe? Ndĩndagwĩka ũũ?”Naake Balaamu agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Aaca.”" 
Numbers22:31 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI agĩkĩhingũra Balaamu maitho, akĩona mũraika arũũgamĩĩte njĩrainĩ anyiitĩĩte rũhiũ rwake rwa njora; Balaamu agĩgĩkoma na nda." 
Numbers22:32 Naake mũraika wa MWATHANI akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wagũtha ndigiri yaku maita macio matatũ nĩkĩ? Njũkĩĩte gũkũrigĩrĩria ndũgaathiĩ, amu ndwagĩrĩirwo nĩgũthiĩ rũgendo rũũrũ." 
Numbers22:33 Ndigiri yaku nĩĩnyonire, na yanjeherera maita macio matatũ. Korwo ndĩnanjeherera, nĩingĩkũũragĩĩte ngatiga ndigiri ĩ muoyo.”" 
Numbers22:34 Naake Balaamu agĩcookeria mũraika wa MWATHANI atĩrĩ, “Nĩnjĩhĩĩtie nĩ ũndũ ndikũũĩ atĩ ũrũũgamĩĩte njĩrainĩ ũndigĩrĩrie ndigaathiĩ; rĩu-rĩ, angĩkorwo nĩũkuona arĩ mahĩtia niĩ thiĩ, nĩngũcooka mũciĩ.”" 
Numbers22:35 Naake mũraika wa MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Thiĩ na andũ aya, no ũkwaria o ũhoro ũrĩa ngũkwĩra wiki.” Kwoguo Balaamu agĩgĩthiĩ nao." 
Numbers22:36 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa Balaki aiguire atĩ Balaamu nĩarooka, agĩthiĩ kũmũtũnga itũũrainĩ rĩa Ari rĩrĩa rĩrĩ hakuhĩ na rũũĩ rwa Arinoni mũhakainĩ wa Moabi." 
Numbers22:37 Balaki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ndagũtũmanĩra rĩa mbere waregire gũũka nĩkĩ? Weciiragia atĩ ndingĩhota gũkũhe iheeo cia kũigana?”" 
Numbers22:38 Naake Balaamu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Githĩ ndiagĩũka? No ndirĩ na hinya o na haniini wa kuuga ũndũ. Ũhoro ũrĩa Ngai ekũnjĩĩra njuge, noguo ngwaria.”" 
Numbers22:39 Balaamu agĩgĩthiĩ na Balaki itũũrainĩ rĩa Huzothu," 
Numbers22:40 kũrĩa Balaki aathĩnjire ndeegwa, mbũri na ng'ondu akĩhe Balaamu na atongoria arĩa maarĩ naake nyama imwe." 
Numbers22:41 Kwarooka gũkĩa, Balaki akĩambatia Balaamu nginya Bamothi Baali, kũrĩa Balaamu angĩahotire kuona andũ amwe a Isiraeli." 
Numbers23:1 Balaamu agĩkĩĩra Balaki atĩrĩ, “Njakĩra igongoona mũgwanja haaha, na ũndeehere ndeegwa mũgwanja na ndũrũme mũgwanja.”" 
Numbers23:2 Naake Balaki agĩgĩĩka o ũguo eerirwo, na o kĩgongoonainĩ Balaki na Balaamu makĩruta igongoona rĩa ndeegwa ĩmwe na ndũrũme ĩmwe." 
Numbers23:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Balaamu akĩĩra Balaki atĩrĩ, “Rũũgama haaha hakuhĩ na igongoona rĩaku rĩa njino, na niĩ thiĩ ngarore hiihi kana MWATHANI nĩekũndũnga, na ũrĩa wothe ekũmenyithia nĩngũkwĩra.” Agĩgĩthiĩ arĩ wiki kĩrĩma igũrũ," 
Numbers23:4 naake Ngai akĩmũtũnga. Balaamu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩnjakĩĩte igongoona mũgwanja, na o kĩgongoonainĩ ngaruta igongoona rĩa ndeegwa ĩmwe na ndũrũme ĩmwe.”" 
Numbers23:5 MWATHANI akĩĩra Balaamu ũrĩa egũthiĩ kuuga, agĩkĩmwĩra acooke kũrĩ Balaki akamũhe ndũmĩrĩri yake." 
Numbers23:6 Agĩgĩcooka, agĩkora Balaki arũũgamĩĩte hakuhĩ na igongoona rĩake rĩa njino e hamwe na atongoria oothe a Moabi." 
Numbers23:7 Balaamu agĩkĩratha atĩrĩ: “Balaki mũthamaki wa Amoabi, nĩandeehithĩĩtie kuuma Siria, irĩmainĩ cia mwena wa irathĩro.Anjĩĩrĩĩte atĩrĩ, ‘Ũka ũnumĩre andũ a Jakubu, ũka wĩhĩre Aisiraeli.’" 
Numbers23:8 Mũndũ ũtarumĩĩtwo nĩ Ngai-rĩ, niĩ ingĩkĩmũruma atĩa?Mũndũ ũteehĩirwo nĩ MWATHANI, niĩ ingĩmwĩhĩra atĩa?" 
Numbers23:9 Nĩndĩramoona ndĩ ndwaro cia mahiga igũrũ Nĩndĩramacũũthĩrĩria ndĩ irĩma igũrũ. Acio nĩ rũũrĩrĩ rwĩtindĩĩtie.Nĩ rũũrĩrĩ rũũĩ atĩ nĩrũraathime gũkĩra ndũũrĩrĩ iria ingĩ. 
Numbers23:10 Andũ a rũciaro rwa Isiraeli nĩ aingĩ o ta rũkũngũ. Nĩ aingĩ mũno matingĩtarĩka. Nĩndekwo ngue ta ũmwe wa andũ aya a Ngai.Ndekwo ngue na thaayũ ta mũndũ mũthingu.” 
Numbers23:11 Balaki agĩkĩĩra Balaamu atĩrĩ, “Nĩ atĩa ũguo wanjĩka? Ndĩrakũreehire gũũkũ ũnumĩre thũ ciakwa, no ũrĩa wee weka nĩgũciraathima waciraathima.”" 
Numbers23:12 Naake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Niĩ no njugire o ũrĩa MWATHANI anjĩĩrĩĩte njuge.”" 
Numbers23:13 Balaki agĩcooka akĩĩra Balaamu atĩrĩ, “Ũka tũthiĩ nawe handũ hangĩ harĩa ũngĩonera Aisiraeli amwe ũkĩmarumĩre ho.”" 
Numbers23:14 Agĩkĩmũtwara mũgũndainĩ wa Zofimu kĩrĩma igũrũ kĩa Pisiga. O na kũu agĩaka igongoona mũgwanja, na o kĩgongoonainĩ akĩruta igongoona rĩa ndeegwa ĩmwe na ndũrũme ĩmwe." 
Numbers23:15 Naake Balaamu akĩĩra Balaki atĩrĩ, “Rũũgama haaha hakuhĩ na igongoona rĩaku rĩa njino, na niĩ thiĩ ngatũnge MWATHANI haarĩa.”" 
Numbers23:16 MWATHANI agĩgĩtũnga Balaamu, akĩmwĩra ũrĩa egũthiĩ kuuga, agĩkĩmwĩra acooke harĩ Balaki akamũhe ndũmĩrĩri yake." 
Numbers23:17 Agĩgĩcooka harĩ Balaki, akĩmũkora o arũũgamĩĩte igongoonainĩ rĩake rĩa njino e hamwe na atongoria a Amoabi. Balaki akĩmũũria ũrĩa MWATHANI oiga." 
Numbers23:18 Naake Balaamu akĩratha atĩrĩ:“Balaki mũũru wa Ziporu, ũka ũigue; thikĩrĩria ũrĩa nguuga." 
Numbers23:19 Ngai-rĩ, ti mũndũ nĩguo aheenanie, ti mũndũ atĩ nĩguo ericũkwo.Ũrĩa eeranĩra nĩahingagia, ũrĩa oiga nĩwĩkagwo." 
Numbers23:20 Niĩ-rĩ, njathĩĩtwo ndaathimane, na Ngai araathimana, niĩ ndingĩhota kũgarũra." 
Numbers23:21 Ngai ndarĩ ũũru ooneete harĩ Jakubu; kana akoona thĩĩna harĩ Isiraeli.MWATHANI Ngai wao arĩ hamwe nao, ũcio nĩ we moimbũraga atĩ nĩ mũthamaki wao." 
Numbers23:22 Ngai nĩamarutĩĩte Misiri; amarũagĩrĩra o ta ndeegwa ya gĩthaka. 
Numbers23:23 Amu gũtirĩ ũhoro wa mĩthaiga kana wa ũragũri ũngĩhũthĩrwo gũthũũkia andũ a Isiraeli. Andũ mekuuga ũhoro wa Aisiraeli atĩrĩ, ‘Tarora ũrĩa Ngai eekĩĩte!’" 
Numbers23:24 Rũũrĩrĩ rwa Isiraeli rũtariĩ ta mũrũũthi; ndũhuurũkaga ũtarĩ ũranyiita na ũkarĩa, na ũkanyua thakame ya kĩrĩa woraga.”" 
Numbers23:25 Balaki agĩkĩĩra Balaamu atĩrĩ, “Warega kũruma andũ aya a Isiraeli, o na kũmaraathima ndũkaamaraathime!”" 
Numbers23:26 No Balaamu akĩĩra Balaki atĩrĩ, “Githĩ ndiakwĩra atĩ no mũhaka njĩke ũrĩa wothe MWATHANI anjĩĩrire?”" 
Numbers23:27 Balaki agĩkĩĩra Balaamu atĩrĩ, “Ũka ngũtware handũ hangĩ, hiihi Ngai nĩegũgwĩtĩkĩria ũrumĩre Aisiraeli ho.”" 
Numbers23:28 Agĩkĩoya Balaamu akĩmũtwara kĩrĩma igũrũ kĩa Peori kĩrĩa kĩng'etheire werũ. 
Numbers23:29 Balaamu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Njakĩra igongoona mũgwanja haaha na ũndeehere ndeegwa mũgwanja na ndũrũme mũgwanja.”" 
Numbers23:30 Balaki agĩgĩĩka ũrĩa eerirwo nĩ Balaamu, na agĩkĩruta o kĩgongoonainĩ ndeegwa ĩmwe na ndũrũme ĩmwe." 
Numbers24:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Balaamu nĩamenyeete atĩ MWATHANI eendaga araathime andũ a Isiraeli na kwoguo ndagĩthiire gũtuĩria ũhoro ta mahinda macio mangĩ ma mbere. Agĩkĩhũgũka na werũinĩ" 
Numbers24:2 agĩcũũthĩrĩria akĩona andũ a Isiraeli maambĩĩte hema kũringana na mĩhĩrĩga yao. Na rĩĩrĩ, akĩiyũrwo nĩ roho wa Ngai," 
Numbers24:3 akĩambĩrĩria kũratha ta ũũ:“Ndũmĩrĩri ya Balaamu mũrũ wa Beori, ũhoro wa mũndũ ũroona wega," 
Numbers24:4 ũraigua ũrĩa Ngai aroiga.Ngũũrĩĩte maitho, nĩndĩroona kĩoneki, kĩoneki kĩrĩa kiumĩĩte kũrĩ Mwene Hinya Wothe." 
Numbers24:5 Kaĩ hema cia Aisiraeli nĩ thaka-ĩ! 
Numbers24:6 Ihaana ta ituamba ciaraganĩĩte kũndũ kũraaya, ta mĩgũnda ĩrĩ ndeereinĩ cia rũũĩ, ta mĩtĩ ya thubiri ĩhandĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI, kana ta mĩtĩ ya mĩtarakwa ĩrĩ hũgũrũrũinĩ cia rũũĩ." 
Numbers24:7 Marĩkoragwo na mbura nyingĩ, mahandage irio ciao mĩgũnda ĩrĩ na maaĩ ma kũigana.Mũthamaki wao egũkorwo arĩ mũnene gũkĩra Agagi; ũthamaki wake ũgũtamba kũndũ kũnene mũno." 
Numbers24:8 Ngai nĩ we wamarutire Misiri, amarũagĩrĩra o ta ndeegwa ya gĩthaka, akaniina thũ ciao, akamemenda mahĩndĩ maacio, na agaciratha na mĩguĩ yake." 
Numbers24:9 Rũũrĩrĩ rũu rũhaana ta mũrũũthi; Rĩrĩa ũkomeete gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩthengerera kũũkĩria.Ũrĩa wothe ũraathimaga Aisiraeli nĩarĩraathimagwo, na ũrĩa wothe ũrumaga Aisiraeli nĩarĩrumagwo.”" 
Numbers24:10 Balaki akĩraakario mũno nĩ Balaamu, agĩkũnja ngundi akĩĩra Balaamu atĩrĩ, “Ndĩragwĩtire ũũke ũrume thũ ciakwa, no handũ ha ũguo ũciraathimĩĩte maita matatũ!" 
Numbers24:11 Rĩu inũka! Nĩndakwĩrĩire kĩheeo, no MWATHANI nĩatũma ngũime kĩheeo kĩu.”" 
Numbers24:12 Naake Balaamu agĩcookeria Balaki atĩrĩ, “Ndeerire anjaama arĩa wandũmĩire atĩ" 
Numbers24:13 o na ũngĩhe betha na thahabu ciothe iria irĩ mũciĩ gwaku ndingĩregana na uuge wa MWATHANI na ũndũ wa gwĩka wendi wakwa niĩ mwene. Niĩ ndĩriugaga o ũrĩa MWATHANI anjĩĩra njuge.” 
Numbers24:14 Na rĩĩrĩ, Balaamu agĩkĩĩra Balaki atĩrĩ, “Rĩu nĩngũcooka kũrĩ andũ aitũ, no itaanathiĩ nĩngũkũmenyithia ũrĩa andũ a Isiraeli mageeka andũ aanyu.”" 
Numbers24:15 Agĩkĩratha atĩrĩ,“Ndũmĩrĩri ya Balaamu mũrũ wa Beori, ũhoro wa mũndũ ũrona wega," 
Numbers24:16 ũraigua ũrĩa Ngai aroiga, Na ũramũkĩra ũũgĩ ũrĩa uumaga kũrĩ Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno.Ngũũrĩĩte maitho nĩndĩroona kĩoneki kĩoneki kĩrĩa kiumĩĩte kũrĩ Mwene Hinya Wothe." 
Numbers24:17 Nĩndĩroona matukũ marĩa magooka, na nĩndĩroona rũũrĩrĩ rwa Aisiraeli. Mũthamaki ũtariĩ ta njata ĩkengeete nĩakoima rũciaroinĩ rũu.Mũthĩĩgi wa ũnene nĩũkoima nyũmba ya Isiraeli, nĩakaahoota atongoria a Amoabi na ahũũre andũ oothe a mũhĩrĩga wa Sethu." 
Numbers24:18 Nĩakaahoota thũ ciake iria irĩ Edomu naguo bũrũri wao ũtuĩke wake, o Aisiraeli magĩthiaga na mbere na ũhootani." 
Numbers24:19 Rũũrĩrĩ rwa Isiraeli nĩrũkaamarangĩrĩria, na rũniinũkie andũ arĩa magaakorwo matigarĩĩte.”" 
Numbers24:20 Ningĩ o kĩonekiinĩ gĩake Balaamu akĩona Aamaleki na akĩratha atĩrĩ,“Aamaleki nĩ o andũ a rũũrĩrĩ rũrĩa rwarĩ hinya mũno, no mũthiainĩ nĩrũgaathira nginya tene na tene.”" 
Numbers24:21 Kĩonekiinĩ gĩake nĩonire Akeni, agĩkĩratha atĩrĩ,“Gĩikaro kĩrĩa ũikarĩĩte nĩkĩgitĩre, gĩtirĩ ũgwatiinĩ; kĩhaana o ta gĩtara kĩa nyoni kĩ handũ igũrũ rwaroinĩ rwa ihiga," 
Numbers24:22 no inyuĩ Akeni nĩmũkaaniinwo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Aasiria makaamũtaha.” 
Numbers24:23 Ningĩ Balaamu akĩratha atĩrĩ,“Andũ aya macookanĩrĩire mwena wa na rũgongo nĩ a?" 
Numbers24:24 Andũ a gũtharĩkĩra nĩmagooka kuuma Kuporo, nĩmakaahoota Aasiria na Eberi, no o nao nĩmagaathira biũ.”" 
Numbers24:25 Balaamu agĩcooka akĩĩhaarĩria akĩinũka, naake Balaki agĩĩthiĩra." 
Numbers25:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Aisiraeli maaka kambĩ yao gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Mĩgaa, arũme a Isiraeli nĩmaambĩrĩirie gũkoma na atumia Amoabi arĩa maarĩ kũu." 
Numbers25:2 Atumia acio nĩmaameetĩire ndĩa magongoonainĩ kũrĩa ngai ya Amoabi yathaathayagĩrio. Aisiraeli magĩgĩthiĩ makĩrĩa, na magĩthaathaiya ngai ĩyo yetagwo" 
Numbers25:3 Baali ya Peori. MWATHANI akĩraakario nĩ Aisiraeli," 
Numbers25:4 agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, “Oya atongoria oothe a andũ a Isiraeli ũmoorage mũthenya barigici mbere ya MWATHANI, na nĩngũgĩtiga kũraakarĩra Aisiraeli.”" 
Numbers25:5 Musa agĩkĩĩra atongoria a Aisiraeli atĩrĩ, “O mũndũ mũhĩrĩgainĩ wake nĩorage mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũtuĩkĩĩte wa gũthaathaiya Baali ya Peori.”" 
Numbers25:6 Na rĩĩrĩ, Mũisiraeli ũmwe nĩatwarire mũndũ wa nja Mũmidiani hemainĩ yake, Musa hamwe na andũ oothe mamwĩroreire, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maacakayagĩra mũromoinĩ wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo." 
Numbers25:7 Rĩrĩa Finehasi mũrũ wa Eleazaru na mũcũkũrũ wa Harũni ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri Ngai oonire ũguo, agĩũkĩra agĩtiga andũ oothe. Akĩoya itimũ," 
Numbers25:8 akĩrũmĩrĩra mũndũ ũcio na mũndũ wa nja ũcio nginya hemainĩ, akĩmatheeca narĩo eerĩ. Naguo mũthiro ũrĩa waniinaga Aisiraeli ũkĩniinwo." 
Numbers25:9 No rĩĩrĩ, mũthiro nĩwakoreetwo ũũragĩĩte andũ ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na inya (24,000)." 
Numbers25:10 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ," 
Numbers25:11 “Finehasi nĩatũmĩĩte ndige kũraakarĩra andũ a Isiraeli nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo eekire. Nĩaregire kũũmĩrĩria gũthaathaiyo kwa ngai ĩngĩ tiga niĩ, na nĩkĩo nyiitire maraakara maakwa ndaaga kũmaniina." 
Numbers25:12 Kĩmwĩre nĩndarĩĩkanĩra naake kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩa thaayũ. 
Numbers25:13 We o hamwe na njiarwa ciake megũtũũra marĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai nginya tene, amu nĩaregire kũũmĩrĩria kuona ngĩigananio na ngai ingĩ, na agĩtũma andũ a Isiraeli mooherwo meehia maao.”" 
Numbers25:14 Mũisiraeli ũrĩa woragirwo na mũndũ wa nja Mũmidiani eetagwo Zimiri mũrũ wa Salu, na arĩ mũtongoria wa nyũmba ĩmwe ya mũhĩrĩga wa Simeoni." 
Numbers25:15 Naake mũndũ wa nja Mũmidiani ũrĩa woragirwo eetagwo Kozibi mwarĩ wa Zuru, ithe aarĩ mũtongoria wa mbarĩ ĩmwe ya Midiani." 
Numbers25:16 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ," 
Numbers25:17 “Tharĩkĩra Amidiani ũmaniine 
Numbers25:18 nĩ ũndũ wa ũũru ũrĩa maamwĩkire rĩrĩa maamũheenirie mũrĩ Peori, o na nĩ ũndũ wa Kozibi, ũrĩa woragĩirwo Peori hĩndĩ ya mũthiro.”" 
Numbers26:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, thuutha wa mũthiro, MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa na Eleazaru mũrũ wa Harũni mũthĩnjĩri Ngai atĩrĩ," 
Numbers26:2 “Taraai mũingĩ wothe wa Isiraeli kũringana na nyũmba cia maithe. Taraai arũme oothe arĩa marĩ na mĩaka kuuma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ gũthiĩ na igũrũ, arĩa mangĩhota gũthiĩ mbaara.”" 
Numbers26:3 (3-4) Nao Musa na Eleazaru magĩathĩkĩra uuge wa MWATHANI, magĩgĩĩta andũ oothe a mĩaka ĩyo hamwe. Makĩmacookanĩrĩria werũinĩ wa Moabi, mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa rũũĩ rwa Jorodani kũng'ethanĩra na Jeriko.Aya nĩ o andũ a Isiraeli arĩa moimire Misiri:" 
Numbers26:4 Mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni (Reubeni nĩ we warĩ mũrũ wa Jakubu ũrĩa irigithaathi): mbarĩ ya Hanoku na mbarĩ ya Palu," 
Numbers26:5 na mbarĩ ya Hezironi, na mbarĩ ya Karimi." 
Numbers26:6 Acio nĩ o maarĩ a mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni, na oothe maarĩ andũ ngiri mĩrongo ĩna na ithatũ, na magana mũgwanja na mĩrongo ĩtatũ. (43,730)." 
Numbers26:7 Njiarwa cia Palu ciarĩ Eliabu 
Numbers26:8 na aariũ aake Nemueli, Dathani, na Abiramu. (Dathani na Abiramu nĩ o maathuurĩĩtwo nĩ mũingĩ. Nĩ o maakararirie Musa na Harũni na makĩnyiitanĩra na Kora na arũmĩrĩri aake kũremera MWATHANI." 
Numbers26:9 Thĩ yathamirie kanua kaayo ĩkĩmameranĩria hamwe na Kora na arũmĩrĩri aake, nao arũme magana meerĩ na mĩrongo ĩtaano makĩniinwo nĩ mwaki, magĩtuĩka kĩmenyithia gĩa gũkaania andũ arĩa angĩ." 
Numbers26:10 No rĩĩrĩ, aariũ a Kora matioragirwo.)" 
Numbers26:11 Mũhĩrĩga wa Simeoni: mbarĩ ya Nemueli, Jamini, Jakini" 
Numbers26:12 Zera, na ya Shaulu." 
Numbers26:13 Andũ oothe a mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Simeoni maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ na magana meerĩ. (22,200)" 
Numbers26:14 Mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi: mbarĩ ya Zefoni, Hagi, Shuni," 
Numbers26:15 Ozini, Eri," 
Numbers26:16 Arodi, na ya Areli." 
Numbers26:17 Andũ oothe a mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩna na magana mataano. (40,500)" 
Numbers26:18 (19-21) Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Juda: mbarĩ ya Shela, Perezu, Zera, Hezironi, na ya Hamuli. (Aariũ eerĩ a Juda nĩ o Eri na Onani maakuĩrĩire bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani.)" 
Numbers26:19 Andũ oothe a mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Juda maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo mũgwanja na ithathatũ na magana mataano. (76,500)" 
Numbers26:20 Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru: mbarĩ ya Tola, Puva," 
Numbers26:21 Jashubu, na ya Shimuroni." 
Numbers26:22 Andũ oothe a mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na inya na magana matatũ. (64,300)" 
Numbers26:23 Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Zebuluni: mbarĩ ya Seredi, Eloni, na ya Jahaleeli." 
Numbers26:24 Andũ oothe a mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Zebuluni maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na magana mataano. (60,500)" 
Numbers26:25 Andũ a mĩhĩrĩga ya Josefu maarĩ a kuuma harĩ aariũ aake eerĩ Manase na Efiraimu. 
Numbers26:26 Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Manase: mũũriũ wa Manase wetagwo Makiru ũrĩa warĩ ithe wa Gileadi. Nacio nyũmba cia Gileadi irũmanĩrĩire ta ũũ: 
Numbers26:27 nyũmba ya Ezeri, Heleku,"
