2Kings22:13 “Thiĩi mũgatuĩrie ũhoro handũinĩ haakwa na ha andũ oothe a Juda, ũkoniĩ ciugo ciothe cia ibuku rĩĩrĩ rĩoneetwo. MWATHANI nĩaraakarĩĩtio mũno nĩ ithuĩ, tondũ maithe maitũ matiigana gwathĩkĩra watho wa ibuku rĩĩrĩ o na kana kũũhingia.”" 
2Kings22:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Hilikia, Ahikamu, Akiboru, na Shafani, na Asaia magĩthiĩ gũtwĩria ũhoro kwĩ Hulida, mũtumia mũnabii watũũraga kũndũ gwakĩĩtwo ica ikuhĩ kũu Jerusalemu. (Mũthuuriwe eetagwo Shalumu mũrũ wa Tikiva na mũcũkũrũ wa Harihasi na nĩwe wamenyagĩrĩra nguo cia Hekaarũ.) Nao magĩkĩhe mũtumia ũcio ũhoro wothe." 
2Kings22:15 Naake akĩmeera macooke kwĩ mũthamaki makamũhe 
2Kings22:16 ndũmĩrĩri ĩno kuuma kwĩ MWATHANI: “Nĩndĩhaarĩirie kũherithia Jerusalemu o hamwe na atũũri a kuo, o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩĩtwo ibukuinĩ rĩu mũthamaki aathoomeirwo." 
2Kings22:17 Andũ acio nĩmandiganĩirie na makarutĩra ngai ingĩ magongoona, na ũndũ ũcio meekĩĩte ũkandaakaria mũno. Maraakara marĩa ndaakarĩire Jerusalemu matingĩhoreka." 
2Kings22:18 Naake mũthamaki we mwene thiĩi mũmwĩre ũũ nĩguo niĩ MWATHANI wa Isiraeli ndoiga: Atĩrĩĩrĩ, tondũ nĩũthikĩrĩirie ciugo cia ibuku rĩu," 
2Kings22:19 waciigua werira na wenyiihia mbere yakwa, wĩ na maithori maingĩ watembũranga nguo ciaku waigua ũrĩa ndĩhaarĩirie gwĩka Jerusalemu na andũ a kuo, kũndũ gũũkũ ngũgũtua gwa kũguoyohithia, kũndũ andũ marĩgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩakuo makĩrumana. No o na gwatuĩka nĩ ũguo-rĩ, nĩndaigua ihooya rĩaku." 
2Kings22:20 Ngaaherithia Jerusalemu thuutha wa gũkua gwaku; wee-rĩ, ũgaakua na thaayũ.” Nao andũ acio magĩcookeria mũthamaki Josia ndũmĩrĩri ĩyo." 
2Kings23:1 Naake mũthamaki Josia agĩcookanĩrĩria hamwe atongoria oothe a Juda o na a Jerusalemu. 
2Kings23:2 Agĩcooka akĩmatongoria, magĩtoonya Hekaarũinĩ, na magĩtwarana na athĩnjĩri Ngai, anabii, na andũ oothe anene na aniini. Naake mũthamaki akĩmathoomera maũndũ moothe ta ũrĩa maandĩkĩĩtwo ibukuinĩ rĩa kĩrĩĩkanĩro rĩrĩa rĩoneetwo Hekaarũinĩ." 
2Kings23:3 Naake akĩrũũgama harĩa aamenyereete gũikara, agĩthondeka kĩrĩĩkanĩro na MWATHANI gĩa atĩ nĩarĩmwathĩkagĩra, na nĩarĩmenyagĩrĩra maathani, na mawatho maake na ngoro yake yothe o na muoyo wake wothe. Na ningĩ nĩarĩhingagia maũndũ moothe ma kĩrĩĩkanĩro ta ũrĩa maandĩkĩĩtwo ibukuinĩ rĩu. Nao andũ oothe magĩtua atĩ o nao nĩmarĩathĩkagĩra kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩu." 
2Kings23:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki Josia agĩatha Hilikia Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene, o na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa maamũteithagĩrĩria, o na aikaria a mũrango wa gũtoonya Hekaarũinĩ, marute na nja indo ciothe iria ciahũthagĩrwo hĩndĩ ya gũthaathaiya Baali, o na ngai ĩrĩa yetagwo Ashera, o na njata. Mũthamaki agĩcinĩra indo icio ciothe nja ya itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu hakuhĩ na gĩtuamba gĩa Kidironi, na agĩtwarithia mũhu ũcio itũũrainĩ rĩa Betheli." 
2Kings23:5 Ningĩ athĩnjĩri ngai arĩa maathuurĩĩtwo nĩ athamaki a Juda makũrutagĩra mĩhianano magongoona kũndũ gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa gwathaathayagĩrio mĩhianano, o kũu matũũrainĩ ma Juda na kũrĩa gwakuhĩhĩirie Jerusalemu, akĩmatigithia mawĩra macio. Ningĩ arĩa maarutaga magongoona kũrĩ Baali, riũa, mweri, na njata, o na mbũtũ yothe ya igũrũ, o nao akĩmatigithia mawĩra macio." 
2Kings23:6 Ningĩ mũhianano wa ngai ĩrĩa yetagwo Ashera akĩũruta kuuma Hekaarũinĩ, agĩthiĩ akĩũcinĩra na kũu nja ya itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu hakuhĩ na gĩtuamba gĩa karũũĩ ga Kidironi, akĩũhũũrahũũra, akĩũthĩa ũgĩtuĩka mũhu, akĩminjaminja mũhu ũcio mbĩĩrĩrainĩ kũrĩa andũ maathikagwo." 
2Kings23:7 Nacio nyũmba iria ciaikaragwo nĩ maraaya kũu hekaarũinĩ agĩcitharia. (Kũu nĩkuo atumia maatumagĩra nguo ndaaya iria ciehumbagwo hĩndĩ ya gũthaathaiya Ashera.) 
2Kings23:8 Naake akĩgĩĩra athĩnjĩri Ngai oothe arĩa maatũũraga Juda guothe akĩmareehe Jerusalemu, o na agĩthaahia kũndũ gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa maarutagĩra magongoona, kuuma Geba nginya Beerisheba. Ningĩ agĩcooka akĩmomoranga kũndũ gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa kwarutagĩrwo magongoona, kũrĩa kwarĩ mwena wa ũmotho mũndũ agĩtoonya itũũra, hakuhĩ na mũrango wa kĩhingo kĩa Joshua mũnene wa itũũra." 
2Kings23:8 Naake akĩgĩĩra athĩnjĩri Ngai oothe arĩa maatũũraga Juda guothe akĩmareehe Jerusalemu, o na agĩthaahia kũndũ gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa maarutagĩra magongoona, kuuma Geba nginya Beerisheba. Ningĩ agĩcooka akĩmomoranga kũndũ gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa kwarutagĩrwo magongoona, kũrĩa kwarĩ mwena wa ũmotho mũndũ agĩtoonya itũũra, hakuhĩ na mũrango wa kĩhingo kĩa Joshua mũnene wa itũũra." 
2Kings23:9 Na rĩĩrĩ, athĩnjĩri Ngai acio matietĩkagĩrio kũruta magongoona kũu Jerusalemu Hekaarũinĩ, no nĩmaarĩyanagĩra na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa angĩ mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ mĩimbie." 
2Kings23:10 Ningĩ mũthamaki Josia agĩthaahia Tofethi kũndũ kũrĩa gwathaathayagĩrio mĩhianano kũu gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Hinomu, nĩ geetha mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ndakaanarutĩre ngai yetagwo Moleku mwana wake igongoona rĩa njino." 
2Kings23:11 Thuutha ũcio agĩcooka akĩeheria mbarathi iria ciamũrĩirwo riũa nĩ athamaki a Juda, na agĩcina ngaari cia mbarathi icio na mwaki. (Icio ciaigagwo gĩthakuinĩ kĩa hekaarũ hakuhĩ na kĩhingo kĩrĩa kĩarigainie na kanyũmba ka Nathani Meleku, mũnjaama ũrĩa wamũteithagĩrĩria gwathana.)" 
2Kings23:12 Ningĩ Josia agĩtharia igongoona iria athamaki a Juda, maakĩĩte igũrũ wa kanyũmba karĩa kaarĩ igũrũ wa nyũmba ya mũthamaki Ahazu, o na agĩtharia igongoona iria mũthamaki Manase aakĩĩte hau nja cierĩ cia Hekaarũ. Agĩciunanga tũcunjĩ tũcunjĩ agĩthiĩ agĩtũikia karũũĩ ga Kidironi." 
2Kings23:13 Ningĩ mũthamaki Josia agĩthaahia kũndũ gũtũũgĩru gwa gũthaathaĩria kũrĩa gwakĩĩtwo nĩ mũthamaki Solomoni mwena wa irathĩro wa Jerusalemu, kwerekera kĩanda kĩa kĩrĩma kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ. Kũndũ kũu nĩkuo Solomoni aakĩire Ashitorathu ngai ya Asidoni, Kemoshu ngai ya Amoabi, o na Moleku ngai ya Aamoni, ngai icio agĩcithũũkangia na agĩcigwatia thaahu." 
2Kings23:14 Nacio itugĩ cia kũhooywo agĩciunanga tũcunjĩ tũcunjĩ, na agĩtemenga mũhianano wa ngai ĩrĩa yetagwo Ashera, nakuo kũndũ kũu yarĩ akĩaragania mahĩndĩ ma andũ kuo." 
2Kings23:15 Ningĩ Josia agĩcooka akĩmomoranga kũndũ gũtũũgĩru gwa gũthaathaĩria kũrĩa Jeroboamu mũrũ wa Nebati, ũrĩa watũmire Aisiraeli meehie, aakĩĩte. Ningĩ akiunanga kĩgongoona o na akĩhũũrahũũra mahiga maakuo magĩtuĩka umbuthĩ, na agĩcina mũhianano wa ngai ĩrĩa yetagwo Ashera." 
2Kings23:16 Na rĩĩrĩ, Josia eehũgũra akĩona mbĩĩrĩra kũu kĩrĩmainĩ, agĩathana mahĩndĩ moimbũrio kuuma mbĩĩrĩrainĩ icio, akĩmacinĩra kĩgongoona igũrũ. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, agĩgĩthaahia kĩgongoona kĩu o ta ũrĩa mũnabii oigĩĩte o tene hingo ya thigũkũ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jeroboamu aarũngiĩ hakuhĩ na kĩgongoona. Mũthamaki Josia aaroranga akĩona mbĩĩrĩra ya mũnabii ũrĩa warĩĩtie maũndũ macio." 
2Kings23:17 Ningĩ agĩcooka akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Mbĩĩrĩra ĩĩrĩa ndĩroona nĩ ya ũ?”Nao andũ a itũũra rĩu rĩa Betheli makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ mbĩĩrĩra ya Mũnabii ũrĩa woimĩĩte Juda akĩaria ũhoro wa maũndũ maya wĩkĩĩte kĩgongoona gĩĩkĩ.”" 
2Kings23:18 Naake Josia akiuga atĩrĩ, “Tiganaai na mbĩĩrĩra ĩyo; mahĩndĩ maake rekeei maikare.” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mahĩndĩ maake o na ma mũnabii ũrĩa woimĩĩte Samaria magĩtiganwo namo." 
2Kings23:19 Ningĩ Josia akĩmomoranga kũndũ gũtũũgĩru gwa gũthaathaĩria matũũrainĩ moothe ma Isiraeli kũrĩa athamaki a Isiraeli maakĩĩte, makaraakaria MWATHANI. Eekire kũndũ kũu gũtũũgĩru gwa gũthaathaĩria o ta ũrĩa eekĩĩte Betheli." 
2Kings23:20 Agĩcooka akĩũragĩra athĩnjĩri ngai oothe a kũndũ gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa gwathaathayagĩrio mĩhianano igongoonainĩ igũrũ iria maatungatagĩra, na agĩcinĩra mahĩndĩ o hau igũrũ wacio. Thuutha wa ũguo agĩcooka Jerusalemu." 
2Kings23:21 Naake mũthamaki Josia agĩatha andũ oothe makũngũĩre thigũkũ ya Bathaka, nĩ ũndũ wa gũtũũgĩria MWATHANI Ngai wao o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩĩtwo ibukuinĩ rĩa kĩrĩĩkanĩro." 
2Kings23:22 Na rĩĩrĩ, kuuma o matukũinĩ ma rĩrĩa atiirĩrĩri bũrũri maaciiragĩra andũ a Isiraeli-rĩ, gũtiakorirwo kũgĩĩte mũthamaki o na ũmwe thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli kana Juda wahotete gũthondekithia thigũkũ ya Bathaka ta ĩyo." 
2Kings23:23 Nayo thigũkũ ĩyo ya Bathaka ĩgĩkũngũĩrwo kũu Jerusalemu mwaka wa ikũmi na ĩnaana wa ũthamaki wa Josia. 
2Kings23:24 Ningĩ mũthamaki Josia akĩeheria ago na ooni maũndũ oothe, ngai cia mĩhianano iria andũ maigĩĩte nyũmbainĩ ciao, mĩhianano yothe ya kũhooywo, o na indo iria ingĩ ciothe cionagwo irĩ magigi kũu itũũrainĩ rĩa Jerusalemu na bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Juda. Ũndũ ũcio aawĩkire nĩ geetha eekĩre hinya ciugo cia watho wa ibuku rĩrĩa Hilikia mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ooneete Hekaarũinĩ." 
2Kings23:25 Na rĩĩrĩ, gũtiakoreetwo na mũthamaki ũngĩ mbere ĩyo, wahoteete gũtungatĩra MWATHANI taake na ngoro yake yothe, o na muoyo wake wothe, o na hinya wake wothe, o ta ũrĩa Watho wa Musa woigĩĩte. O na ningĩ gũtiacookire kuoneka ũngĩ taake thuutha wake." 
2Kings23:26 No rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI ndaigana gũtigana na maraakara maake megwakana ta mwaki, marĩa aatũire araakarĩire Juda nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa Manase aamũthirĩkĩĩtie akamũraakaria." 
2Kings23:27 Naake MWATHANI akiuga atĩrĩ, “Andũ a Juda nĩkũmeeheria ngũmeeheria ndige gũcooka kũmoona, o ta ũrĩa ndeekire andũ a Isiraeli. Ningĩ o narĩo itũũra rĩĩrĩ rĩa Jerusalemu, rĩrĩa ndathuurire o hamwe na Hekaarũ, ĩrĩa ndoigire nĩkuo ndĩrĩthaathayagĩrio nĩngũcitiganĩria.”" 
2Kings23:28 Na rĩĩrĩ, maũndũ marĩa mangĩ Josia eekire, maandĩkĩĩtwo Ibukuinĩ rĩa Hisitoria ya Athamaki a Juda." 
2Kings23:29 Na rĩĩrĩ, matukũinĩ ma ũthamaki wa Josia nĩrĩo Neko mũthamaki wa Misiri oimagarire agĩthiĩ rũũĩinĩ rwa Farati nĩguo agateithĩrĩrie mũthamaki wa Asiria. Naake mũthamaki Josia akiumagara nĩguo akahũũrane na mũthamaki wa Misiri, naake Neko akĩmũũragĩra o kũu Megido." 
2Kings23:30 Nacio njaama ciake igĩkuua mwĩrĩ wake na ngaari ya mbarathi kuuma Megido igĩthiĩ, ikĩmũthika mbĩĩrĩrainĩ cia athamaki a Jerusalemu.Nao andũ a Juda magĩthuura Joahazu mũrũ wa Josia, makĩmũitĩrĩria maguta, agĩtuĩka mũthamaki." 
2Kings23:31 Na rĩĩrĩ, Joahazu aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka Juda arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtatũ, naake agĩthamaka mĩeri ĩtatũ e Jerusalemu. Nyina eetagwo Hamutali, mwarĩ wa Jeremia woimĩĩte Libina." 
2Kings23:32 Naake agĩĩka maũndũ maingĩ mataakenagia MWATHANI o ta marĩa meekĩĩtwo nĩ maithe maake marĩa ma tene. 
2Kings23:33 Na rĩĩrĩ, Neko mũthamaki wa Misiri akĩnyiita Joahazu mũgwate, akĩmũhingĩrithia Ribila bũrũriinĩ wa Hamathu, na kĩo gĩĩko kĩu gĩgĩkinyia ũthamaki wake mũthia. Ningĩ agĩtuĩra andũ a Juda igooti rĩa kiro ngiri ithatũ cia magana mana (3,400) cia betha na kiro mĩrongo ĩtatũ na inya cia thahabu." 
2Kings23:34 Naake mũthamaki Neko agĩtua Eliakimu, mũrũ wa Josia, mũthamaki wa Juda ithenya rĩa ithe, na akĩmũgarũrĩra rĩĩtwa akĩmwĩta Jehoiakimu. Naake Neko agĩtwara Joahazu Misiri kũrĩa aakuĩrĩirie." 
2Kings23:35 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthamaki Jehoiakimu akĩũngania igooti kuuma kũrĩ andũ a bũrũri wake nĩ geetha ahote kũrĩha mũthamaki wa Misiri kĩrĩa eendaga. O mũndũ aarutaga igooti kũringana na ũtonga wake." 
2Kings23:36 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jehoiakimu aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka Juda arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtaano, naake agĩthamaka mĩaka ikũmi na ũmwe e Jerusalemu. Nyina eetagwo Zebida mwarĩ wa Pedaia woimĩĩte itũũra rĩa Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Naake agĩĩka maũndũ maingĩ mooru marĩa mataakenagia MWATHANI o ta marĩa meekĩĩtwo nĩ maithe maake ma tene. 
2Kings24:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, o Jehoiakimu agĩthamakaga-rĩ, Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babilonia agĩtharĩkĩra Juda, na handũ ha mĩaka ĩtatũ Jehoiakimu agĩtũũra amũtungatagĩra, na thuutha ũcio akĩmũkararia akĩmũremera." 
2Kings24:2 Naake MWATHANI akĩrekia mbũtũ cia Ababilonia, cia andũ a Siria, cia Amoabi, na cia Aamoni ikahũũre bũrũri wa Juda iwanange o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI oigĩĩte na kanua ka anabii ndungata ciake nĩageeka." 
2Kings24:3 Ũndũ ũcio wothe wekĩkire, o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI oigĩĩte, tondũ ndeendaga kuona Juda maithoinĩ maake, nĩ ũndũ wa meehia moothe marĩa Manase eekĩĩte;" 
2Kings24:4 o na nĩ ũndũ wa andũ matarĩ na ũũru arĩa ooragithĩĩtie. MWATHANI ndangĩoheire Manase meehia macio eekĩĩte. 
2Kings24:5 Na rĩĩrĩ, maũndũ marĩa mangĩ Jehoiakimu eekire maandĩkĩĩtwo Ibukuinĩ rĩa Hisitoria ya Athamaki a Juda." 
2Kings24:6 Naake Jehoakimu akua, Jehoiakini agĩthamaka ithenya rĩake." 
2Kings24:7 Naake mũthamaki wa Misiri ndaigana kuuma bũrũriinĩ wake rĩngĩ, tondũ naake mũthamaki wa Babilonia nĩehĩmbĩirie bũrũri wothe ũrĩa warĩ wa Misiri, kuuma rũũĩinĩ rwa Farati, o nginya mũhakainĩ wa na rũgongo wa Misiri." 
2Kings24:8 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jehoiakini aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka aarĩ wa mĩaka ikũmi na ĩnaana, naake agĩthamaka mĩeri ĩtatũ kũu Jerusalemu. Nyina eetagwo Nehushita, mwarĩ wa Elinathani woimĩĩte Jerusalemu." 
2Kings24:9 Naake agĩĩka maũndũ maingĩ marĩa mataakenagia MWATHANI, o ta marĩa meekĩĩtwo nĩ ithe." 
2Kings24:10 Na rĩĩrĩ, matukũinĩ macio, mbũtũ cia ita cia Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babilonia igĩthiĩ igĩtharĩkĩra itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu ikĩrĩthiũrũrũkĩria." 
2Kings24:11 Rĩarĩĩkia gũthiũrũrũkĩrio, Nebukadinezaru agĩũka kuo," 
2Kings24:12 naake mũthamaki Jehoiakini, nyina, ciana ciake, njaama ciake, na atongoria aake, makĩĩneana kũrĩ njaama cia mũthamaki wa Ababilonia. Nebukadinezaru aathamaka mĩaka ĩnaana, akĩohithia Jehoiakini." 
2Kings24:13 Ningĩ agĩcooka agĩkuuithia mũthiithũ wothe ũrĩa warĩ Hekaarũinĩ, o na nyũmbainĩ ya mũthamaki, akĩũtwarithia Babilonia. Nacio indo ciothe cia thahabu iria Solomoni aathondekithĩĩtie cia gũtũmĩrwo Hekaarũinĩ, agĩciũraganga tũcunjĩ tũcunjĩ, o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI oigĩĩte." 
2Kings24:14 Ningĩ agĩcooka agĩthaamithia andũ oothe a Jerusalemu, atongoria oothe a kwa mũthamaki, o na andũ oothe a bata kũu bũrũriinĩ. Mũigana wa andũ acio oothe maathaamirio maarĩ ngiri ikũmi (10,000). Namo mabundi moothe, aturi a indo cia cuuma, akĩmathaamithia oothe, agĩtigia kũu bũrũri ũcio wa Juda o andũ arĩa athĩĩni." 
2Kings24:15 Nebukadinezaru agĩgĩtwara Jehoiakini hamwe na nyina, atumia aake, njaama ciake, o na andũ oothe a bata a Juda, marĩ mĩgwate Babiloni." 
2Kings24:16 Naake Nebukadinezaru agĩthaamithia andũ oothe a bata ngiri mũgwanja (7,000) akĩmatwara Babiloni, na mabundi na aturi a indo cia cuuma ngiri ĩmwe (1,000), na oothe maarĩ andũ mangĩathiire ita." 
2Kings24:17 Thuutha ũcio Nebukadinezaru agĩtua Matania mũthamaki wa Juda ithenya rĩa Jehoiakini ithe mũnyiinyi, na akĩmũgarũrĩra rĩĩtwa akĩmwĩta Zedekia." 
2Kings24:18 Na rĩĩrĩ, Zedekia aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ũmwe, naake agĩthamaka mĩaka ikũmi na ũmwe kũu Jerusalemu. Nyina eetagwo Hamutali mwarĩ wa Jeremia woimĩĩte itũũra rĩa Libina." 
2Kings24:19 Naake Zedekia agĩĩka maũndũ maingĩ mooru akĩhĩtĩria MWATHANI, o ta ũrĩa mũthamaki Jehoiakimu eekĩĩte." 
2Kings24:20 Naake MWATHANI akĩraakario mũno nĩ andũ a Jerusalemu na a Juda, o nginya akĩmaingata atige gũcooka kũmoona rĩngĩ." 
2Kings25:1 Naake Zedekia akĩremera Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babilonia. Kwoguo mũthenya wa ikũmi wa mweri wa ikũmi wa mwaka wa kenda wa ũthamaki wa Zedekia, Nebukadinezaru agĩũka na mbũtũ yake yothe ya ita, agĩtharĩkĩra itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu. Agĩthiũrũrũkĩria itũũra rĩu na akĩrĩakĩrĩra na ngathĩ cia kũrĩtharĩkĩra." 
2Kings25:2 Itũũra rĩu rĩgĩgĩtũũra rĩthiũrũrũkĩirio ũguo o nginya mwaka wa ikũmi na ũmwe wa ũthamaki wa Zedekia. 
2Kings25:3 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya wa kenda wa mweri wa kana wa mwaka ũcio, ng'aragu ĩgĩkorwo ĩcacĩĩte kũu itũũrainĩ ũguo atĩ gũtiarĩ o na kĩ andũ mangĩarĩire." 
2Kings25:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo rũthingo rwa itũũra rũgĩtũrĩkio mwanya wa gũtoonyerwo, nacio thigari ciothe ikĩũra kũrĩ o ũtukũ. Ikĩũra igereire mũgũnda wa mũthamaki ikiumĩra kĩhingo kĩrĩa kĩanyiitithanĩĩtie thingo iria igĩrĩ. Ikĩũra iroreete na gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Jorodani, o na gũtuĩka Ababilonia no maarigiicĩirie itũũra." 
2Kings25:5 No rĩĩrĩ, mbũtũ cia ita cia Ababilonia igĩteng'eria mũthamaki Zedekia, ikĩmũkinyĩrĩra rũũĩinĩ rũrĩa rwĩ hakuhĩ na Jeriko, nacio thigari ciake ciothe ikĩmũtiganĩria ikiũra." 
2Kings25:6 Nacio mbũtũ icio cia ita cia Ababilonia, ikĩnyiita mũthamaki Zedekia ikĩmutwarĩra mũthamaki Nebukadinezaru ũrĩa warĩ itũũrainĩ rĩa Ribila; naake akĩmũtuĩra arĩ o kũu." 
2Kings25:7 Nao makĩũraga aariũ a Zedekia o akĩonaga, naake we mwene makĩmũkũũra maitho, makĩmuoha na bĩngũ makĩmũtwara Babiloni." 
2Kings25:8 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya wa mũgwanja mweri wa gataano mwaka wa ikũmi na kenda wa ũthamaki wa Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babilonia, Nebuzaradani mũnene wa mbũtũ ciake cia ita, na ndungata ya mũthamaki, agĩũka Jerusalemu." 
2Kings25:9 Naake agĩcina Hekaarũ, o na nyũmba ya mũthamaki, o na nyũmba ciothe cia andũ a bata kũu Jerusalemu." 
2Kings25:10 Nacio thigari ciake ikĩmomoranga thingo ciothe cia itũũra rĩu. 
2Kings25:11 Naake Nebuzaradani agĩtaha andũ arĩa oothe maatigarĩĩte kũu itũũrainĩ, mabundi moothe marĩa maatigarĩĩte kuo, o na andũ arĩa moorĩĩte magathiĩ mwena wa Ababilonia, oothe akĩmatwara Babilonia." 
2Kings25:12 Andũ arĩa maatigirwo kũu Juda nĩ Nebuzaradani, no arĩa maarĩ athĩĩni mũno na mataarĩ na kĩndũ. Acio akĩmatua a gũceehaga mĩthabibũ na a kũrĩmaga mĩgũnda." 
2Kings25:13 Nao Ababilonia makiunanga itugĩ cia gĩcango, o hamwe na ngaari cia kũguucio iria ciarĩ kũu Hekaarũinĩ, o na itangi rĩrĩa inene rĩa gĩcango, nakĩo gĩcango kĩu gĩothe gĩgĩtwarwo Babiloni." 
2Kings25:14 Ningĩ makĩoya nyũngũ, iciko cia tĩĩri, mbakũri, na tũmĩĩhato tũniini twa kũhoria ndambĩ cia taawa, mbakũri cia gũcinĩra ũbaani na indo ciothe cia gĩcango iria ciahũthagĩrwo kũu Hekaarũinĩ, magĩthiĩ nacio." 
2Kings25:15 Ningĩ magĩkuua indo ciothe iria ciathondekeetwo na thahabu kana betha, hamwe na tũbakũri tũrĩa tũniini, o na ngĩo cia mwaki." 
2Kings25:16 Nakĩo gĩcango kĩrĩa Solomoni aatũmĩrĩĩte gwaka itugĩ iria igĩrĩ, ngaari cia kũguucio, o na itangi rĩria inene, iria aigĩĩte kũu Hekaarũinĩ, gĩtingĩathimĩkire nĩkũritũha." 
2Kings25:17 Itugĩ icio cierĩ, ciakĩĩtwo na mwakĩre o ro ũmwe, o kĩmwe gĩakoragwo na kĩrũũgamo kĩa mita inyaanya, na kĩongo gĩa gĩcango gĩa kĩrũũgamo kĩa mita ĩmwe na boiniti ithatũ. Ningĩ o gĩtugĩ kĩagemeetio na mũhari wa ngongomanga cia gĩcango." 
2Kings25:18 Ningĩ Nebuzaradani, mũnene ũcio wa arangĩri, agĩkuua Seraia Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene, na Zefania ũrĩa warĩ mũnyiinyi wake na anene angĩ atatũ a Hekaarũ marĩ mĩgwate." 
2Kings25:19 Nakuo kũu itũũrainĩ akĩnyiita mũnene wa thigari, na andũ a bata ataano arĩa maataaraga mũthamaki arĩa maarĩ o kũu itũũrainĩ, karani wa mũnene wa thigari ũrĩa wamenyagĩrĩra rekondi cia mbaara, o na andũ angĩ mĩrongo ĩtandatũ a bata." 
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradani akĩmatwara kwĩ mũthamaki wa Babilonia ũrĩa warĩ itũũrainĩ rĩa Ribila. 
2Kings25:21 Naake mũthamaki akĩmahũũra, na akĩmooragĩra o kũu Ribila, itũũra rĩrĩa rĩarĩ rũgongo rwa Hamathu.Ũguo nĩguo andũ a Juda maatahirwo magĩthaamio kuuma bũrũri wao." 
2Kings25:22 Naake Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babilonia agĩthuura Gedalia, mũrũ wa Ahikimu na mũcũkũrũ wa Shafani, atuĩke barũũthi wa andũ arĩa aatigire Juda nĩguo amaathage." 
2Kings25:23 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa anene a Juda na thigari iria iteeneanĩĩte kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Babilonia maiguire atĩ Gedalia nĩatuĩkĩĩte barũũthi magĩthiĩ magĩĩturanĩra naake Mizipa. Anene arĩa maathiire kũrĩ we nĩ: Ishumaeli mũrũ wa Nethania, Johanani mũrũ wa Karea, Seraia mũrũ wa Tanihumethu woimĩĩte itũũra rĩa Netofa, na Jezania woimĩĩte itũũra rĩa Maaka." 
2Kings25:24 Naake Gedalia akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ndamũthaitha mũtigeetigĩre anene a Babilonia. Inyuĩ tũũraai bũrũri ũyũ mũtungatagĩra mũthamaki wa Babilonia na nĩmũrĩonaga wega.”" 
2Kings25:25 No rĩĩrĩ, mweri wa mũgwanja, wa mwaka ũcio, Ishumaeli, mũrũ wa Nethania na mũcũkũrũ wa Elishama, wa mbarĩ ya mũthamaki, agĩthiĩ Mizipa e na andũ ikũmi, makĩũraga Gedalia, o na makĩũraga Aisiraeli o na Ababilonia arĩa maarĩ kuo hamwe naake." 
2Kings25:26 Nao Aisiraeli oothe, itonga, athĩĩni, na anene oothe a mbũtũ cia ita makĩũrĩra Misiri tondũ nĩmeetigagĩra Ababilonia." 
2Kings25:27 Na rĩĩrĩ, mwaka ũrĩa Evilimerodaku aatuĩkire mũthamaki wa Babilonia, akĩiguĩra mũthamaki Jehoiakini tha, akĩmũrekereria kuuma njeera. Eekĩre ũndũ ũcio mũthenya wa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na mũgwanja, mweriinĩ wa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ, mwaka wa mĩrongo ĩtatũ na mũgwanja kuuma hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jehoiakini aathaamirio." 
2Kings25:28 Naake Evilimerodaku akĩmwĩka wega, na akĩmũtũũgĩria gũkĩra athamaki arĩa angĩ maarĩ ithaamĩrio Babilonia hamwe naake." 
2Kings25:29 Naake Jehoiakini akĩruta nguo cia njeera, agĩtũũra arĩanagĩra na mũthamaki." 
2Kings25:30 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya o mũthenya, o nginyagia rĩrĩa aakuire, nĩaheyagwo irio cia kũmũigana." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu aarĩ ithe wa Sethu, naake Sethu aarĩ ithe wa Enoshu, naake Enoshu aarĩ ithe wa Kenani," 
1Chronicles1:2 naake Kenani aarĩ ithe wa Mahalaleli, naake Mahalaleli aarĩ ithe wa Jaredi." 
1Chronicles1:3 Jaredi aarĩ ithe wa Enoku, naake Enoku aarĩ ithe wa Methusela, naake Methusela aarĩ ithe wa Lameki," 
1Chronicles1:4 naake Lameki aarĩ ithe wa Noa. Noa aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ: Shemu, Hamu, na Jafethi." 
1Chronicles1:5 Aariũ a Jafethi maarĩ: Gomeri, Magogu, Madai, Javani, Tubali, Mesheki, na Tirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Aariũ a Gomeri maarĩ: Ashikenazu, Rifathu, na Togarima." 
1Chronicles1:7 Nao aariũ Javani maarĩ: Elishahu, Sipania, Kuporo, na Rodo." 
1Chronicles1:8 Aariũ a Hamu maarĩ: Kushi, Misiri, Libia,na Kanaani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Nao aariũ a Kushi maarĩ: Seba, Havila, Sabita, Raama, na Sabiteka. Nao aariũ a Raama maarĩ: Sheba na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kushi nĩaciarĩirwo kaana ga kahĩĩ geetagwo Nimurodi. Nimurodi nĩ we watuĩkire mũndũ njamba wa mbere gwathana gũũkũ thĩ. 
1Chronicles1:11 Na rĩĩrĩ, Misiri aarĩ ithe wa andũ a Lidia, Anani, Lehabi, Nafituhi," 
1Chronicles1:12 Pathirusi, Kasiluhi na Kirete. Afilisiti moimire Kirete." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaani nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Sidoni na Hethi. Sidoni nĩ we warĩ mũũrũwe wa irigithaathi. 
1Chronicles1:14 Ningĩ Kanaani nowe warĩ ithe wa Ajebusi, Aamori, Agirigashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 Ahivi, Aariki, Asini" 
1Chronicles1:16 Aarivadi, Azemari, na Ahamathi." 
1Chronicles1:17 Nao aariũ a Shemu maarĩ: Elamu, Asiria, Aripakishadi, Ludia, Aramu, Uzu, Hulu, Getheru, na Mesheki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Aripakishadi aarĩ ithe wa Shela, naake Shela aarĩ ithe wa Eberi." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eberi aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ. Ũmwe eetagwo Peregu, amu matukũinĩ maake andũ a thĩ nĩmaagayũkanĩĩte. Mũũriũ ũcio ũngĩ eetagwo Jokitani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Jokitani aarĩ ithe wa Alimodadi, Shelefu, Hazarimavethu, Jera" 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoramu, Uzali, Dikila," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebali, Abimaeli, Sheba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri, Havila, na Jobabu." 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri, Havila, na Jobabu." 
1Chronicles1:24 Naruo rũrĩra rwa Shemu nginya Aburamu rwahaanaga ta ũũ: Shemu, Aripakishadi, Shela" 
1Chronicles1:25 Eberi, Pelegu, Reu" 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugu, Nahori, Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 na Aburamu (na nĩwe Aburahamu.) 
1Chronicles1:28 Aariũ a Aburahamu maarĩ Isaaka na Ishumaeli. 
1Chronicles1:29 Nao aariũ a Ishumaeli nĩ o maarĩ maithe ma mĩhĩrĩga ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ nayo nĩ ĩno: Nabaiothi (nĩ we warĩ wa irigithaathi), Kedari, Adibeli, Mibisamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishima, Duma, Masa, Hadadi, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jeturu, Nafishi, na Kedema. Acio nĩ o maarĩ aariũ a Ishumaeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Aburahamu aarĩ na mũtumia wa kũigwo wetagwo Ketura, naake aamũciarĩire aariũ atandatũ, nĩ o Zimirani, Jokishani, Medani, Midiani, Ishibaku, na Shua. Jokishani aarĩ ithe wa Sheba na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Naake Midiani aarĩ ithe wa Efa, Eferi, Hanoku, Abida, na Elidaha." 
1Chronicles1:34 Isaaka mũrũ wa Aburahamu aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ, Esau na Jakubu." 
1Chronicles1:35 Esau aarĩ ithe wa Elifazi, Reueli, Jeushi, Jalamu, na Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Elifazi aarĩ ithe wa Temani, Omari, Zefo, Gatamu, Kenazi, Timina, na Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Naake Reueli aarĩ ithe wa Nahathu, Zera, Shama, na Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 (38-42) Andũ arĩa maatũũraga bũrũri wa Edomu kĩambĩrĩriainĩ maarĩ njiarwa cia aariũ aya Seiru:Lotani aarĩ ithe wa Hori na Homamu. (Lotani aarĩ na mwarĩ wa nyina wetagwo Timina.)Shobali aarĩ ithe wa Alivani, Manahathu, Ebali, Shefi, na ya Onamu.Zibeoni aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Aia na Ana. Ana aarĩ ithe wa Dishani, naake Dishani aarĩ ithe wa Hamurani, Eshibani, Ithirani, na Kerani.Ezeri aarĩ ithe wa Bilihani, Zaavani, na Jaakani.Naake Dishani aarĩ ithe wa Uzu na Arani." 
1Chronicles1:39 (43-50) Na rĩĩrĩ, athamaki aya nĩ o maathanaga bũrũriinĩ wa Edomu, gũtaanagĩa athamaki bũrũriinĩ wa Isiraeli, na maarũmanĩrĩire ta ũũ:Bela mũrũ wa Beori wa kuuma itũũra rĩa DinihabaJobabu mũrũ wa Zera wa kuuma itũũra rĩa BoziraHushamu wa kuuma bũrũri wa TemaniHadadi mũrũ wa Bedadi wa kuuma itũũra rĩa Avithi (nĩ we wahootire Amidiani mbaarainĩ ĩrĩa yarũĩirwo bũrũriinĩ wa Moabi)Samula wa kuuma itũũra rĩa MasirekaShaulu wa kuuma itũũra rĩa Rehobothu, rũũĩinĩ rwa FaratiBaali Hanani mũrũ wa AkiboruHadadi wa kuuma itũũra rĩa Pau (mũtumia wake eetagwo Mehetabeli, mwarĩ wa Matiredi na mũcũkũrũ wa Mezahabu.)" 
1Chronicles1:39 (43-50) Na rĩĩrĩ, athamaki aya nĩ o maathanaga bũrũriinĩ wa Edomu, gũtaanagĩa athamaki bũrũriinĩ wa Isiraeli, na maarũmanĩrĩire ta ũũ:Bela mũrũ wa Beori wa kuuma itũũra rĩa DinihabaJobabu mũrũ wa Zera wa kuuma itũũra rĩa BoziraHushamu wa kuuma bũrũri wa TemaniHadadi mũrũ wa Bedadi wa kuuma itũũra rĩa Avithi (nĩ we wahootire Amidiani mbaarainĩ ĩrĩa yarũĩirwo bũrũriinĩ wa Moabi)Samula wa kuuma itũũra rĩa MasirekaShaulu wa kuuma itũũra rĩa Rehobothu, rũũĩinĩ rwa FaratiBaali Hanani mũrũ wa AkiboruHadadi wa kuuma itũũra rĩa Pau (mũtumia wake eetagwo Mehetabeli, mwarĩ wa Matiredi na mũcũkũrũ wa Mezahabu.)" 
1Chronicles1:40 Andũ a Edomu maagayanĩĩtio na mĩhĩrĩga ta ũũ:Timina, Aliva, Jethethi" 
1Chronicles1:41 Oholibama, Ela, Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:42 Kenazi, Temani, Mibizari" 
1Chronicles1:43 Magidieli, na Iramu." 
1Chronicles2:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jakubu aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ikũmi na eerĩ: Reubeni, Simeoni, Lawi, Juda, Isakaru, Zebuluni," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dani, Josefu, Benjamini, Nafutali, Gadi, na Asheri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Naake Juda aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ataano. Mũtumia wake ũrĩa wetagwo Bathishua ũrĩa warĩ Mũkanaani aamũciarĩire aanake atatũ: Eri, Onani, na Shela. Eri ũrĩa warĩ irigithaathi rĩake nĩoragirwo nĩ MWATHANI nĩ ũndũ aarĩ mwaganu mũno." 
1Chronicles2:4 Naake Tamaru ũrĩa warĩ mũtumia wa mũũrũwe, nĩamũciarĩire aanake eerĩ: Perezu na Zera." 
1Chronicles2:5 Naake Perezu aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Hezironi na Hamulu. 
1Chronicles2:6 Naake mũrũ wa nyina Zera aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ataano: Zimuri, Ethani, Hemani, Kalikoli, na Darida." 
1Chronicles2:7 Naake Akani mũrũ wa Karimi, ũmwe wa njiarwa cia Zera, nĩareehithĩirie Aisiraeli mũthiro nĩ ũndũ wa kũhitha indo iria ciamũrĩĩtwo cia kũniinwo." 
1Chronicles2:8 Ethani aarĩ na mũũriũ o ũmwe wetagwo Azaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Hezironi aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ: Jerameeli, Ramu, na Kalebai." 
1Chronicles2:10 Naruo rũrĩra rwa Ramu nginya Jesii rwahaanaga ta ũũ: Ramu aarĩ ithe wa Aminadabu, naake Aminadabu aarĩ ithe wa Nahashoni (mũtongoria wa bata wa andũ a Juda.)" 
1Chronicles2:11 Naake Nahashoni nĩ we warĩ ithe wa Salimoni, naake Salimoni nĩwe warĩ ithe wa aarĩ ithe wa Boazu," 
1Chronicles2:12 naake Boazu aarĩ ithe wa Obedi, naake Obedi nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Jesii." 
1Chronicles2:13 Naake Jesii aarĩ ithe wa aariũ mũgwanja maarũmanĩrĩire ta ũũ: Eliabu, Abinadabu, Shimea," 
1Chronicles2:14 Nethaneli, Radai," 
1Chronicles2:15 Ozemu, na Daudi." 
1Chronicles2:16 Ningĩ Jesii aarĩ ithe wa airĩĩtu eerĩ: Zeruia na Abigaĩli.Naake Zeruia mwarĩ wa Jesii agĩciara aariũ atatũ: Abishai, Joabu, na Asaheli." 
1Chronicles2:17 Naake Abigaĩli akĩhikio nĩ Jetheri wa rũciaro rwa Ishumaeli, nao magĩciara mwanake wetagwo Amasa." 
1Chronicles2:18 Na rĩĩrĩ, Kalebu mũrũ wa Hezironi akĩhikia Azuba, nao magĩciara mũirĩĩtu wetagwo Jeriothu, naake Jeriothu agĩciara aariũ atatũ: Jesheri, Shobabu na Aridoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Na rĩĩrĩ, Azuba mũtumia wa Kalebu akua, Kalebu akĩhikia Efiratha, nao magĩciara mũũriũ wetagwo Huru." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huru aarĩ ithe wa Uri, naake Uri aarĩ ithe wa Bezaleli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Naake Hezironi arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtandatũ, akĩhikia mwarĩ wa Makiru, mwarĩ wa nyina na Gileadi. Nao magĩciara mũũriũ wetagwo Segubu." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu nĩ we warĩ ithe wa mũũriũ wetagwo Jairũ. Jairũ aarĩ na matũũra mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na matatũ bũrũriinĩ wa Gileadi. 
1Chronicles2:23 No rĩĩrĩ, moothamaki ma Geshuri na Aramu makĩmatuunya matũũra mĩrongo ĩtandatũ, o hamwe na matũũra ma Jairũ na Kenathu, o na tũtũũra tũrĩa twarigiicĩirie. Andũ arĩa oothe matũũraga kũu, maarĩ njiarwa cia Makiru, ithe wa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Na rĩĩrĩ, Hezironi akua, Kalebu mũũrũwe akĩhikia Efiratha mũtumia ũrĩa warĩ wa ithe. Nao magĩciara Ashuru ũrĩa wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jerameeli, irigithaathi rĩa Hezironi, aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ataano: Ramu (nĩ we warĩ wa irigithaathi), Bura, Oreni, Ozemu, na Ahija." 
1Chronicles2:26 (26-27) Ramu aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ: Maazu, Jamini, na Ekeri. Ningĩ Jerameeli aarĩ na mũtumia ũngĩ wetagwo Atara, nao magĩciara mũũriũ wetagwo Onamu." 
1Chronicles2:27 Naake Onamu aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Shamai na Jada. O naake Shamai arĩ na aariũ o eerĩ: Madabu, na Abishuri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Na rĩĩrĩ, Abishuri akĩhikia mũtumia wetagwo Abihaili, nao magĩciara aariũ eerĩ: Ahabani na Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:29 Naake Nadabu mũrũ wa nyina na Abishuri aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Seledi na Apaimu. Na rĩĩrĩ, Seledi aakuire atarĩ na ciana." 
1Chronicles2:30 Apaimu aarĩ ithe wa Ishi, naake Ishi aarĩ ithe wa Sheshani, naake Sheshani aarĩ ithe wa Ahilai." 
1Chronicles2:31 Jada mũrũ wa nyina na Shamai aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Jetheri na Jonathani. No rĩĩrĩ, Jetheri aakuire atarĩ na ciana." 
1Chronicles2:32 Naake Jonathani aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Pelethi na Zaza. Na rĩĩrĩ, acio oothe maarĩ njiarwa cia Jerameeli." 
1Chronicles2:33 Na rĩĩrĩ, Sheshani ndaarĩ na aariũ no airĩĩtu. No aarĩ na ndungata ya kuuma Misiri yetagwo Jariha." 
1Chronicles2:34 Ndungata ĩyo nĩamĩheire mwarĩ atuĩke mũtumia wayo, nao magĩciara kaana ga kahĩĩ magĩgeeta Atai." 
1Chronicles2:35 Naruo rũrĩra rwa Atai nginya Elishama rwahaanaga ta ũũ: Atai aarĩ ithe wa Nathani, Nathani aarĩ ithe wa Zabadu," 
1Chronicles2:36 Zabadu aarĩ ithe wa Efilali, Efilali aarĩ ithe wa Obedi," 
1Chronicles2:37 Obedi aarĩ ithe wa Jehu, Jehu aarĩ ithe wa Azaria," 
1Chronicles2:38 Azaria aarĩ ithe wa Helezu, Helezu aarĩ ithe wa Eleasa," 
1Chronicles2:39 Eleasa aarĩ ithe wa Sisimai, Sisimai aarĩ ithe wa Shalumu," 
1Chronicles2:40 Shalumu aarĩ ithe wa Jekamia, naake Jekamia aarĩ ithe wa Elishama." 
1Chronicles2:41 Na rĩĩrĩ, irigithaathi rĩa Kalebu, mũrũ wa nyina na Jerameeli, rĩarĩ Mesha. Mesha aarĩ ithe wa Zifu, Zifu aarĩ ithe wa Maresha, naake Maresha aarĩ ithe wa Heburoni." 
1Chronicles2:42 Naake Heburoni aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana: Kora, Tapua, Rekemu, na Shema." 
1Chronicles2:43 Shema aarĩ ithe wa Rahamu, Rahamu aarĩ ithe wa Jorikeamu. Rekemu, mũrũ wa nyina na Shema, aarĩ ithe wa Shamai," 
1Chronicles2:44 Shamai aarĩ ithe wa Maoni, naake Maoni aarĩ ithe wa Bethizuri." 
1Chronicles2:45 Kalebu aarĩ na mũtumia wa kũigwo wetagwo Efa, naake akĩmũciarĩra aariũ angĩ atatũ: Harani, Moza, na Gazezi. Harani aarĩ ithe wa mwanake wetagwo Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:46 (Naake mũndũ wetagwo Jahadai aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atandatũ: Regemu, Jothamu, Geshani, Peleti, Efa, na Shaafu.)" 
1Chronicles2:47 Kalebu aarĩ na mũtumia ũngĩ wa kũigwo wetagwo Maaka, naake akĩmũciarĩra aariũ eerĩ: Sheberi na Tirihana." 
1Chronicles2:48 Agĩcooka akĩmũciarĩra aariũ angĩ eerĩ: Shaafu ũrĩa wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Madimana, na Sheva ũrĩa wambĩrĩirie matũũra ma Makibena na Gibea. Kalebu aarĩ na mwarĩ wetagwo Akisa." 
1Chronicles2:49 Kalebu aarĩ na njiarwa ingĩ ciarũmanĩrĩire ta ũũ:Huru nĩ we warĩ irigithaathi rĩa mũtumia wa Kalebu ũrĩa wetagwo Efiratha. Mũrũ wa Huru ũrĩa wetagwo Shobali nĩ we wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Kiriathu Jearimu. 
1Chronicles2:50 Mũũrũwe wa keerĩ ũrĩa wetagwo Salima nĩ we wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Bethilehemu, naake mũũrũwe wa gatatũ ũrĩa wetagwo Harefu akĩambĩrĩria itũũra rĩa Bethigaderi." 
1Chronicles2:51 Na rĩĩrĩ, Shobali ũcio warĩ mwambĩrĩria wa itũũra rĩa Kiriathu Jearimu aarĩ ithe wa andũ arĩa maatũũraga Haroe, o na nuthu ya andũ arĩa maatũũraga Menuhothi," 
1Chronicles2:52 o na mbarĩ ici iria ciatũũraga kũu Kiriathu Jearimu: Aithiri, Aputhi, Ashumathi, na Amishirai. (Andũ arĩa maatũũraga matũũra ma Zora na Eshitaoli maarĩ a mbarĩ ciao.)" 
1Chronicles2:53 Salima ũrĩa wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Bethilehemu, aarĩ ithe wa andũ arĩa maatũũraga Netofa na Atirothu Bethi Joabu, o na andũ a Zori, arĩa maarĩ mbarĩ ĩmwe ya andũ arĩa maatũũraga Manahathu." 
1Chronicles2:54 Nacio mbarĩ ici irũmĩrĩire, iria ciarĩ njoorua na kwandĩka na gũkobia marũa, ciatũũraga Jabezu: Atirathi, Ashimeathi, o na Asukathi. Mbarĩ icio nĩcio Akeni arĩa mahikanirie na Arekabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 (1-3) Ici nĩcio ciana cia Daudi iria ciaciarĩirwo Heburoni ta ũrĩa ciarũmanĩrĩire:Amunoni, nyina aarĩ Ahinoamu ũrĩa woimĩĩte JezireeliDanieli, nyina aarĩ Abigaĩli ũrĩa woimĩĩte KarimeliAbisalomu, nyina aarĩ Maaka, mwarĩ wa Talimai mũthamaki wa Geshuri.Adonija, nyina aarĩ HagithuShefatia, nyina aarĩ AbitaliIthireamu, nyina aarĩ Egila." 
1Chronicles3:1 (1-3) Ici nĩcio ciana cia Daudi iria ciaciarĩirwo Heburoni ta ũrĩa ciarũmanĩrĩire:Amunoni, nyina aarĩ Ahinoamu ũrĩa woimĩĩte JezireeliDanieli, nyina aarĩ Abigaĩli ũrĩa woimĩĩte KarimeliAbisalomu, nyina aarĩ Maaka, mwarĩ wa Talimai mũthamaki wa Geshuri.Adonija, nyina aarĩ HagithuShefatia, nyina aarĩ AbitaliIthireamu, nyina aarĩ Egila." 
1Chronicles3:2 Acio oothe atandatũ maaciarĩirwo itũũrainĩ rĩa Heburoni, ihindainĩ rĩa mĩaka mũgwanja na nuthu rĩrĩa Daudi aathamakire kuo.Nakuo Jerusalemu aathamakire mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩtatũ." 
1Chronicles3:3 Ici nĩcio ciana ciake iria ciaciarĩirwo Jerusalemu:Mũtumia wake ũrĩa wetagwo Bathisheba mwarĩ wa Amieli aamũciarĩire aariũ ana: Shimea Shobabu, Nathani, na Solomoni." 
1Chronicles3:4 Hamwe na acio, nĩarĩ na aariũ angĩ kenda: Ibiharu, Elishua, Elipeleti," 
1Chronicles3:5 Noga, Nefegu, Jafia," 
1Chronicles3:6 Elishama, Eliada, na Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles3:7 To acio oiki aarĩ nao, nĩarĩ na aariũ angĩ a atumia aake a kũigwo. O na ningĩ nĩarĩ na mwarĩ wetagwo Tamaru." 
1Chronicles3:8 Nacio njiarwa cia mũthamaki Solomoni ciarũmanĩrĩire ta ũũ: Solomoni aarĩ ithe wa Rehoboamu, Rehoboamu aarĩ ithe wa Abija, Abija aarĩ ithe wa Asa, Asa aarĩ ithe wa Jehoshafatu," 
1Chronicles3:9 Jehoshafatu aarĩ ithe wa Joramu, Joramu aarĩ ithe wa Ahazia, Ahazia aarĩ ithe wa Joashu," 
1Chronicles3:10 Joashu aarĩ ithe wa Amazia, Amazia aarĩ ithe wa Azaria, Azaria aarĩ ithe wa Jothamu," 
1Chronicles3:11 Jothamu aarĩ ithe wa Ahazu, Ahazu aarĩ ithe wa Hezekia, Hezekia aarĩ ithe wa Manase," 
1Chronicles3:12 Manase aarĩ ithe wa Amoni, Amoni aarĩ ithe wa Josia." 
1Chronicles3:13 Josia aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana: Johanani, Jehoiakimu, Zedekia, na Joahazu." 
1Chronicles3:14 Jehoiakimu aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Jehoiakini na Zedekia. 
1Chronicles3:15 Ici nĩcio njiarwa cia mũthamaki Jehoiakini ũrĩa wanyiitirwo mũgwate agĩtwarwo Babilonia: Jehoiakini aarĩ ithe wa aariũ mũgwanja: Shealitieli," 
1Chronicles3:16 Malikiramu, Pedaia, Shenazaru, Jakamia, Hoshama, na Nedabia." 
1Chronicles3:17 Pedabia aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Zerubabeli na Shimei. Zerubabeli aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Meshulamu na Hanania, na mwarĩ ũmwe wetagwo Shelomithu." 
1Chronicles3:18 Zerubabeli aarĩ ithe wa aariũ angĩ ataano: Hashuba, Oheli, Berekia, Hasadia na Jushabu Hesedi." 
1Chronicles3:19 Hanania aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Pelatia na Jeshaia. Jeshaia aarĩ ithe wa Refaia, Refaia aarĩ ithe wa Arinani, Arinani aarĩ ithe wa Obadia, naake Obadia aarĩ ithe wa Shekania." 
1Chronicles3:20 Shekania aarĩ ithe wa mũũriũ ũmwe wetagwo Shemaia. Shemaia aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ataano: Hatushu, Igali, Baria, Nearia na Shafatu." 
1Chronicles3:21 Nearia aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ: Elioenai, Hizikia na Azirikamu." 
1Chronicles3:22 Elioenai aarĩ ithe wa aariũ mũgwanja: Hodavia, Eliashibu, Pelaia, Akubu, Johanani, Delaia na Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Ici nĩcio njiarwa imwe cia Juda: Perezu, Hezironi, Karimi, Huru na Shobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Shobali aarĩ ithe wa Reaia, Reaia aarĩ ithe wa Jahathu, Jahathu aarĩ ithe wa Ahumai na Lahadi, arĩa maarĩ maithe ma andũ arĩa maatũũraga Zora." 
1Chronicles4:3 (3-4) Huru aarĩ irigithaathi rĩa mũtumia wa Kalebu ũrĩa wetagwo Efiratha. Huru aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ: Etamu, Penueli na Ezeri. Acio nĩ o maambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Bethilehemu. Naake Atamu aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ: Jezireeli, Ishima na Idibasha. Ningĩ nĩarĩ na mũirĩĩtu wetagwo Hazeleliponi. Penueli nĩ we wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Gedori, naake Ezeri akĩambĩrĩria itũũra rĩa Husha." 
1Chronicles4:4 Naake Ashuru, ũrĩa wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Tekoa, aarĩ na atumia eerĩ, Hela na Naara." 
1Chronicles4:5 Aariũ arĩa aaciarire me na Naara maarĩ ana: Ahuzamu, Heferi, Temeni, na Haahashatari." 
1Chronicles4:6 Nao aariũ arĩa aaciarire me na Hela maarĩ atatũ: Zerethu, Iziharu, na Ethinani." 
1Chronicles4:7 Kozu aarĩ ithe wa Anubu na Zobeba, na no we warĩ kĩhumo kĩa mbarĩ cia Ahariheli mũrũ wa Harumu." 
1Chronicles4:8 Na rĩĩrĩ, kwarĩ mũndũ wetagwo Jabezu waheetwo gĩtĩĩo gũkĩra andũ arĩa angĩ a mũciĩ wao. Nyina aamũheire rĩĩtwa rĩu tondũ aamũciarire na ruwo rũnene mũno." 
1Chronicles4:9 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jabezu akĩhooya Ngai wa Isiraeli atĩrĩ, “Ndagũthaitha Ngai ũndaathime na ũhe bũrũri mũnene. Ikaranagia na niĩ na ũngitagĩre ndikaanoone ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũngĩnjiguithia ruwo.” Naake MWATHANI akĩmũcookeria mahooya maake akĩmũhe kĩrĩa aahoeete." 
1Chronicles4:10 Na rĩĩrĩ, Kalebu mũrũ wa nyina na Shuha aarĩ ithe wa Mehiru, naake Mehiru aarĩ ithe wa Eshitoni." 
1Chronicles4:11 Eshitoni aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ: Bethirafa, Pasea, na Tehina. Tehina nĩ we wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Nahashu. Njiarwa cia andũ acio ciatũũraga Reka." 
1Chronicles4:12 Kenazi aarĩ ithe wa Othinieli na Seraia. Naake Othinieli aarĩ ithe wa Hathathu na Meonothai 
1Chronicles4:13 Naake Meonothai aarĩ ithe wa Ofira.Naake Seraia aarĩ ithe wa Joabu, ũrĩa wambĩrĩirie gĩtuamba gĩa Aturi, na andũ aakĩo oothe maarĩ njoorua cia gũtura." 
1Chronicles4:14 Kalebu mũrũ wa Jefune aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ: Iru, Ela, na Naamu. Naake Ela aarĩ ithe wa Kenazi." 
1Chronicles4:15 Naake Jehaleleli aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana: Zifu, Zifa, Tiria, na Asareli." 
1Chronicles4:16 (17-18) Ezira aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana: Jetheru, Meredi, Eferi na Jaloni. Naake Meredi akĩhikia mwarĩ wa mũthamaki wa Misiri wetagwo Bithia magĩciara mũirĩĩtu wetagwo Miriamu na aanake eerĩ, Shamai na Ishiba. Naake Ishiba nĩ we wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Eshitemoa. Ningĩ Meredi akĩhikia mũtumia ũngĩ wa kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Juda na magĩciara aariũ atatũ: Jeredi, ũrĩa wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Gedori, Heberi, ũrĩa wambĩrĩrie itũũra rĩa Soko, na Jekuthieli ũrĩa wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Zanoa." 
1Chronicles4:17 Naake Hodia akĩhikia mwarĩ wa nyina na Nahamu. Acio nĩ o maarĩ kĩhumo kĩa njiarwa cia mbarĩ ya Agarimu arĩa maatũũraga itũũra rĩa Keila, na mbarĩ ya Amaakathi arĩa matũũraga itũũra rĩa Eshitemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Shimoni aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana: Amunoni, Rina, Benihanani, na Tiloni.Ishi aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Zohethu na Benizohethu." 
1Chronicles4:19 Njiarwa cia Shela mũrũ wa Juda nĩ: Eri ũrĩa wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Leka, na Laada ũrĩa wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Maresha o na mbarĩ ya arĩa maathondekaga nguo cia gataani arĩa maatũũraga itũũra rĩa Bethi Ashibea;" 
1Chronicles4:20 Jokimu na andũ arĩa maatũũraga itũũra rĩa Kozeba, Joashu, na Sarafi ũrĩa wahikirie atumia Amoabi na agĩcooka agĩtũũra Bethilehemu. (Maũndũ maya nĩ ma tene mũno.)" 
1Chronicles4:21 Andũ acio moombagĩra mũthamaki indo cia rĩũmba na maikaraga Netaimu na Gedera. 
1Chronicles4:22 Simeoni aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ataano: Nemueli, Jamini, Jaribu, Zera, na Shaulu." 
1Chronicles4:23 Shaulu aarĩ ithe wa Shalumu, naake Shalumu aarĩ ithe wa Mibisamu, naake Mibisamu aarĩ ithe wa Mishima." 
1Chronicles4:24 Naake Mishima aarĩ ithe wa Hamueli, naake Hamueli aarĩ ithe wa Zakuru, naake Zakuru aarĩ ithe wa Shimei." 
1Chronicles4:25 Naake Shimei aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ikũmi na atandatũ na airĩĩtu atandatũ. No rĩĩrĩ, andũ a nyũmba yao matiaciarire ciana nyingĩ, naguo mũhĩrĩga wa Simeoni ndũigana kuongerereka ta wa Juda." 
1Chronicles4:26 Nacio njiarwa icio o nginyagia matukũinĩ ma mũthamaki Daudi ciatũũraga matũũrainĩ maya: Beerisheba, Molada, Hazarishuali," 
1Chronicles4:27 Biliha, Ezemu, Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:28 Bethueli, Horima, Zikilagi," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bethi Marikabothu, Hazarisusimu, Bethibiri, na Shaaraimu." 
1Chronicles4:30 Hamwe na matũũra macio nĩkwarĩ na mangĩ mataano kũrĩa ciatũũraga, namo nĩ: Etamu, Aini, Rimoni, Tokeni, na Ashani," 
1Chronicles4:31 na tũtũũra tũrĩa twathiũrũrũkĩirie mĩciĩ ĩyo o nginya Baalathu. Macio nĩ mo matũũra marĩa ciatũũraga na maandĩkĩĩtwo o hamwe na mĩciĩ yao. 
1Chronicles4:32 (34-38) Aya nao nĩ o atongoria a mbarĩ ciao: Meshobabu, Jamuleki, Joshahu mũrũ wa Amazia, Joeli na Jehu (mũrũ wa Joshibia, mũrũ wa Seraia, mũrũ wa Asieli), Elioenai, Jaakoba, Jeshohaia, Asaia, Adieli, Jesimieli, Benaia na Ziza (mũrũ wa Shifi mũrũ wa Aloni, mũrũ wa Jedaia, mũrũ wa Shimuri, mũrũ wa Shemaia.) Tondũ wa ũrĩa andũ aya mathiaga magĩthegeyaga," 
1Chronicles4:32 (34-38) Aya nao nĩ o atongoria a mbarĩ ciao: Meshobabu, Jamuleki, Joshahu mũrũ wa Amazia, Joeli na Jehu (mũrũ wa Joshibia, mũrũ wa Seraia, mũrũ wa Asieli), Elioenai, Jaakoba, Jeshohaia, Asaia, Adieli, Jesimieli, Benaia na Ziza (mũrũ wa Shifi mũrũ wa Aloni, mũrũ wa Jedaia, mũrũ wa Shimuri, mũrũ wa Shemaia.) Tondũ wa ũrĩa andũ aya mathiaga magĩthegeyaga," 
1Chronicles4:33 magĩkĩhurunjũka na mwena wa ithũĩro magĩkinya hakuhĩ na itũũra rĩa Gerari, nĩguo makarĩithagie ũhiũ wao na mwena wa irathĩro wa gĩtuamba kĩrĩa itũũra rĩu rĩakĩĩtwo." 
1Chronicles4:34 Nao magĩkĩona kũndũ kwarĩ kũnoru gwa kũrĩithio kũu gĩtuambainĩ kĩu, na bũrũri warĩ mwaraganu, ũkahoorera na ũkagĩa na thaayũ. Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ arĩa maatũũraga kuo tene maarĩ njiarwa cia Hamu." 
1Chronicles4:35 Matukũinĩ ma Hezekia mũthamaki wa Juda, andũ acio magweteetwo hau igũrũ, maathiire Gerari, magĩthũũkangia hema na nyũmba cia andũ arĩa maatũũraga kuo. Magĩkĩingata andũ acio, magĩgĩtũũra kuo tondũ kwarĩ kwega gwa kũrĩithagia." 
1Chronicles4:36 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ angĩ magana mataano (500) a mũhĩrĩga wa Simeoni magĩthiĩ na mwena wa irathĩro magĩkinya Edomu. Nao maatongoreetio nĩ Pelatia, Nearia, Refaia, na Uzieli aariũ a Ishi." 
1Chronicles4:37 Nao makinya kuo makĩuraga Aamaleki arĩa maatigarĩĩte, magĩgĩtũũra kuo, nao matũũraga kuo kinyagia ũũmũũthĩ." 
1Chronicles5:1 Ici nĩcio njiarwa cia Reubeni, irigithaathi rĩa Jakubu. (Na rĩĩrĩ, tondũ Reubeni nĩakomire na mũtumia ũmwe wa kũigwo wa ithe, nĩatuunyirwo ũrigithaathi ũkĩheeo Josefu." 
1Chronicles5:2 No rĩĩrĩ, nĩ thĩinĩ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Juda kuoimire mũtongoria wa mĩhĩrĩga yothe tondũ nĩguo wagĩire na hinya.)" 
1Chronicles5:3 Reubeni, irigithaathi rĩa Jakubu, aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana: Hanoku, Palu, Hezironi, na Karimi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Ici nĩcio njiarwa cia Joeli kuuma rũciaro rũmwe kinya rũrĩa rũngĩ. Joeli aarĩ ithe wa Shemaia, Shemaia aarĩ ithe wa Gogu, Gogu aarĩ ithe wa Shimei, Shimei aarĩ ithe wa Mika," 
1Chronicles5:4 Ici nĩcio njiarwa cia Joeli kuuma rũciaro rũmwe kinya rũrĩa rũngĩ. Joeli aarĩ ithe wa Shemaia, Shemaia aarĩ ithe wa Gogu, Gogu aarĩ ithe wa Shimei, Shimei aarĩ ithe wa Mika," 
1Chronicles5:5 Mika aarĩ ithe Reaia, Reaia aarĩ ithe wa Baali," 
1Chronicles5:6 Baali aarĩ ithe wa Beera. Na rĩĩrĩ, Beera nĩ we warĩ mũtongoria wa mũhĩrĩga, no nĩanyiitirwo nĩ Tiligathu Pileseri mũthamaki wa Asiria agĩthaamio." 
1Chronicles5:7 Nao andũ arĩa maarĩ atongoria a mbarĩ, thĩinĩ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni maarĩ: Jeieli na nĩwe warĩ mũnene wao, Zekaria," 
1Chronicles5:8 Bela mũrũ wa Azazu na mũcũkũrũ wa Shema wa mbarĩ ya Joeli ĩrĩa yatũũraga Aroeri o nginya Nebo na Baali Meoni. 
1Chronicles5:8 Bela mũrũ wa Azazu na mũcũkũrũ wa Shema wa mbarĩ ya Joeli ĩrĩa yatũũraga Aroeri o nginya Nebo na Baali Meoni. 
1Chronicles5:9 Tondũ wa ũrĩa mbarĩ ĩyo yarĩ na mahiũ maingĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Gileadi, ĩkĩĩgwatĩra o na mwena wa irathĩro wa werũ ũcio wothe o nginya rũũĩ rwa Farati." 
1Chronicles5:10 Ningĩ matukũinĩ ma mũthamaki Saũlũ, mũhĩrĩga ũcio wa Reubeni nĩwatharĩkĩire njiarwa cia Hagari, ũgĩciũraga, ũgĩtũũra bũrũriinĩ wacio mwena wa irathĩro wa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi watũũrire bũrũri wa Bashani ũrĩa ũrĩ na mwena wa na rũgongo wa mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni o nginya Saleka na mwena wa irathĩro." 
1Chronicles5:12 Naake Joeli nĩ we warĩ mũnene wao, naake Shafamu nĩwe warĩ mũnyiinyi wake, nao Janai na Shafatu nĩ o maambĩrĩirie mbarĩ iria ingĩ ciatũũraga Bashani." 
1Chronicles5:12 Naake Joeli nĩ we warĩ mũnene wao, naake Shafamu nĩwe warĩ mũnyiinyi wake, nao Janai na Shafatu nĩ o maambĩrĩirie mbarĩ iria ingĩ ciatũũraga Bashani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Nao andũ a mĩhĩrĩga ĩyo ĩngĩ arĩa maatũũraga kuo maarĩ a mbarĩ ici mũgwanja: mbarĩ ya Mikaeli, Meshulamu, Sheba, Jorai, Jakani, Zia, na ya Eberi." 
1Chronicles5:14 Acio maarĩ njiarwa cia Abihaili mũrũ wa Huri, Huri mũrũ wa Jaroa, Jaroa mũrũ wa Gileadi, Gileadi mũrũ wa Mikaeli, Mikaeli mũrũ wa Jeshishai, Jeshishai mũrũ wa Jahado, naake Jahado mũrũ wa Buzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi mũrũ wa Abidieli na mũcũkũrũ wa Guni, nĩ we warĩ mũtongoria wa mbarĩ icio." 
1Chronicles5:16 Mbarĩ icio ciatũũraga Gileadi na Bashani, matũũrainĩ maakuo, o na bũrũri wothe wa Sharoni ũrĩa warĩithagio." 
1Chronicles5:17 (Rekondi icio ciothe ciacookanĩrĩirio matukũinĩ ma Jothamu mũthamaki wa Juda na ma Jeroboamu wa Keerĩ, mũthamaki wa Isiraeli.)" 
1Chronicles5:18 Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩkwarĩ thigari ngiri mĩrongo ĩna na inya na magana mũgwanja ma mĩrongo ĩtandatũ (44,760) kuuma mũhĩrĩgainĩ wa Reubeni na wa Gadi na nuthuinĩ ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase iria ciarĩ njamba cia kũrũa na hiũ cia njora, ngo, na moota." 
1Chronicles5:19 Nĩcioimagarire igĩthiĩ kũrũa na mĩhĩrĩga ya Hagari nĩ yo: Jeturu, Nafishi, na Nodabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 Nacio igĩkĩĩhoka Ngai, na ikĩmũhooya aciteithie, naake Ngai akĩigua mahooya maacio, agĩtuma ihoote njiarwa cia Hagari, o na arĩa maaciteithagĩrĩria." 
1Chronicles5:21 Nacio igĩcooka igĩtaha kuuma gwĩ thũ icio ciacio, ngamĩĩra ngiri mĩrongo ĩtaano (50,000), ng'ondu ngiri igĩrĩ cia magana mataano (2,500) ndigiri ngiri igĩrĩ (2,000) na mĩgwate ngiri igana rĩmwe (100,000)." 
1Chronicles5:22 Ningĩ ikĩũraga thigari cia thũ nyingĩ, nĩ ũndũ ciarũaga Ngai aarĩ mwena wacio. Nayo mĩhĩrĩga ĩyo ĩgĩthiĩ gũtũũra bũrũriinĩ ũcio o nginya hĩndĩ ya ithaamĩrio." 
1Chronicles5:23 Nao andũ a nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase magĩtũũra bũrũriinĩ wa Bashani o nginya Baali Herimoni, Seniru, o na mwena wa na rũgongo wa kĩrĩma kĩa Herimoni. Nao magĩkĩingĩha mũno." 
1Chronicles5:24 Aya nao nĩ o maarĩ atongoria a mbarĩ ciao: Eferi, Ishi, Elieli, Azirieli, Jeremia, Hodavia, na Jadieli. Andũ acio maarĩ thigari njoorua na atongoria marĩ igweta a mbarĩ ciao." 
1Chronicles5:25 Nao andũ acio makĩremera Ngai wa maithe maao makĩmũtirĩka, makĩambĩrĩria gũthaathaiya ngai cia mĩhianano cia andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ iria Ngai aingatĩĩte kuuma kuo." 
1Chronicles5:26 Kwoguo Ngai akĩhe Puli mũthamaki wa Aasiria (na no we Tigilathu Pileseri) hinya wa gũtharĩkĩra bũrũri wao. Naake agĩthaamia mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni, wa Gadi na nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase akĩmĩtwara ĩgatũũre Hala, Haboru Hara o na hakuhĩ na rũũĩ rwa Gozani, na nokuo ĩtũire nginyagia ũũmũũthĩ." 
1Chronicles6:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Lawi aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ nao nĩ o: Gerishoni, Kohathu, na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Kohathu aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana nao nĩ o: Amuramu, Iziharu, Heburoni, na Uzieli." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amuramu aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ nao nĩ o: Harũni na Musa, na nĩarĩ mũirĩĩtu ũmwe wetagwo Miriamu.Harũni aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana nao nĩ o: Madabu, Abibu, Eleazaru, na Ithamaru." 
1Chronicles6:4 Nacio njiarwa cia Eleazaru kuuma rũciaro rũmwe kinyagia rũrĩa rũngĩ ciahaanaga ta ũũ: Eleazaru aarĩ ithe wa Finehasi, Finehasi aarĩ ithe wa Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishua aarĩ ithe wa Buki, Buki aarĩ ithe wa Uzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Uzi aarĩ ithe wa Zerahia, Zerahia aarĩ ithe wa Meraiothu," 
1Chronicles6:7 Meraiothu aarĩ ithe wa Amaria, Amaria aarĩ ithe wa Ahitubu" 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitubu aarĩ ithe wa Zadoku, Zadoku aarĩ ithe wa Ahimaazu," 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaazu aarĩ ithe wa Azaria, Azaria aarĩ ithe wa Johanani," 
1Chronicles6:10 Johanani aarĩ ithe wa Azaria (ũrĩa watungataga e mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Hekaarũinĩ ĩrĩa mũthamaki Solomoni aakire Jerusalemu)," 
1Chronicles6:11 Azaria aarĩ ithe wa Amaria, Amaria aarĩ ithe wa Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitubu aarĩ ithe wa Zadoku, Zadoku aarĩ ithe wa Shalumu," 
1Chronicles6:13 Shalumu aarĩ ithe wa Hilikia, Hilikia aarĩ ithe wa Azaria," 
1Chronicles6:14 Azaria aarĩ ithe wa Seraia, Seraia aarĩ ithe wa Jehozadaku." 
1Chronicles6:15 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jehozadaku nĩathaamanĩirio hamwe na andũ a Juda na a Jerusalemu arĩa MWATHANI aatũmire mathaamio nĩ mũthamaki Nebukadinezaru." 
1Chronicles6:16 Lawi aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ nao nĩ o: Gerishoni, Kohathu, na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Gerishoni aarĩ ithe wa Libini na Shimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Kohathu aarĩ ithe wa Amuramu, Iziharu, Heburoni, na Uzieli." 
1Chronicles6:19 Naake Merari aarĩ ithe wa Mahili na Mushi. 
1Chronicles6:20 Njiarwa cia Gerishoni kuuma rũciaro rũmwe kinyagia rũrĩa rũngĩ ciahaanaga ta ũũ: Gerishoni aarĩ ithe wa Libini, Libini aarĩ ithe wa Jahathu, Jahathu aarĩ ithe wa Zima," 
1Chronicles6:21 Zima aarĩ ithe wa Joa, Joa aarĩ ithe wa Ido, Ido aarĩ ithe wa Zera, naake Zera aarĩ ithe wa Jeatherai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Njiarwa cia Kohathu kuuma rũciaro rũmwe kinyagia rũrĩa rũngĩ ciahaanaga ta ũũ: Kohathu aarĩ ithe wa Aminadabu, Aminadabu aarĩ ithe wa Kora, Kora aarĩ ithe wa Asiru, Asiru aarĩ ithe wa Elikana," 
1Chronicles6:23 Elikana aarĩ ithe wa Ebiasafu, Ebiasafu aarĩ ithe wa Aziru," 
1Chronicles6:24 Aziru aarĩ ithe wa Tahathu, Tahathu aarĩ ithe wa Urieli, naake Urieli aarĩ ithe wa Uzia, naake Uzia aarĩ ithe wa Shaulu." 
1Chronicles6:25 Elikana aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Amasai na Ahimothu. 
1Chronicles6:26 Njiarwa cia Ahimothu kuuma rũciaro rũmwe kinyagia rũrĩa rũngĩ ciahaanaga ta ũũ: Ahimothu aarĩ ithe wa Elikana, Elikana aarĩ ithe wa Zofai, Zofai aarĩ ithe wa Nahathu, Nahathu aarĩ ithe wa Eliabu," 
1Chronicles6:27 Eliabu aarĩ ithe wa Jerohamu, naake Jerohamu aarĩ ithe wa Elikana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Samũeli aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Joeli nĩ we warĩ wa irigithaathi, naake Abija nĩ we warĩ mũnyiinyi." 
1Chronicles6:28 Samũeli aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Joeli nĩ we warĩ wa irigithaathi, naake Abija nĩ we warĩ mũnyiinyi." 
1Chronicles6:29 Njiarwa cia Merari kuuma rũciaro rũmwe kinyagia rũrĩa rũngĩ ciahaanaga ta ũũ: Merari aarĩ ithe wa Mahili, Mahili aarĩ ithe wa Libini, Libini aarĩ ithe wa Shimei, Shimei aarĩ ithe wa Uza," 
1Chronicles6:30 Uza aarĩ ithe wa Shimea, Shimea aarĩ ithe wa Hagia, naake Hagia aarĩ ithe wa Asaia." 
1Chronicles6:31 Nao andũ aya nĩ o mũthamaki Daudi aatuire marũmbũyagie ũini wa nyĩmbo handũ harĩa hathaathayagĩrio kũu Jerusalemu thuutha wa Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro gũtoonyio ho. 
1Chronicles6:32 Nao nĩgũtuanĩra maatuanagĩra ũini wa nyĩmbo kũu Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo nginyagia rĩrĩa mũthamaki Solomoni aakire Hekaarũ. 
1Chronicles6:33 Na rĩĩrĩ, mĩtaratara ya nyũmba cia arĩa matungataga yarũmanĩrĩire ta ũũ:Mbarĩ ya Kohathu: Hemani mũrũ wa Joeli nĩ we warĩ mũinithia wa gĩkundi kĩa mbere. Nakĩo kĩhumo kĩa mũciĩ wake kĩoimanĩĩte na Jakubu na gĩatariĩ ta ũũ: Hemani aarĩ mũrũ wa Joeli, Joeli mũrũ wa Samũeli, Samũeli mũrũ wa Elikana," 
1Chronicles6:33 Na rĩĩrĩ, mĩtaratara ya nyũmba cia arĩa matungataga yarũmanĩrĩire ta ũũ:Mbarĩ ya Kohathu: Hemani mũrũ wa Joeli nĩ we warĩ mũinithia wa gĩkundi kĩa mbere. Nakĩo kĩhumo kĩa mũciĩ wake kĩoimanĩĩte na Jakubu na gĩatariĩ ta ũũ: Hemani aarĩ mũrũ wa Joeli, Joeli mũrũ wa Samũeli, Samũeli mũrũ wa Elikana," 
1Chronicles6:34 Elikana mũrũ wa Jerohamu, Jerohamu mũrũ wa Elieli, Elieli mũrũ wa Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 Toa mũrũ wa Zufi, Zufi mũrũ wa Elikana, Elikana mũrũ wa Mahathu, Mahathu mũrũ wa Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 Amasai mũrũ wa Elikana, Elikana mũrũ wa Joeli, Joeli mũrũ wa Azaria, Azaria mũrũ wa Zefania," 
1Chronicles6:36 Amasai mũrũ wa Elikana, Elikana mũrũ wa Joeli, Joeli mũrũ wa Azaria, Azaria mũrũ wa Zefania," 
1Chronicles6:37 Zefania mũrũ wa Tahathu, Tahathu mũrũ wa Asiru, Asiru mũrũ wa Ebiasafu, Ebiasafu mũrũ wa Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 Kora mũrũ wa Iziharu, Iziharu mũrũ wa Kohathu, Kohathu mũrũ wa Lawi, naake Lawi mũrũ wa Jakubu." 
1Chronicles6:39 Naake Asafu nĩ we warĩ mũinithia wa gĩkundi gĩa keerĩ. Nakĩo kĩhumo kĩa mũciĩ wake kĩoimanĩĩte na Lawi na gĩatariĩ ũũ: Asafu aarĩ mũrũ wa Berekia, Berekia mũrũ wa Shimei," 
1Chronicles6:40 Shimea mũrũ wa Mikaeli, Mikaeli mũrũ wa Baaseia, Baaseia mũrũ wa Malikija," 
1Chronicles6:41 Malikija mũrũ wa Ethini, Ethini mũrũ wa Zera, Zera mũrũ wa Adaia," 
1Chronicles6:42 Adaia mũrũ wa Ethani, Ethani mũrũ wa Zima, Zima mũrũ wa Shimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 Shimei mũrũ wa Jahathu, Jahathu mũrũ wa Gerishoni, naake Gerishoni mũrũ wa Lawi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Naake Ethani wa mbarĩ ya Merari nĩ we warĩ mũinithia wa nyĩmbo wa gĩkundi gĩa gatatũ. Nakĩo kĩhumo kĩa mũciĩ wake kĩoimanĩĩte na Lawi na gĩatariĩ ũũ: Ethani aarĩ mũrũ wa Kishi, Kishi mũrũ wa Abudi, Abudi mũrũ wa Maluku," 
1Chronicles6:45 Maluku aarĩ mũrũ wa Hashabia, Hashabia aarĩ mũrũ wa Amazia, Amazia arĩ mũrũ wa Hilikia, Hilikia arĩ mũrũ wa Amuzi," 
1Chronicles6:46 Amuzi mũrũ wa Bani, Bani mũrũ wa Shemeru," 
1Chronicles6:47 Shemeru mũrũ wa Mahali, Mahali mũrũ wa Mushi, Mushi mũrũ wa Merari, naake Merari mũrũ wa Lawi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Nao Alawii acio angĩ makĩgaĩrwo mawĩra marĩa mangĩ moothe ma handũ harĩa haathaathayagĩrio. 
1Chronicles6:49 Na rĩĩrĩ, Harũni na aariũ aake nĩ o maarutagĩra kĩgongoonainĩ magongoona ma njino o na ma ũbaani. Wĩra wao warĩ kũhingia maũndũ moothe ma gũthaathaiya marĩa meekagĩrwo Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno, o na kũruta magongoona ma kũhoroheria Aisiraeli, o ta ũrĩa Musa ndungata ya Ngai aathanĩĩte gwĩkagwo." 
1Chronicles6:50 Ũyũ nĩguo mũtaratara wa njiarwa cia Harũni: Harũni aarĩ ithe wa Eleazaru, Eleazaru aarĩ ithe wa Finehasi, Finehasi aarĩ ithe wa Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:51 Abishua aarĩ ithe wa Buki, Buki aarĩ ithe wa Uzu, Uzi aarĩ ithe wa Zerahia," 
1Chronicles6:52 Zerahia aarĩ ithe wa Meraiothu, Meraiothu aarĩ ithe wa Amaria, Amaria aarĩ ithe wa Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:53 Ahitubu, aarĩ ithe wa Zadoku, naake Zadoku aarĩ ithe wa Ahimaazu." 
1Chronicles6:54 Na rĩĩrĩ, ũyũ nĩguo bũrũri ũrĩa wagaĩrwo njiarwa cia Harũni cia mbarĩ ya Kohathu: Mbarĩ ya Kohathu nĩ yo yaheirwo igai rĩa mbere rĩa bũrũri ũrĩa wagaĩrwo Alawii." 
1Chronicles6:55 Bũrũriinĩ wa Juda nĩmaaheirwo Heburoni o na ithaka cia kũrĩithia iria ciagũthiũrũrũkĩirie. 
1Chronicles6:56 No rĩĩrĩ, mĩgũnda na tũtũũra twa itũũra rĩu, twaheirwo Kalebu mũrũ wa Jefune." 
1Chronicles6:57 (57-59) Na rĩĩrĩ, njiarwa cia Harũni ciaheirwo matũũra maya: Heburoni (itũũra rĩa kũũrĩrwo nĩ mũndũ ooragana atekwenda), Jatiru, Libina, Eshitemoa, Hileni, Debiri, Ashani na Bethi Shemeshi, o itũũra rĩaheanagwo hamwe na ithaka ciarĩo cia kũrĩithia." 
1Chronicles6:58 Bũrũriinĩ wa Benjamini maaheirwo matũũra maya: Geba, Alemethu na Anathothu, o hamwe na ithaka ciamo cia kũrĩithia. Matũũra maao moothe maarĩ ikũmi na matatũ." 
1Chronicles6:59 Andũ a mbarĩ ya Kohathu arĩa maatigarire maaheirwo matũũra ikũmi thĩinĩ wa bũrũri wa nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase ya mwena wa ithũĩro. O mũciĩ waheagwo itũũra na njĩra ya gũcuuka mĩtĩ. 
1Chronicles6:60 Nao andũ a mbarĩ ya Gerishoni maaheirwo matũũra ikũmi na matatũ kũringana na mĩciĩ yao. Matũũra macio maaheanirwo bũrũriinĩ wa Isakaru, Asheri, Nafutali, na wa nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase ya mwena wa Irathĩro kũu Bashani." 
1Chronicles6:61 Andũ a mbarĩ ya Merari maaheirwo matũũra ikũmi na meerĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Reubeni, wa Gadi na wa Zebuluni o kũringana na mĩciĩ yao." 
1Chronicles6:62 Ũguo nĩguo andũ a Isiraeli maagaĩire Alawii matũũra o na ithaka cia kũrĩithia iria ciarigiicĩirie matũũra macio. 
1Chronicles6:63 (Matũũra macio magweteetwo hau kabere ma bũrũri wa Juda, Simeoni na Benjamini maaheanirwo na njĩra ya gũcuuka mĩtĩ.)" 
1Chronicles6:64 Ningĩ mĩciĩ ĩmwe ya mbarĩ ya Kohathu nĩyaheirwo matũũra na ithaka cia kũrĩithia bũrũriinĩ wa Efiraimu, namo nĩ mo:" 
1Chronicles6:65 Shekemu (itũũra rĩa kũũrĩrwo nĩ mũndũ ooragana atekwenda, bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma nyingĩ wa Efiraimu), Gezeri," 
1Chronicles6:66 Jokimeamu, Bethi Horoni," 
1Chronicles6:67 Aijaloni, na Gathu Rimoni." 
1Chronicles6:68 Bũrũriinĩ wa nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase ya mwena wa ithũĩro yaheirwo matũũra ma Aneri, Bileamu o hamwe na ithaka cia kũrĩithia." 
1Chronicles6:69 Nayo mĩciĩ ya mbarĩ ya Gerishoni yaheirwo matũũra na ithaka cia kũrĩithio ta ũũ: bũrũriinĩ wa nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase ya mwena wa Irathĩro maaheirwo: Golani thĩinĩ wa Bashani, na Ashitorathu." 
1Chronicles6:70 Bũrũriinĩ wa Isakaru maaheirwo matũũra na ithaka cia kũrĩithia ta ũũ: Kedeshi, Daberathu," 
1Chronicles6:71 Ramothu, na Anemu." 
1Chronicles6:72 Bũrũriinĩ wa Asheri maaheirwo matũũra na ithaka cia kũrĩithia ta ũũ: Mashali, Abidoni," 
1Chronicles6:73 Hukoku, na Rehobu." 
1Chronicles6:74 Bũrũriinĩ wa Nafutali maaheirwo matũũra na ithaka cia kũrĩithia ta ũũ: Kedeshi thĩinĩ wa Galili, Hamoni, na Kiriathaimu." 
1Chronicles6:75 Mĩciĩ ĩrĩa yatigarire ya mbarĩ ya Merari yaheirwo matũũra maya na ithaka cia kũrĩithia iria ciamarigiicĩirie:Bũrũriinĩ wa Zebuluni yaheirwo: Rimono na Taboru. 
1Chronicles6:76 Bũrũriinĩ wa Reubeni na mwena wa irathĩro wa rũũĩ rwa Jorodani gũkuhĩ na itũũra rĩa Jeriko yaheirwo Bezeri werũinĩ, Jahaza," 
1Chronicles6:77 Kedemothu, na Mefaathu." 
1Chronicles6:78 Bũrũriinĩ wa Gadi yaheirwo matũũra na ithaka cia kũrĩithia ta ũũ: Ramothu bũrũriinĩ wa Gileadi, Mahanaimu," 
1Chronicles6:79 Heshiboni, na Jazeni." 
1Chronicles7:1 Isakaru aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana nao nĩ o: Tola, Pua, Jashabu, na Shimuroni." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tola aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atandatũ nao nĩ o: Uzi, Refaia, Jerieli, Jahamai, Ibisamu, na Shemueli. Acio nĩ o maarĩ anene a mĩciĩ ya mbarĩ ya Tola na maarĩ thigari ciarĩ igweta. Matukũinĩ ma mũthamaki Daudi njiarwa ciao ciarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ na magana matandatũ (22,600)." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzi aarĩ ithe wa mũũriũ ũmwe wetagwo Izirahia. Naake Izirahia aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana nao nĩ o: Mikaeli, Obadia, Joeli, na Ishia. Acio nĩ o maarĩ anene a mĩciĩ yao." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzi aarĩ ithe wa mũũriũ ũmwe wetagwo Izirahia. Naake Izirahia aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana nao nĩ o: Mikaeli, Obadia, Joeli, na Ishia. Acio nĩ o maarĩ anene a mĩciĩ yao." 
1Chronicles7:4 Nao makĩhikia atumia aingĩ na magĩciara ciana nyingĩ mũno ũguo atĩ nĩkwoimire andũ ngiri mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ithathatũ (36,000) mangĩahotire gũtuĩka thigari." 
1Chronicles7:5 Nao andũ oothe a mĩciĩ ya mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩnaana na mũgwanja (87,000) arĩa mangĩahotire gũtuĩka thigari." 
1Chronicles7:6 Benjamini aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ, nao nĩ o: Bela, Bekeri, na Jediaeli." 
1Chronicles7:7 Bela aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ataano, nao nĩ o: Eziboni, Uzi, Uzieli, Jerimothu, na Iri. Acio nĩ o maarĩ anene a mbarĩ ciao na maarĩ thigari ciarĩ igweta. Njiarwainĩ ciao kwarĩ andũ ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ na mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ana (22,034) arĩa mangĩahotire gũtuĩka thigari." 
1Chronicles7:8 Bekeri aarĩ ithe wa aariũ kenda nao nĩ o: Zemira, Joashu, Eliezeri, Elioenai, Omuri, Jeremothu, Abija, Anathothu, na Alemethu." 
1Chronicles7:9 Nao andũ oothe a mbarĩ ciao arĩa mangĩahotire gũtuĩka thigari maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na magana meerĩ (20,200)." 
1Chronicles7:10 Jedieli aarĩ ithe wa mũũriũ ũmwe wetagwo Bilihani, naake Bilihani aarĩ ithe wa aariũ mũgwanja nao nĩ o: Jeushi, Benjamini, Ehudi, Kenaana, Zethani, Tarishishi, na Ahishaharu." 
1Chronicles7:11 Acio nĩ o maarĩ anene a mbarĩ ciao na oothe maarĩ thigari ciarĩ igweta. Njiarwainĩ ciao nĩkwarĩ andũ ngiri ikũmi na mũgwanja na magana meerĩ (17,200) arĩa mangĩahotire gũtuĩka thigari." 
1Chronicles7:12 O nao Shupimu na Hupimu maarĩ a mũhĩrĩga ũcio.Dani aarĩ ithe wa mũũriũ ũmwe wetagwo Hushimu. 
1Chronicles7:13 Nafutali aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana nao nĩ o: Jahazieli, Guni, Jezeri, na Shalumu. (Acio maarĩ njiarwa cia Biliha.)" 
1Chronicles7:14 Na rĩĩrĩ, Manase aarĩ na mũtumia wa kũigwo Mũaramea, naake akĩmũciarĩra aariũ eerĩ: Asirieli na Makiru. Naake Makiru aarĩ ithe wa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles7:15 Na rĩĩrĩ, Makiru nĩagũranĩire Hupimu na Shupimu. Mwarĩ wa nyina na Makiru eetagwo Maaka. Mũũriũ wa keerĩ wa Makiru eetagwo Zelofehadi. Zelofehadi aarĩ o na airĩĩtu atheri." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka mũtumia wa Makiru aaciarire aariũ eerĩ, nao nĩ o: Pereshu na Shereshu. Pereshu aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ nao nĩ o: Ulamu na Rekemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulamu aarĩ ithe wa mũũriũ wetagwo Bedani. Icio nĩcio njiarwa cia Gileadi mũrũ wa Makiru na mũcũkũrũ wa Manase. 
1Chronicles7:18 Na rĩĩrĩ, Gileadi aarĩ na mwarĩ wa nyina wetagwo Hamolekethu, naake agĩciara aariũ atatũ, nao nĩ o: Ishihodu, Abiezeri, na Mahala." 
1Chronicles7:19 (Shemida aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana, nao nĩ o: Ahiani, Shekemu, Liki, na Aniamu.)" 
1Chronicles7:20 Ici nĩcio njiarwa cia Efiraimu kuuma rũciaro rũmwe kinyagia rũrĩa rũngĩ. Efiraimu aarĩ ithe wa Shuthela, Shuthela aarĩ ithe wa Beredi, Beredi aarĩ ithe wa Tahathu, Tahathu aarĩ ithe wa Eleada, Eleada aarĩ ithe wa Tahathu," 
1Chronicles7:21 Tahathu aarĩ ithe wa Zabadu, naake Zabadu aarĩ ithe wa Shuthela. Efiraimu aarĩ ithe wa aariũ angĩ eerĩ, nao nĩ o: Ezeri na Eleadi arĩa mooragirwo nĩ andũ a bũrũri wa Gathu nĩ ũndũ wa kũiya ng'ombe ciao." 
1Chronicles7:22 Naake Efiraimu, ithe wao, akĩmarĩrĩra matukũ maingĩ, nao andũ aao magĩũka kũmũhooreria." 
1Chronicles7:23 Thuutha ũcio, Efiraimu agĩkoma na mũtumia wake, naake akĩgĩa nda, agĩciara kaana ga kahĩĩ, magĩgatua Beria nĩ ũndũ wa mũtino ũrĩa wakoreete mũciĩ wao." 
1Chronicles7:24 Efiraimu nĩarĩ na mwarĩ wetagwo Sheera, ũrĩa wakire Bethi Horoni ya na Rũgongo na Bethi Horoni ya na Kĩanda, na agĩaka itũũra rĩa Uzeni Sheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Ningĩ Efiraimu aarĩ na mũũriũ ũngĩ wetagwo Refa. Refa aarĩ ithe wa Resefu, Resefu aarĩ ithe wa Tela, Tela aarĩ ithe wa Tahani," 
1Chronicles7:26 Tahani aarĩ ithe wa Ladani, Ladani aarĩ ithe wa Amihudu, Amihudu aarĩ ithe wa Elishama," 
1Chronicles7:27 Elishama aarĩ ithe wa Nuni, naake Nuni aarĩ ithe wa Joshua." 
1Chronicles7:27 Elishama aarĩ ithe wa Nuni, naake Nuni aarĩ ithe wa Joshua." 
1Chronicles7:28 Naguo bũrũri ũrĩa meegwatĩire na magĩtũũra wahĩmbĩirie Betheli o hamwe na matũũra marĩa magũthiũrũrũkĩirie, ũgathiĩ na mwena wa irathĩro nginyagia Naarani, nakuo mwena wa ithũĩro wathiĩte nginyagia Gezeri na matũũra marĩa maagũthiũrũkĩirie. O na nĩwahĩmbĩirie matũũra ma Shekemu na Aya na matũũra marĩa maathiũrũrũkĩirie." 
1Chronicles7:29 Ningĩ nĩwahakaine na njiarwa cia Manase iria ciatũũraga matũũra ma Bethi Shani, Taanaka, Megido, na Dori na tũtũũra twamo.Kũndũ kũu guothe nĩkuo njiarwa cia Josefu mũrũ wa Jakubu ciatũũraga." 
1Chronicles7:30 Na rĩĩrĩ, Asheri aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana, nao nĩ o: Imuna, Ishiva, Ishivi, na Beria; nĩarĩ na mũirĩĩtu wetagwo Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Beria aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ, nao nĩ o: Heberi na Malikieli. (Malikieli nĩ we wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Birizaithu.)" 
1Chronicles7:32 Heberi aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ, nao nĩ o: Jafileti, Shomeri, na Hothamu; nĩarĩ na mũirĩĩtu wetagwo Shua." 
1Chronicles7:33 Jafileti aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ, nao nĩ o: Pasaka, Bimihali, na Ashavathu." 
1Chronicles7:34 Mũrũ wa nyina Shemeru aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ, nao nĩ o: Rohaga, Jehuba, na Aramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Mũrũ wa nyina Hothamu aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana, nao nĩ o: Zofa, Imuna, Sheleshu, na Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Naake Zofa aarĩ ithe wa: Sua, Harineferi, Shuali, Beri, Imura," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezeri, Hodu, Shama, Shilusha, Ithurani, na Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Na rĩĩrĩ Jetheri aarĩ ithe wa: Jefune, Pisipa, na Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Naake Ula aarĩ ithe wa: Ara, Hanieli, na Rizia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Icio ciothe nĩcio ciarĩ njiarwa cia Asheri. Acio nĩ o maarĩ anene a mbarĩ ciao, njamba cia ita na atongoria a bata. Njiarwainĩ icio ciothe cia Asheri nĩkwarĩ andũ ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ithathatũ (26,000) arĩa mangĩahotire gũtuĩka thigari." 
1Chronicles8:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Benjamini aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ataano, nao maarũmanĩrĩire ta ũũ: Bela, Ashibeli, Ahara," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha, na Rafa." 
1Chronicles8:3 Naake Bela aarĩ ithe wa: Adari, Gera, Abihudu," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abishua, Naamani, Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Shefufani, na Huramu." 
1Chronicles8:6 (6-7) Ehudi aarĩ ithe wa: Naamani, Ahija, na Gera. Acio nĩ o maarĩ anene a mbarĩ cia maithe iria ciatũũraga Geba, iria ciacookire kũingatwo igĩthiĩ gũtũũra Manahathu. Na rĩĩrĩ, Gera, ithe wa Uza na Ahihudu, nĩ we wamatongoririe kũũra maingatwo." 
1Chronicles8:7 (8-9) Na rĩĩrĩ, Shaharaimu arĩĩkia gũtigana na atumia aake eerĩ Hushimu na Baara, agĩthiĩ gũtũũra bũrũriinĩ wa Moabi. Arĩ kũu, akĩhikia Hodeshu na makĩgĩa na aariũ mũgwanja, nao nĩ o: Jobabu, Zibia, Mesha, Malikamu," 
1Chronicles8:7 (8-9) Na rĩĩrĩ, Shaharaimu arĩĩkia gũtigana na atumia aake eerĩ Hushimu na Baara, agĩthiĩ gũtũũra bũrũriinĩ wa Moabi. Arĩ kũu, akĩhikia Hodeshu na makĩgĩa na aariũ mũgwanja, nao nĩ o: Jobabu, Zibia, Mesha, Malikamu," 
1Chronicles8:8 Jeuzu, Sakia, na Mirima. Acio oothe nĩ o maatuĩkire anene a mbarĩ ciao." 
1Chronicles8:9 Ningĩ Shaharaimu na Hushimu nĩmaaciarĩĩte aariũ eerĩ, nao nĩ o: Abitubu na Elipaali." 
1Chronicles8:10 Naake Elipaali aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ nao nĩ o: Eberi, Mishamu na Shemedi. Shemedi nĩwe wakire itũũra rĩa Ono na rĩa Lodi o na tũtũũra tũrĩa twathiũrũrũkĩirie matũũra macio." 
1Chronicles8:11 Na rĩĩrĩ, Beria na Shema nĩ o maarĩ anene a mbarĩ iria ciatũũraga Aijaloni na nĩ o maingatire andũ arĩa matũũraga itũũra rĩa Gathu." 
1Chronicles8:12 Beria aarĩ ithe wa Ahio, Shashaka, Jeremothu," 
1Chronicles8:13 Zebadia, Aradi, Ederi" 
1Chronicles8:14 Mikaeli, Ishipa, na Joha." 
1Chronicles8:15 Na rĩĩrĩ, njiarwa imwe cia Elipaali ciarĩ Zebadia, Meshulamu, Hiziki, Heberi," 
1Chronicles8:16 Ishimerai, Izilia, na Jobabu." 
1Chronicles8:16 Ishimerai, Izilia, na Jobabu." 
1Chronicles8:17 Nacio njiarwa imwe cia Shimei ciarĩ: Jakimu, Zikiri, Zabedi," 
1Chronicles8:18 Elienai, Zilethai, Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:19 Adaia, Beraia, na Shimirathu." 
1Chronicles8:20 Nacio njiarwa imwe cia Shashaka ciarĩ: Ishipani, Eberi, Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:21 Abidoni, Zakiri, Hanamu," 
1Chronicles8:22 Hanania, Elamu, Anithothinja," 
1Chronicles8:23 Ifideia, na Penueli." 
1Chronicles8:24 Na rĩĩrĩ, njiarwa cia Jerohamu ciarĩ: Shamusherai, Sheharia, Athalia," 
1Chronicles8:25 Jaareshia, Elija, na Zikiri." 
1Chronicles8:26 Acio nĩ o maarĩ anene a njiarwa cia mbarĩ ciao na oothe maatũũraga Jerusalemu. 
1Chronicles8:27 Jeieli nĩ we wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Gibeoni na nokuo aatũũraga. Mũtumia wake eetagwo Maaka. 
1Chronicles8:28 Ciana ciake ciarũmanĩrĩire ta ũũ: Abidoni nĩ we warĩ wa irigithaathi, agacookwo nĩ Zuru, Kishu, Baali, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:29 Gedori, Ahio, Zekeri," 
1Chronicles8:30 na Mikilothu ithe wa Shimea. Njiarwa icio ciothe ciatũũraga Jerusalemu hakuhĩ na mbarĩ iria ingĩ ciao. 
1Chronicles8:31 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, Neri aarĩ ithe wa Kishu, Kishu aarĩ ithe wa Saũlũ. Saũlũ aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana, nao nĩ o: Jonathani, Malikishua, Abinadabu, na Eshibaali." 
1Chronicles8:32 Naake Jonathani aarĩ ithe wa Meribubaali, naake Meribubaali aarĩ ithe wa Mika." 
1Chronicles8:33 Naake Mika aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana nao nĩ o: Pithoni, Meleku, Tarea, na Ahazu." 
1Chronicles8:34 Naake Ahazu aarĩ ithe wa Jehoada, Jehoada aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ, nao nĩ o: Alemethu, Azamavethu, Zimuri. Zimuri aarĩ ithe wa Moza," 
1Chronicles8:35 Moza aarĩ ithe wa Binea, Binea aarĩ ithe wa Rafa, Rafa aarĩ ithe wa Eleasa, naake Eleasa aarĩ ithe wa Azeli." 
1Chronicles8:36 Naake Azeli aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atandatũ nao nĩ o: Azirikamu, Bokeru, Ishumaeli, Shearia, Obadia, na Hanamu." 
1Chronicles8:37 Naake Esheku mũrũ wa ithe na Azeli aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ na maarũmanĩrĩire ta ũũ: Ulamu, Jeushi, na Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles8:38 Nao aariũ a Ulamu maarĩ thigari njoorua o na arathi na mĩguĩ maarĩ igweta. Naake aarĩ na aariũ na tũcũkũrũ igana na mĩrongo ĩtaano (150). Acio oothe magweteetwo maarĩ a mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini. 
1Chronicles9:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ oothe a Isiraeli maandĩkĩĩtwo kũringana na ndĩra ciao, na ũhoro ũcio wandĩkĩĩtwo Ibukuinĩ rĩa Athamaki a Isiraeli.Andũ a Juda nĩmaatahĩĩtwo magatwarwo Babiloni nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maao." 
1Chronicles9:2 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ a mbere gũcooka ũgaiinĩ na matũũrainĩ maao nĩ Aisiraeli o ũguo, athĩnjĩri Ngai, Alawii, o na ndungata cia Hekaarũ." 
1Chronicles9:3 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ amwe a mũhĩrĩga wa Juda, Benjamini, Efiraimu na wa Manase maathiire gũtũũra Jerusalemu." 
1Chronicles9:4 (4-6) Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Juda arĩa maathiire gũtũũra Jerusalemu maarĩ mĩciĩ magana matandatũ ma mĩrongo kenda (690). Na rĩĩrĩ, njiarwa cia Perezu mũrũ wa Juda ciatongoreetio nĩ Uthai mũrũ wa Amihudi na mũcũkũrũ wa Omuri; naake Omuri aarĩ mũrũ wa Imuri na mũcũkũrũ wa Bani.Nacio cia Shela mũrũ wa Juda ciatongoreetio nĩ Asaia, na nĩwe warĩ mũnene wa mbarĩ yao.Nacio cia Zera mũũriũ ũcio ũngĩ wa Juda ciatongoreetio nĩ Jeueli." 
1Chronicles9:5 (7-8) Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini arĩa maathiire gũtũũra Jerusalemu nĩ:Salu mũrũ wa Meshulamu na mũcũkũrũ wa Hodavia mũrũ wa HasenuaIbineia mũrũ wa JerohamuEla mũrũ wa Uzi na mũcũkũrũ wa MikiriMeshulamu mũrũ wa Shefatia, Shefatia mũrũ wa Reueli, Reueli mũrũ wa Ibinija." 
1Chronicles9:6 Andũ a mũhĩrĩga ũcio wa Benjamini arĩa maathiire gũtũũra Jerusalemu maarĩ mĩciĩ magana kenda ma mĩrongo ĩtaano na ĩtandatũ (956). Nao acio oothe magweteetwo hau igũrũ nĩ o maarĩ anene a mĩciĩ. 
1Chronicles9:7 (10-12) Athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa maathiire gũtũũra Jerusalemu, nao nĩ aya:Jedaia, Jehoiaribu, JakiniAzaria (ũrĩa warĩ mũnene wa hekaarũ) mũrũ wa Hilikia, Hilikia mũrũ wa Meshulamu, Meshulamu mũrũ wa Zadoku, Zadoku mũrũ wa Meraiothu, Meraiothu mũrũ wa AhitubuAdaia mũrũ wa Jerohamu, Jerohamu mũrũ wa Pashuri, Pashuri mũrũ wa MalikijaMaasai mũrũ wa Adieli, Adieli mũrũ wa Jahazera, Jahazera mũrũ wa Meshulamu, Meshulamu mũrũ wa Meshilemithu, Meshilemithu mũrũ wa Imeri." 
1Chronicles9:8 Athĩnjĩri Ngai ngiri ĩmwe na magana mũgwanja ma mĩrongo ĩtandatũ (1,760) maarĩ anene a mĩciĩ, na maarĩ njoorua cia kũruta mawĩra ma Hekaarũ." 
1Chronicles9:9 (14-16) Alawii arĩa maathiire gũtũũra Jerusalemu nĩ: Shemaia mũrũ wa Hashubu, Hashubu mũrũ wa Azirikamu, Azirikamu mũrũ wa Hashabia wa mbarĩ ya MerariBakabakari, Hereshu, na GalaliMatania mũrũ wa Mika, Mika mũrũ wa Zikiri, Zikiri mũrũ wa Asafu,Obadia mũrũ wa Shemaia, Shemaia mũrũ wa Galali, Galali mũrũ wa JeduthuniBerekia mũrũ wa Asa na mũcũkũrũ wa Elikana, ũrĩa watũũraga matũũra ma rũgongo rwa Netofa." 
1Chronicles9:10 Aya nao nĩ o arangĩri a Hekaarũ arĩa maathiire gũtũũra Jerusalemu; Shalumu, Akubu, Talimoni, Ahimani na andũ a nyũmba ya maithe maao. Naake Shalumu nĩ we warĩ mũnene wao." 
1Chronicles9:11 Mbere ĩyo nĩ o maarangagĩra kĩhingo gĩa kwa mũthamaki kĩa mwena wa irathĩro. Ningĩ no o maarĩ arangĩri a ihingo cia kũrĩa Alawii maikaraga. 
1Chronicles9:12 Na rĩĩrĩ, Shalumu, mũrũ wa Kore na mũcũkũrũ wa Ebiasafu, marĩ hamwe na mbarĩ yao ya Kora, nĩ o maarĩ arangĩri a kĩhingo gĩa gũtoonya Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo, o ta ũrĩa maithe maao maamenyagĩrĩra kambĩ ya MWATHANI." 
1Chronicles9:13 Finehasi mũrũ wa Eleazaru aarĩ mũnene wao rĩmwe tene; MWATHANI aarĩ hamwe naake. 
1Chronicles9:14 O naake Zekaria mũrũ wa Meshelemia, aarĩ mũrangĩri wa kĩhingo gĩa gũtoonya Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo." 
1Chronicles9:15 Andũ acio oothe maathuurĩĩtwo kũrangĩra ihingo, nao maarĩ magana meerĩ na ikũmi na eerĩ (212). Nao maandĩkĩĩtwo kũringana na matũũra marĩa maatũũraga. Namo mawĩra macio ma bata ũguo, maaheirwo maithe maao nĩ mũthamaki Daudi na Mũnabii Samũeli." 
1Chronicles9:16 Nao andũ acio o hamwe na njiarwa ciao magĩthiĩ na mbere kũruta wĩra wa kũrangĩra ihingo icio cia Hekaarũ. 
1Chronicles9:17 Kwarĩ na ihingo inya, o kĩhingo kĩroreete na mwena wakĩo; ũguo nĩ ta kuuga, mwena wa irathĩro, ithũĩro, rũgongo o na mwena wa kĩanda. Ningĩ o kĩhingo kĩarĩ na mũrangĩri ũrĩa warĩ mũnene." 
1Chronicles9:18 Nao arangĩri acio mateithagĩrĩrio nĩ andũ a mbarĩ ciao arĩa maatũũranagia nao matũũrainĩ maao, na maatuanagĩra mĩthenya mũgwanja ya kũmateithĩrĩria, mahinda mamwe na mamwe." 
1Chronicles9:19 Nao arangĩri acio ana anene a ihingo maarĩ Alawii, na nĩ o maathanaga. Ningĩ nĩ o maamenyagĩrĩra tũnyũmba tũrĩa twarĩ thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ, o na harĩa mĩthiithũ ya bata ya Hekaarũ yaigagwo." 
1Chronicles9:20 Nao maikaraga hakuhĩ na Hekaarũ, tondũ warĩ wĩra wao wa kũmĩrangĩra na kũhingũraga ihingo ciayo o rũũciinĩ." 
1Chronicles9:21 Alawii arĩa angĩ nĩ o maarĩ amenyereri a indo iria ciahũthagĩrwo hĩndĩ ya gũthaathaiya Hekaarũinĩ. Nĩ o maacitaraga ikiumio na igĩcookio. 
1Chronicles9:22 Amwe a acio nĩ o maarĩ amenyereri a indo iria ciarĩ nyamũre, mũtu ũrĩa mũhinyu, ndibei, maguta, ũbaani, o na indo nungi wega." 
1Chronicles9:23 No warĩ wĩra wa athĩnjĩri Ngai gũtukanagia indo icio nungi wega. 
1Chronicles9:24 Mũlawii ũmwe wetagwo Matithia irigithaathi rĩa Shalumu wa mbarĩ ya Kora nĩ we waheetwo wĩra wa gũkanda mĩgate ya magongoona. 
1Chronicles9:25 Nayo mbarĩ ya Kohathu nĩ yo yaheetwo wĩra wa gũthondeka mĩgate mĩtheru ĩrĩa yarutagĩrwo Ngai Hekaarũinĩ mĩthenya ya Thabatũ. 
1Chronicles9:26 Ningĩ nĩkwarĩ na andũ amwe a mĩciĩ ya Alawii arĩa maaheetwo wĩra wa kũina nyĩmbo Hekaarũinĩ. Nao anene a mbarĩ ciao maatũũraga tũnyũmbainĩ twa Hekaarũ na gũtirĩ wĩra ũngĩ maarutaga nĩ ũndũ nĩmangĩetirwo hĩndĩ o yothe mũthenya kana ũtukũ. 
1Chronicles9:27 Andũ acio nĩ o maarĩ anene a mĩciĩ ya Alawii kũringana na ũrĩa njiarwa ciao ciatariĩ, na maatũũraga Jerusalemu." 
1Chronicles9:28 Jeieli nĩwe wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Gibeoni na nĩkuo aatũũraga. Mũtumia wake eetagwo Maaka. 
1Chronicles9:29 Ciana ciake ciarũmanĩrĩire ta ũũ: Abidoni, Zuru, Kishu, Baali, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:30 Gedori, Ahio, Zekaria, na Mikilothu" 
1Chronicles9:31 ithe wa Shimea. Njiarwa icio ciothe ciatũũraga Jerusalemu hakuhĩ na mbarĩ iria ingĩ cia maithe maacio. 
1Chronicles9:32 Neri aarĩ ithe wa Kishu, naake Kishu aarĩ ithe wa Saũlũ. Naake Saũlũ aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana, nao nĩ o: Jonathani, Malikishua, Abinadabu, na Eshibaali." 
1Chronicles9:33 Jonathani aarĩ ithe wa Meribubaali, naake Meribubaali aarĩ ithe wa Mika." 
1Chronicles9:34 Mika aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ana nao nĩ o: Pithoni, Meleku, Tarea, na Ahazu." 
1Chronicles9:35 Ahazu aarĩ ithe wa Jara, naake Jara aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atatũ nao nĩ o: Alemethu, Azamavethu, na Zimuri. Naake Zimuri aarĩ ithe wa Moza." 
1Chronicles9:36 Moza aarĩ ithe wa Binea, Binea aarĩ ithe wa Rafaia, Rafaia aarĩ ithe wa Eleasa, naake Eleasa aarĩ ithe wa Azeli." 
1Chronicles9:37 Azeli aarĩ ithe wa aariũ atandatũ, na nĩ o: Azirikamu, Bokeru, Ishumaeli, Shearia, Obadia, na Hanani." 
1Chronicles10:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Afilisiti magĩkĩhũũrana na Aisiraeli kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Giliboa. Nao andũ aingĩ mũno a Isiraeli makĩũragĩrwo kuo. Andũ acio angĩ makĩũra, o hamwe na Saũlũ na aariũ aake." 
1Chronicles10:2 Nao Afilisiti makĩmateng'eria na makĩũraga aariũ a Saũlũ: Jonathani, Abinadabu, na Malikishua." 
1Chronicles10:3 Nayo mbaara ĩgĩkĩũmĩra Saũlũ mũno, naake akĩrathwo na mĩguĩ nĩ thũ ciake, agĩtiihio mũno." 
1Chronicles10:4 Saũlũ agĩkĩĩra mwanake ũrĩa wamũkuuagĩra indo ciake cia mbaara atĩrĩ, “Comora rũhiũ rwaku rwa njora ũnjũrage, nĩ geetha andũ aya matatĩĩĩte Ngai matigooke manguucanĩrie manjũrage.” No rĩĩrĩ, mwanake ũcio akĩigua guoya mũno gwĩka ũguo. Kwoguo Saũlũ akĩoya rũhiũ rwake rwa njora akĩrũgwĩra." 
1Chronicles10:5 Mwanake ũcio wamũkuuagĩra indo ciake cia mbaara oona atĩ Saũlũ nĩakua, o naake akĩĩgũithĩria rũhiũ rwake rwa njora, agĩkua." 
1Chronicles10:6 Ũguo nĩguo Saũlũ na aariũ aake atatũ maakuire. Na rĩĩrĩ, ũthamaki wa Saũlũ ũgĩgĩkinya mũthia." 
1Chronicles10:7 Rĩrĩa Aisiraeli arĩa maarĩ na mwena ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa gĩtuamba kĩa Jezireeli, maiguire atĩ mbũtũ ya ita ya Isiraeli nĩyora, na atĩ Saũlũ na aariũ aake nĩmaakua, magĩtiganĩria matũũra maao, makĩũra. Nao Afilisiti magĩthiĩ magĩikara matũũrainĩ macio." 
1Chronicles10:8 Mũthenya ũrĩa warũmĩrĩire, Afilisiti magĩthiĩ kũũngania indo iria ciatigĩĩtwo nĩ andũ arĩa mooragĩĩtwo. Nao makĩona ciimba cia Saũlũ na aariũ aake atatũ igũĩte kũu kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Magĩgĩtinia mũtwe wa Saũlũ na makĩmwaũra nguo ciake cia mbaara. Magĩcooka magĩtũma andũ bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Afilisiti makamenyithanie ũhoro ũcio mwega kũrĩ ngai ciao cia mĩhianano o na kũrĩ andũ aao. 
1Chronicles10:10 Magĩcooka makĩiga indo ciake cia mbaara hekaarũinĩ ĩmwe yao, naguo mũtwe wake makĩũcuuria hekaarũinĩ ya Dagoni ngai yao." 
1Chronicles10:11 Rĩrĩa andũ a Jabeshi, itũũra rĩa Gileadi, maiguire ũrĩa Afilisiti meekĩĩte Saũlũ," 
1Chronicles10:12 andũ arĩa maarĩ njamba magĩthiĩ makĩgĩĩra kĩimba gĩa Saũlũ na ciimba cia aariũ aake magĩcitwara Jabeshi. Magĩcithika rungu rwa mũtĩ wa mũgandi na makĩĩhinga kũrĩa irio mĩthenya mũgwanja. 
1Chronicles10:13 Ũguo nĩguo Saũlũ aakuire nĩ ũndũ wa kwaga kwĩhokeka harĩ MWATHANI, kwaga gwathĩkĩra watho wake, na kũhooya kĩrĩra maroho ma andũ arĩa maakuĩte" 
1Chronicles10:14 handũ ha kũhooya MWATHANI. Kwoguo MWATHANI akĩmũũraga, naguo ũthamaki wake akĩũhe Daudi mũrũ wa Jesii." 
1Chronicles11:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ oothe a Isiraeli magĩthiĩ Heburoni kũrĩ Daudi makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Tũrĩ a mũthiimo ũmwe nawe, o na a mwĩrĩ ũmwe." 
1Chronicles11:2 O na rĩrĩa Saũlũ aakoragwo arĩ mũthamaki witũ, wee nĩ we watongoragia andũ a Isiraeli magĩthiĩ mbaarainĩ o na makĩinũka. Naake MWATHANI Ngai waku agĩkwĩrĩra atĩ nĩũkaarĩithagia andũ aake, na ũtuĩke mũtongoria wao.”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Tondũ ũcio atongoria oothe a Isiraeli magĩthiĩ kwĩ mũthamaki Daudi kũu Heburoni. Naake agĩthondeka kĩrĩĩkanĩro nao, nao makĩmũitĩrĩria maguta, agĩtuĩka mũthamaki wa bũrũri wa Isiraeli, o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI eeranĩire ahũthĩrĩĩte Samũeli." 
1Chronicles11:4 Naake Daudi na andũ oothe a Isiraeli magĩthiĩ, magĩtharĩkĩra itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu. Hĩndĩ ĩyo itũũra rĩu rĩetagwo Jebusi, na Ajebusi, arĩa maarĩ atũũri aakuo kuuma o tene, maatũũraga o kuo." 
1Chronicles11:5 Nao Ajebusi makĩĩra Daudi ndangĩtoonya kuo o na atĩa. No Daudi agĩtuunyana itũũra rĩao rĩa Zayuni, rĩrĩa rĩairigĩirwo na rũthingo rwa hinya, narĩo rĩgĩcooka gwĩtagwo “Itũũra rĩa Daudi.”" 
1Chronicles11:6 Naake Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ wa mbere ũrĩa ũkũũmĩrĩrĩria kũhũũra Ajebusi, nĩwe ũgũtuĩka mũtongoria wa mbũtũ cia ita.” Joabu, ũrĩa nyina eetagwo Zeruia, nĩ we warĩ wa mbere gwĩka ũguo, naake agĩtuuo mũtongoria." 
1Chronicles11:7 Naake Daudi agĩgĩtũũra itũũrainĩ rĩu rĩairigĩĩtwo na rũthingo rwa hinya, narĩo rĩgĩcooka, gwĩtagwo “Itũũra rĩa Daudi.”" 
1Chronicles11:8 Agĩcooka akĩrĩakĩrĩra, aambĩrĩirie na mwena wa irathĩro wa kĩrĩma, tondũ nĩkuo thĩ yaraganĩĩte wega. Naake Joabu agĩcookereria itũũra rĩu kũrĩa gwatigarĩĩte." 
1Chronicles11:9 Naake Daudi agĩkĩrĩrĩria kũgĩa na hinya nĩ ũndũ MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe aarĩ hamwe naake. 
1Chronicles11:10 Ũyũ nĩguo mũtaratara wa thigari cia Daudi iria ciarĩ igweta. Thigari ici, inyiitanĩire na andũ arĩa angĩ a Isiraeli, nĩcio ciamũteithĩrĩirie gũtuĩka mũthamaki, o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI eeranĩire. Nocio ciamũteithĩrĩirie nĩguo ũthamaki wake wĩhande wega." 
1Chronicles11:11 Njamba ya mbere yetagwo Jashobeamu ya mbarĩ ya Ahakimoni. Nĩ yo yarĩ mũnene wa anene arĩa angĩ a mbũtũ cia ita moĩkaine ta “Njamba Ithatũ.” Yahũũranire na andũ magana matatũ, ĩkĩmooraga oothe na itimũ rĩayo mbaarainĩ o ĩmwe." 
1Chronicles11:12 Njamba ya keerĩ thĩinĩ wa njamba icio ithatũ yetagwo Eleazaru mũrũ wa Dodo ya mbarĩ ya Ahohi. 
1Chronicles11:13 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe, ĩrĩ hamwe na Daudi nĩyarũire na Afilisiti kũndũ gwetagwo Pasi Damimu. Yarĩ handũ mũgũnda waiyũire mbaarĩ, rĩrĩa Asiraeli maambĩrĩirie kũũra nĩ guoya." 
1Chronicles11:14 No yo hamwe na andũ aayo makĩrũũgama mũgũndainĩ ũcio gatagatĩ, makĩhũũrana na Afilisiti. Naake MWATHANI akĩmahe ũhootani mũnene." 
1Chronicles11:15 Mũthenya ũmwe, njamba ithatũ thĩinĩ wa anene mĩrongo ĩtatũ arĩa maarĩ njamba cia ita, magĩikũrũka ngurungainĩ ya Adulamu kũrĩa Daudi aarĩ. Hĩndĩ ĩyo mbũtũ ya ita ya Afilisiti yakĩĩte kambĩ yayo gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Refaimu." 
1Chronicles11:16 Daudi aarĩ handũ kĩrĩmainĩ hagitĩirwo na hinya, nakĩo gĩkundi kĩmwe kĩa mbũtũ cia ita cia Afilisiti nĩgĩathiĩte, gĩgaikara Bethilehemu." 
1Chronicles11:17 Naake Daudi akĩigua anyootiĩ mũno akiuga atĩrĩ, “Naarĩ korwo ndoona mũndũ ũngĩndeehere maaĩ ma kũnyua kuuma gĩthimainĩ kĩrĩa kĩrĩ kĩhingoinĩ kĩa Bethilehemu!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Thigari iria ithatũ ciarĩ njamba, igĩgĩtuĩkanĩria kambĩinĩ ya Afilisiti, igĩtaha maaĩ kuuma gĩthimainĩ, ikĩreehera Daudi. No we handũ ha kumanyua akĩmaita thĩ marĩ igongoona kũrĩ MWATHANI." 
1Chronicles11:19 Akiuga atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndingĩhota kũnyua maaĩ maya, tondũ ingĩĩka ũguo, no ta kũnyua ingĩkorwo ngĩnyua thakame ya andũ aya megwĩtwarĩrĩirie ũgwatiinĩ wa gĩkuũ!” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndaigana kũmanyua. Macio nĩ mo maũndũ ma ũcamba marĩa thigari icio ithatũ njamba ciekire."
