Job7:19 Ingĩĩhia-rĩ, no ngorwo ngwĩkĩĩte ũndũ, wee mũrangĩri wa andũ? Ũnduĩte kĩndũ gĩakwĩruta cabaa nakĩo nĩkĩ? Kaĩ nduĩkĩĩte mũrigo harĩ we?" 
Job7:20 Kaĩ ũtarĩ hingo ũngĩnjohera wĩhia wakwa? Kaĩ ũtangĩndekera ihĩtia rĩrĩa njĩhĩĩtie?Njerekeire gũthiĩ mbĩĩrĩrainĩ, na ndĩrĩkorwo ndĩthiĩrĩire rĩrĩa ũrĩkorwo ũkĩnjaria.”" 
Job8:1 Naake Bilidadi wa kuuma Shuha agĩcookia atĩrĩ," 
Job8:2 “Ũgũthiĩ na mbere itĩĩna rĩigana atĩa ũkĩaragia maũndũ ta maya? Mĩario yaku no ta kũhũũra maaĩ na ndĩrĩ. 
Job8:3 Kaĩ kũrĩ hingo Ngai oogomagia waragania? Mwene Hinya Wothe-rĩ, nĩoinaga kĩhooto?" 
Job8:4 Ciana ciaku no mũhaka ikorwo ciĩhĩirie Ngai, nĩkĩo aciherithĩĩtie ta ũrĩa ciagĩrĩirwo." 
Job8:5 Ũngĩcookerera Ngai, na ũthaithe Mwene Hinya Wothe," 
Job8:6 ũngĩkorwo ũrĩ mũthingu na ũtarĩ na ũcuuke, Ngai no ooke agũteithie, na agũcookerie mũciĩ na indo ciaku ta kĩheeo." 
Job8:7 Ũtonga ũrĩa wothe ũteete ũgũtuĩka kĩndũ hatarĩ, ũkĩringithanio na kĩrĩa egũkũhe." 
Job8:8 “Ndagũthaitha taikia maitho na thuutha mahindainĩ ma tene, wone ũrĩa maithe maitũ meerutire." 
Job8:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, ũtũũro witũ nĩ mũkuhĩ, na tũtirĩ ũndũ tũũĩ. Matukũ maitũ gũũkũ thĩ mathiraga o ta kĩĩruru." 
Job8:10 Reke andũ arĩa oogĩ a tene magũthoomithie; thikĩrĩria ũrĩa maroiga. 
Job8:11 “Ithanjĩ-rĩ, no rĩkũre kũndũ gũtarĩ maaĩ? Marura-rĩ, no makũre kũndũ gũtaarahĩĩte maaĩ?" 
Job8:12 Maaĩ mangĩhũa-rĩ, marura macio na ithanjĩ rĩu no kũũma moomaga matarĩ makũrũ makũhũthĩrwo." 
Job8:13 Andũ arĩa mataathĩkagĩra Ngai mahaana o ta marura macio; maaga gwathĩkĩra Ngai kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩao no gũthira gĩthiraga. 
Job8:14 Maigaga mwĩhoko wao handũ hatarĩ harũmu, mwĩhoko wao ũgakĩhũtha o ta rũrenda rwa mbũmbũĩ." 
Job8:15 Mangĩĩtiirania naho, nĩkũmomoka hamomokaga; mangĩhenyiitĩrĩra, hatingĩmarũũgamia." 
Job8:16 Andũ arĩa ooru maringũkaga o ta rĩa hĩndĩ ya ũrugarĩ;mahaana o ta ria rĩrĩa rĩhambaga mũgũnda wothe. 
Job8:17 Mĩri yarĩo ĩtambagĩrĩra mahiga, ĩkenyiitĩrĩra mahiga." 
Job8:18 No rĩĩrĩ, rĩngĩmũnywo, gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩmenya atĩ rĩarĩ ho." 
Job8:19 Kĩu nĩkĩo gĩkeno kĩa andũ arĩa ooru; andũ angĩ mookaga magaikara handũ haao. 
Job8:20 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, Ngai ndatiganagĩria mũndũ mũthingu, na ndateithagĩrĩria arĩa ooru." 
Job8:21 Kwoguo nĩagaatũma ũtheke o rĩngĩ, na wanĩrĩre nĩgũkena." 
Job8:22 Nĩagaaconorithia arĩa makũmeneete, na aharaganie mĩciĩ ya andũ arĩa ooru.”" 
Job9:1 Naake Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ," 
Job9:2 “Nĩnjũũĩ ma atĩ ũguo nĩguo kũrĩ; no rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ no atuĩke mũthingu mbere ya Ngai?" 
Job9:3 Mũndũ angĩenda gũciira na Ngai, ndangĩhota kũmũcookeria o na kĩũria kĩmwe harĩ ciũria ngiri." 
Job9:4 Ngai nĩ mũũgĩ na arĩ hinya mũingĩ; kũrĩ mũndũ ũrĩ wehandahanda aciire naake akĩhootana? 
Job9:5 Athengagia irĩma iterĩgĩrĩire, na agacihang'urania na maraakara." 
Job9:6 Ainainagia thĩ ĩkoima harĩa ĩrĩ, nacio itugĩ ciayo ikeenyenya." 
Job9:7 Aathaga riũa, rĩkaaga kũratha, o na njata, ikaaga kũruta ũtheri." 
Job9:8 Nĩ we wiki watambũrũkirie matu mairũ, na akĩrangaranga ng'oong'o wa ndamaathia ya iriainĩ." 
Job9:9 Nĩ we wathondekire njata iria ciĩtagwo, Nduba, Karaũ, Kĩrĩmĩra, o na njata iria cia mwena wa na kĩanda." 
Job9:10 Eekaga maũndũ manene tũtangĩhungura, o na ageeka maũndũ ma kũgegania matangĩtarĩka." 
Job9:11 Ngai ahĩtũkagĩra hakuhĩ na niĩ, na ndingĩhota kũmuona." 
Job9:12 Ooyaga kĩrĩa gĩothe ekwenda, na gũtirĩ ũngĩmũrigĩrĩria; gũtirĩ ũngĩmũũria, ‘Ũreeka atĩa?’" 
Job9:13 “Angĩraakara, ndaraakarũkaga narua; nĩarangĩrĩirie arĩa maateithĩrĩirie ndamaathiaya iriainĩ ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo Rahabu." 
Job9:14 “Ingĩkĩruta ciugo kũ, nĩguo njookerie Ngai?" 
Job9:15 O na angĩkorwo itarĩ na ũcuuke-rĩ, ndingĩhota kũmũcookeria; ũrĩa ingĩĩka no njũũririe Ngai ũrĩa ũtuanagĩra ciira anjiguĩre tha." 
Job9:16 O na ingĩĩka ũguo, na eetĩkĩre njarie, ndingĩĩtĩkia atĩ no aathikĩrĩrie." 
Job9:17 Amu nĩatũmaga kĩhuuhũkanio kĩĩhũũre, na akandiihangia mũno hatarĩ gĩtũmi." 
Job9:18 Ndaheaga mweke wa kũhiihia; aiyũrĩĩtie ũtũũro wakwa na mathĩĩna. 
Job9:19 Angĩkorwo nĩkũgerana hinya-rĩ, e na hinya kũngĩra.Angĩkorwo nĩgũtwarana igootiinĩ-rĩ, nũũ ũngĩmũtwarĩra thamanji?" 
Job9:20 O na gũtuĩka ndirĩ na mahĩtia, ciugo ciakwa mwene ciahota kũndua mwĩhia.O na gũtuĩka ndirĩ na ũcuuke, no ahote kuonania atĩ ndĩ mũremi." 
Job9:21 (21-22) Niĩ ndirĩ na mahĩtia, no ndiramaka; nĩnogeetio nĩ ũtũũro, no ũcio ti ũndũ; twĩ na mahĩtia kana tũtarĩ, Ngai no egũtwananga." 
Job9:22 Mũndũ ũtarĩ ũcuke angĩkua gĩkuũ kĩa na ihenya, Ngai nĩgũtheka athekaga." 
Job9:23 Ngai nĩkũneana aneanĩĩte thĩ mookoinĩ ma andũ ooru.Nĩkũhinga ahingĩĩte maitho ma arĩa oothe matuithanagia ciira. Angĩkorwo ti Ngai wĩkĩĩte ũguo-rĩ, nũũ ũgĩĩkĩĩte?" 
Job9:24 “Matukũ maakwa nĩmarathira na ihenya; marahanyũka, na ndirĩ wega ndĩroona." 
Job9:25 Marahĩtũka o ta gatarũ karĩa karĩ ihenya mũno, kana o ta rwĩgĩ rũkĩoya gacui." 
Job9:26 (27-28) Ingĩtheria gĩthiithi gĩakwa, ngerie kũriganĩrwo nĩ ruwo rwakwa, mathĩĩna maakwa moothe manjũkagĩrĩra makanjĩkĩra guoya; nĩnjũũĩ atĩ Ngai anduĩte mwĩhia." 
Job9:27 Tondũ nĩnduĩtwo mwĩhia-rĩ, ngũgĩthiĩ na mbere gwĩthĩĩnia nĩkĩ?" 
Job9:28 O na ingĩĩthamba na thabuuni ũrĩkũ, meehia maakwa matingĩthera." 
Job9:29 Ngai anjikĩĩtie irimainĩ rĩa gĩko, o na nguo ciakwa mwene nĩirandega." 
Job9:30 Ngai angĩrĩ mũndũ, ndamũcookeria; no tũtwarane igootiinĩ tũgatuithanio." 
Job9:31 Ĩndĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ wa kũrũũgama gatagatĩ gaakwa naake; gũtirĩ wa gũtũtuithania niĩ na Ngai. 
Job9:32 Ngai, tiga kũherithia! ndagũthaitha, tiga kũmakia!" 
Job9:33 Ngwaria itarĩ na guoya, tondũ nĩndĩyũĩ o ngoro thĩinĩ." 
Job10:1 “Niĩ-rĩ, nĩnogeetio nĩ ũtũũro; ndingĩhota gũtumĩria mateta maakwa, na ngwaria ndĩ na ruwo rũingĩ ngoro." 
Job10:2 Ngai, tiga kũnjethera mahĩtia! Tanjĩĩra! Mahĩtia maakwa nĩ marĩkũ?" 
Job10:3 Kaĩ wonaga arĩ wega kũhinyanĩrĩria? No ũmene kĩndũ ũthondekeete na mooko maaku, kana gũkenera mĩbango ya andũ aaganu?" 
Job10:4 Maitho maaku-rĩ, kaĩ matariĩ ta ma mũndũ? Muonere waku wa maũndũ kaĩ ũkĩrĩ ta wa mũndũ?" 
Job10:5 Matukũ maaku-rĩ, kaĩ makĩrĩ ta ma mũndũ? Mĩaka yaku kaĩ ĩkĩrĩ ta ya mũndũ?" 
Job10:6 Ũragĩthuuthuuria mahĩtia maakwa na ũkanjarĩria meehia nĩkĩ? 
Job10:7 Wee nĩũũĩ atĩ ndihĩtĩĩtie, na gũtirĩ ũngĩngũũra kuuma mookoinĩ maaku." 
Job10:8 “Mooko maaku nĩ mo manyũmbire na magĩĩthondeka, na rĩu nĩũrericũkwo ũkanyananga." 
Job10:9 Ririkana atĩ ũnyũmbĩĩte na rĩũmba; kaĩ ũgũgĩĩthĩa nduĩke rũkũngũ o rĩngĩ? 
Job10:10 Nĩwaheire baaba hinya wa kũnjiara, ũgĩkĩreka ngũre ndĩ ndainĩ ya maitũ." 
Job10:11 Nĩwathondekire mwĩrĩ wakwa na mahĩndĩ na mĩkiha, na ũkĩhumbĩra mahĩndĩ macio na nyama na gĩkonde." 
Job10:12 Nĩũheete muoyo na ũkaanyonia ũtugi; nĩũmenyagĩrĩra na ũkanjiga muoyo. 
Job10:13 No rĩĩrĩ, mahinda macio moothe nĩnjũũĩ ũkoragwo ũkĩbanga na ngoro kũnyũnũha." 
Job10:14 Wetereire wone kana nĩngwĩhia, nĩguo wage kũnjohera." 
Job10:15 Ingĩĩhĩa, kaĩ ndĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! O na ingĩĩka wega ndingĩyambararia.Amu njiyũirwo nĩ gĩconoko na nyonaga o mathĩĩna maakwa." 
Job10:16 Ingĩyambararia, ũũhĩtaga ũhaana o ta mũrũũthi, o na ũkaringaga ciama nĩguo ũnyũnũhe." 
Job10:17 Ũnjethagĩra aira angĩ mangararie; maraakara maaku harĩ niĩ nĩkuongerereka moongererekaga; ũndeehithagĩria mbũtũ na mbũtũ cia kũhũũra hingo ciothe. 
Job10:18 “Warekire nyume nda ya maitũ nĩkĩ? Naarĩ korwo ndakuire itooneetwo nĩ riitho o na rĩmwe! 
Job10:19 Naarĩ korwo ndakuire o ndoima nda ya maitũ, ndwarwo mbĩĩrĩra thikwo!" 
Job10:20 Githĩ matukũ maakwa ti manyiinyi? Tandigithĩria ngenakene haniini," 
Job10:21 itaanathiĩ kũrĩa itakoima, bũrũri wĩ nduma na ihooru," 
Job10:22 bũrũri wĩ nduma na thogothogo, kũrĩa ũtheri ũhaana nduma.”" 
Job11:1 Zofaru ũrĩa wa kuuma Naama agĩcookia atĩrĩ: Ndeto nyingĩ ũguo-rĩ, no ciage gũcookio?" 
Job11:2 “Mũndũ wa kwaria maũndũ maingĩ ũguo-rĩ, no atuĩke mũkinyanĩru?" 
Job11:3 Mũhũhũũtĩko waku-rĩ, no ũkirie andũ? No ũthekerere andũ, na wage wa gũgũcookeria?" 
Job11:4 Woiga atĩ ũrutani waku nĩ mũrũngarũ, na atĩ ũrĩ mũtheru maithoinĩ ma Ngai." 
Job11:5 Naarĩ korwo Ngai no aarie; naarĩ korwo no agũcookerie! 
Job11:6 Naarĩ korwo no akũmenyithie maũndũ marĩa mahithe ma ũũgĩ! Ngai nĩoĩ maũndũ maingĩ.Kĩmenye atĩ ndakũherithĩĩtie ta ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire. 
Job11:7 “No ũhote kũmenya maũndũ ma hitho marĩa mathiũrũrũkĩirie Mwene Hinya Wothe? 
Job11:8 Maũndũ macio nĩ maraaya gũkĩra igũrũ, na nĩ mariku gũkĩra kwa arĩa akuũ.Ũngĩgĩĩka atĩa o rĩrĩa ũũĩ o maũndũ maniini?" 
Job11:9 Ningĩ nĩ maraihu gũkĩra thĩ, na makaarama gũkĩra iria." 
Job11:10 Ngai angĩgũikia njeera, kana agũtware igootiinĩ, nũũ ũngĩmũgirĩrĩria?" 
Job11:11 Ngai nĩoĩ andũ arĩa a tũhũ; angĩkĩona mahĩtia no aage kũrũmbũiya? 
Job11:12 Angĩkorwo ndigiri ya gĩthaka no ĩciare mũndũ-rĩ, naake mũndũ mũkĩĩgu no oohĩge." 
Job11:13 “Ayubu, ũngĩthondeka ngoro yaku,no ũthaathaiye Ngai." 
Job11:14 Angĩkorwo wĩ na mahĩtia, mathengie; ndũkaareke ũmaramari ũtũũre gwaku mũciĩ." 
Job11:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo no ũtiire ũthiũ waku ũtarĩ na thoni. Ĩĩ, na no ũrũũgame ũtarĩ na guoya." 
Job11:16 No ũriganĩrwo nĩ mĩtangĩko yaku, o ta maaĩ marĩa marĩĩkĩĩtie gũtherera." 
Job11:17 Ũtũũro waku ũgĩthere gũkĩra thaa thita cia mũthenya, namo mahinda marĩa mooru ma ũtũũro ũcio magĩthere o ta ũrĩa gũtheraga gũgĩkĩa." 
Job11:18 Nawe ũtũũre wĩiguĩte na ũiyũirwo nĩ kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro, naake Ngai akũgitagĩre na akũheage thaayũ." 
Job11:19 No ũkomage na nduone wa gũgũthĩĩnia, na andũ aingĩ meyendithagie harĩ we." 
Job11:20 No rĩĩrĩ, andũ arĩa aaganu nĩmagaaturuura,na matione njĩra o yothe ya kũũrĩra; mwĩhoko wao ũgaakorwo ũrĩ o gĩkuũ.”" 
Job12:1 Naake Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ: 
Job12:2 “Kaĩ mũrĩ imenyi-ĩ! Mwakua-rĩ, ũũgĩ ũgaakuanĩra na inyuĩ." 
Job12:3 No rĩĩrĩ, o na niĩ ndĩ na ũũgĩ o ta inyuĩ; mũtirĩ oogĩ kũngĩra. Nũũ ũtooĩ maũndũ macio?" 
Job12:4 Araata aakwa rĩu nĩgũũthekerera marathekerera, o niĩ ndahooyaga Ngai na akanjigua.Nĩgũũthekerera marathekerera, o niĩ mũndũ mũthingu ũtarĩ ũcuuke." 
Job12:5 Matirĩ na mathĩĩna, na nĩgũũthaakĩra marathaakĩra; njerekeire kũgũa, na no marahũũra." 
Job12:6 No rĩĩrĩ, atuunyani na arĩa matatĩĩĩte Ngai maikaire na thaayũ, o acio matuaga atĩ hinya wao nĩguo ngai yao." 
Job12:7 “Rĩu-rĩ, ũria nyamũ na nĩigũgũthoomithia; ũria nyoni na nĩigũgũcookeria." 
Job12:8 Arĩria mĩtĩ na nĩgũgũthoomithia; ningĩ arĩria thamaki na nĩigũgũtaarĩria. 
Job12:9 Ciothe nĩciũĩ atĩ nĩ guoko kwa MWATHANI gwaciũmbire. 
Job12:10 Kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩrĩ muoyo, o na roho wa mũndũ o wothe irĩ guokoinĩ gwake." 
Job12:11 Matũ makenagio nĩkũigua ciugo, o ta ũrĩa rũrĩmĩ rũkenagio nĩgũcama irio." 
Job12:12 Andũ akũrũ makoragwo na ũũgĩ; arĩa maikĩĩtie matukũ nĩmooĩ maingĩ. 
Job12:13 “Ngai nĩ mwene ũũgĩ na hinya; nĩoĩ gũtaarana, na nĩoĩ maingĩ." 
Job12:14 Ngai angĩmomora-rĩ, nũũ ũngĩaka rĩngĩ? Angĩhingĩrĩria mũndũ-rĩ, nũũ ũngĩmũhingũrĩra?" 
Job12:15 Angĩgirĩrĩria mbura, indo ciothe nĩkũũma ciũmaga; angĩmĩhingũrĩra, kũgĩaga na mũiyũro." 
Job12:16 Nĩarĩ hinya o na ũũgĩ; mũhĩtithio na mũhĩtithania, o eerĩ nĩ aake." 
Job12:17 Aconoraga anene, na agatua atongoria irimũ." 
Job12:18 Arutaga athamaki itĩinĩ ciao, akamatua mabuthu." 
Job12:19 Aconoraga athĩnjĩri Ngai, na akahang'ũrania anene arĩa matangĩenyenyeka." 
Job12:20 Akiragia arĩa mehokeetwo nĩ andũ, nao arĩa akũrũ akamatuunya ũmenyo." 
Job12:21 Aagithagia aathani gĩtĩĩo, na agatuunya anene ũnene." 
Job12:22 Athikũragia maũndũ marĩa mathike, na akareehe marĩa marĩ ndumainĩ ũtheriinĩ." 
Job12:23 Atũũgagĩria ndũũrĩrĩ na agacihang'urania; atũmaga itheereme o na agaciharagania. 
Job12:24 Atuaga aathani irimũ, agatũma maturuure na matione njĩra." 
Job12:25 Magagĩthiĩ makĩhambahambataga ndumainĩ, magĩtũgũũgaga o ta arĩĩu." 
Job13:1 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, maitho maakwa nĩmooneete maũndũ macio moothe, matũ maakwa nĩmamaiguĩte na ngamamenya." 
Job13:2 Marĩa mũũĩ o na niĩ nĩndĩmooĩ; ndĩ mũũgĩ o ta inyuĩ. 
Job13:3 No ngwenda kwaria na Mwene Hinya Wothe; ngwenda gũciira na Ngai. 
Job13:4 Inyuĩ-rĩ, mũhumbĩrĩĩte ũrimũ wanyu na maheeni; inyuothe mũrĩ mandagĩtaarĩ matangĩĩhoneria mũndũ." 
Job13:5 Naarĩ korwo mwakira; no mwoneke ta mũrĩ oogĩ! 
Job13:6 “Rĩu tathikĩrĩriai ihooto ciakwa; tathikĩrĩriai mateta maakwa. 
Job13:7 Mũraarĩria Ngai mũgĩtũmagĩra maheeni? Mũramwarĩria mũgĩtũmagĩra wara? 
Job13:8 Nĩkũgeria mũrageria kũmũgitĩra? Nĩmũkũmũciirĩrĩra? 
Job13:9 No muone wega Ngai angĩmũthuuthuuria? Ningĩ-rĩ, no mũmũheenie ta ũrĩa mũndũ aheenagia ũrĩa ũngĩ?" 
Job13:10 O na mũngĩgĩa na mũthuutũkanio na hitho-rĩ, hatirĩ nganja no amũkũũme." 
Job13:11 Githĩ riiri wake to ũmwĩkĩre guoya? Githĩ gĩtĩĩo gĩake to kĩmũtue nda? 
Job13:12 Thimo cianyu nĩ cia tũhũ o ta mũhu; ihooto cianyu nĩ cia tũhũ o ta ndaka. 
Job13:13 Kiraai mũreke njarie; ngwaria njĩkwo ũrĩa ngwĩkwo. 
Job13:14 “Ngũkĩaga gũikia muoyo wakwa ũgwatiinĩ nĩkĩ? 
Job13:15 O na Ngai angĩnjũraga-rĩ, nĩ kĩĩ kĩngĩ njetereire? Ĩndĩ no ngwĩtetera mbere yake." 
Job13:16 No gũkorwo gwĩtetera nokuo kũngĩĩhonokia, amu gũtirĩ mũndũ mũũru ũngĩrũũgamana na Ngai." 
Job13:17 “Tagĩthikĩrĩriei wega ciugo ciakwa; tategaai matũ mũigue mĩario yakwa. 
Job13:18 Rĩu nĩngwĩciirĩrĩra, amu nĩnjũũĩ atĩ ndirĩ na mahĩtia." 
Job13:19 “Nũũ ũngĩrũũgamana na niĩ? No ngĩkire njeterere kũũragwo. 
Job13:20 Ngai, ũngĩnjĩkĩra o maũndũ meerĩ, no ndige kwĩhitha ũthiũ waku." 
Job13:21 Namo nĩ maya: ũtige kũũnyamaaria, na ũtige kũnjĩkĩra guoya." 
Job13:22 “Weka ũguo, no wambe warie, na niĩ njookie, kana ũreke njarie, nawe ũnjookerie." 
Job13:23 Njĩkĩĩte mahĩtia marĩkũ? Meehia maakwa-rĩ, maigana atĩa? Ndagũthaitha menyithia mahĩtia maakwa na meehia maakwa." 
Job13:24 “Ũraĩtheema nĩkĩ? Ũranyona ta ndĩ thũ yaku nĩkĩ? 
Job13:25 Ũrahahũra nĩkĩ? Niĩ ndĩ o ihuti; ũrahanyũkania na niĩ o ta maragara. 
Job13:26 Ũrathitangĩra maũndũ mooru mũno, na ũkanjookereria mahĩtia ma rĩrĩa ndarĩ mwĩthĩ." 
Job13:27 Ũnjoheete magũrũ na nyororo, ũkabaara mĩthiĩre yakwa yothe, o na ũgathuuthuuria makinya maakwa." 
Job13:28 Ndĩragĩthira o ta kĩndũ kĩbuthu, o ta nguo ndĩe nĩ memenyi." 
Job14:1 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũciaragwo nĩ mũtumia, atũũraga o ihinda iniini, na nĩwakuona mathĩĩna maingĩ." 
Job14:2 Akũraga na akahooha o ta ihũa, akabuaĩria o ta kĩĩruru." 
Job14:3 Wee Ngai-rĩ, mũndũ ta ũcio no ũmũrore? Mũndũ ta ũcio no ũciire naake?" 
Job14:4 Kũrĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota kũruta kĩndũ gĩtheru kuuma harĩ kĩndũ gĩtarĩ gĩtheru? Gũtirĩ o na ũmwe ũngĩhota! 
Job14:5 Matukũ ma mũndũ nĩmatare; nĩũũĩ mũigana wa mĩaka yake; ũmwĩkĩrĩire mĩhaka atangĩhota gũkĩra. 
Job14:6 Roria maitho na kũngĩ ũtige kũmuona; reke akenere matukũ maake, ta mũthũkũmi agĩkenera mũcaara wake." 
Job14:7 “Mũtĩ watemwo, nĩhakoragwo na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro atĩ, wahota kũringũra, ũrute thuuna." 
Job14:8 O na mĩri yaguo ĩngĩhoohera tĩĩriinĩ, na gĩthukĩ kĩaguo kĩũme," 
Job14:9 wona maaĩ ũthundũkaga na ũkoimia honge o ta mũtĩ mwĩthĩ. 
Job14:10 Ĩndĩ mũndũ akuaga, agatuĩka kĩndũ hatarĩ; arĩĩkia gũtuikana-rĩ, athiaga na kũ?" 
Job14:11 “Ta ũrĩa maaĩ ma iria mahũaga, na ta ũrĩa rũũĩ rwagaga maaĩ rũkooma-rĩ," 
Job14:12 noguo mũndũ akuaga na ndacookaga muoyo; kinya rĩrĩa igũrũ rĩgaathenga, ndagacooka gũũkĩra rĩngĩ, o na kana arahũrwo toroinĩ ũcio wake." 
Job14:13 “Naarĩ korwo no ũũhithe kwa arĩa akuũ nginya maraakara maaku mathire, ũcooke ũtue ihinda rĩa kũndirikana." 
Job14:14 Mũndũ angĩkua-rĩ, no ariũke? No niĩ-rĩ, nĩnjetereire mahinda meega; ngweterera o nginya mahinda maya ma thĩĩna mathire." 
Job14:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo no wĩtane na niĩ njĩtĩke; nawe ũgĩkenio nĩ niĩ, o niĩ kĩũmbe gĩaku." 
Job14:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo no ũkĩbaarage mĩthiĩre yakwa yothe, na nduone meehia maakwa." 
Job14:17 No ũnjohere meehia maakwa na ũriganĩrwo nĩmo, na ũhuure mahĩtia marĩa moothe ndaneeka." 
Job14:18 “Nĩkũrĩ mahinda makinyaga irĩma ikainaina na ikaharagana, nyanjara cia mahiga ikarutwo harĩa ciuma," 
Job14:19 maaĩ makahũũra mahiga ma rũũĩ magathera, na kĩguũ gĩgatwara tĩĩri. Ũguo noguo ũharaganagia mwĩhoko wa mũndũ." 
Job14:20 Ũtooragia mũndũ, ageethiĩra tene na tene; ũgarũraga gĩthiithi gĩake, ũkamũingata." 
Job14:21 Ciana ciake itũũgĩragio, na ndangĩmenya; iconoragwo, na ndangĩona." 
Job14:22 Aiguaga ruwo o rwa mwĩrĩ wake, na akeerĩrĩra o we mwene.”" 
Job15:1 Thuutha ũcio Elifazi ũrĩa wa kuuma Temani agĩcookia o rĩngĩ atĩrĩ," 
Job15:2 “Ayubu, mũndũ mũũgĩ no aarie ciugo cia tũhũ ũguo? No ahũhũũtĩke ũguo?" 
Job15:3 Mũndũ mũũgĩ-rĩ, nĩagĩrĩirwo kwaria mĩgambo ĩtarĩ uumithio, kana ciugo itangĩmũguna?" 
Job15:4 No rĩĩrĩ, wee nĩkũniina ũraniina gĩtĩĩo kĩa Ngai na ũkagiria andũ mamũhooe." 
Job15:5 Waganu waku nĩguo ũragũtongoria; ũgagĩtũmĩra ciugo cia wara. 
Job15:6 Kwoguo kanua gaaku nĩ ko karakuohithia, ti niĩ; ciugo ciaku nĩcio iragũtuĩra." 
Job15:7 “Kaĩ arĩ we mũndũ wa mbere gũciarwo? Kaĩ waciarirwo mbere ya ithũngũri? 
Job15:8 Kaĩ waiguire kĩama kĩa Ngai gĩgĩciira? Ũreciiria atĩ we no we mũũgĩ? 
Job15:9 Nĩ kĩĩ ũũĩ ithũĩ tũtooĩ? Nĩ kĩĩ ũiguĩte, tũtaiguĩte?" 
Job15:10 Gatagatĩinĩ gaitũ harĩ na andũ akũrũ na marĩ na mbuĩ, nĩ akũrũ gũkĩra thooguo." 
Job15:11 Kaĩ ũtaanaiganĩra Ngai akũũmĩrĩria, o na kana akwarĩria na ũhooreri atũhũthĩrĩĩte?" 
Job15:12 Ngoro yaku ĩratuumatuuma nĩkĩ? Ũratũbucabucĩria maitho macio maaku nĩkĩ? 
Job15:13 Ũraraakarĩra Ngai nĩkĩ? Ũrareka mĩgambo ta ĩyo yume kanua gaaku nĩkĩ? 
Job15:14 Mũndũ kaĩ akĩrĩ kĩĩ, atĩ no akorwo arĩ mũtheru? Mũndũ ũciarĩĩtwo nĩ mũtumia-rĩ, no atuĩke mũthingu?" 
Job15:15 Ngai ndehokaga o na araika aake, o na ti atheru maithoinĩ maake." 
Job15:16 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũnyuaga waganu o ta ũrĩa anyuaga maaĩ-rĩ, githĩ to agĩkorwo arĩ kĩndũ kĩnungu na kĩrĩ magigi mbere ya Ngai?" 
Job15:17 “Tathikĩrĩria, ngwĩre; nĩngũkuumbũrĩra marĩa nyoneete." 
Job15:18 Nĩngũkuumbũrĩra maũndũ marĩa andũ oogĩ maanoiga, marutĩĩtwo nĩ maithe maao, matekũmahitha ũndũ o na ũmwe." 
Job15:19 No o oiki maatũũraga bũrũriinĩ wao; gũtiarĩ mũrũũrĩrĩ wa gũtũma matigane na Ngai. 
Job15:20 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũhinyagĩrĩria arĩa angĩ atangĩkaga matukũ maake moothe. 
Job15:21 Mĩgambo ya kũmwĩkĩra guoya nĩ yo aiguaga matũinĩ maake, atuunyani mamũũkagĩrĩra hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aterĩgĩrĩire." 
Job15:22 We ndeetĩkagia atĩ nĩakoima ndumainĩ; oonaga eetereirwo no gĩkuũ. 
Job15:23 Kĩimba gĩake gĩgaatuĩka irio cia nderi; nĩoĩ atĩ marigĩrĩrio maake no kwanangwo. 
Job15:24 Kĩeha na kĩmako imwĩkagĩra guoya; imũũkagĩrĩra o ta mũthamaki wĩhaarĩirie gũthiĩ mbaarainĩ. 
Job15:25 Nĩ tondũ nĩakũnjĩire Ngai ngundi, na nĩatuĩte kũremera Mwene Hinya Wothe." 
Job15:26 (26-27) Nĩ mwĩtĩi na nĩ mũremi; anyiitaga ngo yake oomĩĩtie kĩongo, akarũe na Ngai." 
Job15:27 Mũndũ ũcio atũũraga matũũrainĩ matiganĩirio, nyũmbainĩ ĩtangĩtũũrwo nĩ andũ, cierekeire gũtuĩka ciĩgĩĩgĩ." 
Job15:28 Ndangĩtũũra e mũtongu; ũtonga wake ndũngĩtheerema, ndangĩgĩa na mĩri bũrũriinĩ," 
Job15:29 na ndangĩhota gũthengera gĩkuũ. Ahaana o ta mũtĩ ũrĩa honge ciaguo icinĩĩtwo nĩ mwaki na mahũa maguo moombũrĩĩtwo nĩ rũhuuho. 
Job15:30 Tanĩagĩtige kwĩheenia akĩiga mwĩhoko wake ũũruinĩ, tondũ ũũru nĩguo ũgaatuĩka mũcaara wake." 
Job15:31 Akaahooha o ta mũtĩ hĩndĩ yake ĩtarĩ nginyu, na oome o ta rũhonge rũrĩa rũtacookaga kũrura rĩngĩ." 
Job15:32 Akaahaana o ta mũthabibũ ũrĩa thabibũ ciaguo ciitĩkaga itaaneerua, kana ta mũtamaiyũ ũrĩa ũitaga kĩro kĩaguo." 
Job15:33 Imaramari itikaagĩa na mbeũ, na mwaki nĩũgaacina nyũmba iria ciakĩĩtwo na mahaki." 
Job15:34 Acio nĩ o andũ arĩa mathugundaga mathĩĩna, na meekaga ũũru; ngoro ciao ciyũire o maheeni matheri.”" 
Job16:1 Naake Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ," 
Job16:2 “Nĩnjiguĩte ciugo nyingĩ ta icio. Kaĩ inyuothe mũrĩ oomanĩrĩria a kũiguĩrwo tha-ĩ! 
Job16:3 Kaĩ ciugo cia kũhũhũũtĩka itegũthira? Nĩ kĩĩ kĩramũhatĩrĩria mũthiĩ o na mbere kwaria? 
Job16:4 Mũngĩrĩ handũ haakwa-rĩ, no njuge ũrĩa wothe mũroiga;no njarie ciugo cia kũmũtuura, na ndĩmũnyũrũrie." 
Job16:5 No ndĩmũũmĩrĩrie na mataaro, na horahorie ruwo rwanyu na mĩario yakwa." 
Job16:6 “O na ndaria, ruwo rwakwa rũtirahorahora; o na ndakira, rũtirandigithĩria." 
Job16:7 Ngai ahũũrĩĩte kĩhinyio; nĩanangĩĩte mũciĩ wakwa wothe. 
Job16:8 Ũrĩa eekĩĩte mwĩrĩ ũyũ wakwa, nĩ ũira wa ũrĩa anyariirĩĩte.Ũhinyaru wakwa nĩũtũmĩĩte andũ moone atĩ nĩnjĩhĩĩtie." 
Job16:9 “Ngai andambururangĩĩte na maraakara; angũũrĩire maitho e na rũthũũro. 
Job16:10 Andũ nĩmaanyararĩĩte; moonganĩĩte hamwe manjũkĩrĩre; marahũũra thĩa matarĩ na tha. 
Job16:11 Ngai anenganĩrĩĩte kũrĩ andũ ooru; anjikĩĩtie mookoinĩ ma andũ aaganu. 
Job16:12 Ndatũũraga hooreire, no Ngai akĩnyiita mũmero, akĩĩbebera na akĩĩmemenda.Ngai areruta cabaa na niĩ;" 
Job16:13 aranjikĩria mĩguĩ na mĩena yothe; atheeceete akandiihia; ndaranjiguĩra tha o na haniini. 
Job16:14 Ngai atheecangĩĩte maita maingĩ; ahithũkĩire o ta mũũthigari ũrĩ na rũthũũro rũingĩ. 
Job16:15 “Ndĩracakaya ndĩhumbĩĩte nguo ya ikũnia, na ngaikara haaha rũkũngũinĩ hootekeete." 
Job16:16 Ndĩrĩĩte nginya maitho magatuunĩha; ndĩroona o marundurundu. 
Job16:17 No niĩ ndirĩ ũũru njĩkĩĩte, na ihooya rĩakwa kwĩ Ngai rĩtirĩ na ũcuuke." 
Job16:18 “We thĩ, ndũgakũnĩkĩre mahĩtia marĩa njĩkĩĩtwo; ndũkaareke kĩrĩro gĩakwa ngĩrĩrĩra ihooto ciakwa gĩkirio!" 
Job16:19 Kũũria igũrũ kũrĩ mũndũ ũrĩ mwena wakwa ũranjarĩrĩria. 
Job16:20 Araata aakwa marathekerera, niĩ na niĩ ngarĩrĩra Ngai." 
Job16:21 Ũcio ũrĩ mwena wakwa-rĩ, ararũĩrĩra kĩhooto gĩakwa mbere ya Ngai o ta mũndũ akĩarĩrĩria mũraatawe." 
Job16:22 Mĩaka yakwa nĩgũthira ĩrathira, ndĩthiĩre kũrĩa itakoima." 
Job17:1 “Ũtũũro wakwa werekeire gũkinya mũthia; ndirahota kũhiihia; no mbĩĩrĩra ĩnjetereire. 
Job17:2 Thiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ andũ maramiinja mĩnyĩrĩ; maitho maakwa maroona o andũ maratũma ndaakare. 
Job17:3 “Ngai, ndĩraaria ũhoro wa ma; amũkĩra ciugo ciakwa. Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩ ũngĩnyiita mbaru ũhoro ũrĩa ngwaria." 
Job17:4 Tondũ nĩũhingĩĩte meciiria maao matikaagĩe na ũmenyo, ndũkaareke maahoote." 
Job17:5 Arĩa makunyanagĩra araata aao nĩ geetha megune, ciana ciao nĩikoora maitho." 
Job17:6 “Ngai anduĩte kĩndũ gĩa gũthekererwo; andũ no mata maranduĩra ũthiũ. 
Job17:7 Ndĩ na ruwo rũingĩ ũguo atĩ, maitho maakwa maroona o nduma; ciĩga ciakwa itigĩĩtwo o mahĩndĩ matheri." 
Job17:8 Andũ arĩa metuaga athingu maroona ũguo makamaka; maranjũkĩrĩra ta mũndũ ũtatĩĩĩte Ngai. 
Job17:9 No rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩarũmĩĩtie njĩra yake; mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩ na mooko matheru athiaga akĩongagĩrĩra hinya." 
Job17:10 No hatirĩ o na ũmwe wa araata aakwa oonekaga arĩ mũũgĩ. 
Job17:11 Matukũ maakwa nĩmathiru; mĩbango yakwa nĩharaganĩĩte; mwĩhoko wakwa nĩ mũthiru. 
Job17:12 No araata aakwa maroiga ũtukũ nĩ mũthenya; maroiga nĩgũkĩa kũrakĩa, no niĩ njũũĩ atĩ ndĩ o ndumainĩ." 
Job17:13 Mwĩhoko wakwa no kwa arĩa akuũ, kũrĩa ngaakoma ndumainĩ." 
Job17:14 Ngeera mbĩĩrĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Wee nĩ we baaba,’naguo mũthũa ndĩwĩre atĩrĩ, ‘Inyuĩ nĩ inyuĩ a maitũ, na no inyuĩ aarĩ a maitũ.’" 
Job17:15 Kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩakwa gĩkĩrĩ ha? Nũũ ũgũkĩona kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩakwa? 
Job17:16 Kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩu no gĩgĩthiĩ na niĩ kwa arĩa akuũ? No gĩgĩikũrũkanie na niĩ rũkũngũinĩ?” 
Job18:1 Naake Bilidadi ũrĩa wa kuuma Shuha agĩcookia atĩrĩ," 
Job18:2 “Ayubu, kaĩ ũtangĩkira? Korwo no ũkire no tũkwarĩrie." 
Job18:3 Ũratuona tũrĩ ta ng'ombe nĩkĩ? Ũratuona tũrĩ akĩĩgu nĩkĩ? 
Job18:4 Nĩkwĩyũnũha ũreyũnũha waraakara. Thĩ-rĩ, nĩgũtiganĩrio tondũ nĩwaraakara? Ndũmba cia mahiga-rĩ, nĩigũthengio harĩa irĩ waraakara?" 
Job18:5 “Ũtheri wa mũndũ mwaganu no ũkũhorio; rũrĩrĩmbĩ rwaguo rũtigaacooka gwakana rĩngĩ. 
Job18:6 Ũtheri wa nyũmba yake ũtuĩkĩĩte o nduma, na taawa wake nĩmũhorie." 
Job18:7 Arathiaga ekinyĩire, no rĩu nĩgũtũgũũga aratũgũũga. Mwĩĩro wa ngoro yake nĩguo ũmũgũithĩĩtie thĩ." 
Job18:8 Etwarĩrĩire mũtegoinĩ magũrũ maake magakĩgwatio; agereire o marimainĩ. 
Job18:9 Mũtego ũmũnyiitĩĩte o thũngw'ainĩ ũgategũka na ndangĩĩteithũra. 
Job18:10 Ahithĩirwo mũtego thĩ, na marima makeenjwo kũrĩa ekũgerera." 
Job18:11 Kĩmako kĩmuumaga na mĩena yothe, na gĩkamũrũmĩrĩra ikinya gwa ikinya." 
Job18:12 Aratũũraga ta gĩtonga, rĩu ndangĩona o na gĩa kũrĩa; mũtino wĩhandĩĩte wetereire harĩa arĩ." 
Job18:13 Mwĩrĩ wake ũiyũirwo nĩ mũrimũ wa kũmakania, na nĩ mũrimũ ũgũtũma mooko na magũrũ maake mabuthe." 
Job18:14 Arutũrũrĩĩtwo nyũmba ĩrĩa aratũire egangarĩĩte, agatwarwo akarũũgame mbere ya mũthamaki ũrĩa wĩtagwo Gĩkuũ." 
Job18:15 Nyũmba yake rĩu ĩratũũrwo nĩ andũ angĩ, na nĩitĩĩtwo ũbiriiti wa kũmĩtheria." 
Job18:16 Na thĩ mĩri yake nĩkũũma irooma, nakuo na igũrũ honge ciake nĩkũhooha irahooha." 
Job18:17 Ngumo yake nĩgũthira ĩrathira gũũkũ thĩ; gũtirĩ mũndũ ũramũririkana. 
Job18:18 Arutĩĩtwo ũtheriinĩ, agaikanio ndumainĩ; nĩarutũrũrĩĩtwo kuuma bũrũriinĩ wa arĩa marĩ muoyo." 
Job18:19 Ndarĩ na ciana kana njiarwa mũhĩrĩgainĩ wao; ndarĩ na wa gũcooka gũtũũra kũu aratũũraga. 
Job18:20 Kuuma irathĩro kinya ithũĩro, arĩa oothe maraigua maũndũ marĩa mamũkorereire maranyiitwo nĩ guoya makainaina nĩkũmaka." 
Job18:21 Macio nĩ mo marigĩrĩrio ma andũ arĩa ooru; macio nĩ mo marigĩrĩrio ma arĩa matarũmbũyanagia na Ngai.” 
Job19:1 Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ," 
Job19:2 “Mũgũtũũra mũũnyamaaragia nginya rĩ? Mũgũtũũra mũũhũũraga na ciugo nginya rĩ? 
Job19:3 Nĩ maita maingĩ mũkoreetwo mũkĩnjinũra; kaĩ mũtangĩconoka nĩ ũguo mũũnumĩĩte? 
Job19:4 O na akorwo nĩnjĩhĩĩtie-rĩ, ũndũ ũcio ũramũtuura nĩkĩ?" 
Job19:5 Mũreyona ta mũrĩ eega kũngĩra, na mũkoona ta hĩtĩĩtie nĩ ũrĩa nyamaarĩkĩĩte." 
Job19:6 Kaĩ mũtaroona atĩ nĩ Ngai ũrahinyĩrĩria, na atĩ nĩ mũtego anjigĩire nĩguo anyiite?" 
Job19:7 Ndateta nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo ahinyĩrĩirie-rĩ, gũtirĩ mũndũ ũrathikĩrĩria; ndĩrakayũrũrũka, no ndiroona kĩhooto gĩkĩrũmĩrĩrwo." 
Job19:8 Ngai ahingĩĩte njĩra yakwa ũguo atĩ ndingĩhota kũhungura. Nĩekĩrĩĩte njĩra yakwa nduma. 
Job19:9 Nĩandunyĩĩte ũtonga wakwa wothe, na agaathũũkĩria ngumo yakwa." 
Job19:10 Arahũũra na mĩena yothe, akamunya kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩakwa, akandiganĩria hinyĩrĩrĩke, ngue." 
Job19:11 Anjitũrũrĩire maraakara maake, na akandua ta thũ yake." 
Job19:12 Andũmĩire thigari citharĩkĩre, nacio nĩcienjeete mĩtaro, na igathiũrũrũkĩria nyũmba yakwa." 
Job19:13 “Nĩatũmĩĩte andũ a mũciĩ wakwa mandiganĩrie, na agatũma arĩa oothe manjũũĩ mandaihĩrĩrie." 
Job19:14 Andũ aitũ na araata aakwa nĩmandiganĩirie. 
Job19:15 Ageni arĩa marookaga gwakwa nĩmariganĩirwo nĩ niĩ; ndungata ciakwa cia andũ a nja iranyona ta mũrũũrĩrĩ; nduĩkĩĩte ta mũndũ itarĩ ciona. 
Job19:16 Ingĩĩta ĩmwe ya ndungata ciakwa, ndĩngĩnjĩtĩka; nĩkũmũthaitha ndĩmĩthaithaga ĩndeithie." 
Job19:17 Mũtumia wakwa ndaroomĩrĩria mĩheehũ yakwa, na aariũ a maitũ matiranguhĩrĩria." 
Job19:18 O na ciana nĩcimeneete; ndarũũgama no gũũthekerera irathekerera. 
Job19:19 Araata aakwa oothe arĩa a bata maranyona magethithimũkwo; andũ arĩa ndĩrendeete mũno nĩmangarũrũkĩĩte. 
Job19:20 Rĩu ndigĩĩtwo o mahĩndĩ matheri; no gũkua itakuĩte. 
Job19:21 “Araata aakwa, njiguĩraai tha; njiguĩraai tha, amu Ngai angũthĩĩte akaanũnda." 
Job19:22 Mũragĩthiĩ o na mbere kũũnyariira ta ũguo Ngai areeka nĩkĩ? Kaĩ mũtangĩiganwo nĩ ũguo mũũnyariirĩĩte? 
Job19:23 “No nyende ciugo ciakwa ciandĩkwo! No nyende ciandĩkwo ibukuinĩ iririkanagwo! 
Job19:24 No nyende ikarwo mahigainĩ igũrũ na karamu ga cuuma, itũũre tene na tene." 
Job19:25 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ Mũngũũri arĩ muoyo, na mũthiainĩ nĩakaarũũgama kũnjarĩrĩria." 
Job19:26 O na ikonde ciakwa ciarĩĩo nĩ mũrimũ ũguo, nĩngoona Ngai ndĩ o mwĩrĩinĩ ũyũ." 
Job19:27 Ngaamuona na maitho maakwa kĩũmbe; ngaamuona arĩ mwena wakwa.No rĩĩrĩ, nĩndĩroorwo nĩ hinya." 
Job19:28 Araata aakwa, mũthugundĩĩte mũbango wa kũndũithia na kũũnyamaaria mũkiugaga atĩ, nĩ niĩ mwene ndereehereire ũndũ ũyũ." 
Job19:29 No rĩĩrĩ, mwĩtigĩreei rũhiũ rwa njora, rũrĩa rũreehithagia maraakara ma Ngai harĩ arĩa meehagia, nĩ geetha mũmenye atĩ kũrĩ mũndũ ũtuanagĩra.”" 
Job20:1 Zofaru ũrĩa wa kuuma Naamathu agĩcookia atĩrĩ," 
Job20:2 “Ayubu nĩũrathĩĩnia meciiria maakwa, ngwaria nĩ ũguo woiga." 
Job20:3 Nĩndaigua irumi ciaku no nĩngũmenya ũrĩa ngũcookia. 
Job20:4 “Kaĩ ũtooĩ atĩ kuuma o tene, rĩrĩa mũndũ aigirwo gũũkũ thĩ," 
Job20:5 kũrũũhia kwa mũndũ mwaganu nĩ kũniini na ũkeni wa mũndũ mũũru no wa ihinda? 
Job20:6 O na angĩĩtũũgĩria, kĩrũũgamo gĩake, mũtwe wake ũhaane ta ũkũhuutia matu-rĩ," 
Job20:7 athiraga o ta mai maake. Arĩa maramuonaga mooranagia atĩrĩ, ‘Rĩu akĩrĩ kũ?’" 
Job20:8 Airagĩria o ta kĩrooto, na ndacookaga kuoneka; athiraga o ta kĩoneki gĩa ũtukũ." 
Job20:9 Andũ arĩa maramuonaga, maticookaga kũmuona, andũ aake matimũikagia riitho rĩngĩ." 
Job20:10 Ciana ciake nĩcio ituĩkaga cia kũrĩha athĩĩni arĩa aanatuunya indo. 
Job20:11 Mwĩrĩ wake ũrĩa wakoragwo wĩ na hinya na ũrugarĩ, ũkuaga ũgathikwo ũgatuĩka o tĩĩri." 
Job20:12 “Ũũru ũkoragwo ũrĩ mũrĩo kanuainĩ gaake ũguo atĩ, aũhithaga rungu rwa rũrĩmĩ rwake;" 
Job20:13 ndangĩũrekereria ũthiĩ, aũhingagĩrĩria kanuainĩ gaake." 
Job20:14 No rĩĩrĩ, irio ciake irũraga irĩ o nda; irũraga o ta thumu wa nyoka ĩrĩa njũru." 
Job20:15 Agagĩtahĩka ũtonga ũrĩa aanameria; Ngai agakĩũrutũrũra uume nda yake. 
Job20:16 Ameragia thumu wa nyoka; nyoka ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo gĩĩko ĩmũrũmaga ĩkamũũraga. 
Job20:17 Ndatũũraga kinya akoona iraathimo cia Ngai; ndakoona ũũkĩ na iria irĩa Ngai aheaga andũ aake na ũingĩ. 
Job20:18 Ndakaarĩa kĩrĩa anogeire, na ndagaakenera ũtonga wake," 
Job20:19 amu nĩahinyagĩrĩria athĩĩni na akamatiganĩria, na akeyoera nyũmba iria we mwene ataakire." 
Job20:20 “Tondũ ũhahanyi wake ndũrĩ gĩthimi, ndangĩhota kũhonokia kĩndũ o gĩothe gĩake kĩa bata." 
Job20:21 Tondũ ndarĩ kĩndũ atigagia aarĩa, ũtonga wake ndũngĩgĩtũũra." 
Job20:22 Oomokagĩrwo nĩ mathĩĩna o rĩĩrĩ egangarĩĩte; akoragĩrĩrwo nĩ nditi nene cia mĩnyamaaro akaharagana. 
Job20:23 Nĩarĩe o kĩrĩa gĩothe ekwenda! Ngai arĩmũherithia arĩ na maraakara mekũrĩrĩmbũka mwaki. 
Job20:24 Akoorĩra rũhiũ rwa njora rwa cuuma, no arathwo na mũguĩ wa gĩcango," 
Job20:25 ũtũrĩkanie mwĩrĩ wake, mũthia waguo ũkũhenia ũnyũrũrũke thakame yake, ngoro yake ĩkĩiyũrwo nĩ kĩmako." 
Job20:26 Kĩrĩa gĩothe eigĩire mũthiithũ nĩkĩrĩanangwo; arĩcinwo nĩ mwaki ũtaakĩĩtio nĩ mũndũ, o na ũcine kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩtigaire nyũmbainĩ yake." 
Job20:27 Igũrũ nĩrĩrĩmenyithania waganu wa mũndũ ũcio, nayo thĩ ĩmũũkĩrĩre." 
Job20:28 Kĩrĩa gĩothe arĩ nakĩo kĩrĩkuuo gĩthiio nakĩo; kĩrĩkururio gĩthiio nakĩo rĩrĩa Ngai arĩraakara. 
Job20:29 Kĩu nĩkĩo kĩheeo kĩrĩa mũndũ mwaganu arĩheeo nĩ Ngai; rĩu nĩrĩo igai rĩrĩa aathĩrĩirwo nĩ Ngai.” 
Job21:1 Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ," 
Job21:2 “Tategaai matũ mũigue ũrĩa nguuga! Ũguo noguo ngũmũũria mũnyũmĩrĩrie naguo. 
Job21:3 Njĩtĩkĩriai njarie; ndarĩĩkia kwaria no mũgĩcooke kũnyũrũria. 
Job21:4 “Mũreciiria nĩ mũndũ ndĩratetia? Ngũgĩkirĩrĩa nĩkĩ? 
Job21:5 Tandoraai na nĩmũkũgega, mũhumbe tũnua twanyu na mooko." 
Job21:6 Ndĩreciiria ũndũ ũyũ ngethithimũkwo, na mwĩrĩ wakwa wothe ũkainaina." 
Job21:7 “Andũ arĩa aaganu-rĩ, marekagwo matũũre nĩkĩ? Marekagwo makinye ũkũrũinĩ na magaacĩre nĩkĩ?" 
Job21:8 Ciana ciao ikũraga magĩcionaga, na ikagaacĩra o maithoinĩ maao." 
Job21:9 Mĩciĩ yao ĩikaraga na thaayũ; Ngai ndamĩreehithagĩria ũũru o wothe. 
Job21:10 Ng'ombe ciao igwatagia igaciara, na gũtirĩ o na ĩmwe ihunaga." 
Job21:11 Moimagaragia ciana ciao o ta rũũru, nacio igathiĩ igĩtũũhatũũhaga." 
Job21:12 Ithiaga ikĩinagĩrwo na tamburini na ngita, na igakenaga nĩkũhuuhĩrwo mĩtũũrirũ." 
Job21:13 Matũũraga o magaacĩire, na magakua o na thaayũ." 
Job21:14 “Meeraga Ngai atigane nao; matiendaga kũrũmĩrĩra njĩra ciake. 
Job21:15 Mooragia atĩrĩ, ‘Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩ we ũ nĩguo tũmũtungatĩre? Nĩkũrĩ uumithio tũngĩona twamũhooya?’" 
Job21:16 Moigaga atĩ nĩ o eene mecarĩirie ũtonga wao; niĩ ndingĩnyiitanĩra na meciiria macio maao. 
Job21:17 “Nĩ maita maigana taawa wa andũ arĩa aaganu wanahorio?Nĩ maita maigana maanakorererwo nĩ mũtino?Nĩ maita maigana Ngai aanamaherithia araakaire? 
Job21:18 Nĩ maita maigana aanamoombũra ta uumbuthĩ? Nĩ maita maigana maanahurutwo ta maragara moombũrĩĩtwo nĩ kĩhuuhũkanio? 
Job21:19 “Muugaga atĩ Ngai aherithagia mwana nĩ ũndũ wa waganu wa mũciari.Aaca! Ngai nĩaherithie mũndũ mwaganu nĩ ũndũ wa waganu wake mwene; nĩonanie atĩ areeka ũguo nĩ ũndũ wa wĩhia. nĩarekwo aigue ũritũ wa waganu wake arĩ we mwene; 
Job21:20 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu nĩarekwo akuue ihera rĩake mwene, na acame maraakara ma Mwene Hinya Wothe." 
Job21:21 Ũtũũro wake wathira-rĩ, angĩcooka atĩa kũrũmbũiya ciana iria atiga na thuutha?" 
Job21:22 Nũũ ũngĩtaara Ngai, o rĩrĩa arĩ we ũtuagĩra aathani arĩa marĩ hinya?" 
Job21:23 (23-24) “Andũ amwe matũũraga na ũgima wa mwĩrĩ o nginya rĩrĩa magaakua; makuaga makeneete na mahooreire, mĩĩrĩ yao ĩrĩ o na hinya." 
Job21:24 Angĩ nao makuaga marĩ na ruwo ngoro, matarĩ maacama gĩkeno o na haniini." 
Job21:25 No oothe makuaga magathikwo, makarĩĩo nĩ mũthũa." 
Job21:26 “Nĩndĩramenya ũrĩa mũreciiria, na ũũru ũrĩa mũraĩnjiirĩria." 
Job21:27 Mũrooria atĩrĩ, ‘Nyũmba ya mũnene ũyũ ĩkĩrĩ ha rĩu? Hema ĩrĩa mũndũ mwaganu aratũũraga ĩrĩ ha rĩu?’" 
Job21:28 Kaĩ mũtarĩ mwatereeta na agendi? Kaĩ mũtarĩ mwaigua ndeto iria mainũkaga nacio? 
Job21:29 Andũ arĩa ooru no o matigaraga mũthenya wa ũgwati; no o mahonokagio mũthenya wa maraakara. 
Job21:30 Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wa gũthitanga mũndũ mwaganu, kana wa kũmũrĩha maũndũ moothe marĩa aaneeka." 
Job21:31 Rĩĩrĩ akuuĩĩtwo agĩtwarwo irimainĩ, mbĩĩrĩra yake ĩkoragwo ĩrangĩirwo wega." 
Job21:32 Andũ aingĩ moimanaga mũtongoro magĩthiĩ mathiko maake; o na tĩĩri nĩũhumbagĩra kĩimba gĩake wega. 
Job21:33 Mũrakĩĩnyũmĩrĩria na maũndũ ma tũhũ nĩkĩ? Macookio maanyu moothe no maheeni matheri!” 
Job22:1 Elifazi ũrĩa wa kuuma Temani agĩcookia atĩrĩ," 
Job22:2 “Mũndũ nĩ wa bata ũrĩkũ harĩ Ngai, o na angĩkorwo e mũũgĩ atĩa?" 
Job22:3 Gũkorwo ũrĩ mũthingu-rĩ, kũngĩguna Mwene Hinya Wothe atĩa? Gũkorwo mĩtugo yaku ĩtarĩ na ũcuuke-rĩ, kũngĩmũteithia na kĩ?" 
Job22:4 Ngai ndarakũherithia na ndaragũtuĩra, nĩ ũrĩa ũmũheaga gĩtĩĩo." 
Job22:5 Githĩ ti ũndũ wa waganu waku mũnene, na wa meehia maaku matangĩtarĩka?" 
Job22:6 Nĩwarĩhirie andũ a mũciĩ wanyu thiirĩ mataarĩ naguo, na ũkĩmaaũra nguo ũkĩmatiga njaga." 
Job22:7 Nĩwaimire arĩa maanogeete maaĩ ma kũnyua, na ũkĩima arĩa maahũũtiĩ irio." 
Job22:8 Nĩwatũmĩrire ũhoti waku na gĩtĩĩo kĩrĩa ũheetwo, gũtuunyana gĩthaka gĩothe." 
Job22:9 Waingatire atumia a ndigwa mooko matheri, na ũkĩhinyirĩria ciana cia ngoriai." 
Job22:10 Nĩkĩo ũthiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ mĩtego, na ũranyiitwo nĩ guoya ũterĩgĩrĩire." 
Job22:11 Nokĩo ũraremwo nĩkuona nĩ ũrĩa ũtumanĩirwo; mũiyũro wa maaĩ ũrakũiga na guoya. 
Job22:12 Githĩ Ngai ndatũũraga igũrũ rĩa igũrũ, na nĩacũũthagĩrĩria njata, o na ciakorwo irĩ igũrũ?" 
Job22:13 O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ, ũũragia atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ kĩĩ Ngai ooĩ? Nĩahumbĩirwo nĩ matu; angĩkĩhota atĩa gũtũtuĩra?" 
Job22:14 Wĩciiragia atĩ nĩagiragĩrĩrio kuona nĩ matu matumanu, rĩrĩa araceeraceera mũtambũrũkoinĩ wa matu mairũ.’" 
Job22:15 Ũgũgĩthiĩ o na mbere kũrũmĩrĩra njĩra o ĩrĩa andũ aaganu matũire mageragĩra? 
Job22:16 Maatwarirwo nĩ kĩguũ o na ihinda rĩao rĩtakinyĩĩte. 
Job22:17 Acio nĩ arĩa maakararirie Ngai, na meetĩkĩĩtie atĩ Mwene Hinya Wothe ndarĩ ũndũ angĩahotire kũmeeka." 
Job22:18 Ĩndĩ nĩ Ngai watũmire matonge; niĩ ndingĩnyiitanĩra na meciiria ma andũ acio aaganu. 
Job22:19 Andũ arĩa athingu moonaga andũ aaganu makĩherithio magakena; andũ arĩa matarĩ ũcuuke mamathekagĩrĩra 
Job22:20 makoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Thũ ciitũ nĩcianangĩĩtwo, na ũtonga ũrĩa itigĩĩte ũgacinwo na mwaki.’" 
Job22:21 “Ayubu, wĩiguithanie na Ngai; tiga kũmuona ta arĩ thũ. Weka ũguo nĩegũkũraathima." 
Job22:22 Amũkĩra mataaro marĩa arakũhe, na ũige ciugo ciake ngoroinĩ yaku." 
Job22:23 Cookerera Mwene Hinya Wothe wĩnyiihĩĩtie, na ũtigane na ũũru wothe ũrĩa wĩkagwo gwaku mũciĩ." 
Job22:24 Ikia thahabu yaku kũraaya nawe; te thahabu yaku ĩrĩa thaka mũno o ta ũrĩa ũngĩte ngomongo. 
Job22:25 Reke Mwene Hinya Wothe atuĩke thahabu yaku, o na atuĩke betha yaku ĩrĩa ya goro." 
Job22:26 Weka ũguo-rĩ, ũrĩikaraga wĩhokeete o Mwene Hinya Wothe, naake atuĩke gĩthima gĩa gĩkeno gĩaku." 
Job22:27 Wamũhooya, nĩarĩgũcookagĩria, na nĩũrĩhingagia mĩhĩtwa ĩrĩa wĩhĩtĩĩte." 
Job22:28 Nĩũrĩgaacagĩra maũndũinĩ moothe marĩa ũrĩĩkaga, na ũtheri nĩũrĩkũmũrĩkagĩra njĩra." 
Job22:29 Ngai nĩanyiihagia arĩa etĩĩi, na akahonokia arĩa enyiihia." 
Job22:30 Nĩegũkũhonokia akorwo ũtarĩ na mahĩtia, na akorwo maũndũ marĩa wĩkaga matirĩ ũcuuke.”" 
Job23:1 Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ," 
Job23:2 “O na ũũmũũthĩ ngũthiĩ o na mbere gũteta ndĩ na marũrũ, tondũ Ngai nĩahũũrĩĩte o na ngĩcaayaga." 
Job23:3 Korwo nĩnjũũĩ kũrĩa ingĩmuona no thiĩ kuo. 
Job23:4 No ndĩmũmenyithie mateta maakwa, na ndĩmuonie ihooto ciakwa." 
Job23:5 No nyende kũmenya ũrĩa angĩnjĩĩra, na ũrĩa angĩnjookeria." 
Job23:6 Ngai no ahũthĩre ũhoti wake mũnene kũũnjũkĩrĩra? Aaca, no athikĩrĩrie ngĩaria." 
Job23:7 Tondũ ndirĩ ũcuuke, no nyũmĩrĩrie gũcookanĩria naake; no oonanie ũrĩa itarĩ na mahĩtia o na atĩa." 
Job23:8 “Ndĩmũcarĩĩtie mwena wa irathĩro, na ndimuone; ngamũcaria mwena wa ithũĩro, ngamwaga." 
Job23:9 Akoreetwo akĩruta wĩra mwena wa na rũgongo na wa na kĩanda, no ndirĩ ndĩramuona." 
Job23:10 No rĩĩrĩ, nĩoĩ mĩthiĩre yakwa yothe; angĩnduĩria, ndarĩ mahĩtia angĩona." 
Job23:11 Ndiumaga njĩrainĩ ciake, na ndikeruraga na kũngĩ o na atĩa." 
Job23:12 Ndirĩ ndatiganĩria maathani maake; ndũire hingagia wendi wake. 
Job23:13 Ngai ndagarũrũkaga, na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩmũkararia; eekaga o ũrĩa ekuona kwagĩrĩire." 
Job23:14 Ũrĩa ekwenda gwĩka na niĩ, nĩguo egwĩka, na ũcio no ũndũ ũmwe wa marĩa maingĩ me meciiriainĩ maake." 
Job23:15 Nĩkĩo nyinainaga ndĩ harĩ we, na ngaigua guoya ndeciiria ũhoro ũcio." 
Job23:16 Ngai nĩagithĩĩtie ngoro yakwa hinya; Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩanjĩguithĩĩtie guoya. 
Job23:17 Ti nduma ĩmakĩĩtie, o na ti nduma ĩnduruurĩĩtie; nĩ Ngai ũmakĩĩtie." 
Job24:1 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, Mwene Hinya Wothe aagaga kũiga mahinda ma gũciirithania nĩkĩ? Aagaga kũiga mũthenya ũrĩa akoonania ihooto cia arĩa mamũtungataga nĩkĩ?" 
Job24:2 Andũ ooru mamunyaga ngiri cia mĩhaka, makahatĩka mĩgũnda yene; matuunyanaga mahiũ, makamarĩithigia marĩ maao." 
Job24:3 Matuunyaga ciana cia ngoriai ndigiri, na makooya ndeegwa ya mũtumia wa ndigwa makamĩiga o nginya akaamarĩha thiirĩ." 
Job24:4 Maagithagia athĩĩni ihooto, na magatũma arĩa oothe abataru mathiĩ makeehithe." 
Job24:5 Athĩĩni acio magagĩcangacanga werũinĩ, o ta ndigiri cia gĩthaka magĩcaria irio; gũtirĩ kũndũ kũngĩ mangĩhota kuonera ciana ciao gĩa kũrĩa." 
Job24:6 Meyũnganagĩria gĩa kũrĩa mĩgũndainĩ ĩtarĩ yao, na makoongania matigari ma thabibũ mĩgũndainĩ ya andũ acio ooru." 
Job24:7 Ũtukũ maraaraga matehumbĩire; matikoragwo na gĩa kwĩrigĩrĩria heho. 
Job24:8 Moiragĩrwo nĩ mbura irĩmainĩ magaconjora, maaga gwa kwĩyũa magathiĩ kwĩgitia rwaroinĩ rwa ihiga." 
Job24:9 “Andũ acio ooru matuunyaga atumia a ndigwa ciana iria marongithia, magaciiga o nginya rĩrĩa makaarĩha thiirĩ." 
Job24:10 Athĩĩni acio magakĩũrũũraga matarĩ na nguo cia kwĩhumba, na magathiaga kũgetha ngano marĩ o ahũũtu." 
Job24:11 Mamahihagĩra ndamaiyũ ikoima maguta, na makamahihĩra thabibũ ikoima ndibei, no magakoragwo marĩ o anyootu." 
Job24:12 Itũũrainĩ andũ arĩa marakua no gũcaaya maracaaya, nao arĩa atiihangie no gũkaya marakaya, no Ngai ndarathikĩrĩria mahooya maao." 
Job24:13 “Kũrĩ andũ mooragĩra ũtheri, matiendaga kũmenya njĩra ciaguo, na matigeragĩra tũcĩra twaguo." 
Job24:14 Mũũragani ookagĩra rũũciinĩ tene, agathiĩ kũũraga andũ arĩa athĩĩni, na ũtukũ agathiĩ kũiya." 
Job24:15 Gĩtharia gĩetagĩrĩra kũgĩe mairia gĩkiugaga na ngoro atĩrĩ, ‘Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũkũnyona,’ na gĩkeehumbĩra ũthiũ gĩtikaamenyeke." 
Job24:16 Aici matharĩkagĩra nyũmba ũtukũ, makeehingĩra mũthenya tondũ matiendaga kuona ũtheri." 
Job24:17 Nduma ndumanu nĩ yo rũũciinĩ rwao oothe, amu matumaga ndũgũ o na maũndũ ndumainĩ ma kũguoyohia." 
Job24:18 “Andũ ooru makuuagwo nĩ maaĩ o ta mahuti; mĩgũnda yao ĩkoragwo ĩrĩ mĩrume nĩ Ngai;na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũthiaga kũruta wĩra mĩgũndainĩ yao ya mĩthabibũ. 
Job24:19 O ta ũrĩa riũa na ũrugarĩ iringũraga mbarabu ĩgathira,noguo andũ arĩa eehia mameragio nĩ bũrũri wa arĩa akuũ." 
Job24:20 Maanyina mariganagĩrwo nĩ o, na makua makarĩĩo nĩ mũthũa; maanangagwo o ta mũtĩ watemwo." 
Job24:21 “Andũ eehia mahinyagĩrĩria atumia thaata, na matirĩ hingo marũmbũyagia atumia a ndigwa." 
Job24:22 Ngai nĩanangaga andũ arĩa marĩ hinya na hinya wake; ooya guoko na igũrũ, andũ acio eehia no gũkua makuaga." 
Job24:23 Ngai no areke matũũre magaacĩire, no aikaraga akĩmatuĩragia hĩndĩ ciothe." 
Job24:24 Matũũgagĩrio kwa ihinda, magacooka makabuĩria; mahoohaga makooma narua o ta ria; marengagwo o ta magira ma ngano." 
Job24:25 Angĩkorwo ũguo tiguo kũrĩ, nũũ ũngĩhota kuonania atĩ nĩndĩraheenania? Nũũ ũngĩhota kũraria ciugo ciakwa?”" 
Job25:1 Bilidadi ũrĩa wa kuuma Shuha agĩcookia atĩrĩ," 
Job25:2 “Ngai arĩ hinya, na andũ oothe nĩmaagĩrĩirwo nĩkũmũtĩĩa; atũũragia gwake igũrũ na thaayũ." 
Job25:3 Thigari ciake no itarĩke? Kũrĩ handũ atamũrĩkaga na ũtheri wake? 
Job25:4 Mũndũ angĩkĩhota atĩa gũtuĩka mũthingu mbere ya Ngai? Mũndũ ũciarĩĩtwo nĩ mũtumia no aage kũhĩtia? 
Job25:5 Angĩkorwo maithoinĩ ma Ngai mweri ndũrĩ ũtheri wa kũigana, na njata itirĩ na ũkengi wa kũigana-rĩ," 
Job25:6 mũndũ, ũrĩa ũrĩ o kĩgunyũ, akĩhaana atĩa? Ũtũũro wa mũndũ ũkĩrĩ kĩ maithoinĩ ma Ngai?”" 
Job26:1 Naake Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ," 
Job26:2 “Kaĩ nĩũndeithĩĩtie-ĩ, o niĩ mũndũ mũthĩĩni na ũtarĩ na hinya!" 
Job26:3 Nĩũheete ũtaaro mwega na ũkanjũhĩgia, niĩ mũndũ mũkĩĩgu." 
Job26:4 Nũũ wera ũguo wothe? Nũũ ũkũhotithĩĩtie kwaria ũguo?” 
Job26:5 Naake Bilidadi agĩcookia atĩrĩ,“Ngoma cia andũ arĩa maakuire nĩkũinaina irainaina irĩ maaĩinĩ marĩa marĩ rungu rwa thĩ." 
Job26:6 Ngai nĩonaga kwa arĩa akuũ; maithoinĩ maake gũtirĩ kĩndũ gĩkũhumbĩrĩĩte. 
Job26:7 Nĩ we watambũrũkirie igũrũ, nayo thĩ akĩmĩcuuria atarĩ na handũ amĩohereire." 
Job26:8 Nĩ we ũiyũragia matu maaĩ na maritũha akamanyiitĩrĩra matigaatathũke. 
Job26:9 Nĩ we ũhumbagĩra mweri, agatambũrũkia itu igũrũ rĩaguo." 
Job26:10 Eekĩrire rũkiriri maaĩinĩ, akĩgayũkania ũtheri na nduma." 
Job26:11 Akayagĩrĩria itugĩ iria itiirĩrĩire igũrũ, ikainaina na igathingitha nĩ guoya." 
Job26:12 Nĩ we watooririe iria na hinya wake. na agĩtooria ndamaathia ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo Rahabu na ũũgĩ wake. 
Job26:13 Mĩhũũmũ yake nĩ yo yatũire igũrũ gũthaka, namo mooko maake makĩũraga ndamaathia ĩrĩa yetharaga." 
Job26:14 Maũndũ macio moothe no mũhiũkio wa ũhoti wake; ũrĩa wothe tũiguĩte, tũiguĩte o na kĩheehũ.No rĩĩrĩ, nũũ ũngĩtaũkĩrwo nĩ ũrĩa Ngai arĩ mũnene?”" 
Job27:1 Naake Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ," 
Job27:2 “Ngwĩhĩta na Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe, o we mũtũũra muoyo, o we ũnjagĩire kĩhooto, na agatũma ngorwo na marũrũ maingĩ." 
Job27:3 Rĩrĩa rĩothe ngũkorwo ndĩ muoyo, na kinya rĩrĩa Ngai egũkorwo aheete mĩhũũmũ," 
Job27:4 mĩromo yakwa ndĩkaaria ũndũ wa ũrongo, na rũrĩmĩ rwakwa rũtikaaheana ũhoro wa maheeni." 
Job27:5 Niĩ ndirĩ hĩndĩ ngoiga atĩ mũrĩ a ma, na ngũtũũra njugaga atĩ ndirĩ na mahĩtia o nginya ngaakua." 
Job27:6 “Ndĩikaraga nũmĩĩtie atĩ ndirĩ na mahĩtia; ngoro yakwa ndĩrĩ ũndũ ĩranjuuka naguo. 
Job27:7 “Thũ ciakwa na arĩa oothe mahinyagĩrĩria, maroherithio o ta andũ aaganu na ooru." 
Job27:8 Andũ arĩa matatĩĩĩte Ngai, mwĩhoko wao ũgaakorwo wĩhoceetie ha, rĩrĩa Ngai akaameetia muoyo wao?" 
Job27:9 Ngai nĩagaagĩthikĩrĩria kĩrĩro kĩao, rĩrĩa magaakorererwo nĩ mathĩĩna?" 
Job27:10 Mangĩambĩĩte gũcaria gĩkeno kĩrĩa Mwene Hinya Wothe aheanaga, na makamũhooyaga hingo ciothe." 
Job27:11 Nĩngũmuonereria ũrĩa Ngai arĩ hinya; nĩngũmũtaarĩria maũndũ marĩa Mwene Hinya Wothe abangĩĩte. 
Job27:12 No rĩĩrĩ, githĩ inyuothe mũtimeyoneire? Nĩkĩ kĩragĩtũma mwarie matũhũũhũ ta macio?" 
Job27:13 “Ũũ nĩguo Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe aherithagia andũ arĩa aaganu na arĩa mahinyagĩrĩria arĩa angĩ. 
Job27:14 Mahota kũgĩa na ciana nyingĩ, no ciothe ikooragĩrwo mbaarainĩ;njiarwa ciao itirĩ hingo cionaga irio cia gũciigana." 
Job27:15 Iria ikaahonoka mbaarainĩ igaakua nĩ ng'aragu; atumia aao a ndigwa matigaacicakaĩra. 
Job27:16 Andũ arĩa aaganu mahota kũgĩa na betha nyingĩ o na kana nguo nyingĩ o ta mahuti. 
Job27:17 Na rĩĩrĩ, nguo icio andũ arĩa athingu nĩ o magaciĩhumba; nayo betha ĩgayanwo nĩ arĩa ehokeku." 
Job27:18 Andũ arĩa aaganu meyakagĩra nyũmba ta ya mbũmbũĩ, kana ta gĩthũnũ kĩrĩa gĩakagwo nĩ mũrangĩri mũgũnda." 
Job27:19 Mũthenya ũmwe magaathiĩ toro marĩ itonga, no magĩũkĩra magaakora ũtonga wao ũtarĩ ho." 
Job27:20 Magaakorererwo nĩ guoya o ta arĩ kĩguũ, mahuruutwo nĩ rũhuuho rwa ũtukũ mathiio nao." 
Job27:21 Rũhuuho rwa kuuma irathĩro rũkamoombũra mathiĩ; rũkamoombũra rũmarute mĩciĩ yao. 
Job27:22 Rũkamoombũra rũtekũmaiguĩra tha, o na mageria ta ũrĩa mangĩhota kwĩhonokia." 
Job27:23 Rũkaamagoromookera makĩũra, na rũmamakie na hinya wa mwanangĩko.”" 
Job28:1 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, kũrĩ kũrĩa betha yenjagwo, na nĩkũrĩ kũrĩa thahabu ĩtheragĩrio." 
Job28:2 Cuuma yenjagwo kuuma na kũu thĩ, gĩcango nakĩo gĩtwekagio kuuma mahigainĩ." 
Job28:3 Andũ matuĩragia nduma ĩrĩa ndumanu mũno, magathuuthuuria ituri cia thĩ, na makeenja mahiga kũrĩa kũrĩ nduma ndumanu." 
Job28:4 Meenjaga marima ma mahiga ma goro kũndũ andũ matatũũraga kana magathiĩ.Marutagĩra wĩra kũndũ maikaraga marĩ oiki, na magaikũrũkaga marima macio na mĩkanda." 
Job28:5 Irio ikũraga tĩĩriinĩ igũrũ, no na kũu rungu rwa tĩĩri ũcio kwenjeetwo na gũkamomoranio." 
Job28:6 Tĩĩriinĩ ũcio gũkoragwo na mahiga ma rangi wa mburuu, na rũkũngũinĩ gũkoima thahabu." 
Job28:7 “Gũtirĩ hũngũ yũĩ njĩra ya gũthiĩ marimainĩ macio, na gũtirĩ nderi ĩreraga igũrũ rĩamo." 
Job28:8 Gũtirĩ mũrũũthi kana nyamũ ĩngĩ o yothe ĩtuĩkanagia kuo. 
Job28:9 “Eenji meenjaga mahiga marĩa moomũ mũno, magakĩhukũrania itina cia irĩma." 
Job28:10 Matũrĩkanagia mahiga macio moomũ, maitho maao makoona kahiga o goothe ka goro." 
Job28:11 Mahingagĩrĩria matherũkĩro ma njũũĩ itigaatherere, kĩrĩa gĩothe kiuma gĩthike gĩkooneka ũtheriinĩ." 
Job28:12 “No rĩĩrĩ, ũũgĩ ũngĩoneka kũ? Ũtaũku-rĩ, tũngĩũruta kũ?" 
Job28:13 Gũtirĩ ũũĩ thogora wa ũũgĩ, na nduonekaga thĩinĩ wa andũ." 
Job28:14 Ndũrĩ thĩ kũrĩa kũriku, o na kana kũrĩa kũriku iriainĩ." 
Job28:15 Ũũgĩ ndũgũragwo na thahabu, na ndũngĩigananio na betha." 
Job28:16 Thahabu iria njega mũno na mahiga marĩa ma goro itingĩhota kũringanio naguo. 
Job28:17 Ũũgĩ ũrĩ goro gũkĩra thahabu, ũrĩ goro o na gũkĩra indo cia thahabu kana icicio iria njega mũno." 
Job28:18 Thogora waguo nĩ mũnene gũkĩra wa mahiga ma goro marĩa ma mburuu, meerũ, kana ma rubi." 
Job28:19 Kahiga ka goro ka rangi wa yerũũ karĩa keega mũno gatingĩringithanio naguo ningĩ ndũngĩgũrĩka na thahabu, o na ĩrĩa theru mũno." 
Job28:20 “Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ, ũũgĩ ũngĩoneka kũ? Ũtaũku-rĩ, tũngĩũruta kũ?" 
Job28:21 Nĩũhithĩĩtwo ciũmbe ciothe o na ũkahithwo nyoni iria ciũmbũkaga. 
Job28:22 Mwanangĩko na gĩkuũ kĩo kĩene, ciugaga atĩrĩ‘No kũigua tũiguaga mũhuuhu wa ũũgĩ.’" 
Job28:23 “Ngai no we ũmenyaga kĩhumo kĩaguo na no we ũũĩ kũrĩa ũtũũraga. 
Job28:24 Nĩ gũkorwo no we wiki ũcũũthagĩrĩria kinya ituri cia thĩ, na no we wiki wonaga kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩrĩ mũhuro wa igũrũ." 
Job28:25 Ningĩ rĩrĩa athondekagĩra rũhuuho hinya waruo, rĩrĩa athimagĩra maria mĩhaka yamo," 
Job28:26 rĩrĩa aheaga mbura mũtaratara wayo, na rĩrĩa atemagĩra ihuuhũkanio njĩra yacio," 
Job28:27 hĩndĩ ĩyo oonire ũũgĩ akĩũgaathĩrĩria, akĩũhanda wega, na agĩũthuuthuuria." 
Job28:28 Agĩcooka akĩĩra mũndũ atĩrĩ, ‘Ũũgĩ-rĩ, nĩgũtĩĩa MWATHANI; naguo ũtaũku nĩgũthengera ũũru.’ ”" 
Job29:1 Ayubu akĩambĩrĩria kwaria rĩngĩ akiuga atĩrĩ," 
Job29:2 “Naarĩ korwo no haane ũrĩa ndahaanaga tene, mahinda marĩa Ngai aikaraga aabaarĩrĩire;" 
Job29:3 rĩrĩa ũtheri wake wamũrĩkagĩra na ũkaanyonereria njĩra ngĩgerera ndumainĩ! 
Job29:4 Naarĩ korwo mĩaka ya tene no ĩcooke, rĩrĩa ndagaacĩire, rĩrĩa Ngai akoragwo arĩ mũraata wa mũciĩ wakwa;" 
Job29:5 rĩrĩa Mwene Hinya Wothe aikaranagia na niĩ, na ndakoragwo thiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ ciana ciakwa!" 
Job29:6 Rĩrĩa mbũri na ng'ombe ciakwa cioimagia iria rĩingĩ, o na mĩtamaiyũ yakwa ĩhandĩĩtwo mahigainĩ yarutaga maguta maingĩ." 
Job29:7 Rĩrĩa rĩothe ndoimagaraga ngathiĩ kĩhingoinĩ gĩa itũũra, ngaheeo gĩtĩ hamwe na athuuri arĩa angĩ," 
Job29:8 aanake manyonaga makanjeherera njĩra na ihenya, nao athuuri magookĩrĩria itĩ maahe gĩtĩĩo." 
Job29:9 Atongoria a mũingĩ nao maatigaga kwaria, na makeenyiita tũnua na mooko." 
Job29:10 Andũ arĩa marĩ igweta maakiragio, nacio nĩmĩ ciao ikoomanĩrĩra o tũnuainĩ twao." 
Job29:11 “Mũndũ o wothe wanyonaga na waiguaga ũhoro wakwa, nĩangaathagĩrĩria." 
Job29:12 Athĩĩni maangaĩra nĩndamateithagia, ciana cia ngoriai irĩa itaarĩ na wa gũciteithia, nĩndaciteithagia." 
Job29:13 Andũ magĩkua nĩmandaathimaga, na nĩndatũmaga atumia a ndigwa, maikarage macanjamũkĩĩte;" 
Job29:14 Hĩndĩ ciothe ndeekaga o maũndũ ma ũthingu na ngatuanagĩra nũmĩrĩire kĩhooto. 
Job29:15 Nĩndoonagĩrĩria itumuumu njĩra, o na nganyiitagĩrĩra ithua." 
Job29:16 Harĩ arĩa athĩĩni, ndahaanaga ta ithe wao, na nĩndarũmbũyanagia na maciira o na ma andũ itooĩ." 
Job29:17 Nĩndaanangaga andũ arĩa matarĩ tha, ngakĩmatuunyũkithia kĩrĩa manyiitĩĩte." 
Job29:18 Ndeĩraga atĩ ngaatũũra mĩaka mĩingĩ ta kagoogo, na ngaakuĩra mũciĩ gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ aakwa." 
Job29:19 Ndahaanaga ta mũtĩ ũhandĩĩtwo hũgũrũrũinĩ cia maaĩ, ũrĩa ũkoragwo na ime ũtukũ wothe." 
Job29:20 Ngumo yakwa yatwaranaga na niĩ ĩkĩongererekaga, ndathiaga ngĩgĩaga hinya mũthenya o mũthenya." 
Job29:21 “Andũ maathikagĩrĩria na mageeterera njarie, na ndaaria no gũkira maakiraga ndĩmataare." 
Job29:22 Ndarĩĩkia kwaria, gũtirĩ wongagĩrĩra ũndũ ũngĩ, ciugo ciakwa ciamanyootoraga o ta maaĩ." 
Job29:23 Maacĩetagĩrĩra o ta ũrĩa meetagĩrĩra mbura; na magaciamũkĩra ta ũria maamũkagĩra mbura niini. 
Job29:24 Maakoragwo moorĩĩtwo nĩ hinya, ndamathekagia magakena; matianogagio nĩkuona gĩthiithi gĩakwa." 
Job29:25 Ndamoonagĩrĩria njĩra ndĩ ta mũtongoria wao; ndatũũranagia nao ta ũrĩa mũthamaki atũũranagia na mbũtũ ciake cia ita,na ngamoomagĩrĩria hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna." 
Job30:1 “No rĩĩrĩ, andũ eethĩ kũngĩra, andũ, maithe maao ingĩeciiririe maita meerĩ kana matatũ ngĩmeetĩkĩria gũikarania na ngui cia kũrangĩra mbũri ciakwa, rĩu nĩ o marathekerera." 
Job30:2 Andũ ta acio mangĩndeithia na kĩ? Nĩ andũ athiru hinya biũ. 
Job30:3 Nĩ andũ marĩ na thĩĩna na ahũũtu, marathũgũna mĩri mĩũmũ me kũndũ kũũmũ na kwanangĩku." 
Job30:4 Matuaga mahuti ma werũinĩ makarĩa, o na nĩmarĩaga mĩri ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ cama ya mĩhĩnga." 
Job30:5 Nĩkũingatwo maingatĩĩtwo mũingĩinĩ, moigagĩrĩrio ta marĩ aici." 
Job30:6 Matũũraga ngurungainĩ cia rũũĩ, na miunguinĩ yenjeetwo ndwaroinĩ cia mahiga." 
Job30:7 Mararamaga o ta nyamũ na kũu gĩthakainĩ, na magakomaga marĩ gĩtutu na kũu ihingainĩ." 
Job30:8 Nĩ kĩruka kĩa andũ matarĩ mbuguĩro na gĩtarĩ igweta. Nĩkũingatwo maingatĩĩtwo moime bũrũriinĩ. 
Job30:9 “Rĩu mookaga o gũũthekerera; harĩ o ndĩ o kĩndũ gĩa gũthaakĩrwo. 
Job30:10 Nĩmaanyararĩĩte na nĩgũũtheema maatheemaga, na manyona no kũũminja maaminjaga mĩnyĩrĩ," 
Job30:11 tondũ Ngai nĩanjagithĩĩtie hinya na kĩene, nao maanjũkĩrĩire matarĩ na tha." 
Job30:12 Maratharĩkĩra marĩ gĩtutu, na makaanyingatithia mehaarĩirie kũnjũraga." 
Job30:13 Nĩmahingĩĩte njĩra ciakwa cia kũũrĩra, no gũthiĩ marathiĩ na mbere kũũnyananga na gũtirĩ na mũndũ wa kũmagirĩrĩria." 
Job30:14 Marangora ta andũ matũrĩkĩĩtie thingo ciakwa cia kũngitĩra, makangomera makaahehenja." 
Job30:15 Maanjigĩĩte na kĩmako; gĩtĩĩo gĩakwa kĩroora ta kĩũmbũrĩĩtwo nĩ rũhuuho, nakuo kũgaacĩra gwakwa kũrabuĩria o ta itu." 
Job30:16 “Rĩu ngiriĩ gũkua; ruwo rwakwa rũtiratigithĩria. 
Job30:17 Mahĩndĩ maakwa maraaraga magĩakana ũtukũ mũgima ruwo rũrĩa ndĩ naruo rũtirathira. 
Job30:18 Ngai anyiitĩĩte mũmero, na agakũnjakũnjania nguo ciakwa." 
Job30:19 Andekanĩĩtie mũtooroinĩ, ngagĩtuĩka o ta rũkũngũ na mũhu." 
Job30:20 “Ngai, ndĩragũkaĩra no ndũranjĩtĩka; ndĩrakũhooya na ndũrathikĩrĩria." 
Job30:21 Nĩũngarũrũkĩĩte ũkaanyonia ũũru; ũranyamaaria na hinya waku wothe. 
Job30:22 Ũranyũmbũra ũkareka rũhuuho rũthiĩ na niĩ; ũranyaagia kĩhuuhũkanioinĩ kĩa iria. 
Job30:23 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ ũnjerekeirie o gĩkuũinĩ; na nokĩo andũ oothe meetereire. 
Job30:24 “Ũratharĩkĩra mũndũ mũhooteku, mũndũ ũtarĩ ũndũ angĩhotera, tiga o gũthaithana aiguĩrwo tha, nĩkĩ?" 
Job30:25 Githĩ arĩa maarĩ thĩĩna, ndiarĩraga hamwe nao? Githĩ ndiaiguagĩra athĩĩni tha?" 
Job30:26 No rĩĩrĩ, ndeetagĩrĩra wega, na no ũũru wangoraga; ndeetagĩrĩra kuona ũtheri, na no nduma ndoonaga." 
Job30:27 Mara maakwa maakanaga nĩ ruwo mategũtigithĩria, mĩthenya ya maruwo no yo ĩndookagĩra." 
Job30:28 Thiaga ndĩthikĩire itekuona riũa, na ndũũgamaga mũingĩinĩ o kũũria andũ mandeithie." 
Job30:29 Mũgambo wakwa ũtuĩkĩĩte wa kĩeha na wa ihooru, o ta mũgambo wa mbwe kana wa ndundu." 
Job30:30 Ngoothi yakwa nĩrĩĩkĩĩtie kũhĩa na nĩroonũka, niĩ na niĩ nĩgũthira ndĩrathira nĩ mũrimũ wa kũhiũha mwĩrĩ." 
Job30:31 Ndatũire njiguaga nyĩmbo cia gĩkeno, no rĩu njiguaga o mũcaayo na kĩrĩro." 
Job31:1 “Nĩndĩhĩtĩĩte ngoiga, ndirĩriragĩria mũndũ wa nja." 
Job31:2 “Ngai Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ-rĩ, atugaga andũ atĩa? Mwene Hinya Wothe-rĩ, aheaga andũ mũcaara atĩa nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko ciao?" 
Job31:3 Andũ arĩa aaganu nĩkũmatũmĩra amatũmagĩra mũthiro; arĩa nao meekaga maũndũ mooru akamaananga. 
Job31:4 Ngai nĩonaga mĩthiĩre yakwa, na nĩoĩ ciĩko ciakwa ciothe." 
Job31:5 “Ndehĩta na ma atĩ, ndirĩ ndeeka ũmaramari, kana ngĩgeria kũheenia mũndũ." 
Job31:6 Ngai ta nĩagĩĩthime na ratiri ĩrĩa ya ma, na nĩekũmenya ũkinyanĩru wakwa!" 
Job31:7 Ingĩkorwo ndĩndaregenyũka, kana ngĩreka ndwarĩrĩrio ũũruinĩ, o na kana ngĩthaahia mooko maakwa na meehia," 
Job31:8 irio iria handĩĩte, irorĩĩo nĩ mũndũ ũngĩ, na mĩmera yakwa ĩromunywo!" 
Job31:9 “Ingĩkorwo ndĩnderirĩria mũtumia wene, na ngĩthiĩ kũmũhingurithia mũrango," 
Job31:10 mũtumia wakwa arokĩrugagĩra mũndũ ũngĩ, na arokoma na andũ angĩ!" 
Job31:11 Nĩ amu ũtharia nĩ ngero njũru na nĩ wĩhia wa gũtwaranĩrwo igootiinĩ. 
Job31:12 Ũtharia ũhaana ta mwaki ũrarĩrĩmbũka o kũrĩrĩmbũka, na no ũcine o biũ kĩrĩa gĩothe ndĩ nakĩo." 
Job31:13 “Ingĩkorwo ndĩndaaga gũthikĩrĩria ndungata ciakwa rĩrĩa ciateta," 
Job31:14 ngaagĩĩka atĩa rĩrĩa Ngai akanjĩta? Ngakĩmũcookeria atĩa rĩrĩa akaahooya ũhoro? 
Job31:15 Githĩ ũrĩa wanyũmbire to we wombire ndungata ciakwa? Kaĩ atarĩ Ngai o ũmwe watũũmbire ithuothe? 
Job31:16 “Ndirĩ ndaima mũthĩĩni kĩndũ; kana ngĩtũma mũtumia wa ndigwa akue ngoro. 
Job31:17 Ndirĩ ndarĩa irio ndĩ nyiiki, na ngĩaga kũgaĩra mwana wa ngoriai," 
Job31:18 Kuuma ndĩ o mũnyiinyi ndũire mbaaragĩrĩra ciana cia ngoriai ta ndĩ ithe wacio, na kuuma ndaciarwo ndũire ndeithagĩrĩria atumia a ndigwa." 
Job31:19 Ndoona mũndũ ũrathĩĩnĩka nĩkwaga nguo, kana ũtarĩ na gĩa kwĩhumba" 
Job31:20 ndĩmũheaga nguo ithondekeetwo na guoya wa kuuma ng'ondu ciakwa; naake akandaathima na ngoro yake yothe 
Job31:21 Ingĩkorwo ndĩndaheenia mwana wa ngoriai tondũ wa kũmenya atĩ igooti rĩrĩ mwena wakwa-rĩ," 
Job31:22 guoko gwakwa kũrounĩkĩra o mũrĩngainĩ wa kĩande, nayo njara yakwa ĩrorekanĩria o gĩtinainĩ kĩayo." 
Job31:23 Ndingĩĩka ũmwe wa macio moothe, nĩ gũkorwo nĩndĩtigĩrĩĩte kũherithio nĩ Ngai." 
Job31:24 “Ndirĩ ndaiga mwĩhoko wakwa ũtongainĩ wakwa," 
Job31:25 kana ngĩgĩĩtĩĩa nĩ ũndũ waguo. 
Job31:26 Ndirĩ ndathaathaiya riũa nĩ ũndũ wa ũkengu warĩo, o na kana ngĩthaathaiya mweri nĩ ũndũ wa ũthaka waguo." 
Job31:27 Ndirĩ ndaheenererio ngĩcihe gĩtĩĩo, na ndirĩ ndamumunya guoko gwakwa nĩ ũndũ wa gũcitĩĩa." 
Job31:28 Ũcio nĩ wĩhia wa gũtwaranĩrwo igootiinĩ, nĩ amu nĩgũkaana Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe." 
Job31:29 “Ndirĩ ndakenerera kwanangwo gwa thũ ciakwa, o na kana ngĩcanjamũka ciakorererwo nĩ mũthiro." 
Job31:30 Ndirĩ ndeehia na ũndũ wa kũhoera thũ ciakwa gĩkuũ. 
Job31:31 Arĩa tũtũũranagia nao nĩmooĩ atĩ nĩndugaga ageni hĩndĩ ciothe. 
Job31:32 Agendi matirĩ maaraara nja, mĩrango yakwa ĩikaraga ĩrĩ mĩhingũrĩre ageni." 
Job31:33 Andũ nĩkũhithĩrĩra mahithagĩrĩra mahĩtia maao, no niĩ ndirĩ ndahumbĩra maakwa." 
Job31:34 Ndirĩ ndakira kana ngĩaga kuumagara, nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtigĩra kĩnyũrũri kana nĩ ũndũ wa kũmakio nĩ mĩario ya andũ." 
Job31:35 Naarĩ korwo ndĩ na wa gũũthikĩrĩria! Ũcio nĩguo ũira wakwa!Reke Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe akĩnjookerie.Naarĩ korwo thũ yakwa yandĩka thitango ciayo ndĩcione! 
Job31:36 Hatirĩ nganja no ndĩcikuue na ciande, na ndĩciigĩrĩre mũtweinĩ wakwa irĩ ta kĩraũni." 
Job31:37 No hote gũtaarĩria Ngai ciĩko ciakwa, o na kũrũũgama mbere yake itagwĩtigĩra." 
Job31:38 “Angĩkorwo nĩkũiya njiĩĩte mũgũnda ũrĩa nĩmaga, na ngaũtuunyana kuuma harĩ eene guo;" 
Job31:39 angĩkorwo ndĩ ndarĩa irio ciaguo itacirutĩire wĩra, na ngĩreka aruti wĩra makue nĩ ng'aragu;" 
Job31:40 mĩigua ĩrogĩkũra handũ ha ngano, na ria handũ ha mbaarĩ.”Mĩario ya Ayubu yathirĩra hau." 
Job32:1 Andũ acio atatũ nĩmaatigire gũcookanĩria na Ayubu tondũ nĩetĩkĩĩtie na ngoro yake atĩ ndaarĩ na mahĩtia. 
Job32:2 No rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ warĩ hau wetagwo Elihu nĩaraakarire mũno. (Elihu aarĩ mũrũ wa Barakeli wa nyũmba ya Buzi, wa mbarĩ ya Ramu.) Elihu aaraakarire nĩ Ayubu tondũ wa gwĩtua atĩ we aarĩ na kĩhooto, no Ngai ndarĩ nakĩo." 
Job32:3 Ningĩ nĩaraakaririo nĩ araata acio atatũ a Ayubu tondũ nĩmaaremirwo nĩgũcookeria Ayubu magĩgĩtũma Ngai ooneke ta arĩ we warĩ na mahĩtia. 
Job32:4 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, Elihu eetereire atekwarĩria Ayubu, tondũ acio angĩ maarĩ akũrũ kũmũkĩra." 
Job32:5 Rĩrĩa Elihu oonire atĩ athuuri acio atatũ matinahota gũcookeria Ayubu wega, nĩaraakarire mũno." 
Job32:6 Agĩkĩambĩrĩria kwaria akiuga atĩrĩ,“Inyuĩ mũrĩ akũrũ, na niĩ ndĩ mũndũ mwĩthĩ,nĩkĩo ngwĩtigĩrĩĩte kũmwĩra woni wakwa." 
Job32:7 Nguugĩĩte ndeke inyuĩ akũrũ mwaranĩrie, ndeke o inyuĩ athuuri mũmenyithanie ũũgĩ wanyu." 
Job32:8 No rĩĩrĩ, roho wa Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩ we ũũkaga thĩinĩ wa mũndũ, akamũhe ũũgĩ." 
Job32:9 Atĩrĩ, mĩaka mĩingĩ tiyo ĩtuaga mũndũ mũũgĩ, ũkũrũ tiguo ũtũmaga mũndũ amenye ihooto." 
Job32:10 Kwoguo ngũmũũria mũthikĩrĩrie. Rekeei o na niĩ heane woni wakwa. 
Job32:11 “Atĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũgũcaragia wa kuuga, ngũkirĩĩte thikĩrĩrie mĩario yanyu; ngũtegeete matũ njigue ũũgĩ wanyu." 
Job32:12 Nĩngũmũthikĩrĩirie wega, no gũtirĩ ũhotire kuonia Ayubu mahĩtia maake, kana kũmũcookeria." 
Job32:13 Mũtigaakiuge atĩ mũrĩ oogĩ; rekeei Ngai acookerie Ayubu arĩ we, tondũ inyuĩ nĩmwaremwo." 
Job32:14 Ayubu nĩ inyuĩ akwaragĩria ti niĩ; na niĩ ndikũmũcookeria ũguo mũkũmũcookagĩria. 
Job32:15 “Ayubu, araata aaku nĩmaaga ciugo cia gũgũcookeria, matirĩ na ũhoro wa gũkwĩra." 
Job32:16 Maagĩkira-rĩ, ngũthiĩ o na mbere gweterera? Nĩ o acio marũngiĩ hau matarĩ na ũndũ ũngĩ maroiga!" 
Job32:17 Atĩrĩ, o na niĩ nĩngũruta woni wakwa, nĩngũkwĩra ũrĩa ndĩreciiria." 
Job32:18 Ndĩ na ũhoro mũingĩ, na roho nĩaraningĩrĩria njarie." 
Job32:19 Ingĩaga kwaria, ndatathũka o ta mondo ĩiyũrĩĩtio ndibei ya mũhihano." 
Job32:20 No mũhaka njarie nĩguo hũũcũke; nĩngũtumũra kanua njarie. 
Job32:21 Ndigwĩcukumania na mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ kana ngenie mũndũ na mĩario," 
Job32:22 Niĩ ndiũĩ gũkenia mũndũ na mĩario, na ingĩmũkenia, Ngai no aherithie na ihenya." 
Job33:1 “Ayubu, rĩu tathikĩrĩria mĩario yakwa; tatega matũ ũigue ũrĩa wothe nguuga." 
Job33:2 Ngũtumũra kanua njarie kĩrĩa kĩrĩ ngoro yakwa. 
Job33:3 Ciugo ciakwa ciothe nĩ nginyanĩru, na ngwaria o ma theri." 
Job33:4 Roho wa Ngai nĩguo wanyũmbire, na Mwene Hinya Wothe akĩhe muoyo." 
Job33:5 “No ũnjookerie ũngĩhota; kĩhaarĩrie ihooto ciaku. 
Job33:6 Maithoinĩ ma Ngai, wee na niĩ nĩtũiganaine, ithuerĩ tũthondekeetwo na rĩũmba." 
Job33:7 Kwoguo ndũrĩ na gĩtũmi gĩa kwĩĩndigĩra, ndigũkũhatĩrĩria." 
Job33:8 “Waria ngĩiguaga; nĩndathikĩrĩria ũrĩa wothe woiga. 
Job33:9 Nĩndaigua woiga: ‘Niĩ ndirĩ na mahĩtia; niĩ ndirĩ ũũru njĩkĩĩte, ndĩ mũthingu na ndirĩ na wĩhia." 
Job33:10 No Ngai nĩacaragia ciĩgwatio nĩguo ahũũre na anyiite ta thũ yake. 
Job33:11 Anjoheete magũrũ na bĩngũ na nĩabaaraga ũrĩa wothe njĩkaga.’ 
Job33:12 “Ayubu, ngũkwĩra hau nĩũhĩtĩĩtie, amu Ngai nĩ mũnene gũkĩra mũndũ o wothe." 
Job33:13 Ũragĩtetia Ngai nĩkĩ atĩ ndacookagia mateta maaku? 
Job33:14 Ngai aaragia rĩmwe na njĩra ĩno, rĩrĩa rĩngĩ na njĩra ĩngĩ, o na akorwo gũtirĩ ũmenyaga ũguo." 
Job33:15 Rĩrĩa andũ marĩ toro, Ngai amaaragĩria na njĩra ya irooto na cioneki." 
Job33:16 Agatũma maigue ũrĩa arenda kuuga, na akamatigĩra rũũri rwa kũmakaania." 
Job33:17 Eekaga ũguo, atũme matigaacooke gwĩka maũndũ mooru, na atũme matigaacooke gwĩtĩĩa." 
Job33:18 Ndangĩreka maanangwo, na nĩamahonokagia kuuma gĩkuũinĩ." 
Job33:19 Ngai arũngaga andũ na kũmatũmĩra mĩrimũ, agakĩiyũria ruwo mĩĩrĩ yao yothe." 
Job33:20 Andũ acio arũaru magakĩaga cama wa irio, irio o na iria njega mũno igagĩtuĩka cia kũmairia ngoro." 
Job33:21 Mĩĩrĩ yao ĩgakĩhĩnja ĩgathira, magagĩtigwo o mahĩndĩ matheri." 
Job33:22 Magagĩkuhĩrĩria gũkua, mathiĩ kwa arĩa akuũ." 
Job33:23 “No rĩĩrĩ, mũraika wa kũmaarĩrĩria, ũmwe wa araika ngiri na ngiri, no ooke amaririkanie ũrĩa maagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩka." 
Job33:24 Mũraika ũcio amaiguĩre tha, athiĩ amaarĩrĩrie, eere Ngai: ‘Matigithie gũthiĩ kwa arĩa akuũ. Kĩndũ gĩa kũmakũũra matigaathiĩ kwa arĩa akuũ kĩrĩ haaha." 
Job33:25 Mĩĩrĩ ya andũ acio ĩgagĩcookwo nĩ hinya rĩngĩ ĩkahaana o ta rĩrĩa maarĩ eethĩ.’ 
Job33:26 Andũ acio magakĩhooya Ngai, naake akamaigua; magagĩthaathaiya Ngai makeneete, naake Ngai akamathondekera maũndũ maao makaagĩra." 
Job33:27 O mũndũ akeera arĩa angĩ atĩrĩ,‘Nĩndeehirie ngĩtiga njĩra ĩrĩa nũngarũ, no Ngai ndaherithĩĩtie ta ũrĩa njagĩrĩirwo." 
Job33:28 Nĩahonokeetie ndigaathiĩ kwa arĩa akuũ, na nĩndĩrathiĩ na mbere gũtũũra muoyo.’" 
Job33:29 “Ngai nĩekaga andũ maũndũ macio moothe, na agacookera maũndũ macio kaingĩ kaingĩ." 
Job33:30 Agakĩhonokia mũndũ ndagathiĩ kwa arĩa akuũ, nĩguo athiĩ na mbere gũtũũra muoyo." 
Job33:31 “Ayubu, tega matũ ũthikĩrĩrie, kira ũreke njarie." 
Job33:32 No angĩkorwo ũrĩ na ũndũ wa gũcookia, no ũnjookerie; no ngene ngĩigua atĩ ũrĩ ũũmainĩ." 
Job33:33 No angĩgĩkorwo ndũrĩ na ũndũ, gĩkire ũgĩĩthikĩrĩrie, na niĩ nĩngũkũũhĩgia.”" 
Job34:1 Elihu agĩgĩthiĩ na mbere kwaria akiuga atĩrĩ," 
Job34:2 “Taiguai ciugo ciakwa, inyuĩ njũhĩga ici; tategaai matũ, inyuĩ imenyi ici." 
Job34:3 Matũ makũũranaga ciugo o ta ũrĩa rũrĩmĩ rũkũũranaga cama wa irio. 
Job34:4 Ũkaai tũtuĩrie ũndũ ũrĩa wa kĩhooto, rekeei tũcookanie ndundu tuone ũndũ ũrĩa mwega." 
Job34:5 Ayubu oiga atĩ we ndarĩ na mahĩtia, na atĩ Ngai nĩamwagithĩĩtie kĩhooto gĩake." 
Job34:6 Ningĩ nĩoiga atĩ o na gũtuĩka ndarĩ na mahĩtia, Ngai amũtuĩte mũheenania;na atĩ o na gũtuĩka ndarĩ na wĩhia, Ngai amũtheecangĩĩte akeenda kũmũũraga." 
Job34:7 Mũrĩ muona mũndũ ũhaana ta Ayubu? Ayubu ndarĩ na gĩtĩĩo o na haniini na Ngai. 
Job34:8 Atumaga ndũgũ na andũ ooru, na agatwaranaga na andũ eehia." 
Job34:9 Nĩkĩo aroiga, ‘Gũtirĩ uumithio mũndũ angĩona o na angĩgeria gũkenia Ngai.’" 
Job34:10 “Tathikĩrĩriai inyuĩ imenyi ici; Ngai-rĩ, no eeke waganu?Mwene Hinya Wothe no eeke ũndũ mũũru? Kũroaga ũguo!" 
Job34:11 Eekaga mũndũ kũringana na ciĩko ciake, na atugaga mũndũ kũringana na mĩtugo yake." 
Job34:12 Ũhoro wa ma nĩ atĩ Ngai ndeekaga waganu; Mwene Hinya Wothe ndoogomagia kĩhooto kĩa mũndũ. 
Job34:13 Nĩkũrĩ mũndũ waheire Ngai ũhoti wake? Nĩkũrĩ mũndũ wamũtuire mũnene wa thĩ yothe? 
Job34:14 Ngai angĩcookera mĩhũũmũ ya muoyo," 
Job34:15 mũndũ o wothe wĩ muoyo no gũkua angĩkua, agĩtuĩke o rũkũngũ." 
Job34:16 “Angĩkorwo ũrĩ mũũgĩ-rĩ, tagĩthikĩrĩrie ũrĩa nguuga." 
Job34:17 Kaĩ ũragĩtuĩra Ngai na nĩ mũthingu? Ũgwĩciiria atĩ nĩathũire kĩhooto? 
Job34:18 Nĩatuagĩra athamaki na aathani maatuĩka andũ a tũhũ kana andũ ooru. 
Job34:19 Ndecukumithanagia na aathani kana akeenda itonga gũkĩra athĩĩni; tondũ oothe nĩ we wamoombire. 
Job34:20 Ũtukũ oothe no makue o ta kũbucia kwa riitho, Ngai ahũũraga andũ magathira.Kweheria andũ arĩa marĩ hinya, ndabataraga kwĩgũmĩra." 
Job34:21 “Amu nĩabaaraga mĩthiĩre ya andũ, na akoona ũrĩa wothe meekaga." 
Job34:22 Gũtirĩ nduma o na ĩngĩkorwo ĩrĩ ndumanu atĩa, ĩngĩhitha andũ arĩa ooru kuuma harĩ Ngai." 
Job34:23 Amu gũtirĩ mũthenya Ngai aigĩĩte nĩ ũndũ wa andũ, rĩrĩa mangithiĩ mbere yake magatuĩrwo." 
Job34:24 Ngai ndabataraga gũtuĩria, nĩ geetha eeherie atongoria, na eekĩre angĩ handũ haao." 
Job34:25 Tondũ nĩoĩ ciĩko ciao, amang'aũranagia na akamahehenja o ũtukũ." 
Job34:26 Nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maao, amaherithagĩria kũndũ andũ maroona," 
Job34:27 tondũ nĩmaamũtiganĩirie, na makĩrangĩrĩria maathani maake moothe." 
Job34:28 Nĩmaatũmire athĩĩni makaĩre Ngai, naake akĩigua makaya maao." 
Job34:29 “Ngai angĩtua atĩ ndarĩ ũndũ egwĩka-rĩ, nũũ ũngĩmũruta mahĩtia?Angĩhũgũka na kũngĩ-rĩ, andũ matingĩteithia." 
Job34:30 Gũtirĩ ũndũ ndũũrĩrĩ ingĩĩka, nĩguo andũ matatĩĩĩte Ngai matigacihinyĩrĩrie kana maciathe." 
Job34:31 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, Ayubu, nĩumbũrĩire Ngai meehia maaku, na ũkamwĩra ndũgũcooka kwĩhia?" 
Job34:32 Ũrĩ wamwĩra akũmenyithie mahĩtia maaku, na ongorwo nĩũhĩtĩĩtie, ndũgũcooka gwĩka ũguo?" 
Job34:33 No tondũ nĩũraregana na ũrĩa Ngai eekaga-rĩ, wetereire eeke ũrĩa wee ũkwenda?Wee nĩ we ũgũtuithania no ti niĩ, gĩtwĩre ũrĩa ũreciiria." 
Job34:34 Mũndũ wothe mũtaũku na mũũgĩ angĩnjigwa angĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ," 
Job34:35 ‘Ti itheru Ayubu araaria ũrimũ na ndarĩ ũndũ aroiga.’ 
Job34:36 Naarĩ korwo Ayubu athuuthuurio o nginya mũthia, araaria ta ũmwe wa andũ arĩa aaganu." 
Job34:37 Harĩ meehia maake nĩarongerera ũremi, akeeraha o haaha mbere iitũ ithuothe, na akaaria maũndũ maingĩ mooru igũrũ rĩa Ngai.”" 
Job35:1 Elihu agĩgĩthiĩ o na mbere kwaria akiuga atĩrĩ," 
Job35:2 “Ayubu, ũrĩ na kĩhooto gĩa kuuga atĩ mbere ya Ngai ndũrĩ na mahĩtia?" 
Job35:3 Kana ũkĩũria Ngai meehia maaku mamũhuutagia atĩa? Na nĩ uumithio ũrĩkũ ũgĩĩte naguo waga kwĩhia? 
Job35:4 Nĩ niĩ ngũgũcookeria, na njookerie araata aya aaku." 
Job35:5 Ikia maitho na igũrũ wĩrorere! Taone ũrĩa matu maraihanĩrĩirie nawe! 
Job35:6 Rĩrĩa wehia-rĩ, ũrĩ ũndũ ũhuutagia Ngai naguo? Mahĩtia maaku o na mangĩingĩha-rĩ, ũmũũnũhaga atĩa?" 
Job35:7 Ũgwĩciiria ũthingu waku nĩũteithagia Ngai? Nĩkũrĩ kĩndũ aamũkagĩra? 
Job35:8 Nĩ mũndũ ta we ũũnũhagwo nĩ meehia maaku, na no mũndũ ta we ũgunĩkaga nĩ ũthingu waku." 
Job35:9 “Andũ mahatĩrĩrio mũno nĩmakayaga, makooria ũteithio wa gũthengia acio marĩ na hinya." 
Job35:10 No gũtirĩ ũcookagĩrĩra Ngai ũrĩa wamũũmbire o we ũrĩa ũmũheaga mwĩhoko rĩrĩa maũndũ maritũha. 
Job35:11 Gũtirĩ ũcookagĩrĩra Ngai ũrĩa ũtũheaga ũũgĩ, tũgagĩtuĩka oogĩ kũrũũga nyamũ na nyoni." 
Job35:12 Magĩkayaga, naake Ngai akaaga kũmeetĩka nĩ ũndũ nĩ andũ etĩĩi na ooru." 
Job35:13 Nĩ ma atĩ Ngai ndathikagĩrĩria kĩrĩro gĩtarĩ kĩene; Mwene Hinya Wothe ndarũmbũyanagia nakĩo. 
Job35:14 Ayubu, Ngai angĩgũthikĩrĩria atĩa, rĩrĩa ũroiga ndũramuona, o rĩrĩa ciira waku ũrĩ mbere yake, na no ũmwetereire?" 
Job35:15 Ũreciiria atĩ ndangĩraakara akũherithie, na atĩ ndarũmbũyanagia na waganu waku." 
Job35:16 Nĩkĩo Ayubu warĩĩtie mĩario ya tũhũ na maũndũ maingĩ ma ũrimũ.” 
Job36:1 Elihu agĩthiĩ o na mbere kwaria akiuga atĩrĩ," 
Job36:2 “Tanjĩtĩkĩria haniini, na nĩngũkuonia, tondũ no njarĩrie Ngai." 
Job36:3 Ndĩ na ũũgĩ mũingĩ, na nĩnguonania atĩ ũrĩa wanyũmbire nĩ mũthingu." 
Job36:4 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, mĩario yakwa ti ya maheeni; nĩũkũmenya atĩ ũyũ ũrakwarĩria nĩ mũndũ mũũgĩ mũno." 
Job36:5 “Atĩrĩ, Ngai arĩ hinya, na ndarĩ mũndũ airaga, ningĩ ndarĩ ũndũ atamenyaga." 
Job36:6 Andũ arĩa eehia ndarekaga matũũre muoyo, no andũ arĩa athĩĩni nĩagitagĩra ihooto ciao." 
Job36:7 Ndaagaga kũbaarĩrĩra andũ arĩa athingu; nĩameetĩkagĩria gũthamaka ta aathani na akamatũũgĩria tene na tene. 
Job36:8 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ mangĩnyiitwo moohwo na bĩngũ, makĩnyiitwo nĩ mĩnyamaaro nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa meekĩĩte," 
Job36:9 nĩamoonagia meehia maao na wĩtĩĩi wao. 
Job36:10 Agagĩtũma mathikĩrĩrie ũrutani wake, na akamaatha matigane na ũũru wao." 
Job36:11 Mangĩmũigua na mamũtungatĩre, marĩĩkagia ũtũũro wao marĩ na thaayũ na magaacĩire." 
Job36:12 Mangĩaga kũmũigua, mooragagwo na rũhiũ rwa njora, magagĩkua nĩ ũndũ wa kũriita kwao." 
Job36:13 “Andũ arĩa matatĩĩĩte Ngai mathiaga na mbere kũraakara, na makaaga kũhooya ũteithio rĩrĩa aramaherithia." 
Job36:14 Magagĩkua marĩ o eethĩ, na makarĩĩkia ũtũũro wao na gĩconoko." 
Job36:15 No rĩĩrĩ, Ngai athoomithagia andũ rĩrĩa maranyamaarĩka, na akamahingũra maitho rĩrĩa marahinyĩrĩrio." 
Job36:16 Ngai nĩakũrutire thĩĩnainĩ, agĩkũhe thaayũ, na agĩkũiga meethainĩ ĩiyũire irio." 
Job36:17 No rĩu ũraherithio ũrĩa wagĩrĩirwo nĩkũherithio. 
Job36:18 Kĩĩmenyerere ndũkaaheenererio nĩ mahaki; na ndũkaahĩtithio nĩ ũtonga. 
Job36:19 Ũtonga waku wothe ndũngĩkũguna, na hinya waku wothe rĩu ndũngĩgũteithia." 
Job36:20 Gĩtige kũũria ũtukũ ũrĩũka rĩ andũ makue. 
Job36:21 Kĩĩmenyerere, ndũgaagĩcooke gwĩka ũũru; ũndũ ũcio nĩguo ũratũma rĩu ũnyamaario." 
Job36:22 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, hinya wa Ngai nĩ mũnene mũno, Ngai nĩ mũrutani wa arutani." 
Job36:23 Gũkĩrĩ mũndũ ũrĩ wonia Ngai njĩra, kana akĩmwĩra atĩ nĩahĩtĩĩtie?" 
Job36:24 Kĩĩrute gũtũũgĩria mawĩra ma Ngai; marĩa andũ matũire makumagia. 
Job36:25 Andũ oothe nĩmamoonaga, no mamacũũthagĩrĩria marĩ o haraaya." 
Job36:26 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, tũtingĩhota gũthima ũnene wa Ngai, o na kana gũtara ithabu rĩa mĩaka yake." 
Job36:27 Ngai oonganagia mataata ma maaĩ, agacooka akamatua mbura." 
Job36:28 Oiragia mbura kuuma matuinĩ, agakĩhe andũ mbura na ũingĩ." 
Job36:29 Kũrĩ mũndũ ũũĩ ũrĩa Ngai atambarũkagia matu? Nĩkũrĩ ũũĩ ũrĩa marurumĩ marurumaga kũu igũrũ atũũraga? 
Job36:30 Atũmaga heni ihenũke kũu igũrũ, no iriainĩ kũrĩa kũriku gũgakira o nduma." 
Job36:31 Ũguo nĩguo Ngai ahũũnagia andũ, na akamahe irio na ũingĩ." 
Job36:32 Anyiitaga ngwa na mooko maake, agaciatha igũthe o harĩa acithimithĩĩtie." 
Job36:33 Mũrurumo wacio nĩũmenyithanagia atĩ kĩhuuhũkanio nĩkĩrooka, o namo mahiũ makamenya atĩ no kĩrooka." 
Job37:1 “Ngoro yakwa yamenya ũguo, ĩgakĩhũũra mũno na ĩgateng'era." 
Job37:2 Tegaai matũ mũthikĩrĩrie mũgambo wa Ngai, mũigue marurumĩ marĩa moimaga kanuainĩ gaake." 
Job37:3 Arekaga rũheni rũhenũke igũrũ, ruume gĩturi kĩmwe gĩa thĩ kinya kĩrĩa kĩngĩ." 
Job37:4 Thuutha ũcio mũgambo wake ũkaiguuo; araramaga na mũgambo wake ũrĩa ũrĩ hinya, na ndangĩtigithania kũhenũkia heni hĩndĩ ĩyo areeka ũguo." 
Job37:5 Ngai araramaga na mũgambo wa kũgegania, na ageeka maũndũ manene tũtangĩhota kũmenya." 
Job37:6 Aathaga mbarabu ĩgue thĩ, na akoiria mbura ya kĩboboto." 
Job37:7 Agakĩrũũgamia wĩra wa mũndũ o wothe nĩ geetha andũ oothe mamenye mawĩra maake. 
Job37:8 Nacio nyamũ ĩgagĩcooka imaamoinĩ ciacio, igagĩikara kuo." 
Job37:9 Kĩhuuhũkanio kiumaga kũrĩa gĩikaraga, heho nayo ĩgooka yumĩĩte makũmbĩinĩ maayo." 
Job37:10 Mĩhũũmũ ya Ngai ĩgagĩtũma kũgĩe mbarabu, maaĩ makamata makanyiitana biũ." 
Job37:11 Ningĩ nĩ we ũritũhagia matu na ũigũ, namo matu macio makahuruuta heni ciake." 
Job37:12 Acihurunjaga mĩena yothe ya thĩ nĩguo ikahingie ũrĩa wothe aaciathĩĩte. 
Job37:13 Atũmaga mbura ĩgĩe kuo, nĩguo aherithie andũ, kana agune tĩĩri, o na kana oonanie ũtugi wake." 
Job37:14 “Ayubu, takira haniini, ũthikĩrĩrie, tarania maũndũ ma kũgegania marĩa Ngai eekaga." 
Job37:15 Nĩũũĩ ũrĩa Ngai aathanaga heni ikahenũka ciumĩĩte matuinĩ? 
Job37:16 Nĩũũĩ ũrĩa atũmaga matu macuuhĩrĩre kũu igũrũ? Ũcio nĩ wĩra wa magegania wa Ngai ũrĩa mũũgĩ kũna. 
Job37:17 Wee no gũthĩĩnio ũthĩĩnagio nĩ ũrugarĩ, rĩrĩa bũrũri ũranyamaario nĩ rũhuuho wa kuuma mwena wa na kĩanda." 
Job37:18 No ũhote kũnyiitanĩra na Ngai gũtambũrũkia matu mairũ na ũtũme moome o ta cuuma ngumuthe? 
Job37:19 Gĩtuonie ũrĩa tũkwĩra Ngai; nĩtũturuurĩĩte; tũtirĩ na ũndũ wa kuuga. 
Job37:20 Niĩ ndikũũria njarie na Ngai, mũndũ angĩaranĩria naake, no kũmerio angĩmerio." 
Job37:21 Rĩu tũtingĩhota kwĩrorera riũa, nĩ ũrĩa rĩkengeete; rũhuuho nĩrũhaatĩĩte matu moothe." 
Job37:22 Mĩrũri ta ya thahabu nĩrooka yumĩĩte mwena wa na rũgongo Ngai arooka arigiicĩirio nĩ riiri wa kũmakania. 
Job37:23 Tũtingĩhota gũkuhĩhĩria riiri wa Mwene Hinya Wothe; Atwĩkaga maũndũ ma ũthingu na ma kĩhooto. 
Job37:24 Nĩkĩo andũ oothe mamũheaga gĩtĩĩo. We ndarũmbũyanagia na mũndũ ũrĩa wĩtuaga mũũgĩ.” 
Job38:1 Thuutha ũcio MWATHANI arĩ thĩinĩ wa kĩhuuhũkanio agĩcookeria Ayubu atĩrĩ," 
Job38:2 “Ũrĩ ũ nĩguo ũrarie kĩrĩra gĩakwa na ciugo cia ũrimũ? 
Job38:3 Akorwo ũrĩ njamba, ngũkũũria ciũria, nawe no mũhaka ũnjookerie!" 
Job38:4 “Warĩ ha rĩrĩa ndaambaga mũthingi wa thĩ? Njookeria akorwo nĩũũĩ. 
Job38:5 Akorwo nĩũũĩ-rĩ, nũũ watuire ũrĩa thĩ ĩgũkorwo ĩigana?Nũũ wamĩthimire?" 
Job38:6 Itugĩ iria inyiitĩrĩire thĩ-rĩ, ciikarĩire kĩ? Nũũ waigĩrĩire ihiga rĩa mũthingi wa thĩ?" 
Job38:7 Mũthenya ũcio ũgĩkia, njata ikĩina irĩ hamwe, nacio ciũmbe cia igũrũ ikĩrũũhia cianĩrĩire nĩgũkena." 
Job38:8 “Nũũ wekĩrĩire iria mĩrango ya kũrĩhingĩrĩria, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa rĩatathũkire kuuma nda ya thĩ?" 
Job38:9 Nĩ niĩ ndarĩhumbĩire na matu na ngĩrĩrigiicĩria na kĩbii gĩtumanu. 
Job38:10 Nĩ niĩ ndarĩĩkĩrĩire mĩhaka, na ngĩrĩtumĩra mĩrango ya kũrĩhingĩrĩria." 
Job38:11 No niĩ ndaarĩrire atĩ ‘Ũrĩkinyaga haaha na ndũrĩkĩraga; ndiihũ ciaku cia hinya irĩrũũgamagĩra haaha.’ 
Job38:12 “Ayubu, ũtũũroinĩ waku wothe-rĩ, ũrĩ watha mũthenya ũkĩe, kana ũkĩonia ruoro rũgĩtema harĩa rũkuumĩrĩra?" 
Job38:13 Ũrĩ warwatha rũnyiite icũrĩ cia thĩ, rumbuthũre andũ arĩa aaganu kũrĩa mehithĩĩte?" 
Job38:14 Ruoro rũgĩtema rũtũmaga irĩma na mĩkuru cionekane wega, igakĩonekana wega o ta mĩkũnjo ya nguo na o ta mũhũũri ũhũũrĩĩtwo rĩũmba igũrũ." 
Job38:15 Andũ arĩa aaganu magakĩimwo ũtheri mooko marĩa maambararĩĩtie magakiunangwo. 
Job38:16 “Atĩrĩrĩ, ũrĩ wathiĩ kũrĩa maaĩ ma iria mathothokagĩra, kana ũkĩũrũũra iriainĩ kũrĩa kũriku?" 
Job38:17 Ũrĩ wonio ihingo cia gĩkuũ kana ihingo cia kwa arĩa akuũ? 
Job38:18 Ũrĩ wemenyera wariĩ wa thĩ? Njookeria akorwo nĩũũĩ maũndũ macio moothe! 
Job38:19 “Nĩũũĩ njĩra ya gũthiĩ kũrĩa ũtheri ũikaraga? Nduma-rĩ, ĩtũũraga kũ?" 
Job38:20 No ũcionie bũrũri wacio na ũciathĩrĩre njĩra cia kũinũka kuo? 
Job38:21 Tondũ warĩ mũciare, na nĩũikangĩĩtie matukũ-rĩ, githĩ to ũkĩhote?" 
Job38:22 “Ũrĩ watoonya kũrĩa mbarabu ciigagwo kana ũkĩona kũrĩa mbembe cia mbura icookanagĩrĩrio? 
Job38:23 Ndĩciigaga kuo cietagĩrĩre hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna. Ndĩcietagĩrĩria mũthenya wa haaro na wa mbaara. 
Job38:24 Njĩra ya kũrĩa ũtheri ũgayagĩrwo, na ya kũrĩa rũhuuho rwa mwena wa irathĩro rũhurunjagĩrwo thĩ yothe-rĩ, ĩrĩ ha." 
Job38:25 “Nũũ watemeire mbura ya kĩboboto mũkaro wa gũthiĩra kana agĩtemera mbura ya mbembe njĩra? 
Job38:26 Nũũ ũtũmaga kũrĩa gũtatũũragwo nĩ andũ, o na kana werũinĩ kũrĩa gũtarĩ andũ kuure?" 
Job38:27 Nũũ ũtũmaga kwoira, kũndũ kũrĩa kũũmũ na kũnyootu gũkunũke na gũkũre nyeki?" 
Job38:28 “Ime na mbura-rĩ, nĩ irĩ ithe?" 
Job38:29 Mbaa na mbarabu-rĩ, nũũ waciciarire," 
Job38:30 nĩ geetha imatage igatuĩka ihiga, na ihithage ũthiũ wa kũrĩa kũriku?" 
Job38:31 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, no ũhote kũnyiitithania njata iria ciĩtagwo Kĩrĩmĩra? No ũhote gũtigithũkania njata iria ciĩtagwo Karaũ?" 
Job38:32 No ũhote kũreehithia itutu cia njata kĩmera gĩacio gĩakinya?No ũhote kuonereria Nduba na ciana ciayo njĩra. 
Job38:33 Nĩũũĩ mawatho marĩa marũmagĩrĩrwo kũũrĩa igũrũ matuinĩ? Mawatho macio-rĩ, no ũhote gwathana marũmagĩrĩrwo gũũkũ thĩ?" 
Job38:34 “No ũhote kũgũũthũkĩra matu ũmaathe makũũrĩrie mbura ũconjore? 
Job38:35 No ũhote gũtũma heni ihenũke na igwathĩkĩre? 
Job38:36 Nũũ wamenyithirie matu rĩrĩa mariuraga, na thaatũ rĩrĩa ũrĩũkaga?" 
Job38:37 Nũũ ũrĩ na mũũgĩ wa kũhota gũtara matu? Nũũ ũngĩhota kũmainamia nĩ geetha moire," 
Job38:38 kinyagia rũkũngũ rũthire na mĩatũka ĩnyiitane? 
Job38:39 “Nĩ we ũcaragĩria mĩrũũthi irio na ũkahũũnia ciana ciayo," 
Job38:40 rĩrĩa ĩhithĩĩte ngurungainĩ ya mahiga, kana rĩrĩa ĩkomeete imaamoinĩ ciayo yoheirie?" 
Job38:41 Nũũ ũheaga mahuru irio rĩrĩa mekũũrũũra mahũũtiĩ, na rĩrĩa tũcui twamo tũrandĩrĩra nĩkũhũũta?" 
Job39:1 Nĩũũĩ rĩrĩa mbũri cia irĩmainĩ iciaraga? Ũrĩ werorera thwariga igĩciara? 
Job39:2 Nĩũũĩ ciikaraga itĩĩna rĩigana atĩa igĩgaciara? Nĩũmenyaga mũthenya ũrĩa igũciara? 
Job39:3 Nĩũũĩ rĩrĩa ikomaga thĩ igĩciara? 
Job39:4 Tũũri twacio tũkũraga tũkagĩĩra hinya o kũu werũinĩ; tũgacooka tũgatigana na maanyina na tũtimacookagĩrĩra. 
Job39:5 “Nũũ wetĩkĩririe ndigiri cia gĩthaka kũrimũũthaga? Nũũ waciohorire agĩcirekereria irimũũthage? 
Job39:6 Nĩ niĩ ndaciheire werũ ciikarage kuo, na ngĩcihe kũndũ kwaraganu kũrĩ cumbĩ itũũrage kuo." 
Job39:7 Itikuhanagĩrĩria na inegene rĩa itũũra, kana ikahoorerio nĩ mũndũ acirutithie wĩra." 
Job39:8 Irimũthaga irĩmainĩ igĩcaria gwa kũrĩa, igĩcaria kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩruru." 
Job39:9 “Mbogo-rĩ, no ĩĩtĩkĩre ũmĩrutithie wĩra? No ĩĩtĩkĩre kũraara kiugũinĩ gĩaku?" 
Job39:10 No ũhote kũmĩĩkĩra icooki ĩrĩme na mũraaũ? kana ũtũme ĩkururie mũraaũ ĩthondeke mĩtaro? 
Job39:11 Tondũ ĩrĩ hinya mũingĩ mũno-rĩ, no ũmĩĩhoke na ũmĩtige ĩkũrutĩre wĩra mũritũ?" 
Job39:12 No ũmĩĩhoke ĩgũkuĩra magetha ĩkũinũkĩrie, o na kana ĩkũhakũrĩre ngano harĩa ĩrahuuhĩrwo?" 
Job39:13 “Mathagu ma nyaga mabatabataga na ihenya mũno, no ndĩngĩhota kũũmbũka ta mũũhau." 
Job39:14 Nyaga ĩtigaga matumbĩ maayo tĩĩri igũrũ, magwatio ũrugarĩ nĩ mũthanga." 
Job39:15 Ndĩmakaga kana nĩmekũrangwo, o na kana nĩmekũũragwo nĩ nyamũ cia gĩthaka." 
Job39:16 Ĩhũũraga tũcui twayo ta tũtarĩ twayo; o na tũngĩkua tuothe ndĩmakaga. 
Job39:17 Ĩĩkaga ũguo tondũ Ngai nĩamĩimire ũũgĩ, na ndaigana kumĩhe ũmenyo." 
Job39:18 No rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa yatambarũkia mathagu ihanyũke, no gũthekerera ĩthekagĩrĩra mbarathi ĩrĩ na mũndũ ũmĩhaicĩĩte tondũ ndĩngĩmĩkĩria ihenya." 
Job39:19 “Nĩ we ũheaga mbarathi hinya, kana ũkamĩhumba ngingo na mũreera mũraihu?" 
Job39:20 Nĩ we ũmĩhotithagia kũrũũgarũũga ta ngigĩ, na kũmakia andũ na mũtiihĩre wayo?" 
Job39:21 Ĩteng'eraga ĩkubĩĩtie ituambainĩ, ĩgatoonya mbaarainĩ na hinya wayo wothe." 
Job39:22 Ndĩmakaga o na kana igetigĩra kĩndũ; rũhiũ rwa njora rũtimĩmakagia. 
Job39:23 Matharaita ma mũndũ ũrĩa ũmĩhaicĩĩte makomoranagia makĩhenagia igũrũ rĩayo. 
Job39:24 Yambambaga ĩkĩringaringaga thĩ, na karumbeeta kahuuhwo ndĩngĩhota gũcooka gũkindĩria." 
Job39:25 Karumbeeta kaahuuhwo nĩgũtiiha ĩtiihaga; ĩnungagĩra mbaara ĩrĩ o kũraihu, na ĩkaigua mũgũũthũko wa atongoria a ita magĩathana." 
Job39:26 “Nĩ we wonagia rwĩgĩ kũũmbũka rĩrĩa rwatambarũkia mathagu rwerekeire mwena wa na kĩanda? 
Job39:27 Rwĩgĩ nĩrwetagĩrĩra ũrũathe rũgaake gĩtara kĩarwo irĩma igũrũ? 
Job39:28 Nderi ĩthondekaga gĩikaro kĩayo mahiga igũrũ marĩa maraaya, na igatua mĩthia ĩrĩa mĩũgĩ yamo kĩndũ gĩa kwĩgitĩra." 
Job39:29 Ĩtuĩragia kĩndũ gĩa kũnyiita ĩrĩ kũu mahigainĩ igũrũ; maitho maayo moonaga kũraihu mũno. 
Job39:30 Ĩreraga tũcui twayo na thakame, na harĩa hoothe harĩ kĩimba nĩ ho ĩgũaga.”" 
Job40:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Ayubu atĩrĩ," 
Job40:2 “We ũteendaga kũhootwo-rĩ, no ũgũthiĩ na mbere kũng'eeng'ana na Mwene Hinya Wothe? Wee ũrakararania na Ngai, kĩmũcookerie!”" 
Job40:3 Naake Ayubu agĩcookeria MWATHANI atĩrĩ," 
Job40:4 “ Niĩ ndĩ kĩndũ hatarĩ! Nĩ atĩa ĩngĩgũcookeria? Niĩ ndirĩ na ũndũ ũngĩ wa kuuga. 
Job40:5 Nĩnjarĩĩtie maita maingĩ, na ndirĩ ũndũ o na ũmwe ingĩongerera.”" 
Job40:6 Naake MWATHANI arĩ kĩhuuhũkanioinĩ akĩarĩria Ayubu o rĩngĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ," 
Job40:7 “Akorwo ũrĩ njamba-rĩ, ngũkũũria ciũria, nawe no mũhaka ũnjookerie." 
Job40:8 Ũrenda kuonania ndirũmagĩrĩra waragania? Ũrenda kũnduta mahĩtia nĩguo wĩtue mwega? 
Job40:9 Ũrĩ na hinya ta niĩ? Mũgambo waku no ũrurume ta wakwa? 
Job40:10 “Takĩĩhotore ũhoti na gĩtĩĩo, na wĩhumbe riiri na ũkaru!" 
Job40:11 Itũrũra marũrũ maaku; baara mũndũ o wothe mwĩtĩi ũmũng'aũranie. 
Job40:12 Erekera mũndũ o wothe mwĩtĩi ũmũconorithie; anangĩra andũ arĩa aaganu o harĩa marũngiĩ. 
Job40:13 Mathike oothe rũkũngũinĩ, na ũmahingĩre ndumainĩ kwa arĩa akuũ." 
Job40:14 Ũngĩĩka ũguo, no ngũgaathĩrĩrie, na njĩtĩkie atĩ no ũhote kwĩhootanĩra na hinya waku." 
Job40:15 “Tawĩciirie ũhoro wa nyamũ ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo Behemothu. Ngĩmĩũmba norĩo ndaakũũmbire; ĩrĩaga nyeki ta ng'ombe. 
Job40:16 Tawĩciirie ũrĩa mwĩrĩ wayo ũrĩ hinya; mĩkiha ya yo ĩrĩ hinya mũno. 
Job40:17 Ĩrũũgamagia mũting'oe wayo ũkeehanda o ta mũtarakwa; mĩkiha ya magũrũ maayo ĩrĩ hinya. 
Job40:18 Mahĩndĩ maayo marĩ hinya o ta gĩcango; magũrũ maayo nĩ moomũ o ta cuuma. 
Job40:19 “Behemothu nĩkĩo kĩũmbe gĩa kũgegania mũno thĩinĩ wa ciũmbe ciakwa ciothe! No niĩ, Mũũmbi wakĩo, ingĩhota gũkĩhooreria." 
Job40:20 Nyeki ĩrĩa ĩrĩaga ĩkũraga irĩmainĩ kũrĩa nyamũ ciothe cia gĩthaka ithaakagĩra. 
Job40:21 Yarahaga rungu rwa ihinga cia mĩigua, na ĩkeehitha mathanjĩinĩ kũrĩa kũrĩ matomboya." 
Job40:22 Ihinga cia mĩigua na mĩtĩinĩ ĩrĩa ĩmeraga ndeereinĩ cia rũũĩ, nĩcio imĩheaga kĩĩgunyĩ." 
Job40:23 O na rũũĩ rũngĩtherera na hinya nĩ ũrĩa rũiyũrĩĩte, yo ndĩhahũkaga; o na rũũĩ rwa Jorodani rũngĩhũyũkĩra kanuainĩ kaayo, ndĩngĩmaka." 
Job40:24 Nũũ ũngĩhota kũmĩnyiita na mũtego, kana atũrĩkie iniũrũ rĩayo na ndwano?" 
Job41:1 “No ũhote kũnyiita ndamaathia ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo Leviathani na ndwano? No ũhote kũmĩoha kanua na mũkanda? 
Job41:2 No ũhote kũmĩĩkĩra mũkanda iniũrũ, kana ũtũrĩkie rũthĩa rwayo na ndwano?" 
Job41:3 No ĩgũthaithe ũmĩrekererie ĩĩthiĩre, kana ĩkũũrie ũmĩiguĩre tha?" 
Job41:4 No ĩthondeke kĩrĩĩkanĩro nawe ĩtũũre ĩgũtungatagĩra tene na tene? 
Job41:5 No ũmĩohe ta nyoni ũthaakage nayo, kana ũmĩĩkĩre rũrigi ndungata ciaku cia airĩĩtu mathaakage nayo?" 
Job41:6 Ategi a thamaki no mahĩtahĩtane makĩmĩgũra, kana ahũũri mbiacara mang'eng'ane makĩmĩgayana?" 
Job41:7 No ũmĩtheecange ngoothi ya yo na mĩguĩ, kana ũmĩtiihangie mũtwe na matimũ?" 
Job41:8 Ũromĩhuutia na guoko; ũngĩhũũrwo mbaara ũtakaariganĩrwo, na ndũngĩkaageria kũmĩhuutia rĩngĩ!" 
Job41:9 “Kuona ndamaathia ĩyo ĩĩtagwo Leviathani kuo gwiki gũtũmaga mũndũ oorwo nĩ hinya na aringĩke. 
Job41:10 Angĩkorwo gũtirĩ mũndũ ũrĩ ũcamba wa kũmĩarahũra-rĩ, nũũ ũngĩkĩrũũgamana na niĩ?"
