Job41:11 Nũũ ndĩ thiirĩ naake nĩguo ndĩmũrĩhe? Kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩrĩ gũũkũ thĩ nĩ gĩakwa! 
Job41:12 “Nĩngũthiĩ na mbere gũkwĩra ũhoro wa magũrũ ma ndamaathia ĩyo, o na gũtaarĩria ũrĩa ĩrĩ ũcamba na hinya." 
Job41:13 Nũũ ũngĩhota kũũnũra rũũa rwayo? Nũũ ũngĩhota gũtũrĩkania rũũa rũu rwayo rũũmũ ta gĩcango? 
Job41:14 Nũũ ũngĩũmĩrĩria kũmĩathamia kanua? Kanua kaayo kaiyũire magego ma kũmakania! 
Job41:15 Mũgongo wayo ũthondekeetwo na ngũũcĩ ihaana ngo inyiitithanĩĩtio ikarũma, nyũmũ o ta ihiga." 
Job41:16 Ngũũcĩ ĩmwe inyiitaine na iria ingĩ ũguo atĩ, o na rĩera rĩtingĩtoonyera hau inyiitithanĩirio." 
Job41:17 Ningĩ itumanĩĩtio ikanyiitana ũguo atĩ, itingĩtigithũkanio na ĩrĩa ĩngĩ." 
Job41:18 Yathimũraga hakoima ũtheri; maitho maayo makengaga ta ũtheri wa riũa rĩkĩratha. 
Job41:19 Kanua kaayo koimaga mwaki ũrarĩrĩmbũka, na gakarathũka thandĩ." 
Job41:20 Maniũrũ maayo marutaga ndoogo ta nyũngũ ĩgĩtherũka kana ta mathanjĩ marahĩa. 
Job41:21 Mĩhũũmũ ya yo ĩgwatagia makara magaakana, na rũrĩrĩmbĩ rũkoima kanuainĩ kaayo." 
Job41:22 Ngingo ya yo ĩrĩ hinya ũguo atĩ, wa gũcemania nayo no kũinaina ainainaga nĩ guoya." 
Job41:23 Ngũũcĩ cia mwĩrĩ wayo ikomanĩire ũguo atĩ, itingĩũnũrĩka o na atĩa." 
Job41:24 Nĩ nyũmũ ngoro o ta ihiga; nĩ nyũmũ o ta ihiga rĩa gĩthĩi. 
Job41:25 Rĩrĩa yetiira, andũ arĩa marĩ hinya no kũmaka mamakaga; mahũũrĩkaga magathira hinya nĩ guoya." 
Job41:26 Rũhiũ rwa njora rũtingĩmĩtiihia; o na ndĩngĩtiihio nĩ itimũ, mũguĩ, kana itimũ rĩa mwenjerere." 
Job41:27 Yunangaga cuuma ta arĩ rũũa rwa ngano, na gĩcango ta arĩ mũtĩ mũbuthu." 
Job41:28 Mĩguĩ ndĩngĩtũma yũre; kũmĩhũũra na mahiga no ta kũmĩhũũra na nyeki. 
Job41:29 Njũgũma no ta mahuti harĩ yo; nĩgũthekerera ĩthekagĩrĩra andũ makĩmĩikĩria matimũ. 
Job41:30 Ngũũcĩ cia nda ya yo ihaana ngĩo; itigaga mũgirito wayo ndakainĩ o ta icembe rĩgĩcimba. 
Job41:31 Itũmaga iria rĩhũyũke o ta maaĩ magĩtherũka, na ĩgatũma rĩrute mũhũũyũ o ta maguta maratherũka." 
Job41:32 Ĩthiaga ĩtigĩĩte mũkirito ũgũkenga thuutha wayo; mũndũ no gwĩciiria atĩ iria nĩriumĩĩtie mbuĩ. 
Job41:33 Gũtirĩ kĩũmbe kĩngĩ kĩhaanaine nayo thĩ yothe; nĩ kĩũmbe gĩtarĩ guoya o na haniini. 
Job41:34 Nĩnyararaga o na nyamũ iria njĩtĩĩi mũno; nĩ mũthamaki wa nyamũ ciothe cia gĩthaka.” 
Job42:1 Ayubu agĩcookeria MWATHANI atĩrĩ," 
Job42:2 “Niĩ nĩnjũũĩ atĩ no ũhote gwĩka maũndũ moothe; mũbango waku ndũngĩgirĩrĩrio nĩ mũndũ. 
Job42:3 Ũrooria atĩ ndĩroomĩrĩria atĩa gũkararia mataaro maaku, o rĩrĩa itarĩ na ũmenyo.Nĩnjarĩĩtie maũndũ itooĩ; maũndũ marikĩru mũno itangĩmamenya." 
Job42:4 Ũnjĩĩrire thikĩrĩrie ndeke warie, na ngũcookerie ciũria ciaku." 
Job42:5 Mbere ĩyo no kũigua ndĩraiguaga ũhoro waku, no rĩu nĩndakwĩyonera na maitho maakwa mwene." 
Job42:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩndemena niĩ mwene, na nĩndahera ndĩitĩrĩirie rũkũngũ na mũhu.”" 
Job42:7 MWATHANI arĩĩkia kwarĩria Ayubu, agĩcooka akĩĩra Elifazi ũrĩa wa kuuma Temani atĩrĩ, “Nĩndaakarĩĩtio nĩ we na araata acio aaku eerĩ nĩ ũndũ mũtiarĩĩtie ũhoro wa ma igũrũ rĩakwa, ta ũrĩa Ayubu ndungata yakwa eekĩĩte." 
Job42:8 Kwoguo oyai ndeegwa mũgwanja na ndũrũme mũgwanja mũthiĩ kwa Ayubu ndungata yakwa mũkarute igongoona rĩa njino nĩ ũndũ wanyu kĩũmbe. Ayubu nĩekũmũhoera, na nĩngũigua mahooya maake njage kũmũconora ta ũrĩa mwagĩrĩirwo. Mũtiarĩĩtie ũhoro wa ma igũrũ rĩakwa ta ũrĩa we eekĩĩte.”" 
Job42:9 Kwoguo Elifazi, Bilidadi, na Zofaru magĩgĩĩka ũrĩa MWATHANI aameerĩĩte, naake MWATHANI akĩigua mahooya ma Ayubu." 
Job42:10 Ayubu arĩĩkia kũhooya nĩ ũndũ wa araata acio aake, MWATHANI akĩmũcookeria ũtonga wake, na akĩwongerera maita meerĩ ma ũrĩa aarĩ naguo mbere ĩyo." 
Job42:11 Thuutha ũcio, aariũ na aarĩ a nyina, na arĩa maarĩ araata aake mbere ĩyo magĩũka kũmũceerera na makĩrĩanĩra naake o kũu mũciĩ gwake. Nao makĩmũhooreria na makĩmũũmĩrĩria nĩ ũndũ wa mathĩĩna moothe marĩa MWATHANI aamũreehithĩirie. O mũndũ akĩmũhe mbeeca na gĩcũhĩ gĩa thahabu." 
Job42:12 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩraathima ũtũũro wa kũrĩĩkĩrĩria wa Ayubu gũkĩra ũrĩa amũraathimĩĩte rĩa mbere. Ayubu nĩagĩire na ng'ondu ngiri ikũmi na inya (14,000), ngamĩĩra ngiri ithathatũ (6,000), ng'ombe ngiri igĩrĩ (2,000), na ndigiri ngiri ĩmwe (1,000)." 
Job42:13 Ningĩ nĩagĩire na aanake mũgwanja na airĩĩtu atatũ. 
Job42:14 Mũirĩĩtu wa mbere aamwĩtire Jemima, wa keerĩ Kezia, na wa gatatũ Kereni Hapuku." 
Job42:15 Bũrũriinĩ ũcio wothe gũtiarĩ andũ a nja angĩ athaka ta airĩĩtu acio a Ayubu. Ayubu nĩagaĩire airĩĩtu acio aake indo o ta ũrĩa agaĩire aariũ aake. 
Job42:16 Thuutha wa ũguo Ayubu aatũũrire mĩaka ĩngĩ igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩna. Nĩonire ciana ciake na ciana cia ciana ciake, nginya rũciaro rwa kana." 
Job42:17 Aakuire arĩ mũthuuri mũkũrũ mũno. 
Psalms1:1 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarũmagĩrĩra mataaro ma andũ arĩa ooru, na ũtageragĩra njĩra cia eehia, kana akagwatanĩra na andũ arĩa matatĩĩĩte Ngai." 
Psalms1:2 We-rĩ, gĩkeno gĩake nĩgwathĩkĩra watho wa MWATHANI, na nĩawĩciiragia mũthenya o na ũtukũ." 
Psalms1:3 Ahaana ta mũtĩ ũrĩa ũhandĩĩtwo ndeereinĩ cia rũũĩ, ũrĩa ũciaraga maciaro maaguo mahinda maaguo makinya, namo mathangũ maaguo matihoohaga.Nĩagaacagĩra ũndũinĩ o wothe ũrĩa eekaga." 
Psalms1:4 No arĩa ooru matihaana ta ũguo o na haniini; mahaana ta mahuti marĩa moombũragwo nĩ rũhuuho. 
Psalms1:5 Tondũ ũcio, andũ arĩa ooru, nĩmagaatuĩrwo nĩ Ngai, na nĩmakaamũranio na andũ arĩa marĩ a Ngai kĩũmbe." 
Psalms1:6 Nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI nĩ we ũtongoragia arĩa athingu o na akamamenyagĩrĩra, no arĩa ooru marĩ njĩrainĩ ya kũũra." 
Psalms2:1 Bata wa mabũrũri kũũngana hithoinĩ, na ndũũrĩrĩ gũthugunda mĩbango ya tũhũ nĩ ũrĩkũ?" 
Psalms2:2 Athamaki aao-rĩ, nĩmaremeete, nao aathani aao nĩmacookanĩĩtie ndundu maremere MWATHANI o na mũthamaki ũrĩa aitĩrĩirie maguta akamũthuura.Marerana atĩrĩ," 
Psalms2:3 “Nĩtwĩyohoreei kuuma wathaniinĩ wao, namo matamu maao tũmateanie matweherere.”" 
Psalms2:4 MWATHANI arĩ o igũrũ, gĩtĩinĩ gĩake kĩa ũnene, no gũtheka aratheka, na akanyũrũria mĩbango ĩyo yao mĩhinyaru." 
Psalms2:5 Agacooka akamakaania araakarĩĩte, o na akameekĩra guoya na ang'ũrĩkĩĩte akameera atĩrĩ," 
Psalms2:6 “Nĩhandĩĩte mũthamaki wakwa igũrũ wa kĩrĩma gĩakwa gĩtheru gĩa Zayuni.” 
Psalms2:7 Naake mũthamaki akoiga atĩrĩ, “Nĩngwanĩrĩra itua rĩa MWATHANI.MWATHANI aanjĩĩrire atĩrĩ, ‘Wee nĩ we mũũriũ wakwa, ũũmũũthĩ nĩndatuĩka thooguo." 
Psalms2:8 Hooya, na nĩngũkũhe mabũrũri moothe matuĩke ũgai waku; thĩ yothe ĩtuĩke yaku kĩũmbe." 
Psalms2:9 Wee nĩũkaamoinanga na njũgũma ya cuuma; o na ũmamemende makuange ta nyũngũ.’ ” 
Psalms2:10 Tondũ ũcio kĩũhĩgeei, inyuĩ athamaki aya; inyuĩ aathani a thĩ iguai ndũmĩrĩri ĩno." 
Psalms2:11 Tungatĩraai MWATHANI mũkĩmũtĩĩaga; 
Psalms2:12 mũinamĩrĩreei mũkĩinainaga; kana ahiũkĩrwo nĩ maraakara, na inyuĩ mũgĩkue o narua.Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ arĩa oothe mamenyagĩrĩrwo nĩwe." 
Psalms3:1 MWATHANI, kaĩ thũ ciakwa nĩ nyingĩ-ĩ! Andũ arĩa maranjũkĩrĩra nĩ aingĩ mũno!" 
Psalms3:2 Aingĩ nĩ arĩa maraaria ũhoro wakwa makoiga atĩrĩ, “Ndarĩ ũteithio angĩona harĩ Ngai.”" 
Psalms3:3 No rĩĩrĩ, wee MWATHANI nĩwe ngo yakwa ya kũngitĩra mĩena yothe; nowe ũheaga ũhootani, na ũkanjookia hinya." 
Psalms3:4 Ngayagĩra MWATHANI andeithie, naake akanjĩtĩka e kĩrĩmainĩ gĩake gĩtheru." 
Psalms3:5 Niĩ-rĩ, ngomaga na ngoona toro, na rũũciinĩ ngarooka gũũkĩra, nĩ ũndũ nĩ MWATHANI ũmenyagĩrĩra ũtukũ wothe." 
Psalms3:6 Ndingĩmakio o na nĩ thũ ngiri nyingĩ iria ithiũrũrũkĩirie na mĩena yothe. 
Psalms3:7 Arahũka, MWATHANI! Ngai wakwa honokia! Nĩ gũkorwo nĩwe ũhũũraga thũ ciakwa ciothe ũgaciagithia hinya wa kũngera ngero." 
Psalms3:8 MWATHANI nĩ we ũhonokanagia; aroraathima andũ aake! 
Psalms4:1 Njĩtĩkaga ndagũkaĩra, wee Ngai, mũngitĩri! Wee nĩwe wandeithũrire rĩrĩa ndarĩ mũhinyĩrĩrie. Nginyĩria wega waku, narĩo ihooya rĩakwa ũkĩrĩigue." 
Psalms4:2 Inyuĩ andũ aya, nĩ nginya rĩ mũgũtũũra mũũnyararĩĩte? Nĩ nginya rĩ mũgũtũũra mwendeete maũndũ ma tũhũ na mũrũmbũyanagia na maheeni?" 
Psalms4:3 Menyaai atĩ MWATHANI nĩeyamũrĩire ndungata yake ĩrĩa ĩmwĩhokeete, na rĩrĩa ndamũkaĩra nĩanjiguaga." 
Psalms4:4 Inainaai mwĩ na guoya, na mũtige kwĩhia; rĩrĩa mũhuurũkĩĩte itandainĩ cianyu-rĩ, o mũndũ nĩaikarage agĩĩcookagĩra." 
Psalms4:5 Rutĩraai MWATHANI magongoona marĩa maagĩrĩire, na mũikarage mũmwĩhokeete." 
Psalms4:6 Kũrĩ aingĩ maroiga atĩrĩ, “Naarĩ korwo tuona maũndũ meega!MWATHANI, tũtiirĩre gĩthiithi gĩaku ũtũkinyĩrie wega waku!”" 
Psalms4:7 No wee gĩkeno kĩrĩa ũnjĩkĩrĩĩte ngoroinĩ, nĩgĩkĩrĩĩte kĩrĩa gĩothe mangĩgĩa nakĩo rĩrĩa me na bũũthi wa ngano na ndibei." 
Psalms4:8 Rĩu-rĩ, ngũthiĩ toro ndĩĩkomere ndĩ o na thaayũ, nĩ ũndũ wee, MWATHANI, nĩ we ũikaraga ũmenyereire wega." 
Psalms5:1 MWATHANI, tega matũ ũigue ciugo ciakwa, na ũigue ngĩcaaya." 
Psalms5:2 Thikĩrĩria, wee Ngai wakwa, na Mũthamaki wakwa, ũndeithie, nĩ gũkorwo nĩ we ndĩrahooya." 
Psalms5:3 MWATHANI, nĩũiguaga mũgambo wakwa o rũũciinĩ; kĩrooko tene nĩrĩo ngũhooyaga, na ngeeterera macookio maaku." 
Psalms5:4 Wee-rĩ, ndũrĩ Ngai wa gũkenera ũmaramari; ndũnyiitaga ũgeni mũndũ mũũru." 
Psalms5:5 Ndũngĩĩtĩkĩria andũ arĩa etĩĩi marũũgame mbere yaku; nĩũthũire andũ oothe arĩa imaramari. 
Psalms5:6 Arĩa oothe maaragia maheeni-rĩ, nĩũmaniinaga nao arĩa mahũthagĩra hinya na maheenanagia nĩũmanyaraire." 
Psalms5:7 No nĩ ũndũ wa wendo waku mũingĩ, nĩngũtoonya nyũmba yaku, ngũthaathaiye ndĩ Hekaarũinĩ yaku theru na ngũinamĩrĩre ndĩnyiihĩĩtie." 
Psalms5:8 Ndongoria MWATHANI na ũthingu waku, nĩ ũndũ thũ ciakwa nĩ nyingĩ mũno; he njĩra nũngĩrĩru ya kũgerera." 
Psalms5:9 Nĩ ũndũ tũnua twao tũtiaragia ũhoro wa ma; ngoro ciao ciendaga o kwananga.Mĩmero yao ĩhaana o ta mbĩĩrĩra humbũrie; nĩmĩ ciao ciaragia o ndeto cia ũrambu. 
Psalms5:10 Ngai, tũma macookererwo nĩ ũũru wao; reke magũithio nĩ mĩbango ĩyo yao ya ungumania.Maikanie na nja tondũ meehia maao nĩ maingĩ mũno, nĩ ũndũ nĩmakũremeire." 
Psalms5:11 No rĩĩrĩ, reke arĩa oothe mooragĩra harĩ we macanjamũke reke matũũre mainaga nĩgũkena.Arĩa meendeete rĩĩtwa rĩaku mamenyagĩrĩre, nĩguo maikarage makeneete nĩ ũndũ waku." 
Psalms5:12 Nĩ ũndũ wee, MWATHANI nĩũraathimaga andũ arĩa athingu, o na ũkamamenyagĩrĩra na wendo waku o ta arĩ ngo." 
Psalms6:1 MWATHANI, ndũkandũithie ũrĩ na maraakara, o na ndũkaherithie ũrĩ mũraakaru." 
Psalms6:2 Nginyĩria wega waku, MWATHANI, nĩ ũndũ no kũũrwo ndĩroorwo nĩ hinya;MWATHANI, honia, nĩ amu mwĩrĩ wakwa ũiyũirwo nĩ ruwo." 
Psalms6:3 Ngoro yakwa o nayo nĩnyamaarĩkĩĩte mũno. Ĩ, MWATHANI, nĩ rĩ ũkandeithia?" 
Psalms6:4 MWATHANI, hũgũka ũhonokie; honokia, nĩ ũndũ wa ũtugi waku." 
Psalms6:5 Nĩ gũkorwo ndũririkanagwo kwa arĩa akuũ; nũũ ũngĩgũkumia e kũu kwa arĩa akuũ? 
Psalms6:6 Gũcaaya gwakwa nĩgũtũmĩĩte njũrwo nĩ hinya; ũtukũ o ũtukũ nĩgũconjoria njonjoragia kamuuto gaakwa na maithori, o na ngacagacia ũrĩrĩ wakwa namo." 
Psalms6:7 Maitho maakwa matirona wega nĩ kĩeha; nĩmoorĩĩtwo nĩ hinya nĩ ũrĩa thũ ciakwa itũmĩĩte ndĩre. 
Psalms6:8 Inyuĩ eeki naaĩ, njehereraai nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI nĩaiguĩte kĩrĩro gĩakwa!" 
Psalms6:9 MWATHANI nĩaiguĩte gũthaithana gwakwa; ihooya rĩakwa nĩarĩtĩkĩrĩĩte. 
Psalms6:10 Thũ ciakwa ciothe nĩirĩconoka, o na inyiitwo nĩ guoya makĩria; irĩhũndũrwo o rĩmwe ituruurĩĩte." 
Psalms7:1 MWATHANI Ngai wakwa, njũkĩĩte harĩ we ũmenyerere; honokia kuuma harĩ arĩa oothe mahanyũkanĩĩtie na niĩ, ũkĩndeithũre." 
Psalms7:2 Waga gwĩka ũguo mekũndembũranga o ta mũrũũthi, macooke mangururie hatarĩ na wa kũndeithũra." 
Psalms7:3 MWATHANI Ngai wakwa, angĩkorwo nĩnjĩkĩĩte ũmwe wa maũndũ maya: ngorwo nĩnjĩkĩĩte ũũru na mooko maakwa," 
Psalms7:4 ngorwo nĩndĩhĩĩte mũraata wakwa wega na ũũru, kana ngataha thũ yakwa hatarĩ gĩtũmi;" 
Psalms7:5 reke thũ ĩyo ĩhanyũkanie na niĩ ĩnyiite. Reke o na ĩhũũre ĩnjũrage, ĩndige thĩ ndĩ mũkuũ!" 
Psalms7:6 MWATHANI arahũka na maraakara maaku, wĩyambararie ũũkĩrĩre mang'ũrĩ ma thũ ciakwa. Ngai wakwa, o wee ũbangĩĩte gũciirithania, arahũka." 
Psalms7:7 Reke andũ moongane makũrigiicĩrie; nawe ũmathamakĩre ũrĩ kũu igũrũ matuinĩ. 
Psalms7:8 MWATHANI, nĩ we ũtuagĩra andũ oothe ciira. Tua ciira wakwa, MWATHANI, kũringana na ũthingu wakwa, nĩ gũkorwo nĩũũĩ wega atĩ ndiĩhĩĩtie." 
Psalms7:9 Ndũkaareke andũ arĩa meekaga ũũru makĩrĩrĩrie gwĩka ũũru;tiirĩrĩra arĩa athingu, wee Ngai ũrĩa mũthingu,o wee ũgeragia ngoro ciitũ o na meciiria maitũ." 
Psalms7:10 Ngai nĩ we mũmenyereri nĩ we ũhonokagia arĩa atheru ngoro. 
Psalms7:11 Ngai-rĩ, nĩ mũciiri ũtuithanagia ciira na kĩhooto, na nĩatuagĩra mũthenya o mũthenya arĩa eeki ũũru." 
Psalms7:12 Mũndũ angĩaga gũtigana na mĩthiĩre yake mĩũru-rĩ, Ngai ekũnoora rũhiũ rwake rwa njora, ageete ũta wake ethime wathi," 
Psalms7:13 o na ooe indo cia mbaara itangĩĩtiirio nĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ, eerekerie mũndũ ũcio mĩguĩ yake ĩgwakana mwaki." 
Psalms7:14 Ta baara wone ũrĩa mũndũ ũrĩa wĩkaga ũũru ararũmwo aciare waganu. Ihu rĩu e narĩo no rĩa kĩũnũhu na kĩrĩa egũciara no maheeni matheri. 
Psalms7:15 Nĩkwenja eenjeete irima o na akarĩrikia,no rĩĩrĩ, irima rĩu eenjeete nĩ we mwene ũgwĩte kuo." 
Psalms7:16 Egũcookererwo no kĩũnũhu kĩu gĩake, naguo ũmaramari ũcio wake ũmũgũĩre o mũtwe wake mwene." 
Psalms7:17 Nĩngũcookeria MWATHANI ngaatho nĩ ũndũ wa ũthingu wake, na ngooce rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno na rwĩmbo." 
Psalms8:1 MWATHANI, o wee MWATHANI witũ, ĩ rĩĩtwa rĩaku ti rĩnene gũũkũ thĩ guothe!Riiri waku-rĩ, ũkinyĩĩte o igũrũ matuinĩ," 
Psalms8:2 na twana o na tũkenge nĩtũũkumagia na tũnua twatuo.Wee-rĩ, hatirĩ thũ o na ĩmwe yaku ĩngĩgũthengerera o na atĩa.Thũ ciaku o na arĩa magũũkagĩrĩra atĩ nĩguo merĩhĩrie harĩ we nĩũmakiragia ki." 
Psalms8:3 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa ngũtiira maitho maakwa ngabaara igũrũ rĩrĩa wee wombire, ngoona mweri na njata icio wĩkĩrĩĩte kuo;" 
Psalms8:4 ndĩyũragia atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ mũndũ akĩrĩ we kĩ nĩguo ũikarage ũkĩmwĩciiragia? Mũndũ ũrĩa arĩ o rũkũngũ akĩrĩ kĩ tondũ ũmũrũmbũyagia?”" 
Psalms8:5 Nĩ amu wee ũmũũmbĩĩte ũguo atĩ no haniini atigairie ahaane o ta we mwene; o na ũkamũhumba thũmbĩ ya riiri na ya gĩtĩĩo mũtwe wake. 
Psalms8:6 Nĩũmũthuurĩĩte ũkamũhe wathani igũrũ rĩa indo ciothe iria wee ũũmbĩĩte; ũgakĩiga indo ciothe o nyaarĩrĩinĩ ciake: 
Psalms8:7 ng'ondu ciothe o na ng'ombe, nyamũ ciothe cia gĩthaka," 
Psalms8:8 nyoni cia rĩerainĩ, thamaki cia iriainĩ, o na kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩrĩa kĩgeragĩra kũu iriainĩ thĩinĩ." 
Psalms8:9 MWATHANI, o wee MWATHANI witũ, ĩ rĩĩtwa rĩaku ti rĩnene gũũkũ thĩ guothe!" 
Psalms9:1 Nĩngũgũcookeria ngaatho MWATHANI na ngoro yakwa yothe;nĩngũgana maũndũ moothe ma magegania marĩa wĩkĩĩte. 
Psalms9:2 Nĩngũkena o na njanjamũke nĩ ũndũ waku; nĩngũina ngĩgoocaga rĩĩtwa rĩaku, wee Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno," 
Psalms9:3 nĩ ũndũ rĩrĩa thũ ciakwa, ciaturumana na ũthiũ waku,ihũndũkaga ikagũa thĩ na mũnduru igakua." 
Psalms9:4 Nĩũtiirĩrĩire kĩhooto gĩakwa ũikarĩire gĩtĩ gĩaku kĩa ũthamakiũgĩtuithania ciira ũtekuogomia kĩhooto. 
Psalms9:5 Ndũũrĩrĩ nĩũcirũithĩĩtie, nao andũ arĩa ooru nĩũmaharaganĩĩtie, namo marĩĩtwa maao ũkamatharia nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms9:6 Thũ ciitũ nĩũciniinĩĩte nginya tene na tene; kũririkanwo itikaaririkanwo o na rĩ; matũũra maacio namo nĩũmaanangĩĩte. 
Psalms9:7 No MWATHANI egũtũũra aikarĩire gĩtĩ kĩa ũthamaki nginya mĩndĩ na mĩndĩ o gĩtĩ kĩrĩa ahaarĩirie gĩa gũciirithanĩria. 
Psalms9:8 We nĩ we ũtuagĩra thĩ na kĩhooto, andũ nao akamatuithania hatarĩ ekuonera." 
Psalms9:9 MWATHANI-rĩ, nĩ we handũ ha gwĩtharagĩrwo nĩ arĩa mahinyĩrĩirio; nĩ we handũ ha kũũragĩrwo hĩndĩ ya thĩĩna." 
Psalms9:10 Arĩa mooĩ rĩĩtwa rĩaku nĩ we marĩhokaga, tondũ, wee MWATHANI, ndũrĩ watiganĩria arĩa magũcaragia." 
Psalms9:11 Inaai mũgĩkumagia MWATHANI ũrĩa ũtũũraga Zayuni; ciĩko ciake-rĩ, ciganĩreei andũ oothe." 
Psalms9:12 Nĩ ũndũ Ngai ũrĩa ũrĩhagĩria arĩa maranyariirĩka ndariganagĩrwo nĩ o; mũkayo wa arĩa marathĩĩnĩka nĩaũririkanaga. 
Psalms9:13 MWATHANI, nginyĩria wega waku! Tarora wone mĩnyamaaro ĩrĩa ndeehithĩirio nĩ thũ ciakwa!Nĩ we ũnjoyaga na igũrũ ũkandũũgia ihingo cia gĩkuũ," 
Psalms9:14 nĩguo ng'ane ngumo yaku yothe na njanjamũke ndĩ o ihingoinĩ cia Zayuni nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa honokeetio nĩ we. 
Psalms9:15 Ndũũrĩrĩ nĩigũĩte irimainĩ o rĩrĩa irenjeete magũrũ maacio nĩmagwatie nĩ mũtego o ũrĩa irategeete. 
Psalms9:16 MWATHANI nĩemenyithanĩĩtie, na nĩatuithanĩĩtie ciira; arĩa ooru nĩagwatie nĩ ciĩko ciao eene." 
Psalms9:17 Andũ arĩa ooru makaarĩĩkĩrĩria kwa arĩa akuũ; kũu nokuo ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe iria iriganagĩrwo nĩ Ngai igaathiĩ. 
Psalms9:18 Nĩ gũkorwo andũ arĩa mabataire matigũtũũra mariganĩire; mwĩhoko wa arĩa athĩĩni naguo ndũgũtũũra wagithĩĩtio kĩene. 
Psalms9:19 Arahũka, MWATHANI! Ndũkaareke hinya wa mũndũ ũtũũgĩre; reke ndũũrĩrĩ ituĩrwo o maithoinĩ maaku." 
Psalms9:20 Ciĩkĩre guoya, MWATHANI! Reke ndũũrĩrĩ imenye atĩ cio no andũ." 
Psalms10:1 MWATHANI, ũkũrũũgama kũraaya ũguo nĩkĩ? Wĩhithaga hĩndĩ ĩrĩa tũrĩ mathĩĩnainĩ nĩkĩ?" 
Psalms10:2 Andũ arĩa ooru mahĩtaga arĩa athĩĩni magĩtĩĩaga; mĩtego ĩyo mathondekeete ĩromagwatia. 
Psalms10:3 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru-rĩ, nĩetĩĩaga nĩ ũndũ wa merirĩria mooru marĩa marĩ ngoroinĩ yake; naake mũndũ ũrĩa mũkoroku, arumaga MWATHANI o na akamũrega." 
Psalms10:4 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru-rĩ, ndacaragia MWATHANI; nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa e mwĩtĩi, eciiragia atĩ gũtirĩ Ngai." 
Psalms10:5 Maũndũ ma mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru maikaraga magaacĩire hingo ciothe. Maitho maake matingĩhota kuona matuĩro ma Ngai; we no kũnyũrũria anyũrũragia arĩa oothe marĩ ũthũ naake. 
Psalms10:6 Eĩraga na ngoro atĩrĩ, “Niĩ-rĩ, ndingĩenyenyeka; gũtirĩ hingo o na ĩmwe ngaatũngana na ũũru.”" 
Psalms10:7 Kanua gaake-rĩ, kaiyũire irumi, maheeni, na ũhinyanĩrĩria; rũrĩmĩ rwake nĩ ngurunga ya kĩũnũhu na ũũru." 
Psalms10:8 Aikaraga ooheirie hakuhĩ na matũũra eetereire kũũraga na hitho arĩa matarĩ na ũũru. Maitho maake maikaraga magĩtuĩragia ũrĩa ũtarĩ na wa kũmũgitĩra. 
Psalms10:9 Aikaraga kũndũ kũhitharu ooheirie o ta mũrũũthi ũrĩ kĩmaamoinĩ kĩaguo; agakĩoheria ũrĩa mũthĩĩni nĩguo amũnyĩĩte, akamũnyiita na mũtego wake, akamũkururia agathiĩ naake." 
Psalms10:10 Agakĩgũtha mũndũ ũcio ũtarĩ na wa kũmũgitĩra, akagũa thĩ nĩ hinya wa igũtha rĩu rĩake." 
Psalms10:11 Mũndũ ũcio mũũru agakĩĩĩra na ngoro atĩrĩ, “Ngai nĩariganĩirwo; nĩahingĩĩte maitho, hatirĩ ũndũ angĩona.”" 
Psalms10:12 Arahũka, MWATHANI; guoko gwaku kũroherithia mũndũ ũcio mũũru; Ngai ndũkariganĩrwo nĩ arĩa maranyariirĩka." 
Psalms10:13 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, mũndũ mũũru amenagĩrĩria Ngai nĩkĩ, akĩĩĩraga na ngoro atĩ ndangĩmũherithia?" 
Psalms10:14 No wee-rĩ, nĩwonaga; mathĩĩna moothe na mĩnyamaaro wee nĩwonaga, na ũkoragwo hingo ciothe wĩhaarĩirie gũteithĩrĩria.Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ na mũteithia-rĩ, eerekagĩrĩria mookoinĩ maaku; wee nĩ we ũtũire wĩ mũteithia wa ciana cia ngoriai." 
Psalms10:15 Unanga guoko kwa mũndũ ũrĩa ũmaramaraga na ageeka ũũru; mũherithie nĩ ũndũ wa ũũru ũrĩa eekĩĩte o nginya aage gũcooka kũwĩka rĩngĩ. 
Psalms10:16 MWATHANI nĩ we mũthamaki kinya tene na tene; arĩa mathaathayagia ngai ingĩ nĩmakaaniinwo mathengio bũrũri wake. 
Psalms10:17 Nĩũiguaga, MWATHANI, wendi wa arĩa enyiihia; nĩũmeekagĩra hinya ngoroinĩ ciao," 
Psalms10:18 na nĩũtegaga matũ ũkaigua mũkayo wa ciana cia ngoriai na wa arĩa ahinyĩrĩrie ũmatiirĩrĩre na kĩhooto, nĩguo mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩ o rũkũngũ ndagaacooke gwĩkanĩra guoya." 
Psalms11:1 Harĩ MWATHANI nĩ ho ndĩtharĩire. Mũgũkĩnjĩĩra atĩ nyũmbũke o ta kanyoni njũrĩre irĩmainĩ nĩkĩ? 
Psalms11:2 Nĩ ũndũ andũ arĩa ooru nĩmoeete moota maao, makahagĩka mĩguĩ makamĩerekeria andũ arĩa atheru ngoro mamarathe marĩ ndumainĩ." 
Psalms11:3 Nĩ atĩa mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu angĩhota gwĩka mũthingi wake ũngĩharaganio? 
Psalms11:4 MWATHANI arĩ thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ yake theru, gĩtĩ gĩake kĩrĩ o igũrũ matuinĩ;Maitho maake nĩmoonaga andũ o kũrĩa guothe mangĩkorwo marĩ akamenya ũrĩa wothe mareeka." 
Psalms11:5 MWATHANI nĩathimaga andũ arĩa athingu o na arĩa ooru; andũ arĩa meendeete kũhũthĩra hinya nĩamathũire na ngoro yake yothe. 
Psalms11:6 Nĩakoirĩria andũ arĩa ooru makara maakanĩĩte magatuunĩha, o na ũbiriiti ũgwakana; akaamareehithĩria rũhuuho rũhiũ amaherithie naruo." 
Psalms11:7 Tondũ MWATHANI nĩ mũthingu na maũndũ ma ũthingu no mo eendeete; andũ arĩa mameekaga-rĩ, nĩ o makoona ũthiũ wake." 
Psalms12:1 MWATHANI, tũhonokie, nĩ gũkorwo rĩu gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe mwĩhokeku ũtigarĩĩte; andũ arĩa ehokeku matingĩoneka gatagatĩinĩ ka mũingĩ." 
Psalms12:2 O mũndũ no maheeni areera ũrĩa marigainie naake; maraheenania na tũnua monjore marĩ na ũhinga ngoroinĩ ciao. 
Psalms12:3 MWATHANI arotinia mĩromo ĩyo yao ĩheenanagia. Arokiria nĩmĩ icio ciaragia na mwĩgaatho ikoiga atĩrĩ," 
Psalms12:4 “Tũrĩonaga kĩrĩa gĩothe tũngĩenda na tũnua twitũ; tũriugaga ũrĩa wothe tũrĩendaga kuuga na gũtirĩ o na ũ ũrĩtũgiragĩrĩria.” 
Psalms12:5 MWATHANI egũkiuga atĩrĩĩrĩ, “Rĩu nĩngwarahũka; nĩ ũndũ athĩĩni nĩahinyĩrĩrie makĩria, na arĩa abataru no gũcaaya maracaaya nĩkũnyamaario. Nĩngũmagitĩra o ta ũrĩa matũire meriragĩria.”" 
Psalms12:6 Ciĩranĩro cia MWATHANI nĩciakwĩhokwo; nĩ theru o ta betha ĩrĩa ĩthereetio maita mũgwanja na mwaki. 
Psalms12:7 Tũgitagĩre hingo ciothe, MWATHANI, o na ũtũmenyagĩrĩre kuuma harĩ rũciaro rũũrũ." 
Psalms12:8 Andũ arĩa ooru maracangacanga kũndũ guothe, naguo ũũra thoni no kũgaathĩrĩrio ũragaathĩrĩrio nĩ andũ." 
Psalms13:1 MWATHANI, nĩ nginya rĩ ũgũtũũra ũriganĩirwo nĩ niĩ? Ũgũtũũra nginya tene ũriganĩirwo nĩ niĩ?Nĩ nginya rĩ ũgũtũũra ũhithĩĩte ũthiũ waku?" 
Psalms13:2 Nĩ nginya rĩ ngũtũũra njiguaga ruwo rohoinĩ wakwa, na ngaikaraga ndĩ na kĩeha ngoroinĩ yakwa ũtukũ na mũthenya?Thũ ciakwa-rĩ, igũtũũra ihootaga nginya rĩ?" 
Psalms13:3 Ndora, na ũnjookerie, MWATHANI Ngai wakwa Cookeria maitho maakwa hinya ndikaae gũkoma toro wa gĩkuũ," 
Psalms13:4 thũ ciakwa itikoige atĩrĩĩrĩ, “Nĩtwamũtooria;” igĩkenerere kũng'aũkana gwakwa." 
Psalms13:5 Niĩ-rĩ, ũtugi waku nĩguo ndĩhokeete; ngoro yakwa nĩrĩcanjamũka rĩrĩa wee ũrĩhonokia." 
Psalms13:6 Nĩngũinĩra MWATHANI, nĩ ũndũ nĩanjĩkĩĩte wega mũno." 
Psalms14:1 Irimũ ciĩĩraga atĩrĩĩrĩ, “Gũtirĩ Ngai.” Ciothe ciendeete o ungumania, na ciĩko iria ciĩkaga no cia ũũra thoni; gũtirĩ o na kĩmwe gĩacio gĩĩkaga ũndũ mwega." 
Psalms14:2 MWATHANI acũũthagĩrĩria andũ arĩ o igũrũ, oone kana gatagatĩinĩ kaao nĩkũrĩ andũ oogĩ o arĩa mamũthaathayagia." 
Psalms14:3 No rĩĩrĩ, oothe no gũturuura maturuurĩĩte, oothe gũtirĩ ũteendeete kungumania maũndũ; gũtirĩ o na ũmwe gatagatĩinĩ kaao wĩkaga ũndũ mwega; gũtirĩ o na ũmwe." 
Psalms14:4 MWATHANI egũkĩũria atĩrĩĩrĩ, “Kaĩ andũ aya oothe meekaga ũũru matarĩ ũmenyo? marĩaga andũ aakwa ta ũrĩa marĩaga irio, na matihooyaga.”" 
Psalms14:5 No hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmakaanyiitwo nĩ guoya mũnene, tondũ Ngai e mwena wa arĩa athingu." 
Psalms14:6 Andũ arĩa ooru mathũũkagia mĩbango ya arĩa athĩĩni, no rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI nĩ we ũmenyagĩrĩra arĩa athĩĩni." 
Psalms14:7 Naarĩ korwo Zayuni kwoima ũhonokio wa Isiraeli!Ĩ andũ a Isiraeli magaakena atĩa hiihi hĩndĩ ĩrĩa MWATHANI agaakorwo atũmĩĩte magaacĩre rĩngĩ! 
Psalms15:1 MWATHANI, nũũ ũngĩtũũra hemainĩ yaku?Nũũ ũngĩtũũra kĩrĩmainĩ gĩaku kĩrĩa gĩtheru?" 
Psalms15:2 Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mĩthiĩre yake ĩtarĩ ũcuuke, ũrĩa wĩkaga ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire o ũrĩa waragia atarĩ na ũhinga ngoroinĩ yake." 
Psalms15:3 Kanua gaake gaticambanagia, na ndeekaga mũratawe ũũru, kana agathiĩ akĩmenagĩrĩria arĩa atũũranagia nao." 
Psalms15:4 Maitho maake matienda kuona arĩa maremeire Ngai, no nĩatĩĩĩte arĩa mathĩkagĩra MWATHANI, na ndaagaga kũhingia ũndũ ũrĩa eeranĩire na mwĩhĩtwa, o na kũngĩkorwo kũhaana atĩa." 
Psalms15:5 Ndakombanagĩra mbeeca ciake nĩguo oone uumithio, o na ndangĩtĩkĩra kũhakwo atĩ nĩguo arute ũira wa kũhinyĩrĩria mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ na mahĩtia.Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩkaga maũndũ macio egũtũũra agaacĩire nginya tene." 
Psalms16:1 Menyerera, Ngai, nĩ ũndũ no harĩ wee itangĩona ũgwati." 
Psalms16:2 MWATHANI ngwĩraga atĩrĩĩrĩ, “Wee-rĩ, nĩ we MWATHANI wakwa; ndirĩ wega o na ũmwe ingĩona ũtarĩ hamwe na niĩ.”" 
Psalms16:3 Ĩ andũ arĩa athingu matitĩĩĩtwo bũrũriinĩ! Ngoro yakwa nĩkenagio mũno nĩ o. 
Psalms16:4 Arĩa mateng'agĩrĩra ngai ingĩ no mathĩĩna matarĩ mũthia mereehagĩrĩra; niĩ-rĩ, ndirĩ hingo ngarutĩra ngai ta icio magongoona ma gũitwo thakame, o na kana marĩĩtwa maacio ndĩmagwete na kanua gaakwa." 
Psalms16:5 MWATHANI, wee no we ũtonga wakwa wothe, nĩ we ũheaga kĩrĩa gĩothe mbataragio nĩkĩo; ikĩroinĩ ciakwa ciothe nĩ we ũnyiitagĩrĩra." 
Psalms16:6 Ũnjatũrĩire ithaka kũndũ kwega mũno; ti itherũ igai rĩakwa nĩ rĩega mũno! 
Psalms16:7 Nĩngũgaatha MWATHANI ũrĩa ũheaga mataaro; ũtukũ-rĩ, ngoro yakwa nĩ yo ĩndaaraga." 
Psalms16:8 Njigaga MWATHANI mbere yakwa mahinda moothe; tondũ e mwena wakwa wa ũrĩo, ndingĩenyenyeka." 
Psalms16:9 Tondũ ũcio ngoro yakwa nĩkeneete, naguo roho wakwa ũgacanjamũka; na ndiraigua guoya o na haniini." 
Psalms16:10 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩũmenyereire kuuma harĩ hinya wa gĩkuũ, na ndũkaarekereria ũrĩa ũkwĩhokeete kwa arĩa akuũ." 
Psalms16:11 Wee-rĩ, nĩ we ũnyonagĩrĩria njĩra ĩrĩa ĩthiaga muoyoinĩ; harĩ wee he na gĩkeno gĩkinyanĩru; guokoinĩ gwaku kwa ũrĩo he na ikeno cia gũtũũra nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms17:1 MWATHANI, igua kĩhooto gĩa ikaya rĩakwa, ikaya rĩakwa rĩa ũteithio rĩthikĩrĩrie.Tega matũ ũigue ngĩkũhooya na kanua gatarĩ na ũhinga." 
Psalms17:2 Ituĩro rĩaku rĩrondirĩrĩra; maitho maaku marona ũhoro ũrĩa mũrũngĩrĩru. 
Psalms17:3 Nĩũgereetie ngoro yakwa, na ũkambaara ũtukũ wothe; ũthuuthuurĩĩtie o biũ, na nduone kanyita ka ũũru o na kaniini, kanua gaakwa gatiheenanagia." 
Psalms17:4 Ndongoreetio nĩ uuge wa kanua gaaku-rĩ, nĩndĩyoneire ciĩko cia andũ, na ngaaga kũrũmĩrĩra njĩra cia arĩa mahũthagĩra hinya." 
Psalms17:5 Makinya maakwa maikaraga marũmĩĩtie njĩra ciaku, na matirĩ matindirũka." 
Psalms17:6 Nĩndagũkaĩra, wee Ngai, tondũ wee nĩũkũnjĩtĩka; nyinamĩrĩria gũtũ gwaku, ũigue ndeto ciakwa." 
Psalms17:7 Nyonia wendo waku wa magegania ũrĩa ũtagarũrũkaga; wee ũhonokagia na guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo arĩa mooragĩra harĩ we nĩguo ũmateithie kuuma harĩ thũ ciao. 
Psalms17:8 Menyerera o ta kĩũma kĩa riitho rĩaku; hitha rungu rwa mathagu maaku," 
Psalms17:9 ndikanyiitwo nĩ andũ ooru arĩa maratharĩkĩra, o acio thũ ciakwa njũru ta kĩ arĩa mandigiicĩirie mĩena yothe." 
Psalms17:10 Ngoro ciao itirĩ na tha; tũnua twao twaragia na mwĩtĩĩo. 
Psalms17:11 No kũũhĩta marahĩta, na rĩu nĩmandigicĩirie; mweke wa kũũnũnda nĩguo rĩu maracaria." 
Psalms17:12 Mahaana o ta mũrũũthi mũhũũtu ũgĩcaria gĩa kũrĩa, kana ta mũrũũthi mwĩthĩ woheirie kĩrĩa ũrenda kũnyiita." 
Psalms17:13 Arahũka, MWATHANI; ng'ethanĩra na thũ ciakwa, ũcitoorie! Honokia muoyo wakwa na rũhiũ rwaku rwa njora kuuma harĩ thũ." 
Psalms17:14 Honokia, MWATHANI, na guoko gwaku kuuma harĩ andũ arĩa muoyoinĩ ũyũ marĩ na kĩrĩa gĩothe mangĩenda.Maherithie na mĩnyamaaro ĩrĩa ũmaigĩire; o na ũmĩkinyĩrie ciana ciao, o na ciana cia ciana ciao." 
Psalms17:15 No niĩ-rĩ, ũthiũ waku nĩndĩrĩwonaga, nĩ ũndũ niĩ ndikũhĩtĩirie; rĩrĩa narĩo ndarahũka, nĩndĩrĩiguaga njiganĩire tondũ wĩ hamwe na niĩ." 
Psalms18:1 Ĩ ndĩkwendeete, wee MWATHANI, o wee hinya wakwa!" 
Psalms18:2 MWATHANI nĩ we mũmenyereri, nĩ we handũ haakwa hagitĩre na hinya ha kwĩhitha, na no we mũngũũri.Ngai wakwa-rĩ, nĩwe mũmenyereri, na harĩ we ndingĩona ũgwati.Nĩ we ngo yakwa, na nĩ we ũngitagĩra na akanjikaria na thaayũ." 
Psalms18:3 Ngayagĩra MWATHANI, naake akahonokia kuuma harĩ thũ ciakwa.MWATHANI arogoocwo." 
Psalms18:4 Mĩnyororo ya kwa arĩa akuũ nĩ yo yeĩthiorereirie, na ngakorererwo nĩ mĩiyũro ya wanangi." 
Psalms18:5 Mĩnyororo ya kwa arĩa akuũ yeĩthiorereirie, nayo mĩtego ya gĩkuũ ĩgathagathagwo ĩnyiite." 
Psalms18:6 Ndĩ mĩnyamaaroinĩ ĩyo ngĩkaĩra MWATHANI; ngĩkaĩra Ngai wakwa andeithie.Naake akĩigua mũgambo wakwa arĩ o Hekaarũinĩ yake, kĩrĩro gĩakwa gĩgĩkinya o matũinĩ maake." 
Psalms18:7 Hĩndĩ ĩyo thĩ ĩkĩinaina na ĩgĩthingitha; o nacio itina cia irĩma ikĩinaina na ĩgĩthingitha, nĩ ũndũ Ngai aarĩ mũraakaru." 
Psalms18:8 Maniũrũ maake makiuma ndoogo ĩkĩambata na igũrũ, naguo mwaki wa kũniinana o na makara maarĩrĩmbũkaga ikiuma kanuainĩ gaake." 
Psalms18:9 Akĩhingũrania igũrũ, agĩikũrũka thĩ arangĩĩte itu rĩtumanu." 
Psalms18:10 Aathiaga oombũkĩĩte akuuĩĩtwo nĩ kĩũmbe kĩrĩ mathagu agĩgĩthiĩ arĩ mathaguinĩ ma rũhuuho. 
Psalms18:11 Eehumbĩire na nduma, na agathiũrũrũkĩrio nĩ matu matutungĩirie mbura." 
Psalms18:12 Mbura ya mbembe na makara maarĩrĩmbũkaga igĩtũrĩkania matu macio maake mairũ, ciumĩĩte ũkengiinĩ ũrĩa warĩ mbere yake." 
Psalms18:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI akĩruruma e kũu igũrũ; naguo mũgambo wa Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno ũkĩiguuo igũrũ rĩa mbura ĩyo ya mbembe na makara macio maarĩrĩmbũkaga. 
Psalms18:14 Naake agĩikia mĩguĩ yake, akĩhurunjania thũ ciake, na agĩciingatithia na heni." 
Psalms18:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo kũndũ kũrĩa kwĩ na thĩ wa iria rĩrĩa inene, gũkĩonekana. nacio itina cia thĩ ikĩhumbũranio, rĩrĩa wee, MWATHANI, warũithirie thũ ciaku, na ũgĩcigũũthũkĩra na maraakara." 
Psalms18:16 MWATHANI arĩ igũrũ agĩtambũrũkia guoko akĩnyiita, akĩnduta ndiainĩ ĩyo ndiku." 
Psalms18:17 Agĩkĩhonokia kuuma mookoinĩ ma thũ ciakwa iria ciangĩrĩĩtie hinya, o na akĩhonokia kuuma harĩ arĩa mathũire, nĩ gũkorwo nĩmaangĩrĩĩtie hinya mũno." 
Psalms18:18 Manjũkĩrĩire rĩrĩa ndaarĩ mathĩĩnainĩ, no MWATHANI akĩmenyerera." 
Psalms18:19 MWATHANI agĩkĩnyumĩrĩria kũndũ gũtaarĩ na moogwati; agĩkĩhonokia nĩ ũndũ nĩakeneetio nĩ niĩ. 
Psalms18:20 MWATHANI akĩndĩha kũringana na ũthingu wakwa; akĩndĩha kĩndũ na kĩngĩ nĩ ũndũ mooko maakwa matiekĩĩte ũũru. 
Psalms18:21 O na nĩ ũndũ ndiagĩĩte kũrũmĩrĩra njĩra cia MWATHANI, kana ngahuutatĩra Ngai wakwa nĩguo njĩke maũndũ mooru." 
Psalms18:22 Nĩndahingĩĩtie ũrĩa mawatho maake moothe moigĩĩte, na ngaathĩkĩra maathani maake." 
Psalms18:23 Ndiarĩ na mahĩtia mbere ya MWATHANI, na nĩndemenyagĩrĩra ndikaahĩtie." 
Psalms18:24 Tondũ ũcio MWATHANI nĩandĩhĩĩte kũringana na ũthingu wakwa, nĩ ũndũ mooko maakwa matiĩkĩĩte ũũru." 
Psalms18:25 Wee, MWATHANI, wĩ mwĩhokeku kũrĩ arĩa makwĩhokeete, na wĩ mũkinyanĩru kũrĩ arĩa akinyanĩru." 
Psalms18:26 Wĩ mũtheru harĩ arĩa maikaraga methereetie, no harĩ arĩa meekaga ũũru wĩ mũrũrũ mũno." 
Psalms18:27 Wee-rĩ, nĩ we ũhonokagia andũ arĩa enyiihia, no arĩa etĩĩi nĩũmaconorithagia." 
Psalms18:28 Nĩ we, MWATHANI, ũtũmaga taawa wakwa wakane wega, ũgakĩnjehereria nduma yakwa, wee Ngai wakwa." 
Psalms18:29 Nĩ we ũheaga hinya wa kũhehenja mbũtũ cia thũ ciakwa; o na ũkaahotithia kũrũũga thingo ciacio cia hinya cia kwĩgitĩra. 
Psalms18:30 Ĩ Ngai ũyũ njĩra ciake ti nginyanĩru! Ĩ ciĩranĩro ciake ti ciakwĩhokwo! Nĩ we ngo ya arĩa oothe amenyagĩrĩra. 
Psalms18:31 MWATHANI wiki no we Ngai; Ngai wiki nĩ we mũtũgitĩri. 
Psalms18:32 Ngai ũcio nĩ we ũheaga hinya, na agatũma njage gũtũngana na ũgwati njĩrainĩ ciakwa." 
Psalms18:33 Nĩ we ũhotithagia gũteng'era itegũtindirũka o ta thwariga ya mũgoma, ngoorĩra irĩmainĩ igũrũ kũrĩa itangĩona ũgwati." 
Psalms18:34 Nĩ we ũndutaga ũrĩa mbaara ĩrũagwo, o nginya ngahota kũhũthĩra ũta ũrĩa wĩ na hinya mũno." 
Psalms18:35 MWATHANI, nĩ we ũmenyagĩrĩra o na ũkahonokia; guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo nĩkuo kũndiiragĩrĩra, ũteithio waku nĩguo ũndũũgĩrĩĩtie." 
Psalms18:36 Nĩ we ũheaga kũndũ kwariĩ gwa kũũrĩra; magũrũ maakwa matirĩ maatirũka. 
Psalms18:37 Thũ ciakwa ndeng'eranagia nacio ngacinyiita; ndihũndũkaga o nginya rĩrĩa ndĩrĩĩkia gũciniina. 
Psalms18:38 Ndĩcigũthaga ikagũa thĩ, na itingĩhota gũcooka gũũkĩra, ikagũa na ngara o magũrũinĩ maakwa." 
Psalms18:39 Nĩ ũndũ wee, MWATHANI, nĩũheaga hinya wa kũrũa mbaara o na ũkaahotithia gũtooria thũ ciakwa." 
Psalms18:40 Nĩũtũmaga thũ ciakwa injũrĩre, arĩa nao mathũire nĩndĩmaniinaga." 
Psalms18:41 Makayaga mateithio, no mationaga wa kũmahonokia; makayagĩra MWATHANI, no we ndameetĩkaga." 
Psalms18:42 Na niĩ ngakĩmathĩa, makahinya o ta rũkũngũ rũrĩa rũmbũragwo nĩ rũhuuho; ngamarangĩrĩria o ta ndooro ya njĩrainĩ." 
Psalms18:43 Nĩ we wahonokirie kuuma harĩ andũ arĩa maang'eng'anaga na niĩ, ũkĩndua mũtongoria wa ndũũrĩrĩ; rĩu andũ itaamenyeete nĩmatuĩkĩĩte ndungata ciakwa." 
Psalms18:44 Andũ a kuuma mabũrũri mangĩ mookaga mbere yakwa makĩinamagĩrĩra; maiguaga ngumo yakwa, makanjathĩkĩra." 
Psalms18:45 Makuaga ngoro magooka makĩinainaga moimĩĩte matũũrainĩ maao marĩa mairigĩre na thingo cia hinya. 
Psalms18:46 MWATHANI e muoyo! Arogoocwo, o we mũngitĩri! Ngai ũrĩa ũhonokagia arotũũgĩrio!" 
Psalms18:47 Nĩ we Ngai ũrĩa ũndĩhagĩria harĩ thũ ciakwa, na agatooria ndũũrĩrĩ agaciiga rungu rwakwa." 
Psalms18:48 Nĩ we ũndutaga mookoinĩ ma thũ ciakwa, akanyambararia igũrũ wa arĩa manjũkagĩrĩra; nĩ we ũmenyagĩrĩra kuuma harĩ andũ arĩa mahũthagĩra hinya." 
Psalms18:49 Tondũ ũcio, nĩngũkũgooca, wee MWATHANI, gatagatĩinĩ ka ndũũrĩrĩ, o na ngumie rĩĩtwa rĩaku na nyĩmbo." 
Psalms18:50 Nĩũheete mũthamaki waku ũhootani mũnene, na ũgatuga ũrĩa waku ũitĩrĩirie maguta ũkamũthuura, o we Daudi na njiarwa ciake nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms19:1 Igũrũ rĩonanagia riiri wa Ngai, namo matu mairũ mamemeerekagia ũrĩa eekĩĩte." 
Psalms19:2 Mũthenya ũkinyagĩria mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ ũhoro wa riiri ũcio, naguo ũtukũ ũkamenyithagia ũtukũ ũrĩa ũngĩ ũhoro wa riiri ũcio." 
Psalms19:3 Gũtirĩ ciugo kana mĩario ihũthagĩra, mĩgambo yacio ndĩiguagwo." 
Psalms19:4 No o na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ, ũrĩa ciugaga ũhunjaga thĩ yothe, na ũkaiguĩka kũrĩa guothe andũ maikaraga gũũkũ thĩ.Kũu igũrũ nĩkuo Ngai aheete riũa ũtũũro," 
Psalms19:5 rĩrĩa rĩrookaga kwĩyumĩria o ta mũhikania akiuma gwake mũciĩ, kana ta mũteng'eri njoorua wĩ na mũhĩĩahĩĩo wa kũhanyũka." 
Psalms19:6 Rĩrathagĩra mũthiainĩ ũmwe wa igũrũ, rĩgatuĩkania ũguo nginya mũthiainĩ ũrĩa ũngĩ, na gũtirĩ kĩndũ gĩtakinyagĩrwo nĩ ũrugarĩ warĩo." 
Psalms19:7 Watho wa MWATHANI nĩ mũkinyanĩru, nĩũheaga ngoro ya mũndũ hinya mwerũ.Kĩrĩra kĩa MWATHANI nĩ gĩa kwĩhokwo, nĩkĩũhĩgagia mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ mũũgĩ." 
Psalms19:8 Mawatho ma MWATHANI nĩ marũngĩrĩru, nĩmakenagia ngoro cia arĩa mamarũmagĩrĩra.Maathani ma MWATHANI nĩ ma kĩhooto, nĩmatũmaga mũndũ agĩe na ũmenyo." 
Psalms19:9 Gũtĩĩa MWATHANI nĩ ũndũ mwega, gũtũũraga nginya tene na tene.Matua ma MWATHANI nĩ ma ma, na makoragwo hingo ciothe marĩ ma kĩhooto." 
Psalms19:10 Nĩmakwĩrirĩrio gũkĩra thahabu ĩrĩa njega mũno; me mũrĩo gũkĩra mũruru wa ũũkĩ. 
Psalms19:11 Nĩ mo manjũhĩgagia, niĩ ndungata yaku; nĩ ũndũ wa kũmaathĩkĩra nĩndaathimagwo." 
Psalms19:12 Nũũ ũngĩhota gũkũũrana wega mahĩtia maake mwene? MWATHANI, ndekera mahĩtia marĩa ngũhĩtagĩria hithoinĩ." 
Psalms19:13 Ningĩ ndigagĩrĩria, niĩ ndungata yaku, ndigaakwĩhagie ngĩmenyaga; ndũkaanareke wĩhia wa mũthemba ũcio ũnjathe, nĩguo ngoragwo ndĩ mwagĩrĩru, na itarĩ na ũũru wa meehia." 
Psalms19:14 Ciugo cia kanua gaakwa, o na meciiria maakwa ĩroĩtĩkĩrwo nĩ we, MWATHANI o wee mũngitĩri na mũngũũri." 
Psalms20:1 MWATHANI arogwĩtĩkaga hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũrĩ mathĩĩnainĩ Ngai wa Jakubu arokũmenyagĩrira. 
Psalms20:2 Arogũtũmĩra ũteithio kuuma Hekaarũinĩ yake, na agũtiirĩrĩre arĩ kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Zayuni." 
Psalms20:3 Aroririkana mahaki maaku moothe, na eetĩkĩre magongoona maaku ma njino." 
Psalms20:4 Arokũhe ũndũ ũrĩa ngoro yaku ĩrirĩirie, na akũhingĩrie mĩbango yaku yothe." 
Psalms20:5 Nĩguo hĩndĩ ĩyo tũkaarũũhia nĩ ũndũ wa ũhootani waku, na tũkũngũĩre ũhootani waku na kũgooca rĩĩtwa rĩa Ngai witũ.MWATHANI arokũhingĩria ũrĩa wothe ũmũhoeete." 
Psalms20:6 Rĩu nĩndamenya atĩ mũthamaki wake ũrĩa aitĩrĩirie maguta akamwamũraMWATHANI nĩamũheaga ũhootani, nĩekũmwĩtĩka arĩ igũrũ rĩu rĩake rĩamũre, amũhe ũhootani mũnene na hinya wake." 
Psalms20:7 Andũ amwe mehokaga ngaari ciao cia mbarathi, arĩa angĩ mbarathi ciao, no ithuĩ twĩhokaga rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI Ngai witũ." 
Psalms20:8 Marĩtũgũũga magũe thĩ o mu, no ithuĩ tũrũũgame na igũrũ twĩhande ki." 
Psalms20:9 MWATHANI, he mũthamaki ũhootani, na ũtwĩtĩkage rĩrĩa twagũkaĩra." 
Psalms21:1 MWATHANI, mũthamaki nĩakeneetio nĩ we nĩ ũndũ nĩũmũheete hinya; nĩ mũcanjamũku nĩ ũndũ nĩũmũhootanĩire." 
Psalms21:2 Nĩũmũhingĩirie ũrĩa erirĩirie na ngoro yake, na ndwagĩĩte kũmũcookeria ũrĩa akũhoeete na mĩromo yake." 
Psalms21:3 Nĩũmũreehithĩirie iraathimo nene, na ũkamwĩkĩra mũtwe thũmbĩ ya thahabu ĩrĩa njega mũno." 
Psalms21:4 Aakũhoire muoyo, nawe ũkĩmũhe, ũgĩkĩmuongerera matukũ maingĩ." 
Psalms21:5 Riiri wake nĩ mũnene nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa wee ũmũteithĩĩtie; nĩũmũheete ũnene o na igweta. 
Psalms21:6 Nĩũmũraathimĩĩte na iraathimo cia gũtũũra nginya tene na tene, na ũgatũma aikarage akeneete nĩ ũndũ wa gũkuonaga." 
Psalms21:7 Nĩ gũkorwo mũthamaki ehokeete o MWATHANI na tondũ wa ũtugi wa Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno ndarĩ hingo akeenyenyeka. 
Psalms21:8 Guoko gwaku nĩgũkaanyiita thũ ciaku ciothe; guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo nĩgũgaakumbata arĩa oothe magũthũire. 
Psalms21:9 Rĩrĩa ũkaamoimĩrĩra-rĩ, ũkaamaniina mahaane o ta macinĩĩtwo na mwaki mũnene. Nĩkũmeria ũkaamameria nĩ ũrĩa ũmaraakarĩire MWATHANI naguo mwaki ũmaniine." 
Psalms21:10 Nĩũkaaniina ciana ciao ciothe ciehere gũũkũ thĩ; mbeũ yao ĩthire biũ thĩinĩ wa andũ. 
Psalms21:11 O na mangĩbanga ũrĩa megũgwĩka ũũru, matingĩgĩa na ũhootani mĩbangoinĩ ĩyo yao ya ungumania." 
Psalms21:12 Nĩ gũkorwo wee nĩũkaamaratha na mĩguĩ yaku, o nginya mahũndũke moore." 
Psalms21:13 Nĩtũgũgũkumia, MWATHANI, nĩ ũndũ wa hinya waku mũnene, o na tũine na tũgaathe ũhoti waku." 
Psalms22:1 Ngai wakwa, Ngai wakwa, ũndiganĩirie nĩkĩ? Ũndaihĩrĩirie nĩkĩ, ũkaaga kũndeithia o na ũkaaga kũigua mũcaayo wakwa?" 
Psalms22:2 Ngũkayagĩra mũthenya, Ngai wakwa, na ndũngĩnjĩtĩka; ũtukũ ngayaga, na ndingĩona wa kũndeithia." 
Psalms22:3 No rĩĩrĩ, wee ũtũire ũikarĩire gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene, o wee ũgoocagwo nĩ Isiraeli, wĩ mũtheru." 
Psalms22:4 Wee nĩ we maithe maitũ meehokaga; maakwĩhokire, nawe ũkĩmahonokia." 
Psalms22:5 Nĩ we maakayagĩra, nawe ũkĩmathara kuuma moogwatiinĩ; no we meehokaga, nawe ndũigana kũmaconorithia." 
Psalms22:6 No niĩ ndĩ o kĩgunyũ, no ti mũndũ; gũtirĩ mũndũ ũtanyararĩĩte o na agathũũra." 
Psalms22:7 Arĩa oothe manyonaga no gũũthekerera mathekagĩrĩra, makanyonia nĩmĩ ciao na makainainia mĩtwe yao" 
Psalms22:8 makoiga atĩrĩ, “Githĩ wee ndwĩhokeete MWATHANI? Arakĩaga gũkũhonokia nĩkĩ? Angĩkorwo MWATHANI nĩakenagio nĩ we-rĩ, arakĩaga gũgũteithia nĩkĩ?”" 
Psalms22:9 No rĩĩrĩ, wee nĩ we watũmire njiarwo; nĩ we wamenyagĩrĩra wega o na itatigĩĩte kuonga." 
Psalms22:10 Ndũire menyereirwo nĩ we kuuma mũthenya ũrĩa ndaciarirwo; kuuma rĩrĩa ndoimire nda ya maitũ wee ũtũire ũrĩ Ngai wakwa. 
Psalms22:11 Ndũkandaihĩrĩrie MWATHANI, tondũ mĩnyamaaro ĩ hakuhĩ, na ndirĩ na wa kũndeithia." 
Psalms22:12 Thiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ thũ nyingĩ ihaana ndeegwa; gũtirĩ mwena o na ũmwe thũ icio itariĩ ta ndeegwa iria irĩ ũrũme mũno cia bũrũri wa Bashani itarĩ. 
Psalms22:13 Injathamĩirie tũnua twacio o ta mĩrũũthi, ĩrararama ĩgĩtembũrangaga." 
Psalms22:14 Hinya wakwa ũthirĩĩte o ta ũrĩa maaĩ maitĩĩtwo handũ hoomũ maniaraga na ihenya, namo mahĩndĩ maakwa moothe nĩmarekanĩĩtie.Ngoro yakwa ĩringũkĩĩte o ta maguta maringithĩĩtio mwaki." 
Psalms22:15 Mũmero wakwa ũng'arĩĩte o ta rũgĩo rũhiũ, naruo rũrĩmĩ rwakwa rũkanyiitana na thĩa ciakwa; ũngomeetie rũkũngũinĩ o ta kĩimba." 
Psalms22:16 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩndigicĩirio nĩ mbũtũ ya andũ ooru; marooka na kũrĩ niĩ o ta magui mahũũtu, na nĩmatheecangĩĩte mooko o na magũrũ." 
Psalms22:17 Mahĩndĩ maakwa moothe nĩmaroneka, nacio thũ ciakwa no kwĩĩndorera iraĩndorera ingũũrĩire maitho." 
Psalms22:18 Nĩkũgayana iragayana nguo ciakwa, nayo kanjũ yakwa nĩkũmĩcuukĩra iramĩcuukĩra mĩtĩ." 
Psalms22:19 No rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI, ndũgaikare haraaya na niĩ! Ũka na ihenya ũndeithũre, amu wee nĩ we ũteithio wakwa!" 
Psalms22:20 Honokia harĩ rũhiũ rwa njora; honokia muoyo wakwa harĩ magui maya! 
Psalms22:21 Honokia kuuma tũnuainĩ twa mĩrũũthi ĩno; honokia kuuma harĩ hĩa cia mbogo. 
Psalms22:22 Nĩngũganĩra andũ aitũ ngumo ya rĩĩtwa rĩaku, na ngũkumie ndĩ o gatagatĩinĩ ga kĩũngano kĩao." 
Psalms22:23 Inyuĩ mũtĩĩĩte MWATHANI, mũkumiei! Mũgooceei, inyuothe njiarwa cia Jakubu!Inyuĩ andũ a Isiraeli, mũthaathaiyei!" 
Psalms22:24 Tondũ ndatiganĩirie ũrĩa ũnyamaarĩĩtio, o na kana akaaga kũmũrũmbũiya mĩnyamaaroinĩ yake. ndamũhithĩire ũthiũ wake nĩaiguĩte akĩmũkaĩra amũteithie." 
Psalms22:25 Nĩ we ũheete hinya wa gũgũkumia ndĩ kĩũnganoinĩ kĩnene nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa wĩkĩĩte; ngũhingia mĩhĩtwa yakwa ĩrĩa ndeeranĩire ndĩ o mbere ya arĩa magũtĩĩĩte. 
Psalms22:26 Andũ arĩa anyamaarie nĩmarĩe nginya mahũũne; arĩa mamaathaga MWATHANI nĩmamũkumie.Marotũũra magaacĩire nginya tene na tene! 
Psalms22:27 Mĩhĩrĩga yothe ya ndũũrĩrĩ cia thĩ nĩgaathaathaiya MWATHANI; ĩkaamũririkana na ĩmũcookerere harĩa hoothe yarũma gũũkũ thĩ. 
Psalms22:28 Nĩ ũndũ MWATHANI nĩ we mũthamaki, ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe nĩ we ũcithamakagĩra." 
Psalms22:29 Andũ oothe arĩa etĩĩi nĩmakaamũinamĩrĩra; arĩa oothe makuaga magathikwo no nginya magaaturia ndu mbere yake. 
Psalms22:30 Njiarwa cia thuuthainĩ nĩikaamũtungatĩra; andũ nĩmakaaheaga rũciaro rũrĩa rũgooka thuutha ũhoro wa MWATHANI 
Psalms22:31 o na mahunjagĩrie andũ arĩa magaaciarwo mameerage atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI nĩahonokirie andũ aake.”" 
Psalms23:1 MWATHANI nĩ we mũrĩithi wakwa, ndirĩ kĩndũ ingĩaga." 
Psalms23:2 Anjarahagia kũndũ kũrĩa kwĩ nyeki nduru, na akandwaraga ngurumo cia maaĩ marĩa mahehu wega." 
Psalms23:3 Aheaga ngoro yakwa hinya mwerũ, akandongoria na njĩra cia ũthingu o ta ũrĩa eeranĩire." 
Psalms23:4 O na ingĩtuĩka ndĩrahungura mũkuru wĩ nduma ndumanu mũno, ndirĩ ũgwati ingĩtigĩra, nĩ gũkorwo wĩ hamwe na niĩ; thiarĩ waku na mũthĩĩgi nĩcio imenyagĩrĩra." 
Psalms23:5 Ũthondekeire iruga thũ ciakwa ciothe ikĩonaga, ũkanyamũkĩra gwaku na gĩtĩĩo kĩnene mũno,na ũkaiyũria gĩkombe gĩakwa o bebe." 
Psalms23:6 Wendo na ũtugi nocio igũtũũra irũmanagĩrĩra na niĩ matukũ moothe ma muoyo wakwa, na ngũtũũra nyũmba ya MWATHANI matukũ moothe marĩa ngũtũũra muoyo." 
Psalms24:1 MWATHANI nĩ we mwene thĩ na kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩ thĩinĩ wayo; mabũrũri moothe nĩ maake, o na arĩa oothe matũũraga thĩinĩ wamo." 
Psalms24:2 Tondũ nĩ we wakire mũthingi wayo ndiainĩ ndiku, na akĩmĩhanda wega, igũrũ wa maaĩ marĩa marĩ na thĩ." 
Psalms24:3 Nũũ ũngĩambata kĩrĩma kĩa MWATHANI? Nũũ ũngĩrũũgama harĩa haake haamũre? 
Psalms24:4 Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mũtheru ngoro o na ciĩkoinĩ ciake; ũrĩa ũtathaathayagia mĩhianano, na ndeeranagĩra maũndũ ma maheeni." 
Psalms24:5 Mũndũ ta ũcio nĩarĩraathimagwo nĩ MWATHANI, na oonagwo arĩ mũthingu nĩ Ngai." 
Psalms24:6 Andũ a mũthemba ũcio nĩ o mamaathaga Ngai, nĩ o mookaga harĩ Ngai wa Jakubu." 
Psalms24:7 Inyuĩ ihingo ici hingũkaai! Inyuĩ mĩrango ĩno ya tene hingũkaai, nĩguo Mũthamaki wa riiri atoonye thĩinĩ!" 
Psalms24:8 Mũthamaki ũcio wa riiri nĩ we ũ? Nĩ MWATHANI ũrĩa ũrĩ hinya na nĩ njamba; nĩ MWATHANI ũrĩa njamba ya ita. 
Psalms24:9 Inyuĩ ihingo ici hingũkaai! Inyuĩ mĩrango ĩno ya tene hingũkaai nĩguo Mũthamaki wa riiri atoonye thĩinĩ! 
Psalms24:10 Mũthamaki ũcio wa riiri nĩ we ũ? MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩ we Mũthamaki ũcio wa riiri. 
Psalms25:1 MWATHANI, ngoro yakwa ndĩmĩroreetie na igũrũ kũrĩ we." 
Psalms25:2 Wee, Ngai wakwa, nĩ we ndĩhokeete, ndũkaareke njonorwo; ndagũthaitha ndũgeetĩkĩre thũ ciakwa ikenererũke nĩ ũndũ wa kũũndooria." 
Psalms25:3 Arĩa oothe maikaraga makwĩhokeete maticonorithagio; arĩa makũremagĩra nĩ o maconorithagia. 
Psalms25:4 MWATHANI, menyithia njĩra ciaku; nduta nĩguo ndĩcimenye." 
Psalms25:5 Ndongoragia na ũhoro waku wa ma, na ũndutage, tondũ wee nĩ we Ngai wakwa ũrĩa ũhonokagia; wee nĩ we njikaraga ndĩhokeete hingo ciothe." 
Psalms25:6 Ririkana, MWATHANI, tha ciaku o na ũtugi waku, iria ũtũire wonanagia kuuma tene." 
Psalms25:7 Njohera meehia o na mahĩtia ma wĩthĩ wakwa, ndirikana, MWATHANI, kũringana na ũtugi o na wega waku." 
Psalms25:8 MWATHANI nĩ mũrũngĩrĩru, na nĩ mwega; tondũ ũcio-rĩ, nĩonagĩrĩria eehia njĩra iria nũngĩrĩru." 
Psalms25:9 Atongoragia andũ arĩa menyiihagia na njĩra ya kĩhooto, na akamarutaga ũrĩa we eendeete." 
Psalms25:10 Arĩa oothe mamenyagĩrĩra kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI na mathĩkagĩra maathani maake amatongoragia na njĩra cia wendo na wĩhokeku. 
Psalms25:11 MWATHANI, o ta ũrĩa wĩranĩire-rĩ, njohera meehia maakwa, nĩ ũndũ nĩ maingĩ." 
Psalms25:12 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũtĩĩĩte MWATHANI ũcio nĩ we arĩonagĩrĩria njĩra ĩrĩa aagĩrĩirwo nĩkũgerera. 
Psalms25:13 We mwene egũtũũra oonaga maũndũ meega, nacio ciana ciake nĩikeegwatĩra bũrũri." 
Psalms25:14 Arĩa mathĩkagĩra MWATHANI nĩ o atumaga ndũgũ nao, na akamamenyithagia kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa arĩĩkanĩrĩĩte nao." 
Psalms25:15 Maitho maakwa maikaraga hingo ciothe macũũthĩrĩirie MWATHANI, tondũ no we ũngĩthara kuuma ũgwatiinĩ." 
Psalms25:16 Hũgũkĩra, MWATHANI, na ũringwo nĩ tha nĩ gũkorwo ndĩ na ihooru, o na ndĩmũnyamaarĩku." 
Psalms25:17 Hooreria ngoro yakwa, na ũndute mathĩĩnainĩ maakwa moothe." 
Psalms25:18 Rora mĩnyamaaro yakwa o na mathĩĩna maakwa na ũnjohere meehia maakwa moothe. 
Psalms25:19 Rora thũ ciakwa, wone ũrĩa ciigana; tarora ũrĩa ithũire!" 
Psalms25:20 Menyerera o na ũhonokie; ndũgeetĩkĩre njonorwo tondũ nĩharĩ we ndĩgitĩĩtie. 
Psalms25:21 Wega o na wĩhokeku irongitagĩra, tondũ wee, MWATHANI, nĩ we ndĩhokeete." 
Psalms25:22 Ngai, gĩkũũre andũ aaku a Isiraeli kuuma mathĩĩnainĩ maao moothe." 
Psalms26:1 MWATHANI, tiirĩrĩra kĩhooto gĩakwa, nĩ ũndũ mĩthiĩre yakwa nĩ mĩkindĩrĩku, na ndũire ngwĩhokeete itegũthangania." 
Psalms26:2 Thuuthuuria, MWATHANI, o na ũngerie; tuĩria ngoro yakwa, o na meciiria maakwa." 
Psalms26:3 Ũtugi waku nĩguo ũndongoragia, na njikaraga ndĩ mwĩhokeku harĩ we." 
Psalms26:4 Ndiikaranagia na andũ a maheeni, o na kana ngagwatanĩra na andũ arĩa marĩ ũhinga." 
Psalms26:5 Nĩthũire thiritũ ya arĩa meekaga ũũru, na nĩndĩtheemaga andũ arĩa aaganu." 
Psalms26:6 Ngwĩthamba mooko maakwa nyonanie atĩ ndirĩ mahĩtia njĩkĩĩte, ngĩthiũrũrũke kĩgongoona gĩaku, MWATHANI," 
Psalms26:7 ngĩinaga nyanĩrĩire rwĩmbo rwa gũcookia ngaatho, na ngĩganaga ciĩko ciaku ciothe cia magegania." 
Psalms26:8 MWATHANI, nĩnyendeete nyũmba yaku ĩrĩa ũikaraga, o handũ harĩa riiri waku ũikaraga." 
Psalms26:9 Ndũkahaatanĩrie na eehia, kana ũndeanĩrie hamwe na arĩa meendeete gũita thakame," 
Psalms26:10 arĩa mooko maao maikaraga magĩĩkaga maũndũ mooru, na maamũkagĩra mahaki hingo ciothe." 
Psalms26:11 No niĩ njĩkaga o maũndũ marĩa meega; kĩnjiguĩre tha, na ũngũũre." 
Psalms26:12 Rĩu ndirĩ ũgwati o na ũrĩkũ ingĩtigĩra; ngũkĩgooca MWATHANI ndĩ o kĩũnganoinĩ kĩa andũ aake. 
Psalms27:1 MWATHANI nĩ we ũtheri wakwa, o na ũhonokio wakwa; ndirĩ hingo ngetigĩra.MWATHANI nĩ we ũmenyagĩrĩra moogwatiinĩ moothe; ndirĩ hingo ngetigĩra." 
Psalms27:2 Rĩrĩa andũ ooru manjũkĩrĩra makĩenda kũnjũraga, o acio mang'eng'anaga na niĩ na marĩ ũthũ na niĩ matindirũkaga makagũa." 
Psalms27:3 O na ingĩrigiicĩrio nĩ mbũtũ nene ya ita, ngoro yakwa ndĩngĩigua guoya; o na thũ ingĩtharĩkĩra, o narĩo ndingĩũrwo nĩ hinya." 
Psalms27:4 Ndĩ o ũndũ ũmwe njũũrĩĩtie MWATHANI, na noguo wiki ndĩrĩcaragia; naguo nĩndũũre nyũmbainĩ ya MWATHANI matukũ moothe ma muoyo wakwa, ndĩroragĩre wega wake, na hooyage kĩrĩra gĩake kuo." 
Psalms27:5 Tondũ nĩarĩngitagĩra hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna; Hekaarũinĩ yake nĩkuo arĩhithaga, na andũũgamagie wega igũrũ wa ndũmba ya ihiga kũrĩa gũtarĩ na ũgwati." 
Psalms27:6 Rĩu nĩndooreetie thũ ciakwa iria ithiũrũrũkĩirie; nĩngũruta magongoona Hekaarũinĩ ya MWATHANI ngĩrũũhagia na ndĩmũinĩre rwĩmbo rwa kũmũgooca. 
Psalms27:7 Thikagĩrĩria, MWATHANI, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndagũkaĩra; nginyagĩria wega waku na ũnjĩtĩkage." 
Psalms27:8 Rĩrĩa woigire atĩrĩ, “Ũka ũthaathaiye,” ndaagũcookeirie atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũũka, MWATHANI." 
Psalms27:9 Tiga kũhitha ũthiũ waku!”Tiga kũhũndũra ndungata yaku ũrĩ na maraakara, wee ũtũire ũũndeithagia,Ndũkandeanĩrie, kana ũndiganĩrie, wee Ngai, Mũhonokia wakwa." 
Psalms27:10 O na baaba na maitũ mangĩndiganĩria, wee MWATHANI, no ũrĩmenyagĩrĩra." 
Psalms27:11 Nyonagĩrĩria, njĩra yaku, MWATHANI, na ũngeragĩrie njĩra ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ na ũgwati, tondũ thũ ciakwa nĩ nyingĩ." 
Psalms27:12 Ndũkaaneane kũrĩ thũ ciakwa iria iranjigĩrĩra igeenyo, ikĩendaga o kũnjĩka ũũru." 
Psalms27:13 Nĩnjĩtĩkĩĩtie atĩ nĩngoona wega wa MWATHANI ndĩ o muoyoinĩ ũyũ. 
Psalms27:14 Eterera o MWATHANI! gĩa na hinya, na ndũgakue ngoro; ĩĩ, eterera o MWATHANI." 
Psalms28:1 MWATHANI, o wee mũngitĩri, nĩndagũkaĩra.Ndũkarege gũũthikĩrĩria, nĩ ũndũ waga kũnjĩtĩka, ngũhaana ta arĩa maikũrũkaga kwa arĩa akuũ." 
Psalms28:2 Igua mathaithana maakwa, ngĩgũkaĩra ũndeithie, nyambararĩĩtie mooko maakwa ndĩmeerekeirie kũu Hekaarũ yaku theru." 
Psalms28:3 Ndũkaherithanĩrie na andũ imaramari, arĩa meekaga ciĩko njũru makĩaragia ndeto cia thaayũ na andũ arĩa angĩ, o rĩrĩa ngoroinĩ ciao marĩ na ũũru." 
Psalms28:4 Maherithie nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa meekĩĩte, o na nĩ ũndũ wa ũũru wa ciĩko ciao; maherithie nĩ ũndũ wa wĩra wa mooko maao; mahe kĩrĩa kĩmaagĩrĩire." 
Psalms28:5 O-rĩ, matitindanagĩrĩra na ũrĩa MWATHANI eekĩĩte, o na kana kĩrĩa athondekeete.Tondũ ũcio nĩkũmoinanga akaamoinanga, na ndagaacooka kũmaaka rĩngĩ." 
Psalms28:6 MWATHANI arogoocwo, nĩ ũndũ nĩaiguĩte mathaithana maakwa." 
Psalms28:7 MWATHANI nĩ we ũmenyagĩrĩra na akangitĩra, na no we ngoro yakwa ĩhokeete.Nĩandeithĩĩtie na ngoro yakwa nĩkeneete; nĩngũmũinĩra rwĩmbo rwa kũmũcookeria ngaatho." 
Psalms28:8 MWATHANI nĩ we ũmenyagĩrĩra andũ aake, nĩagitagĩra o na akahonokia mũthamaki wake ũrĩa aitĩrĩirie maguta." 
Psalms28:9 Honokia andũ aaku, MWATHANI, na ũraathime arĩa marĩ aaku; tuĩka mũrĩithi wao, na ũmamenyagĩrĩre tene na tene." 
Psalms29:1 Goocaai MWATHANI, inyuĩ ciũmbe cia igũrũ; goocaai riiri wake o na hinya wake." 
Psalms29:2 Goocaai riiri wa rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI; thaathayai MWATHANI mwĩhumbĩĩte nguo cia ũtheru. 
Psalms29:3 Mũgambo wa MWATHANI ũragamba na kũu iriainĩ; Ngai ũrĩa ũrĩ riiri nĩararuruma, mũgambo wa MWATHANI ũragamba igũrũ rĩa iria rĩrĩa inene." 
Psalms29:4 Mũgambo wa MWATHANI wĩ hinya, mũgambo wa MWATHANI ũiyũire riiri." 
Psalms29:5 Mũgambo wa MWATHANI nĩunangaga mĩtarakwa, MWATHANI-rĩ, oinangaga mĩtarakwa ya Lebanoni." 
Psalms29:6 Atũmaga irĩma cia Lebanoni itũũhatũũhe ta tũcaũ, na agatũma kĩrĩma kĩa Herimoni kĩrũũgarũũge o ta gateegwa." 
Psalms29:7 Mũgambo wa MWATHANI ũhenũkagia nĩnĩmbĩ cia mwaki. 
Psalms29:8 Mũgambo wa MWATHANI nĩũthingithagia werũ, MWATHANI nĩatũmaga werũ wa Kadeshi ũthingithe." 
Psalms29:9 Mũgambo wa MWATHANI ũtũmaga mĩtĩ ya mĩgandi ĩthingĩthe, na ũgatũma mĩtitũ ĩhũrũrũke ĩgatigwo ũtheri; nao arĩa oothe marĩ hekaarũinĩ yake makaanĩrĩra makoiga atĩrĩ, “Ngai arogoocwo!”" 
Psalms29:10 MWATHANI-rĩ, nĩ we ũthamakagĩra ndĩa ĩrĩa ndiku; egũtũũra e mũthamaki nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms29:11 MWATHANI aroheaga andũ aake hinya, na amaraathimage maikarage na thaayũ!" 
Psalms30:1 Nĩngũkũgooca, MWATHANI, tondũ nĩũhonokeetie ũgakĩgiria thũ ciakwa ingenerere." 
Psalms30:2 MWATHANI Ngai wakwa, ndagũkaĩire ũndeithie, nawe ũkĩhonia." 
Psalms30:3 MWATHANI, nĩwarutire muoyo wakwa kuuma kwa arĩa akuũ, o na ũkĩhonokia rĩrĩa ndeerekeire mbĩĩrĩrainĩ." 
Psalms30:4 Inĩraai MWATHANI nyĩmbo cia kũmũgooca, inyuothe andũ aake arĩa mũmwĩhokeete, na mũcookerie rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩtheru ngaatho" 
Psalms30:5 Tondũ maraakara maake no ma ihinda o iniini, no ũtugi wake ũikaranagia na mũndũ matukũ moothe ma muoyo wake.Mũndũ no araare akĩrĩra, no gwakĩa akene." 
Psalms30:6 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndagaacĩire ndoigire atĩrĩ, “Ndikeenyenyeka o na rĩ.”" 
Psalms30:7 MWATHANI, wega waku wamenyereire ngĩrũma o ta kĩrĩma, no ũgĩcooka ũkĩhitha ũthiũ waku, na niĩ ngĩkua ngoro." 
Psalms30:8 Ngĩgũkaĩra, wee MWATHANI, ngĩgũthaitha ũndeithie." 
Psalms30:9 “Gĩkuũ gĩakwa-rĩ, kĩngĩkorwo kĩrĩ na uumithio ũrĩkũ harĩ we? Uumithio wĩ ha ndarĩĩkia gũtoonya mbĩĩrĩrainĩ?Ndakua-rĩ, nĩngaahota gũkũgooca, o na kana kũgana ũrĩa wee wĩ mwĩhokeku?" 
Psalms30:10 Njigua, MWATHANI, na ũnginyĩrie wega waku! Ndeithia, MWATHANI!”" 
Psalms30:11 Nĩũtũmĩĩte gũcakaya gwakwa gũtuĩke gĩkeno, ũkanjehereria kĩeha ũkahumba ndũũruhĩ," 
Psalms30:12 nĩguo ngũgoocage itegũtigithĩria.MWATHANI, Ngai wakwa, ngũtũũra ngũcookagĩria ngaatho tene na tene." 
Psalms31:1 MWATHANI, nĩharĩ wee njũkĩĩte ũmenyerere ndũgeetĩkĩre o na atĩa njonorwo. Ndagũthaitha honokia, tondũ wĩ Ngai mũthingu." 
Psalms31:2 Thikĩrĩria na ũndeithie o narua! Tuĩka handũ haakwa ha gwĩtharĩra ũmenyagĩrĩre, handũ haakwa ha kwĩgitia ũhonokie." 
Psalms31:3 Nĩ gũkorwo wee nĩ we mũngitĩri, o na handũ haakwa haake na hinya ha gwĩtharĩra.Nyiita guoko ũndongorie, MWATHANI, o ta ũrĩa weranĩire." 
Psalms31:4 Nduta mũtegoinĩ ũrĩa nyambĩirwo, tondũ wee nĩ we ũngitagĩra ũgwatiinĩ." 
Psalms31:5 Ndaiga muoyo wakwa mookoinĩ maaku; nĩũkũngũũra, MWATHANI, tondũ wee wĩ Ngai mwĩhokeku." 
Psalms31:6 Nĩũthũire arĩa oothe mathaathayagia ngai cia mĩhianano; niĩ-rĩ, ndĩhokeete o MWATHANI." 
Psalms31:7 Nĩngũkena o na njanjamũke tondũ wa ũtugi waku, nĩ gũkorwo nĩwoneete mĩnyamaaro yakwa, mathĩĩna maakwa nĩũmooĩ." 
Psalms31:8 Ndũndekereirie mookoinĩ ma thũ ciakwa, no nĩkũũhe ũheete wĩyathi wa gũthiĩ o harĩa ingĩenda." 
Psalms31:9 Nginyĩria wega waku, MWATHANI, tondũ ndĩ mũthĩĩnĩku; maitho maakwa nĩmanogeetio nĩkũrĩra, ndirĩ na hinya o na haniini." 
Psalms31:10 Nĩndooreetio nĩ kĩeha, nayo mĩaka yakwa igakuhĩhio nĩgũcaaya; mathĩĩna marĩa ndĩ namo nĩ mo maniinĩĩte hinya, o namo mahĩndĩ maakwa nĩ mahinyaru." 
Psalms31:11 Nĩnyararĩĩtwo nĩ arĩa marĩ ũthũ na niĩ, na makĩria andũ arĩa tũrigainie nao.Arĩa manjũũĩ nĩmeĩndigĩrĩĩte; rĩrĩa manyona njĩrainĩ no kũũra mooraga." 
Psalms31:12 Meciiriainĩ ma andũ ndiganĩire o ta ũrĩa mũndũ ũrĩĩkĩĩtie gũkua ariganagĩra; haana o ta kĩndũ gĩteetwo mborerainĩ. 
Psalms31:13 Nĩndĩraigua thũ nyingĩ ikĩaria na mĩheehũ guoya ũgakĩnyuma na mĩena yothe.Irabangĩra mĩbango mĩũru, nĩguo injũkĩrĩre injũrage." 
Psalms31:14 No wee, MWATHANI, no we niĩ ndĩhokeete; wee nĩ we Ngai wakwa." 
Psalms31:15 Nĩ we ũmenyagĩrĩra hingo ciothe; honokia kuuma harĩ thũ ciakwa, o na kuuma harĩ arĩa maranyariira." 
Psalms31:16 Ũthiũ waku ũrotherera ndungata yaku; honokia tondũ wa ũtugi waku. 
Psalms31:17 Ndũgeetĩkĩre, MWATHANI, njonorwo, nĩ gũkorwo nĩ we ngaĩire.Reke arĩa ooru maconorwo arĩ o, reke maikũrũke kwa arĩa akuũ makirĩĩte ki." 
Psalms31:18 Tũnua tũrĩa twaragia maheeni tũrotumana, o tũu twĩtĩĩaga na tũkeyona tũkĩnyũrũragia andũ arĩa athingu." 
Psalms31:19 Ĩ wega waku ũrĩa ũigĩire arĩa magũtĩĩĩte ti mũingĩ! Andũ oothe nĩmooĩ ũrĩa wee ũtugaga arĩa ũmenyagĩrĩra. 
Psalms31:20 Ũmahithaga o harĩa wee ũrĩ, ũkamaraihanĩrĩria na andũ arĩa meendaga kũmeeka ũũru. Ũmaigaga handũ heega harĩa matangĩonana na haaro cia thũ ciao." 
Psalms31:21 Goocaai MWATHANI nĩ ũndũ nĩaranyonirie wendo wa magegania, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndĩraarĩ mũrigiicĩrie nĩ thũ." 
Psalms31:22 Nĩndĩramakĩĩte na ngambĩrĩria gwĩciiria atĩ nĩanyingatĩĩte akanjeheria maithoinĩ maake; no nĩaraiguire mathaithana maakwa, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndĩramũkaĩire andeithie." 
Psalms31:23 Endaai MWATHANI, inyuothe andũ aake ehokeku! Andũ arĩa ehokeku MWATHANI nĩamamenyagĩrĩra, no arĩa etĩĩi nĩkũmaherithia amaherithagia ta ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire." 
Psalms31:24 Gĩai na hinya, na mũũmĩrĩrie ngoro, inyuothe arĩa mwĩhokeete MWATHANI." 
Psalms32:1 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa woheirwo mahĩtia maake, o ũrĩa ũrekeirwo meehia maake." 
Psalms32:2 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa MWATHANI atangĩtua mwĩhia na ũrĩa ũtaheenanagia." 
Psalms32:3 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndaagire kuumbũra meehia maakwa-rĩ, nĩndahinyarire nĩ ũrĩa ndatindaga ngĩcaaya mũthenya wothe." 
Psalms32:4 Nĩ gũkorwo, MWATHANI nĩwaherithagia mũthenya o na ũtukũ; hinya wakwa ũgĩgĩthira o ta ũrĩa ime rĩthiraga hĩndĩ ya ũrugarĩ." 
Psalms32:5 Nĩrĩo ndakumbũrĩire meehia maakwa; ndiahithire mahĩtia maakwa.Ndatuire itua atĩ nĩngũkumbũrĩra meehia maakwa, MWATHANI, nawe ũkĩnjohera moothe." 
Psalms32:6 Tondũ ũcio, andũ arĩa makwĩhokeete nĩmaagĩrĩirwo nĩgũkũhooyaga rĩrĩa maritũhĩirwo nĩ maũndũ.Hingo ĩrĩa mathĩĩna mooka matariĩ ta mũiyũro wa maaĩ-rĩ, matirĩkinyagĩrĩrwo nĩmo." 
Psalms32:7 Wee nĩ we kĩĩhitho gĩakwa, nĩũrĩngitagĩra hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna; nĩngũkũinĩra nĩ ũndũ nĩũhonokeetie, o na ũkamenyerera wega." 
Psalms32:8 MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩndĩrĩkuonagĩrĩria njĩra ĩrĩa ũrĩgeraga; nĩndĩgũtaaraga na ngũmenyagĩrĩre." 
Psalms32:9 Ndũkahaane ta mbarathi kana nyũmbũ, iria itarĩ ũmenyo ũguo atĩ no mũhaka ciĩkĩrwo matamu na mĩrĩnga kanua nĩguo ciĩtĩkĩre gwathĩka.”" 
Psalms32:10 Andũ arĩa ooru matũnganaga na maũndũ maingĩ ma kũmaiguithia ruwo, no andũ arĩa mehokeete MWATHANI nĩamenyagĩrĩra na ũtugi wake." 
Psalms32:11 Inyuĩ arĩa athingu kenaai o na mũcanjamũke, nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ marĩa MWATHANI eekĩĩte; inyuothe mũmũathĩkagĩra, kũngũiyai nĩgũkena." 
Psalms33:1 Inyuothe arĩa athingu, kũngũiyai nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa MWATHANI eekĩĩte; mũgooceei inyuĩ arĩa mũmwathĩkagĩra." 
Psalms33:2 Goocaai MWATHANI na inanda mũinĩreei na ngita. 
Psalms33:3 Mũinĩreei rwĩmbo rũerũ hũũraai ngita na mũkũngũiye nĩgũkena. 
Psalms33:4 Tondũ ciugo cia MWATHANI nĩ cia ma, na wĩra wake wothe nĩwakwĩhokwo." 
Psalms33:5 MWATHANI eendeete ũthingu na kĩhooto; ũtugi wake ũiyũire thĩ o kũiyũra. 
Psalms33:6 Igũrũ rĩombirwo na kiugo kĩa MWATHANI nĩ we woigire igũrũ rĩgĩe, na riũa na mweri o ũndũ ũmwe na njata." 
Psalms33:7 Nĩ we wacookanĩrĩirie maaĩ ma maria marĩa manene handũ hamwe, namo ma kũrĩa kũriku mũno akĩmahingĩra thitoo." 
Psalms33:8 Thĩ yothe nĩthaathaiye MWATHANI, andũ oothe arĩa matũũraga gũũkũ thĩ nĩmamũtĩĩe." 
Psalms33:9 Nĩ ũndũ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aaririe, thĩ nĩrĩo yagĩire; aathana-rĩ, ĩkĩhanda wega." 
Psalms33:10 MWATHANI nĩ we ũtũmaga maũndũ marĩa ndũũrĩrĩ ibangĩĩte gwĩka matuĩke ma tũhũ; nĩ we ũthũũkanagia mĩbango ĩrĩa andũ mabangĩĩte. 
Psalms33:11 Ũndũ ũrĩa MWATHANI aciirĩire gwĩka-rĩ, ũtũũraga nginya tene na tene; mĩbango yake ĩkinyagĩrĩra njiarwa ciothe." 
Psalms33:12 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ rũũrĩrĩ rũrĩa MWATHANI arĩ we Ngai waruo, o andũ arĩa athuurĩĩte magatuĩka aake kĩũmbe." 
Psalms33:13 MWATHANI acũũthagĩrĩria arĩ o igũrũ, akoona andũ oothe." 
Psalms33:14 Acũũthagĩrĩria arĩa oothe matũũraga gũũkũ thĩ arĩ o gĩtĩinĩ gĩake kĩa ũthamaki. 
Psalms33:15 Nĩ we ũmahotithagia gwĩciiria na nĩoĩ ciĩko ciao ciothe. 
Psalms33:16 Mũthamaki-rĩ, ndahootanaga nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa e na thigari nyingĩ cia mbaara; o naake mũthigari ndagĩaga na ũhootani nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa arĩ na hinya mũingĩ." 
Psalms33:17 Mbarathi cia mbaara itirĩ ũhootani ingĩhe mũndũ, o na kana imũhonokie na hinya ũcio wacio mũnene." 
Psalms33:18 MWATHANI-rĩ, aikaraga acũũthĩrĩirie arĩa mamwathĩkagĩra, o acio maikaraga mehokeete ũtugi wake" 
Psalms33:19 nĩguo amahonokagie gĩkuũinĩ, na amaigage muoyo hĩndĩ ya ng'aragu." 
Psalms33:20 Tũkwĩhoka o MWATHANI, tondũ nĩ we mũtũteithia o na mũtũmenyereri." 
Psalms33:21 Ngoro ciitũ nĩikeneete nĩ ũndũ wake, tondũ nĩtwĩhokeete rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩtheru." 
Psalms33:22 Ũtugi waku, MWATHANI ũroikaranagia na ithuĩ, o ta ũrĩa ithuĩ tũkwĩhokeete wee." 
Psalms34:1 Nĩndĩcookagĩria MWATHANI ngaatho hĩndĩ ciothe; ngũtũũra ndĩmũgoocaga. 
Psalms34:2 Ngoro yakwa no gũkumia ĩrakumia MWATHANI; arĩa oothe ahinyĩrĩrie marĩiguaga ũguo magakena. 
Psalms34:3 Goocaai ũnene wa MWATHANI mwĩ hamwe na niĩ; rekeei tũtũũgĩrie rĩĩtwa rĩake tũrĩ hamwe! 
Psalms34:4 Ndahoire MWATHANI, naake akĩnjookeria, akĩniina guoya wothe ũrĩa ndaarĩ naguo." 
Psalms34:5 Andũ arĩa mahinyĩrĩirio mamũcũũthagĩrĩria magakena; gũtirĩ hingo maconorithagio. 
Psalms34:6 Ndakaĩire MWATHANI, naake akĩnjigua akĩnduta mathĩĩnainĩ maakwa moothe." 
Psalms34:7 Mũraika wa MWATHANI aikaraga arangĩire arĩa mathĩkagĩra MWATHANI, akamahonokagia kuuma ũgwatiinĩ." 
Psalms34:8 Camaai muone atĩ MWATHANI nĩ mwega! Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa wĩtharagĩra harĩ we!" 
Psalms34:9 Athĩkĩraai MWATHANI, inyuĩ andũ aake atheru; arĩa mamwathĩkagĩra matirĩ kĩndũ maagaga." 
Psalms34:10 Mĩrũũthi mĩĩthĩ nĩyagaga gĩa kũrĩa ĩkahũũta, no arĩa macaragia MWATHANI matirĩ kĩndũ kĩega maagaga." 
Psalms34:11 Ũkaai, ciana ciakwa, mũndegere matũ, na nĩngũmũruta gũtĩĩa MWATHANI." 
Psalms34:12 Nĩ ũrĩkũ wanyu ũngĩenda gũikara na gĩkeno na gũtũũra matukũ maingĩ oonaga maũndũ meega? 
Psalms34:13 Kĩmenyagĩrĩre rũrĩmĩ rwaku rũtikanoige ũũru, na kanua gaaku gatikanaarie maheeni." 
Psalms34:14 Ndũkaneeke ũũru, no ĩkaga wega; caragia thaayũ na ngoro yaku yothe." 
Psalms34:15 MWATHANI aikaraga acũũthĩrĩirie andũ arĩa athingu, na athikĩrĩirie kĩrĩro kĩao." 
Psalms34:16 No nĩareganaga na andũ arĩa meekaga ũũru, nĩguo marĩĩkia kuuma gũũkũ thĩ mariganĩre biũ." 
Psalms34:17 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ arĩa athingu makaĩra MWATHANI amateithie, nĩamaiguaga akamaruta mathĩĩnainĩ maao moothe." 
Psalms34:18 MWATHANI akoragwo hakuhĩ na arĩa makuĩte ngoro, na nĩahonokagia arĩa mwĩhoko wao ũthirĩĩte." 
Psalms34:19 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩatũnganaga na mathĩĩna maingĩ, no rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI nĩamũhonokagia kuuma harĩ mo moothe." 
Psalms34:20 Amũmenyagĩrĩra wega; hatirĩ ihĩndĩ o na rĩmwe rĩake rĩngiunwo. 
Psalms34:21 Andũ arĩa aaganu makooragwo nĩ ũũru; arĩa nao mathũire andũ arĩa athingu nĩmakaaherithio. 
Psalms34:22 MWATHANI nĩakũũraga mĩoyo ya ndungata ciake; arĩa mooragĩra harĩ we amamenyerere ndamaherithagia. 
Psalms35:1 MWATHANI, ng'eng'ana na arĩa marang'eng'ana na niĩ; rũa na arĩa mararũa na niĩ!" 
Psalms35:2 Oya ngo yaku na indo ciaku cia mbaara, ũũke ũndeithie!" 
Psalms35:3 Arĩa mahanyũkanĩĩtie na niĩ moere itimũ rĩaku o na ithanwa; ũkĩnjĩĩre atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũkũhonokia!”" 
Psalms35:4 Arĩa meendaga kũnduta muoyo maroconorwo na maagithio gĩtĩĩo.Arĩa mabangaga ũrĩa mekũnjũkĩrĩra manjĩke ũũru marohũndũrwo, na maturuure." 
Psalms35:5 Marotuĩka ta mahuti moombũrĩĩtwo nĩ rũhuuho nĩ ũrĩa maingatithĩĩtio nĩ mũraika wa MWATHANI. 
Psalms35:6 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũraika wa MWATHANI ahanyũkanĩĩtie nao-rĩ, njĩra yao ĩrogĩa nduma, na ĩrotendera!" 
Psalms35:7 Nĩ ũndũ manjigĩire mũtego na makanyenjera irima nĩguo manyiite o na itameekĩĩte ũũru o na atĩa. 
Psalms35:8 Marokorererwo nĩ mwanangĩko materĩgĩrĩire; maronyiitwo nĩ mũtego ũcio manjigĩire maanangĩke arĩ o! 
Psalms35:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngoro yakwa nĩgacanjamũka nĩ ũndũ wa MWATHANI; nĩngaakena nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa ahonokeetie. 
Psalms35:10 Nĩngeera MWATHANI na ngoro yakwa yothe atĩrĩ, “Gũtirĩ ũhaana ta we.Wee-rĩ, nĩ we ũmenyagĩrĩra arĩa matarĩ na hinya kuuma harĩ arĩa marĩ na hinya kũmakĩra, na ũkagitĩra arĩa athĩĩni kuuma harĩ arĩa maramahinyĩrĩria.”" 
Psalms35:11 Aira me na muorooto wa kũndoonyia ũgwatiinĩ marookĩra, makanjũũria ciũria igũrũ rĩa maũndũ itooĩ." 
Psalms35:12 Marandĩha wega na ũũru, na niĩ ngakĩũrwo nĩ hinya." 
Psalms35:13 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maarĩ arũaru-rĩ, ndathiaga ndĩhumbĩĩte nguo ya ikũnia, na ngehingaga kũrĩa irio. Ndahooyaga ndĩthunanĩire nĩ ũndũ wa ihooru," 
Psalms35:14 ta arĩ mũraata wakwa kana mũrũ wa maitũ ũratũma ndĩthikĩre.Ndathiaga ndĩthikĩire o ta mũndũ ũracakaĩra nyina. 
Psalms35:15 No niĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndarĩ mathĩĩnainĩ, o nĩgũkena maakenire, na makĩndigiicĩria nĩguo manyũrũrie;andũ itooĩ na kũrĩa moimĩĩte magĩthekerera mategũtigithĩria." 
Psalms35:16 Magĩgĩkĩrĩrĩria kũnyũrũria makĩmenagĩrĩria na makĩndoraga manyiira. 
Psalms35:17 Nĩ ihinda rĩigana atĩa hiihi, MWATHANI, ũgũikara o wĩroreire?Honokia kuuma kũrĩ arĩa maranyariira; ndeithũra kuuma mookoinĩ ma mĩrũũthi ĩno!" 
Psalms35:18 Na niĩ nĩndĩrĩgũcookagĩria ngaatho ndĩ kĩũnganoinĩ kĩa andũ aaku; ngũgoocage ndĩ mbere yao oothe. 
Psalms35:19 Ndũkaareke arĩa manduĩte thũ yao o rĩrĩa itarĩ makenerere kũhootwo gwakwa; arĩa mathũire o na hatarĩ na ũũru ndĩmeekĩĩte ndũkaareke maroranage makiunanagĩra maitho nĩgũkenio nĩ ũrĩa ndĩranyariirĩka. 
Psalms35:20 Nĩ gũkorwo o maaragia o maũndũ ma haaro, na makaigagĩrĩra andũ arĩa meendeete thaayũ igeenyo iria mathugundĩĩte na meciiria maao." 
Psalms35:21 Manjathamagĩria tũnua twao makaanĩrĩra makoiga atĩrĩ, “Ha ha, ha, ha! Nĩtũroonire ũrĩa ũreekire!”" 
Psalms35:22 No wee, MWATHANI, ũndũ ũcio nĩũwĩyoneire na maitho maaku; tondũ ũcio ndũgaakire! Tiga gũikara kũraaya na niĩ, MWATHANI!" 
Psalms35:23 Arahũka, MWATHANI, ũngitĩre; rũũgama na igũrũ, Ngai wakwa, ũrũĩrĩre kĩhooto gĩakwa!" 
Psalms35:24 MWATHANI Ngai wakwa, tondũ wĩ mũthingu, onania ũrĩa itarĩ na mahĩtia; ndũkaareke thekererwo nĩ thũ ciakwa!" 
Psalms35:25 Ndũkaareke ciĩĩre na ngoro atĩrĩ, “Nĩtweka ũrĩa tũkwendaga! Nĩtwamũniina!”" 
Psalms35:26 Reke arĩa makenaga nĩkuona ngĩnyariirĩka maconoke na maturuure; arĩa meyonaga ta marĩ eega kũngĩra marohumbwo nĩ gĩconoko na manyararwo! 
Psalms35:27 Reke arĩa marenda kuona kĩhooto gĩakwa kĩgitĩirwo maanĩrĩre makeneete na moige mategũtigithĩria atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI nĩ mũnene! Nĩakeneetio nĩ ũgaacĩru wa ndungata yake!”" 
Psalms35:28 Na niĩ nĩndĩrĩheanaga ũrĩa wee wĩ mũthingu na ngũgoocage mũthenya wothe. 
Psalms36:1 Andũ arĩa ooru matitĩĩaga Ngai meciiragia o ũhoro wa meehia. 
Psalms36:2 Nĩ gũkorwo meheenagia makeĩĩra atĩ Ngai ndangĩmenya meehia marĩa meekĩĩte na amaherithie nĩ ũndũ wamo. 
Psalms36:3 Kanua kaao kaaragia o maũndũ mooru na ma maheeni; matiĩkaga maũndũ ma ũũgĩ na meega. 
Psalms36:4 Mathugundaga mĩbango mĩũru makomeete itandainĩ ciao; njĩra ĩrĩa mageragĩra ĩmeerekagĩria o maũndũinĩ mooru; na gũtirĩ hĩndĩ mathũũraga ũndũ o wothe mũũru. 
Psalms36:5 Ũtugi waku, MWATHANI, ũkinyĩĩte o igũrũ, naguo wĩhokeku waku ũgakinya o matuinĩ." 
Psalms36:6 Ũthingu waku ũraihĩĩte na igũrũ o ta irĩma, namo matua maaku ma ciira makarikĩra o ta kũndũ kũrĩa kũriku mũno kwa iria.Nĩ we, MWATHANI, ũmenyagĩrĩra andũ o ũndũ ũmwe na nyamũ." 
Psalms36:7 Ĩ ũtugi waku, Ngai, ndũkĩrĩ mũnene! Andũ ũmamenyagĩrĩra rungu rwa mathagu maaku." 
Psalms36:8 Nao makarĩa makahũũna wega nyũmbainĩ yaku, ũgacooka ũkamahe gĩa kũnyua kuuma rũũĩinĩ rwaku rwa ikeno." 
Psalms36:9 Wee-rĩ, nĩ we gĩthima kĩa muoyo, na tũmũrĩkagĩrwo nĩ ũtheri waku." 
Psalms36:10 Kĩrĩrĩria gũkinyĩria arĩa makũũĩ wendo waku, o na ũkĩrĩrĩrie gwĩka wega arĩa atheru ngoro!" 
Psalms36:11 Ndũkaareke nginyangĩrĩrio thĩ nĩ andũ arĩa marĩ mwĩtĩĩo, o na kana ũreke nyingatithio nĩ andũ arĩa meekaga ũũru." 
Psalms36:12 Taone ũrĩa andũ arĩa ooru magũĩte! Maikanĩĩtio thĩ, na matingĩhota kwĩyũkĩria!" 
Psalms37:1 Ndũgatangĩkage ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa andũ arĩa meekaga ũũru, o na kana ũiguage ũiru nĩ ũndũ wa andũ arĩa maikaraga makĩhĩtagia." 
Psalms37:2 Amu megũthira narua ta ũrĩa nyeki yũmaga, na makue na ihenya o ta ũrĩa ria rĩhoohaga rĩarĩĩkia kũmunywo." 
Psalms37:3 Wĩhokage o MWATHANI, na wĩkage wega, nĩguo ũikarage bũrũriinĩ ũrĩ na thaayũ." 
Psalms37:4 Ikaraga ũgĩĩkaga maũndũ marĩa makenagia Ngai, naake nĩarĩkũhingagĩria ũrĩa ngoro yaku ĩriragĩria." 
Psalms37:5 Rekagĩrĩria MWATHANI maũndũ maaku moothe, mwĩhokage, naake nĩarĩgũteithagia." 
Psalms37:6 Nĩarĩtũmaga ũthingu waku ũkengage ta ũtheri wa mũthenya, na kĩhooto gĩaku gĩkengage ta ũtheri wa riũa rĩa thaa thita." 
Psalms37:7 Ikaraga mbere ya MWATHANI ũhooreire, na ũtegũtheethũka; ndũgatangĩkage ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa andũ arĩa magaacagĩra maũndũinĩ maao o na kana nĩ ũndũ wa ũhootani wa arĩa mathugundaga mĩbango mĩũru." 
Psalms37:8 Wĩgiragĩrĩrie kũraakara, na kũng'ũrĩka; ndũgatangĩkage ngoro tondũ no gũtũme wĩke ũũru." 
Psalms37:9 Arĩa meekaga ũũru nĩmakaaniinwo, no arĩa mehokeete MWATHANI nĩmakaagaya thĩ." 
Psalms37:10 No ihinda iniini rĩtigarĩĩte andũ arĩa ooru maniinwo; ũrĩmacaria ciikaroinĩ ciao, na ndũmoone." 
Psalms37:11 No rĩĩrĩ, andũ arĩa menyiihagia nĩ o makaagaya thĩ, na maikarage makeneete nĩ ũndũ wa kũgĩa na ũgaacĩru o na thaayũ." 
Psalms37:12 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru abangagĩra mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu mĩbango mĩũru, na akamũroraga manyiira." 
Psalms37:13 No rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI nĩgũthekerera athekagĩrĩra mũndũ ũcio mũũru nĩ ũndũ nĩoĩ atĩ mũthenya wake wa kũniinwo wĩ hakuhĩ." 
Psalms37:14 Andũ arĩa ooru macomoreete hiũ ciao cia njora, na makageeta moota maao, nĩguo maniine arĩa athĩĩni na arĩa mekwenda ũteithio, o na moorage arĩa meekaga wega." 
Psalms37:15 No rĩĩrĩ, hiũ icio ciao cia njora nocio marĩũragwo nacio, namo moota maao moinangwo." 
Psalms37:16 Indo niini iria mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu akoragwo nacio nĩ njega gũkĩra ũtonga wothe wa andũ arĩa ooru. 
Psalms37:17 Tondũ hinya wa arĩa ooru nĩũkaaniinwo nĩ MWATHANI, no andũ arĩa athingu nĩamamenyagĩrĩra." 
Psalms37:18 MWATHANI nĩarũmbũyagia andũ arĩa mamwathĩkagĩra, na igai rĩao rĩgũtũũra nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms37:19 Mationaga ũũru hingo ya mathĩĩna; makoragwo na irio cia kũigana hingo ĩrĩa kũrĩ na ng'aragu. 
Psalms37:20 No andũ arĩa ooru nĩgũthira magaathira; thũ cia MWATHANI igaathira o ta ũrĩa ũthaka wa mahũa ũthiraga; igaathirĩrĩkĩra o ta ũrĩa ndoogo ithirĩrĩkagĩra. 
Psalms37:21 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru akombaga kĩndũ na ndarĩhaga, no mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu aheanaga na ũtaana." 
Psalms37:22 Arĩa maraathimĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI nĩ o makaagaya thĩ, no arĩa arumĩĩte nĩkũniinwo makaaniinwo." 
Psalms37:23 MWATHANI nĩ we wonagĩrĩria mũndũ njĩra ĩrĩa aagĩrĩirwo nĩkũgera; mũndũ ũrĩa ũthiaga na mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa ĩmũkenagia nĩamũmenyagĩrĩra wega. 
Psalms37:24 O na angĩtindirũka ndangĩgũa, tondũ MWATHANI nĩakoragwo amũnyiitĩĩte guoko." 
Psalms37:25 Kuuma rĩrĩa ndarĩ mũnyiinyi nginyagia rĩu ndĩ mũkũrũ, ndirĩ ndoona mũndũ mũthingu atiganĩirio nĩ MWATHANI kana ciana ciake ikĩhooya irio." 
Psalms37:26 Hingo ciothe aheanaga ategũthuurania na agakombagĩra andũ arĩa angĩ; ciana ciake nĩ kĩraathimo harĩ we. 
Psalms37:27 Tigaga gwĩka ũũru, ĩkaga wega na nĩũgũtũũra tene na tene." 
Psalms37:28 Tondũ MWATHANI eendeete o kĩhooto, na ndatiganagĩria andũ aake arĩa ehokeku.Andũ arĩa athingu megũtũũra mamenyereirwo nginya tene na tene, no arĩa meekaga maũndũ mooru nĩkũniinwo makaaniinwo." 
Psalms37:29 Arĩa athingu nĩ o makaagaya thĩ, na mamĩtũũre nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms37:30 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu aaragia o ndeto cia ũũgĩ, na akarũũgamagĩrĩra maũndũ ma kĩhooto." 
Psalms37:31 Ngoro yake ĩikaraga ĩrũmĩĩtie o watho wa Ngai wake, na ndĩrĩ hĩndĩ ĩtiganaga naguo." 
Psalms37:32 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru aikaraga ooheirie mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩguo amũũrage," 
Psalms37:33 no MWATHANI ndangĩmũrekereria mookoinĩ ma mũndũ ũcio mũũru, o na kana areke oonekane arĩ na mahĩtia hĩndĩ ĩrĩa araciirithio." 
Psalms37:34 Ikaraga wĩhokeete o MWATHANI na ũrũmagĩrĩre njĩra ciake, naake nĩegũgũtũũgĩria ũgae bũrũri, na wĩyonere andũ arĩa ooru makĩniinwo." 
Psalms37:35 Njĩrĩgĩĩte kuona mũndũ ũmwe mũũru wahinyanagĩrĩria mũno; aikaraga eetũũgĩrĩĩtie igũrũ rĩa andũ oothe ta mĩtarakwa ya Lebanoni. 
Psalms37:36 Mũthenya ũmwe nĩndahĩtũkĩire gwake, no ndaarĩ kuo, o na ndamũcaria, ndiamuonire." 
Psalms37:37 Baara mũndũ ũrĩa mwega, na ũrore mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu, mũndũ ũrĩa wendeete thaayũ nĩarĩ njiarwa." 
Psalms37:38 No arĩa meehagia nĩkũniinwo makaaniinwo o biũ; njiarwa ciao nĩkũũragwo ikooragwo. 
Psalms37:39 MWATHANI nĩ we ũhonokagia andũ arĩa athingu; nĩamamenyagĩrĩra hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna. 
Psalms37:40 Nĩamateithagia na akamaruta ũgwatiinĩ; amahonokagia kuuma harĩ andũ arĩa ooru tondũ mooragĩra harĩ we nĩguo amamenyerere. 
Psalms38:1 MWATHANI, ndũkandũithie ũrĩ na maraakara,o na kana ũherithie ũrĩ na marũrũ," 
Psalms38:2 tondũ nĩũndihangĩĩtie na mĩguĩ yaku, na guoko gwaku nĩkũhũũrĩĩte mũno." 
Psalms38:3 Mwĩrĩ wakwa wothe nĩũratuura nĩ ũndũ wa maraakara maaku; mahĩndĩ maakwa nĩmarandĩa nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maakwa. 
Psalms38:4 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩngunĩkanĩirio nĩ meehia maakwa; nĩ mũrigo mũritũ mũno itangĩhota gũkuua. 
Psalms38:5 Tondũ wa ũrimũ wakwa-rĩ, ironda ciakwa nĩciambĩrĩirie kũnunga o na kũbutha." 
Psalms38:6 Thiaga ndĩhacĩĩte o nginya ngakuruma na nda; mũthenya wothe ndindaga ngĩcakaya. 
Psalms38:7 Nĩ gũkorwo njohero yakwa ĩ na ruwo ta rwa mwaki, na mwĩrĩ wakwa nĩũratuura." 
Psalms38:8 Ndirĩ na hinya o na mũnyiinyi, na ndĩmũhehenje o biũ; nĩndangĩkĩĩte ngoro, na nĩndĩracaaya nĩ ruwo." 
Psalms38:9 MWATHANI, nĩũũĩ ũrĩa ngoro yakwa ĩrirĩirie, o na nĩũraigua ũrĩa ndĩracaaya." 
Psalms38:10 Ngoro yakwa ĩrahũũra na hinya; hinya wakwa nĩ mũthiru, na maitho maakwa nĩ matuune." 
Psalms38:11 Araata aakwa na arĩa tũrigainie nao matirenda kũnguhĩrĩria nĩ ũndũ wa ironda iria ndĩ nacio; o na andũ a mũciĩ witũ nĩmaranjũrĩra. 
Psalms38:12 Arĩa marenda kũnjũraga nĩ mĩtego maranjigĩra nao arĩa marenda kũnjĩka ũũru no kũmakia maramakia; mũthenya wothe matindaga makĩbanga ũrĩa mekũnjũkĩrĩra. 
Psalms38:13 No niĩ-rĩ, haana ta mũndũ ũtaiguaga, tondũ ndiguaga, kana ta mũndũ ũtaaragia tondũ ndiaragia." 
Psalms38:14 Haana ta mũndũ ũtaiguaga, tondũ ndicookagia." 
Psalms38:15 No wee, MWATHANI-rĩ, no we ndĩhokeete; na nĩ we, MWATHANI Ngai wakwa ũkũnjookeria." 
Psalms38:16 Ndakũhooya ndũkaareke thũ ciakwa ikenerere mĩnyamaarĩko yakwa! Ndũkaareke ciĩtĩĩe nĩ ũndũ wa kũhootwo gwakwa! 
Psalms38:17 Tondũ ndigairie o haniini ngurumane, na gũtirĩ hĩndĩ itaraigua ngĩtuurwo mũno." 
Psalms38:18 Nĩndoimbũra meehia maakwa, na nĩndamahera" 
Psalms38:19 Arĩa mathũire nĩ andũ matarĩ na mũrimũ, na me na hinya, na aingĩ aao nĩ arĩa mathũire o na hatarĩ ũndũ mũũru njĩkĩĩte." 
Psalms38:20 Ndumĩĩtwo ũthũ nĩ arĩa mandĩhaga wega na ũũru tondũ nĩngeragia gwĩka maũndũ marĩa maagĩrĩire. 
Psalms38:21 Ndũkaanandiganĩrie, MWATHANI! Ngai wakwa ndũgaikare haraaya na niĩ!" 
Psalms38:22 Ũka na ihenya ũndeithie, Wee, MWATHANI, mũhonokia wakwa!" 
Psalms39:1 Ndoigire atĩrĩ, “Nĩndĩmenyagĩrĩra mĩthiĩre yakwa, na ndirĩtĩkagĩria rũrĩmĩ rwakwa rũhĩtithagie; ndirĩaragia o na haniini andũ arĩa ooru marĩ ho.”" 
Psalms39:2 Ndakirĩĩte ki o ta mũndũ ũtangĩhota kwaria, o na ũndũ ũrĩa mwega! No o na ndĩyũmĩrĩirie ũguo-rĩ, ruwo rwakwa no gũkĩrĩrĩria rwakĩrĩrĩirie kũneneha," 
Psalms39:3 nayo ngoro yakwa ĩkahĩĩahĩĩagĩra thĩinĩ wakwa.O ũrĩa ndakĩragĩrĩria gwĩcũũrania, noguo mũhĩahĩĩo ũcio warĩ thĩinĩ wakwa wongererekaga.Nĩguo ndaambĩrĩirie kwaria ngiuga atĩrĩ," 
Psalms39:4 “MWATHANI, menyithia hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ngakua, na ngũtũũra muoyo mĩaka ĩigana atĩa; ndeithia kũmenya ũrĩa ũtũũro wakwa wĩ mũkuhĩ." 
Psalms39:5 Ĩ matukũ marĩa ũheete ma gũtũũra gũũkũ thĩ ti maniini!Ihinda rĩakwa rĩothe rĩa gũtũũra gũũkũ thĩ ti kĩndũ harĩ we.Ti itherũ mũndũ o wothe wĩ muoyo o na angĩkorwo ahaana atĩa, no tũhũ." 
Psalms39:6 Muoyo wake ũthiraga na ihenya o ta kĩĩruru; mĩhang'o ĩrĩa ehang'agia nayo no ya tũhũ; eyũmbagĩrĩra ũtonga mũingĩ, no ndooĩ nũũ ũkeeguna naguo." 
Psalms39:7 “Rĩu, MWATHANI-rĩ, nĩ ũndũ ũrĩkũ ngĩetereire? Kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩakwa kĩrĩ o harĩ we." 
Psalms39:8 Nduta meehiainĩ maakwa moothe, na ndũgeetĩkĩre thekererwo nĩ irimũ." 
Psalms39:9 Ngũikara ngirĩĩte ki, o ta mũndũ ũtangĩhota kwaria, nĩ gũkorwo nĩ we ũtũmĩĩte nyamaarĩke ũguo nyamaarĩkĩĩte." 
Psalms39:10 Ndũkahũũre rĩngĩ! Ihũũra rĩaku nĩrĩniinĩĩte mwĩrĩ wakwa hinya. 
Psalms39:11 Rĩrĩa watua kũherithia mũndũ ũkĩmũrũithagia nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maake-rĩ, ũthaka wake ũũniinaga ũgathira o ta kĩndũ eendeete kĩrĩĩtwo nĩ mũthũa. Ti itherũ mũndũ o wothe no tũhũ!" 
Psalms39:12 “Igua ihooya rĩakwa, MWATHANI, na ũthikĩrĩrie kĩrĩro gĩakwa; ndũkaae kwaga kuona maithori maakwa!Nĩ ũndũ niĩ ndĩ o mũgeni o kwa ihinda iniini o ta ũrĩa maithe maakwa moothe maatariĩ." 
Psalms39:13 Tiga kũndaakarĩra, MWATHANI, nĩguo ngene itanathirĩrĩkĩra njage gũcooka gũkorwo ho rĩngĩ.”" 
Psalms40:1 Ndeetereire MWATHANI andeithie o ngirĩrĩirie, naake agĩthikĩrĩria, na akĩigua kĩrĩro gĩakwa." 
Psalms40:2 Akĩnduta irimainĩ rĩa rĩũrĩro, o thĩinĩ wa mũtondo mũriku mũno, akĩndũũgamia igũrũ wa ihiga akĩhotithia kwĩhanda wega." 
Psalms40:3 Agĩĩkĩra rwĩmbo rwerũ kanuainĩ gaakwa rwa kũgoocaga Ngai witũ naruo.Andũ aingĩ marĩonaga ũguo magetigĩra, magakĩiga mwĩhoko wao harĩ MWATHANI." 
Psalms40:4 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũikaraga ehokeete o MWATHANI, na ũtagwatanagĩra na andũ arĩa etĩĩi, kana arĩa mathaathayagia ngai cia mĩhianano." 
Psalms40:5 MWATHANI Ngai wakwa, nĩũtwĩkĩire maũndũ maingĩ na manene, o na gũtwĩciiria nĩũtwĩciirĩĩtie na njĩra nene mũno; gũtirĩ ũngĩ o na ũrĩkũ ũngĩhaananio nawe!Ingĩtua kũgana mĩbango ĩyo yothe ya magegania ĩrĩa ũtũbangĩire-rĩ, ndingĩmĩrĩĩkia tondũ ndĩngĩtarĩka." 
Psalms40:6 Wee-rĩ, ndũbatairio nĩ magongoona kana iheeo we ndũkenagĩra magongoona ma njino o na magongoona marĩa marutagwo nĩ ũndũ wa meehia.No nĩũheete matũ ma gũkũigua." 
Psalms40:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “Ĩ niĩ ũyũ haaha; ibukuinĩ rĩa Watho nĩ ho haandĩkĩĩtwo ũrĩa njagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩkaga." 
Psalms40:8 Nĩngenagio nĩgwĩka ta ũrĩa wendeete, Ngai wakwa; Watho waku-rĩ, ndĩũigĩĩte ngoroinĩ yakwa thĩinĩ.”" 
Psalms40:9 Nĩheanĩĩte ũhoro mwega wa ũrĩa ũtũhonokeetie, kĩũnganoinĩ kĩa andũ aaku oothe; nĩũũĩ wega, MWATHANI, atĩ ndirĩ hingo ĩtarĩũheanaga." 
Psalms40:10 Ndihithĩĩte ngoroinĩ yakwa ũhoro wa ũrĩa ũhonokanagia nĩnjarĩĩtie ũhoro wa ũrĩa wee wĩ mwĩhokeku, o na ũrĩa ũteithanagia.Ndiagĩĩte kuumbũrĩra kĩũngano kĩa andũ aaku oothe ũrĩa ũrĩ mũtugi na mwĩhokeku." 
Psalms40:11 MWATHANI, ndũkarege kũnjiguĩra tha; wendo waku na wĩhokeku-rĩ, ironangagĩra hingo ciothe!" 
Psalms40:12 Nĩthiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ mathĩĩna maingĩ mũno; meehia maakwa nĩmanyingĩhĩire nginya ngaremwo nĩkuona. Nĩ maingĩ gũkĩra njuĩrĩ cia mũtwe wakwa, na ngoro yakwa nĩyũrĩĩtwo nĩ hinya." 
Psalms40:13 Honokia, MWATHANI, nĩ ũndũ wa kwenda gwaku! Hiũha, MWATHANI, ũndeithie!" 
Psalms40:14 Andũ arĩa marenda kũnjũraga maroconorwo na maturuure biũ; acio marenda kũnjĩka ũũru marohũndũrwo na maconorwo. 
Psalms40:15 Arĩa mathekagĩrĩra marokua ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa mahooteetwo. 
Psalms40:16 No rĩĩrĩ, arĩa oothe magũcaragia marokena na macanjamũke; arĩa meendeete ũhonokania waku marotũũra moigaga atĩrĩ, “Ĩ MWATHANI ti mũnene!”" 
Psalms40:17 MWATHANI, niĩ ndĩ mũthĩĩnĩku na mũbataru, no wee ndũriganĩirwo nĩ niĩ.Wee-rĩ, nĩ we mũhonokia wakwa, na Ngai wakwa, hiũha ũkĩndeithie!" 
Psalms41:1 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũrũmbũyanagia na arĩa athĩĩni.MWATHANI nĩarĩmũteithagia hĩndĩ ĩrĩa arĩ mathĩĩnainĩ." 
Psalms41:2 MWATHANI nĩarĩmũmenyagĩrĩra na amũtũũragie muoyo arĩmũikaragia na gĩkeno bũrũriinĩ na ndarĩmũrekagĩrĩria mookoinĩ ma thũ ciake. 
Psalms41:3 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa akomeete gĩtandainĩ arĩ mũrũaru-rĩ, MWATHANI nĩarĩmũteithagia na amũcookagĩrie ũgima wake wa mwĩrĩ." 
Psalms41:4 Na niĩ ngũkiuga atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI, nĩngwĩhĩirie; njiguĩra tha na ũhonie.”" 
Psalms41:5 Thũ ciakwa ciaragia ũhoro wakwa irĩ na ũiru ikooria atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ agaagĩkua rĩ nĩ geetha rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩriganĩre?”" 
Psalms41:6 Ũrĩa mũrĩ ũthũ na niĩ angĩũka kũndora, aheaga o ciugo cia kũngenia o rĩrĩa muorooto wake ũrĩ kũhũnga ndeto ciakwa njũru nĩguo acooke agacimemerekie kũndũ guothe arĩĩkia kuumagara." 
Psalms41:7 Arĩa oothe mathũire maheehanaga makĩaria ndeto ciakwa makĩhooyagĩra nyone ũũru. 
Psalms41:8 Moigaga atĩrĩ, “Nĩ mũrũaru mũno; ndangiuma hau akomeete arĩ muoyo.”" 
Psalms41:9 O na mũraata wakwa ũrĩa mũnene, ũrĩa ndĩrehokeete mũno, na tũrarĩanagĩra thaani ĩmwe naake, nĩandiganĩirie." 
Psalms41:10 No rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI, njiguĩra tha ũhonie, nĩguo ndĩrĩhĩrie harĩ thũ ciakwa!" 
Psalms41:11 Weka ũguo nĩngũmenya atĩ nĩũkeneetio nĩ niĩ na atĩ thũ yakwa ndĩngĩrũũhia nĩ ũndũ nĩndĩmĩtooreetie. 
Psalms41:12 Nĩũkũndeithia, tondũ mĩthiĩre yakwa nĩ mĩega, na ũnjige harĩa ũrĩ nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms41:13 Goocaai MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli nginya tene na tene! Ameni! Ameni! 
Psalms42:1 Wee Ngai ngoro yakwa ĩkwĩrirĩirie, o ta ũrĩa thwariga ĩriragĩria tũrũũĩ twĩ na maaĩ mahehu wega." 
Psalms42:2 Ngoro yakwa ĩnyooteire Ngai, Ngai ũrĩa ũrĩ muoyo.Ĩ nĩrĩ ngooka gũthaathaiya mbere yaku!" 
Psalms42:3 Ndĩraga mũthenya na ũtukũ, irio ciakwa no maithori tu; hingo ciothe thũ ciakwa inyũrũragia ikĩnjũũragia atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ Ngai waku e ha?”" 
Psalms42:4 Nĩnguaga ngoro, ndaririkana hĩndĩ ya tene, ũrĩa ndathiaga nyũmbainĩ ya Ngai hamwe na andũ arĩa angĩ ndĩmatongoreetie, twĩ gĩkundi kĩa andũ makeneete, tũkĩinaga na tũkĩgoocaga Ngai twanĩrĩire." 
Psalms42:5 Nĩkĩ wee ngoro yakwa, ũrĩ na ihooru ũguo? ũratangĩka ũguo nĩkĩ?Wĩhoke Ngai nĩ gũkorwo nĩndĩrĩmũgooca o rĩngĩ, o we mũhonokia wakwa na Ngai wakwa." 
Psalms42:6 (6-7) Gũũkũ ithaamĩrioinĩ ngoro yakwa nĩrathĩĩnĩka mũno, kwoguo nĩndĩmũririkanaga.Nĩarekeetie ndiihũ cia kĩeha ikahuba ngoro yakwa, ndia cia kũrĩa kũriku gũtarĩ gĩturi irananamĩra o ta mũiyũro wa maaĩ, na ta ndururumo cia maaĩ maraikũrũka meerekeire Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani moimĩĩte kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Herimoni na kĩa Mizari." 
Psalms42:7 MWATHANI aronanagia ũtugi wake mũthenya, nĩguo ndĩmũinagĩre ũtukũ, ta arĩ ihooya ndĩrahooya harĩ Ngai mwene ũtũũro wakwa." 
Psalms42:8 Njũũragia Ngai, o we mũngitĩri atĩrĩ, “Ũriganĩirwo nĩ niĩ nĩkĩ?Thiaga ndĩthikĩire nĩ ũrĩa thũ ciakwa ihinyĩrĩirie nĩkĩ?”" 
Psalms42:9 Nĩhehenjeetwo nĩ irumi iria thũ ciakwa iranuma ikĩnjũũragia itegũtigithĩria atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ Ngai waku e ha?”" 
Psalms42:10 Nĩ kĩĩ, wee ngoro yakwa, ũrĩ na ihooru ũguo? Ũratangĩka ũguo nĩkĩ?Wĩĩhoke Ngai nĩ gũkorwo nĩndĩrĩmũgooca o rĩngĩ, o we mũhonokia wakwa na Ngai wakwa." 
Psalms43:1 Tua ciira wakwa, Ngai, na wonanie kĩhooto gĩakwa harĩ andũ arĩa matagwĩtĩkĩĩtie; honokia kuuma harĩ andũ a maheeni na matarũmagĩrĩra kĩhooto!" 
Psalms43:2 Wee Ngai nĩ we mũmenyereri ũndiganĩirie nĩkĩ?Thiaga ndĩthikĩire nĩ ũrĩa thũ ciakwa ihinyĩrĩirie nĩkĩ? 
Psalms43:3 Tũma ũtheri waku o na ũhoro waku wa ma indongorie arĩ cio, injookie Zayuni, kĩrĩma gĩaku gĩtheru na Hekaarũinĩ yaku kũrĩa ũikaraga." 
Psalms43:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩndĩthiĩ kĩgongoonainĩ gĩaku, wee Ngai, o wee Ngai ũrĩa ũrĩ kĩhumo gĩa gĩkeno gĩakwa, na nĩndĩkũgooca ngĩhũũraga kĩnanda, wee Ngai, Ngai wakwa." 
Psalms43:5 Nĩ kĩĩ, wee ngoro yakwa, ũrĩ na ihooru ũguo? Ũratangĩka ũguo nĩkĩ?Wĩĩhoke Ngai nĩ gũkorwo nĩndĩrĩmũgooca o rĩngĩ, o we mũhonokia wakwa na Ngai wakwa." 
Psalms44:1 Twaneiguĩra na matũ maitũ, Ngai, maithe maitũ nĩmatwĩrĩĩte, maũndũ marĩa wekire hĩndĩ yao matukũinĩ ma tene." 
Psalms44:2 Nĩ we warutũrũrire ndũũrĩrĩ na guoko gwaku, ũkĩhanda andũ aaku bũrũriinĩ wacio; wanyariirire ndũũrĩrĩ iria ingĩ, no andũ aaku ũgĩtũma magaacĩre."
