Psalms87:4 “Nĩngaagwetanĩria Misiri na Babilonia hamwe na mabũrũri marĩa manjathĩkagĩra; nĩngaataranĩria andũ a Filisitia, Turo, na Ethiopia hamwe na atũũri a Jerusalemu.”" 
Psalms87:5 Na rĩĩrĩ, ũhoro wa Zayuni ũkĩario nĩgũkeeragwo atĩrĩ, “Andũ oothe maaciarĩirwo thĩinĩ waku;” nĩ gũkorwo Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno nĩagaatũma rĩgĩe na hinya." 
Psalms87:6 MWATHANI nĩakandĩka marĩĩtwa ma andũ ibukuinĩ atĩ oothe maaciarĩirwo Jerusalemu. 
Psalms87:7 Magaacimbicaga oothe nĩgũkena makĩinaga atĩrĩ, “Itũũra rĩa Zayuni nĩrĩo kĩhumo kĩa iraathimo ciitũ ciothe.”" 
Psalms88:1 MWATHANI, Ngai, mũhonokia wakwa, ndindaga ngĩhooya ũteithio mũthenya wothe, na ngarĩraga ũtukũ ndĩ mbere yaku." 
Psalms88:2 Igua ihooya rĩakwa, na ũthikĩrĩrie ngĩgũkaĩra ũndeithie!" 
Psalms88:3 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩnyariirĩkĩĩte mũno, na ngirie gũkua." 
Psalms88:4 Ndaranĩirio na arĩa makirie gũkua; ndirĩ na hinya o na mũniini. 
Psalms88:5 Haana ta mũndũ ũtiganĩirio gatagatĩinĩ ga ciimba; ndariĩ ta ũmwe wa andũ mooragĩĩtwo magathikwo mbĩĩrĩrainĩ arĩa ũtacookaga kũrũmbũiya rĩngĩ, na ũthengeirie ũteithio waku." 
Psalms88:6 Ũnjikĩĩtie o mbĩĩrĩrainĩ gĩtina, kũndũ kwĩ nduma ndumanu na kũriku mũno." 
Psalms88:7 Maraakara maaku nĩmangomeire mũno; ndiihũ ciamo nĩcihehenjeete. 
Psalms88:8 Nĩũtũmĩĩte ndiganĩrio nĩ araata aakwa; ũnduĩte kĩndũ kĩ magigi harĩ o.Hingĩrĩirio ũguo atĩ ndingĩhota kũũra. 
Psalms88:9 Maitho maakwa nĩmoorĩĩtwo nĩ hinya nĩ ũrĩa nyamaarĩkĩĩte; ngũkayagĩra mũthenya o mũthenya, MWATHANI, na ngakũhooyaga nyambararĩĩtie mooko maakwa na igũrũ." 
Psalms88:10 Nĩũringagĩra andũ arĩa akuũ ciama? Nĩmarĩũkaga gũkũgooca? 
Psalms88:11 Ũtugi waku nĩũhunjagio mbĩĩrĩrainĩ, kana wĩhokeku waku ũkaganwo kũndũ kwa mwanangĩko?" 
Psalms88:12 Ciama ciaku nĩcionagwo kũndũ kũu kwa nduma kana wega waku ũkamenywo bũrũriinĩ ũcio wa kĩriganĩro? 
Psalms88:13 Niĩ-rĩ, nĩ we, MWATHANI, ngayagĩra; ngũhooyaga rũũciinĩ o rũũciinĩ." 
Psalms88:14 Ũndegeete nĩkĩ, MWATHANI? Nĩkĩ gĩtũmĩĩte ũhuutatĩre?" 
Psalms88:15 Ndũire nyariirĩkaga ngakuhagĩrĩria gũkua kuuma ndĩ o mũnyiinyi; nĩniinĩĩtwo hinya nĩ maũndũ ma kũguoyohia marĩa ũnjĩkĩĩte. 
Psalms88:16 Maraakara maaku matangĩtatĩka nĩmahehenjeete; mahũũra maaku ma kũguoyohia nĩmaranyananga. 
Psalms88:17 Mathiũrũrũkagĩria mũthenya wothe o ta mũiyũro wa maaĩ; hingagĩrĩrio nĩmo na mĩena yothe. 
Psalms88:18 Nĩũtũmĩĩte ndiganĩrio o na nĩ araata aakwa arĩa nyumĩranĩĩtie ngoro mũno nao; nduma noyo mũraata wakwa. 
Psalms89:1 MWATHANI, ngũtũũra nyinaga ũrĩa wee wĩ mũtugi, na ng'anaga hingo ciothe ũrĩa wĩ mwĩhokeku." 
Psalms89:2 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ wendo waku ũgũtũũra nginya tene na tene, na wĩhokeku waku nĩ mũrũmu o ta igũrũ." 
Psalms89:3 Wee nĩwoigire atĩrĩĩrĩ, “Nĩndĩĩkanĩire na mũndũ ũrĩa thuurĩĩte; nĩnjĩĩrĩire ndungata yakwa Daudi na mwĩhĩtwa ũũ:" 
Psalms89:4 ‘Njiarwa ciaku igũtũũra ithamakaga; ũthamaki waku ngũũtũũria nginya tene na tene.’ ” 
Psalms89:5 Igũrũ nĩgũkumia rĩrakumia ciĩko cia magegania iria wee, MWATHANI wĩkaga; ciũmbe iria theru nĩkũgana iragana irĩ kĩũnganoinĩ gĩacio ũrĩa wee wĩ mwĩhokeku." 
Psalms89:6 Gũtirĩ ũngĩ kũu igũrũ ũhaana ta we, MWATHANI, ndũngĩigananio na kĩũmbe o na kĩmwe kĩa iria i kũu igũrũ matuinĩ." 
Psalms89:7 Wee-rĩ, nĩũheetwo gĩtĩĩo kĩnene mũno kĩamainĩ gĩa ciũmbe iria theru; ciothe ciikaraga igegearĩĩte nĩ ũndũ waku." 
Psalms89:8 Gũtirĩ wĩ hinya ta we, MWATHANI Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe. Ũkoragwo wĩ mwĩhokeku maũndũinĩ moothe, MWATHANI." 
Psalms89:9 Nĩ we wathaga iria rĩrĩa rĩhuuhũkanagia na hinya, na ũkahooreria makũmbĩ maarĩo marĩa maikanagia na hinya." 
Psalms89:10 Nĩ we wahehenjire ndamaathia ĩrĩa yetagwo Rahabu ũkĩmĩũraga; thũ ciaku wacihurunjire na guoko gwaku kũrĩ hinya. 
Psalms89:11 Igũrũ nĩ rĩaku, o ũndũ ũmwe na thĩ; nĩ we wombire thĩ na kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩ thĩinĩ wayo." 
Psalms89:12 Nĩ we wombire mwena wa na rũgongo na wa na kĩanda; kĩrĩma gĩa Taboru na gĩa Herimoni nĩgũkũinĩra irakũinĩra nĩgũkena. 
Psalms89:13 Wee-rĩ, kaĩ ũrĩ hinya mũingĩ-ĩ! Kaĩ ũhootani waku nĩ mũnene-ĩ!" 
Psalms89:14 Mũthingi wa ũthamaki waku nĩ ũthingu na kĩhooto; maũndũ moothe marĩa wĩkaga moonanagia wendani na wĩhokeku. 
Psalms89:15 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ andũ arĩa mooĩ gũkũgooca na nyĩmbo; acio-rĩ, maikaraga magĩtugagwo nĩwe, MWATHANI" 
Psalms89:16 Matindaga macanjamũkĩĩte mũthenya wothe nĩ ũndũ waku, na magakũgoocaga tondũ nĩũmeekaga wega." 
Psalms89:17 Nĩ we ũtũheaga ũhootani mũnene; tũrũũhagia tũkiugagĩrĩria nĩ ũndũ nĩũtwendeete. 
Psalms89:18 Wee, MWATHANI, nĩ we watũthuurĩire ũrĩa ũrĩtũgitagĩra; Wee, Ngai Mũtheru wa Isiraeli, nĩ we watũheire mũthamaki witũ." 
Psalms89:19 Tene mũno-rĩ, nĩwarĩirie na njĩra ya kĩoneki ndungata ciaku iria ciakwĩhokeete ũkiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩheete mũndũ ũmwe njamba ya ita hinya, nĩheete ũrĩa thuurĩĩte kuuma andũinĩ gĩtĩ kĩa ũthamaki." 
Psalms89:20 Nĩnduĩte ndungata yakwa Daudi mũthamaki na ũndũ wa kũmũitĩrĩria maguta marĩa matheru. 
Psalms89:21 Hinya wakwa ũrĩkoragwo hamwe naake hingo ciothe, ũhoti wakwa nĩũrĩtũmaga agĩe na hinya." 
Psalms89:22 Thũ ciake itikaamũkĩria hinya rĩ o rĩ, andũ arĩa ooru matikaamũhoota." 
Psalms89:23 Nĩngaahehenja thũ ciake na njũrage arĩa oothe mamũthũire. 
Psalms89:24 Nĩndĩrĩmwendaga na ndĩmuonagie wĩhokeku; ndĩrĩmũheaga ũhootani hingo ciothe. 
Psalms89:25 Nĩngaaramia ũthamaki wake kuuma iria rĩa Mediteraneani nginya rũũĩ rwa Farati. 
Psalms89:26 Akanjĩĩraga atĩrĩ, ‘Wee nĩ we baaba; na no we Ngai wakwa, nĩ we ũmenyagĩrĩra na no we ũhonokagia.’" 
Psalms89:27 Nĩngaamũtua mũrũ wakwa wa irigithaathi, na ndũme atuĩke mũthamaki mũnene gũkĩra athamaki oothe a thĩ." 
Psalms89:28 Ngũtũũra ndĩmũtugaga nginya tene na tene, nakĩo kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ndĩĩkanĩire naake gĩikarage kĩrũmĩĩte." 
Psalms89:29 Ũthamaki wake ũgũtũũra o nginya igũrũ rĩgaathira; njiarwa ciake igũtũũra ithamakaga nginya tene na tene. 
Psalms89:30 “No rĩĩrĩ, njiarwa ciake ingĩkaaga gwathĩkĩra watho wakwa ciage gũikara ta ũrĩa ndĩciathĩĩte," 
Psalms89:31 ingĩkaagarara ũrĩa ndĩcirũtĩĩte, ciage kũmenyerera maathani maakwa," 
Psalms89:32 nĩngaaciherithia nĩ ũndũ wa wĩhia ũcio wacio na nĩngaatũma inyariirĩke nĩ ũndũ wa mahĩtia maacio. 
Psalms89:33 No ndigaatiga kwenda Daudi kana njage kũhingia ũrĩa ndĩmwĩrĩire. 
Psalms89:34 Ndigaathũũkia kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ndĩĩkanĩire naake kana ngarũre ũrĩa ndĩmwĩrĩire. 
Psalms89:35 “Nĩndehĩta na rĩĩtwa rĩakwa rĩtheru atĩ ndikaaheenia Daudi rĩ o rĩ. 
Psalms89:36 Mbeũ yake ndĩgaathira tene na tene, na ngũtũũra menyagĩrĩra ũthamaki wake matukũ moothe marĩa riũa rĩgũtũũra rĩaraga." 
Psalms89:37 Ũthamaki wake ũgũtũũra wĩhandĩĩte o ta mweri ũrĩa ũtũũraga wonagwo igũrũ matuinĩ.” 
Psalms89:38 No rĩĩrĩ, nĩũraakarĩĩtio nĩ mũthamaki, ũrĩa ũthuurĩĩte na ũndũ wa kũmũitĩrĩria maguta ũkamũrega." 
Psalms89:39 Nĩwĩthambĩĩte kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ũrĩĩkanĩire na ndungata yaku na ũkarangĩrĩria thũmbĩ yake ndooroinĩ. 
Psalms89:40 Nĩũmomoranĩĩtie thingo cia itũũra rĩake na ũgatharũrania nyũmba ciake cia kwĩgitĩra iria njake na thingo cia hinya. 
Psalms89:41 Indo ciake iraiywo nĩ mwĩhĩtũkĩri o wothe; arĩa oothe arigainie nao nĩkũmũthekerera maramũthekerera. 
Psalms89:42 Nĩũheete arĩa marĩ muku naake ũhootani; nĩũtũmĩĩte thũ icio ciake ciothe ikene. 
Psalms89:43 Nĩũtũmĩĩte indo ciake cia mbaara ituĩke cia tũhũ, na ũkamũrekereria ahootwo mbaarainĩ." 
Psalms89:44 Nĩũmũtuunyĩĩte mũthĩĩgi wa ũthamaki na ũgaikania thũmbĩ yake thĩ. 
Psalms89:45 Nĩũtũmĩĩte oonekane arĩ mũkũrũ, nĩũmũhumbĩĩte gĩconoko." 
Psalms89:46 MWATHANI, ũgũtũũra wĩhithĩĩte nginya tene na tene? Maraakara maaku megũtũũra marĩrĩmbũkaga ta mwaki nginya rĩ?" 
Psalms89:47 Ririkana, MWATHANI, ũrĩa ũtũũro wakwa wĩ mũkuhĩ! Ririkana atĩ watũũmbire tũrĩ o andũ!" 
Psalms89:48 Nũũ ũngĩtũũra na aage gũkaanakua? Mũndũ-rĩ, no ahote kwĩgirĩrĩria ndakaanatoonye mbĩĩrĩrainĩ?" 
Psalms89:49 MWATHANI, wendo ũrĩa watwendeete naguo tene wathiire kũ? Ciĩranĩro iria werĩire Daudi ciathiire kũ?" 
Psalms89:50 Ririkana ũrĩa niĩ, ndungata yaku ndĩranyũrũrio na ũrĩa ndĩromĩrĩria irumi ciothe iria ndĩrarumwo nĩ ndũũrĩrĩ iria itagũtĩĩĩte." 
Psalms89:51 Thũ ciaku, MWATHANI, nĩkũruma iraruma mũthamaki waku ũrĩa ũitĩrĩirie maguta ũkamũthuura! Iramũruma o harĩa hoothe arathiĩra." 
Psalms89:52 Goocaai MWATHANI nginya tene na tene! Ameni! Ameni! 
Psalms90:1 MWATHANI, wee nĩ we ũtũũraga wĩ gĩtũũro giitũ." 
Psalms90:2 Mbere ya ũtanoomba irĩma, o ũtanathondeka thĩ wee warĩ o Ngai mũtũũra muoyo na ũgũtũũra ũrĩ Ngai nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms90:3 Wĩraga mũndũ acooke o rũkũngũinĩ; ũmũgarũraga agatuĩka o rũkũngũ. 
Psalms90:4 Harĩ we-rĩ, mĩaka ngiri no ta mũthenya ũmwe; no ta mũthenya wa ira ũguo ũrahĩtũkire; no ta ihinda ikuhĩ rĩa ituanĩra rĩa ũtukũ." 
Psalms90:5 Ũtũhaataga ta ũrĩa mũiyũro wa maaĩ ũhaataga; tũthiraga na ihenya o ta kĩrooto.Tũhaana ta nyeki ĩrĩa ĩringũraga rũũciinĩ," 
Psalms90:6 ĩgakũra na ĩkarura wega, hwaĩinĩ ĩgacooka ĩkahooha, ĩkooma." 
Psalms90:7 Ithuĩ-rĩ, nĩkũniinwo tũraniinwo nĩ mang'ũrĩ maaku; marũrũ maaku nĩgũtũguoyohia maratũguoyohia." 
Psalms90:8 Waganu witũ ũũigĩĩte o mbere yaku; meehia maitũ marĩa tũhithĩĩte ũmaigĩĩte o harĩa ũngĩmoona. 
Psalms90:9 Ũtũũro witũ nĩkũniinwo ũraniinwo nĩ maraakara maaku; ũrathira o ta ihũũmũka. 
Psalms90:10 Ũtũũro witũ wa gũũkũ thĩ nĩ mĩaka mĩrongo mũgwanja, kana mĩaka mĩrongo ĩnaana, tũngĩkorwo tũrĩ na hinya.No rĩĩrĩ, kĩrĩa ĩtũreehagĩra no mathĩĩna na kĩeha; ũtũũro ũthiraga na ihenya, na ithuĩ tũgathiĩ tũkabuĩria." 
Psalms90:11 Nũũ ũũĩ mang'ũrĩ maaku maigana atĩa na akamenya marũrũ maaku nĩguo akũhe gĩtĩĩo kĩrĩa wagĩrĩire kũheeo? 
Psalms90:12 Tuonie ũrĩa ũtũũro witũ wĩ mũkuhĩ, nĩguo tũũhĩge." 
Psalms90:13 Ũgũikara ũraakarĩĩte nginya rĩ, MWATHANI? Tũiguĩre tha ithuĩ ndungata ciaku." 
Psalms90:14 Tũhũũnagie ũtugi waku rũũciinĩ o rũũciinĩ, nĩguo tũkenage na tũcanjamũkage matukũ maitũ moothe." 
Psalms90:15 Tũkenie matukũ o ta marĩa ũtũnyariirĩĩte. na mĩaka o ta ĩrĩa tuoneete mathĩĩna. 
Psalms90:16 Reke ithuĩ, ndungata ciaku, tuone ciĩko ciaku cia hinya, nacio njiarwa ciitũ cione hinya waku mũnene." 
Psalms90:17 Wega wa MWATHANI Ngai witũ ũrogĩa na ithuĩ, arotũteithagia kũhootana maũndũinĩ moothe marĩa tũrĩĩkaga!" 
Psalms91:1 Ũrĩa wothe ũikaraga ũgitĩriinĩ wa Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno, na akamenyagĩrĩrwo nĩ Mwene Hinya Wothe" 
Psalms91:2 no ahote kũmwĩra atĩrĩ, “We nĩ we mũngitĩri na mũmenyereri; we nĩ we Ngai wakwa ũrĩa niĩ ndĩhokeete.”" 
Psalms91:3 Tondũ we nĩarĩkũrigagĩrĩria ndũgaatoonye mũtegoinĩ ũrĩa ũhithĩĩtwo, na ndũkaanyiitwo nĩ mũrimũ mũũru." 
Psalms91:4 Arĩkũhumbagĩra na mathagu maake, na ndũrĩ ũgwati ũrĩonaga tondũ nĩarĩkũmenyagĩrĩra wega, wĩhokeku wake nĩũrĩkũmenyagĩrĩra na ũkũgitagĩre." 
Psalms91:5 Ndũrĩtigagĩra ũgwati o wothe ũrĩa ũngĩũka ũtukũ, kana gũtharĩkĩrwo ũterĩgĩrĩire mathaa ma mũthenya," 
Psalms91:6 kana mũthiro ũrĩa ũniinanaga rĩrĩa kwĩ nduma na mwanangĩko ũrĩa ũũraganaga kwĩ o mũthenya. 
Psalms91:7 Andũ ngiri ĩmwe o na mangĩgũa mwena waku wa ũmotho makuĩte, nao angĩ ngiri ikũmi mwena waku wa ũrĩo, wee ndũrĩ ũũru ũrĩgũkoragĩrĩra." 
Psalms91:8 Wee-rĩ, no kwĩrorera ũrĩroragĩra na maitho maaku ũrĩa andũ arĩa aaganu maraherithio." 
Psalms91:9 Tondũ nĩũtuĩte MWATHANI mũkũgitĩri, Ũrĩa Wĩ Igũrũ Mũno ũkamũtua mũkũmenyereri-rĩ," 
Psalms91:10 ndũrĩ ũũru ũrĩonaga, na mũciĩ waku ndũrĩkuhagĩrĩrio nĩ haaro o na ĩrĩkũ." 
Psalms91:11 Ngai nĩarĩathaga araika aake makũmenyagĩrĩre kũrĩa guothe ũrĩthiaga. 
Psalms91:12 Marĩgũkuuaga na mooko maao nĩguo ndũkaahĩngwo kũgũrũ nĩ ihiga. 
Psalms91:13 Nĩũrĩrangagĩrĩria mĩrũũthi na gĩĩko na ũkinyagĩrĩrie na magũrũ maaku mĩrũũthi ĩrĩa mĩĩthĩ na nyoka iria irĩ thumu. 
Psalms91:14 Ngai aroiga atĩrĩ, “Nĩndĩrĩhonokagia arĩa manyendeete na menyagĩrĩre arĩa mooĩ rĩĩtwa rĩakwa." 
Psalms91:15 Manjĩta nĩndĩrĩmeetĩkaga; nĩndĩrĩkoragwo hamwe nao magĩthĩĩnĩka, ndĩmahonokagie na ndĩmatĩĩithagie." 
Psalms91:16 Nĩndĩrĩmaheaga ũtũũro mũraaya, na ndĩmahonokagie.”" 
Psalms92:1 Nĩ wega mũno gũgũcookagĩria ngaatho wee, MWATHANI, na kũinaga tũgĩkumagia rĩĩtwa rĩaku, wee, Ngai Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno." 
Psalms92:2 Nĩ ũndũ mwega mũno kũganaga ũtugi waku o rũũciinĩ, na wĩhokeku waku o hwaĩinĩ," 
Psalms92:3 tũkĩhũũraga ngita na tũkĩinaga na inanda. 
Psalms92:4 Nĩ gũkorwo wee, MWATHANI, nĩũngeneetie na ciĩko ciaku cia hinya, ndĩraina ngeneete nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa wĩkĩĩte." 
Psalms92:5 Ĩ ciĩko ciaku, MWATHANI, ti nene! Ĩ meciiria maaku, ti marikĩru!" 
Psalms92:6 Mũndũ ũrĩa kĩrimũ ndangĩmenya; mũndũ mũkĩĩgu ndangĩkũũrana ũndũ ũyũ; 
Psalms92:7 andũ arĩa aaganu o na mangĩkũra ta nyeki; arĩa meekaga ũũru o na mangĩtonga; makaaniinwo o biũ," 
Psalms92:8 tondũ wee, MWATHANI ũtũũraga ũtũũgĩrĩĩte nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms92:9 Ti itherũ, thũ ciaku, MWATHANI nĩikaaniinwo, na arĩa oothe meekaga ũũru nĩmagaatoorio." 
Psalms92:10 Ũtũmĩĩte ngĩe na hinya o ta mbogo; nĩũndaathimĩĩte na gĩkeno. 
Psalms92:11 Nĩndĩyoneire na maitho maakwa thũ ciakwa ikĩhootwo, na ngeiguĩra na matũ maakwa kĩrĩro kĩrĩa gĩkorereire andũ aaganu arĩa maranjũkĩrĩire." 
Psalms92:12 Andũ arĩa athingu mathegeaga o ta mĩkĩndũ, makũraga o ta mĩtarakwa ya Lebanoni." 
Psalms92:13 Mahaana ta mĩtĩ ĩhandĩĩtwo nyũmbainĩ ya MWATHANI ĩrĩa ĩkũraga Hekaarũinĩ ya Ngai witũ," 
Psalms92:14 ĩkarutaga maciaro o na ĩrĩ mĩkũrũ na ĩgaikaraga ĩrurĩĩte na ĩrĩ na hinya. 
Psalms92:15 Ũndũ ũcio wonanagia atĩ MWATHANI nĩ mũrũngĩrĩru, na atĩ ũrĩa ũmenyagĩrĩra nĩ mũthingu." 
Psalms93:1 MWATHANI nĩ we mũthamaki; ehumbĩĩte ũnene na hinya.Thĩ ĩhandĩĩtwo ĩkarũma ki; ndĩngĩenyenyeka o na atĩa. 
Psalms93:2 Gĩtĩ gĩaku kĩa ũnene, MWATHANI gĩtũire gĩ kĩrũmu kuuma o tene; wee-rĩ, warĩ o kuo kuuma tene na tene." 
Psalms93:3 MWATHANI, iria nĩkwanĩrĩra rĩraanĩrĩra; rĩraanĩrĩra rĩkĩrurumaga na rĩkĩhũũyũkaga." 
Psalms93:4 MWATHANI ũrĩa wathanaga na ũnene wothe igũrũ matuinĩ arĩ hinya gũkĩra mũhũũyũkanio wa iria na makũmbĩ maarĩo. 
Psalms93:5 Mawatho maaku, MWATHANI, nĩ ma gũtũũra tene na tene.Ti itherũ Hekaarũ yaku ĩgũtũũra ĩrĩ theru nginya mĩndĩ na mĩndĩ." 
Psalms94:1 MWATHANI, tondũ wĩ Ngai ũrĩa ũrĩhanagĩria onania ũrĩa ũraakarĩĩte!" 
Psalms94:2 Wee ũtuagĩra andũ oothe arahũka ũhe andũ arĩa etĩĩi kĩrĩa kĩmaagĩrĩire. 
Psalms94:3 MWATHANI, nĩ nginya rĩ andũ arĩa aaganu megũtũũra makenaga? Megũtũũra ũguo nginya rĩ?" 
Psalms94:4 Andũ arĩa ooru-rĩ, nĩ nginya rĩ megũtũũra meyambararagia, na metĩĩaga nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko ciao cia ũmaramari?" 
Psalms94:5 Mahehenjaga andũ aaku, MWATHANI, na makanyariira arĩa me aaku kĩũmbe." 
Psalms94:6 Mooragaga atumia a ndigwa na ciana cia ngoriai, hamwe na ageni arĩa matũũraga bũrũriinĩ witũ." 
Psalms94:7 Moigaga atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI ndarona; Ngai wa Isiraeli ndararũmbũiya.”" 
Psalms94:8 Inyuĩ andũ aya akingitaru, gĩai na ũmenyo; kaĩ mũkoohĩga rĩ, irimũ ici?" 
Psalms94:9 Mũreciiria Ngai ũrĩa wombire matũ ndaiguaga? Mũreciiria ũrĩa wombire maitho ndoonaga? 
Psalms94:10 Mũreciiria Ngai ũrĩa ũrũngaga ndũũrĩrĩ ndangĩciherithia? Mũreciiria Ngai ũrĩa ũrutaga andũ oothe ndarĩ ũmenyo? 
Psalms94:11 MWATHANI nĩoĩ ũrĩa andũ meciiragia; nĩoĩ ũrĩa meciiria maao marĩ ma tũhũ. 
Psalms94:12 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũtaaragwo nĩ we, MWATHANI, ũrĩa wee ũrutaga watho waku." 
Psalms94:13 Ũtũmaga aikare ahooreire hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna o nginya andũ arĩa aaganu makenjerwo irima. 
Psalms94:14 Nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI ndangĩtiganĩria andũ aake; ndangĩteanĩria andũ arĩa marĩ aake kĩũmbe. 
Psalms94:15 Kĩhooto nĩgĩgũcooka kuonekana maciirainĩ nao andũ oothe athingu nĩmarĩnyiitaga ũndũ ũcio mbaru. 
Psalms94:16 Nũũ wokĩrĩire andũ acio aaganu handũinĩ haakwa? Nũũ warĩ mwena wakwa ngĩng'eng'ana na andũ acio meekaga ũũru? 
Psalms94:17 Korwo MWATHANI ndandeithĩrĩirie-rĩ, no gũkua ingĩakuire o narua." 
Psalms94:18 Ndoigire atĩrĩ, “Nĩndĩragũa!” No ũtugi waku, MWATHANI, ũkĩĩnyiitĩrĩra." 
Psalms94:19 Rĩrĩa ngoro yakwa ĩtangĩkĩĩte na ĩrathĩĩnĩka-rĩ, wee, nĩũhooragĩria na ũkanjanjamũra." 
Psalms94:20 Wee-rĩ, ndũrĩ ngwatanĩro na atuithania ooru, arĩa moogomagia watho." 
Psalms94:21 Moonganaga makabanga ũrĩa mekũũraga andũ arĩa athingu, na magatuĩra andũ matarĩ na mahĩtia kũũragwo." 
Psalms94:22 No rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI nĩatuĩkĩĩte mũgitĩri wakwa; Ngai wakwa nĩ we ũmenyagĩrĩra." 
Psalms94:23 Nĩekũmaherithia nĩ ũndũ wa mahĩtia maao na amaniine nĩ ũndũ wa waganu wao; MWATHANI Ngai witũ nĩekũmaniina. 
Psalms95:1 Ũkaai, tũgooce MWATHANI! Rekeei tũinĩre Ngai ũrĩa ũtũmenyagĩrĩra tũkeneete!" 
Psalms95:2 Nĩtũthiĩi harĩ we tũrĩ na ngaatho; rekeei tũmũinĩre nyĩmbo cia kũmũgooca tũkeneete. 
Psalms95:3 Nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI nĩ Ngai mũnene, na nĩ mũthamaki mũnene wa ngai iria ingĩ ciothe." 
Psalms95:4 Nĩ we wathaga thĩ yothe, kuuma kũrĩa kũriku mũno o nginya tũcũmbĩrĩ twa irĩma." 
Psalms95:5 Nĩ we wathaga iria na nĩwe warĩũmbire o ũndũ ũmwe na thĩ nyũmũ, ĩrĩa we mwene oombire na mooko maake." 
Psalms95:6 Ũkaai, tũmũinamĩrĩre na tũmũthaathaiye; nĩtũturiei ndu mbere ya MWATHANI ũrĩa watũũmbire." 
Psalms95:7 Nĩ gũkorwo we nĩ we Ngai witũ, nĩ ithuĩ andũ arĩa aramataga, ng'ondu iria we mwene arĩithagia.Thikĩrĩriai ũrĩa aroiga ũũmũũthĩ." 
Psalms95:8 “Mũtikoomie ngoro ta ũrĩa maithe maanyu meekire marĩ Meriba, o na ta ũrĩa meekire mũthenya ũrĩa maarĩ Masa kũu werũinĩ." 
Psalms95:9 Mangeririe na makĩndoria, o na gũtuĩka nĩmooneete ũrĩa wothe ndameekĩire." 
Psalms95:10 Nĩndatũire ndaakarĩire andũ acio mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna na ngiuga atĩrĩĩrĩ, ‘Ĩ andũ aya ti aremi! Matiathĩkagĩra maathani maakwa.’" 
Psalms95:11 Tondũ ũcio nĩndehĩtire ndaakarĩĩte ngiuga atĩrĩ, ‘Matirĩ hingo magatoonya bũrũri ũrĩa ingĩkaamahe ũhuurũko.’ ”" 
Psalms96:1 Inĩraai MWATHANI rwĩmbo rwerũ! Inĩraai MWATHANI, andũ oothe a thĩ!" 
Psalms96:2 Inĩraai MWATHANI, na mũmũgooce! Menyithanagiai o mũthenya ũrĩa atũhonokeetie!" 
Psalms96:3 Ganĩraai ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe ũhoro wa riiri wake; ĩraai andũ oothe ũhoro wa ciĩko ciake cia magegania. 
Psalms96:4 Nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI nĩ mũnene, na nĩ wa kũgoocwo mũno; nĩ wa gũtĩĩo gũkĩra ngai ciothe." 
Psalms96:5 Ngai cia ndũũrĩrĩ iria ingĩ ciothe nĩ mĩhianano mĩtheri, no MWATHANI nĩ we wombire igũrũ." 
Psalms96:6 Athiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ ũnene na riiri; Hekaarũ yake ĩiyũire hinya na ũthaka. 
Psalms96:7 Goocaai MWATHANI, andũ oothe a thĩ; kumiai riiri o na hinya wake." 
Psalms96:8 Goocaai rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI rĩrĩa rĩrĩ riiri; ũkaai Hekaarũinĩ yake mũrĩ na iheeo. 
Psalms96:9 Thaathayai MWATHANI o we mwene ũnene na riiri; inainaai mũrĩ mbere yake andũ oothe a thĩ! 
Psalms96:10 Ĩraai ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI nĩ we mũthamaki! Thĩ ĩrũmĩĩte ũndũ ĩtangĩenyenyeka; nĩagaatuĩra andũ na kĩhooto.”" 
Psalms96:11 Igũrũ ta nĩrĩkene, thĩ nayo ta nĩcanjamũke; iria ta nĩrĩrurume o na ciũmbe ciothe iria irĩ kuo." 
Psalms96:12 Ithaka ta nĩicanjamũke, o na indo ciothe iria irĩ thĩinĩ wacio! Mĩtĩ yothe ya mũtitũ nĩkiuge ngemi" 
Psalms96:13 mbere ya MWATHANI, tondũ nĩarooka; arooka gwathana thĩ. Arĩathaga andũ oothe a thĩ na kĩhooto na ũhoro wa ma." 
Psalms97:1 MWATHANI nĩ we mũthamaki! Thĩ ta nĩkene, icigĩrĩra cia iriainĩ ta nĩicanjamũke!" 
Psalms97:2 Athiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ matu na nduma ndumanu; arathana na ũthingu na kĩhooto. 
Psalms97:3 Atongoreetio nĩ mwaki ũracina thũ ciake mĩena yothe. 
Psalms97:4 Heni ciake nĩkũmũrĩka iramũrĩka mabũrũri; thĩ no kũinaina ĩrainaina yaciona. 
Psalms97:5 Irĩma iraringũka o ta mũcumaa mbere ya MWATHANI, mbere ya MWATHANI wa thĩ yothe." 
Psalms97:6 Igũrũ rĩranĩrĩra ũthingu wake, nao andũ oothe nĩmaroona riiri wake." 
Psalms97:7 Arĩa oothe mathaathayagia mĩhianano nĩmaconoreetwo, o acio metĩĩaga nĩ ũndũ wa mĩhianano ĩyo ya tũhũ. Ngai ciothe nĩkũinamĩrĩra irainamĩrĩra MWATHANI." 
Psalms97:8 Andũ a Zayuni nĩmakeneete nĩkũigua ũguo, namo matũũra ma Juda nĩmacanjamũkĩĩte tondũ wa matuĩro maaku, MWATHANI." 
Psalms97:9 Nĩ gũkorwo wee, MWATHANI, nĩ we wathaga thĩ yothe; wee wĩ mũnene gũkĩra ngai ciothe." 
Psalms97:10 MWATHANI nĩendeete arĩa mathũire ũũru; nĩamenyagĩrĩra mĩoyo ya andũ aake, akamahonokia kuuma mookoinĩ ma andũ arĩa aaganu." 
Psalms97:11 Ũtheri nĩwarĩire andũ arĩa athingu, nao andũ arĩa eega nĩmakinyĩrĩirwo nĩ gĩkeno." 
Psalms97:12 Inyuothe arĩa athingu kenaai nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa MWATHANI eekĩĩte!Ririkanaai ũrĩa Ngai ũrĩa mũtheru eekĩĩte, na mũmũcookerie ngaatho." 
Psalms98:1 Inĩraai MWATHANI rwĩmbo rwerũ, tondũ nĩekĩĩte maũndũ ma magegania; guoko gwake kwa ũrĩo na hinya wake mũtheru nĩimũreehithĩirie ũhootani." 
Psalms98:2 MWATHANI nĩamenyithanĩĩtie ũhootani wake; nĩoneetie ndũũrĩrĩ hinya wake wa kũhonokania. 
Psalms98:3 Nĩahingĩĩtie na wĩhokeku ũrĩa eerĩire andũ aake a Isiraeli; thĩ yothe nĩyoneete ũhootani wa Ngai witũ. 
Psalms98:4 Inĩraai MWATHANI mũkeneete inyuĩ andũ oothe a thĩ; mũgooceei na nyĩmbo mũkiugagĩrĩria nĩgũkena! 
Psalms98:5 Inaai mũkĩgoocaga MWATHANI! Inaai mũkĩhũũraga inanda! 
Psalms98:6 Huuhaai tũrumbeeta na macoro, na muugĩrĩrie nĩgũkena mũrĩ mbere ya MWATHANI, mũthamaki witũ!" 
Psalms98:7 Iria nĩrĩrurume, o ũndũ ũmwe na ciũmbe ciothe iria irĩ thĩinĩ warĩo; thĩ nĩĩine, o ũndũ ũmwe na atũũri aayo!" 
Psalms98:8 Njũũĩ nĩihũũre hĩ; irĩma nĩciine mbere ya MWATHANI ikeneete," 
Psalms98:9 tondũ nĩarooka gwatha thĩ.Arĩathaga andũ a thĩ na kĩhooto na amatuagĩre ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire. 
Psalms99:1 MWATHANI nĩ we mũthamaki; andũ nĩkũinaina marainaina. Aikarĩire ciũmbe iria irĩ mathagu irĩ ta gĩtĩ gĩake gĩa ũthamaki, nayo thĩ no gũthingitha ĩrathingitha." 
Psalms99:2 MWATHANI nĩ mũnene Zayuni; nĩ we wathaga ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe. 
Psalms99:3 Andũ oothe nĩmarĩkumagia rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩnene na rĩa gwĩtigĩrwo. We nĩ mũtheru! 
Psalms99:4 Wee, mũthamaki ũrĩa ũrĩ hinya nĩwendeete kĩhooto; nĩũhandĩĩte waragania thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli; nĩũtũmĩĩte kũgĩe na kĩhooto na ũthingu." 
Psalms99:5 Goocaai MWATHANI Ngai witũ! Mũthaathaiyei mũrĩ mbere ya gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũthamaki. We nĩ mũtheru! 
Psalms99:6 Musa na Harũni maarĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai aake, naake Samũeli aarĩ ũmwe wa arĩa maamũhooyaga; nĩmaakaĩire MWATHANI, naake akĩmeetĩka." 
Psalms99:7 Aamaarĩirie arĩ gĩtugĩinĩ gĩa itu; nĩmaathĩkĩire mawatho na maathani marĩa aamaheire. 
Psalms99:8 Nĩwetĩkire andũ aaku, MWATHANI Ngai witũ, ũkĩmoonia atĩ we ũrĩ Ngai wohanagĩra, o na gũtuĩka nĩwamaherithirie nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maao." 
Psalms99:9 Goocaai MWATHANI Ngai witũ, na mũmũthaathaiye mũrĩ kĩrĩmainĩ gĩake gĩtheru, tondũ MWATHANI Ngai witũ nĩ mũtheru!" 
Psalms100:1 Inĩraai MWATHANI inyuĩ andũ oothe a thĩ! 
Psalms100:2 Thaathayai MWATHANI mũcanjamũkĩĩte; ũkaai mbere yake mũkĩinaga mũkeneete! 
Psalms100:3 Menyaai atĩ MWATHANI nĩ Ngai; nĩ we watũũmbire, na tũrĩ aake; tũrĩ andũ aake, na ng'ondu iria arĩithagia" 
Psalms100:4 Toonyeraai ihingo cia Hekaarũ yake mũrĩ na ngaatho thiĩi njainĩ ciayo mũkĩgoocaga.Mũcookeriei ngaatho na mũmũgooce. 
Psalms100:5 Nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI nĩ mwega; wendo wake ndũrĩ hĩndĩ ũgaathira na wĩhokeku wake ũgũtũũra nginya tene na tene. 
Psalms101:1 Nĩngũina rwĩmbo rũkoniĩ wĩhokeku na kĩhooto; wee, MWATHANI, nĩ we ngũinĩra rwĩmbo rũu." 
Psalms101:2 Ndĩrĩthiaga na mĩthiĩre ĩtarĩ na ũcuuke. Ũgooka harĩ niĩ rĩ?Nĩndĩrĩikaraga gwakwa mũciĩ na mũikarĩre mũkinyanĩru," 
Psalms101:3 na nĩndĩrĩreganaga na ũndũ o wothe mũũru.Nĩthũire ciĩko cia arĩa matirikaga Ngai; ndĩrĩgĩaga ngwatanĩro nao. 
Psalms101:4 Ndirĩogomagia kĩhootona ndirĩendaga gũkuhanĩrĩria na ũndũ mũũru. 
Psalms101:5 Nĩndĩrĩniinaga mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũcambagia mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ na hitho; ndirĩkiragĩrĩria mũndũ mwĩtĩi na mũng'athia. 
Psalms101:6 Nĩndĩrĩiguagĩra tha andũ arĩa ehokeku bũrũriinĩ, na ndĩmeetĩkagĩrie maikaranagie na niĩ.Mũndũ o wothe ũtarĩ ũcuuke nĩarĩndungataga." 
Psalms101:7 Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũheenanagia ũrĩikaraga gwakwa; mũndũ ũrĩa waragia ũhoro ũtarĩ wa ma ndarĩikaraga mbere yakwa. 
Psalms101:8 Mũthenya o mũthenya nĩndĩrĩniinaga andũ ooru arĩa marĩ bũrũriinĩ witũ; nĩndĩrĩingataga andũ oothe arĩa meekaga ũũru kuuma itũũra rĩa MWATHANI. 
Psalms102:1 Thikĩrĩria ihooya rĩakwa, MWATHANI, na ũigue gũkaya gwakwa." 
Psalms102:2 Ndũkaae kũrora na kũngĩ rĩrĩa ndĩrathĩĩnĩka! Thikĩrĩria, na ũnjĩtĩke narua ndagũkaĩra!" 
Psalms102:3 Ũtũũro wakwa nĩgũthira ũrathira o ta ũrĩa ndoogo ĩthiraga; mwĩrĩ wakwa ũrakana o ta mwaki. 
Psalms102:4 Hũũrĩkangĩĩte ngahooha o ta nyeki; nĩnjũrĩĩtwo nĩ ngoro ya kũrĩa irio. 
Psalms102:5 Nĩhĩnjĩĩte mũno nĩ ũrĩa ndĩracaaya na hinya. 
Psalms102:6 Haana o ta nderi ya werũinĩ; nduĩkĩĩte o ta ndundu ĩrĩa ĩikaraga kũndũ gũtharũranĩĩtio. 
Psalms102:7 Ndionaga toro; haana ta kanyoni karĩ o goiki gacũmbĩrĩ igũrũ ka nyũmba. 
Psalms102:8 Ndindaga ngĩthirĩkio nĩ thũ ciakwa; arĩa manyũrũragia mahũthagĩra rĩĩtwa rĩakwa makĩrumana. 
Psalms102:9 Ndĩaga mũhu ta irio na ngatukania kĩrĩa ndĩranyua na maithori maakwa," 
Psalms102:10 nĩ ũndũ wa maraakara maaku na mang'ũrĩ tondũ ũnjoeete na igũrũ ũkanyuguta kũndũ kũraaya. 
Psalms102:11 Ũtũũro wakwa ũhaana ta kĩĩruru kĩa hwaĩinĩ; ndĩrahooha o ta nyeki. 
Psalms102:12 No wee, MWATHANI, ũgũtũũra ũthamakaga nginya tene na tene; rĩĩtwa rĩaku rĩgũtũũra rĩririkanagwo nĩ njiarwa ciothe." 
Psalms102:13 Ti itherũ nĩũkwarahũka ũiguĩre itũũra rĩa Zayuni tha; ihinda rĩa kũrĩka wega nĩrĩrĩĩkĩĩtie gũkinya; ihinda rĩrĩa rĩagĩrĩire ti rĩngĩ nĩ rĩĩrĩ. 
Psalms102:14 Ndungata ciaku nĩirĩendeete, o na gũtuĩka nĩrĩanangĩĩtwo; nĩiringagwo nĩ tha nĩ ũndũ warĩo, o na gũtuĩka nĩrĩtharũranĩĩtio." 
Psalms102:15 Ndũũrĩrĩ nĩigeetigĩra MWATHANI; athamaki oothe a thĩ nĩmageetigĩra hinya wake. 
Psalms102:16 Nĩ ũndũ MWATHANI nĩagaaka Zayuni rĩngĩ; nĩakoonania ũnene wake. 
Psalms102:17 Nĩakaigua ihooya rĩa andũ aake arĩa matiganĩirio, na ndakaanyarara ihooya rĩao." 
Psalms102:18 Andĩkĩra rũciaro rũrĩa rũrooka ũrĩa MWATHANI eekĩĩte, nĩguo arĩa matarĩ aciare makaamũgooca." 
Psalms102:19 MWATHANI aacũũthĩrĩirie arĩ handũ haake hatheru kũu igũrũ, akĩbaara thĩ arĩ igũrũ matuinĩ." 
Psalms102:20 Akĩigua mũcaayo wa arĩa mooheetwo na akĩohora arĩa maatuĩrĩirwo kũũragwo. 
Psalms102:21 Tondũ ũcio rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI nĩrĩkaanĩrĩrwo Zayuni, na nĩagaakumio Jerusalemu," 
Psalms102:22 rĩrĩa mabũrũri na moothamaki makoongana hamwe mathaathaiye MWATHANI. 
Psalms102:23 MWATHANI nĩahinyarĩĩtie ndĩ o mwĩthĩ, nĩakuhakuhĩĩtie muoyo wakwa." 
Psalms102:24 Ndũkanjũrage, Ngai wakwa, itarĩ mũkũrũ.Wee, MWATHANI, ũtũũraga nginya tene na tene;" 
Psalms102:25 nĩ we wombire thĩ kuuma o tene, na ũkĩũmba igũrũ na mooko maaku." 
Psalms102:26 Thĩ na igũrũ nĩigaathira, no wee ndũgaathira; igaakũra o ta nguo.Ũgaaciteania o ta nguo, nacio ithire." 
Psalms102:27 No wee-rĩ, ndũgarũrũkaga; muoyo waku ũtũũraga tene na tene." 
Psalms102:28 Ciana ciitũ nĩigaatũũra na thaayũ, na njiarwa ciacio nĩigaikaraga na thaayũ imenyereirwo nĩ we." 
Psalms103:1 Ngoro yakwa, gooca MWATHANI!Kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩ thĩinĩ wakwa nĩgĩkumie rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩtheru!" 
Psalms103:2 Ngoro yakwa, gooca MWATHANI! Na ndũkariganĩrwo nĩ ũrĩa e mũtaana." 
Psalms103:3 Anjohagĩra meehia maakwa moothe, na akahonia mĩrimũ yakwa yothe." 
Psalms103:4 Ahonokagia ndigaakue, na akanyonagia wendani na tha" 
Psalms103:5 Ahũũnagia na maũndũ meega mũthenya o mũthenya, nĩguo ngaikaraga ndĩ mwĩthĩ na ndĩ na hinya ta rwĩgĩ." 
Psalms103:6 MWATHANI nĩoragĩria arĩa mahinyĩrĩirio, na akarũũgamagĩrĩra ihooto ciao." 
Psalms103:7 Nĩaguũrĩirie Musa mĩbango yake, na akĩreka andũ a Isiraeli moone ciĩko ciake cia hinya." 
Psalms103:8 MWATHANI arĩ tha na nĩ muuma andũ, ndaraakaraga na ihenya na aiyũirwo nĩ ũtugi." 
Psalms103:9 Ndaikaraga agĩtũrũithagia, kana araakarĩĩte nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms103:10 Ndatũherithagia ta ũrĩa twagĩrĩirwo nĩkũherithio, kana akerĩhĩria ta ũrĩa meehia na mahĩtia maitũ maigana." 
Psalms103:11 O ta ũrĩa igũrũ rĩraihĩrĩirie thĩ-rĩ, noguo wendo wake ũigana harĩ arĩa mamũtĩĩĩte." 
Psalms103:12 O ta ũrĩa irathĩro rĩraihĩrĩirie ithũĩro, noguo atwehereirie meehia maitũ magatũraihĩrĩria." 
Psalms103:13 O ta ũrĩa mũciari aiguagĩra ciana ciake tha, noguo MWATHANI aiguagĩra tha arĩa mamũtĩĩĩte," 
Psalms103:14 tondũ nĩoĩ kĩrĩa tũũmbĩĩtwo nakĩo; nĩaririkanaga atĩ twĩ rũkũngũ. 
Psalms103:15 Ithuĩ tũhaana o ta nyeki, kana ta ihũa rĩa gĩthaka rĩrĩa rĩcanũkaga na ihenya," 
Psalms103:16 rĩgacooka rĩkahũũrwo nĩ rũhuuho rĩgathira, rĩkaaga gũcooka kuonwo rĩngĩ." 
Psalms103:17 No rĩĩrĩ, wendo wa MWATHANI ũikaranagia na arĩa mamũtĩĩĩte nginya tene na tene, naguo wega wake ũgakinyagĩrĩra njiarwa ciao" 
Psalms103:18 iria imenyagĩrĩra kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩake na ciathĩkagĩra maathani maake. 
Psalms103:19 MWATHANI nĩahandĩĩte gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũthamaki igũrũ matuinĩ, na nĩ mũthamaki wa indo ciothe." 
Psalms103:20 Goocaai MWATHANI, inyuĩ araika aake njamba irĩ hinya, o inyuĩ mwathĩkagĩra maathani maake na mũthikagĩrĩria ũrĩa aroiga!" 
Psalms103:21 Goocaai MWATHANI, inyuĩ mbũtũ ciake ciothe cia ita, o inyuĩ ndungata ciake, mwĩkaga ũrĩa eendeete!" 
Psalms103:22 Goocaai MWATHANI inyuĩ ciũmbe ciake ciothe iria irĩ kũrĩa guothe athamakaga!Ngoro yakwa gooca MWATHANI! 
Psalms104:1 Ngoro yakwa gooca MWATHANI! Ĩ wee, MWATHANI, Ngai wakwa, ndũrĩ mũnene!Wĩhumbĩĩte ũnene na riiri" 
Psalms104:2 na ũkehumba ũtheri ta nguo.Nĩ we watambũrũkirie igũrũ ta hema," 
Psalms104:3 na ũkĩhanda itugĩ cia nyũmba yaku maaĩinĩ marĩa marĩ na kũu igũrũ.Wee nĩ we ũtuaga matu ngaari ya mbarathi ya gũgũkuua, na ũgakuuo nĩ mathagu ma rũhuuho." 
Psalms104:4 Wee nĩ we ũtuaga huuho arekio aaku, nacio heni ũgacitua ndungata ciaku." 
Psalms104:5 Wee nĩ we wakire thĩ mũthingiinĩ wayo, na ndĩrĩ hingo ĩkeenyenyeka." 
Psalms104:6 Wee nĩ we wahumbĩrĩĩte thĩ na maaĩ ma iria ta nguo, namo maaĩ magakunĩkĩria irĩma." 
Psalms104:7 Ũgĩcooka ũgĩkũũma maaĩ makĩũra magĩtherera rĩrĩa maiguire wathana na kayũ kanene," 
Psalms104:8 magĩtherera igũrũ wa irĩma magĩitĩrĩra ciandainĩ, makĩnyũrũrũka na kũrĩa wee wamathondekeire." 
Psalms104:9 Wee nĩ we wekĩrĩire maaĩ macio mĩhaka ĩrĩa matangĩkĩra nĩguo matikaanacooke kũhumbĩra thĩ rĩ kana rĩ. 
Psalms104:10 Wee nĩwe ũtũmaga ithima cia maaĩ itherũkage ciandainĩ, maaĩ maacio magathereragĩra gatagatĩinĩ ka irĩma," 
Psalms104:11 makanyuagwo nĩ nyamũ ciothe cia gĩthaka; ndigiri cia gĩthaka ikenyotoraga namo. 
Psalms104:12 Ngurumoinĩ cia ithima icio nĩkuo nyoni ciakaga itara ciacio, ikainaga irĩ hongeinĩ cia mĩtĩ." 
Psalms104:13 Wee nĩ we uuragĩria irĩma mbura kuuma igũrũ, thĩ ĩiyũire indo iria wombire." 
Psalms104:14 Wee nĩ we ũtũmaga nyeki ĩkũre nĩ ũndũ wa mahiũ na ũgakũria mĩmera ĩrĩa andũ mahandaga, nĩguo moonage gĩa kũrĩa kuuma tĩĩriinĩ," 
Psalms104:15 na moonage ndibei ya kũmacanjamũra ngoro, na maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ makwĩhaka ũthiũ makarura wega, na irio cia kũrĩa makagĩa na hinya." 
Psalms104:16 Mĩtarakwa ya Lebanoni nĩyuragĩrio mbura wega; mĩtĩ ĩyo nĩ ya MWATHANI kĩũmbe, nĩ we mwene wamĩhandire." 
Psalms104:17 Mĩtĩinĩ ĩyo nĩ ho nyoni ciakaga itara ciacio; mĩkarakabainĩ nĩkuo nyũmba cia mĩĩhau irĩ. 
Psalms104:18 Irĩmainĩ iria ndaaya nĩkuo mbũri cia gĩthaka ciikaraga, nakuo ndwaroinĩ cia mahiga nĩkuo itoore cionaga gwa kwĩhitha." 
Psalms104:19 Wee-rĩ, nĩ we wombire mweri ũmenyithanagie imera; riũa narĩo nĩ rĩũĩ ihinda rĩarĩo rĩa gũthũa." 
Psalms104:20 Nĩ we ũtũmaga kũgĩe nduma gũgagĩtuka, nacio nyamũ ciothe cia gĩthaka ikoimĩra iceemeete." 
Psalms104:21 Mĩrũũthi ĩrĩa mĩĩthĩ ĩraramaga o ĩkĩhĩtaga, ĩgĩcaragia irio iria Ngai amĩheaga." 
Psalms104:22 Riũa rĩaratha, ĩkahũndũka ĩgathiĩ ĩgakoma imaamoinĩ ciayo." 
Psalms104:23 Nao andũ magathiĩ mawĩrainĩ magakĩmaruta o nginya hwaĩinĩ. 
Psalms104:24 Ĩ wee, MWATHANI, indo iria ũũmbĩĩte ti nyingĩ! Ũciũmbĩĩte ciothe na ũũgĩ! Thĩ ĩiyũire ciũmbe ciaku." 
Psalms104:25 Iria nĩrĩo rĩĩrĩa, inene na rĩariĩ ta kĩ, rĩiyũire ciũmbe irĩ muoyo itangĩtarĩka; iria niini o na iria nene." 
Psalms104:26 Meeri nĩkuo igeragĩra, na nokuo Leviathani, ndamaathia ya iriainĩ ĩrĩa wee wombire, itũũhaga na ĩgathaaka." 
Psalms104:27 Indo icio ciothe nĩ we ikoragwo iroreete igũrũ nĩguo ũciheage irio ciacio rĩrĩa ciabatara. 
Psalms104:28 Ũciheaga, nacio ikooya ikarĩa; ũciheaga irio na guoko gwaku ikahũũna wega." 
Psalms104:29 Rĩrĩa wacitiganĩria ikaigua guoya mũno; wathengia mĩhũũmũ yaku, igakua igacooka tĩĩri ũrĩa ciarĩ o mbere." 
Psalms104:30 Rĩrĩa wacihe mĩhũũmũ yaku ikoombĩka, nĩ we werũhagia maũndũ moothe marĩa marĩ gũũkũ thĩ." 
Psalms104:31 Riiri wa MWATHANI ũrotũũra nginya tene na tene! MWATHANI arokenera wĩra wake! 
Psalms104:32 Aroraga thĩ, ĩkainaina; ahuutagia irĩma, ikaruta ndoogo." 
Psalms104:33 Ngũtũũra nyinagĩra MWATHANI matukũ moothe ma muoyo wakwa; ndĩrĩinaga ngĩgoocaga Ngai wakwa matukũ moothe marĩa ngũtũũra muoyo. 
Psalms104:34 MWATHANI arokenio nĩ meciiria maakwa, nĩ gũkorwo nĩ we ũheaga gĩkeno." 
Psalms104:35 Eehia maroniinwo kuuma gũũkũ thĩ; andũ arĩa aaganu marothira o biũ.Ngoro yakwa gooca MWATHANI! Goocaai MWATHANI! 
Psalms105:1 Cookeriai MWATHANI ngaatho, anĩrĩraai ũnene wake, menyithiai andũ oothe a thĩ ũrĩa eekĩĩte." 
Psalms105:2 Mũgooceei na nyĩmbo; menyithaniai maũndũ moothe ma magegania marĩa eekĩĩte! 
Psalms105:3 Kenaai tondũ tũrĩ aake; arĩa oothe mamũthaathayagia nĩmacanjamũke! 
Psalms105:4 Cariai MWATHANI, o na hinya wake; mũthaathayagiei hingo ciothe." 
Psalms105:5 (5-6) Inyuĩ njiarwa cia Aburahamu, ndungata yake, o inyuĩ njiarwa cia Jakubu, ũrĩa Ngai athuurĩĩte; ririkanaai ciama iria Ngai aaringire, o na matuĩro marĩa aatuire." 
Psalms105:6 MWATHANI nĩ we Ngai witũ; maathani maake nĩmakũrũmagĩrĩrwo nĩ thĩ yothe. 
Psalms105:7 Egũtũũra amenyereire kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩake nginya tene na tene, na ndakaariganĩrwo nĩ ciĩranĩro ciake rĩ kana rĩ." 
Psalms105:8 Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩu nĩkĩo aarĩĩkanĩire na Aburahamu, na nokĩo eerĩire Isaaka na mwĩhĩtwa." 
Psalms105:9 MWATHANI nĩerũhĩirie Jakubu kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩu, gĩa gũtũũra tene na tene," 
Psalms105:10 akiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩngaakũhe bũrũri wa Kanaani; ũcio nĩguo ũgaatuĩka igai rĩaku.”" 
Psalms105:11 Andũ acio a Ngai matiarĩ aingĩ; maarĩ o ageni bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani. 
Psalms105:12 Maatũire moorũũraga mabũrũriinĩ moothe, na moimaga ũthamakiinĩ ũmwe, magathiĩ ũngĩ." 
Psalms105:13 No rĩĩrĩ, Ngai ndaigana gwĩtĩkĩria mũndũ o na ũmwe amahinyĩrĩrie; nĩguo amamenyerere nĩakaanirie athamaki" 
Psalms105:14 akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũtikaanahuutie andũ aakwa arĩa njitĩrĩirie maguta ngamaamũra; mũtikaaneeke anabii aakwa ũũru.”" 
Psalms105:15 Na rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI agĩtũma kũgĩe na ng'aragu bũrũriinĩ wao, akĩniina irio ciao ciothe." 
Psalms105:16 No nĩatũmĩĩte mũndũ mbere yao, Josefu, ũrĩa wendeetio arĩ ngombo." 
Psalms105:17 Aikaraga ooheetwo na mabĩngũ magũrũ, na ooheetwo nyororo ngingo," 
Psalms105:18 o nginya rĩrĩa ũndũ ũrĩa oigĩĩte nĩũgeekĩka wekĩkire. Kiugo kĩa MWATHANI gĩkĩonania atĩ aarĩ mũndũ wa ma. 
Psalms105:19 Naake mũthamaki wa Misiri akĩohorithia Josefu; mwathi wa ndũũrĩrĩ akĩmũrekereria. 
Psalms105:20 Akĩmũtua mũnene wa thirikaari yake, na akĩmũhe wathani wa bũrũri wake wothe." 
Psalms105:21 Aarĩ na hinya wa gwathaga anene a kwa mũthamaki, na ũhoti wa kũheaga arĩa maataaraga mũthamaki." 
Psalms105:22 Nĩrĩo Jakubu, aathiire Misiri, agĩthaamĩra bũrũriinĩ ũcio." 
Psalms105:23 Naake MWATHANI agĩtũma andũ aake maingĩhe mũno, na magĩe na hinya gũkĩra thũ ciao." 
Psalms105:24 Agĩgĩtũma Amisiri mathũũre andũ aake, na mathugundĩre ndungata ciake mĩbango ya wara." 
Psalms105:25 Nĩrĩo aatũmire ndungata yake Musa, na Harũni, ũrĩa aathuurĩĩte." 
Psalms105:26 Nao magĩĩka ciĩko cia Ngai cia hinya, na makĩringa ciama kũu Misiri." 
Psalms105:27 Naake Ngai agĩtũma kũgĩe na nduma ndumanu mũno bũrũriinĩ ũcio, no Amisiri matiigana gwathĩkĩra maathani maake." 
Psalms105:28 Agĩkĩgarũra maaĩ maao magĩtuĩka thakame, na akĩũraga thamaki ciao ciothe." 
Psalms105:29 Bũrũri wao wothe ũkĩiyũra ciũra, o na nginya nyũmba thĩinĩ kwa mũthamaki wao." 
Psalms105:30 Ngai agĩcooka agĩathana, naguo bũrũri wothe ũkĩiyũra ngi na rwagĩ." 
Psalms105:31 Agĩcooka akĩrekia mbura ya mbembe na heni, handũ ha mbura bũrũriinĩ wao;" 
Psalms105:32 akĩhũũra mĩthabibũ yao na mĩkũyũ o na agĩatũranga mĩtĩ ya bũrũri wao. 
Psalms105:33 Agĩcooka agĩathana o rĩngĩ, gũgĩũka mĩrumbĩ ya ngigĩ itangĩtarĩka," 
Psalms105:34 ikĩrĩa mĩmera yothe ĩrĩa yarĩ bũrũriinĩ ũcio, na ikĩrĩa irio ciothe cia mũgũnda ikĩniina." 
Psalms105:35 Ngai agĩcooka akĩũraga aariũ oothe a marigithaathi mĩciĩinĩ yothe ya andũ a Misiri. 
Psalms105:36 Nĩrĩo aarutire Aisiraeli kuo makuuĩĩte betha na thahabu na gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wao ũtaarĩ na hinya na ũgima mwega wa mwĩrĩ. 
Psalms105:37 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa moimagarire Amisiri magĩkena, nĩ gũkorwo nĩmaanyiitĩĩtwo nĩ guoya nĩ ũndũ wa andũ acio a Isiraeli." 
Psalms105:38 Naake Ngai agĩtambũrũkia itu igũrũ rĩa andũ aake, akĩmahumbĩra, na akĩmahe mwaki wa kũmamũrĩkagĩra ũtukũ." 
Psalms105:39 Rĩrĩa maamwĩtirie irio akĩmareehithĩria tũmakia arũme, na akĩmahe irio cia kuuma igũrũ na ũingĩ." 
Psalms105:40 Ningĩ Ngai nĩatũranirie rwaro rwa ihiga, maaĩ magĩthothoka, magĩtherera werũinĩ o ta rũũĩ." 
Psalms105:41 Ndaigana kũriganĩrwo nĩ kĩĩranĩro, kĩrĩa eerĩire Aburahamu ndungata yake na mwĩhĩtwa." 
Psalms105:42 Kwoguo, MWATHANI agĩkĩruta andũ aake aamũre kuuma bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri, nao makĩina makiugagĩrĩria nĩgũkena." 
Psalms105:43 Akĩmahe mabũrũri ma ndũũrĩrĩ, magĩkĩĩgwatĩra ũtonga wa andũ angĩ." 
Psalms105:44 Eekire ũguo nĩguo andũ aake maathĩkagĩre mawatho maake na marũmagĩrĩre kĩrĩra gĩake.Goocaai MWATHANI! 
Psalms106:1 Goocaai MWATHANI! Cookeriai MWATHANI ngaatho tondũ nĩ mwega; wendo wake nĩ wa nginya tene tene! 
Psalms106:2 Nũũ ũngĩhota kũgana ciĩko cia hinya iria eekĩĩte, kana amũgooce ta ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire?" 
Psalms106:3 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ arĩa marũmagĩrĩra kĩhooto, o arĩa meekaga wega hingo ciothe." 
Psalms106:4 Ndirikanaga, MWATHANI, rĩrĩa ũratuga andũ aaku; honokagia rĩrĩa ũramahonokia," 
Psalms106:5 nĩguo nyonage ũgaacĩru wa andũ aaku aamũre, na ngenanagĩre na rũũrĩrĩ rwaku, na ndĩrahage hamwe na arĩa marĩ aaku kĩũmbe." 
Psalms106:6 Ithuĩ-rĩ, twĩhĩĩtie o ta ũrĩa maithe maitũ meehirie; nĩtũhĩtĩĩtie na tũgeeka ũũru." 
Psalms106:7 Rĩrĩa maithe maitũ maarĩ Misiri, matiigana kũmenya ciĩko cia Ngai cia magegania; nĩmaariganĩirwo nĩ maita marĩa anameenda, makĩremera Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno marĩ rũteereinĩ rwa Iria Ituune." 
Psalms106:8 No nĩamahonokirie, o ta ũrĩa eeranĩire, nĩguo oonanie ũrĩa hinya wake wĩ mũnene." 
Psalms106:9 Aathire Iria Ituune rĩũme, narĩo rĩkĩũma; akĩringĩria andũ aake kũndũ kuomĩĩte biũ." 
Psalms106:10 Na njĩra ĩyo akĩmahonokia kuuma harĩ arĩa maamathũire; akĩmakũũra kuuma harĩ thũ ciao. 
Psalms106:11 Thũ icio ciao ikĩhumbanĩrio nĩ maaĩ; hatirĩ o na ĩmwe yatigarire. 
Psalms106:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ aake magĩĩtĩkia ciĩranĩro ciake, makĩmũinĩra makĩmũgoocaga." 
Psalms106:13 No rĩĩrĩ, makĩriganĩrwo o narua nĩ ũrĩa eekĩĩte, matiigana gweterera Ngai amataare." 
Psalms106:14 Makĩnyiitwo nĩ thuti nene ya irio marĩ kũu werũinĩ, na makĩgeria Ngai marĩ o kuo." 
Psalms106:15 Naake MWATHANI akĩmahe kĩrĩa maamũũrĩĩtie, agĩcooka akĩmarekeria mũrimũ mũũru." 
Psalms106:16 Na rĩĩrĩ, maambĩĩte hema ciao o kũu werũinĩ, andũ amwe nĩmaiguĩrĩire Musa ũiru, o na makĩigua ũiru nĩ ũndũ wa Harũni ndungata theru ya MWATHANI." 
Psalms106:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo thĩ ĩgĩkĩemũka, ĩkĩmeria Dathani, na ĩgĩthikania Abiramu na mũciĩ wake." 
Psalms106:18 Thuutha wa ũguo mwaki ũgĩtuthũkĩra arũmĩrĩri aao, ũgĩcina andũ acio aaganu." 
Psalms106:19 Rĩrĩa maarĩ Sinai, magĩthondeka mũhianano wa thahabu wa gateegwa, makĩũthaathaiya." 
Psalms106:20 Magĩgĩkũũrania Ngai na mũhianano wa ndeegwa ĩrĩa ĩrĩaga nyeki. 
Psalms106:21 Makĩriganĩrwo nĩ Ngai ũrĩa wamahonokirie, o ũrĩa wekire ciĩko cia hinya Misiri," 
Psalms106:22 o na makĩriganĩrwo nĩ maũndũ ma magegania marĩa eekĩire bũrũriinĩ ũcio, na ciĩko cia kũguoyohania iria eekĩire Iriainĩ Ituune." 
Psalms106:23 Ngai nĩangĩaniinire andũ aake, tiga aathaithirwo nĩ Musa, ndungata yake ĩrĩa aathuurĩĩte, ndakaae kũmaniina na maraakara." 
Psalms106:24 Magĩcooka makĩnyarara bũrũri ũrĩa mwega tondũ matiigana gwĩtĩkia ũrĩa Ngai aameerĩire. 
Psalms106:25 Makĩng'oong'oora marĩ hemainĩ ciao, na makĩaga gwathĩkĩra MWATHANI." 
Psalms106:26 Tondũ ũcio akĩoya guoko na igũrũ akĩĩhĩta atĩ nĩegũtũma makuire kũu werũinĩ," 
Psalms106:27 na ahurunje njiarwa ciao ndũũrĩrĩinĩ, igakuĩre mabũrũriinĩ mageni." 
Psalms106:28 Ningĩ Aisiraeli marĩ Peori nĩmaatuĩkire arũmĩrĩri a ngai ĩrĩa yetagwo Baali, na makĩrĩa magongoona marĩa maarutagĩrwo ngai ĩtaarĩ muoyo." 
Psalms106:29 Ciĩko ciao nĩciatũmire MWATHANI araakare, naake akĩmareehithĩria mũrimũ mũũru." 
Psalms106:30 No rĩĩrĩ, Finehasi akĩrũũgama na igũrũ akĩherithia arĩa maarĩ na mahĩtia, naguo mũthiro ũgĩthira." 
Psalms106:31 Ũndũ ũcio mwega eekire nĩũtũire ũririkanagwo nĩ andũ, na ũgũtũũra ũririkanagwo nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms106:32 Aisiraeli nĩmaaraakaririe MWATHANI marĩ ithimainĩ cia Meriba, naake Musa agĩtoonya thĩĩnainĩ nĩ ũndũ wao," 
Psalms106:33 tondũ nĩmaamũiguithirie ũũru mũno ngoro, akĩaria arĩ na maraakara." 
Psalms106:34 Matiigana kũniina ndũũrĩrĩ, ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aamaathĩĩte meeke;" 
Psalms106:35 handũ ha gwĩka ũguo-rĩ, maatumire ndũgũ nacio, na makĩĩruta mĩtugo yacio." 
Psalms106:36 Magĩcooka makĩambĩrĩria gũthaathaiya mĩhianano ya ndũũrĩrĩ icio, naguo ũndũ ũcio ũkĩmareehithĩria mũthiro." 
Psalms106:37 Makĩruta aariũ na aarĩ aao magongoona kũrĩ ngoma," 
Psalms106:38 magĩgĩita thakame ĩtaarĩ na mahĩtia, ya aariũ na aarĩ aao, o arĩa maarutaga marĩ magongoona kũrĩ mĩhianano ya Kanaani naguo bũrũri ũgĩthaahio nĩ thakame ĩyo." 
Psalms106:39 O nao eene makĩnyiitwo nĩ thaahu nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko icio ciao, na makĩaga gũtuĩka ehokeku harĩ Ngai." 
Psalms106:40 Tondũ ũcio MWATHANI akĩraakarĩra andũ aake, na akĩnyiitwo nĩ mang'ũrĩ nĩ ũndũ wao." 
Psalms106:41 Akĩmaneana mookoinĩ ma ndũũrĩrĩ, magĩgĩathwo nĩ thũ ciao." 
Psalms106:42 Makĩhinyĩrĩrio nĩ thũ ciao, na makĩigwo rungu rwa watho wacio." 
Psalms106:43 MWATHANI nĩahonokirie andũ aake maita maingĩ, no o makĩĩrutanĩria o kũmũremera, na kwoguo magĩgĩthiĩ na mbere kũrikĩra meehiainĩ maao." 
Psalms106:44 O na kũrĩ ũguo, MWATHANI nĩamaiguire rĩrĩa maakaire, na akĩona mĩnyamaaro ĩrĩa maarĩ nayo." 
Psalms106:45 Nĩ ũndũ wao-rĩ, akĩririkana kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩake, na akĩgarũra meciiria maake nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa arĩ muuma andũ." 
Psalms106:46 Agĩgĩtũma maiguĩrwo tha nĩ arĩa oothe maamahinyagĩrĩria. 
Psalms106:47 Tũhonokie, MWATHANI Ngai witũ, na ũtũcookanĩrĩrie kuuma ndũũrĩrĩinĩ, nĩguo tũgũcookagĩrie ngaatho na tũkumagie rĩĩtwa rĩaku rĩtheru." 
Psalms106:48 Goocaai MWATHANI, Ngai wa Isiraeli; mũgooceei rĩu nginya tene na tene!Andũ oothe ugaai atĩrĩ, “Ameni!” Goocaai MWATHANI!" 
Psalms107:1 “Cookeriai MWATHANI ngaatho, tondũ nĩ mwega; wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene!”" 
Psalms107:2 Inyuothe arĩa MWATHANI ahonokeetie ugaai ũguo. Nĩamũhonokeetie kuuma harĩ thũ cianyu 
Psalms107:3 akamũcookia amũrutĩĩte kuuma mabũrũriinĩ mageni, kuuma irathĩro na ithũĩro, na kuuma rũgongo na kĩanda." 
Psalms107:4 Amwe nĩmoorũũrire werũinĩ ũrĩa ũtaarĩ o na kĩ, maagĩĩte njĩra ya kũmakinyia itũũra mangĩonire gwa gũtũũra." 
Psalms107:5 Maarĩ ahũũtu na makanyoota na magate mwĩhoko wothe. 
Psalms107:6 Magĩkaĩra MWATHANI marĩ mĩnyamaaroinĩ yao, naake akĩmahonokia kuuma mathĩĩnainĩ maao." 
Psalms107:7 Akĩmagereria njĩra nũngĩrĩru, nginya magĩkinya itũũra mangĩonire gwa gũtũũra." 
Psalms107:8 Andũ acio ta nĩmagĩcookerie MWATHANI ngaatho tondũ wa ũtugi wake, o na nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko cia magegania iria aameekĩire." 
Psalms107:9 We-rĩ, nĩanyootoraga arĩa anyootu, na akahũũnia arĩa ahũũtu na maũndũ meega." 
Psalms107:10 Amwe maikaraga ndumainĩ methikĩire makĩnyariirĩkaga marĩ mĩgwate mooheetwo na mĩnyororo," 
Psalms107:11 tondũ nĩmaaremeire maathani ma Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe, na makĩnyarara mataaro maake." 
Psalms107:12 Nao makĩrutithio wĩra mũritũ ũkĩmooraga ngoro, magĩthiĩ makĩgũaga, na matione wa kũmateithia." 
Psalms107:13 Magĩkaĩra MWATHANI marĩ mĩnyamaaroinĩ yao, naake akĩmahonokia kuuma mathĩĩnainĩ maao." 
Psalms107:14 Akĩmaruta kũu maikaraga ndumainĩ methikĩire, na agĩtuanga mĩnyororo yao." 
Psalms107:15 Andũ acio ta nĩmagĩcookerie MWATHANI ngaatho tondũ wa ũtugi wake, o na nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko cia magegania iria aameekĩire." 
Psalms107:16 We-rĩ, nĩoinangaga ihingo cia gĩcango, na agatinangia cuuma iria ihingagwo nacio." 
Psalms107:17 Amwe maarĩ irimũ cianyariirĩkaga nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maacio, o na nĩ ũndũ wa ũũru wacio." 
Psalms107:18 Moonaga irio o ciothe makaira ngoro, nao magĩgĩkuhĩrĩria gũkua." 
Psalms107:19 Magĩkaĩra MWATHANI marĩ mĩnyamaaroinĩ yao, naake akĩmahonokia kuuma mathĩĩnainĩ maao." 
Psalms107:20 Agĩathana, akĩmahonia, akĩmahonokia kuuma gĩkuũinĩ." 
Psalms107:21 Andũ acio ta nĩmagĩcookerie MWATHANI ngaatho tondũ wa ũtugi wake, o na nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko cia magegania iria aameekĩire." 
Psalms107:22 Nĩmamũrutĩre magongoona ma kũmũcookeria ngaatho na magane ũrĩa wothe eekĩĩte makĩinaga makeneete. 
Psalms107:23 Amwe maagereire iriainĩ na meeri, makĩhũũraga mbiacara kũu iriainĩ," 
Psalms107:24 makĩyonera ũrĩa MWATHANI angĩĩka, o na makĩyonera ciĩko ciake cia magegania kũu iriainĩ." 
Psalms107:25 MWATHANI aathanire, gũkĩgĩa na kĩhuuhũkanio kĩnene, gĩgĩtũma iria rĩgĩe na makũmbĩ." 
Psalms107:26 Meeri igĩikanio na igũrũ, igĩcooka igĩikanio na kũu thĩ.Andũ acio magĩgĩkua ngoro tondũ wa ũrĩa maarĩ ũgwatiinĩ mũnene;" 
Psalms107:27 makĩagaaga magĩtũgũũgaga ta arĩĩu, matarĩ na ũndũ o na ũmwe mangĩahotire gwĩteithia naguo." 
Psalms107:28 Magĩkaĩra MWATHANI marĩ mĩnyamaaroinĩ yao, naake akĩmahonokia kuuma mathĩĩnainĩ maao." 
Psalms107:29 Naake akĩhooreria kĩhuuhũkanio kĩu kĩnene, namo makũmbĩ macio ma iria makĩhoorera." 
Psalms107:30 Nao magĩgĩkena tondũ iria nĩrĩahoorereete, naake akĩmakinyia o wega icukĩro rĩa meeri rĩrĩa merirĩirie gũkinya." 
Psalms107:31 Andũ acio ta nĩmagĩcookerie MWATHANI ngaatho tondũ wa ũtugi wake, o na nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko cia magegania iria aameekĩire." 
Psalms107:32 Nĩmagane ũnene wake kĩũnganoinĩ kĩa andũ, na mamũgooce marĩ kĩamainĩ kĩa atongoria." 
Psalms107:33 MWATHANI atũmaga njũũĩ ihwe, na agatũma ithima itige gũtherera." 
Psalms107:34 Atũmaga bũrũri ũrĩa mũnoru ũhĩnje, nĩ ũndũ wa waganu wa atũũri aaguo." 
Psalms107:35 Agarũraga werũ ũgatuĩka kũndũ kũrĩ na tũria twa maaĩ, na agatũma ithima cia maaĩ ikunũke kũndũ kũũmagaru," 
Psalms107:36 akareka andũ arĩa ahũũtu matũũre kũndũ kũu, nao magaaka itũũra rĩrĩa marĩikaraga." 
Psalms107:37 Makahanda irio mĩgũndainĩ na makahanda mĩthabibũ, makagetha magetha maingĩ." 
Psalms107:38 MWATHANI araathimaga andũ aake makagĩa na ciana nyingĩ, na ndarekaga mahiũ maao manyiihe." 
Psalms107:39 Rĩrĩa andũ a Ngai maahootwo na maaconorithio na ũndũ wa kũhinyĩrĩrio mategũcaaĩrwo na kũnyariirwo," 
Psalms107:40 nĩanyararaga arĩa maramahinyĩrĩria, na agatũma moorũre werũinĩ maturuurĩĩte." 
Psalms107:41 No rĩĩrĩ, nĩahatũraga arĩa abataru kuuma mĩnyamaaroinĩ yao, na agatũma maciarane makaingĩha o ta mahiũ." 
Psalms107:42 Andũ arĩa athingu moonaga ũguo magakena, no andũ arĩa oothe aaganu nĩgũkirio makiragio." 
Psalms107:43 Mũndũ o wothe mũũgĩ ta nĩagĩĩciirie ũhoro wa maũndũ macio; na akĩmenye ũrĩa MWATHANI e mũtugi. 
Psalms108:1 Ndingĩenyenyeka, Ngai, ndingĩenyenyeka! Nĩngũina na ngũgooce! Wee roho wakwa arahũka!" 
Psalms108:2 Arahũkaai kĩnanda na ngita! Nĩngwarahũra riũa! 
Psalms108:3 Nĩngũgũcookeria ngaatho, MWATHANI, ndĩ gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ; nĩngũkũinĩra nyĩmbo cia gũkũgooca ndĩ gatagatĩinĩ ka ndũũrĩrĩ." 
Psalms108:4 Nĩ gũkorwo ũtugi waku nĩ mũraaya gũkĩra igũrũ; wĩhokeku waku ũkinyĩĩte o igũrũ matuinĩ. 
Psalms108:5 Onania ũnene waku Ngai, kũu igũrũ, na riiri waku gũũkũ thĩ yothe!" 
Psalms108:6 Tũhonokie na hinya waku, na ũnjookerie ihooya rĩakwa nĩguo andũ arĩa wendeete matharwo kuuma ũgwatiinĩ." 
Psalms108:7 Ngai, arĩ gĩikaro gĩake gĩtheru, nĩoigĩĩte atĩrĩ, “Ngwatũranga Shekemu ngĩrũũhagia, na ngayanĩrie andũ aakwa gĩtuamba gĩa Sukothu." 
Psalms108:8 Gileadi nĩ gwakwa, o na Manase; Efiraimu nĩ ngobia yakwa ya kũngitĩra mũtwe; Juda nĩ mũthĩĩgi wakwa wa ũthamaki." 
Psalms108:9 Moabi nĩ kĩraĩ gĩakwa gĩa gwĩthambĩra; nĩ niĩ mwene bũrũri wa Edomu.Nĩngũkena ngĩrũũhagia nĩ ũrĩa hooteete bũrũri wa Filisitia.” 
Psalms108:10 Nũũ ũkũndwara itũũrainĩ rĩrĩa rĩirigĩirwo na thingo cia hinya? Nũũ ũkũndongoria andware Edomu? 
Psalms108:11 No wee, Ngai, nĩũtũregeete; wee, Ngai, ndumagaranagia na mbũtũ ciitũ cia ita." 
Psalms108:12 Tũhootanĩre harĩ thũ ciitũ, nĩ gũkorwo ũteithio wa mũndũ nĩ wa tũhũ." 
Psalms108:13 Ngai arĩ hamwe na ithuĩ nĩtũkũhootana; nĩ we ũkũrangĩrĩria thũ ciitũ thĩ. 
Psalms109:1 Ndũgaakire, Ngai, wee nĩ we ngoocaga!" 
Psalms109:2 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩnjũkĩrĩirwo nĩ andũ ooru na aheenania, maraaria ndeto ciakwa makĩheenanagia." 
Psalms109:3 Manyumĩĩte na mĩena yothe makĩaragia ciugo cia rũthũũro, na magĩtharĩkagĩra hatarĩ gĩtũmi." 
Psalms109:4 O na gũtuĩka nĩndĩmeendeete, na nĩndĩmahooyagĩra, no kũnjuuka maranjuuka." 
Psalms109:5 Marandĩha wega na ũũru, na makandĩha wendani na rũmena." 
Psalms109:6 Mũndũ ũrĩa arĩ we thũ yakwa, mũthuurĩre mũtuanĩri mũũru wa kũmũciirithia, na ũreke ĩmwe ya thũ ciake ĩmũthitange." 
Psalms109:7 Arociirithio na oonekane arĩ na mahĩtia; ihooya rĩake rĩronwo rĩrĩ o meehia! 
Psalms109:8 Ũtũũro wake ũrokuhĩha; wĩra wake ũroywo nĩ mũndũ ũngĩ! 
Psalms109:9 Ciana ciake irotuĩka cia ngoriai, naake mũtumia wake arotuĩka wa ndigwa." 
Psalms109:10 Ciana ciake irocangacanga ikĩhooyaga; irorutũrũrwo maganjoinĩ maacio kũrĩa itũũraga. 
Psalms109:11 Indo ciake ciothe irotahwo nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩ thiirĩ naake; andũ a kũngĩ maroeyoera indo ciothe iria aanathũkũma. 
Psalms109:12 Aroaga mũndũ ũngĩmũtaanahĩra; o na kana ciana ciake cia ngoriai cione mũndũ ũngĩciiguĩra tha. 
Psalms109:13 Njiarwa ciake ciothe irokua; rũciaro rũrĩa rũgooka rũroriganĩrwo nĩ rĩĩtwa rĩake. 
Psalms109:14 MWATHANI aroririkanaga mahĩtia ma maithe maake, na aroaga gũkaanoohera nyina meehia maake." 
Psalms109:15 Meehia maao marotũũra maririkanagwo nĩ MWATHANI, na arotũma marĩĩtwa maao mariganĩre gũũkũ thĩ o biũ!" 
Psalms109:16 Tondũ rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ ũcio ndarĩ hĩndĩ arĩ eciiria kuonania ũtaana; wĩra wake ũraarĩ kũnyariira na kũũraga athĩĩni, arĩa abataru, na arĩa makuĩte ngoro." 
Psalms109:17 Arogwatwo nĩ kĩrumi, tondũ we arendeete o kũrumana!Iraathimo iromũraihĩrĩria, tondũ we ndaraathimanaga!" 
Psalms109:18 Aramenyereete kũrumana o ta ũrĩa amenyereete kwĩhumba nguo. Irumi icio ciake iroconjoria mwĩrĩ wake o ta maaĩ; irotoonya mahĩndĩinĩ maake o ta maguta! 
Psalms109:19 Iromũhumbagĩra o ta nguo iria ehumbaga, na imwĩrigiicagĩrie ta mũcibi ũrĩa eyohaga." 
Psalms109:20 Herithia thũ ciakwa ta ũguo, MWATHANI, o icio ciaragia maũndũ mooru igũrũ rĩakwa." 
Psalms109:21 No rĩĩrĩ, wee Ngai MWATHANI wakwa, ndeithia o ta ũrĩa wĩranĩire, na ũhonokie tondũ wĩ mwega na nĩũnyendeete." 
Psalms109:22 Nĩ gũkorwo ndĩ mũthĩĩni na nĩmbataire, na ngaiguithio ruwo o ngoro thĩinĩ." 
Psalms109:23 Ndĩ hakuhĩ kũbuĩria o ta kĩĩruru kĩa hwaĩinĩ; nyũmbũrĩĩtwo nĩ rũhuuho o ta ngigĩ. 
Psalms109:24 Maru maakwa nĩmoorĩĩtwo nĩ hinya nĩ ũndũ wa kwĩhinga kũrĩa; ndĩ mũhĩnju mũno. 
Psalms109:25 Andũ manyona, no gũũthekerera mathekagĩrĩra; mainainagia mĩtwe makĩnduaga mĩnyĩrĩ." 
Psalms109:26 Ndeithia, MWATHANI Ngai wakwa! Honokia, tondũ wa ũtugi waku!" 
Psalms109:27 Menyithia thũ ciaku atĩ wee, MWATHANI, nĩ we ũhonokagia." 
Psalms109:28 No inume, no we nĩũkũndaathima.Arĩa manyariiraga marohootwo, na niĩ, ndungata yaku, ndĩrocanjamũka." 
Psalms109:29 Thũ ciakwa irohumbwo nĩ thoni; irwehumba gĩconoko gĩacio ta kabuuti. 
Psalms109:30 Nĩngũcookeria MWATHANI ngaatho mũno nyanĩrĩire; nĩngũmũgooca ndĩ ũũnganoinĩ wa andũ," 
Psalms109:31 tondũ nĩagitagĩra mũndũ mũbataru na akamũhonokia kuuma harĩ arĩa mamũtuĩrĩire gĩkuũ. 
Psalms110:1 MWATHANI nĩerire MWATHANI wakwa atĩrĩ, “Ikara thĩ mwena wakwa wa ũrĩo, nginya rĩrĩa ngaatũma ũrangĩrĩrie thũ ciaku.”" 
Psalms110:2 MWATHANI nĩagaatũma ũthamaki waku ũnenehe wambĩrĩirie Zayuni, nawe nĩũgaathaga thũ ciaku iria ĩgũthiũrũrũkĩirie." 
Psalms110:3 Andũ aaku nĩmakeerutĩra mũthenya ũrĩa ũkaarũa na thũ ciaku.Aanake aaku magooka kũrĩ we irĩmainĩ iria theru matariĩ ta ime rĩa rũũciinĩ kĩrooko tene. 
Psalms110:4 MWATHANI nĩehĩtĩĩte na ndangĩĩricũkwo, akoiga atĩrĩ, “Wee ũgũtũũra ũrĩ mũthĩnjĩri Ngai kinya tene o ta ũrĩa Melikizedeki aatariĩ.”" 
Psalms110:5 MWATHANI e mwena waku wa ũrĩo; rĩrĩa arĩraakara nĩarĩhehenja athamaki. 
Psalms110:6 Nĩagaatuĩra ndũũrĩrĩ na aiyũrie kũrĩa kũrũagĩrwo na ciimba; nĩakaahoota athamaki gũũkũ thĩ guothe. 
Psalms110:7 Mũthamaki nĩakaanyua maaĩ karũũĩinĩ karĩa karĩ mũkĩra wa njĩra. Tondũ ũcio nĩakaagĩa na ũhootani. 
Psalms111:1 Goocaai MWATHANI! Nĩngũcookeria MWATHANI ngaatho na ngoro yakwa yothe ndĩ kĩũnganoinĩ kĩa andũ aake. 
Psalms111:2 Ĩ ciĩko iria MWATHANI eekaga ti cia magegania! Arĩa oothe makenagio nĩcio nĩmeendaga gũcimenya. 
Psalms111:3 Ciĩko ciake ciyũire ũtĩĩku na riiri; ũthingu wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms111:4 MWATHANI nĩatũmĩĩte ciĩko ciake cia magegania iririkanwo; MWATHANI nĩ mũtugi na mũigua tha. 
Psalms111:5 Arĩa mamũtĩĩĩte nĩamaheaga irio, na ndariganagĩrwo nĩ kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩake." 
Psalms111:6 Nĩoneetie andũ aake hinya wake, na ũndũ wa kũmahe mabũrũri ma ndũũrĩrĩ." 
Psalms111:7 Akoragwo arĩ mwĩhokeku na wa kĩhooto ũndũinĩ o wothe ũrĩa eekaga; maathani maake moothe nĩmakwĩhokwo. 
Psalms111:8 Megũtũũra nginya tene na tene; maaheanirwo nĩ we na ũũma na ũthingu. 
Psalms111:9 Nĩahonokirie andũ aake, na agĩthondeka kĩrĩĩkanĩro nao gĩa gũtũũra tene na tene.We nĩ mũtheru na wa kũguoyohania." 
Psalms111:10 Gũtĩĩa MWATHANI nĩkuo kĩhumo kĩa ũũgĩ wothe;Ngai nĩahotithagia andũ arĩa mathĩkagĩra maathani maake gũtuithania maũndũ wega.Arotũũra agoocagwo nginya tene na tene. 
Psalms112:1 Goocaai MWATHANI!Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũtĩĩĩte MWATHANI; o ũrĩa ũkenagĩra gwathĩkĩra maathani maake." 
Psalms112:2 Ciana ciake nĩirĩkoragwo irĩ cia bata bũrũriinĩ; njiarwa ciake nĩirĩraathimagwo. 
Psalms112:3 Mũciĩ wake ũrĩkoragwo na indo na ũtonga, naake egũtũũra agaacĩire nginya tene." 
Psalms112:4 Andũ arĩa eega, o arĩa marĩ tha, oima andũ, na a kĩhooto, nĩmaragĩrwo nĩ ũtheri ndumainĩ." 
Psalms112:5 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũkombanagĩra na ũtaana, o ũrĩa wĩkaga maũndũ maake na njĩra ya kĩhooto." 
Psalms112:6 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwega ndarĩ hingo akeenyenyeka; egũtũũra aririkanagwo nginya tene. 
Psalms112:7 Ndainainagio nĩ ndũmĩrĩri njũru; wĩtĩkio wake nĩ mũrũmu, na aikaraga ehokeete o MWATHANI." 
Psalms112:8 Aikaraga oomĩrĩirie na ndetigagĩra, o nginya akoona thũ ciake ikĩhootwo." 
Psalms112:9 Arĩa marĩ na thĩĩna, amaheaga na ũtaana, na ũtaana wake ndũrĩ hingo ũthiraga; nĩarĩkoragwo na hinya na nĩarĩtĩĩagwo." 
Psalms112:10 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu oonaga ũguo akaraakara; aroraga na manyiira agacooka akairĩria, kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩake gĩgaatuĩka gĩa tũhũ." 
Psalms113:1 Goocaai MWATHANI! Inyuĩ ndungata cia MWATHANI, goocaai rĩĩtwa rĩake." 
Psalms113:2 Rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI rĩrogoocwo kuuma rĩu nginya tene na tene. 
Psalms113:3 Rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI rĩrogoocwo kuuma irathĩro nginya ithũĩro! 
Psalms113:4 MWATHANI aathaga ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe; riiri wake ũrĩ na kũu igũrũ rĩa igũrũ. 
Psalms113:5 Gũtirĩ ũhaana ta MWATHANI Ngai witũ. Aikarĩire gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũthamaki na kũu igũrũ rĩa igũrũ," 
Psalms113:6 no nĩainamagĩrĩra acũũthĩrĩrie igũrũ na thĩ. 
Psalms113:7 Ooyaga athĩĩni na igũrũ akamaruta rũkũngũinĩ; akaruta arĩa abataru kĩarainĩ 
Psalms113:8 akamatua araata a anene, o anene a andũ aake." 
Psalms113:9 Nĩatũmaga mũtumia ũrĩa thaata aheeo gĩtĩĩo gwake mũciĩ; nĩamũkenagia na ũndũ wa kũmũhe ciana.Goocaai MWATHANI! 
Psalms114:1 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli moimire Misiri, o rĩrĩa njiarwa cia Jakubu ciomire bũrũri mũgeni;" 
Psalms114:2 Juda gwatuĩkire kũndũ kwa Ngai kwamũre, Isiraeli gũgĩtuĩka kũndũ kũrĩa aathanaga." 
Psalms114:3 Iria rĩonire ũguo rĩkĩũra, naruo rũũĩ rwa Jorodani rũgĩcooka na thuutha." 
Psalms114:4 Irĩma igĩtũũhatũũha ta ndũrũme, ithũngũri ikĩrũũgarũũga ta ng'ondu." 
Psalms114:5 Kaĩ kwahaanire atĩa nĩguo, wee Iria ũũre, nawe Jorodani ũcooke na thuutha?" 
Psalms114:6 Kaĩ kwahaanire atĩa, inyuĩ irĩma, mũtũũhatũũhe ta ndũrũme, na inyuĩ ithũngũri mũrũũgarũũge ta ng'ondu?" 
Psalms114:7 Wee, thĩ, inaina ũrĩ mbere ya MWATHANI, o hau mbere ya Ngai wa Jakubu," 
Psalms114:8 ũrĩa wagarũrire rwaro rwa ihiga rũgĩtuĩka iria rĩa maaĩ, ihiga rĩrĩa rĩũmũ mũno rĩgĩtuĩka gĩthima kĩa maaĩ." 
Psalms115:1 Nowe wiki MWATHANI, o wee wiki tu, wagĩrĩire kũgoocwo, no ti ithuĩ, tondũ wĩ mũtugi na mwĩhokeku." 
Psalms115:2 Nĩkĩ gĩgũtũma ndũũrĩrĩ itũũrie atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ Ngai wanyu arĩ ha?”" 
Psalms115:3 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, Ngai witũ arĩ igũrũ; eekaga o ũrĩa wothe ekwenda." 
Psalms115:4 Mĩhianano ya ndũũrĩrĩ nĩ ya betha na thahabu ĩthondekeetwo nĩ mooko ma andũ. 
Psalms115:5 Ĩrĩ na tũnua, no ndĩaragia, ĩrĩ na maitho, no ndĩonaga." 
Psalms115:6 Ĩrĩ na matũ, no ndĩiguaga; ĩrĩ na maniũrũ, no ndĩiguaga mũnungo." 
Psalms115:7 Ĩrĩ na mooko, no ndĩhambataga; ĩrĩ na magũrũ, no ndĩngĩĩtwara; ndĩngĩnyuria o na haniini." 
Psalms115:8 Arĩa oothe mamĩthondekaga na arĩa oothe mamĩhokaga magaatuĩka o ta yo. 
Psalms115:9 Mwĩhokeei MWATHANI, inyuĩ andũ a Isiraeli! Nĩ we ũmũteithagia na akamũmenyerera" 
Psalms115:10 Mwĩhokeei MWATHANI, inyuĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai! Nĩ we ũmũteithagia na akamũmenyerera." 
Psalms115:11 Mwĩhokeei MWATHANI, inyuothe arĩa mũmũtĩĩĩte! Nĩ we ũmũteithagia na akamũmenyerera." 
Psalms115:12 MWATHANI nĩatwĩciiragia na nĩegũtũraathima; nĩekũraathima andũ a Isiraeli na athĩnjĩri Ngai oothe. 
Psalms115:13 Nĩekũraathima arĩa oothe mamũtĩĩĩte, aniini na anene." 
Psalms115:14 MWATHANI aromũhe ciana nyingĩ inyuĩ eene na njiarwa cianyu! 
Psalms115:15 Mũroraathimwo nĩ MWATHANI, ũrĩa wombire igũrũ na thĩ!" 
Psalms115:16 Igũrũ nĩ rĩa MWATHANI wiki, no thĩ nĩamĩheanĩĩte kũrĩ andũ." 
Psalms115:17 MWATHANI ndagoocagwo nĩ arĩa akuũ; ndagoocagwo nĩ ũrĩa wothe ũikũrũkĩĩte bũrũri wa ũkiri. 
Psalms115:18 No ithuĩ arĩa tũrĩ muoyo nĩtũrĩmũcookagĩria ngaatho kuuma rĩu nginya tene na tene. Goocaai MWATHANI! 
Psalms116:1 Nĩnyendeete MWATHANI, tondũ nĩaiguĩte mũgambo wakwa na mahooya maakwa." 
Psalms116:2 Tondũ nĩathikĩrĩirie-rĩ, ngũtũũra ndĩmũkayagĩra matukũ moothe marĩa ngũtũũra muoyo." 
Psalms116:3 Ndathiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ gĩkuũ na mĩena yothe, na ngĩkumbacwo nĩ mĩnyororo ya kwa arĩa akuũ ĩrĩa ĩ ruwo; ngĩkĩgĩa na kĩeha na ngĩthĩĩnĩka." 
Psalms116:4 Ngĩgĩkaĩra MWATHANI ngiuga atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI, ndagũthaitha honokia muoyo wakwa!”" 
Psalms116:5 MWATHANI nĩ mũtugi na nĩ mwega; Ngai witũ arĩ tha. 
Psalms116:6 MWATHANI nĩamenyagĩrĩra arĩa matangĩhota gwĩteithia; nĩahonokirie rĩrĩa ndarĩ ũgwatiinĩ. 
Psalms116:7 Ngoro yakwa hoorera, nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI nĩanjĩkĩĩte wega." 
Psalms116:8 MWATHANI nĩahonokeetie kuuma harĩ gĩkuũ; nĩaniinĩĩte maithori maakwa na akagirĩrĩria ndikaahootwo. 
Psalms116:9 Tondũ ũcio nĩndĩthiaga ndĩ mbere ya MWATHANI ndĩ bũrũri wa arĩa marĩ muoyo. 
Psalms116:10 No ndeetĩkĩĩtie o na rĩrĩa ndoigire atĩrĩ, “Ĩ ndithĩĩnĩkĩĩte!”" 
Psalms116:11 Na ngiuga makĩĩte atĩrĩ, “Ĩ andũ ti a maheeni!”" 
Psalms116:12 Nĩ kĩĩ ingĩrutĩra MWATHANI nĩ ũndũ wa wega wothe ũrĩa anjĩkĩĩte? 
Psalms116:13 Nĩkũrutĩra ngũrutĩra MWATHANI kĩheeo kĩa ndibei ndĩmũcookerie ngaatho nĩ ũndũ wa kũũhonokia," 
Psalms116:14 na hingie ũrĩa njĩĩranĩire andũ aake oothe marĩ ho. 
Psalms116:15 MWATHANI, nĩatuuragwo mũno rĩrĩa ũmwe wa andũ aake ehokeku akua." 
Psalms116:16 MWATHANI, niĩ ndĩ ndungata yaku; ndĩ ndungata, o ta ũrĩa maitũ aarĩ. nĩũhonokeetie kuuma harĩ gĩkuũ." 
Psalms116:17 Nĩngũkũrutĩra igongoona rĩa gũgũcookeria ngaatho na ngũthaathaiye. 
Psalms116:18 (18-19) Maũndũ marĩa ngwĩrĩire MWATHANI, ngũmahingia ndĩ Jerusalemu. Ngũmahingĩria njainĩ cia Hekaarũ ngĩonagwo nĩ andũ oothe.Goocaai MWATHANI!" 
Psalms117:1 Goocaai MWATHANI, inyuĩ ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe! Mũtũũgĩriei inyuĩ andũ oothe!" 
Psalms117:2 Nĩ gũkorwo wendo wake nĩ mũingĩ harĩ ithuĩ, na wĩhokeku wake nĩ wa gũtũũra nginya tene na tene.Goocaai MWATHANI!" 
Psalms118:1 Cookeriai MWATHANI ngaatho, tondũ nĩ mwega, na wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene." 
Psalms118:2 Andũ a Isiraeli tanĩmoige atĩrĩ, “Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.”" 
Psalms118:3 Athĩnjĩri Ngai tanĩmoige atĩrĩ, “Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.”" 
Psalms118:4 Arĩa oothe matĩĩĩte MWATHANI tanĩmoige atĩrĩ, “Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.”" 
Psalms118:5 Ndakaĩire MWATHANI rĩrĩa ndahatĩrĩirio, naake akĩnjĩtĩka na akĩndeithũra." 
Psalms118:6 MWATHANI arĩ hamwe na niĩ, ndirĩ ũndũ ingĩtigĩra. Mũndũ-rĩ, nĩ atĩa angĩhota kũnjĩka?" 
Psalms118:7 MWATHANI nĩũndeithagia, nĩngeyonera thũ ciakwa ikĩhootwo." 
Psalms118:8 Nĩ kaba kwĩhoka MWATHANI handũ ha kwĩhoka andũ. 
Psalms118:9 Nĩ kaba kwĩhoka MWATHANI handũ ha kwĩhoka athamaki. 
Psalms118:10 Ndaarĩ mũthiũrũkĩrie nĩ thũ nyingĩ, no MWATHANI akĩndeithia gũciananga." 
Psalms118:11 Ciathiũrũrũkĩirie na mĩena yothe, no MWATHANI akĩndeithia gũciananga." 
Psalms118:12 Cianyũmbĩrĩire mĩena yothe o ta njũkĩ, no MWATHANI akĩndeithia gũciananga, ikĩhora na ihenya o ta mwaki wa mĩigua." 
Psalms118:13 Ndahatĩkĩĩtwo nĩ thũ hakuhĩ ngũe, no MWATHANI akĩndeithia." 
Psalms118:14 MWATHANI nĩ we ũheaga hinya na ũhoti; nĩ we ũhonokeetie. 
Psalms118:15 Taiguai ũrĩa andũ a Ngai maroigĩrĩria makeneete marĩ hemainĩ ciao nĩ ũndũ wa kũhootana; “MWATHANI nĩatooranĩĩtie! 
Psalms118:16 Hinya wa MWATHANI nĩũtũhootanĩire! Hinya wake mũnene nĩũtooranĩĩtie!” 
Psalms118:17 Niĩ-rĩ, ndigũkua, no nĩgũtũũra ngũtũũra muoyo, ng'anage ũrĩa MWATHANI eekĩĩte." 
Psalms118:18 MWATHANI nĩaherithĩĩtie mũno, no ndandekereirie ngue." 
Psalms118:19 Hingũrĩraai ihingo cia Hekaarũ nĩguo ndoonye ngacookerie MWATHANI ngaatho. 
Psalms118:20 Gĩĩkĩ-rĩ, nĩ kĩhingo kĩa MWATHANI; arĩa athingu no o mangĩgĩtoonyera." 
Psalms118:21 Nĩngũgũcookeria ngaatho, MWATHANI, nĩ ũndũ nĩũnjĩtĩkĩĩte, na ũkaahe ũhootani." 
Psalms118:22 Ihiga rĩrĩa aaki maaregire nĩrĩo rĩgĩĩte bata gũkĩra marĩa mangĩ moothe mũthingiinĩ. 
Psalms118:23 Nĩ MWATHANI wekire ũguo, na ũndũ ũcio nĩ wa magegania tũkĩwona." 
Psalms118:24 Ũyũ nĩguo mũthenya ũrĩa MWATHANI ahootanĩĩte; nĩtũkeneei na tũcanjamũke! 
Psalms118:25 MWATHANI, tũhonokie, twagũthaitha! MWATHANI, twagũthaitha tũma tũgaacĩre!" 
Psalms118:26 Kũraathimwo nĩ ũrĩa ũgũũka na rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI! Tũrĩ Hekaarũinĩ ya MWATHANI nĩtwamũraathima inyuĩ. 
Psalms118:27 MWATHANI nĩ we Ngai, nĩatwĩkĩĩte wega.Ambĩrĩriai gũkũngũiya mũnyiitĩĩte mathĩgĩ na mooko; thiũrũrũkaai kĩgongoona." 
Psalms118:28 Wee nĩ we Ngai wakwa, nĩngũgũcookeria ngaatho; wee nĩ we Ngai wakwa, nĩngũgana ũrĩa wĩ mũnene." 
Psalms118:29 Cookeriai MWATHANI ngaatho, tondũ nĩ mwega; wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene." 
Psalms119:1 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ arĩa mũtũũrĩre wao ũtarĩ ũcuuke, arĩa matũũraga kũringana na watho wa MWATHANI." 
Psalms119:2 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ arĩa marũmagĩrĩra maathani maake, o arĩa mamwathĩkagĩra na ngoro yothe," 
Psalms119:3 na matihĩtagia o na atĩa, o no kũgera mageragĩra njĩra cia MWATHANI." 
Psalms119:4 Wee, MWATHANI, nĩũtũheete maathani maaku, na nĩũtwĩrĩĩte tũmaathĩkagĩre na kĩyo." 
Psalms119:5 Naarĩ korwo ndatuĩka mwĩhokeku ũhoroinĩ wa gwathĩkĩra mawatho maaku! 
Psalms119:6 Ingĩathĩkagĩra maathani maaku moothe-rĩ, ndĩrĩconorithagio nĩ andũ." 
Psalms119:7 Nĩndĩrĩkũgoocaga na ngoro theru, rĩrĩa ũrĩkoragwo ũkĩnduta matua maaku ma kĩhooto." 
Psalms119:8 Nĩndĩrĩathĩkagĩra mawatho maaku; ndũkaandiganĩrie o na rĩ! 
Psalms119:9 Mũndũ mwĩthĩ-rĩ, angĩiga mũtũũrĩre wake wĩ mũtheru atĩa? No na ũndũ wa gwathĩkagĩra uuge waku." 
Psalms119:10 Ngwathĩkagĩra na ngoro yakwa yothe; ndũkaareke nemere maathani maaku. 
Psalms119:11 Njigĩĩte uuge waku ngoroinĩ yakwa, nĩguo ndikaae gũkwĩhĩria." 
Psalms119:12 Nĩngũkũgooca, wee, MWATHANI, nduta mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:13 Nĩnguuga nyanĩrĩire ngĩcookagĩra mawatho moothe marĩa wee ũheanĩĩte. 
Psalms119:14 Nĩngenagio nĩkũrũmĩrĩra maũira maaku makĩria ma ũrĩa ngenagio nĩkũgĩa na ũtonga mũingĩ. 
Psalms119:15 Nĩndĩrĩtaranagia ũhoro wa mawatho maaku, na nduĩragie ũhoro wa njĩra ciaku." 
Psalms119:16 Nĩngenagio nĩ mawatho maaku; ndikaariganĩrwo nĩ uuge waku. 
Psalms119:17 Njĩka wega, niĩ, ndungata yaku, nĩguo ndũũre na njathĩkagĩre uuge waku." 
Psalms119:18 Hingũra maitho, nĩguo hote kuona ũrutani wa magegania ũrĩa ũrĩ wathoinĩ waku." 
Psalms119:19 Niĩ-rĩ, ndĩ o mũgeni kwa ihinda iniini gũũkũ thĩ; ndũkaahithe maathani maaku." 
Psalms119:20 Ngoro yakwa hingo ciothe nĩhĩahĩaga nĩkwĩrirĩria kũmenya matua maaku. 
Psalms119:21 Wee-rĩ, nĩũkũũmaga andũ arĩa etĩĩi, o arĩa agwate nĩ kĩrumi, arĩa maremeire maathani maaku." 
Psalms119:22 Ndũkaareke maanume na maanyarare, tondũ nĩmenyereire maũira maaku." 
Psalms119:23 O na aathani maikara thĩ manjiirĩre ũũru niĩ ndungata yaku, no ndĩrĩtaranagia ũhoro wa mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:24 Maũira maaku nĩmangenagia; nĩ mo mandaaraga. 
Psalms119:25 Njaraganĩĩte thĩ hootekeete; njookeria hinya rĩngĩ, o ta ũrĩa wĩranĩire!" 
Psalms119:26 Rĩrĩa ndakwĩrire ũrĩa wothe ndeekĩĩte-rĩ, wee nĩwanjookeirie; nduta mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:27 Ndeithia kũmenya mawatho maaku, na niĩ nĩndĩrĩciiragia ũhoro wa ũrutani waku wa magegania." 
Psalms119:28 Ndĩ na kĩeha kĩingĩ mũno ngoroinĩ yakwa; nyongerera hinya, o ta ũrĩa weranĩire!" 
Psalms119:29 Ndeithia ndikaarũmĩrĩre mĩtugo mĩũru, na ũndute na kwenda gwaku watho waku." 
Psalms119:30 Niĩ-rĩ, thuurĩĩte gũgwathĩkĩra; nĩthikĩrĩirie matua maaku." 
Psalms119:31 Nĩnũmĩĩtie maũira maaku, MWATHANI; ndũkaareke njonorithio!" 
Psalms119:32 Nĩndĩrĩathĩkagĩra maathani maaku na kĩyo, tondũ nĩũheaga ũmenyo mũrikĩru." 
Psalms119:33 MWATHANI, nduta ũrĩa mawatho maaku moigĩĩte na nĩndĩrĩmaathĩkagĩra hingo ciothe." 
Psalms119:34 Nduta kũmenya mawatho maaku wega na nĩndĩmaathĩkagĩra, na nĩndĩmamenyagĩrĩra na ngoro yakwa yothe." 
Psalms119:35 Ngereria njĩra ĩrĩa yonanĩnĩirio nĩ maathani maaku, tondũ nĩngenagio nĩ yo." 
Psalms119:36 He wendo wa kũrũmia maũira maaku, handũ ha wendo wa gũtonga." 
Psalms119:37 Ngiragĩrĩria ndikaarũmbũyanagie na maũndũ ma tũhũ; njĩka wega, o ta ũrĩa wĩranĩire." 
Psalms119:38 Hingĩria ũrĩa ũnjĩĩrĩire niĩ ndungata yaku, o ta ũrĩa ũhingagĩria arĩ oothe magwathĩkagĩra ũrĩa ũmeerĩire." 
Psalms119:39 Njehereria irumi iria ndĩtigĩrĩĩte, tondũ matua maaku nĩ meega." 
Psalms119:40 Niĩ-rĩ, ndĩriragĩria o gwathĩkĩra mawatho maaku, he muoyo mwerũ, tondũ we wĩ mũthingu." 
Psalms119:41 MWATHANI wendo waku ũronginyĩra, na ũrohonokia ta ũrĩa wĩranĩire," 
Psalms119:42 nĩguo hote gũcookeria arĩa manyũrũragia, tondũ nĩndĩhokeete kiugo gĩaku." 
Psalms119:43 Hotithagia kwaragia ũũma hingo ciothe, tondũ mawathoinĩ maaku nĩ ho njigĩĩte mwĩhoko wakwa." 
Psalms119:44 Ngũtũũra njathĩkagĩra watho waku nginya tene na tene. 
Psalms119:45 Ndĩrĩikaraga ndĩgangarĩĩte tondũ nĩngeragia gwathĩkĩra mawatho maaku. 
Psalms119:46 Nĩndĩmenyithagia athamaki maũira maaku na ndirĩconokaga. 
Psalms119:47 Nĩngenagio nĩ maathani maaku tondũ nĩndĩmeendeete. 
Psalms119:48 Nĩndĩĩĩte na ngenda maathani maaku; nĩndĩciiragia ũhoro wa mawatho maaku. 
Psalms119:49 Ririkana kiugo kĩrĩa ũnjĩĩrĩire, niĩ ndungata yaku; ũndũ ũcio ũnjĩĩrĩĩte nĩũheete kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro." 
Psalms119:50 Rĩrĩa ndĩranyariirĩka-rĩ, nĩhooragĩrio nĩkũmenya atĩ ũndũ ũrĩa ũnjĩĩrĩire nĩguo ũnjĩkagĩra muoyo." 
Psalms119:51 Andũ arĩa etĩĩi nĩmanyũrũrĩĩtie mũno, no nditigĩĩte kũrũmĩrĩra watho waku." 
Psalms119:52 Nĩnyũmagĩrĩria ngoro, MWATHANI, rĩrĩa ndaririkana matua marĩa wanatua." 
Psalms119:53 Nĩndaakaraga mũno nĩkuona andũ aaganu makĩaga gwathĩkĩra watho waku. 
Psalms119:54 Ndungaga nyĩmbo ikoniĩ maathani maaku, ndĩ muoyoinĩ ũyũ wa gũũkũ thĩ wa ihinda inyiinyi." 
Psalms119:55 Nĩngũririkanaga ũtukũ, MWATHANI, na ngaathĩkĩra watho waku." 
Psalms119:56 Ũndaathimĩĩte ũguo tondũ nĩnjathĩkĩire mawatho maaku. 
Psalms119:57 MWATHANI nĩnjiganĩĩtwo nĩ we; nĩngũkwĩrĩra atĩ nĩndĩrĩathĩkagĩra ciugo ciaku. 
Psalms119:58 Ndagũthaitha na ngoro yakwa yothe ũnjiguĩre tha, o ta ũrĩa wĩranĩire." 
Psalms119:59 Nĩndĩciirĩĩtie wega ũhoro wa mĩthiĩre yakwa; nĩndakwĩrĩra atĩ nĩndĩrĩathĩkagĩra mataaro maaku. 
Psalms119:60 Ndĩrĩathĩkagĩra maathani maaku na ihenya mũno. 
Psalms119:61 Ndiriganĩirwo nĩ watho waku, o na gũtuĩka nĩnjigĩirwo mĩtego nĩ andũ aaganu." 
Psalms119:62 Njũkagĩra thaa thita cia ũtukũ gũkũgooca tondũ wa matua maaku ma kĩhooto. 
Psalms119:63 Ndĩ mũraata wa arĩa oothe magũtĩĩĩte na mathĩkagĩra mawatho maaku. 
Psalms119:64 Ũtugi waku, MWATHANI, ũiyũire thĩ; nduta mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:65 MWATHANI, nĩũnjĩkĩĩte wega, niĩ ndungata yaku, o ta ũrĩa wĩranĩire." 
Psalms119:66 Nduta gũtuithania maũndũ wega o na kũmamenya, tondũ nĩndĩhokeete maathani maaku." 
Psalms119:67 Nĩndahĩtagia mbere ya ũtanaaherithia, no rĩu nĩnjathĩkagĩra uuge waku." 
Psalms119:68 Wee wĩ mwega na nĩwĩkaga wega; nduta mawatho maaku. 
Psalms119:69 Andũ arĩa etĩĩi nĩmanjigĩrĩire igeenyo, no niĩ njathĩkagĩra mawatho maaku na ngoro yakwa yothe." 
Psalms119:70 Andũ acio etĩĩi nĩ ariitu, no niĩ ngenagio nĩ watho waku." 
Psalms119:71 Kũherithio kũrĩa ndaherithirio kwarĩ kwega, tondũ nĩkwandutire mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:72 Watho ũrĩa waheanire, harĩ niĩ wĩ bata gũkĩra ũtonga wothe wa gũũkũ thĩ." 
Psalms119:73 Mooko maaku nĩ mo manyũmbire, na magĩĩthondeka ũguo ndariĩ; he ũmenyo nĩguo ndĩrute maathani maaku." 
Psalms119:74 Arĩa magũtĩĩĩte marĩnyonaga magakena, tondũ nĩndĩhokeete ũrĩa wĩranĩire." 
Psalms119:75 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ matua maaku nĩ ma kĩhooto, MWATHANI, na ũherithĩĩtie tondũ wĩ mwĩhokeku." 
Psalms119:76 Ũtugi waku ũronyũmagĩrĩria o ta ũrĩa ũnjĩĩrĩire, niĩ ndungata yaku." 
Psalms119:77 Njiguĩra tha, na nĩngũtũũra muoyo, tondũ nĩngenagio nĩ watho waku." 
Psalms119:78 Andũ arĩa etĩĩi maroconorithio, tondũ nĩmanjigĩrĩire igeenyo; haakwa mwene-rĩ, mawatho maaku nĩmo ndĩrĩciiragia ũhoro wamo." 
Psalms119:79 Arĩa magũtĩĩĩte, o arĩa mooĩ maathani maaku, maronjookerera." 
Psalms119:80 Reke njathĩkagĩre mawatho maaku na ngoro yakwa yothe, nĩguo ndikaanaconoke." 
Psalms119:81 MWATHANI, nĩtheethũkĩĩte njetereire ũhonokie; mwĩhoko wakwa ndĩũigĩĩte kiugoinĩ gĩaku." 
Psalms119:82 Maitho maakwa nĩmanogeete nĩgũcũũthĩrĩria ũrĩa wanjĩrĩire njũũragia atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ ũgaakĩndeithia rĩ?”" 
Psalms119:83 Njagĩĩte bata o ta mondo ya rũũa ya ndibei ndũrĩkangu; no rĩĩrĩ, ndiriganĩirwo nĩ mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:84 Ngweterera nginya rĩ, niĩ ndungata yaku? Arĩa maranyariira ũkaamaherithia rĩ?" 
Psalms119:85 Andũ etĩĩi, mataathĩkagĩra watho waku, nĩmeenjeete marima nĩguo mandege." 
Psalms119:86 Maathani maaku moothe nĩmakwĩhokwo, andũ nĩmaranyariira hatarĩ gĩtũmi, ndeithia." 
Psalms119:87 Makirie kũnjũraga, no nditiganĩirie mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:88 Honokia muoyo wakwa, nĩ ũndũ wa ũtugi waku, nĩguo njathĩkagĩre kĩrĩra gĩaku." 
Psalms119:89 Kiugo gĩaku, MWATHANI gĩgũtũũra tene na tene, gĩgũtũũra nginya tene na tene kũu igũrũ." 
Psalms119:90 Wĩhokeku waku nĩ wa nginya tene na tene, nĩ we wahandire thĩ, na ĩtũũraga ĩrũmĩĩte." 
Psalms119:91 Indo ciothe ikoreetwo ho nginyagia rĩu nĩ ũndũ nĩ we ũtuĩte ũguo; indo ciothe nĩ we itungataga. 
Psalms119:92 Korwo watho waku tiguo ũkoreetwo ũrĩ gĩkeno gĩakwa, nĩingĩkuĩte nĩ ũndũ wa kũnyariirĩka." 
Psalms119:93 Ndikaariganĩrwo nĩ mawatho maaku o na rĩ, tondũ nĩũnjigĩĩte muoyo na ũndũ wa mo." 
Psalms119:94 Ndĩ waku honokia! Nĩngereetie gwathĩkĩra mawatho maaku. 
Psalms119:95 Andũ aaganu manjohetie manjũrage, no niĩ ndĩciiragia ũhoro wa kĩrĩra gĩaku." 
Psalms119:96 Nĩmenyeete atĩ gũtirĩ ũndũ mũkinyanĩru; maathani maaku no mo makinyanĩru. 
Psalms119:97 Ĩ ndiendeete watho waku! Nĩndĩciiragia ũhoro waguo mũthenya wothe. 
Psalms119:98 Maathani maaku nĩmanjũhĩgagia gũkĩra thũ ciakwa, tondũ makoragwo hamwe na niĩ hĩndĩ ciothe." 
Psalms119:99 Nĩngĩĩte na ũmenyo gũkĩra arutani aakwa oothe, tondũ nĩndĩciiragia ũhoro wa mataaro maaku." 
Psalms119:100 Nĩngĩĩte na ũũgĩ gũkĩra andũ arĩa akũrũ, tondũ nĩnjathĩkagĩra mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:101 Nĩndĩgirĩrĩirie mĩtugo yothe mĩũru, nĩguo njathĩkĩre uuge waku." 
Psalms119:102 Nditiganĩirie ũrutani waku, tondũ wee mwene nĩ we ũndutĩĩte." 
Psalms119:103 Ĩ kĩrĩra gĩaku gĩtirĩ mũrĩo! Gĩ cama gũkĩra ũũkĩ! 
Psalms119:104 Mawatho maaku nĩmaheaga ũmenyo, tondũ ũcio nĩthũire mĩthiĩre yothe ya maheeni." 
Psalms119:105 Kiugo gĩaku nĩ taawa wa kũũmũrĩkĩra; nĩ ũtheri ũrĩa ũũmũrĩkagĩra njĩra. 
Psalms119:106 Nĩndĩhĩtĩĩte ngwatĩirie atĩ nĩndĩrĩathĩkagĩra matua maaku marĩa me ma kĩhooto. 
Psalms119:107 Nĩnyariirĩkĩĩte mũno, MWATHANI; njiga muoyo, o ta ũrĩa wĩranĩire." 
Psalms119:108 Amũkĩra mahooya maakwa ma gũcookia ngaatho, MWATHANI, na ũndute kĩrĩra gĩaku." 
Psalms119:109 Muoyo wakwa ũkoragwo ũrĩ ũgwatiinĩ hĩndĩ ciothe, no ndiriganagĩrwo nĩ watho waku." 
Psalms119:110 Andũ aaganu nĩmanjigĩire mũtego, no nditiganĩirie mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:111 Kĩrĩra gĩaku nĩkĩo igai rĩakwa rĩa tene na tene; nĩkĩo gĩkeno kĩa ngoro yakwa. 
Psalms119:112 Nĩnduĩte na ngoro yakwa gwathĩkĩra mawatho maaku nginya mũthenya ũrĩa ngaakua. 
Psalms119:113 Niĩ-rĩ, nĩthũire andũ matarĩ kĩhaarĩro, no nĩnyendeete watho waku." 
Psalms119:114 Wee nĩ we mũngitĩri na mũmenyereri, ndĩhokeete o ũrĩa ũnjĩrĩire." 
Psalms119:115 Njehereraai, inyuĩ mwĩkaga ũũru! Niĩ ngwathĩkĩra maathani ma Ngai wakwa." 
Psalms119:116 Nyiitĩrĩra o ta ũrĩa wĩranĩire, nĩguo ndũũre muoyo; ndũkaareke njonoke nĩ ũndũ wa mwĩhoko ũrĩa ndĩ naguo." 
Psalms119:117 Ndirĩrĩra nĩguo ndikoone ũgwati, na nĩndĩrĩrũmbũyanagia na mawatho maaku hingo ciothe." 
Psalms119:118 Wee-rĩ, nĩũregaga arĩa oothe matarũmagĩrĩra mawatho maaku; mĩbango yao ya wara nĩ ya tũhũ." 
Psalms119:119 Maithoinĩ maaku andũ aaganu mahaana ta mahuti ma kĩarainĩ; nĩkĩo niĩ nyendeete kĩrĩra gĩaku. 
Psalms119:120 Nĩnyinainaga nĩ ũrĩa ngwĩtigĩrĩĩte; nĩndĩtigĩrĩĩte matua maaku. 
Psalms119:121 Niĩ-rĩ, njĩkĩĩte o maũndũ ma kĩhooto na meega; ndũkandekererie harĩ arĩa maranyariira!" 
Psalms119:122 Njĩĩrĩra atĩ nĩũkũndeithia niĩ, ndungata yaku; ndũkaareke andũ etĩĩi mahinyĩrĩrie." 
Psalms119:123 Maitho maakwa nĩmanogeete nĩgũgũcũũthĩrĩria ũũke ũhonokie, na ũndeithũre o ta ũrĩa wanjĩrĩire." 
Psalms119:124 Nyonia ũtugi waku, niĩ ndungata yaku, na ũndute mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:125 Niĩ ndĩ ndungata yaku; he ũmenyo nĩguo menyage kĩrĩra gĩaku. 
Psalms119:126 MWATHANI, hingo yaku nĩ nginyu ya gwĩka ũndũ, tondũ andũ matirathĩkĩra watho waku." 
Psalms119:127 Niĩ nĩnyendeete maathani maaku; ndĩmeendeete gũkĩra thahabu, o thahabu ĩrĩa njega mũno." 
Psalms119:128 Tondũ ũcio nĩnũmagĩrĩra mawatho maaku moothe, nĩthũire mĩthiĩre yothe ya maheeni." 
Psalms119:129 Ũrutani waku-rĩ, nĩ wa magegania; ndĩwathĩkagĩra na ngoro yakwa yothe." 
Psalms119:130 Ciugo ciaku ciataarĩrio andũ nĩimareehagĩra ũtheri, na ikoohĩgia arĩa matarĩ oogĩ." 
Psalms119:131 Njathamĩĩtie kanua ngoro ĩkĩhũũrahũũraga, nĩ ũrĩa ndĩrirĩirie maathani maaku." 
Psalms119:132 Hũgũkĩra na ũnjiguĩre tha, o ta ũrĩa ũmenyereete gwĩka arĩa makwendeete." 
Psalms119:133 Menyerera ndikaagũe, o ta ũrĩa ũnjĩĩrĩire, na ndũkaareke ũũru ũndoorie." 
Psalms119:134 Honokia kuuma harĩ arĩa marahinyĩrĩria nĩguo njathĩkĩre mawatho maaku. 
Psalms119:135 Ũthiũ waku ũrotherera, niĩ, ndungata yaku, na ũrondutaga mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:136 Maitho maakwa maraita maithori mategũtigithĩria, tondũ andũ matirathĩkĩra watho waku." 
Psalms119:137 Wee, MWATHANI, wĩ mũthingu, na matua maaku nĩ ma kĩhooto." 
Psalms119:138 Maathani marĩa wee ũheanĩĩte nĩ ma kĩhooto na ma kwĩhokwo o biũ. 
Psalms119:139 Nĩnjinĩĩtwo mũno nĩ maraakara nĩ ũrĩa thũ ciakwa itiganĩirie ciugo ciaku. 
Psalms119:140 Ĩ kĩĩranĩro gĩaku ti kĩa ma! na nĩndĩkĩendeete, niĩ, ndungata yaku." 
Psalms119:141 Nĩnyararĩĩtwo na ngaagĩrwo kĩene, no nditiganĩirie mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:142 Ũthingu waku nĩ wa tene na tene, na watho waku nĩ wa ma." 
Psalms119:143 Nĩthĩĩnĩkĩĩte o na ngatangĩka, no maathani maaku nĩmatũmaga ngene." 
Psalms119:144 Maathani maaku megũtũũra marĩ ma kĩhooto nginya tene na tene; he ũmenyo nĩguo ndũũre muoyo. 
Psalms119:145 Ngũkaĩire na ngoro yakwa yothe; njĩtĩka, MWATHANI, na nĩndĩrĩathĩkagĩra mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:146 Nĩ we ngaĩire; honokia, na nĩndĩrĩmenyagĩrĩra mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:147 Njũkagĩra riũa rĩtanaratha gũgũkaĩra ũndeithie; njigĩĩte mwĩhoko wakwa ũndũinĩ ũrĩa wĩranĩire. 
Psalms119:148 Ndaaraga ũtukũ wothe, itarĩ toro, ngĩtarania ũhoro wa ciĩranĩro ciaku." 
Psalms119:149 Igua mũgambo wakwa, MWATHANI, tondũ wĩ mũtugi; menyerera muoyo wakwa, tondũ we ũrĩ wa kĩhooto." 
Psalms119:150 Arĩa manyariiraga matarĩ na tha nĩmarakuhĩhĩria; nĩ andũ matarũmbũyanagia na watho waku. 
Psalms119:151 No wee, MWATHANI, wĩ hakuhĩ na niĩ, na maathani maaku moothe nĩ ma ma." 
Psalms119:152 Ndamenyire o tene kuuma kĩrĩrainĩ gĩaku atĩ wagĩthondekire kĩrĩ gĩa gũtũũra nginya tene na tene. 
Psalms119:153 Rora mĩnyamaaro yakwa, na ũhonokie, tondũ nditiganĩirie watho waku." 
Psalms119:154 Njarĩrĩria na ũndekererie, honokia o ta ũrĩa wĩranĩire." 
Psalms119:155 Andũ arĩa aaganu matikaahonokio, tondũ matiathĩkagĩra mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:156 Tha ciaku, MWATHANI, nĩ nyingĩ; njiguĩra tha na ũhonokie." 
Psalms119:157 Arĩa maranyariira na arĩa mathũire nĩ aingĩ, no ndiagaga kũrũmĩrĩra mataaro maaku." 
Psalms119:158 Ndoraga andũ arĩa mateetĩkĩĩtie ngamanyarara, tondũ matimenyagĩrĩra maathani maaku." 
Psalms119:159 Tarora ũrĩa nyendeete mawatho maaku! Menyerera MWATHANI, tondũ ũrĩ muuma andũ." 
Psalms119:160 Ũũma nĩguo mũthingi wa uuge waku, na matua maaku ma kĩhooto nĩ ma tene na tene." 
Psalms119:161 Aathani maranyariira hatarĩ gĩtũmi, no niĩ nĩndĩĩĩte ciugo ciaku mũno." 
Psalms119:162 Ngenagĩra ciĩranĩro ciaku o ta ũrĩa mũndũ ũtahĩĩte indo nyingĩ itainĩ akenaga. 
Psalms119:163 Nĩthũire o na nganyarara maheeni, no nĩnyendeete watho waku." 
Psalms119:164 Ngũcookagĩria ngaatho maita maingĩ o mũthenya tondũ wa matua maaku ma kĩhooto. 
Psalms119:165 Arĩa meendeete watho waku nĩmaikaraga na thaayũ mũingĩ, na gũtirĩ ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũngĩtũma mahĩngwo." 
Psalms119:166 Wee, MWATHANI, no we njetereire ũhonokie; nĩhingagia maathani maaku." 
Psalms119:167 Nĩnjathĩkagĩra mawatho maaku, na nĩndĩmeendeete mũno." 
Psalms119:168 Nĩnjathĩkagĩra mawatho na maũira maaku; nĩwonaga ũrĩa wothe njĩkaga. 
Psalms119:169 MWATHANI, gũthaithana gwakwa kũroiguo nĩ we; he ũmenyo o ta ũrĩa wĩranĩire." 
Psalms119:170 Ũroigua ihooya rĩakwa, na ũhonokie tondũ nĩũnjĩĩrĩire ũguo." 
Psalms119:171 Nĩndĩrĩkũgoocaga hĩndĩ ciothe, tondũ nĩũndutaga mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:172 Nĩndĩrĩganaga ciĩranĩro ciaku, tondũ maathani maaku moothe nĩ ma kĩhooto." 
Psalms119:173 Koragwo wĩhaarĩirie hingo ciothe kũndeithia, tondũ nĩthuurĩĩte gwathĩkĩra mawatho maaku." 
Psalms119:174 Nĩtheethũkĩire ũhonokio waku, MWATHANI, Watho waku nĩũngenagia." 
Psalms119:175 Reke ndũũre muoyo nĩguo ngũgoocage na ũreke matua maaku mandeithagie. 
Psalms119:176 Nĩnduruurĩĩte o ta ng'ondu yũrĩĩte; njaria niĩ, ndungata yaku, tondũ nditiganĩirie maathani maaku." 
Psalms120:1 Ndakaĩire MWATHANI ndĩ thĩĩnainĩ, naake akĩnjĩtĩka." 
Psalms120:2 MWATHANI, honokia, kuuma harĩ andũ a maheeni na a ũhinga." 
Psalms120:3 Inyuĩ aheenania aya, Ngai akaamwĩka atĩa? Akaamũherithia atĩa hiihi!" 
Psalms120:4 Akaamũratha na mĩguĩ mĩũgĩ, na amũcine na makara mararĩrĩmbũka mwaki!" 
Psalms120:5 Gũtũũrania na inyuĩ nĩ kũũru o ta gũtũũra Mesheki kana gũtũũrania na andũ a Kedari. 
Psalms120:6 Nĩndũũranĩĩtie kwa ihinda iraaya mũno, na andũ matendeete thaayũ!" 
Psalms120:7 Niĩ nyendeete o thaayũ, no ingĩaria ũhoro wa thaayũ, o meendaga o mbaara!" 
Psalms121:1 Ngũtiira maitho ndore irĩmainĩ; ĩ ũteithio wakwa ũgũkiuma nakũ? 
Psalms121:2 Ũteithio wakwa ũngiuma harĩ MWATHANI, ũrĩa wombire igũrũ na thĩ." 
Psalms121:3 We ndangĩreka ũtirũke; mũkũmenyereri ndacũngaga. 
Psalms121:4 Mũmenyereri wa Isiraeli-rĩ, ndacũngaga kana agakoma." 
Psalms121:5 MWATHANI nĩ we mũkũgitĩri; arĩ hakuhĩ nawe nĩguo akũmenyagĩrĩre. 
Psalms121:6 Ndũrĩkagwo ũũru nĩ riũa mũthenya, kana nĩ mweri ũtukũ." 
Psalms121:7 MWATHANI nĩarĩkũgitagĩra kuuma moogwatiinĩ moothe; nĩarĩmenyagĩrĩra muoyo waku. 
Psalms121:8 MWATHANI nĩarĩkũmenyagĩrĩra, ũgĩthiĩ o na ũgĩcooka, kuuma rĩu nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms122:1 Nĩndĩrakenire manjĩĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũthiĩi nyũmbainĩ ya MWATHANI.”" 
Psalms122:2 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, wee Jerusalemu, rĩu tũrũngiĩ na thĩinĩ wa ihingo ciaku!" 
Psalms122:3 Ĩ wee, Jerusalemu, ndũrĩ itũũra rĩakĩĩtwo rĩnyiitithanĩĩtio wega!" 
Psalms122:4 Gwaku nĩkuo mĩhĩrĩga yũkaga, o yo mĩhĩrĩga yothe ya Isiraeli, gũcookeria MWATHANI ngaatho o ta ũrĩa aamĩathire." 
Psalms122:5 Thĩinĩ waku wee Jerusalemu, nĩkuo athamaki a Isiraeli maikaragĩra itĩ ciao cia ũthamaki nĩguo matuithanie andũ aao." 
Psalms122:6 Hoeraai Jerusalemu thaayũ; ugaai atĩrĩ, “Arĩa meendeete Jerusalemu marogaacĩra." 
Psalms122:7 Kũrĩa thingo ciaku irigicĩirie kũrogĩa na thaayũ, na thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ciaku cia ũthamaki kũroikara kũhooreire.”" 
Psalms122:8 Tondũ wa arĩa twĩtainwo nao o na araata, wee Jerusalemu, ndakũhoera thaayũ." 
Psalms122:9 Tondũ wa nyũmba ya MWATHANI Ngai witũ, ndakũhoera ũgaacĩru, wee Jerusalemu." 
Psalms123:1 Wee, MWATHANI, nĩ we njũthĩrĩirie, o wee ũikarĩire gĩtĩ gĩaku kĩa ũnene kũu igũrũ." 
Psalms123:2 O ta ũrĩa ndungata ĩroraga igũrũ mũnene wayo, na o ta ũrĩa mũirĩĩtu ndungata aroraga mũmĩathi-rĩ, ũguo noguo na ithuĩ tũkũroreete igũrũ, wee, MWATHANI Ngai witũ, ũrĩtũiguĩra tha." 
Psalms123:3 Tũiguĩre tha, MWATHANI, tũiguĩre tha, nĩ gũkorwo nĩtũcambĩĩtio o kũigana." 
Psalms123:4 Nĩtũkirĩrĩirie o kũigana kĩnyũrũri kĩa arĩa maikaraga megangarĩĩte, na njambanio ya andũ etĩĩi." 
Psalms124:1 Tiga MWATHANI araarĩ mwena witũ,Aisiraeli ta nĩmagĩcookere ũguo;" 
Psalms124:2 “Tiga MWATHANI araarĩ mwena witũ rĩrĩa thũ ciitũ iratũtharĩkĩire,"
