Psalms124:3 ingĩratũmeririe tũrĩ o muoyo, nĩ ũrĩa irarĩrĩmbũkĩĩtwo nĩ maraakara nĩ ũndũ witũ." 
Psalms124:4 Tũngĩrahaatirwo nĩ mũiyũro wa maaĩ, tũhubĩkanio nĩ maaĩ;" 
Psalms124:5 tũngĩrahubĩkanirio nĩ kĩguũ gĩgũtherera na ihenya ta rũũĩ.” 
Psalms124:6 MWATHANI arogaathwo, tondũ ndanatũrekereria tũniinwo nĩ thũ ciitũ." 
Psalms124:7 Tũhonokeire ciarera o ta kanyoni koorĩĩte kuuma mũtegoinĩ wa mũtegi nyoni; mũtego nĩũtuĩkĩĩte, tũgakĩũra!" 
Psalms124:8 Ũteithio witũ uumaga harĩ MWATHANI, ũrĩa wombire igũrũ na thĩ." 
Psalms125:1 Arĩa mehokeete MWATHANI mahaana kĩrĩma gĩa Zayuni kĩrĩa gĩtangĩenyenyeka o na atĩa, na gĩgũtũũra kĩĩhandĩĩte nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms125:2 O ta ũrĩa irĩma ithiũrũrũkĩirie Jerusalemu, noguo MWATHANI athiũrũrũkĩirie andũ aake rĩu nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms125:3 Andũ arĩa aaganu matigũtũũra maathaga bũrũri wa andũ arĩa athingu; mangĩtũũra meekaga ũguo-rĩ, andũ arĩa athingu o nao mahota gwĩka ũũru." 
Psalms125:4 MWATHANI, ĩka wega andũ arĩa eega, o arĩa matarĩ ũcuuke ngoroinĩ ciao." 
Psalms125:5 No rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI, ũkĩherithia arĩa matarũmagĩrĩra njĩra yaku, herithia o na arĩa meekaga ũũru.Isiraeli kũroikara na thaayũ!" 
Psalms126:1 Rĩrĩa MWATHANI aatũcookirie Jerusalemu, tuonaga ta arĩ kũroota twarootaga!" 
Psalms126:2 Hĩndĩ ĩyo tũgĩtheka na tũkĩina nyĩmbo tũkeneete, nacio ndũũrĩrĩ ikĩĩrana atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI nĩekĩĩte andũ aake maũndũ manene!”" 
Psalms126:3 MWATHANI nĩatwĩkĩire maũndũ manene; kaĩ nĩtũkeneete-ĩ! 
Psalms126:4 Tũma tũgaacĩre o rĩngĩ, MWATHANI, o ta ũrĩa mbura ĩtũmaga njũũĩ iria ihũĩte ciyũre rĩngĩ." 
Psalms126:5 Arĩa mahandaga makĩrĩraga, marogetha makĩrũũhagia nĩgũkena." 
Psalms126:6 Arĩa moimagaraga makĩrĩraga makuuĩĩte mbegũ cia kũhanda, makaahũndũka makĩrũũhagia nĩgũkena, makuuĩĩte magetha maao." 
Psalms127:1 Tiga nyũmba yakirwo nĩ MWATHANI, amĩaki marutaga wĩra wa tũhũ;tiga itũũra rĩmenyereirwo nĩ MWATHANI, arangĩri no wĩra wa tũhũ makoragwo makĩruta." 
Psalms127:2 Nĩ tũhũ mũtheri mũndũ gũũkagĩra kĩrooko tene na gũkomaga acereirwo akĩruta wĩra nĩguo oone gĩa kũrĩa.MWATHANI-rĩ, ahingagĩria arĩa eendeete mabataro maao marĩ o toro." 
Psalms127:3 Ciana nĩ kĩheeo na nĩ kĩraathimo kuuma kũrĩ MWATHANI. 
Psalms127:4 Ciana iria mũndũ aciaraga arĩ o mwĩthĩ ihaana ta mĩguĩ mĩingĩ ĩnyiitĩĩtwo na mooko nĩ njamba ya ita. 
Psalms127:5 Gũkena-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũcio ũrĩ na mĩguĩ mĩingĩ ta ũguo, tondũ ndarĩ hingo akaahootwo nĩ thũ ciake rĩrĩa rĩothe arĩkoragwo agĩciira nacio." 
Psalms128:1 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ o wothe ũtĩĩĩte MWATHANI, o ũrĩa ũrũmagĩrĩra njĩra ciake." 
Psalms128:2 Wĩra ũrĩa mũndũ ũcio arutaga nĩũrĩmũhingagĩria mabataro maake, na nĩarĩikaraga akeneete na agaacĩire." 
Psalms128:3 Mũtumia wake arĩciaraga o ta mũthabibũ ũrĩa ũciaraga mũno e mũciĩ gwake, nacio ciana ciake irĩkoragwo ihaana ta thuuna cia mĩtamaiyũ ithiũrũrũkĩirie meetha yake." 
Psalms128:4 Ũguo nĩguo mũndũ ũrĩa ũtĩĩĩte MWATHANI arĩraathimagwo. 
Psalms128:5 MWATHANI aroraathimaga mũndũ ũcio arĩ Zayuni. Arotũũra oonaga maũndũ meega thĩinĩ wa Jerusalemu ũtũũro wake wothe! 
Psalms128:6 Arotũũra nginya akoona ciana cia ciana ciake!Isiraeli kũroikara na thaayũ! 
Psalms129:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, Isiraeli, twĩre ũrĩa thũ ciaku cianakũnyariira kuuma ũrĩ o mwĩthĩ." 
Psalms129:2 “Kuuma ndĩ o mwĩthĩ, thũ ciakwa ciananyariira ĩtarĩ na tha, no gũtirĩ hĩndĩ irĩciandooria." 
Psalms129:3 Thũ ciakwa ciandemangire mũgongo ũkĩhaana ta mũgũnda ũrĩmĩĩtwo na mũraaũ. 
Psalms129:4 No rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI nĩ mwĩhokeku, nĩatuangĩĩte mĩnyororo ĩrĩa ndĩroheetwo nayo nĩ andũ aaganu.”" 
Psalms129:5 Arĩa oothe mathũire Zayuni marohũndũrwo maconokeete. 
Psalms129:6 Marohaana ta nyeki ĩmereete igũrũ wa nyũmba, ĩrĩa ĩhoohaga o na ĩtarĩ ĩrakũra," 
Psalms129:7 na ndĩtuagwo nĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ kana ĩgakuuo ĩrĩ ihĩĩri. 
Psalms129:8 Arĩa mahĩtũkagĩra hakuhĩ matiugaga atĩrĩ, “MWATHANI aromũraathima! Nĩtwamũraathima rĩĩtwainĩ rĩa MWATHANI!”" 
Psalms130:1 MWATHANI, nĩndagũkaĩra ndĩ ndiainĩ ndiku mũno ya mathĩĩna." 
Psalms130:2 Igua gũkaya gwakwa, MWATHANI; tegera matũ gũthaithana gwakwa!" 
Psalms130:3 MWATHANI, ũngĩtaraga maita marĩa tũkwĩhagĩria-rĩ, nũũ ũtangĩtuĩra?" 
Psalms130:4 No rĩĩrĩ, wee nĩũtuohagĩra, nĩguo tũgũtĩĩage." 
Psalms130:5 Njetereire ũteithio waku, MWATHANI, na ngoro yakwa yothe, na nĩndĩhokeete ciĩranĩro ciaku." 
Psalms130:6 Njetereire MWATHANI gũkĩra ũrĩa arangĩri metagĩrĩra gũkĩe, ĩĩni, gũkĩra ũrĩa arangĩri metagĩrĩra gũkĩe." 
Psalms130:7 Isiraeli, wĩhoke MWATHANI tondũ we nĩ mũtugi na nĩarĩ hinya mũingĩ wa kũhonokania." 
Psalms130:8 MWATHANI we mwene nĩ we ũrĩhonokia andũ aake a Isiraeli kuuma meehiainĩ maao moothe. 
Psalms131:1 MWATHANI, niĩ ndirĩ mwĩtĩi na ndiĩgaathaga. Ndirũmbũyanagia na maũndũ manene kana marĩa itangĩhota gwĩka." 
Psalms131:2 Niĩ-rĩ, nĩndĩrutĩĩte kũiganĩra na gũikaraga hooreire o ta ũrĩa kaana gaikaraga kahooreire gakĩonga; ũguo noguo njiganĩire ngoroinĩ yakwa." 
Psalms131:3 Isiraeli, wĩhoke MWATHANI rĩu na nginya tene na tene!" 
Psalms132:1 MWATHANI, ndũkariganĩrwo nĩ Daudi na mathĩĩna marĩa moothe oonire." 
Psalms132:2 MWATHANI ririkana, ũrĩa aakwĩrĩire na mwĩhĩtwa; wee, Ngai wa Jakubu, o Wee ũrĩ Hinya, ririkana ũrĩa akwĩhĩtĩire akiuga atĩrĩ," 
Psalms132:3 “Ndigaatoonya nyũmba yakwa, kana haice ũrĩrĩ wakwa;" 
Psalms132:4 ndigakoma toro, kana hinge riitho," 
Psalms132:5 itooneire MWATHANI handũ; itooneire Ngai wa Jakubu, o Wee Ũrĩ Hinya, gĩikaro.”" 
Psalms132:6 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, twaiguire ũhoro wa Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro tũrĩ Bethilehemu, tũgĩcooka tũkĩrĩkora mĩgũndainĩ ya Jearimu." 
Psalms132:7 Tũkiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũthiĩi nyũmbainĩ ya MWATHANI tũkamũthaathaiye tũrĩ mbere ya gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũthamaki!”" 
Psalms132:8 Arahũka, MWATHANI, ũtoonye kĩhuurũkoinĩ gĩaku, wee mwene na Ithandũkũ rĩaku rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro, rĩrĩa rĩonanagia hinya waku." 
Psalms132:9 Athĩnjĩri Ngai maroehumbaga ũthingu, andũ aaku marougĩrĩria nĩgũkena." 
Psalms132:10 MWATHANI, tondũ wa ũrĩa werĩire ndungata yaku Daudi-rĩ, ndũkaanatiganĩrie mũthamaki waku ũrĩa ũitĩrĩirie maguta ũkamwamũra." 
Psalms132:11 Nĩwerĩire Daudi na mwĩhĩtwa, mwĩhĩtwa ũtangĩricũkwo ũkiuga atĩrĩ,“Nĩngaatua ũmwe wa ciana ciaku mũthamaki, naake nĩagaathamaka thuutha waku." 
Psalms132:12 Ciana ciaku ingĩkamenyerera kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩakwa na irũmagĩrĩre maathani maakwa marĩa ndĩrĩcirutaga,o na ciana ciacio igaatũũra ithamakaga ithenyainĩ rĩaku nginya tene na tene.”" 
Psalms132:13 Tondũ rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI nĩathuurĩĩte Zayuni; nĩerirĩirie gũgũtua kũndũ gwake gwa gũtũũra." 
Psalms132:14 Oigĩĩte atĩrĩ, “Gĩĩkĩ nĩkĩo kĩhuurũko gĩakwa nginya tene na tene; gũũkũ nĩkuo ngũtũũra tondũ nĩndĩkwendeete." 
Psalms132:15 Nĩndĩrĩheaga itũũra rĩa Zayuni kĩrĩa gĩothe rĩrĩbataragio nĩkĩo; nĩndĩrĩheaga athĩĩni aarĩo irio makarĩa makahũũna. 
Psalms132:16 Ndĩhumbaga athĩnjĩri Ngai aarĩo ũhonokio, nao andũ aarĩo arĩa ehokeku marĩinaga makĩrũũhagia nĩgũkena." 
Psalms132:17 Kũu nĩkuo ndĩtũmaga ũmwe wa njiarwa cia Daudi atuĩkage mũthamaki mũnene; wathani wa mũthamaki wakwa ũrĩa njitĩrĩirie maguta ngamwamũra, nĩkuo ndĩtũmaga ũtũũre ũgaacĩire." 
Psalms132:18 Thũ ciake ndĩrĩcihumbaga gĩconoko, no we, ndĩtũmaga ũthamaki wake ũnenehage na ũgaacagĩre.”" 
Psalms133:1 Ĩ nĩ ũhoro mwega atĩa, o na wĩ gĩkeno, andũ a mũciĩ ũmwe gũikaranagia maiguaine!" 
Psalms133:2 Ũiguano ta ũcio ũhaana maguta ma goro ma kwamũrana maitĩrĩirio mũtwe wa Harũni makanyũrũrũkĩra nderuinĩ ciake o nginya karainĩ ya nguo yake. 
Psalms133:3 Ningĩ ũiguano ta ũcio ũhaana ime rĩa kĩrĩma kĩa Herimoni, rĩrĩa rĩitĩkaga irĩmainĩ cia Zayuni. Kũu Zayuni nĩkuo MWATHANI eeranĩire kĩraathimo gĩake, nĩkĩo ũtũũro wa tene na tene." 
Psalms134:1 Ũkaai mũgooce MWATHANI, inyuothe ndungata cia MWATHANI, o inyuĩ mũtungataga thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ yake ũtukũ." 
Psalms134:2 Ambarariai mooko maanyu mũrĩ Hekaarũinĩ mũkĩhooyaga, na mũgooce MWATHANI!" 
Psalms134:3 MWATHANI, ũrĩa wombire igũrũ na thĩ, aromũraathima e Zayuni!" 
Psalms135:1 Goocaai MWATHANI! Goocaai rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI, inyuĩ ndungata cia MWATHANI," 
Psalms135:2 o inyuĩ mũrũũgamaga nyũmbainĩ ya MWATHANI, o inyuĩ mũrũũgamaga njainĩ cia Hekaarũ ya Ngai witũ." 
Psalms135:3 Goocaai MWATHANI, tondũ nĩ mwega; inĩraai rĩĩtwa rĩake, tondũ nĩ mũtugi." 
Psalms135:4 MWATHANI nĩethuurĩire Jakubu atuĩke wake; nĩethuurĩire andũ a Isiraeli matuĩke aake kĩũmbe. 
Psalms135:5 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ MWATHANI nĩ mũnene; MWATHANI witũ nĩ mũnene gũkĩra ngai iria ingĩ ciothe. 
Psalms135:6 MWATHANI eekaga o ũrĩa ekwenda kũũrĩa igũrũ na gũũkũ thĩ, mariainĩ na kũrĩa guothe kũriku mũno." 
Psalms135:7 Nĩ we ũtũmaga matu maambate kuuma ituri cia thĩ; nĩ we ũtũmaga kũgĩe na heni ireehane na marurumĩ na no we ũreehithagia rũhuuho kuuma thitooinĩ ciake. 
Psalms135:8 MWATHANI nĩ we woragire marigithaathi moothe ma Misiri ma andũ o na ma nyamũ. 
Psalms135:9 Nĩ we wekire moorirũ na akĩringa ciama bũrũriinĩ ũcio wa Misiri nĩguo aherithie mũthamaki wakuo na ndungata ciake ciothe. 
Psalms135:10 Nĩ we wanangire ndũũrĩrĩ nyingĩ na akĩũraga athamaki maarĩ na hinya; 
Psalms135:11 Sihoni, mũthamaki wa Aamoni, Ogu, mũthamaki wa Bashani, na athamaki oothe arĩa maarĩ Kanaani," 
Psalms135:12 agĩcooka akĩhe andũ aake a Isiraeli mabũrũri maao matuĩke ũgai wao. 
Psalms135:13 Rĩĩtwa rĩaku, MWATHANI, rĩgũtũũra nginya tene na tene; ngumo yaku, MWATHANI, ĩgũtũũra ĩririkanagwo nĩ njiarwa ciothe." 
Psalms135:14 Nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI nĩakaagitĩra andũ aake, na aiguĩre ndungata ciake tha." 
Psalms135:15 Mĩhianano ya ndũũrĩrĩ ĩthondekeetwo na betha na thahabu; ĩthondekeetwo nĩ mooko ma andũ. 
Psalms135:16 Ĩ na tũnua, no ndĩaragia; ĩ na maitho, no ndĩonaga." 
Psalms135:17 Ĩ na matũ, no ndĩiguaga, o na ndĩngĩhota kũhiihia." 
Psalms135:18 Arĩa mamĩthondekaga na arĩa mamĩhokaga marohaana o tayo. 
Psalms135:19 Goocaai MWATHANI, inyuĩ andũ a Isiraeli! Kumiai MWATHANI, inyuĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai!" 
Psalms135:20 Goocaai MWATHANI, inyuĩ Alawii! Kumiai MWATHANI, inyuĩ arĩa mũmũtĩĩĩte!" 
Psalms135:21 Goocaai MWATHANI arĩ Zayuni! Mũkumiei arĩ Jerusalemu, mũciĩ wake!Goocaai MWATHANI!" 
Psalms136:1 Cookeriai MWATHANI ngaatho, tondũ nĩ mwega; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene." 
Psalms136:2 Cookeriai Ngai ũrĩa mũnene gũkĩra ngai iria ingĩ ciothe ngaatho;tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:3 Cookeriai MWATHANI wa aathani oothe ngaatho; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:4 We wiki nĩ we wĩkaga maũndũ ma kũgegania mũno; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:5 Nĩ we wombire igũrũ na ũũgĩ wake; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:6 Nĩ we wakire thĩ ndiainĩ iria ndiku, tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene." 
Psalms136:7 Nĩ we wombire riũa na mweri; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:8 Riũa rĩathage mũthenya; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:9 Naguo mweri na njata ciathage ũtukũ; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:10 Nĩ we woragire aariũ a marigithaathi ma Amisiri; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:11 Akĩruta andũ a Isiraeli kuuma Misiri; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:12 Na guoko gwake na gĩcoka gĩake kĩrĩ hinya mũno; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:13 Nĩ we wagayanirie Iria Ituune; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:14 Akĩringĩria Aisiraeli gatagatĩ kaarĩo; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:15 No mũthamaki wa Misiri na mbũtũ ciake cia ita akĩmahubĩkania kũu Iriainĩ; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:16 Nĩ we watongoririe andũ aake werũinĩ; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:17 Akĩũraga athamaki maarĩ na hinya; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:18 Akĩũraga athamaki maarĩ ngumo; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:19 Sihoni mũthamaki wa Aamoni; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:20 Na Ogu mũthamaki wa Bashani; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:21 MWATHANI agĩcooka akĩhe andũ aake bũrũri wa athamaki acio ũgĩtuĩka ũgai wao; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:22 Akĩũheana kũrĩ Isiraeli, ndungata yake, ũgĩtuĩka ũgai wake; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene." 
Psalms136:23 MWATHANI ndariganĩirwo nĩ ithuĩ rĩrĩa twatooreetio; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:24 Nĩatũhonokirie kuuma harĩ thũ ciitũ; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:25 Nĩ we ũheaga ciũmbe ciothe irĩ muoyo irio; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms136:26 Cookeriai Ngai wa igũrũ ngaatho; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene. 
Psalms137:1 Hũgũrũrũinĩ cia njũũĩ cia Babiloni, nĩkuo twaikaraga thĩ tũkarĩra, twaririkana Zayuni." 
Psalms137:2 Mĩtĩinĩ ĩrĩa yarĩ hũgũrũrũinĩ icio, nĩkuo twacuuragia inanda ciitũ," 
Psalms137:3 tondũ twĩ kũu, arĩa maatũtahĩĩte maatwĩraga tũmainĩre; anyariiri acio aitũ maatwĩraga tũmacanjamũre makoiga atĩrĩ, “Tũinĩreei rwĩmbo rũmwe rwa iria mwainaga mwĩ Zayuni!”" 
Psalms137:4 Twakĩhota atĩa kũinĩra MWATHANI rwĩmbo tũrĩ bũrũriinĩ mũgeni? 
Psalms137:5 Jerusalemu, ingĩkariganĩrwo nĩ we, guoko gwakwa kwa ũrĩo kũroremwo nĩgũkaanahũũra kĩnanda rĩ o rĩ!" 
Psalms137:6 Ndĩroremwo nĩgũkaina rĩ o rĩ ingĩkaanariganĩrwo nĩ we, kana ingĩkaaga gũgũtua gatũũrũ ga gĩkeno gĩakwa, wee Jerusalemu." 
Psalms137:7 MWATHANI, ririkana ũrĩa Aedomu meekire mũthenya ũrĩa itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu rĩanyiitirwo.Ririkana ũrĩa moigaga mategũtigithĩria atĩrĩ, “Rĩmomoreei! Rĩmomoreei! Rĩmomoraniei rĩothe!”" 
Psalms137:8 Babiloni, werekeire kũharaganio! Gũkena-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩgwĩka o ta ũrĩa watwĩkire!" 
Psalms137:9 Gũkena-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩoya tũkenge twaku atũhũũrithanie ndwaroinĩ cia mahiga!" 
Psalms138:1 Nĩngũgũcookeria ngaatho, MWATHANI, na ngoro yakwa yothe; nĩngũkũinĩra ngĩgũkumagia ngai ciothe irĩ ho." 
Psalms138:2 Ngũinamĩrĩra ndoreete na kũrĩa Hekaarũ yaku theru ĩrĩ, ngooce rĩĩtwa rĩaku, nĩ ũndũ wa ũtugi na wĩhokeku waku, tondũ nĩwonanĩĩtie atĩ rĩĩtwa rĩaku nĩrĩo rĩnene, o na maathani maaku nĩ manene." 
Psalms138:3 Rĩrĩa ndagwĩtire, nĩwanjĩtĩkire, na ũkĩnyongerera hinya." 
Psalms138:4 Athamaki oothe a thĩ nĩmagaakũgooca, MWATHANI, tondũ nĩmaiguĩte maũndũ marĩa wĩranĩire." 
Psalms138:5 Ningĩ nĩmakaagana ciĩko iria wee wĩkĩĩte, o na magane ũrĩa riiri waku wĩ mũnene." 
Psalms138:6 O na gũtuĩka, wee MWATHANI, wĩ igũrũ mũno nĩũrũmbũyagia andũ arĩa enyiihia, na ũkamenya ũrĩa andũ arĩa etĩĩi mareeka ũrĩ o kũraaya." 
Psalms138:7 Rĩrĩa thiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ mathĩĩna, wee nĩũmenyagĩrĩra wega; ũng'ethanagĩra na thũ ciakwa iria cindaakarĩire, ũkahonokia na guoko gwaku kwĩ hinya." 
Psalms138:8 MWATHANI nĩũrĩhingia, maũndũ moothe marĩa wĩranĩire. Wendo waku, MWATHANI, nĩ wa tene na tene; ndũgaatiganĩrie wĩra wa mooko maaku." 
Psalms139:1 MWATHANI, nĩũthuuthuurĩĩtie na ũkaamenya." 
Psalms139:2 Wee-rĩ, nĩũmenyaga ũrĩa wothe ndĩreeka; ũmenyaga ũrĩa wothe ndĩreciiria ũrĩ o kũraaya." 
Psalms139:3 Wee nĩũnyonaga rĩrĩa ndĩraruta wĩra kana rĩrĩa huurũkĩĩte; gũtirĩ gĩĩko o na kĩmwe gĩakwa wee ũtooĩ. 
Psalms139:4 O na itarĩ ndĩratumũra kanua, wee, MWATHANI nĩũkoragwo ũmenyeete ũrĩa ndĩrenda kuuga." 
Psalms139:5 Ũthiũrũrũkĩirie na mĩena yothe, ũkamenyerera na hinya waku." 
Psalms139:6 Kũũmenya ta ũguo wee ũmenyeete nĩ ũndũ wa magegania mũno harĩ niĩ; ũmenyo ta ũcio ũrĩ igũrũ mũno ũguo atĩ ndingĩhota kũũkinyĩra. 
Psalms139:7 Nĩ na kũ ingĩgĩthiĩ ndĩthare kuuma harĩ we? Nĩ na kũ ingĩũrĩra ndũkaanyone? 
Psalms139:8 Ingĩambata igũrũ, wee ũrĩ kuo; ingĩikũrũka kwa arĩa akuũ, o na kuo ũrĩ o kuo." 
Psalms139:9 O na ingĩũmbũka hĩtũke rũkĩrĩrĩ rwa mwena wa irathĩro, kana ngorwo ndĩratũũra kũraaya mũno mbere ya rũkĩrĩrĩ rwa mwena wa ithũĩro," 
Psalms139:10 ũngĩkorwo o kuo ũkĩndongoria na ũkĩndeithia. 
Psalms139:11 Ingĩũria nduma ĩhithe kana ũtheri ũrĩa ũthiũrũrũkĩirie ũtuĩke ũtukũ," 
Psalms139:12 nduma ĩyo ndĩngĩkorwo ĩrĩ nduma harĩ we, na ũtukũ ũcio wakorwo ũthereete o ta mũthenya.Harĩ we nduma na ũtheri itirĩ ũtiganu." 
Psalms139:13 Wee-rĩ, nĩ we wombire ciĩga ciakwa ciothe; nĩ we wanyiitithanirie ndĩ o ndainĩ ya maitũ." 
Psalms139:14 Nĩngũkũgooca tondũ nĩũnyũmbĩĩte na njĩra ya kũmakania na ya kũgegania; ũrĩa wothe wĩkaga nĩ wa kũgegania mũno; niĩ mwene nĩnjũũĩ ũguo na ngoro yakwa yothe. 
Psalms139:15 Rĩrĩa mahĩndĩ maakwa maathondekagwo makanyiitithanio na kinyi ndainĩ ya maitũ, rĩrĩa ndaakũragĩra kũu hithoinĩ, wee nĩwoĩ atĩ ndarĩ kuo." 
Psalms139:16 Nĩwanyonaga o na itarĩ ndĩraciarwo.Wandĩkire ibukuinĩ rĩaku matukũ marĩa wangaĩire o na matarĩ marambĩrĩria. 
Psalms139:17 Ĩ meciiria maaku, Ngai, matikĩrĩ bata harĩ niĩ! Ĩ matikĩrĩ maingĩ!" 
Psalms139:18 Ingĩtua kũmatara-rĩ, maingĩha gũkĩra mũthanga; nĩguo hote kũmatara nginya ndĩmarĩĩkie no ndũũrire muoyo tene na tene o ta we." 
Psalms139:19 Ngai, naarĩ korwo woraga andũ arĩa aaganu! Naarĩ korwo ooragani maatigana na niĩ!" 
Psalms139:20 Maaragia maũndũ ma waganu igũrũ rĩaku; moigaga maũndũ mooru igũrũ rĩa rĩĩtwa rĩaku. 
Psalms139:21 MWATHANI, ĩ ndithũire arĩa magũthũire! Ĩ ndimeneete arĩa magũũkagĩrĩra!" 
Psalms139:22 Ndĩmathũire o biũ; ndĩmatuaga thũ ciakwa. 
Psalms139:23 Ngai, thuuthuuria ũmenye ngoro yakwa; ngeria, ũmenye meciiria maakwa." 
Psalms139:24 Baara wone kana ndĩ na ũũru o na ũrĩkũ, na ũkĩndongorie na njĩra ĩrĩa ya gũtũũra nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms140:1 MWATHANI, honokia kuuma harĩ andũ ooru; ngitĩra kuuma harĩ andũ arĩa mahũthagĩra hinya," 
Psalms140:2 arĩa mathugundaga maũndũ mooru ngoroinĩ ciao, na hingo ciothe makoragwo manungĩĩte o mbaara." 
Psalms140:3 Nĩmĩ ciao nĩ njũru o ta nyoka ĩrĩa ĩrĩ thumu mũno; ciugo iria maaragia irĩ thumu o ta wa nyoka iria ciĩtagwo gĩĩko. 
Psalms140:4 MWATHANI, menyerera ndikanyiitwo nĩ andũ arĩa aaganu; ngitĩra kuuma harĩ andũ arĩa mahũthagĩra hinya, o arĩa marabanga ũrĩa mekũniina." 
Psalms140:5 Andũ arĩa etĩĩi nĩmanjigĩire mũtego; nĩmaambĩĩte ngara ciao cia kũndega na makaamba nyambo njĩrainĩ nĩguo manyiite. 
Psalms140:6 Njĩĩrĩĩte MWATHANI atĩrĩ, “Wee, nĩwe Ngai wakwa.” Igua mathaithana maakwa, MWATHANI." 
Psalms140:7 MWATHANI, Ngai wakwa, o wee mũngitĩri ũrĩ hinya, nĩwamenyereire mũthenya ũrĩa kwarĩ na mbaara." 
Psalms140:8 MWATHANI, ndũkaahingĩrie andũ arĩa aaganu ũrĩa marenda;ndũkaareke mĩbango yao mĩũru ĩgaacĩre." 
Psalms140:9 Ndũgeetĩkĩre thũ ciakwa igĩe na ũhootani; irumi iria iranuma nacio irocicookerera! 
Psalms140:10 Irogwĩrwo nĩ makara mekũrĩrĩmbũka mwaki! Iroikanio irima itakoimĩra! 
Psalms140:11 Andũ arĩa macambanagia maroaga kũgaacĩra; andũ arĩa mahũthagĩra hinya marokinyĩrĩrwo nĩ ũũru ũmaniine. 
Psalms140:12 MWATHANI, nĩnjũũĩ atĩ wee nĩ we ũrũagĩrĩra arĩa athĩĩni na ũkagitĩra ihooto cia ngĩa." 
Psalms140:13 Nĩ ma andũ arĩa athingu nĩmarĩkũgoocaga; arĩa arũngĩrĩru marĩtũũranagia nawe. 
Psalms141:1 MWATHANI, nĩ we ndĩrakaĩra, hiũha ũndeithie! Thikĩrĩria ngĩgũkaĩra." 
Psalms141:2 Reke ihooya rĩakwa harĩ we rĩtuĩke ta mũtararĩko mwega wa ũbaani na kwambararia gwakwa kwa mooko gũtuĩke ta igongoona rĩa hwaĩinĩ. 
Psalms141:3 MWATHANI, menyagĩrĩra kanua gaakwa, na ũrangagĩre iromo ciakwa," 
Psalms141:4 teithagia ngoro yakwa ndĩkeriragĩrie ũũru na ndĩkaagwatanagĩre na andũ ooru ũũruinĩ wao.Ndũkaanareke ndĩanĩre nao maruga maao. 
Psalms141:5 No njĩtĩkĩre kũherithio o na kũrũngwo na njĩra ya wendani nĩ mũndũ mwega, no ndingĩĩtĩkĩra o na haniini gũtĩĩo nĩ andũ ooru, tondũ gũtirĩ hingo itahooyaga nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ mooru marĩa meekaga." 
Psalms141:6 Andũ oothe nĩmakaamenya atĩ ciugo ciakwa ciarĩ cia ma, rĩrĩa aathani aao makaarekanio thĩ moimĩĩte rwaro igũrũ rwa ihiga." 
Psalms141:7 Mahĩndĩ maao makaaharagana mĩenainĩ ya mbĩĩrĩra, o ta mahiga maatũrangĩĩtwo." 
Psalms141:8 Wee Ngai, MWATHANI wakwa, no we ndĩhokeete; harĩ we nĩ ho njũkĩĩte ũmenyerere; ndũkaareke ngue!" 
Psalms141:9 Menyerera ndikanyiitwo nĩ mĩtego ĩrĩa mategeete, na ndigatheecangwo nĩ nyambo cia andũ arĩa meekaga ũũru." 
Psalms141:10 Andũ arĩa meekaga maũndũ mooru marogũa mĩtegoinĩ ĩyo yao,no niĩ ndĩroaga kũnyiitwo nĩ yo." 
Psalms142:1 Ndĩrakaĩra MWATHANI na mũgambo mũnene; ndĩramũthaitha nyanĩrĩire anjiguire tha. 
Psalms142:2 Ngũmũtwarĩra mateta maakwa moothe, na ndĩmũmenyithie mathĩĩna maakwa moothe." 
Psalms142:3 Rĩrĩa ndĩ hakuhĩ kũhooteka, nĩũnyonagĩrĩria njĩra.Thũ ciakwa nĩcinjigĩire mũtego njĩrainĩ ĩrĩa ngeragĩra." 
Psalms142:4 Tarora hakuhĩ na niĩ wone hatirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũngĩndeithia; hatirĩ o na ũ ũngĩmenyerera. Hatirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũrarũmbũyania na niĩ. 
Psalms142:5 MWATHANI, nĩndagũkaĩra ũndeithie; wee, MWATHANI, nĩ we mũmenyereri, wee nĩ we ndĩrirĩirie ndĩ bũrũri wa arĩa marĩ muoyo." 
Psalms142:6 Thikĩrĩria mũkayo wakwa, tondũ nĩndeete mwĩhoko wothe.Honokia kuuma harĩ thũ ciakwa, tondũ irĩ na hinya mũno kũngĩra." 
Psalms142:7 Nduta mĩnyamaaroinĩ yakwa, nĩguo ngũgooce kĩũnganoinĩ kĩa andũ aaku, tondũ wa wega wothe ũrĩa ũnjĩkĩĩte." 
Psalms143:1 MWATHANI, igua ihooya rĩakwa; thikĩrĩria gũthaithana gwakwa, tondũ wĩ mwĩhokeku; njĩtĩka tondũ wĩ mũthingu." 
Psalms143:2 Ndũkanjiirithie, niĩ, ndungata yaku, tondũ maithoinĩ maaku gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũngĩtuuo mũthingu." 
Psalms143:3 Thũ yakwa nĩhanyũkanĩĩtie na niĩ; nĩĩnũndĩĩte o thĩ tĩĩriinĩ; ĩtũmĩĩte njikare ndumainĩ ta arĩa maakuire o tene. 
Psalms143:4 Tondũ ũcio nĩhootekeete; nĩndeete mwĩhoko o biũ. 
Psalms143:5 Nĩndĩraririkana hĩndĩ ya tene, ngeciiria ũhoro wa ciĩko ciaku ciothe, na ngatarania ũrĩa wothe waneeka." 
Psalms143:6 Nyambararĩĩtie mooko maakwa na kũrĩ we ngĩkũhooya; roho wakwa ũkũnyooteire o ta thĩ nyũmũ. 
Psalms143:7 MWATHANI, kĩnjĩtĩke rĩu!Nĩndeete mwĩhoko wothe.Gĩtige kũhitha ũthiũ waku nĩguo ndikaae kũhaana ta arĩa maikũrũkaga kwa arĩa akuũ." 
Psalms143:8 Kĩndirikanagie rũũciinĩ o rũũciinĩ ũrĩa wĩ mũtugi, tondũ njigĩĩte mwĩhoko wakwa harĩ we.Mahooya maakwa ndĩmeerekeirie na igũrũ kũrĩ we; nyonereria njĩra ĩrĩa njagĩrĩirwo nĩkũgerera." 
Psalms143:9 MWATHANI, njũkĩĩte harĩ we ũmenyerere; honokia kuuma harĩ thũ ciakwa." 
Psalms143:10 Wee nĩ we Ngai wakwa, ndutaga kũhingia wendi waku; roho waku mwega arongeragĩria kũndũ gũtarĩ ũgwati." 
Psalms143:11 Honokia, MWATHANI, o ta ũrĩa wĩranĩire; nduta mĩnyamaaroinĩ yakwa tondũ wĩ mwega." 
Psalms143:12 Tondũ wa ũrĩa ũnyendeete-rĩ, ũraga thũ ciakwa; niina arĩa oothe marahinyĩrĩria tondũ niĩ ndĩ ndungata yaku." 
Psalms144:1 MWATHANI, o we mũmenyereri arogoocwo! Nĩ we ũndutaga kũrũa mbaara na ũhaaragĩrĩria gũthiĩ itainĩ." 
Psalms144:2 Nĩ we mũngitĩri na mũmenyereri, na no we kĩĩgunyĩ gĩakwa na mũhonokia ũrĩa ndĩhokeete angitagĩre.Nĩ we ũigaga ndũũrĩrĩ rungu rwa watho wakwa." 
Psalms144:3 MWATHANI, kaĩ mũndũ akĩrĩ we kĩ tondũ ũmũrũmbũyagia? Mũndũ ũrĩa arĩ o rũkũngũ akĩrĩ we kĩ tondũ ũikaraga ũkĩmwĩciiragia?" 
Psalms144:4 Mũndũ no ta ihũũmũka rĩmwe; matukũ maake mathiraga na ihenya o ta kĩĩruru. 
Psalms144:5 MWATHANI, hingũra igũrũ, ũikũrũke thĩ! Huutia irĩma nĩguo irute ndoogo!" 
Psalms144:6 Reehithia heni ũhurunje thũ ciaku; ikia mĩguĩ yaku ũcingatithie. 
Psalms144:7 Tambũrũkia guoko gwaku ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ, ũndute ndiainĩ ĩno ndiku, ũhonokie; ndeithũra kuuma mookoinĩ ma ndũũrĩrĩ ng'eni." 
Psalms144:8 Tũnua twacio twaragia o maheeni, na iheenanagia o na ciĩhĩtĩĩte." 
Psalms144:9 Ngai, nĩngũkũinĩra rwĩmbo rwerũ; ngũkũinĩra ngĩhũũraga kĩnanda." 
Psalms144:10 Wee-rĩ, nĩwe ũheaga athamaki ũhootani, na nĩwe ũteithũraga Daudi ndungata yaku." 
Psalms144:11 Honokia kuuma harĩ thũ ciakwa itarĩ tha; ndeithũra kuuma mookoinĩ ma ndũũrĩrĩ ng'eni.Tũnua twacio twaragia o maheeni, na iheenanagia o na ciĩhĩtĩĩte." 
Psalms144:12 Aanake aitũ marohaana ta mĩtĩ ya mũhandano ĩrakũra wega ĩrĩ na hinya.Airĩĩtu aitũ marohaana ta itugĩ irĩ riiri iria itiiragĩrĩra nyũmba ya mũthamaki. 
Psalms144:13 Makũmbĩ maitũ maroiyũraga irio cia mĩthemba yothe. Ng'ondu ciitũ irociaraga tũgondu ngiri na ngiri. 
Psalms144:14 Mahiũ maitũ marociaraga mũno matekũhuna na mategũkuuithia. Njĩrainĩ ciitũ kũroagaga kĩrĩro kĩa mĩnyamaaro. 
Psalms144:15 Gũkena-rĩ, nĩ andũ arĩa maraathimĩĩtwo ta ũguo; gũkena-rĩ, nĩ andũ arĩa Ngai wao arĩ MWATHANI." 
Psalms145:1 Nĩngũgũtũũgĩria wee, Ngai wakwa na mũthamaki wakwa, na ngũcookagĩrie ngaatho nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms145:2 Ndĩrĩgũcookagĩria ngaatho o mũthenya na ndũũre ngũgoocaga nginya tene na tene. 
Psalms145:3 MWATHANI nĩ mũnene na wa kũgoocwo mũno; ũnene wake ndũngĩtuĩrĩka. 
Psalms145:4 Rũciaro o rũciaro nĩrũriganagĩra rũrĩa rũrũrũmĩrĩire ũrĩa waneeka, na rũmenyithanagie ciĩko ciaku cia hinya." 
Psalms145:5 Nĩndĩrĩciiragia ũhoro wa riiri waku na ũnene waku, na ndĩciiragie ũhoro wa ciĩko ciaku cia magegania." 
Psalms145:6 Andũ marĩaragia ũhoro wa ciĩko ciaku cia hinya na cia kũguoyohia, na niĩ ng'anage ũrĩa ũrĩ mũnene." 
Psalms145:7 Nĩmarĩganaga ũtugi waku na makũinagĩre tondũ wa ũrĩa wĩ mũtaana. 
Psalms145:8 MWATHANI nĩ muuma andũ na arĩ tha, ndaraakaraga na ihenya na aiyũirwo nĩ ũtugi." 
Psalms145:9 Eekaga andũ oothe wega na nĩaiguagĩra tha kĩrĩa gĩothe oombĩĩte. 
Psalms145:10 MWATHANI, ciũmbe ciaku ciothe nĩirĩkũgoocaga, nao andũ aaku magũcookagĩrie ngaatho." 
Psalms145:11 Marĩaragia ũhoro wa riiri wa ũthamaki waku, na maheanage ũhoro wa ũrĩa wee ũrĩ hinya," 
Psalms145:12 nĩguo mamenyithie andũ oothe ciĩko ciaku cia hinya na ũrĩa ũthamaki waku ũrĩ riiri. 
Psalms145:13 Ũthamaki waku nĩ wa gũtũũra tene na tene; wathani waku ndũrĩ hingo ũgaathira.MWATHANI nĩ mwĩhokeku ciĩranĩroinĩ ciake ciothe, na nĩ mũtaana ciĩkoinĩ ciake ciothe." 
Psalms145:14 MWATHANI nĩatiiragĩrĩra arĩa oothe maragũa, na nĩoyaga na igũrũ arĩa oothe moorĩĩtwo nĩ hinya." 
Psalms145:15 Indo ciothe irĩ muoyo nĩ we iroraga igũrũ, nawe ũgacihe irio rĩrĩa ciabatara." 
Psalms145:16 Ũciheaga irio na ũtaana ũkahingĩria kĩũmbe o kĩũmbe mabataro maakĩo. 
Psalms145:17 MWATHANI nĩ mũthingu maũndũinĩ moothe marĩa eekaga, na nĩ mũtaana ciĩkoinĩ ciake ciothe." 
Psalms145:18 MWATHANI akoragwo hakuhĩ na arĩa oothe mamũkayagĩra; o arĩa mamũkayagĩra na ngoro yothe. 
Psalms145:19 Nĩahingagĩria arĩa mamũtĩĩĩte mabataro maao; nĩaiguaga kĩrĩro kĩao, akamahonokia." 
Psalms145:20 MWATHANI nĩamenyagĩrĩra arĩa oothe mamwendeete, no arĩa oothe aaganu nĩakaamaniina." 
Psalms145:21 Niĩ-rĩ, ngũtũũra ngoocaga MWATHANI; ciũmbe ciothe nĩitũũre igoocaga rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩtheru nginya tene na tene." 
Psalms146:1 Goocaai MWATHANI! Ngoro yakwa, gooca MWATHANI!" 
Psalms146:2 Ngũtũũra ngoocaga MWATHANI matukũ moothe ma muoyo wakwa; ngũtũũra nyinagĩra Ngai wakwa ũtũũro wakwa wothe. 
Psalms146:3 Ndũkaige mwĩhoko waku harĩ anene; mũndũ-rĩ, ndangĩhota gũgũteithia." 
Psalms146:4 Rĩrĩa maakua-rĩ, macookaga o tĩĩriinĩ, mĩbango yao ĩgakinya mũthia mũthenya o ro ũcio." 
Psalms146:5 Gũkena-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũteithio wake uumaga harĩ Ngai wa Jakubu, na ũigĩĩte mwĩhoko wake harĩ MWATHANI Ngai wake," 
Psalms146:6 ũrĩa wombire igũrũ, thĩ, iria, na kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩ thĩinĩ wacio.We-rĩ, nĩahingagia ciĩranĩro ciake hingo ciothe." 
Psalms146:7 Nĩ we ũtuagĩra na kĩhooto arĩa mahinyĩrĩirio, na ũheaga arĩa mahũũtiĩ irio.MWATHANI nĩ we wohoraga arĩa mooheetwo" 
Psalms146:8 na ũtũmaga itumuumu icooke kuona rĩngĩ. Nĩ we woyaga na igũrũ arĩa moorĩĩtwo nĩ hinya; nĩendeete andũ arĩa athingu. 
Psalms146:9 MWATHANI nĩ we ũmenyagĩrĩra ageni na ũteithagia atumia a ndigwa na ciana cia ngoriai; no rĩĩrĩ, andũ arĩa aaganu nĩakaamaniina." 
Psalms146:10 MWATHANI egũtũũra athamakaga nginya tene na tene;Ngai waku, wee Zayuni, ndarĩ hingo atarĩthamakaga. Goocaai MWATHANI!" 
Psalms147:1 Goocaai MWATHANI!Nĩ ũndũ mwega kũina tũkĩgoocaga Ngai witũ; kũmũkumia-rĩ, nĩ ũndũ mwega na wĩ kĩhooto." 
Psalms147:2 MWATHANI nĩgwaka araaka Jerusalemu rĩngĩ; nĩgũcookia aracookia mũciĩ andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maatahĩĩtwo. 
Psalms147:3 Nĩahonagia arĩa ahinyaru na akamooha ironda ciao. 
Psalms147:4 Nĩ we watuire mũigana wa njata, na akĩhe njata o njata rĩĩtwa rĩayo." 
Psalms147:5 MWATHANI witũ nĩ mũnene, na nĩarĩ hinya; ũũgĩ wake ndũngĩthimĩka." 
Psalms147:6 Andũ arĩa enyiihia MWATHANI nĩamatũũgagĩria, no arĩa aaganu nĩamarangagĩrĩria thĩ." 
Psalms147:7 Inĩraai MWATHANI nyĩmbo cia kũmũgooca; inĩraai Ngai witũ mũkĩhũũraga ngita. 
Psalms147:8 Nĩ we ũhumbagĩra igũrũ na matu; nĩ we uuragĩria thĩ mbura na ũtũmaga nyeki ĩkũre irĩmainĩ. 
Psalms147:9 Nĩ we ũheaga nyamũ cia gĩthaka irio ciacio, o ũndũ ũmwe na tũcui twa mahuru rĩrĩa twakaya." 
Psalms147:10 MWATHANI ndakenagio nĩ hinya wa mbarathi o na kana ũcamba wa thigari cia ita; 
Psalms147:11 we-rĩ, akenagio nĩ arĩa mamũtĩĩĩte, o arĩa mehokaga ũtugi wake." 
Psalms147:12 Wee, Jerusalemu, gooca MWATHANI! Kumia Ngai waku, wee Zayuni!" 
Psalms147:13 Tondũ nĩatũmĩĩte ihingo ciaku igĩe na hinya, na nĩaraathimĩĩte andũ aaku." 
Psalms147:14 Nĩaigĩĩte mĩhaka yaku kwĩ na thaayũ, na agakũhũũnia na ngano ĩrĩa njega mũno." 
Psalms147:15 Aathaga thĩ, na ũrĩa aathana ũkahingio na ihenya." 
Psalms147:16 Ahumbagĩra thĩ na tharunji ĩkahaana ta ĩhumbĩirwo na mũrĩngĩti wa maguoya meerũ cua, na akahurunja mbaa o ta mũhu." 
Psalms147:17 Oiragia mbura ya mbembe ta arĩ kagoto aroiria kuuma igũrũ; heho yake-rĩ, nũũ ũngĩmĩũmĩrĩria?" 
Psalms147:18 Aathanaga, tharunji ĩgatwekũka; atũmaga rũhuuho rũhuruutane, maaĩ magatherera." 
Psalms147:19 Ngai nĩaheete andũ aake ndũmĩrĩri ciake; nĩaheete Aisiraeli mawatho maake na matua maake. 
Psalms147:20 No rĩĩrĩ, ndũũrĩrĩ iria ingĩ ndaciĩkĩĩte ta ũguo; itiũĩ mawatho maake.Goocaai MWATHANI!" 
Psalms148:1 Goocaai MWATHANI!Goocaai MWATHANI mũrĩ kũu igũrũ; mũkumiei inyuĩ mũrĩ kũu gũtũũgĩru mũno! 
Psalms148:2 Mũgooceei, inyuĩ araika aake oothe; mũkumiei inyuĩ mbũtũ ciake ciothe cia ita." 
Psalms148:3 Mũgooceei, inyuĩ riũa na mweri; mũkumiei inyuĩ njata ciothe njangararu!" 
Psalms148:4 Mũgooce, wee igũrũ rĩrĩa rĩrĩ igũrũ mũno; mũkumiei, inyuĩ maaĩ marĩa marĩ igũrũ wa igũrũ!" 
Psalms148:5 Indo icio ciothe nĩigooce rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI, tondũ nĩ we wathanire, nacio ikĩũmbĩka." 
Psalms148:6 Nĩ we waciĩkĩrire harĩa irĩ nginya tene na tene, na agĩthondeka watho ũtangĩgarũrĩka rĩ kana rĩ." 
Psalms148:7 Goocaai MWATHANI inyuĩ mũrĩ gũũkũ thĩ inyuĩ ndamaathia cia iria, o na inyuĩ kũndũ guothe kwa iria kũrĩa kũriku mũno." 
Psalms148:8 Mũgooceei mwaki, mbura ya mbembe, tharunji, kĩbii, na kĩhuuhũkanio, o inyuĩ mũhingagia ũrĩa aathanĩĩte." 
Psalms148:9 Mũgooceei, irĩma na ithũngũri, mĩtĩ ya matunda ma mĩtitũ," 
Psalms148:10 nyamũ ciothe cia gĩthaka na mahiũ, nyamũ iria itambaga, o na nyoni!" 
Psalms148:11 Mũgooceei, athamaki a thĩ na andũ oothe, anene na aathani oothe a thĩ," 
Psalms148:12 airĩĩtu na aanake, andũ arĩa akũrũ o na ciana!" 
Psalms148:13 Acio oothe nĩmagooce rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI, tondũ norĩo riiki rĩtũũgĩru; riiri wake ũrĩ igũrũ wa igũrũ na thĩ." 
Psalms148:14 Nĩatũmĩĩte rũũrĩrĩ rwake rũgĩe na hinya nĩguo andũ aake oothe mamũgooce, nao nĩ andũ a Isiraeli arĩa eendeete mũno. Goocaai MWATHANI!" 
Psalms149:1 Goocaai MWATHANI!Inĩraai MWATHANI rwĩmbo rwerũ, mũkumĩriei kĩũnganoinĩ kĩa andũ aake arĩa ehokeku!" 
Psalms149:2 Isiraeli, kena nĩ ũndũ wa Mũkũũmbi; canjamũkaai, andũ a Zayuni, nĩ ũndũ wa mũthamaki wanyu!" 
Psalms149:3 Goocaai rĩĩtwa rĩake mũkĩrũũgarũũgaga; mũkumiei mũkĩhũũraga tamburini na ngita! 
Psalms149:4 Nĩ ũndũ MWATHANI nĩakenagio nĩ andũ aake; nĩaheaga arĩa menyiihagia ũhootani. 
Psalms149:5 Andũ arĩa ehokeku nĩmakene nĩ ũndũ wa kũhootana; nĩmaraare magĩkũngũiya ũtukũ wothe. 
Psalms149:6 Nĩmagooce Ngai maanĩrĩire manyiitĩĩte hiũ ciao cia njora noore wega," 
Psalms149:7 merĩhĩrie harĩ ndũũrĩrĩ, na maherithie andũ." 
Psalms149:8 Moohe athamaki aacio na mabĩngũ, atongoria aacio mamoohe na nyororo;" 
Psalms149:9 maherithie ndũũrĩrĩ ta ũrĩa Ngai aathanĩĩte.Ũcio-rĩ, nĩguo ũhootani wa andũ arĩa ehokeku.Goocaai MWATHANI!" 
Psalms150:1 Goocaai MWATHANI!Goocaai Ngai arĩ kũu gwake gũtheru! Mũkumiei arĩ igũrũ, o kũu gwake kwa hinya!" 
Psalms150:2 Mũgooceei nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko ciake cia hinya; mũkumiei nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa e mũnene! 
Psalms150:3 Mũgooceei mũkĩhuuhaga tũrumbeeta; mũkumiei na ngita na inanda! 
Psalms150:4 Mũgooceei mũkĩhũũraga tamburini mũkĩrũũgarũũgaga; mũkumiei na inanda na mĩtũũrirũ! 
Psalms150:5 Mũgooceei mũkĩhũũrithanagia thaani iria ng'ambi mũno; mũkumiei na thaani iria ihũũrithanagio ikagamba o kũgamba! 
Psalms150:6 Ciũmbe ciothe irĩ muoyo nĩigooce MWATHANI!Goocaai MWATHANI! 
Proverbs1:1 Ici nĩcio thimo cia Solomoni, mũrũ wa Daudi na mũthamaki wa Isiraeli." 
Proverbs1:2 Thimo ici nĩ cia kũũhĩgia mũndũ na kũmũtaara, nĩ geetha ahote kũmenya ũhoro wega na kũũkũũrana." 
Proverbs1:3 Imũtaare ũhoroinĩ wa gũtũũra na ũũgĩ, ũthingu, kĩhooto, na waragania." 
Proverbs1:4 Nĩ cia kũũhĩgia ũrĩa ũtarĩ mũũgĩ, o na cia gũtũma andũ eethĩ matuĩke oogĩ, na cia kũmatua andũ a bata maũndũinĩ maao." 
Proverbs1:5 Mũndũ mũũgĩ aciigua akoongerera ũũgĩ makĩria, naake ũrĩa mũmenyi maũndũ akoongorera ũmenyo." 
Proverbs1:6 Ningĩ nĩ cia gũteithia mũndũ kũrugũra thimo o na ngerekano, o na ningĩ kũmenya moohoro ma andũ arĩa oogĩ o na ndaĩ ciao." 
Proverbs1:7 Gũtĩĩa MWATHANI nĩkuo kĩhumo kĩa ũũgĩ wothe; irimũ nĩithũire ũũgĩ o na ũtaaro. 
Proverbs1:8 Mwana wakwa, thikagĩrĩria mataaro ma thooguo, na ndũkaanaregane na ũrutani wa maitũguo." 
Proverbs1:9 Mataaro macio marĩhaanaga thũmbĩ ya kũgemia mũtwe, o na ta mĩgathĩ ya kũgemia ngingo yaku." 
Proverbs1:10 Mwana wakwa, ũngĩkaaheenererio nĩ arĩa meehagia, ndũkaaneetĩkĩre," 
Proverbs1:11 o na mangĩgakwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũka tũkooherie andũ tũmahũũre; ĩĩ, tũmakungĩre o na mateehĩĩtie." 
Proverbs1:12 Twamaigĩrĩra njara ciitũ, no gĩkuũ gĩkamarega o na angĩkorwo me muoyo, o na kana marĩ agima." 
Proverbs1:13 Tũgĩcooke tũkĩyoere ũtonga wothe, nacio nyũmba ciitũ tũciyũrie ũtonga ũcio tũtahĩĩte." 
Proverbs1:14 Wĩturanĩre na ithuĩ, ũmaathi ũcio ũgũtuĩka witũ ithuothe.”" 
Proverbs1:15 Mwana wakwa, ndũkaanarũmanĩrĩre na andũ ta acio, ndũkaanamoime thuutha o na haniini." 
Proverbs1:16 Nĩ ũndũ meendaga gwĩka o maũndũ marĩa mooru, matagurarĩĩtie mũndũ matikenaga." 
Proverbs1:17 Nĩ tũhũ gũtega mũtego nyoni ĩrĩa ũrenda kũgwatia ĩgĩkuonaga. 
Proverbs1:18 Andũ acio-rĩ, nĩ thũ cia mĩoyo yao eene, nĩ o meyenjagĩra irima rĩa gĩkuũ." 
Proverbs1:19 Ũguo nĩguo andũ arĩa matuunyanaga indo na hinya marĩĩkagĩrĩria; ũtuunyani ũcio nĩkũũraga ũũragaga mwene guo. 
Proverbs1:20 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, ũũgĩ nĩaretana arĩ barabarainĩ, o na ningĩ agakayũrũrũka arĩ ndũũnyũinĩ," 
Proverbs1:21 aretana arĩ o thingo igũrũ, arĩ o ihingoinĩ cia itũũra akoiga atĩrĩ," 
Proverbs1:22 “Inyuĩ irimũ ici, mũkwenda gũtũũra mũhaana ũguo nginya rĩ?Ĩ nao arumani megũtũũra marumanaga kinya rĩ? Na inyuĩ irimũ mũgũtũũra mũthũire ũũgĩ kinya rĩ?" 
Proverbs1:23 Tategaai matũ mũigue ngĩmũtaara, ngũmũhe kĩrĩra kĩega na ndikũmũhitha ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ." 
Proverbs1:24 Ndũire ndimwĩtaga na inyuĩ mũkaaga kũnjigua, ngamũtambũrũkĩria mooko, na hatirĩ wanyu ũngĩĩringithia." 
Proverbs1:25 Mũgagĩkararia mataaro maakwa ningĩ ndamũkaania mũkaaga kũigua. 
Proverbs1:26 Niĩ nĩngaamũthekerera hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna maanyu, na ningĩ ndĩmũnyũrũrie hĩndĩ ĩrĩa guoya ũkaamũkorerera." 
Proverbs1:27 Rĩrĩa guoya ũhaana ta kĩhuuhũkanio ũkaamũkorerera, naguo thĩĩna wanyu ũmũkorerere ta rũhuuho rwa ngoma cia aka, na mĩnyamaaro na ruwo rwa ngoro imũkorerere," 
Proverbs1:28 hĩndĩ ĩyo o na mũngĩkaanjĩta ndikaamũcookeria ũndũ, o na ningĩ mũngĩkaanjaria na kĩyo mũtikaanyona." 
Proverbs1:29 Gĩtũmi nĩ ũndũ nĩmũthũire ũũgĩ, ningĩ ũhoro ũcio wa gũtĩĩa MWATHANI ndũrĩ kĩene harĩ inyuĩ." 
Proverbs1:30 Ningĩ mwagĩire kĩrĩra gĩakwa bata, na ndamũkaania mũkoona ta arĩ ũndũ wa tũhũ." 
Proverbs1:31 Kwoguo mũkaarĩa maciaro kuuma wĩra wa mooko maanyu, na mũhũũnio nĩ ciĩko cianyu njũru." 
Proverbs1:32 Andũ arĩa irimũ makuaga nĩ ũndũ wa gũtuĩka o nĩ mĩgarũ, naguo mwĩgangaro wa irimũ nĩguo ũciniinaga." 
Proverbs1:33 No rĩĩrĩ, ũrĩa ũrĩthikagĩrĩria arĩikaraga arĩ mũrangĩre na egangarĩĩte; ũcio-rĩ, arĩikaraga atarĩ na guoya wa ũndũ o wothe mũũru.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Mwana wakwa, ũngĩĩtĩkĩra kwamũkĩra ciugo ciakwa, na wĩigĩre maathani maakwa ta mũthiithũ," 
Proverbs2:2 ningĩ ũngĩtega gũtũ ũthikĩrĩrie ũũgĩ, nayo ngoro yaku ĩriragĩrie kũgĩa na ũmenyo," 
Proverbs2:3 ũngĩhooya ũheeo ũmenyo o na ningĩ ũthaithane ũheeo ũtaũku," 
Proverbs2:4 ũngĩĩkĩra kĩyo kũũcaria ta ũrĩa betha ĩcaragio, o na kana ta ũrĩa mũthiithũ ũhithĩĩtwo handũ ũcaragio," 
Proverbs2:5 hĩndĩ ĩyo norĩo ũngĩmenya ũteithio ũrĩa uumanaga na gũtĩĩa MWATHANI, na ũgĩe na ũmenyo wa Ngai." 
Proverbs2:6 Ũũgĩ, ũheanagwo nĩ MWATHANI, ũmenyi na ũtaũku no we ũheanaga." 
Proverbs2:7 Arĩa arũngĩrĩru nĩ we ũmataaraga, nĩ we ngo ya arĩa marĩ mĩthiĩre mĩega." 
Proverbs2:8 Nĩ we ũrangagĩra njĩra cia kĩhooto, o na akamenyagĩrĩra mĩthiĩre ya arĩa maiguaine naake." 
Proverbs2:9 Ũngĩmenya ũguo, norĩo ũngĩhota gũtaũkĩrwo nĩ ũhoro wa ũthingu na wa kĩhooto, na ũmenye mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa wagĩrĩirwo nĩgũthiaga nayo." 
Proverbs2:10 Ningĩ ũgĩtuĩke mũndũ mũũgĩ, naguo ũmenyo ũiguithagie roho waku gĩkeno." 
Proverbs2:11 Ũgerereri-rĩ, nĩguo ũrĩkumenyagĩrĩra, ũtaũku nĩguo ũrĩkũgitagĩra." 
Proverbs2:12 Nĩcio irĩkũhonokagia kuuma ũũruinĩ, o na kuuma kũrĩ andũ a tũnua monjore;" 
Proverbs2:13 andũ matooĩ mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa mĩega, andũ matũũraga ndumainĩ ya meehia;" 
Proverbs2:14 andũ makenagio no gwĩka ũũru, na magakenagĩra wĩhia wa ũtũrĩko;" 
Proverbs2:15 andũ a mĩthiĩre mĩhĩtanu, na matangĩĩhokeka." 
Proverbs2:16 Ningĩ nĩũrĩteithũragwo kuuma harĩ mũndũ wa nja mwaganu, o na kuuma kũrĩ mĩario yake ya wara agĩkũheenereria;" 
Proverbs2:17 o mũtumia ũrĩa ũtirikĩĩte mũthuuriwe o na akariganĩrwo nĩ mĩhĩtwa ĩrĩa eehĩtire mbere ya Ngai. 
Proverbs2:18 Kwa mũndũ wa nja ũcio no ta irima rĩa gĩkuũ, nayo mĩthiĩre yake yerekanagĩria o kwa arĩa akuũ." 
Proverbs2:19 Ũrĩa ũmũceeragĩra, ndoimaga kuo, na ndacookagĩrĩra njĩra ya muoyo." 
Proverbs2:20 Kwoguo, rũmagĩrĩra njĩra ya andũ arĩa eega, na ũrũmagĩrĩre mĩthiĩre ya andũ arĩa athingu." 
Proverbs2:21 Nĩ gũkorwo andũ arĩa arũngĩrĩru, o arĩa akinyanĩru, nĩ o magaatũũra bũrũri ũyũ." 
Proverbs2:22 No arĩa aaganu nĩkweherio makeeherio kuo, nao andũ arĩa ooru mamunywo meeherio kuo." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwana wakwa, tũũra ũririkanaga ũrutani wakwa, ngoro yaku ĩrotũũra ĩmenyagĩrĩra maathani maakwa." 
Proverbs3:2 Marĩgũtũũragia matukũ maingĩ gũũkũ thĩ, na ũtũũrage mũtũũrĩre wa thaayũ." 
Proverbs3:3 Wathĩki na wĩhokeku ndũkaanareke ikweherere. Ciĩyohage ngingo; na ũciandĩke ngoroinĩ yaku. 
Proverbs3:4 Weka ũguo nĩũrĩkenagia Ngai, o nao andũ nĩmarĩgũkenagĩra." 
Proverbs3:5 Tũũra wĩhokeete MWATHANI na ngoro yaku yothe, ndũkaanehoke ũmenyo waku." 
Proverbs3:6 Rekagĩrĩria MWATHANI maũndũ maaku moothe, naake nĩarĩkũrũngagĩrĩria njĩra ciaku." 
Proverbs3:7 Ndũkaaneone ta wĩ mũũgĩ gũkĩra ũrĩa ũrĩ, tĩĩaga MWATHANI na ũreganage na ũndũ wothe mũũru." 
Proverbs3:8 Ũndũ ũcio nĩ wa gũgwĩkĩra hinya, o na wa gũtũma wĩhande wega." 
Proverbs3:9 Tĩĩaga MWATHANI na kũmũrutĩra magetha marĩa meega ma maciaro ma mũgũnda waku. 
Proverbs3:10 Weka ũguo makũmbĩ maaku marĩiyũraga magetha, o nayo ndibei yaku ĩrĩkoragwo ĩiyũrĩĩte kuo na ũingĩ." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwana wakwa, thikagĩrĩria rĩrĩa MWATHANI arakũrũnga, na ndũkaraakarage rĩrĩa aragũkaania." 
Proverbs3:12 Nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI arũngaga ũrĩa eendeete, o ta ũrĩa mũciari arũngaga mwana eendeete." 
Proverbs3:13 Gũkena-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa wĩgĩrĩire na ũũgĩ, akagĩa na ũmenyo." 
Proverbs3:14 Amu uumithio wa ũũgĩ ũkĩrĩĩte uumithio wa betha, o na ũrĩ goro gũkĩra thahabu." 
Proverbs3:15 Ũũgĩ ũcio wĩ goro gũkĩra mahiga ma goro, na ndũngĩũgerekania na kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩrĩa ũngĩrirĩria." 
Proverbs3:16 Ũheanaga ũingĩ wa matukũ na guoko kwa ũrĩo, na ũkaheana ũtonga na gĩtĩĩo na guoko kwa ũmotho." 
Proverbs3:17 Ũũgĩ ũtũmaga mĩthiĩre ya mũndũ ĩtuĩke mĩega, o na ũkamũtongoria na njĩra cia thaayũ." 
Proverbs3:18 Ũrĩa ũgĩĩte na ũũgĩ nĩagĩĩte na mũtĩ wa muoyo, nao arĩa marĩwĩnyiitagĩrĩra nĩmarĩkenaga." 
Proverbs3:19 MWATHANI oombire thĩ na ũũgĩ wake; narĩo igũrũ rĩkĩgĩa na ũndũ wa ũmenyo wake. 
Proverbs3:20 Ũũgĩ ũcio wake nĩguo watũmire njũũĩ itherere, namo matu moiragie mbura." 
Proverbs3:21 Mwana wakwa, wĩnyiitĩre ũũgĩ na ũgerereri, ndũkaareke ciehere meciiriainĩ maaku." 
Proverbs3:22 Icio-rĩ, nĩigũtũma ũgĩe na muoyo, na ituĩke ũgemu wa mũtũũrĩre waku." 
Proverbs3:23 Nawe nĩũrĩkiumagaraga na njĩra yaku o wega, na ndũrĩonaga ũndũ wa gũkũhĩnga." 
Proverbs3:24 Wathiĩ toro ndũrĩ ũndũ ũrĩtigagĩra, ningĩ wakoma ndũrĩũragwo nĩ toro." 
Proverbs3:25 Ndũkaamakio nĩ mwanangĩko ũrĩa ũngĩũka ũterĩgĩrĩirwo o na kana kĩhuuhũkanio kĩrĩa gĩkoragĩrĩra andũ arĩa aaganu. 
Proverbs3:26 Tondũ MWATHANI no we mwĩhoko waku; ndangĩreka kũgũrũ gwaku kũnyiitwo nĩ mĩtego. 
Proverbs3:27 Andũ arĩa mabatairio nĩgwĩkwo wega meekage, angĩkorwo wĩ na ũhoti wa gwĩka ũguo." 
Proverbs3:28 Ndũkaaneere mũndũ wa itũũra rĩaku ainũke mooko matheri angĩkorwo wahota kũmũteithia o hĩndĩ ĩyo. 
Proverbs3:29 Mũndũ wa itũũra rĩaku ũrĩa ũtũũranagia nawe akwĩhokeete, ndũkaanamũthugundĩre ũũru." 
Proverbs3:30 Ndũkaanakararanie na mũndũ tũhũ atarĩ na ũndũ mũũru agwĩkĩĩte. 
Proverbs3:31 Ndũkaanaiguĩre andũ arĩa mahũthagĩra hinya ũiru; o na kana wĩciirie gwĩka ciĩko ta iria meekaga. 
Proverbs3:32 Amu mũndũ mwaganu nĩ kĩndũ kĩ magigi harĩ MWATHANI, ĩndĩ arĩa arũngĩrĩru nĩ o ehokeete." 
Proverbs3:33 Mĩciĩ ya arĩa ooru nĩmĩgwate nĩ kĩrumi kĩa MWATHANI, no mĩciĩ ya arĩa athingu nĩkũraathima amĩraathimaga." 
Proverbs3:34 MWATHANI nĩanyararaga arĩa manyũrũranagia, no arĩa ahooreri nĩamatugaga." 
Proverbs3:35 Andũ arĩa oogĩ igai rĩao no ngumo njega, ĩndĩ irimũ kĩrĩa ciĩyonagĩra no gĩconoko." 
Proverbs4:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, ciana ciakwa, tegaai matũ mũthikĩrĩrie kĩrĩra gĩa ithe wanyu, na nĩmũkwĩgĩĩra na ũmenyo." 
Proverbs4:2 Ndĩmũrutaga ndeto iria njega, menyaai gũkaanatigana na ũrutani wakwa." 
Proverbs4:3 Rĩrĩa ndarĩ mwana mũnyiinyi ndĩ na baaba, ndĩ o wa mũũmwe kwa maitũ-rĩ;" 
Proverbs4:4 baaba aaheaga kĩrĩra akoiga atĩrĩ,“Tũũra ũririkanaga ũrĩa wothe njugaga, menyagĩrĩra maathani maakwa na nĩũgũtũũra." 
Proverbs4:5 Wĩgĩĩre na ũũgĩ na ũgerereri! Ndũkaanariganĩrwo nĩ ciugo cia kanua gaakwa. 
Proverbs4:6 Menya gũkaanatigana na ũũgĩ naake nĩarĩkũmenyagĩrĩra; tuma ndũgũ naake na nĩegũtũũra akũrangĩire. 
Proverbs4:7 Ũndũ ũrĩa wa bata wĩgiĩ ũũgĩ no kwĩgĩĩra na ũũgĩ we mwene, nakuo kũgĩa na ũgerereri nĩguo ũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ wa bata mũno." 
Proverbs4:8 Tuma ndũgũ na ũũgĩ naake nĩegũgũtũũgĩria; mũhĩmbĩrie na nĩegũtũma ũheeo gĩtĩĩo. 
Proverbs4:9 Naake ekũhaana o ta thũmbĩ aragwĩkĩra mũtwe. thũmbĩ thaka nĩ yo agaakũhe.” 
Proverbs4:10 Mwana wakwa, thikĩrĩria na ũrũmie na kinyi ũhoro wakwa, na nĩũgũtũũra muoyo matukũ maingĩ." 
Proverbs4:11 Nĩnguonereirie mĩthiĩre ya ũũgĩ, na ngagũtongoria na njĩra iria njega." 
Proverbs4:12 Ndũkaahĩngĩĩcwo rĩrĩa ũgũthiĩ na njĩra, o na ũgĩteng'era ndũkaahĩngwo nĩ kĩndũ." 
Proverbs4:13 Tũũra ũrũmĩĩtie kĩrĩra kĩrĩa wĩrutĩĩte, na ndũkaanariganĩrwo nĩkĩo o na haniini; tũũra ũkĩmenyereire wega na nĩgĩgũgũtũũria muoyo." 
Proverbs4:14 Ndũkaanarũmanĩrĩre na mĩthiĩre ya andũ arĩa aaganu, ndũkaanathiĩ na mĩthiĩre ya andũ arĩa ooru." 
Proverbs4:15 Mĩĩtheemage, na ndũkaanathiĩ nayo, eheria meciiria maaku harĩ yo, wĩhĩtũkĩre." 
Proverbs4:16 O matikomaga mateekĩĩte ũndũ mũũru; o na matingĩona toro matatiihĩĩtie mũndũ. 
Proverbs4:17 Meyonagĩra gĩa kũrĩa kuumana na ũmaramari, na gĩa kũnyua kuumana na haaro." 
Proverbs4:18 No rĩĩrĩ, mĩthiĩre ya arĩa athingu no ta riũa rĩkĩratha, o na ta ũrĩa rĩthiaga rĩkĩaraga o nginyagia mĩaraho." 
Proverbs4:19 Mĩthiĩre ya arĩa aaganu ĩhaana ta nduma ndumanu mũno; o na mangĩgũa matingĩmenya kĩrĩa kĩamahĩnga. 
Proverbs4:20 Mwana wakwa, thikĩrĩria ciugo ciakwa, tega gũtũ ũthikĩrĩrie ũrĩa ndĩrakwĩra." 
Proverbs4:21 Ndũkaanareke ciugo ciakwa ikweherere, ciririkanage na ũcigage ngoroinĩ yaku. Wĩciiragie ũhoro wacio." 
Proverbs4:22 Kũrĩ arĩa macimenyeete nĩ muoyo, o na nĩ ũgima kũrĩ arĩa marĩ nacio." 
Proverbs4:23 Menyerera mũno mathugunda ma ngoro yaku; amu mathugunda macio nĩ mo mathondekaga mũtũũrĩre waku. 
Proverbs4:24 Wĩmenyerie kwaga kwaria ndeto hotomu, o namo maheeni nĩmeehere harĩ we." 
Proverbs4:25 Ikaraga ũcũũthĩrĩirie o mbere na ndũkaanehũgũre. 
Proverbs4:26 Menyagĩrĩra mũno mĩthiĩre yaku, naguo mũtũũrĩre waku nĩũgũũtũra wĩhandĩĩte wega." 
Proverbs4:27 Tũũra wĩhandĩĩte o wega, na wĩtheemage ũũru." 
Proverbs5:1 Mwana wakwa, thikĩrĩria ciugo cia ũũgĩ wakwa; tega gũtũ ũigue ngĩgũtaara." 
Proverbs5:2 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũrĩhotaga gũkũũrana maũndũ, nacio ciugo cia kanua gaaku igitagĩre ũũgĩ ũcio." 
Proverbs5:3 Iromo cia mũtumia mwaganu itaataga ciugo ihaana ta ũũkĩ, ningĩ mũgambo wake ũkoragwo ũnyorokeete o ta maguta." 
Proverbs5:4 No marigĩrĩrioinĩ akoragwo arũrĩĩte o ta mbakĩ, na no ruwo rũtheri atigagĩra mũndũ." 
Proverbs5:5 Makinya maake maroreete o gĩkuũinĩ; nayo mĩthiĩre yake ĩrĩĩkagĩrĩria o kwa arĩa akuũ. 
Proverbs5:6 Ndakindagĩria njĩrainĩ ĩrĩa ya muoyo; no kwagaaga agaagaga na ndamenyaga na kũrĩa eerekeire. 
Proverbs5:7 Rĩu ciana ciakwa, tagĩthikĩrĩriei ũrĩa ndĩroiga na mũtikaanariganĩrwo nĩ ciugo ciakwa." 
Proverbs5:8 Mwĩtheemageei mũtumia ta ũcio, ningĩ mũtikaanakuhĩhĩrie mũrango wa nyũmba yake." 
Proverbs5:9 Nĩ ũndũ nĩmũkwĩagithia gĩtĩĩo, o naguo wĩthĩ wanyu wanangwo nĩ arĩa matarĩ tha." 
Proverbs5:10 Ningĩ ũtonga wanyu ũthiĩ na andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ, o na nacio indo iria mũthũkũmĩĩte ituĩke cia mũrũũrĩrĩ." 
Proverbs5:11 Marigĩrĩrioinĩ ma muoyo wanyu mũgaagĩĩthikĩra, o rĩrĩa ikonde cia mwĩrĩ wanyu, o na mĩĩrĩ yanyu yothe ĩgaakorwo ĩniinũkĩrĩirio." 
Proverbs5:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũgaakiuga atĩrĩ, “Wũi ĩiya wakwa-ĩ! Nĩ kĩĩ gĩatũmire njage gũthikĩrĩria ngĩtaarwo, o na njage gũthikĩrĩria ngĩkaanio?" 
Proverbs5:13 Ngĩkĩaga gũthikĩrĩria arutani aakwa, o na ngĩaga kũrũmbũyania na arĩa maandaraga." 
Proverbs5:14 Ndarĩ hakuhĩ gũconorwo, ndĩ o hau kĩũnganoinĩ kĩa andũ oothe.”" 
Proverbs5:15 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, nyuaga maaĩ ma itangi rĩaku wee mwene o maaĩ moimĩĩte gĩthimainĩ gĩaku." 
Proverbs5:16 Ndũkaanareke gĩthima gĩaku kiune gĩikũrũkie maaĩ njĩrainĩ. 
Proverbs5:17 Reke maaĩ macio magũteithagie o wee wiki, na matigaateithagie ageni arĩa mũrĩ nao." 
Proverbs5:18 Gĩkenagĩre gĩthima kĩu gĩaku, ũgĩkenagio nĩ mũhiki ũrĩa wahikirie wĩ mwĩthĩ." 
Proverbs5:19 O ũcio ũthakarĩĩte na akaagĩrĩra o ta gathiiya. Iganagwo nĩ nyondo ciake hĩndĩ ciothe, o naguo wendo wake ũgũcanjamũrage." 
Proverbs5:20 Nĩkĩ gĩgũtũma, wee mwana wakwa, wende kũhe mũtumia ũngĩ wendo waku? Nĩkĩ gĩgũtũma wĩrirĩrie nyondo cia mũtumia wene?" 
Proverbs5:21 Amu MWATHANI nĩonaga ũrĩa wothe wĩkaga, o na no we ũroranagia ikĩro ciaku ciothe." 
Proverbs5:22 Meehia ma mũndũ mwaganu nĩ mũtego, agwatagio nĩ mũtego wa meehia macio maake." 
Proverbs5:23 Ũcio agakua nĩ ũndũ wa kũremwo nĩkwĩnyiita maũndũinĩ moothe, na agatoma nĩ ũndũ wa ũrimũ wake." 
Proverbs6:1 Mwana wakwa, angĩkorwo nĩũtuĩkĩĩte wa kũrĩhĩra mũndũ ũngĩ thiirĩ wake," 
Proverbs6:2 na wone taũgwatĩĩtwo nĩ ciugo cia kanua gaaku, o nacio irĩĩkanĩro ciaku igatuĩka mũtego kũrĩ wee-rĩ," 
Proverbs6:3 mwana wakwa, menya atĩ wĩmũkĩrie hinya nĩ mũndũ ũcio. Ũrĩa wagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩka nĩguo wĩteithũre harĩ we nĩ atĩrĩ; thiĩ harĩ we, wĩnyiihĩĩtie ũmũthaithe eeherie kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩu." 
Proverbs6:4 Ndũkaaneetĩkĩre maitho maaku mahĩtwo nĩ toro, o na kana imone ciaku icũũnge." 
Proverbs6:5 Wĩteithũre ta kanyoni gakiuma mũtegoinĩ, kana ta thwariga ĩkĩũrĩra mũgwĩmi." 
Proverbs6:6 Igũũta-rĩ, ta nĩicũũthĩrĩrie thigiriri, igĩtaranie mĩtugo yacio nĩguo ciũhĩge." 
Proverbs6:7 Thigiriri-rĩ, itirĩ mũtongoria kana mũnene, o na kana mũndũ wa gũciatha," 
Proverbs6:8 na no ciĩigagĩra mũthiithũ wa irio hĩndĩ ya ũrugarĩ, igakĩhaarĩria nĩ ũndũ wa hingo ya heho." 
Proverbs6:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, wee kĩgũũta gĩĩkĩ, ũgũtũũra ũkomeete kinya rĩ? Ũkaagurumũka kuuma toro hĩndĩ irĩkũ?" 
Proverbs6:10 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, amba ũcooke toro, ũkomakome o haniini; o na ningĩ wĩkumbatanĩrie ũhuurũke." 
Proverbs6:11 Nawe ũgũkorererwo nĩ ũthĩĩni taũkoreetwo nĩ mĩitũ ũtharĩkĩrwo nĩ ũkĩa o ta ũtharĩkĩirwo nĩ ita. 
Proverbs6:12 Mũndũ wa mũcene na mwaganu, acangacangaga akĩaragia mũhuuhu." 
Proverbs6:13 Nĩkuunĩra oinagĩra mũndũ riitho, akamũheneria na guoko, nĩ geetha amũheenererie." 
Proverbs6:14 Nĩgũthugunda athugundaga ũũru na ngoro yake, na agathogothaga thĩĩna hingo ciothe." 
Proverbs6:15 Kwoguo, mũtino ũkaamũkora aterĩgĩrĩire, agaakobobanio aanangwo biũ." 
Proverbs6:16 (16-19) Kũrĩ maũndũ mũgwanja marĩa MWATHANI athũire: Maitho ma mwĩtĩĩo, rũrĩmĩ rwa maheeni, mooko mooragaga andũ mateehĩĩtie, ngoro ĩrĩa ĩthugundaga o waganu mũtheri, magũrũ marĩa mateng'eraga gwĩka o ũũru mũtheri, mũndũ ũrutaga ũira wa maheeni, na mũndũ ũhũũrithanagia andũ arĩa angĩ." 
Proverbs6:17 Mwana wakwa, rũmia watho wa thooguo, na ndũkaanariganĩrwo nĩ ũrutani wa maitũguo." 
Proverbs6:18 Ciugo ciao nĩitũũre irĩ mũthiithũ waku; ciige ngoroinĩ yaku. 
Proverbs6:19 Ũrutani wacio ũgũtongoragie ũkiumagara, ningĩ ũkũmenyagĩrĩre wĩ toro,o na ningĩ ũgũtaarage rĩrĩa warahũka kuuma toro." 
Proverbs6:20 Watho-rĩ, nĩ taawa, kĩrĩra nĩ ũtheri, ningĩ gũkaanio nĩkuonererio njĩra ya muoyo." 
Proverbs6:21 Ũhoro ũcio nĩũgũkweheranĩria na mũtumia mwaganu, o na ũkwehanĩrĩrie na ciugo ciake cia kũheenanĩrĩria." 
Proverbs6:22 Menyerera ndũkaanaguucĩrĩrio nĩ ũthaka wake, o na kana ũguucĩrĩrio nĩ mwĩgemio wa njuĩrĩ cia maitho maake." 
Proverbs6:23 Mũmaraaya aheenagĩrĩrio na keenyũ ka mũgate, mũtumia mũtharia aguĩmaga mũtũũrĩre wothe wa mũndũ mũrũme." 
Proverbs6:24 Rĩu-rĩ, mũndũ ahota gũkuua mwaki na gĩthũri gĩake, na nguo ciake itihĩe?" 
Proverbs6:25 Ningĩ mũndũ angĩthiĩra igũrũ rĩa makara me na mwaki, githĩ makinya maake to mahĩe?" 
Proverbs6:26 Ũguo no taguo mũndũ angĩtharia na mũtumia wa mũndũ ũngĩ, ũrĩa ũngĩĩka ũguo no mũhaka aconorithio." 
Proverbs6:27 Andũ matimenaga mũici aiyĩte no geetha ehũũnie rĩrĩa e mũhũũtu. 
Proverbs6:28 No rĩĩrĩ, angĩnyiitwo, nĩarĩhagio maita mũgwanja, o na ningĩ akanenganĩra kĩrĩa gĩothe arĩ nakĩo." 
Proverbs6:29 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtharanagia, ũcio ndeciiragia wega; mũndũ ũcio nĩkwĩyũnũha eyũnũhaga we mwene." 
Proverbs6:30 Kĩrĩa oonaga no nguraro na kwagithio gĩtĩĩo, na ningĩ atũũraga anyararĩĩtwo kinya tene." 
Proverbs6:31 Ũiru-rĩ, nĩũtũmaga mũthuuriwe araakare mũno, ningĩ ndũrekaga mũthuuri ũcio aigue tha rĩrĩa arerĩhĩria." 
Proverbs6:32 Na ũngĩmũhe irĩhi o na rĩrĩkũ rĩa gwĩkũũra narĩo ndangĩamũkĩra, ningĩ hatirĩ iheeo o na irĩkũ ingĩhooreria maraakara maake." 
Proverbs7:1 Mwana wakwa, ririkanaga ciugo ciakwa, wĩigĩre mataaro maakwa matuĩke mũthiithũ waku." 
Proverbs7:2 Menyagĩrĩra mataaro maakwa na nĩũgũtũũra, menyagĩrĩra ũrutani wakwa o ta arĩ kĩũma kĩa riitho rĩaku." 
Proverbs7:3 Wĩigĩre mataaro maakwa hingo ciothe; maandĩke o ngoroinĩ yaku. 
Proverbs7:4 Menyagĩrĩra ũũgĩ o ta ũrĩa ũngĩmenyerera mwarĩ wa maitũguo, naguo ũtaũku o ta ũrĩa ũngĩmenyerera mũraataguo." 
Proverbs7:5 Weka ũguo nĩũrĩkoragwo ũrĩ mũrigĩrĩrie kuuma kũrĩ mũtumia ũrĩa mwaganu, ũgĩtheemage ciugo ciake cia wara." 
Proverbs7:6 Hingo ĩmwe nĩgũcũũthĩrĩria ndacũũthagĩrĩria na ndirica ya nyũmba yakwa; 
Proverbs7:7 ngĩkĩona andũ eethĩ aingĩ mataarĩ na ũmenyo, ngĩgĩkũũrana mwanake ũmwe wao warĩ mũkingitaru o kũigana." 
Proverbs7:8 Nĩgũthiĩ athiaga na barabara, agagĩthiĩ aroreete nyũmba ya mũndũ wa nja ũmwe mũmaraaya," 
Proverbs7:9 o mathaa ma hwaĩinĩ gũkĩambĩrĩria kũgĩa nduma. 
Proverbs7:10 Mwanake ũcio agĩtũngwo nĩ mũtumia wehumbĩĩte kĩũmaraaya na nĩabangĩĩte mũbango. 
Proverbs7:11 Aarĩ mũtũmia mũũmĩrĩru ũtaiguaga thoni, na ndakindagĩria gwake mũciĩ." 
Proverbs7:12 Mahinda mamwe e barabarainĩ, marĩa mangĩ ndũũnyũinĩ, marĩa mangĩ handũ koonainĩ ooheirie o ũrĩa angĩona!" 
Proverbs7:13 Agĩkĩhĩmbĩria mwanake ũcio akĩmũmumunya, akĩmũkũũrĩra maitho akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ," 
Proverbs7:14 “Ndĩ na ndĩa thuutha wa kũruta magongoona ma ũiguano; ũũmũũthĩ nĩndahingia mĩhĩtwa yakwa. 
Proverbs7:15 Nĩkĩo ndakiumagara gũgũcaria, ngũtuĩte atĩ no nginya tuonane, na nĩndakena ndakuona." 
Proverbs7:16 Nĩndandĩkĩĩte ũrĩrĩ wakwa; ndĩwarĩte macuka magemie ma gatani ya Misiri. 
Proverbs7:17 Ningĩ ngaũhuuhĩrĩria maraaci, manemane, ũbaani, thubiri, na mĩndarathini." 
Proverbs7:18 Gĩũke tũkeendane nginya gũkĩe, tũgĩĩkenie na wendo ũcio o nginya tũnyootoke." 
Proverbs7:19 Tondũ mũthuuri wakwa ndarĩ kuo; nĩathiĩte rũgendo rwa matukũ maingĩ. 
Proverbs7:20 Nĩathiĩte na mbeeca nyingĩ cia kũmũigana, na agacooka ciumia igĩrĩ ciathira.”" 
Proverbs7:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩkĩmũheenereria na ndeto ciake cia uuhani, naake agĩkĩheeneka nĩ mĩario ĩyo mĩnyoroku ya kanua gaake." 
Proverbs7:22 Agĩkĩmũrũmĩrĩra o ta ũrĩa ndeegwa ĩrũmagĩrĩra mũthĩnji, o na kana ta thwariga ĩikĩĩtie mũtegoinĩ;" 
Proverbs7:23 igagĩtheecwo nĩ mũguĩ o nginya mara makoima.O na ta ũrĩa kanyoni kagũaga mũtegoinĩ, ndamenyaga atĩ muoyo wake ũrĩ ũgwatiinĩ." 
Proverbs7:24 Rĩu-rĩ, ciana ciakwa, tathikĩrĩriai ũrĩa ndĩroiga; tegaai matũ mũigue ciugo ciakwa." 
Proverbs7:25 Mũtikaaneetĩkĩre kũheenererio nĩ mũtumia wa mũthemba ta ũcio, o na kana mũmũthingate." 
Proverbs7:26 Amu-rĩ aanarũnda arũme aingĩ a bata, arĩa aanooraga-rĩ, matingĩtarĩka." 
Proverbs7:27 Gũthiĩ gwake-rĩ, nĩgwĩtwarĩrĩria gĩkuũinĩ, ĩyo nĩ yo njĩra nguhĩ mũno ya gũgĩkinya gĩkuũinĩ." 
Proverbs8:1 Rĩu-rĩ, githĩ ũũgĩ ti gwĩtana aretana, naake ũtaũku agakaĩrĩria?" 
Proverbs8:2 O kũu tũcũmbĩrĩinĩ twa irĩma hakuhĩ na barabara, o hau macemanĩrio ma njĩra nĩ ho arũũgamaga." 
Proverbs8:3 Ningĩ o hau kĩhingoinĩ gĩa itũũra, o hau haingĩragĩrwo nĩ ho eetanagĩra." 
Proverbs8:4 Agakiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩ inyuĩ andũ aya ndĩraarĩria; inyuothe mũingĩ wa thĩ nĩ inyuĩ ndĩraaria na inyuĩ." 
Proverbs8:5 Inyuĩ mũtarĩ oogĩ, mwĩmenyeriei ũthuurĩrĩri; inyuĩ irimũ ici, mwĩcookereei." 
Proverbs8:6 Tathikĩrĩriai ciugo cia bata iria ngũmwarĩria; ngũmwĩra o maũndũ ma kĩhooto. 
Proverbs8:7 Ngũmwarĩria o ma theri; waganu-rĩ, nĩ kĩndũ kĩ magigi, na ndingĩwaria." 
Proverbs8:8 Kanua gaakwa gekwaria o maũndũ ma ũthingu, hatirĩ kiugo ingĩaria kĩa maheeni kana gĩa kũhĩtithania." 
Proverbs8:9 Kũrĩ arĩa ataũkĩre, maũndũ macio matirĩ iriga, kũrĩ arĩa oogĩ, maũndũ macio nĩ marũngarũ." 
Proverbs8:10 Oyai mataaro maakwa handũ ha betha, ningĩ wĩthuurĩreei ũũgĩ handũ ha thahabu ĩrĩa theru mũno." 
Proverbs8:11 Ũũgĩ nĩ mwega gũkĩra mahiga ma goro. na ndũngĩgerekanio na kĩndũ o na kĩmwe kĩa iria mũngĩrirĩria. 
Proverbs8:12 Niĩ ũũgĩ, ndĩ na ũthuurirĩ, ndĩ na ũmenyo, na nĩnjũũĩ gũthugunda maũndũ wega." 
Proverbs8:13 Gũtĩĩa MWATHANI-rĩ, nĩgũthũũra waganu: Niĩ-rĩ, nĩthũire mwĩtĩĩo, rũng'athio, mĩthiĩre ya waganu, o na kwaria maheeni." 
Proverbs8:14 Nĩ niĩ mwene kĩrĩra, ũtaũku na ũhoti o nacio no ciakwa." 
Proverbs8:15 Nĩndeithagia athamaki gũthamaka, nao aathani ngamateithia gũtua maciira na kĩhooto." 
Proverbs8:16 Nĩndeithagĩrĩria aathani gwathana, na ngateithia anene gwatha thĩ." 
Proverbs8:17 Andũ arĩa manyenda o na niĩ nĩndĩmeendeete, arĩa oothe manjaragia na kĩyo nĩmanyonaga." 
Proverbs8:18 Nĩ niĩ heyanaga ũtonga o na gĩtĩĩo, ũtonga na ũhootani iria itaagaga." 
Proverbs8:19 Kĩrĩa ũngĩruta kuuma harĩ niĩ, kĩ na bata gũkĩra thahabu ĩrĩa theru mũno, o na uumithio wakwa ũgakĩra betha iria njega mũno." 
Proverbs8:20 Mĩthiĩre yakwa nĩ ya ũthingu, njĩra ciakwa no kĩhooto gĩtheri," 
Proverbs8:21 nĩguo heyage arĩa manyenda ũtonga na njiyũragie nyũmba ciao na mĩthiithũ. 
Proverbs8:22 “MWATHANI aanyũmbire o kĩambĩrĩria kĩa wĩra wake, nĩ niĩ wĩra wa mbere wa mooko maake." 
Proverbs8:23 Ndoombirwo ndĩ wa mbere o thĩ ĩtanoombwo. 
Proverbs8:24 Hingo ĩrĩa gũtaarĩ na maria, norĩo ndaciarirwo, o hingo ĩyo gũtaarĩ na ithima cia maaĩ." 
Proverbs8:25 Ndaciarirwo mbere ya kũgĩa kwa irĩma, o mbere ya ithũngũri kũgĩa." 
Proverbs8:26 O mbere Ngai atanoomba thĩ o na kana ithaka, o na kana rũkũngũ o ruothe." 
Proverbs8:27 Niĩ ndarĩ ho, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa athondekire igũrũ, o rĩrĩa eekĩrire rũkirĩri igũrũ wa iria." 
Proverbs8:28 O rĩrĩa arũmirie kũu matuinĩ, rĩrĩa aatũmire ithima ciume maaĩ mathiage iriainĩ," 
Proverbs8:29 rĩrĩa eekĩrĩire maaĩ ma iria mĩhaka, nĩguo maaĩ maikarage o ta ũrĩa we mwene aathanire, o rĩrĩa athondekire itina cia thĩ." 
Proverbs8:30 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ndakoragwo hakuhĩ na MWATHANI, ngĩmũteithĩrĩria gũthondeka maũndũ, ngamũkenagia mũthenya o mũthenya, na niĩ ngakenaga ndĩ harĩ we hingo ciothe." 
Proverbs8:31 Ningĩ ngakenaga nĩ ũndũ wa thĩ ĩno yake ya gũtũũrwo o na ngakenaga nĩ andũ. 
Proverbs8:32 “Rĩu, ciana ciakwa, tategaai matũ mũigue; gũkena-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ o wothe ũhingagia uuge wakwa." 
Proverbs8:33 Tuĩkaai a gũthikagĩrĩria ũtaarani wakwa na nĩmũkũũhĩga, menyaai mũũtirike." 
Proverbs8:34 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũnjiguaga arĩ na gĩkeno. Aikaraga o mũthenya ihingoinĩ ciakwa, na agaikaraga eetereire o hau mũrangoinĩ wakwa." 
Proverbs8:35 Tondũ ũrĩa ũgĩĩte na niĩ, nĩagĩĩte na muoyo, naake MWATHANI nĩarĩmũtugaga." 
Proverbs8:36 Ũrĩa ũtarĩ na niĩ, nĩkwĩyũnũha eyũnũhaga, arĩa oothe mathũũraga nĩ gĩkuũ makoragwo meendeete.”" 
Proverbs9:1 Ũũgĩ nĩeyakĩire nyũmba, na akeyacũhĩria itugĩ mũgwanja." 
Proverbs9:2 Nĩathĩnjĩĩte ndũrũme ciake cia gĩceegũ; ndibei yake nĩhaarĩrie wega, o na meetha nĩarĩĩte." 
Proverbs9:3 Nĩarekeetie airĩĩtu arĩa mamũtungataga mageetane marũngiĩ tũthũngũriinĩ twa itũũra. 
Proverbs9:4 Moige atĩrĩ, “Irimũ ciothe nĩitoonye na gũũkũ!” Arĩa matarĩ oogĩ arameera atĩrĩ," 
Proverbs9:5 “Ũkaai mũrĩe irio ciakwa na mũnyue ndibei ĩrĩa haarĩirie. 
Proverbs9:6 Tiganaai na ũrimũ nĩguo mũtũũre, thiagaai na mĩthiĩre ya ũtaũku.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Ũrĩa ũkaanagia mũndũ wa kĩnyũrũri nĩ gĩconoko egĩagĩra nakĩo.Na ũrĩa ũkaanagia mũndũ mwaganu nĩkwĩyũnũha eyũnũhaga. 
Proverbs9:8 Ndũkaanakaanie mũndũ wa kĩnyũrũri tondũ no agũthũũre. No ũngĩkaania mũndũ mũũgĩ, ũcio no akwende." 
Proverbs9:9 Ũngĩtaara mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩohĩgaga makĩria; ũngĩruta mũndũ mũthingu ũndũ nĩongagĩrĩra ũmenyo. 
Proverbs9:10 Gũtĩĩa MWATHANI nĩkuo kĩhumo kĩa ũũgĩ, na ũngĩmenya Ũrĩa Ũmwe Mũtheru nĩwegĩĩra na ũmenyo." 
Proverbs9:11 Ũũgĩ nĩkuongerera wongagĩrĩra matukũ maaku, o na ũkoongerera ũtũũro waku mĩaka ĩngĩ mĩingĩ." 
Proverbs9:12 Angĩkorwo wĩ mũũgĩ-rĩ, ũũgĩ ũcio nĩ ũteithio waku wiki; angĩkorwo wĩ wa kĩnyũrũri ndũrĩ ũteithio ũngĩona." 
Proverbs9:13 Mũtumia mũkĩĩgu nĩ wa inegene; nĩ mwaganu o na ndarĩ thoni. 
Proverbs9:14 Nĩgũikara aikaraga o hau mũrangoinĩ wa nyũmba yake, o na ahota gũikara itũũra gatagatĩ," 
Proverbs9:15 agagĩĩtaga arĩa mekũhĩtũka, o arĩa megwĩthiĩra mabatainĩ maao." 
Proverbs9:16 Akameera atĩrĩ, “Andũ arĩa oothe irimũ nĩmatoonye gũũkũ!”Na akeera arĩa matarĩ oogĩ atĩrĩ," 
Proverbs9:17 “Maaĩ ma kũiya me mũrĩo, na irio cia kũrĩĩra hithoinĩ o nacio i mũrĩo!”" 
Proverbs9:18 No matimenyaga atĩ, arĩa oothe matoonyaga gwake matiumaga kuo, na matiũĩ atĩ arĩa maanatoonya kuo marĩ o kwa arĩa a akuũ." 
Proverbs10:1 Ici nĩ thimo cia Solomoni: Mwana mũũgĩ atũmaga ithe akene, no mwana kĩrimũ atũũragia nyina na kĩeha." 
Proverbs10:2 Ũtonga uumanĩĩte na magendo nĩ wa tũhũ, no ũthingu nĩũhonokanagia kuuma harĩ gĩkuũ." 
Proverbs10:3 MWATHANI ndangĩreka mũndũ mũthingu ahũũte, ĩndĩ ũrĩa mwaganu ndarĩ kĩndũ angĩona." 
Proverbs10:4 Ũgũũta ũreehagĩra mũndũ ũthĩĩni, no kĩyo gĩtũmaga mũndũ atonge." 
Proverbs10:5 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũũgĩ agethaga hĩndĩ ya magetha; no mũndũ ũtindaga toro hĩndĩ ĩrĩa kũragethwo areehage gĩconoko. 
Proverbs10:6 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩegĩagĩra na iraathimo, ĩndĩ mĩario ya mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu ihũmbĩire mbaara." 
Proverbs10:7 Mũndũ mũthingu nĩaikaraga mũno agĩkaariganĩra, ĩndĩ ũrĩa mwaganu ariganagĩra na ihenya." 
Proverbs10:8 Mũndũ wĩ na ũũgĩ wa ngoro nĩetĩkagĩra mawatho, no mũndũ wa kũhũhũũtĩka nĩkũniinwo aniinagwo." 
Proverbs10:9 Mũndũ wa mĩikarĩre ya ũthingu nĩmũgitĩre, no mũndũ ũhotomagia mĩthiĩre yake ũcio nĩoimbũragwo." 
Proverbs10:10 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũhithagĩrĩra ũndũ ũrĩa wa ma, kaĩ arĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ!Ĩndĩ ũrĩa ũrũithagia ũrĩa ũngĩ ũtheriinĩ, ũcio nĩ wa thaayũ." 
Proverbs10:11 Mĩario ya mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩ gĩthima kĩa muoyo, ĩndĩ mĩario ya mũndũ mwaganu ĩhumbĩire mbaara." 
Proverbs10:12 Rũthũro rũreehage ngũĩ, ĩndĩ wendo wohanagĩra meehia moothe." 
Proverbs10:13 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũũgĩ aaragia o ũgima, ĩndĩ kĩrimũ gĩetereire o rũthanju." 
Proverbs10:14 Mũndũ mũũgĩ, ũũgĩ nĩguo ũtonga wake, no mĩario ya kĩrimũ ĩgĩtwaragĩrĩria thĩĩnainĩ." 
Proverbs10:15 Ũtonga wa mũndũ nĩ ta kĩndũ gĩa kwĩgitia nakĩo, no ũthĩĩni nĩkwananga wanangaga ũrĩa ũrĩ naguo." 
Proverbs10:16 Mũcaara wa mũndũ mũthingu nĩ muoyo, no uumithio wa mũndũ mwaganu no wĩhia." 
Proverbs10:17 Ũrĩa ũiguaga agĩtaarwo nĩagĩaga na mũtũũrĩre mwega, ĩndĩ ũrĩa ũtaiguaga agĩkaanio nĩkũũra ooraga." 
Proverbs10:18 Mũndũ wa ungumania aaragia o maheeni, naake ũrĩa waragia mũhuuhu nĩ kĩrimũ." 
Proverbs10:19 Kwaria ciugo nyingĩ gũtũmaga mũndũ ahĩtie, ĩndĩ mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩkũmenyerera amenyagĩrĩra mĩario yake." 
Proverbs10:20 Mĩario ya mũndũ mũthingu nĩ ta betha ĩrĩa njega mũno; no mathugunda ma mũndũ mwaganu matirĩ uumithio. 
Proverbs10:21 Mĩario ya mũndũ mũthingu nĩ ũteithio kũrĩ andũ aingĩ, no irimũ ikuaga nĩ ũndũ wa ũrimũ wacio." 
Proverbs10:22 Kĩraathimo kĩa MWATHANI kĩreehage ũtonga, na ndarĩ kĩeha areehanagĩria na ũtonga ũcio." 
Proverbs10:23 Harĩ kĩrimũ gwĩka ũũru nĩ ta ithaako. Naake mũndũ mũũgĩ akenagio no gwĩka ciĩko cia ũũgĩ. 
Proverbs10:24 Ũndũ ũrĩa mũndũ mwaganu etigĩrĩĩte nĩguo ũmũkoraga no ũndũ ũrĩa mũndũ mũthingu eriragĩria nĩguo aheagwo. 
Proverbs10:25 Kĩhuuhũkanio gĩoka, arĩa aaganu matwaragĩrĩrio magatoma, ĩndĩ arĩa athingu hĩndĩ ciothe nĩkũmenyererwo mamenyagĩrĩrwo." 
Proverbs10:26 Gũtũma kĩgũũta wĩra, no ta ũgagatu wa thiki magegoinĩ, kana ta ndoogo ĩrĩ maitho." 
Proverbs10:27 Gũtĩĩa MWATHANI gũtũmaga mũndũ oongongererwo matukũ, ĩndĩ matukũ ma ũrĩa mwaganu nĩkũnyiihio manyiihagio." 
Proverbs10:28 Kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩa arĩa athingu kĩmakinyagia gĩkenoinĩ, no mwĩhoko wa arĩa aaganu no tũhũ mũtheri." 
Proverbs10:29 MWATHANI nĩ we mwĩgitio wa arĩa ehokeku, no arĩa aaganu nĩkũniina amaniinaga." 
Proverbs10:30 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu egũtũũra ehandĩĩte ki, no ũrĩa mwaganu nĩkweherio akeeherio thĩ." 
Proverbs10:31 Mũndũ mũthingu aaragia o maũndũ ma ũũgĩ, no mũndũ wa maheeni nĩagaakirio." 
Proverbs10:32 Mũndũ mũthingu aaragia o ndeto cia kwendeka, no mũndũ mwaganu aaragia o ndeto cia gũthĩĩnia andũ ngoro." 
Proverbs11:1 MWATHANI nĩathũire andũ arĩa mahũthagĩra ithimi cia maheeni, ĩndĩ nĩakenagĩra ithimi cia ma." 
Proverbs11:2 Mwĩtĩĩo-rĩ, ũreehage gĩconoko; ĩndĩ ũũgĩ nĩ wa arĩa menyiihagia." 
Proverbs11:3 Andũ arĩa eega, wega wao nĩguo ũmatũũragia, no arĩa a ungumania nĩmaniinagwo nĩ ungumania wao." 
Proverbs11:4 Ũtonga ndũrĩ ũteithio mũthenya wa maraakara ma Ngai, no ũthingu nĩũhonokagia mũndũ kuuma gwĩ gĩkuũ." 
Proverbs11:5 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩatũũraga mũtũũrĩre mwega, ĩndĩ ũrĩa mwaganu agũithagio nĩ waganu wake." 
Proverbs11:6 Ũthingu wa arĩa ehokeku nĩũmateithũraga, no mĩgarũ nĩkũgwatio ĩgwatagio nĩ thuti ciayo." 
Proverbs11:7 Mũndũ mwaganu akua, akuaga na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩake, mwĩhoko wa andũ ooru no gũthira ũthiraga." 
Proverbs11:8 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩagitagĩrwo mĩnyamaaroinĩ; ĩndĩ ũrĩa mwaganu nĩkũrekererio arekagĩrĩrio mĩnyamaaroinĩ ĩyo," 
Proverbs11:9 Mĩario ya mũndũ mwaganu nĩgũthũũkia ĩthuũkagia mũndũ ũrĩa marigainie, ĩndĩ ũũgĩ nĩũhonokagia mũndũ mũthingu." 
Proverbs11:10 Rĩrĩa andũ athingu maraathimwo andũ a itũũra nĩgũkena makenaga; na rĩrĩa arĩa aaganu marathira no ngemi. 
Proverbs11:11 Rĩrĩa andũ arĩa athingu maraathimwo itũũra nĩgũtũũgĩrio rĩtũũgagĩrio, ĩndĩ mĩario ya arĩa aaganu ĩtũmaga rĩanangwo." 
Proverbs11:12 Nĩ ũrimũ gũcambia mũndũ wa itũũra rĩaku, no mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩgũkira akiraga." 
Proverbs11:13 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũthiaga akĩaragia ndeto cia mũhuuhu ndarĩ hitho, ĩndĩ mũndũ mwĩhokeku, ũcio nĩ wa kwĩhokerwo maũndũ." 
Proverbs11:14 Bũrũri ũngĩaga ũtaaro mwega nĩkũgũa ũgũaga, no ũrĩa wĩ na ataarani aingĩ nĩkwĩhanda wĩhandaga." 
Proverbs11:15 Ũrĩa ũtuĩkĩĩte wa kũrĩhĩra mũndũ ũngĩ thiirĩ wake, no nginya ũndũ ũcio ũmũthĩĩnie, kaba kũregana na ũndũ ũcio." 
Proverbs11:16 Mũtumia wa ngoro njega nĩaheyagwo gĩtĩĩo, no mũtumia ũtarĩ mĩtugo nĩ gĩconoko.Kĩgũũta gĩtingĩonera ũtonga, no mũndũ wĩ kĩyo nĩatongaga." 
Proverbs11:17 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩkaga wega, nĩ we wĩgunaga, ĩndĩ mũndũ ũtarĩ tha, nĩ we mwene wĩthũũkagia." 
Proverbs11:18 Mũndũ mwaganu ndarĩ mũcaara oonaga, no ũrĩa wĩkaga maũndũ ma ũthingu, ũcio igai rĩake nĩ rĩega." 
Proverbs11:19 Mũndũ ũrũmagĩrĩra ũthingu nĩagaatũũra muoyo, no ũrĩa ũrũmagĩrĩra maũndũ ma waganu nĩagaakua." 
Proverbs11:20 Andũ a meciiria mooru nĩmathũirwo nĩ MWATHANI, no andũ a mĩthiĩre mĩkinyanĩru nĩmamũkenagia." 
Proverbs11:21 Hatirĩ hĩndĩ andũ arĩa ooru matakaaherithio, ĩndĩ arĩa athingu nĩmakaahonokio." 
Proverbs11:22 Mũtumia mũthaka ũtarĩ kĩhaarĩro, no ta gĩcũhĩ gĩa thahabu kĩ iniũrũ rĩa ngũrũe." 
Proverbs11:23 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu eriragĩria ũndũ ũrĩa mwega, ĩndĩ ũndũ ũrĩa mũndũ mwaganu eriragĩria ũreehage ngũĩ." 
Proverbs11:24 Mũndũ mũtugi athiaga na mbere na gũtonga, no mũndũ mũkarĩ no gũthiĩ athiaga na mbere gũthĩĩna." 
Proverbs11:25 Mũndũ mũtugi nĩaraathimagwo, na ũrĩa ũkundanagia maaĩ naake nĩakundagio." 
Proverbs11:26 Ũrĩa ũregaga kwenderia andũ irio nĩarumagwo nĩ andũ, ĩndĩ ũrĩa wendagĩria andũ, nĩmamũraathimaga." 
Proverbs11:27 Ũrĩa ũcaragĩrĩria maũndũ ma wega nĩagaathagĩrĩrio, ĩndĩ ũrĩa ũcaragia ũũru, noguo ũmũkoraga." 
Proverbs11:28 Ũrĩa wĩhokaga ũtonga wake aitĩkaga ta mahuti hĩndĩ ya mbura ĩrĩa nene, no ũrĩa mũthingu arĩruraga o ta mathangũ." 
Proverbs11:29 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũnyariiraga mũciĩ wake ndarĩ uumithio oonaga, kĩrimũ nakĩo gĩtuĩkaga ndungata ya mũndũ ũrĩa mũũgĩ." 
Proverbs11:30 Maciaro ma mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩ mũtĩ wa muoyo, na mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩaguucagĩrĩria mĩoyo ya andũ aingĩ." 
Proverbs11:31 Angĩkorwo andũ arĩa eega magwataga igai rĩao marĩ o gũũkũ thĩ-rĩ, arĩa aaganu na arĩa eehia mangĩkĩaga kũgwata rĩao atĩa?" 
Proverbs12:1 Mwendi gũtaarwo nĩ mwenda ũmenyo ĩndĩ mũthũũri gũkaanio ũcio nĩ kĩrimũ. 
Proverbs12:2 Mũndũ mwega nĩatũũgagĩrio nĩ MWATHANI, ĩndĩ mũndũ wa mĩtugo mĩũru nĩamũherithagia." 
Proverbs12:3 Mũndũ ndangĩgaacĩra na maũndũ ma waganu, no mũndũ angĩĩhanda maũndũinĩ ma ũthingu ndangĩenyenyeka." 
Proverbs12:4 Mũtumia ngatha nĩ thũmbĩ ya mũthuuriwe, ĩndĩ mũtumia ũrĩa ũconorithagia mũthuuriwe nĩ ta woru wĩ mahĩndĩinĩ." 
Proverbs12:5 Mathugunda ma mũndũ mũthingu nĩ ma kĩhooto, no mataaro ma mũndũ mwaganu nĩ mahotomu." 
Proverbs12:6 Mĩario ya arĩa aaganu no ya ũũragani mũtheri, ĩndĩ mĩario ya arĩa arũngĩrĩru nĩĩmateithũraga." 
Proverbs12:7 Arĩa aaganu nĩkũng'aũranio mang'aũranagio magathira, no arĩa athingu megũtũũra mehandĩĩte." 
Proverbs12:8 Mũndũ agaathagĩrĩrio nĩ ũndũ wa ũũgĩ wake, no ũrĩa ũtarĩ mũũgĩ nĩkũnyararwo anyararagwo." 
Proverbs12:9 Kaba mũndũ wonagwo ta atarĩ kĩene na nĩeyonagĩra gĩa kũrĩa, gũkĩra mũndũ wĩ igweta, no ndangĩonera gĩa kũrĩa." 
Proverbs12:10 Mũndũ mũthingu nĩamenyagĩrĩra mahiũ maake, ĩndĩ ũrĩa mwaganu no wĩĩ mũtheri oonagia mahiũ maake." 
Proverbs12:11 Mũrĩmi wĩ kĩyo ndaagaga gĩa kũrĩa ĩndĩ ũrĩa ũtũũraga mbũrũũrũ no kwara araga rũhĩ. 
Proverbs12:12 Andũ arĩa aaganu maakenagĩra o maũndũ ma waganu wao, ĩndĩ arĩa athingu mehandaga wega." 
Proverbs12:13 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu agwatagio nĩ mĩario ya kanua gaake, ĩndĩ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩgwĩthara etharaga thĩĩnainĩ" 
Proverbs12:14 Mĩario ya mũndũ mwega ĩtũmaga aikare egangarĩĩte, na mũndũ arĩhagwo mũcaara kũringana na wĩra wake." 
Proverbs12:15 Kĩrimũ-rĩ, kĩyonaga gĩ kĩũgĩ mũno, no mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩathikagĩrĩria ũtaaro." 
Proverbs12:16 Mang'ũrĩka ma kĩrimũ moimbũkaga na ihenya, ĩndĩ mũndũ mũũgĩ arumwo nĩkũmeria ameragia ũhoro ũcio." 
Proverbs12:17 Mũndũ waragia ũhoro wa ma ũira wake ũkoragwo wĩ wa ma, ĩndĩ mũndũ wa maheeni arutaga ũira wa maheeni." 
Proverbs12:18 Ciugo itarĩ mbaarĩrĩre wega itiihagia o ta rũhiũ, no ciugo cia ũũgĩ nĩkũhooreria ihooragĩria." 
Proverbs12:19 Ũhoro wa ma ũtũũraga tene na tene, ĩndĩ maheeni no ma ihinda iniini." 
Proverbs12:20 Maheeni marĩ ngoroinĩ cia arĩa mathugundaga ũũru, ĩndĩ ngoroinĩ cia arĩa mathugundaga maũndũ ma wega, no gĩkeno." 
Proverbs12:21 Hatirĩ ũndũ mũũru ũkoraga andũ arĩa athingu, no arĩa aaganu matũũraga maiyũrĩrĩirwo nĩ ũũru." 
Proverbs12:22 Maheeni nĩ kĩndũ kĩ magigi harĩ MWATHANI, no arĩa eeki maũndũ ma ma, MWATHANI nĩgũkena amakenagĩra." 
Proverbs12:23 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩahithagĩrĩra ũũgĩ wake, ĩndĩ ngoro cia irimũ cianagĩrĩra ũrimũ wacio." 
Proverbs12:24 Mũndũ wĩ kĩyo nĩatuĩkaga mũthamaki, no gũtuĩka kĩgũũta gũtũmaga mũndũ atũũre e ngombo." 
Proverbs12:25 Kĩeha gĩikaragia ngoro ĩrĩ nditũ, ĩndĩ kwarĩrio wega gũtũmaga mũndũ akene." 
Proverbs12:26 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩ kĩonereria kĩega harĩ andũ arĩa angĩ, no mĩthiĩre ya ũrĩa mwaganu nĩkũhĩtithia ĩmahĩtithagia." 
Proverbs12:27 Kĩgũũta gĩtingĩinũkĩria nyama ya iguĩma, ĩndĩ mũndũ wĩ kĩyo ũtonga wake nĩ wa bata." 
Proverbs12:28 Ũthingu ũtũmaga mũndũ atũũre muoyo, ĩndĩ waganu werekagĩria mũndũ o gĩkuũinĩ." 
Proverbs13:1 Mwana mũũgĩ nĩathikagĩrĩria ithe akĩmũtaara, ĩndĩ mũndũ mũremi ndaiguaga agĩkaanio." 
Proverbs13:2 Mũndũ wa mĩario mĩega arĩagĩra mĩario ĩyo yake, ĩndĩ mũndũ mungumania eendaga o haaro." 
Proverbs13:3 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũmenyagĩrĩra ciugo ciake, nĩatũũragia muoyo wake;ĩndĩ mwaria ndeto itarĩ kĩhaarĩro nĩ we mwene wĩyanangaga." 
Proverbs13:4 Kĩgũũta kĩĩriragĩria na gĩtione kĩndũ, ĩndĩ mũndũ wĩ kĩyo nĩgũtongio atongagio." 
Proverbs13:5 Mũndũ mũthingu nĩathũire ndeto cia maheeni, ĩndĩ mũndũ mwaganu mĩtugo yake ĩ thoni na gĩconoko." 
Proverbs13:6 Ũthingu nĩũgitagĩra mũndũ ũtarĩ na mahĩtia, no meehia mang'aũranagia mwene mo." 
Proverbs13:7 Kwĩ mũndũ wĩtuaga mũtongu na ndarĩ kĩndũ, na ũngĩ agetua mũthĩĩni, ĩndĩ nĩ gĩtonga." 
Proverbs13:8 Mũndũ gĩtonga ahũthagĩra ũtonga wake nĩguo ahonokie muoyo wake, ĩndĩ mũthĩĩni ndarĩ mũndũ ũngĩtindanĩrĩra naake." 
Proverbs13:9 Mũndũ mũthingu nĩ ta taawa wakanaga hingo ciothe, ĩndĩ mũndũ mwaganu nĩ ta taawa wakanaga ũkĩhooraga." 
Proverbs13:10 Mwĩtĩĩo ũreehage o thĩĩna, ĩndĩ mwendi gũtaarwo egĩyagĩra na ũũgĩ." 
Proverbs13:11 Ũtonga wa gũũka na ihenya ũthiraga na ihenya, ĩndĩ ũtonga wa kuonwo na thithino nĩũtũũraga." 
Proverbs13:12 Ũndũ mwĩrĩgĩrĩre waga kũhinga nĩũragaga mũndũ ngoro, no ũndũ mwĩrĩgĩrĩre wahinga nĩũkenagia mũndũ." 
Proverbs13:13 Mũndũ ũthũire gũtaarwo nĩkwĩyũnũha eyũnũhaga, ĩndĩ mũndũ wathĩkagĩra maathani nĩatugagwo." 
Proverbs13:14 Kĩrĩra kĩa mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩ gĩthima kĩa muoyo; gĩteithagia mũndũ gũtheema ũgwati. 
Proverbs13:15 Ũũgĩ ũtũmaga mũndũ aheeo gĩtĩĩo, ĩndĩ mĩthiĩre ya mĩgarũka nĩ yo mwanangĩko wao." 
Proverbs13:16 Andũ arĩa abaarĩrĩri meekaga maũndũ maao na ũũgĩ, ĩndĩ kĩrimũ nĩkwanĩka kĩanĩkaga ũrimũ wakĩo." 
Proverbs13:17 Mũrekio mũũru aingagĩria andũ ũũruinĩ, na mũrekio mwĩhokeku areehage thaayũ." 
Proverbs13:18 Mũregi gũtaarwo atũũraga e mũthĩĩni na aconokeete, ĩndĩ mũndũ wenda kũrũngwo nĩatĩĩagwo." 
Proverbs13:19 Ũndũ mwĩrirĩrie wahinga wĩ gĩkeno ngoroinĩ, ĩndĩ irimũ nĩithũire gũtigana na ũrimũ wacio." 
Proverbs13:20 Mũceera na andũ arĩa oogĩ nĩohĩgaga, ĩndĩ mũceera na mũkũndũ akũndũkaga o taake." 
Proverbs13:21 Eehia ũũru nĩguo ũmathingataga, ĩndĩ arĩa athingu marĩhagwo na maũndũ meega." 
Proverbs13:22 Mũndũ mwega atigagĩra o nginya acũkũrũ aake magai, ĩndĩ ũtonga wa mũndũ mwĩhia ũigĩirwo andũ arĩa athingu." 
Proverbs13:23 Mũgũnda wa mũthĩĩni ũrĩa ũtarĩmagwo wahota kuumia irio nyingĩ, ĩndĩ ũmaathi ũcio wahota kwanangwo hatarĩ kĩhooto." 
Proverbs13:24 Mũndũ wa kũiga rũthanju thĩ ndeendeete mwana wake, ĩndĩ ũrĩa ũmwendeete nĩamũrũngaga." 
Proverbs13:25 Mũndũ mũthingu ndaagaga gĩa kũrĩa, ĩndĩ mũndũ mwaganu ndahũũnaga." 
Proverbs14:1 Mũtumia mũũgĩ nĩgwaka aakaga mũciĩ wake, ĩndĩ mũtumia kĩrimũ nĩgũtharia aũtharagia na mooko maake mwene." 
Proverbs14:2 Mũndũ wa mũtũũrĩre mwega nĩgũtĩĩa atĩĩaga MWATHANI, no wa mũtũũrĩre mũhĩtanu nĩkũmena amũmeneete." 
Proverbs14:3 Mĩario ya mũndũ kĩrimũ nĩ rũthanju rwa kũmũhũũra, no andũ arĩa oogĩ ciugo ciao nĩ cia kũmagitĩra." 
Proverbs14:4 Kũrĩa kwĩ ndeegwa cia kũrĩma magetha nĩ maingĩ, ĩndĩ kũrĩa gũtarĩ, noguo magetha manyiihĩĩte." 
Proverbs14:5 Mũira mwĩhokeku ndaheenanagia, ĩndĩ ũrĩa ũtarĩ mwĩhokeku, aaragia o maheeni." 
Proverbs14:6 Mũndũ wa kĩnyũrũri ndangĩũhĩga, ĩndĩ mũndũ mũigua oohĩgaga na ihenya." 
Proverbs14:7 Tiga gũikarania na kĩrimũ, amu gĩtingĩkũhe ũtaaro." 
Proverbs14:8 Ũũgĩ wa mũndũ mũbaarĩrĩri nĩkũmenya ũhoro wa mĩthiĩre yake, ĩndĩ ũkĩĩgu wa kĩrimũ nĩũkĩhĩtithagia." 
Proverbs14:9 Ngai nĩanyaraire andũ arĩa aaganu, ĩndĩ nĩakenagio nĩ andũ arĩa eega." 
Proverbs14:10 Ũrũrũ wa ngoro ũmenyekaga no mwene yo, o na gĩkeno kĩayo hatirĩ mũndũ ũngĩ ũngĩkĩmenya." 
Proverbs14:11 Nyũmba ya mũndũ mwaganu nĩkũniinwo ĩkaaniinwo, ĩndĩ hema ya mũndũ mũthingu ĩgaatũũra o ho." 
Proverbs14:12 Nĩkũrĩ njĩra mũndũ oonaga ta arĩ yo nũngarũ, ĩndĩ marigĩrĩrio maayo no gĩkuũinĩ." 
Proverbs14:13 Mĩtheko no ĩhithĩrĩre kĩeha, na gĩkeno no kĩrĩĩkĩrĩrie na kĩeha." 
Proverbs14:14 Mũndũ mũgarũ ndarĩ uumithio oonaga, mũndũ mwega oonaga uumithio wa wega wake." 
Proverbs14:15 Kĩrimũ gĩĩtĩkagia ũndũ o wothe, ĩndĩ mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩathimaga maũndũ." 
Proverbs14:16 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩgwĩcuuma ecuumaga agetheemaga ũũru, ĩndĩ mũndũ kĩrimũ nĩgwĩtwara etwaragĩrĩria ũũruinĩ ũcio." 
Proverbs14:17 Mũndũ wa kũraakara na ihenya eekaga maũndũ ma ũrimũ, ĩndĩ mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩkwĩnyiita enyiitaga." 
Proverbs14:18 Irimũ magai macio no ũrimũ, no arĩa abaarĩrĩri nĩ thũmbĩ ya ũũgĩ meekagĩrwo." 
Proverbs14:19 Andũ arĩa ooru mainamagĩrĩra arĩa eega, arĩa aaganu nao maikaraga ihingoinĩ cia arĩa athingu mekonoteete." 
Proverbs14:20 Mũthĩĩni athũirwo nĩ nginyagia mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake, ĩndĩ gĩtonga nĩkĩrĩ araata aingĩ." 
Proverbs14:21 Mũndũ ũmeneete ũrĩa ũngĩ ũcio nĩ mwĩhia, ĩndĩ gũkena-rĩ, nĩ ũrĩa ũiguagĩra mũthĩĩni tha." 
Proverbs14:22 Githĩ arĩa mathugundaga ũũru ti kũhĩtia mahĩtagia? Arĩa mathugundaga mawega, kĩrĩa moonaga nĩ ũtugi na maũndũ ma ma." 
Proverbs14:23 Kũruta wĩra na kĩyo kwĩ uumithio, ĩndĩ kanua monjore gatirĩ uumithio." 
Proverbs14:24 Andũ arĩa oogĩ ũtonga wao nĩguo thũmbĩ yao, ĩndĩ irimũ imenyekaga nĩ ũndũ wa ũrimũ wacio." 
Proverbs14:25 Mũira wa ma nĩahonokagia andũ, ĩndĩ ũrĩa ũrutaga ũira wa maheeni nĩ mũmakunyanĩri." 
Proverbs14:26 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtĩĩĩte MWATHANI nĩarĩ na mwĩhoko mũrũmu; na ciana ciake nĩirĩonaga ha kũũrĩra. 
Proverbs14:27 Gũtĩĩa MWATHANI nĩ gĩthima kĩa muoyo, nĩ gĩa gũtũma mũndũ atheemage mĩtego ya gĩkuũ." 
Proverbs14:28 Mũthamaki ũrĩa wathaga andũ aingĩ nĩekagĩrĩrwo, ĩndĩ ũrĩa wathaga o andũ anyiinyi oonekaga ta atarĩ kĩene." 
Proverbs14:29 Mũndũ mũũgĩ ndahiũhaga kũraakara, ĩndĩ ũrĩa ũraakaraga na ihenya, oonanagia ũrĩa akĩĩgĩĩte." 
Proverbs14:30 Thaayũ wa ngoro ũtũmaga mwĩrĩ ũgĩe na hinya, ĩndĩ ũiru nĩ ta woru wĩ mahĩndĩinĩ." 
Proverbs14:31 Mũhinyĩrĩria athĩĩni nĩkũnyarara anyararaga ũrĩa wamoombire, ĩndĩ ũrĩa ũmaiguagĩra tha nĩgũtĩĩa atĩĩaga Ngai." 
Proverbs14:32 Mũndũ mwaganu ang'aũranagio nĩ waganu wake, ĩndĩ ũrĩa mũthingu agitagĩrwo nĩ ũthingu wake." 
Proverbs14:33 Ũũgĩ ũtũũraga ngoroinĩ ya mũndũ ũrĩa wĩ na ũmenyo, ĩndĩ irimũ itingĩmenya ũhoro wa ũũgĩ." 
Proverbs14:34 Ũthingu nĩgũtũũgĩria ũtũũgĩragia rũũrĩrĩ, ĩndĩ wĩhia nĩgũconorithia ũconorithagia andũ oothe." 
Proverbs14:35 Ndungata ĩrĩa ĩtungataga maũndũ wega, nĩtũũgagĩrio nĩ mũthamaki, ĩndĩ ĩrĩa ĩĩkaga maũndũ ma gĩconoko nĩherithagio." 
Proverbs15:1 Icookia rĩega nĩrĩhooreragia maraakara, ĩndĩ rũcinũ rũtũmaga maraakara maakane." 
Proverbs15:2 Mũndũ mũũgĩ aaragia o maũndũ magũtũma ũũgĩ wĩrirĩrio, ĩndĩ irimũ ciaragia o ũrimũ." 
Proverbs15:3 Maitho ma MWATHANI moonaga kũndũ guothe, macũũthagĩrĩria andũ magĩĩka ũũru kana wega." 
Proverbs15:4 Ciugo cia tha ciĩkagĩra mũndũ hinya, ĩndĩ ciugo itarĩ tha nĩ cia kũũraga mũndũ ngoro." 
Proverbs15:5 Kĩrimũ gĩtirũmbũyanagia na ũrutani wa ithe, ĩndĩ mũndũ mũbaarĩrĩri nĩerũmbũyagia agĩkaanio." 
Proverbs15:6 Mũndũ mũthingu nĩeigagĩra ũtonga, ĩndĩ mũthiithũ wa mũndũ mwaganu nĩ thĩĩna mũtheri." 
Proverbs15:7 Mũndũ mũũgĩ atambagia ũmenyi, ĩndĩ kĩrimũ gĩtiũĩ gwĩka ũguo." 
Proverbs15:8 MWATHANI nĩakenagĩra mahooya ma andũ arĩa athingu, ĩndĩ magongoona ma andũ arĩa aaganu nĩamathũire." 
Proverbs15:9 MWATHANI nĩathũire mĩthiĩre ya arĩa aaganu, ĩndĩ arĩa meekaga maũndũ ma ũthingu acio nĩameenda." 
Proverbs15:10 Mũndũ wa mĩtugo mĩũru iherithia rĩake nĩ inene; mũndũ ũthũire gũkaanio marigĩrĩrio maake no gũkua. 
Proverbs15:11 Kwa arĩa akuũ o na icuainĩ MWATHANI nĩoĩ ũrĩa gũtariĩ, makĩria ma ũguo nĩoĩ meciiria ma andũ." 
Proverbs15:12 Mũndũ mwĩĩkĩrĩri ndeendaga kũrũngwo; ndeendaga gũthiĩ ndunduinĩ ya arĩa oogĩ. 
Proverbs15:13 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ akeneete, o na gĩthiithi nĩkĩonanagia, ĩndĩ e na kĩeha aikaraga arĩ mũritũhĩre ngoro." 
Proverbs15:14 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩendaga kuongerera ũũgĩ, ĩndĩ irimũ itũũragia o ũrimũ wacio." 
Proverbs15:15 Mũtũũrĩre wa arĩa anyamarĩku nĩ wa kwĩhinyanĩrĩria gũtheri, ĩndĩ arĩa akenu maikaraga ta marĩ ndĩainĩ." 
Proverbs15:16 Kaba ngorwo na indo itarĩ nyingĩ na ngorwo ndĩĩĩte MWATHANI, gũkĩra gũtonga na ngorwo na mĩtangĩko." 
Proverbs15:17 Kaba kũrĩa managu harĩ na ũiguano, gũkĩra gũthĩnjĩrwo ndeegwa noru harĩ na rũthũũro." 
Proverbs15:18 Mũndũ wa marũrũ atũmaga kũgĩe ngarari, ĩndĩ gũkirĩrĩria kũreehage thaayũ." 
Proverbs15:19 Mũtũũrĩre wa kĩgũũta ũiyũirwo nĩ thĩĩna, ĩndĩ mũtũũrĩre wa mũndũ mũthingu ũnyorokeete o wega." 
Proverbs15:20 Mwana mũũgĩ atũmaga ithe akene, ĩndĩ mwana kĩrimũ nĩkũnyarara anyararaga nyina." 
Proverbs15:21 Mũndũ mũkĩĩgu akenagio nĩ ũrimũ wake, ĩndĩ mũndũ mũũgĩ mĩthiĩre yake nĩ mĩkinyanĩru." 
Proverbs15:22 Kĩrĩra kĩega kĩreehage mĩbango mĩega, namo mataaro mooru mareehage mĩbango mĩũru." 
Proverbs15:23 Kaĩ nĩ ũndũ wĩ gĩkeno kũheana icookia rĩega ihinda rĩrĩa rĩagĩrĩire-i! 
Proverbs15:24 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũũgĩ atheemaga njĩra ya kwa arĩa akuũ, akagerera njĩra ya kũmũkinyia muoyoinĩ." 
Proverbs15:25 MWATHANI nĩgũtharia atharagia mũciĩ wa mũndũ mwĩtĩi, no nĩamenyagĩrĩra indo cia mũtumia wa ndigwa." 
Proverbs15:26 MWATHANI nĩathũire mathugunda mooru, ĩndĩ ndeto njega nĩacikenagĩra." 
Proverbs15:27 Mũhahamĩri wa indo ciene areehagĩra mũciĩ wake thĩĩna, ĩndĩ mũndũ ũthũire mahaki nĩwagũtũũria muoyo wake." 
Proverbs15:28 Mũndũ mũthingu nĩabaaragĩrĩra macookio maake wega, ĩndĩ macookio ma kĩrimũ makoragwo me mooru." 
Proverbs15:29 MWATHANI nĩaraihĩrĩirie mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu, ĩndĩ mahooya ma ũrĩa mũthingu nĩamaiguaga." 
Proverbs15:30 Gĩthiithi gĩcanjamũku nĩgĩkenagia ngoro, nacio ndeto njega nĩitũmaga mũndũ aigue wega." 
Proverbs15:31 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩathikagĩrĩria rĩrĩa ekũrũngwo, na nĩarĩtũũranagia na andũ arĩa oogĩ." 
Proverbs15:32 Mũndũ ũtenda gũtaarwo nĩemeneete, no ũrĩa wendeete kũrũngwo nĩagĩaga na ũmenyo." 
Proverbs15:33 Gũtĩĩa MWATHANI nĩgũtũmaga mũndũ agĩe na ũũgĩ, nakuo kwĩnyiihia gũtũmaga mũndũ atĩĩo." 
Proverbs16:1 Mũndũ abangaga mĩbango, no mũmĩhingia nĩ MWATHANI." 
Proverbs16:2 Mĩthiĩre ya mũndũ nĩ mĩkinyanĩru maithoinĩ maake, ĩndĩ MWATHANI no we ũmĩthimaga." 
Proverbs16:3 Wĩhokagĩre MWATHANI mĩbango yaku na nĩrĩgaacagĩra. 
Proverbs16:4 Hatirĩ kĩndũ o na kĩmwe MWATHANI oombire hatarĩ gĩtũmi gĩakĩo, o naake mũndũ mwĩhia oombirwo nĩ ũndũ wa mũthenya wa ithirĩro." 
Proverbs16:5 MWATHANI nĩathũire mũndũ mwĩtĩi, mũndũ ta ũcio ndangĩaga kũherithio." 
Proverbs16:6 Wĩhokeku na ũthingu nĩihorohagĩria meehia, na gũtĩĩa MWATHANI gũtũmaga mũndũ atheeme ũũru." 
Proverbs16:7 Mũndũ akenia MWATHANI, atũmaga thũ ciake ituĩke araata." 
Proverbs16:8 Kaba tũindo tũniini twĩ na kĩhooto, gũkĩra uumithio mũingĩ woneetwo na ungumania." 
Proverbs16:9 Mũndũ nĩ we ũthugundaga mĩthiĩre yake, ĩndĩ MWATHANI nĩ we ũmuonagĩrĩria njĩra." 
Proverbs16:10 Mũthamaki arĩ na ũhoti wa gũtuithania maũndũ, na matua maake makoragwo marĩ ma kĩhooto." 
Proverbs16:11 MWATHANI eendaga ithimi ciothe ituĩke cia ma, o na mathogora moothe matuĩke ma kĩhooto." 
Proverbs16:12 Harĩ athamaki kũmaramara nĩ ũndũ wĩ magigi, nĩ amu ũthamaki ũrũmagio nĩ waragania." 
Proverbs16:13 Mũthamaki akenaga nĩkũigua ũhoro wa ma, na nĩakenagio nĩ ũrĩa waragia ũhoro wa ma." 
Proverbs16:14 Marũrũ ma mũthamaki mareehage gĩkuũ, ĩndĩ mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩamahooragĩria." 
Proverbs16:15 Gũtiirĩrwo gĩthiithi nĩ mũthamaki kwĩ mwago, kwendwo nĩ we nĩ ta itu rĩa mbura ya hĩndĩ ya kĩmera." 
Proverbs16:16 Kũgĩa na ũũgĩ gũkĩrĩĩte kũgĩa na thahabu, nakuo kũgĩa na ũmenyo gũgakĩra kũgĩa na betha." 
Proverbs16:17 Barabara ya mũndũ mũthingu ĩmwĩthemagia ũũruinĩ; ũrĩa ũmenyagĩrĩra njĩra yake nĩagitagĩra muoyo wake. 
Proverbs16:18 Mwĩtĩĩo werekagĩria mũndũ mũthiroinĩ, naruo rũng'athio nĩkũrũnda rũmũrũndaga." 
Proverbs16:19 Kaba kwĩnyiihia ũikaranie na mũthĩĩni, kũrĩ kũgayana itaha rĩaku na andũ etĩĩi." 
Proverbs16:20 Ũrĩa ũthikagĩrĩria agĩtaarwo nĩagaacagĩra; nakuo kwĩhoka MWATHANI kũreehagĩre mũndũ gĩkeno. 
Proverbs16:21 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩamenyekaga nĩ ũndũ wa ũũgĩ wake, na mĩario mĩnyoroku yonganagĩrĩra ũmenyo." 
Proverbs16:22 Ũũgĩ nĩ gĩthima kĩa muoyo kũrĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mũũgĩ, ĩndĩ irimũ, ũrimũ nĩguo ihera rĩacio." 
Proverbs16:23 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩabaaragĩrĩra mĩario yake, mĩario yake yongagĩrĩra ũmenyo." 
Proverbs16:24 Ndeto njega nĩ ta ũũkĩ; igĩcamwo i mũrĩo, na harĩ mwĩrĩ nĩ ũgima." 
Proverbs16:25 Harĩ na njĩra mũndũ oonaga ta arĩ yo njega, ĩndĩ imwerekagĩria gĩkuũinĩ." 
Proverbs16:26 Kũnyootera wĩra gũtũmaga mũndũ aũrute na kĩyo, akaũruta o nginya akanyootoka." 
Proverbs16:27 Mũndũ mwaganu athugundaga o maũndũ ma ũũru, mĩario yake ĩhaana o ta rũrĩrĩmbĩ rwa mwaki." 
Proverbs16:28 Mũhuuhu ũtambagio nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu; naake mũndũ wa njuukũ aharaganagia ũraata wa andũ. 
Proverbs16:29 Mũndũ wa haaro aguucagĩrĩria mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake, akamũtoonyia ũgwatiinĩ." 
Proverbs16:30 Mũndũ ũhingahingaga maitho maake mĩtugo yake ti mĩega.Mũndũ ũtembaga mĩromo yake atũmaga maũndũ mooru mekĩke.
