Proverbs16:31 Mbuĩ nĩ thũmbĩ ya ũgemu, nĩ kĩheeo kĩa mũtũũrĩre wa ũthingu." 
Proverbs16:32 Mũndũ ũtumagĩria maraakara maake nĩ mwega gũkĩra njamba, na mũndũ ũũĩ kuoha rũrĩmĩ rwake nĩ mwega gũkĩra mũndũ ũtuunyanĩĩte itũũra." 
Proverbs16:33 Kura nĩgũikio ciikagio andũ mamenye wendi wa Ngai ĩndĩ Ngai nĩ we ũtuithanagia. 
Proverbs17:1 Kaba kũrĩa keenyũ gatheri ka mũgate kwĩ na thaayũ, gũkĩra thigũkũ mũciĩ wĩ na ngũĩ." 
Proverbs17:2 Ndungata ĩrĩa mbaarĩrĩri maũndũ wega, nĩgaatuĩka ya gwatha mũũriũ wa mwene yo ũrĩa ũreehage gĩconoko, na nĩkaagwata igai hamwe na ciana ciake." 
Proverbs17:3 Betha na thahabu iniinagwo ngaanga nĩ mwaki, ĩndĩ MWATHANI nĩ we ũroranagia ngoro." 
Proverbs17:4 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu athikagĩrĩria maũndũ ma waganu; na mũndũ wa maheeni athingataga o maũndũ ma maheeni. 
Proverbs17:5 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũnyũrũragia mũthĩĩni nĩ ũrĩa wa mũũmbire anyũrũragia; mũndũ ũkenaga andũ moona ũũru ndangĩaga kũherithio. 
Proverbs17:6 Andũ arĩa akũrũ metĩĩaga na ciana cia ciana ciao, o ta ũrĩa ciana nacio ciĩtĩĩaga na aciari acio." 
Proverbs17:7 Mĩario ya bata ndĩngiuma kanua ka mũndũ kĩrimũ na mũndũ wĩheete gĩtĩĩo ndangĩaria maheeni. 
Proverbs17:8 Andũ amwe meciiragia mahaki maringaga ciama, mũheani wamo eetĩkĩĩtie mahota gũthondeka maũndũ moothe." 
Proverbs17:9 Ũrĩa wohanagĩra nĩ wendani acaragia, no ũrĩa ũtindagĩrĩra mahĩtia nĩkũũraga ooragaga ũraata." 
Proverbs17:10 Mũndũ mũũgĩ angĩkaanio nĩaiguaga, mũndũ kĩrimũ o na angĩhũũrwo mĩcarica igana ndangĩigua." 
Proverbs17:11 Waganu ũtwaranaga na ũremi, thuuthainĩ mũndũ oonaga o ruwo." 
Proverbs17:12 Kaba gũtũngwo nĩ nduba ĩtuunyĩĩtwo ciana ciayo, gũkĩra gũkora kĩrimũ gĩkĩrĩa ũrimũ wakio." 
Proverbs17:13 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩhaga wega na ũũru, ũũru ũtũũranagia naake." 
Proverbs17:14 Kĩambĩrĩria kĩa ngarari nĩ ta rũũĩ rũkiuna, tigana na ngarari weherere mbaara." 
Proverbs17:15 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũhinyagĩrĩria mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu, na ũrĩa ũtũũgĩragia ũrĩa mwaganu, matikenagia MWATHANI o na haniini." 
Proverbs17:16 Mbeeca harĩ kĩrimũ cia tũhũ, tondũ gĩtingĩhota gũcihũthĩra na ũũgĩ." 
Proverbs17:17 Araata matũũraga meendaine, andũ maciaranagĩrwo nĩguo mateithanagie." 
Proverbs17:18 Kĩrimũ gĩtuĩkaga mũira wa mũndũ ũngĩ; gĩgagĩtuĩka gĩa kũmũrĩhĩra thiirĩ. 
Proverbs17:19 Mwendi wĩhia nĩ haaro egĩĩragĩra. Mwendi gũtonga nĩ thĩĩna mũtheri ecaragĩria. 
Proverbs17:20 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩciiragia na njĩra ĩtarĩ nũngĩrĩru, ndarĩ ũndũ mwega angĩona; ũrĩa waragia ũũru, etoonyagia thĩĩnainĩ." 
Proverbs17:21 Mwana kĩrimũ atũũragia mũciari wake na kĩeha, na mũciari wa mwana ũcio ndaikaraga e mũkenu." 
Proverbs17:22 Ngoro njanjamũku ĩtũmaga mũndũ aikare arĩ mũkenu, ihooru nĩkũhinyaria rĩhinyaragia mũndũ." 
Proverbs17:23 Andũ arĩa aaganu maamũkagĩra mahaki, namo maciira makaaga gũtuuo na kĩhooto." 
Proverbs17:24 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩamenyaga ũndũ ũrĩa wa bata, ĩndĩ kĩrimũ gĩtirĩ ũndũ ũngĩgĩteithia." 
Proverbs17:25 Mwana kĩrimũ atũũragia ithe na kĩeha, na akaiguithia nyina ruwo ngoro." 
Proverbs17:26 Nĩ ũndũ mũũru kũherithia mũndũ mũthingu, o na nĩ ũũru kũhũũra andũ a gĩtĩĩo na kĩboko." 
Proverbs17:27 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩathimaga mĩario yake, mũndũ wa ngoro hooreri ũcio nĩ mũtaũku." 
Proverbs17:28 Tondũ rĩĩrĩ, o na kĩrimũ kĩngĩĩkirĩra, no kĩonwo gĩ kĩũgĩ, na kĩngĩtumia no kĩonwo ta gĩ gĩtaũku." 
Proverbs18:1 Mũndũ ũtaiguanaga na andũ arĩa angĩ, nĩkwenda eendeete maũndũ maake, na nĩareganaga na matua ma arĩa angĩ." 
Proverbs18:2 Kĩrimũ gĩtimakagio nĩ ũkĩĩgu wakĩo, gĩkenagio no kwĩgaathĩrĩria." 
Proverbs18:3 Meehia mareehage gĩconoko, kwĩagĩra gĩtĩĩo kũreehage thoni." 
Proverbs18:4 Ciugo iria mũndũ aaragia no ituĩke kĩhumo kĩa ũũgĩ, o ta ndia ndiku na ta karũũĩ gegũtherera." 
Proverbs18:5 Ti wega kũgaathĩrĩria mũndũ mwaganu, kana kwogomia kĩhooto kĩa ũrĩa mũthingu." 
Proverbs18:6 Mĩario ya kĩrimũ ĩreehage haaro, na nĩkĩo kĩĩtagĩria rũthanju." 
Proverbs18:7 Mĩario ya kĩrimũ nĩ yo ĩkĩũnũhaga, nacio ciugo ciakĩo nĩcio igĩtoonyagia ũgwatiinĩ." 
Proverbs18:8 Mũhuuhu ũrĩ cama mũno, mũndũ aũigua ndũriganagĩra." 
Proverbs18:9 Mũndũ kĩgũũta wĩrainĩ wake ndarĩ ũtiganu na mũndũ mwanangi. 
Proverbs18:10 MWATHANI nĩ mũnaara ũrĩ na hinya, mũndũ mũthingu angĩĩhitha thĩinĩ, aikaraga ahooreire." 
Proverbs18:11 Gĩtonga kĩĩgeragĩria atĩ kĩgitĩirwo nĩ ũtonga wakĩo; o ta itũũra rĩirigĩirwo na rũthingo rwa mahiga. 
Proverbs18:12 Mũndũ mwĩtĩi nĩkwanangĩka anangĩkaga, ĩndĩ ũrĩa mwĩnyiihia nĩgũtĩĩo atĩĩagwo." 
Proverbs18:13 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũrimũ o na wĩ gĩconoko, mũndũ gũcookia ũhoro ataiguĩte." 
Proverbs18:14 Kwĩyũmĩrĩria mũndũ arĩ mũrũaru gwĩ kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩa kũhona, ĩndĩ mũndũ angĩaga kwĩyũmĩrĩria ndangĩhona." 
Proverbs18:15 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩegĩagĩra na ũmenyo, naake mũndũ mũtaũku nĩacaragia ũũgĩ." 
Proverbs18:16 Ũngĩenda kuona mũnene-rĩ, thiĩ ũkuuĩĩte kĩheeo gĩa kũmũhe na nĩũkũmuona." 
Proverbs18:17 Mwambĩrĩria ciira oonagwo ta arĩ we wĩ na ũhoro wa ma, o nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũrĩa araciira naake arĩambĩrĩria kũmũũria ciũria." 
Proverbs18:18 Kura ĩniinaga ngarari, nĩtuithanagia andũ eerĩ njamba." 
Proverbs18:19 Teithia mũndũ ũrĩa mũciaranĩirwo naake, na nĩarĩkũgitagĩra o ta rũthingo rwa itũũra rĩrĩ hinya; ĩndĩ mũngĩtetania naake o na gũgũteithia ndangĩgũteithia." 
Proverbs18:20 Maũndũ marĩa mũndũ aaragia nĩ mo hũũni yake, maũndũ macio nĩ mo atũũranagia namo." 
Proverbs18:21 Mĩario ĩrĩa mũndũ aaragia nĩ yo ĩreehage muoyo kana gĩkuũ kwoguo maciaro maayo no mũhaka mũndũ amaamũkĩre. 
Proverbs18:22 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũgĩĩte na mũtumia nĩagĩĩte na kĩndũ kĩega, na nĩgũtugwo atugĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI." 
Proverbs18:23 Mũthĩĩni nĩgũthaithana athaithanaga, ĩndĩ gĩtonga nĩkũgoromoka kĩgoromokaga." 
Proverbs18:24 Araata amwe matingĩĩhokwo, no nĩkũrĩ araata mangĩtuĩka ehokeku o na gũkĩra aariũ a nyina na mũndũ." 
Proverbs19:1 Kaba mũthĩĩni ũthiaga na mĩthiĩre mĩrũngĩrĩru, gũkĩra kĩrimũ kĩiyũirwo nĩ maheeni." 
Proverbs19:2 Tiga wega mũndũ kwaga ũmenyo, kũhĩka gũtũmaga mũndũ ahĩtie." 
Proverbs19:3 Mũndũ mũkĩĩgu nĩ we wĩthũũkagĩria na mĩthiĩre yake, nayo ngoro yake ĩkanugunĩra MWATHANI." 
Proverbs19:4 Gĩtonga kĩrĩ araata aingĩ, ĩndĩ mũthĩĩni nĩkũũrĩrwo ooragĩrwo nĩ o." 
Proverbs19:5 Mũira wa maheeni no mũhaka aherithio, mũndũ wa maheeni ndangĩĩteithũra." 
Proverbs19:6 Andũ aingĩ nĩmeendagĩrĩria harĩ andũ arĩa marĩ igweta; andũ arĩa aheani marĩ araata aingĩ. 
Proverbs19:7 Mũthĩĩni ndarĩ kĩene harĩ aariũ a ithe; ningĩ o na angĩgeria na kĩyo atĩa ndangĩgĩĩra na araata, o na angĩmeringĩrĩria matingĩmwĩtĩkĩra." 
Proverbs19:8 Mũndũ mwendi ũũgĩ nĩ we mwene wĩĩkaga wega, ningĩ ũrĩa wĩ na ũmenyo nĩagaacagĩra." 
Proverbs19:9 Mũira wa maheeni no mũhaka aherithio, mũndũ waragia maheeni nĩakaaniinwo." 
Proverbs19:10 Mũtũũrĩre mwega gwĩ kĩrimũ nĩ wa tũhũ, ningĩ gũtiagĩrĩire ndungata ĩtuĩke ya gwathaga anene." 
Proverbs19:11 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩatumagĩria maraakara na ihenya, gĩkeno gĩake nĩkũrekanĩra." 
Proverbs19:12 Maraakara ma mũthamaki nĩ ta mũraramo wa mũrũũthi, ĩndĩ angĩkwenda no ta mbura ya maguna ng'ombe." 
Proverbs19:13 Mwana kĩrimũ areehagĩre ithe ũgwati, na mũtumia mũnegeni no ta maaĩ magĩtaata, ta - ta - ta." 
Proverbs19:14 Mũndũ ahota kũgaya ũtonga mũingĩ kuuma kũrĩ aciari, ĩndĩ mũtumia mũgerekereri nĩkĩheeo kuuma kwĩ MWATHANI." 
Proverbs19:15 Ũthayo ũtũmaga mũndũ akome toro mũnene, mũndũ kĩgũũta arĩikaraga na ng'aragu." 
Proverbs19:16 Kũmenyerera maathani nĩkuo kũmenyerera ũtũũro; Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũthũire gũtaarwo egĩĩragĩra gĩkuũ. 
Proverbs19:17 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtugaga mũthĩĩni nĩ ta kũhithia ahithagia indo ciake he MWATHANI, wega ũcio wake MWATHANI nĩaũrĩhaga." 
Proverbs19:18 Menyeria ciana ciaku mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa mĩega o hĩndĩ ĩrĩa irĩ nyiinyi cia kwĩruta maũndũ; ĩndĩ wacirekereria nĩ gũthũũka igũthũũka. 
Proverbs19:19 Mũndũ wa marũrũ maingĩ no mũhaka aherithio, tondũ o na wamũteithia, no mũhaka ũgeeka o ũguo hĩndĩ ĩngĩ." 
Proverbs19:20 Thikagĩrĩria kĩrĩra o na ũtaaro, na nĩũkũũhĩga." 
Proverbs19:21 Andũ mebangagĩra maũndũ maingĩ, ĩndĩ kwenda kwa MWATHANI nĩkuo kũhingaga." 
Proverbs19:22 Mũndũ mũkoroku e gĩconoko, naake mũthĩĩni nĩ mwega gũkĩra mũheenania." 
Proverbs19:23 Gũtĩĩa MWATHANI kuongagĩrĩra mũndũ matukũ, mũndũ agagĩikara egangarĩĩte na ndarĩ ũũru ũmũkoragĩrĩra." 
Proverbs19:24 Kĩgũũta kĩrikagia guoko irioinĩ, no gĩkaremwo nĩkwĩyoera irio kĩrĩe." 
Proverbs19:25 Herithia mũndũ ũrĩ rũng'athio, nĩguo arĩa matarĩ oogĩ merute naake, rũnga mũndũ mũũgĩ na nĩekũũhĩga makĩria." 
Proverbs19:26 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũnyariiraga ithe, na akaingata nyina oime mũciĩ wake, ereehagĩra gĩconoko o na thoni." 
Proverbs19:27 Mwana wakwa, ũngĩtiga kwĩruta, o na ũũgĩ ũrĩa wĩ naguo nĩũkũriganĩra." 
Proverbs19:28 Mũira ũtarĩ kĩhaarĩro nĩanyararaga itua rĩa kĩhooto; naguo waganu wĩ mũrĩo kũrĩ arĩa aaganu. 
Proverbs19:29 Andũ a rũng'athio no mũhaka maherithio, nacio irimũ ihũũrwo na thanju." 
Proverbs20:1 Ndibei na njoohi-rĩ, nĩ cia irumi na inegene, naguo ũrĩĩu nĩ ũndũ wa ũrimũ." 
Proverbs20:2 Maraakara ma mũthamaki no ta mũraramo wa mũrũũthi, kũmũraakaria nĩkwĩũnũha." 
Proverbs20:3 Gwĩtheema ngũĩ kũreehagĩre mũndũ gĩtĩĩo; ĩndĩ kĩrimũ kĩendeete o haaro. 
Proverbs20:4 Kĩgũũta kĩregaga gũciimba mũgũnda wakĩo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yagĩrĩire, nakĩo gĩtirĩ kĩndũ kĩgethaga hĩndĩ ya magetha." 
Proverbs20:5 Meciiria ma mũndũ mahaana ta maaĩ me gĩthima kĩriku, ĩndĩ mũndũ mũũgĩ no ahote kũmataha." 
Proverbs20:6 Andũ aingĩ nĩmeendaga kwĩgaathĩrĩria ũrĩa marĩ ehokeku, ĩndĩ andũ ehokeku no mooneke?" 
Proverbs20:7 Ciana iria irĩ na ithe mwĩhokeku na wĩkaga ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire nĩikenaga. 
Proverbs20:8 Mũthamaki angĩikarĩra gĩtĩ atuithanie ciira, nĩabaaraga maũndũ na njĩra njega." 
Proverbs20:9 Nũũ ũngĩhota kuuga atĩ ngoro yake nĩ theru na ndĩrĩ na meehia? 
Proverbs20:10 Ithimi cia maheeni nĩ indo irĩ magigi maithoinĩ ma MWATHANI. 
Proverbs20:11 Mwana amenyekaga ũrĩa ahaana na ciĩko ciake, agakĩmenyeka kana nĩ mwĩhokeku o na kana nĩ mwega." 
Proverbs20:12 MWATHANI nĩ we wombire matũ ma kũiguaga namo o na maitho ma kuonaga namo. 
Proverbs20:13 Kwenda toro mũno kũreehagĩre mũndũ ũthĩĩni, ĩndĩ wagĩa kĩyo nĩũrĩonaga gĩa kũrĩa." 
Proverbs20:14 Mũgũri agũraga akĩnegenaga ĩndĩ agacooka gwĩtĩĩa na kĩrĩa agũra. 
Proverbs20:15 Mĩario mĩega na mĩbaarĩrĩre ĩkĩrĩĩte thahabu kana tũhiga twa goro. 
Proverbs20:16 Mũndũ angĩtuĩka mũira wa kũrĩhĩra mũndũ ũngĩ thiirĩ nĩ indo ciake we mwene atoonyagia ũgwatiinĩ. 
Proverbs20:17 Irio mũndũ eyoneire na maheeni aiguaga i mũrĩo, ĩndĩ thuuthainĩ no ũrũrũ mũtheri aiguaga." 
Proverbs20:18 Ũtaaro mwega ũteithagia mũndũ mĩbangoinĩ yake, na kuo gũthiĩ mbaarainĩ kwendaga mĩbango." 
Proverbs20:19 Mũndũ wa mũhuuhu ndarĩ hitho; wĩthemage mũndũ wa mĩnua ĩĩrĩ. 
Proverbs20:20 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũrumaga aciari aake, akuaga na ihenya o ta taawa ũhoreirio ndumainĩ o rĩmwe." 
Proverbs20:21 Igai mũndũ eetĩĩtie na hinya, rĩtirĩ kĩraathimo mũicoinĩ." 
Proverbs20:22 Ndũkaanarĩhie ũũru na ũũru, wĩhoke MWATHANI na nĩegũkũhonokia." 
Proverbs20:23 MWATHANI nĩathũire ithimi cia maheeni o nacio ratiri cia maheeni ndacikenagĩra. 
Proverbs20:24 MWATHANI nĩ we ũtuonagĩrĩria ha kũgera; nũũ ũngĩkĩhota kũmenya na kũrĩa mũtũũrĩre wake ũroreete? 
Proverbs20:25 Nĩ ũndũ mũũru mũndũ kwĩrĩra Ngai kĩheeo na mwĩhĩtwa ataambĩĩte gwĩciiria wega, na thuutha wa gwĩka ũguo mũndũ acooke ericũkwo." 
Proverbs20:26 Mũthamaki mũũgĩ nĩgũthuuthuuria athuuthuuragia andũ arĩa aaganu, akamaherithia atekũmacaaĩra." 
Proverbs20:27 Meciiria maitũ nĩ taawa tũheetwo nĩ MWATHANI, nĩ mo mathuuthuuragia ngoro ciitũ." 
Proverbs20:28 Mũthamaki atũũragio nĩ wĩhokeku na ũhoro wa ma; gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũnene gĩtiragĩrĩrwo nĩ ũthingu. 
Proverbs20:29 Hinya wa andũ eethĩ nĩguo riiri wao, naguo riiri wa athuuri nĩ mbuĩ ciao." 
Proverbs20:30 Kũhũũra mũndũ nginya akaigua ruwo gũtũmaga atigane na waganu wake; iboko itũmaga mũndũ ecookere mũno. 
Proverbs21:1 MWATHANI nĩ we wathaga ngoro ya mũthamaki, amĩerekagĩria o harĩa ekwenda o ta ũrĩa eerekagĩria mũkaro wa maaĩ." 
Proverbs21:2 Mũndũ oonaga maũndũ moothe marĩa eekaga me meega, ĩndĩ MWATHANI nĩ we ũtuĩragia ngoro yake." 
Proverbs21:3 Gwĩka maũndũ ma ũgima na ma kĩhooto nĩgũkenagia MWATHANI, gũkĩra kũmũrutĩra magongoona." 
Proverbs21:4 Andũ arĩa aaganu matongoragio nĩ mwĩgaatho na mwĩĩkĩrĩro, na ũguo nĩ wĩhia." 
Proverbs21:5 Mĩbango ya mũndũ wĩ kĩyo ĩtũmaga mũndũ agĩe indo; ĩndĩ mĩbango ĩtarĩ mĩbaarĩrĩre ĩreehagĩre mũndũ ũthĩĩni. 
Proverbs21:6 Ũtonga mũndũ egĩĩrĩire naguo na njĩra ya wara ũthiraga o narua, ningĩ no ta gĩkuũ eegĩĩrĩrĩire." 
Proverbs21:7 Andũ arĩa aaganu maniinagwo no waganu, tondũ nĩmaregaga kũrũmĩrĩra waragania." 
Proverbs21:8 Mĩthiĩre ya mũndũ ũrĩa mwĩhia nĩ mĩgonyoku, ĩndĩ mĩthiĩre ya ũrĩa mũthingu nĩ mĩrũngarũ." 
Proverbs21:9 Nĩ kaba gũtũũra itara, gũkĩra gũtũũrania nyũmba ĩmwe na mũtumia wa ngarari." 
Proverbs21:10 Ngoro ya mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu ĩciiragia o maũndũ ma waganu, ndarĩ tha na mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ." 
Proverbs21:11 Mũndũ wa rũng'athio angĩherithio, ũrĩa mũkĩĩgu nĩekunyaga gũtũ; ũrĩa mũũgĩ angĩtaarwo, nĩohĩgaga makĩria." 
Proverbs21:12 Ngai, o we ũrĩa mũthingu, nĩoĩ maũndũ marĩa meekĩkaga nyũmbainĩ cia andũ arĩa aaganu; arutũrũraga acio aaganu akamaniina." 
Proverbs21:13 Ũngĩrega gũthikĩrĩria mũthĩĩni agĩkaya, o nawe rĩrĩa ũrĩkaya ndũrĩthikĩrĩrio." 
Proverbs21:14 Ũngĩraakaria mũndũ mũhe kĩheeo na hitho na nĩekũhoorera. 
Proverbs21:15 Ituĩro rĩa kĩhooto nĩ gĩkeno harĩ arĩa athingu, no harĩ andũ arĩa aaganu nĩ gĩconoko." 
Proverbs21:16 Mũndũ ũtarũmagĩrĩra mĩthiĩre ya ũũgĩ, marigĩrĩrio maake no gĩkuũ." 
Proverbs21:17 Mwendi o maũndũ ma gwĩkenia atuĩkaga o mũthĩĩni, ũrĩa wendeete ndibei na maguta ndatongaga." 
Proverbs21:18 Andũ arĩa aaganu megĩĩragĩra mathĩĩna magĩciiragia maragĩrĩra andũ arĩa athingu. 
Proverbs21:19 Nĩ kaba gũtũũra werũinĩ, gũkĩra gũtũũra na mũtumia wa ngarari na wa nugunugu." 
Proverbs21:20 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩeigagĩra nyũmbainĩ yake mũthiithũ, ĩndĩ kĩrimũ nĩkũwananga kĩanangaga indo ciakĩo." 
Proverbs21:21 Rũmia ũtugi na ũthingu na nĩũgũtũũra muoyo matukũ maingĩ; na ndũkaaga kũheeo gĩtĩĩo na gwĩkwo wega. 
Proverbs21:22 Mũndũ mũũgĩ ahota kwĩnyiitĩra itũũra rĩrangĩirwo nĩ andũ njamba, na acooke amomore thingo iria mehokeete." 
Proverbs21:23 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũmenyagĩrĩra mĩario yake, nĩ haaro egiragĩrĩria." 
Proverbs21:24 Mũndũ mwĩtĩi na wa rũng'athio eetagwo mũndũ wa kĩnyũrũri; maũndũ maake nĩ ma mwĩtĩĩo na ndamakaga. 
Proverbs21:25 Kĩgũũta gĩtenda kũruta wĩra na mooko maakĩo, nĩkĩo kĩene gĩeteetaga gĩkuũ." 
Proverbs21:26 Mũndũ mũgũũta atindaga acumĩkĩire indo ciene mũthenya wothe, ĩndĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu atuganaga akeneete." 
Proverbs21:27 MWATHANI ndakenagio nĩ igongoona rĩa mũndũ mwaganu, na makĩria rĩrĩa ekũruta e na ũhinga ngoro." 
Proverbs21:28 Ũira wa mũndũ wa maheeni ndwĩtĩkagio, no ciugo cia mũndũ ũcũũranagia maũndũ wega icio nĩciĩtĩkagio." 
Proverbs21:29 Mũndũ mwaganu nĩkwĩhithania ehithanagia, ĩndĩ mũndũ mũthingu nĩeonanagia na mĩthiĩre yake." 
Proverbs21:30 Ũũgĩ wa mũndũ, ũmenyo, kana kĩrĩra o na kĩrĩkũ itingĩmũteithia angĩkorwo MWATHANI ndakeneetio nĩ we." 
Proverbs21:31 Mbarathi nĩciikaraga ciĩhaarĩirie kũrũa, ĩndĩ ũhootani uumaga kwĩ MWATHANI." 
Proverbs22:1 Kaba kũgĩa rĩĩtwa rĩega gũkĩra gũtonga, nakĩo gĩtĩĩo nĩ kĩega gũkĩra betha na thahabu." 
Proverbs22:2 Andũ arĩa itonga na athĩĩni maigananĩĩtio ũndũ ũmwe; MWATHANI nĩ we wamoombire oothe. 
Proverbs22:3 Mũndũ mũũgĩ oonaga ũgwati akaweherera, ĩndĩ kĩrimũ nĩgũtũnga kĩũtũngaga gĩkaniinwo." 
Proverbs22:4 Gwathĩkĩra MWATHANI na kwĩnyiihia, gũtũmaga mũndũ atonge, atĩĩo na atũũre matukũ maingĩ." 
Proverbs22:5 Angĩkorwo wee mwene nĩ wenda muoyo waku, eherera mĩtego ĩrĩa ĩgwatagia andũ arĩa aaganu." 
Proverbs22:6 Onia mwana mũtũũrĩre ũrĩa mwega, na ndarĩ hingo akaariganĩrwo nĩguo matukũinĩ maake moothe." 
Proverbs22:7 Athĩĩni matũũraga me ngombo cia itonga, na ũrĩa ũkombaga atũũraga e ngombo ya mũmũkomberi." 
Proverbs22:8 Ũrĩa wogomagia ciira nĩ haaro egĩĩragĩra, nĩ rũthanju rwa kwĩhũũra etuagĩra." 
Proverbs22:9 Mũndũ ũheaga athĩĩni gĩa kũrĩa nĩaraathimagwo. 
Proverbs22:10 Ingata mũndũ wa rũng'athio, na ngarari, ngũĩ na irumi nĩigũthira." 
Proverbs22:11 Mũndũ ũrĩ ngoro theru na waragia wega, mũthamaki no amũtue mũraatawe." 
Proverbs22:12 Maitho ma MWATHANI macũũthagĩrĩria arĩa oogĩ, arĩa maaragia maheeni nĩareganaga nao." 
Proverbs22:13 Kĩgũũta gĩikaraga o ro mũciĩ, tondũ kĩĩgwatagia nĩgĩkũrĩĩo nĩ mũrũũthi kĩoimagara." 
Proverbs22:14 Mĩario ya mũndũ wa nja mwaganu nĩ ta irima iriku, rĩgũaga mũndũ ũraakarĩirwo nĩ MWATHANI." 
Proverbs22:15 Ciana nĩciendeete mũno gwĩka maũndũ ma ũrimũ, ĩndĩ rũthanju nĩrũtũmaga ciĩrute mĩtugo mĩega." 
Proverbs22:16 Ũrĩa ũhinyagĩrĩria athĩĩni nĩguo atonge, kana agatwaragĩra itonga iheeo atuĩkaga mũthĩĩni." 
Proverbs22:17 Thikĩrĩria ũigue ciugo iria cianario nĩ andũ arĩa oogĩ; ngoro yaku ta nĩrũmie ũrutani wakwa. 
Proverbs22:18 Nĩ wega gũtũũra ũciririkanaga, na ningĩ ũgacigwetaga hingo ciothe ũkĩaria." 
Proverbs22:19 Ndĩrakũmenyithia ciugo icio mũthenya ũyũ wa ũũmũũthĩ; nĩguo ũtũũre wĩhokeete MWATHANI. 
Proverbs22:20 Ngũkwandĩkĩra thimo mĩrongo ĩtatũ ikoniĩ ũtaaro o na ũmenyo. 
Proverbs22:21 Nĩirĩkũmenyithagia ũrĩa ũhoro wa ma ũtariĩ, ningĩ watũmwo ũkamenya ũrĩa ũrĩcookagĩria agũtũmi ũhoro wa ma." 
Proverbs22:22 Menya ũkaahinyĩrĩria mũthĩĩni tondũ wĩ na ũhoti wa gwĩka ũguo, kana ũhinyĩrĩrie mũndũ ũtarĩ na hinya mwĩ ciirainĩ naake." 
Proverbs22:23 Nĩ amu MWATHANI nĩ we ũgatuĩka wa kũmaarĩrĩria, na amarĩhĩrie harĩ arĩa maramahinyĩrĩria." 
Proverbs22:24 Ndũkaanatume ndũgũ na mũndũ ũhiũhaga kũraakara, kana ũthiĩ rũgendo na mũndũ wa mang'ũrĩ," 
Proverbs22:25 nĩ geetha ndũkaae kũnyiita mĩtugo yake, mũtũũrĩre waku ũgĩthũũkane." 
Proverbs22:26 Ndũkaanatuĩke wa kũrũũgamĩrĩra mũndũ agĩkomba thiirĩ. 
Proverbs22:27 Ũngĩgaakĩaga gĩa kũrĩha nakĩo, ũgaatuunywo o na ũrĩrĩ ũrĩa ũkomagĩra." 
Proverbs22:28 Menya gũkaanakũũra mũtĩ wa tene wa mũhaka ũrĩa maathooguo maahandire. 
Proverbs22:29 Mũruti wa wĩra wĩ kĩyo-rĩ, ũcio no atuĩke wa gũtwaranaga na mũthamaki, ti wa gũtwaranaga na tũmũndũ o ũguo tũtarĩ kĩene." 
Proverbs23:1 Waikara thĩ kũrĩa irio na mũthamaki-rĩ, baarĩrĩra wega ũmenye ũcio nũũ mwĩ naake." 
Proverbs23:2 Nĩ kaba kũnyiihia mũhaaha, angĩkorwo wĩ mũndũ wa mũhaaha." 
Proverbs23:3 Ndũkaanakorokere irio icio irĩ na cama; no gũkorwo hiihi nĩ cia gũkũheenereria. 
Proverbs23:4 Tuĩka mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩguo ndũkaaneanange ũgĩetha ũtonga. 
Proverbs23:5 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ, ũtonga ũcio waku wahota gũthira o narua, o ta ũmereetie mathagu ũkoombũka ta rwĩgĩ." 
Proverbs23:6 Tiga kũrĩa irio cia mũndũ mũkarĩ; o na kana ũkorokere irio icio irĩ na cama. 
Proverbs23:7 Ahota gũkwĩra, “Ũka ũrĩe na ũnyue” ĩndĩ ũguo ti guo atuĩte agwĩke.Ũguo areciiria noguo we mwene atariĩ." 
Proverbs23:8 Nĩũgũtahĩka kĩrĩa ũkũrĩĩte, nayo mĩario yaku mĩega ĩtuĩke ya tũhũ." 
Proverbs23:9 Ndũkaanaarie ũhoro wa bata na kĩrimũ nĩ ũndũ no kĩũnyarare. 
Proverbs23:10 Menya gũkaanakũũra mũtĩ wa tene wa mũhaka kana ũtuunye andũ a ndigwa mĩgũnda yao. 
Proverbs23:11 Nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI nĩ we mũmarĩhĩria, na nĩ we mũmaarĩrĩria." 
Proverbs23:12 Thikagĩrĩria mũrutani waku na wĩrute maũndũ moothe marĩa ũngĩhota. 
Proverbs23:13 Ndũkaanage kũherithia mwana, amu o na wamũhũũra na rũthanju ndangĩkua." 
Proverbs23:14 Wamũhũũra na rũthanju nĩwahonokia muoyo wake ndũgaathiĩ kwa arĩa akuũ. 
Proverbs23:15 Mwana wakwa, ũngĩũhĩga-rĩ, o na niĩ ngoro yakwa no ĩkene." 
Proverbs23:16 Ngoro yakwa nĩrĩcanjamũkaga, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũkwaria maũndũ ma ũũgĩ." 
Proverbs23:17 Ndũkaanaiguĩre andũ arĩa eehia ũiru; tũũra ũrũmĩĩtie ũhoro wa gũtĩĩa MWATHANI. 
Proverbs23:18 Nĩ amu weka ũguo, kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩaku gĩa thuutha gĩgatũũra gĩ kĩega." 
Proverbs23:19 Mwana wakwa, tathikĩrĩria nĩguo ũkĩũhĩge; menyagĩrĩra mũno mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa ũthiaga nayo." 
Proverbs23:20 Ndũkaanathiĩ thiritũ na andũ arĩa meendaga kũnyua ndibei mũno, o na kana andũ arĩa makorokagĩra nyama." 
Proverbs23:21 Amu mũrĩĩu na mũkoroku acio megũtũũra marĩ athĩĩni; ũgũũta-rĩ, ũtũmaga mũndũ ehumbe matangari." 
Proverbs23:22 Thikagĩrĩria thooguo ũrĩa wagũciarire, na ũmenye gũkaananyarara maitũguo, o na akorwo nĩ mũkũrũ." 
Proverbs23:23 Wĩgũrĩre ũhoro wa ma, ũũgĩ, ũtaaro na ũtaũku; menya ũgaacooka gũciendia." 
Proverbs23:24 Ithe wa mũndũ mũthingu aikaraga e mũcanjamũku, mũciari wa mwana mũũgĩ no gũkena ekenagĩra." 
Proverbs23:25 Tũmaga aciari aaku makenage nĩ ũndũ waku, ĩĩni, gĩcanjamũrage maitũguo ngoro." 
Proverbs23:26 Mwana wakwa, thikagĩrĩria mataaro maakwa na ningĩ wĩrutage na mũtũũrĩre wakwa." 
Proverbs23:27 Mũmaraaya nĩ irima iriku, mũndũ wa nja mũhuhungĩki naake nĩ mũtego mũũru." 
Proverbs23:28 Nĩgũtega ategaga andũ o ta mĩkora, ningĩ agatũma arũme aingĩ maage kwĩhokeka kũrĩ atumia aao." 
Proverbs23:29 (29-30) Rĩu-rĩ, tanyonia mũrĩĩu, ũrĩa ũngĩenda kwĩongerera ũrĩĩu, niĩ na niĩ nĩngũkuonia mũndũ wĩ na kĩeha o na wĩthikĩire, mũndũ wa haaro hĩndĩ ciothe, na ũikaraga akĩnugunaga.Maitho maake matuunĩhĩĩte ta mwaki, na e na nguraro cia kwĩgĩrĩrĩra." 
Proverbs23:30 Atĩrĩ, ndũkaanamererie ndibei mata, o na angĩkorwo ĩmatĩĩte atĩa, o na angĩkorwo ĩgĩita mũhũũyũ ĩrĩ gĩkombeinĩ, o na yatuĩka nĩnyororokaga wega ĩkĩmerũka." 
Proverbs23:31 Mũthiainĩ ĩtũmaga ũigue ta ũrũmĩĩtwo nĩ nyoka kana ta ũtuĩrĩirwo mata nĩ gĩĩko. 
Proverbs23:32 Maitho maaku makoonaga maũndũ mageni, na ndũngĩhota gwĩciiria kana kwaria ũrũngĩrĩirie wega." 
Proverbs23:33 Ĩĩni, ũgakĩiguaga ta mũndũ ũrathambĩra eekĩĩte kĩĩhindiĩ kana ta mũndũ ũkomeete macuainĩ ĩracũũgacũũgio nĩ iria." 
Proverbs23:34 Ũgagĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “No mũhaka ngorwo ndĩmũgũthe, o na kũhũũrwo ndĩmũhũũre, no ndĩraririkana.Nĩ kĩĩ kĩragiria njũkĩre? Nĩmbatarĩĩtio nĩgũthiĩ kũnyua rĩngĩ.”" 
Proverbs24:1 Ndũkaanaiguĩre andũ arĩa ooru ũiru, kana ũtume ũraata nao." 
Proverbs24:2 Amu o meciiragia ũhoro wa haaro, maaragia o ndeto cia kũiguithia mũndũ ũũru." 
Proverbs24:3 Mĩciĩ yakagwo na njĩra ya ũũgĩ, ũmenyo nĩguo ũtũmaga ĩtũũre ĩhandĩĩte." 
Proverbs24:4 Ũũgĩ ũtũmaga nyũmba ciyũrio indo cia bata, indo ciothe iria njega cigakĩiyũrio kuo." 
Proverbs24:5 Ũũgĩ wĩ mbere ya hinya, nakuo kũgĩa na ũũgĩ kwĩ bata gũkĩra kũgĩa na hinya." 
Proverbs24:6 Thuuthuuria maũndũ maaku wega ũtarĩ ũrathiĩ mbaarainĩ, ũtaaro mwega wahota gũtũma ũhootane." 
Proverbs24:7 Maũndũ ma ũũgĩ nĩ hinya mũno kĩrimũ gĩkĩmamenya, gĩtitumũraga kanua rĩrĩa maũndũ ma bata mekwario." 
Proverbs24:8 Mũndũ ũthugundaga gwĩka ũũru, arĩĩtagwo mũndũ wa haaro." 
Proverbs24:9 Irimũ ithugundaga o maũndũ ma meehia, na andũ nĩmathũire mũndũ wa kĩnyũrũri." 
Proverbs24:10 Angĩkorwo ndũngĩtiirĩrĩria hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna gũtirĩ nganja wĩ mũhũthũ. 
Proverbs24:11 Tuĩka wa gũteithũra arĩa maratwarwo gĩkuũinĩ; arĩa marathiĩ kũũragwo hatarĩ gĩtũmi tuĩka wa kũmahonokia. 
Proverbs24:12 Wahota kuuga atĩ ũcio ti ũhoro waku, ĩndĩ Ngai nĩoĩ, na nĩ we ũthuuthuuragia meciiria maaku.Aikaraga agitĩire muoyo waku, na nĩoĩ ũguo, naake akaahe mũndũ mũcaara kũringana na ũrĩa eekaga." 
Proverbs24:13 Mwana wakwa, rĩaga ũũkĩ, amu nĩũrĩ cama. O ta ũrĩa mũruru wa maguainĩ wĩ mũrĩo wĩ rũrĩmĩinĩ rwaku," 
Proverbs24:14 kĩmenye na ma atĩ ũguo noguo ũũgĩ ũtariĩ harĩ ngoro yaku. Wĩnyiitĩre ũũgĩ na mũtũũrĩre waku wa thuutha nĩ ũkaagacĩra. 
Proverbs24:15 Ndũgaatuĩke mũndũ mwaganu wa kuohagĩria andũ arĩa athingu kana ũtuĩke wa gũtharĩkĩra mĩciĩ yao. 
Proverbs24:16 Nĩ amu mũndũ mũthingu o na angĩgũa maita mũgwanja, agũaga o agĩũkagĩra; ĩndĩ ũrĩa mwaganu agũithagio na mũnduru nĩ waganu wake na ndookagĩra." 
Proverbs24:17 Ndũkaanakene rĩrĩa thũ yaku yona thĩĩna, ningĩ ndũkaanacanjamũke ngoro rĩrĩa yarũndwo." 
Proverbs24:18 Nĩ ũndũ MWATHANI ndakenagio nĩ ũndũ ta ũcio; amu ahota kwĩricũkwo eeherie maraakara maake harĩ thũ ĩyo. 
Proverbs24:19 Tiga gwakanagwo nĩ ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa andũ arĩa ooru, na ndũkaanaigue ũũru nĩ ũndũ wa acio aaganu." 
Proverbs24:20 Nĩ gũkorwo mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru ndarĩ ũndũ mwega eetereire thuuthainĩ, na nĩkũniinwo aniinagwo." 
Proverbs24:21 Mwana wakwa, tĩĩaga MWATHANI, o na mũthamaki wa gũũkũ thĩ; ndũkaananyiitanĩre na andũ arĩa meendaga kũmakararia." 
Proverbs24:22 Amu-rĩ, andũ ta acio maniinagwo o narua, ningĩ-rĩ, nũũ ũngĩhota kũmenya iherithia rĩrĩa MWATHANI Ngai kana mũthamaki wa gũũkũ thĩ angĩmareehithĩria?" 
Proverbs24:23 O na thimo ici irũmĩrĩire ciarĩĩtio no andũ oogĩ. Gũthuutũkania ciirainĩ-rĩ, ti ũndũ mwega." 
Proverbs24:24 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtuaga ũrĩa mwaganu mwega, nĩkũrumwo arumagwo na agathũũrwo nĩ andũ oothe." 
Proverbs24:25 Ũrĩa ũherithagia mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu nĩagaacagĩra, ningĩ andũ nĩmamũraathimaga." 
Proverbs24:26 Icookia rĩa kwĩhokeka rĩonanagia wendo mũnene. 
Proverbs24:27 Amba ũthagathage indo ciothe cia mwako wothe, warĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo no ũgĩake nyũmba yaku." 
Proverbs24:28 Ndũkaanaigĩrĩre mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ kĩgeenyo, o na kana warie maheeni igũrũ rĩake." 
Proverbs24:29 Menya gũkaanoiga, “Njĩka na njĩka ndĩrĩ marũrũ, mũndũ ũcio ngũmwĩka o ta ũguo anjĩkĩĩte.”" 
Proverbs24:30 Ndĩragereire mũgũndainĩ wa mũndũ kĩgũũta na kĩrimũ o na ndĩragerera mũgũndainĩ wake wa mĩthabibũ," 
Proverbs24:31 ndĩrona yothe ĩramereete mĩigua, o na ĩkaiyũrwo nĩ ria, na ningĩ rũirigo rwayo rwa mahiga rũkamomoka." 
Proverbs24:32 Ndĩraũbaara mũno na ndĩrecũũrania ũhoro ũcio na ndĩreruta ũndũ. 
Proverbs24:33 Ũngĩenda gũkoma-rĩ, koma, o na ũngĩenda gũkumbatanĩria mooko ũhurũke, ĩka guo." 
Proverbs24:34 No ũrĩkorererwo nĩ ũthĩĩni ta mũici, naguo wagi ũgũtharĩkĩre o ta arĩ mũndũ ũgwete mĩguĩ." 
Proverbs25:1 Ici o nacio nĩ thimo ingĩ cia Solomoni, o ta ũrĩa ciandĩkirwo nĩ tũrani twa Hezekia mũthamaki wa Juda." 
Proverbs25:2 Ngai ekagĩrĩrwo nĩ ũndũ wa kũiga maũndũ hithoinĩ, nao athamaki meekagĩrĩrwo nĩ ũndũ wa kũhithũria hitho." 
Proverbs25:3 O ta ũrĩa igũrũ rĩraihĩte, o nayo thĩ ĩkarika, ũguo noguo ngoro cia athamaki itangĩtuĩrĩka." 
Proverbs25:4 Theria betha ĩthire gutu, naake mũturi ature kĩndũ kĩega." 
Proverbs25:5 Andũ arĩa aaganu ndũkaameetĩkĩrie gũtuĩka ataari a mũthamaki na ũthamaki wake ũgũtuĩka wa kĩhooto. 
Proverbs25:6 Ndũkaanetũgĩrie mbere ya mũthamaki o kana ũikaranie na atongoria; 
Proverbs25:7 nĩ kaba gwĩtwo ũthiĩ ũikarĩre itĩ cia mbere, gũkĩra kwĩrwo ũũkĩrĩrie gĩtĩ mũtongoria aikarĩire." 
Proverbs25:8 Wona ũndũ na maitho maaku, ndũkanaũtware igootiinĩ na ihenya.Mũndũ ũngĩ angĩruta ũira mwega kũrĩ waku, githĩ wee to ũconoke?" 
Proverbs25:9 Aranĩriai ũndũ ũcio mũrĩ inyuerĩ mũiguithanie, ndũkaanatuĩke wa kũumia nja." 
Proverbs25:10 Wauumia nja nĩũkwĩyagithia gĩtĩĩo ũgĩtũũre ũnyararĩĩtwo. 
Proverbs25:11 Ũhoro warĩĩtio ũhaarĩrĩĩtio wega, nĩ ta kĩndũ gĩthondekeetwo na thahabu ĩthondekereirwo wega na betha." 
Proverbs25:12 Irũithia rĩa mũndũ mũũgĩ harĩ mũndũ ũkũigua, nĩ ta gĩcũhĩ gĩa gũtũ gĩa thahabu kana mũgathĩ wa ngingo wa mahiga ma goro." 
Proverbs25:13 Mũrekio mwĩhokeku nĩ gĩkeno harĩ mũmũrekia, atariĩ ta maaĩ mahehu hĩndĩ ya ũrugarĩ wa hĩndĩ ya magetha." 
Proverbs25:14 Mũndũ wĩranagĩra indo atangĩhota kũheana, nĩ ta matu na rũhuuho itangiuria mbura." 
Proverbs25:15 Gũkirĩrĩria gũtũmaga mũnene ateithie mũndũ nacio ciugo njega iguucagĩrĩria athamaki. 
Proverbs25:16 Wona ũũkĩ rĩa ũrĩa ũgũkũigana, nĩ ũndũ mũrĩo nĩwĩrũmagĩra." 
Proverbs25:17 Ndũkaanatue mũciĩ wa mũndũ wa mũhaka gĩtindo, wahota kũmwĩkĩra kĩnyiria akũmene." 
Proverbs25:18 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũiganagĩrĩra igeenyo, atariĩ ta njũgũma, kana ta rũhiũ rwa njora o na kana ta mũguĩ mũnoore." 
Proverbs25:19 Kwĩhoka mũndũ ũtarĩ mwĩhokeku hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna, no ta kũrĩa na igego rĩũnĩkĩru, kana ta gũthiĩ na kũgũrũ kuonju." 
Proverbs25:20 Kũinĩra mũndũ wĩ na kĩeha ngoroinĩ no ta kũruta nguo hĩndĩ ya heho, kana kũhaka kĩronda cumbĩ." 
Proverbs25:21 Thũ yaku ĩngĩkorwo ĩhũtiĩ mĩhe gĩa kũrĩa, na ĩngĩkorwo ĩnyootiĩ mĩhe gĩa kũnyua;" 
Proverbs25:22 amu weka ũguo nĩũgũtũma ĩconoke, naake MWATHANI nĩegũkũgaathĩrĩria." 
Proverbs25:23 Mũceneneko ũreehage maraakara, o ta ũrĩa rũhuuho rwa na rũgongo, rũreehage mbura." 
Proverbs25:24 Nĩ kaba gũtũũra nyũmba igũrũ, gũkĩra gũtũũrania na mũtumia wa inegene kũu nyũmbainĩ thĩinĩ." 
Proverbs25:25 Kũigua ũhoro mwega wa bũrũri wa kũraaya, no ta kũnyua maaĩ mahehu wĩ mũnyootu." 
Proverbs25:26 Mũndũ mũthingu ũnyiitanagĩra na mwĩhia, no ta karũũĩ ke na munju kana gĩthima kiunjuge." 
Proverbs25:27 Kũrĩa ũũkĩ mũingĩ nĩkuoria nda, ningĩ kũganwo mũno nĩkũũra." 
Proverbs25:28 Mũndũ ũraakaraga na ihenya, no ta itũũra rĩmomorangĩĩtwo rĩgatigwo rĩtarĩ na thingo." 
Proverbs26:1 Ta mbarabu ĩgũĩte hĩndĩ ya ũrugarĩ, kana ta mbura hĩndĩ ya magetha, no taguo gĩtĩĩo gĩtaagĩrĩire kĩrimũ." 
Proverbs26:2 O ta ũrĩa nyoni ciũmbũkaga na itiũmbe, noguo irumi itarĩ gĩtũmi itangĩgwata mũndũ." 
Proverbs26:3 Hũũra mbarathi na kĩboko, nayo ndigiri ũmĩohe na matamu, nakĩo kĩrimũ ũkĩhũre na rũthanju." 
Proverbs26:4 Ndũkaanacookerie kĩrimũ na ũrimũ wakio, ũngĩĩka ũguo ũkũhaana o ta kĩo." 
Proverbs26:5 Cookeria kĩrimũ na ũrimũ wakĩo, gĩtigaakĩone ta gĩtuĩkĩĩte kĩũgĩ." 
Proverbs26:6 Mũtũmi wa kĩrimũ na ũhoro-rĩ, nĩ we mwene wĩigwithagia ruwo, na akeegĩrĩra thĩĩna." 
Proverbs26:7 Kĩrimũ kĩraaria na thimo, no ta kĩonje gĩgĩĩtwara na magũrũ maakĩo" 
Proverbs26:8 Kũgaathĩrĩria kĩrimũ no ta gũikia ihiga na kĩgũtha. 
Proverbs26:9 Ta mũigua ũgĩtheeca guoko kwa mũrĩĩu, no taguo ngerekano itariĩ ikĩario nĩ tũnua twa irimũ." 
Proverbs26:10 Ta mũgwĩmi ũrĩa ũikagia mĩguĩ yake o ũguo, Noguo mũndũ atariĩ ũrĩa wandĩkaga kĩrimũ na mũrĩĩu." 
Proverbs26:11 Kĩrimũ kĩrĩa gĩtindagĩrĩra ũrimũ wakio, no ta ngui ĩgũcookera matahĩko maayo." 
Proverbs26:12 Nĩwonaga mũndũ ũrĩa wĩtuaga atĩ nĩ mũũgĩ? Kĩrimũ-rĩ, nĩkĩmũkĩrĩĩte." 
Proverbs26:13 Kĩgũũta gĩikaraga o ro mũciĩ tondũ kĩĩgwatagia nĩgĩkũrĩĩo nĩ mũrũũthi kĩoimagara. 
Proverbs26:14 Ta ũrĩa mũrango ũtindaga ũgĩcuuha na marenji maguo, no taguo kĩgũũta kĩĩgarũraga gĩkomeete ũrĩrĩ." 
Proverbs26:15 Kĩgũũta nĩkĩremagwo nĩkwĩyoera irio kĩrĩe. 
Proverbs26:16 Kĩgũũta kĩyonaga gĩ kĩũgĩ gũkĩra andũ mũgwanja arĩa mangĩcookia na ũũgĩ. 
Proverbs26:17 Mũndũ wa gũtoonyerera ngũĩ yene, no ta mũndũ ũranyiita ngui matũ." 
Proverbs26:18 (18-19) Mũndũ ũrĩa ũhĩtithagia mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ wa mũhaka na akoiga atĩ no itherũ-rĩ, ahaana mũgũrũki ũretwarĩrĩria gĩkuũinĩ." 
Proverbs26:19 Mwaki waga kuongererwo ngũ, nĩũhoraga ngarari ingĩaga haaro nĩithiraga." 
Proverbs26:20 O ta ũrĩa makara magwatagia mangĩ mwaki na ngũ igatũma mwaki wakane makĩria, naguo mũndũ wa ngũĩ aringanagĩrĩria haaro." 
Proverbs26:21 Mũhuuhu ũrĩ cama mũno, mũndũ aũigua ndũriganagĩra." 
Proverbs26:22 Ciugo nyoroku cia maheeni, no ta nyũngũ ĩthondekeetwo na rĩũmba rĩtacinĩĩtwo wega." 
Proverbs26:23 Hinga ĩhithagĩrĩra rũthũũro rwayo na ciugo nyoroku wega. 
Proverbs26:24 Tiga gwĩtĩkia ndeto icio ciayo o na i njega nĩ ũndũ ngoroinĩ ya yo ĩiyũire rũthũũro. 
Proverbs26:25 O na ĩngĩhithĩrĩra rũthũũro rwayo, maciaro maaruo no makoimbũka." 
Proverbs26:26 Mwenji wa irima nĩ we mwene ũgũaga rĩo, na mũhingiritia wa ihiga nĩ we mwene uunagwo kũgũrũ nĩrĩo." 
Proverbs26:27 Mũndũ wa maheeni, nĩathũire arĩa aheenanagia igũrũ rĩao, namo maheeni nĩkũharagania maharaganagia." 
Proverbs27:1 Tiga kwĩraha na rũũciũ, tondũ rũũciũ maũndũ mahota kũgarũrũka." 
Proverbs27:2 Tiga kwĩgana wee mwene kaba ũganwo nĩ andũ angĩ, kana andũ matakũũĩ." 
Proverbs27:3 Gĩtango gĩa kĩrimũ, nĩ kĩritũ gũkĩra ihiga hamwe na mũthanga." 
Proverbs27:4 Marũrũ matirĩ tha, no kwananga maanangaga ĩndĩ ũiru nĩ mũũru makĩria." 
Proverbs27:5 Kaba kũrũithia mũndũ ũtekũmwĩtigĩra gũkĩra wendo wa ngunguĩ. 
Proverbs27:6 Nguraro cia gwĩkĩrwo nĩ mũraata itĩrĩ ruwo, ĩndĩ thũ yaku o na ĩngĩkũmumunya mĩĩmenyerere." 
Proverbs27:7 Mũndũ ũhũniĩ, o na ũũkĩ kũrĩ we ndũrĩ cama, ĩndĩ mũndũ ũhũũtiĩ, o na irio ng'andu no arĩe." 
Proverbs27:8 Mũndũ wa mbũrũũrũ ahaana o ta kanyoni gatiganĩirie gĩtara gĩako. 
Proverbs27:9 Maraaci o na mũtararĩko wa maguta nĩikenagia mũndũ, ĩndĩ mathĩĩna meekagĩra mũndũ kĩeha." 
Proverbs27:10 Menyagĩrĩra araata aaku mwene, o na ningĩ ndũkaanatirike araata a thooguo; ndũkaanathiĩ kwa mũrũ wa maitũguo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũrĩ na thĩĩna.Mũndũ ũrĩa mũrigainie naake no agũteithie gũkĩra mũrũ wa maitũguo wĩ kũraaya." 
Proverbs27:11 Mwana wakwa, wĩgĩĩre na ũũgĩ na nĩũkũnjanjamũra ngoro, hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩe na macookio ma kwĩra mũnjũgiti." 
Proverbs27:12 Mũndũ mũbaarĩrĩri oonaga ũgwati ũgĩũka akaweherera, ĩndĩ kĩrimũ nĩgũtũnga kĩũtũngaga gĩgakĩniinwo." 
Proverbs27:13 Mũndũ angĩtuĩka wa kũrĩhĩra mũndũ atooĩ thiirĩ, nĩ indo ciake we mwene atoonyagia ũgwatiinĩ." 
Proverbs27:14 Kũgũtũkĩra mũndũ na ngeithi rũũciinĩ no ta kũmũtũngia mũtino. 
Proverbs27:15 Mũtumia mũnegeni no ta maaĩ magĩtaata, ta ta ta, hĩndĩ ya mbura." 
Proverbs27:16 Kũmũgirĩrĩria no ta kũhũũra maaĩ na ndĩrĩ, kana gũkumbacĩria maguta matweku na rũhĩ." 
Proverbs27:17 Cuuma nĩnooraga iria ingĩ, naguo noguo mũndũ mũũgĩ oohĩgagia ũrĩa ũngĩ." 
Proverbs27:18 Mũceehi wa mũkũyũ nĩarĩaga matunda maaguo. Ndungata ĩrĩa ĩmenyagĩrĩra mũmĩathi nĩheyagwo gĩtĩĩo. 
Proverbs27:19 O ta ũrĩa mũndũ oonaga kĩĩruru gĩake maaĩinĩ, noguo we mwene eyonaga ngoroinĩ yake." 
Proverbs27:20 Gĩkuũ o na kwa arĩa akuũ itiiganagia, na noguo maitho ma mũndũ matariĩ." 
Proverbs27:21 Betha na thahabu iniinagwo ngaanga nĩ mwaki, naake mũndũ ageragio na kũganwo gwake." 
Proverbs27:22 O na ũngĩhũũra kĩrimũ gĩtigairie haniini gĩkue, ndũrĩ ũndũ ũngĩĩka ũrimũ ũcio wakĩo." 
Proverbs27:23 Menyaga ũrĩa mahiũ maaku maikaire, ũkĩmenyagĩrĩre wega ndũũru ciaku;" 
Proverbs27:24 amu ũtonga nĩũthiraga, o na moothamaki matitũũraga." 
Proverbs27:25 Mũndũ atuaga thaara na agatũgũta nyeki ciandainĩ, o rĩrĩa kwĩ na thaara ũngĩ ũrakũra mũgũnda." 
Proverbs27:26 No wĩthondekere nguo na guoya wa ng'ondu ciaku, na wĩgũrĩre mũgunda na wendia wa mbũri imwe ciaku." 
Proverbs27:27 Nacio mbũri icio ingĩ ikũheage iria wee mwene, andũ a mũciĩ waku, o na ndungata ciaku cia airĩĩtu." 
Proverbs28:1 Mũndũ mwaganu amakagio nĩ kĩĩruru, no mũndũ mũthingu eyũmagĩrĩria ta mũrũũthi." 
Proverbs28:2 Bũrũri ũngĩĩhia, nĩũgĩaga na aathani aingĩ. Ĩndĩ mũthamaki mũũgĩ na mũtaũku nĩatũmaga bũrũri wĩkindĩre." 
Proverbs28:3 Mũthamaki ũhinyagĩrĩria mũndũ mũkĩa no ta mbura ya rũhuuho ĩkomeetie irio. 
Proverbs28:4 Mũndũ ũtiganĩirie watho, agaathagĩrĩria andũ arĩa aaganu.Ĩndĩ mũndũ wathĩkagĩra watho, ndangĩnyiitanĩra nao." 
Proverbs28:5 Andũ aaganu matimenyaga kĩhooto, no arĩa mathaathayagia MWATHANI nĩmakĩmenyaga wega." 
Proverbs28:6 Kaba mũthĩĩni mwĩhokeku kũrĩ gĩtonga gĩkoroku. 
Proverbs28:7 Mwana mũtaũku nĩathĩkagĩra Watho ĩndĩ ũrĩa ũthiaga thiritũ na mĩkora nĩgũconorithia aconorithagia mũciari wake. 
Proverbs28:8 Atĩrĩ, ũtonga wa kwĩonera na njĩra ya kuongerera uumithio ũrĩa gũtaagĩrĩire, ũrigagia na andũ arĩa maiguagĩra athĩĩni tha." 
Proverbs28:9 Mũndũ ũtaiguaga watho o na mahooya maake Ngai ndangĩmaigua. 
Proverbs28:10 Mũndũ ũhĩtithagia mũndũ ũrĩa mwĩhokeku acookaga kũgũa o meehiainĩ maake mwene.No mũndũ ũtarĩ na mahĩtia nĩaraathimagwo. 
Proverbs28:11 Gĩtonga kĩyonaga gĩ kĩũgĩ ĩndĩ mũthĩĩni wĩ na mĩthiĩre mĩega nĩagĩkĩrĩĩte. 
Proverbs28:12 Rĩrĩa arĩa athingu matũũgĩrio andũ nĩmakenaga, no arĩa aaganu matũũgĩra andũ magakua ngoro." 
Proverbs28:13 Mũndũ ũhithagĩrĩra meehia maake ndangĩgaacĩra ĩndĩ ũrĩa ũmoimbũraga na akamatiganĩria, nĩaiguagĩrwo tha." 
Proverbs28:14 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtĩĩaga MWATHANI aikaraga akeneete, ĩndĩ ndũrĩka nĩkũniinwo ĩniinagwo." 
Proverbs28:15 Athĩĩni matingĩĩguna kuuma harĩ mũtongoria mwaganu, ahaana ta mũrũũthi ũkĩrarama, kana ta njũũi ĩraguĩma." 
Proverbs28:16 Mũtongoria kĩrimũ nĩahinyagĩrĩria andũ aake ĩndĩ ũrĩa ũthũire ungumania nĩathanaga matukũ maingĩ. 
Proverbs28:17 Mũndũ ũrathĩĩnio nĩ thakame ya mũndũ ooragĩĩte, nĩ we mwene wĩĩnjeire mbĩĩrĩra, tigana naake." 
Proverbs28:18 Tũũra wĩ mwĩhokeku na nĩũrĩikaraga na thaayũ, no mũndũ ũtarĩ mwĩhokeku arĩrũndagwo o rĩmwe." 
Proverbs28:19 Mũrĩmi wĩ kĩyo ndaagaga gĩa kũrĩa, ĩndĩ kĩgũũta gĩtũũraga na thĩĩna." 
Proverbs28:20 Mũndũ mwĩhokeku arĩtũũraga araathimagwo no mũndũ wa kwenda gũtonga na ihenya arĩonaga o ndirũ. 
Proverbs28:21 Gũthuutũkania ti ũndũ mwega, mũndũ ahota kwĩhia nĩ ũndũ wa keenyũ ka mũgate." 
Proverbs28:22 Mũndũ mwĩyendi eendaga gũtonga narua, ĩndĩ ndooĩ atĩ ũthĩĩni no ũmũkorerere." 
Proverbs28:23 Rũithia mũndũ na thuuthainĩ nĩarĩgũtĩĩa gũkĩra ũrĩa ũmũgaathagĩrĩria. 
Proverbs28:24 Mũndũ ũiyaga aciari aake na akoiga ũcio ti ũndũ, ndarĩ ngũũrani na mũici." 
Proverbs28:25 Mũndũ mwĩyendi nĩ thĩĩna egĩĩragĩrĩra, no mũndũ wĩhokeete MWATHANI ũcio nĩarĩonaga wega." 
Proverbs28:26 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩhokaga meciiria maake nĩ kĩrimũ no mũndũ ũrĩa ũthikagĩrĩria mataaro ma andũ oogĩ nĩahonokaga. 
Proverbs28:27 Mũtugi athĩĩni ndathĩĩnaga, ĩndĩ ũrĩa ũthunaga guoko ndoonaga kĩraathimo." 
Proverbs28:28 Arĩa aaganu maatũũgĩra, andũ nĩkwĩhitha mehithaga; ĩndĩ maagũa kuuma ũneneinĩ, arĩa athingu nĩmoongererekaga." 
Proverbs29:1 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũng'athagia o na arũithio agũaga na ndoone wa kũmũũkĩria, oinĩkangaga na ndoonaga kĩhonia." 
Proverbs29:2 Rĩrĩa mũndũ mũthingu atuĩka mũthamaki andũ nĩgũkena makenaga.Ĩndĩ rĩrĩa ũrĩa mwaganu aathana, andũ nĩkũnuguna manugunaga." 
Proverbs29:3 Mwana ũrĩa wendeete ũũgĩ atũmaga mũciari akene, ĩndĩ ũrĩa ũgĩaga thiritũ na aka a maraaya nĩgũitanga aitangaga indo ciake." 
Proverbs29:4 Mũthamaki ũrĩa ũrũmbũyanagia na kĩhooto bũrũri wake nĩwĩkindagĩra.Ĩndĩ mũthamaki wendeete o mbia nĩkũwananga awanangaga. 
Proverbs29:5 Mũndũ ũheenagĩrĩria ũrĩa ũngĩ, nĩ we mwene wĩigagĩra mũtego." 
Proverbs29:6 Wĩhia wa mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu nĩ mũtego kũrĩ we mwene; mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu aikaraga egangarĩĩte nĩgũkena. 
Proverbs29:7 Mũndũ mũthingu nĩamenyagĩrĩra ihooto cia athĩĩni, ĩndĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu ti mũtaũkĩre nĩ maũndũ macio." 
Proverbs29:8 Andũ a njiinũ matũmaga itũũra rĩgĩe ngũĩ, no arĩa oogĩ nĩkũhooreria marĩhooreragia." 
Proverbs29:9 Mũciiri na kĩrimũ, o na e mũũgĩ, ndarĩ uumithio oonaga, tiga o gĩconoko gĩtheri." 
Proverbs29:10 Ooragani nĩmathũire mũndũ mwĩhokeku, no arĩa athingu nĩkũgitĩra magitagĩra muoyo wake." 
Proverbs29:11 Kĩrimũ gĩtingĩhota kũhithĩrĩra maraakara, no mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩakiragĩrĩria na akamahooreria." 
Proverbs29:12 Mũthamaki angĩtuĩka wa gũthikagĩrĩria maheeni, njaama ciake ciothe ituĩkaga cia maheeni." 
Proverbs29:13 Mũthĩĩni na mũmũhinyĩrĩria eerĩ marĩ ũndũ ũmwe mahaanainie. MWATHANI nĩ we wamaheire maitho. 
Proverbs29:14 Mũthamaki ũrĩa ũgitagĩra ihooto cia athĩĩni, ũthamaki wake nĩũikaraga ihinda iraaya." 
Proverbs29:15 Kũrũnga na gũtaarana nĩciĩkagĩra mũndũ ũũgĩ, no mwana mwĩĩri nĩaconorithagia mũmũciari." 
Proverbs29:16 Rĩrĩa arĩa aaganu megwathana waganu nĩũingĩhaga, ĩndĩ arĩa athingu nĩmakeerorera kũgũa kwa andũ arĩa aaganu." 
Proverbs29:17 Ruta mwana mĩtugo, na nĩũrĩkenaga, ĩĩ, ũgĩkĩiguage gĩkeno ngoro." 
Proverbs29:18 Rũũrĩrĩ rũtarĩ kĩrĩra kĩa Ngai nĩ rũhĩtanu, no kũraathimwo nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũrũmagia watho." 
Proverbs29:19 Ndungata ndĩngĩrũngwo na kwarĩrio gũtheri yahota gũtaũkĩrwo na yage kwĩrũmbũyia. 
Proverbs29:20 Kĩrimũ kĩrĩ kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gũkĩra mũndũ ũrĩa waragia atabaarĩrĩire mĩario yake. 
Proverbs29:21 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtũũnagia ndungata yake kuuma ĩ nyiinyi, marigĩrĩrioinĩ ĩgetũũgĩria o na gũkĩra mũũrũwe." 
Proverbs29:22 Mũndũ wa maraakara atũmaga kũgĩe haaro na mũndũ wa marũrũ aikaraga akĩhĩtagia. 
Proverbs29:23 Mwĩtĩĩo ũgũĩthagia mũndũ njamba, ĩndĩ mũndũ mwĩnyiihia nĩatĩĩagwo." 
Proverbs29:24 Mũndũ ũgĩaga ndũgũ na mũici nĩ we mwene wĩthũire, anyuithagio muuma na ndangiumbũra." 
Proverbs29:25 Gwĩtigĩra andũ kũreehage ũgwati, ĩndĩ mwĩhoki MWATHANI nĩmũgitĩre." 
Proverbs29:26 Andũ aingĩ nĩmeendithagia harĩ mũthamaki, ĩndĩ MWATHANI no we wiki ũtuaga ciira na kĩhooto." 
Proverbs29:27 Mũndũ mũthingu ndagwatanagĩra na mũndũ mwaganu, na mũndũ mwaganu ndagwatanagĩra na mũndũ mũthingu." 
Proverbs30:1 Ici nĩcio ciugo cia ũrathi wa Aguri mũrũ wa Jake. “Ngai ndarĩ hamwe na niĩ, Ngai ndarĩ hamwe na niĩ. Ingĩteithĩka atĩa?" 
Proverbs30:2 Niĩ-rĩ, ndariĩ ta nyamũ ti ta mũndũ; ndireciiria ta mũndũ." 
Proverbs30:3 Ndirĩ nderuta ũũgĩ o na atĩa, o na kana ngamenya Ũrĩa Mũtheru." 
Proverbs30:4 Nũũ wanamenya maũndũ moothe ma igũrũ? Nũũ wanakumbatĩria rũhuuho na rũhĩ, kana akĩoha maaĩ na nguo yake, o na kana agĩĩkĩra mĩhaka yothe ya thĩ?Ongorwo nĩũmũũĩ-rĩ, eetagwo atĩa? Mũũrũwe naake eetagwo atĩa?" 
Proverbs30:5 “Ngai nĩahingagia uuge wake; we nĩ ngo ya kũgitĩra arĩa oothe mooragĩra harĩ we. 
Proverbs30:6 Tiga kuongerera ciugo ciake ũndũ ndakaae gũkũrũithia agũtue wa maheeni.” 
Proverbs30:7 Mbere ya ngue, ndakũhooya maũndũ maya meerĩ, Ngai!" 
Proverbs30:8 Njehereria ũhoro wa wara na wa maheeni; ndũkaanareke ndonge kana thĩĩne, heyaga o irio iria bataire." 
Proverbs30:9 Ingĩhũũna mũno-rĩ, no ndiganĩrwo nĩ we; ingĩthĩĩna no ngakĩiye, ndeehithĩrie Ngai wakwa gĩconoko." 
Proverbs30:10 Ndũkamenererie ndungata harĩ mũnene wayo, wahota kũgwatwo nĩ kĩrumi, wone thĩĩna." 
Proverbs30:11 Kũrĩ andũ marumaga maithe maao, o na mataheyaga maanyina gĩtĩĩo." 
Proverbs30:12 Kũrĩ andũ meyonaga ta marĩ atheru, o rĩrĩa marĩ na gĩko." 
Proverbs30:13 Kũrĩ andũ meyonaga marĩ eega, ĩĩni, magagĩciiragia o no o." 
Proverbs30:14 Kũrĩ andũ mahinyagĩrĩria athĩĩni na arĩa angĩ mũno, na ũguo nĩguo meyonagĩra gĩa kũrĩa." 
Proverbs30:15 Thambara ĩrĩ airĩĩtu eerĩ; moigaga “Tũheei! Tũheei!”Kũrĩ indo inya itaiganagia o na kana ikanyira: 
Proverbs30:16 Kwa arĩa akuũ, mũtumia ũtaciaraga, thĩ nyũmũ, na mwaki ũtangĩhoreka." 
Proverbs30:17 Mũndũ ũnyũrũragia ithe na akanyarara nyina, aagĩrĩirwo nĩkũrĩĩo nĩ nderi, kana maitho maake makũũrwo nĩ mahuru." 
Proverbs30:18 Kũrĩ maũndũ mana ma magegania itahotaga gũtaũkĩrwo nĩ mo: 
Proverbs30:19 Ũrĩa rwĩgĩ rũmbũkaga rĩerainĩ, ũrĩa nyoka ĩthiagĩra igũrũ wa ihiga, ũrĩa meeri imenyaga njĩra iriainĩ, na ũrĩa mwanake na mũirĩĩtu meendanaga." 
Proverbs30:20 Mũtugo wa mũtumia mũmaramari nĩ ũy atharia, ethambaga akoiga atĩrĩ, “Ndirĩ meehia ndeeka.”" 
Proverbs30:21 Kũrĩ maũndũ mana mainainagia thĩ: 
Proverbs30:22 ngombo rĩrĩa yatuĩka mũthamaki, kĩrimũ kĩrĩĩte gĩkahũũna," 
Proverbs30:23 mũirĩĩtu njong'i angĩhika, na mũirĩĩtu ndungata ũrĩa ũtuunyaga mũtumia ũrĩa ũmwandĩkĩĩte mũthuuri wake." 
Proverbs30:24 Gwĩ tũnyamũ tũna thĩinĩ wa thĩ, tũnyiinyi na tũũgĩ mũno:" 
Proverbs30:25 thigiriri itirĩ hinya no nĩcihotaga kũiga mũthiithũ wa irio hingo ya ũrugarĩ. 
Proverbs30:26 ikami nacio itirĩ hinya, no nĩcihotaga gũthondeka kũndũ gwa gũtũũra ndwaroinĩ cia mahiga;" 
Proverbs30:27 ngigĩ o na itarĩ na mũthamaki nĩcihotaga kũũmbũka irĩ gĩtutu; 
Proverbs30:28 no ũkumbatĩrie njagathi na guoko, na no ikoragwo nyũmba cia athamaki." 
Proverbs30:29 Kũrĩ nyamũ inya ũngĩenda kwĩrorera mũkinyũkĩrie wacio; 
Proverbs30:30 mũrũũthi arĩ guo njamba gũkĩra nyamũ iria ingĩ ciothe, na ndũrĩ nyamũ o na ĩmwe wĩtigagĩra;" 
Proverbs30:31 njamba ya ngũkũ, thenge, na mũthamaki akĩrora thigari ciake." 
Proverbs30:32 Ũngĩkorwo nĩũkoreetwo ũrĩ mũkĩĩgu ũgetĩĩa na ũgathugunda waganu, ikara thĩ wĩcũũranie ũhoro ũcio." 
Proverbs30:33 Ũngĩhũũra iria, riumaga maguta ũngĩringa mũndũ iniũrũ nĩanunuhaga, na ũngĩthooria maraakara nĩũkuona ũũru." 
Proverbs31:1 Maya nĩ mo mataaro marĩa mũthamaki Lemueli aaheirwo nĩ nyina. 
Proverbs31:2 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, mũrũ wakwa nyendeete mũno, o we icookia rĩa mahooya maakwa, ngũkwĩra atĩa?" 
Proverbs31:3 Ndũgaatũũre ũhanyũkanagia na andũ a nja, acio maanarũnda athamaki." 
Proverbs31:4 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, Lemueli, athamaki matiagĩrĩirwo nĩkũnyuaga ndibei o na kana gũkorokera njoohi." 
Proverbs31:5 Maarĩo nĩmariganagĩrwo nĩ watho, na makaaga kũrũmbũyania na ihooto cia arĩa athĩĩni." 
Proverbs31:6 Njoohi-rĩ, nĩ ya arĩa marathira, nayo ndibei nĩ ya arĩa me na ruwo ngoro." 
Proverbs31:7 Reke manyue mariganĩrwo nĩ ũthĩĩni wao, makĩriganĩrwo nĩ mĩnyamaaro yao." 
Proverbs31:8 Aragĩrĩria arĩa matangĩhota kwĩarĩrĩria, ũkĩrũũgamagĩrĩre ihooto cia arĩa oothe matangĩhota kwĩyũrĩria." 
Proverbs31:9 Aragĩrĩria andũ ta acio, ũmaaragĩrĩrie na kĩhooto, na ũmatuithanagie na ũthingu.Gitagĩra ihooto cia arĩa athĩĩni na arĩa abataru.”" 
Proverbs31:10 Kaĩ mũtumia ngatha e hinya kuoneka-ĩ, nĩ gũkorwo thogora wake ũkĩrĩĩte tũhiga twa goro." 
Proverbs31:11 Mũthuuriwe nĩamwĩhokeete na mũthuuri ũcio ndangĩtuĩka mũkĩa. 
Proverbs31:12 Mũtumia ũcio matukũ moothe ma muoyo wake eekaga mũthuuri wake wega, ndangĩmwĩka ũũru." 
Proverbs31:13 Ehang'agia na gũtuma nguo cia guoya na cia gataani. 
Proverbs31:14 Athũgũraga irio ciake kũraaya agaciinũkia, o ta meeri cia mbiacara." 
Proverbs31:15 Ookagĩra kũrĩ o ũtukũ, agakĩhaarĩria irio cia andũ aake, na akabangĩra ndungata ciake cia airĩĩtu mawĩra ma kũruta." 
Proverbs31:16 Eethaga mũgũnda akagũra na mbeeca iria athũkũmĩĩte, akahanda mĩthabibũ." 
Proverbs31:17 Mũtumia ũcio e kĩyo, arutaga wĩra wake na hinya, erutanĩirie." 
Proverbs31:18 Nĩoĩ uumithio wa mawĩra maake moothe, amarutaga o nginya ũtukũ ũgakũra." 
Proverbs31:19 Nĩ we mwene wĩyogothagĩra ndigi, agagĩĩtumĩra nguo ciake mwene." 
Proverbs31:20 Nĩatugaga athĩĩni, ĩĩ, na arĩa aagi akamoohorera indo." 
Proverbs31:21 Kwagĩa mbaa we ndamakaga, tondũ andũ aake me na nguo cia ũrugarĩ." 
Proverbs31:22 Ningĩ nĩegemagĩria macuka ma kwara ũrĩrĩ agakĩĩhumbaga nguo cia gataani iria njega na cia babũ. 
Proverbs31:23 Mũthuuriwe nĩoĩo wega, nĩ ũmwe wa atongoria a andũ." 
Proverbs31:24 Mũtumia ũcio agagĩtumaga nguo cia gataani akĩendagia, nayo mĩcibi agatwaragĩra ahũũri a mbiacara meendie." 
Proverbs31:25 Arĩ hinya na nĩatĩĩĩtwo, na ndangĩmakio nĩ ũrĩa ũgooka thuutha." 
Proverbs31:26 Aaragia na ũũgĩ, kĩrĩra gĩake no kĩrĩa kĩega." 
Proverbs31:27 Arĩ kĩyo na maũndũ ma mũciĩ wake, na ndarĩaga irio atanogeire." 
Proverbs31:28 Ciana ciake ciugaga atĩrĩ, “Maitũ aroraathimwo!” Mũthuuriwe o naake nĩkũgaatha amũgaathaga." 
Proverbs31:29 Oigaga atĩrĩ, “Atumia aingĩ maanatuĩka ngatha, no wee-rĩ, nĩũmakĩrĩĩte oothe.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Mĩthaiga nĩyakũheenania, noguo ũthaka nĩũthiraga, ĩndĩ mũtumia ũtĩĩyaga MWATHANI, ũcio nĩwagwĩkagĩrĩrwo." 
Proverbs31:31 Mũgaathageei nĩ ũndũ wa mawĩra moothe marĩa arutaga; arokumagio nĩ andũ oothe. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Ici nĩcio ciugo cia Mũhunjia mũrũ wa Daudi, ũrĩa warĩ mũthamaki thĩinĩ wa Jerusalemu." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Maũndũ moothe nĩ ma tũhũ, nĩguo Mũhunjia ekuuga. Ĩĩ, ti itherũ moothe nĩ tũhũ mũtheri." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Nĩ uumithio ũrĩkũ mũndũ agĩaga naguo,nĩ ũndũ wa wĩra wa hinya ũrĩa arutaga gũũkũ thĩ?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Njiarwa ciũkaga igacooka igathiĩ, igatiga thĩ ĩhaana o ũguo ĩtariĩ." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Riũa rĩrathaga na rĩgathũa, rĩgacooka rĩgathiĩ narua harĩa rĩrathagĩra." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Naruo rũhuuho rũhuruutanaga na kĩanda na na rũgongo, rũgatũũra rũthiũrũrũkaga ũguo." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Nacio njũũĩ ithereraga ikeitĩrĩra iriainĩ, na iria rĩtiyũraga. Harĩa maaĩ mathereragĩra no ho macookaga magatherera o rĩngĩ." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Maũndũ moothe mareehanagĩra mĩnoga ĩrĩa mũndũ atangĩhota kũgweta; maitho matingĩigania kũmĩona kana matũ maiganie kũmĩigua. 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Maũndũ marĩa maarĩ kuo tene, no mo magaakorwo kuo; marĩa meekirwo tene no mo mageekwo. Gũtirĩ ũndũ mwerũ gũũkũ thĩ." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, gũtirĩ kĩndũ kĩngĩĩrwo atĩrĩ, “Tarora wone gĩĩkĩ nĩ kĩerũ.” Ciothe cianakorwo kuo matukũinĩ ma tene mbere iitũ." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Maũndũ marĩa maanakorwo kuo matiririkanagwo, na marĩa marĩ kuo matikaaririkanwo matukũ ma thuutha." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Niĩ Mũhunjia ndaarĩ mũthamaki wa Isiraeli thĩinĩ wa Jerusalemu. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Nĩndatuire atĩ nĩngũbaara na nduĩrie maũndũ moothe marĩa meekagwo gũũkũ thĩ.Ngai nĩatũnengerire maũndũ matarĩ meega tũtangagwo nĩ mo. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Nĩnyoneete maũndũ marĩa moothe meekagwo gũũkũ thĩ na moothe nĩ ma tũhũ; no ũndũ ũmwe na kũhũũra maaĩ na ndĩrĩ. 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Kĩndũ kĩrĩa kĩogomu gĩtingĩrũngĩka; na kĩrĩa gĩtarĩ ho gĩtingĩtarwo. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Nĩndeĩĩrire atĩrĩ, “Nĩngĩĩte na ũũgĩ mũingĩ mũno gũkĩra athamaki oothe maanaathana Jerusalemu mbere yakwa; na meciiria maakwa maanoona maũndũ maingĩ makoniĩ ũũgĩ na ũmenyi.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Nĩndagĩtuire atĩ nĩngũmenya maũndũ ma ũũgĩ, na menye maũndũ ma ũgũrũki, o na menye maũndũ ma ũrimũ. No nĩndamenyire atĩ o naguo ũguo, no kũhũũra maaĩ na ndĩrĩ." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Amu ũũgĩ mũnene nĩũreehage kĩeha, na kũmenya mũno kũreehage mathĩĩna maingĩ." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Nĩndatuire na ngoro atĩ nĩngwĩkenia na ndĩkĩmenye gĩkeno nĩ kĩĩ. No nĩndacookire ngĩmenya, o na ũguo no tũhũ." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Nĩndagundũrire atĩ mĩtheko nĩ ũrimũ, na ikeno itirĩ ũndũ mwega ciĩkaga mũndũ." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 O ndĩ na thuti ya kũgĩa na ũũgĩ-rĩ, nĩndeciiririe ũrĩa ingĩĩkenia na ndibei, na ũrĩa ingĩrũmanĩrĩra na ũrimũ. Ndeciiririe hiihi no menye nĩ ũndũ ũrĩkũ mwega gũũkũ thĩ andũ mangĩĩka matukũinĩ macio maniini ma ũtũũro wao." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Nĩndeekire maũndũ manene; ngĩyakĩra manyũmba o na ngĩĩhandĩra mĩthabibũ mĩgũndainĩ. 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Nĩndethondekeire mĩgũnda, o na tũmĩgũnda twa kũhuurũka, na kũu mĩgũndainĩ na tũmĩgũndainĩ tũu ngĩhanda mĩtĩ ya matunda ma mĩthemba yothe." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Ngĩcooka ngĩthondeka tũria twa maaĩ ma gũitĩrĩria mĩtitũ ya mĩtĩ ĩyo yakũraga. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ngĩcooka ngĩgũra ngombo, na nĩndaarĩ na ngombo ciaciarĩirwo gwakwa; o na nĩndaarĩ na ng'ombe, mbũri, na ng'ondu nyingĩ gũkĩra andũ arĩa oothe maanakorwo Jerusalemu mbere yakwa." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Ngĩcooka ngĩcookanĩrĩria betha na thahabu kuuma mĩthiithũinĩ ya moothamaki na mabũrũri marĩa ndaathaga; o na nĩndaarĩ na arũme na atumia manyinagĩra, o na nĩndaigĩĩte atumia aingĩ o ta ũrĩa mũndũ mũrũme angĩĩrirĩria." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Kwa ũguo nĩndatuĩkire mũndũ mũnene gũkĩra arĩa maanakorwo Jerusalemu mbere yakwa, na ũũgĩ wakwa ngĩikara naguo." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ingĩabataririo nĩ kĩndũ o nakĩ, nĩndakĩonaga, na ndieimaga ikeno cia mĩthemba yothe, na ngoro yakwa nĩyaiguaga ĩkeneetio nĩ wĩra wakwa na ũcio nĩguo wakĩrĩ mũcaara wakwa." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Nĩndagĩcookire ngĩciiria ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa moothe ndeekĩĩte, o na ũrĩa ndaũrutĩĩte na hinya, na moothe ngĩona nĩ ma tũhũ, na no ũndũ ũmwe na kũhũũra maaĩ na ndĩrĩ, na matiarĩ na bata o na haniini." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Tondũ wa rĩĩrĩ, nĩ atĩa ũngĩ mũthamaki angĩĩka tiga o maũndũ marĩa maneekwo nĩ athamaki angĩ mbere yake.Kwa ũguo nĩndaambĩrĩirie gwĩciiria ũhoro wa ũũgĩ, ũgũrũki, o na wa ũrimũ." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ngĩkĩmenya atĩ ũũgĩ nĩ mwega gũkĩra ũrimũ o ta ũrĩa ũtheri ũrĩ mwega gũkĩra nduma. 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩakoragwo akĩona kũrĩa arathiĩ, no mũndũ mũkĩĩgu ageragĩra ndumainĩ; na nĩnjũũĩ atĩ oothe makaarĩĩkĩrĩria o ũndũ ũmwe." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ngĩgĩcooka ngĩĩĩra atĩrĩ, “O na niĩ ngaarĩĩkĩrĩria o ta ũrĩa irimũ ikaarĩĩkĩrĩria. Rĩu-rĩ, nĩ uumithio ũrĩkũ ngĩgĩĩte naguo nĩ ũndũ wa gũkorwo ndĩ mũũgĩ mũno? Ngĩĩcookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Hatirĩ, hatirĩ o na ũmwe.’ ”" 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Mũndũ mũũgĩ kana mũndũ mũkĩĩgu, gũtirĩ ũgũtũũra aririkanagwo matukũinĩ marĩa magooka, oothe magaakua mariganĩre tene na tene. O ũrĩa mũndũ mũũgĩ akuaga noguo mũndũ mũkĩĩgu akuaga!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Niĩ ngĩkĩmena ũtũũro, tondũ maũndũ moothe marĩa meekagwo gũũkũ thĩ maarĩ ma kũnjiguithia ũũru, amu moothe nĩ ma tũhũ na no ũndũ ũmwe na kũhũũra maaĩ na ndĩrĩ." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Nĩndamenire indo ciothe iria ndarutĩire wĩra gũũkũ thĩ, ndamenya atĩ no mũhaka ciothe ngaacitigĩra mũndũ ũrĩa ũgooka thuutha wakwa." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Nũũ ũũĩ kana hiihi mũndũ ũcio agaakorwo e mũũgĩ kana e mũkĩĩgu? Na mũndũ ũcio agaagĩtuĩka mwene indo iria ndutĩire wĩra na ngahũthĩra ũũgĩ gũũkũ thĩ. O na ũguo wothe no tũhũ. 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Kwa ũguo nĩnderirire nĩ ũndũ wa wĩra wothe ndarutĩĩte gũũkũ thĩ. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Tondũ mũndũ aruta wĩra na ũũgĩ wake na ũmenyi, na ũũhĩgĩrĩru, indo icio no mũhaka agaacitiga irĩĩo nĩ mũndũ ũtaacinogeire. O na ũguo wothe no tũhũ na nĩ ũũru mũno." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Mũndũ-rĩ, nĩ kĩĩ arĩ nakĩo thuutha wa kwĩnogia na gwĩthĩĩnia rĩrĩa ekũruta wĩra gũũkũ thĩ?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Matukũ moothe ma ũtũũro wake makoragwo na mathĩĩna maingĩ mũno, na mĩtangĩko yake nĩ ya kũmũreehere kĩeha. O na ũtukũ, meciiria maake matihuurũkaga. O na ũguo wothe no tũhũ." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Gũtirĩ ũndũ ũngĩ mwega harĩ mũndũ gũkĩra arĩe, anyue, na ekenie na indo iria anogeire. Na o na ũguo nĩndamenyire atĩ uumaga harĩ Ngai." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Tondũ-rĩ, we atarĩ ho, mũndũ no ahote kũrĩa kana ekenie?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Amu Ngai nĩwe ũheaga mũndũ ũrĩa ũmũkenagia ũũgĩ, ũmenyo na gĩkeno, no mũndũ mwĩhia amũheaga wĩra wa gũthũkũma indo akĩigaga, nĩguo indo icio ikaaheeo mũndũ ũrĩa ũkenagia Ngai. O na ũguo wothe no tũhũ, na no ũndũ ũmwe na kũhũũra maaĩ na ndĩrĩ." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Ũndũ o wothe wĩkĩkaga gũũkũ thĩ, wĩkĩkaga o ihinda rĩrĩa Ngai aamũrĩĩte." 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Kũrĩ ihinda rĩa gũciarwo, na ihinda rĩa gũkua. Kũrĩ ihinda rĩa kũhanda na ihinda rĩa kũmunya." 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Kũrĩ ihinda rĩa kũũraga, na ihinda rĩa kũhonia. Kũrĩ ihinda rĩa gũtharia na ihinda rĩa gwaka." 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Kũrĩ ihinda rĩa kũrĩra na ihinda rĩa gũtheka. Kũrĩ ihinda rĩa gũcakaya na ihinda rĩa kũina. 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Kũrĩ ihinda rĩa gũkomania, na ihinda rĩtarĩ rĩa gũkomania. Kũrĩ ihinda rĩa kũhĩmbanĩria, na ihinda rĩa kwaga kũhĩmbanĩria." 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Kũrĩ ihinda rĩa gũcaria, na ihinda rĩa gũte. Kũrĩ ihinda rĩa gũcookanĩrĩria, na ihinda rĩa kũhuurunja." 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Kũrĩ ihinda rĩa gũtarũranga, na ihinda rĩa gũtuma. Kũrĩ ihinda rĩa gũkira, na ihinda rĩa kwaria." 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Kũrĩ ihinda rĩa kwendana, na ihinda rĩa kũmenana, Kũrĩ ihinda rĩa mbaara, na ihinda rĩa thaayũ." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Mũruti wa wĩra nĩ uumithio ũrĩkũ oonaga kuuma wĩra ũrĩa arutaga? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Nĩnyoneete mĩtangĩko ĩrĩa Ngai aheete andũ metangage nayo. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Indo ciothe nĩacithondekire i njagĩrĩru mahindainĩ maacio, o na nĩekĩrĩĩte wendo wa kũmenya maũndũ ma tene na tene, no o na kũrĩ o ro ũguo, mũndũ ndangĩmenya ũrĩa Ngai eekĩĩte kuuma kĩambĩrĩria nginya kĩrĩĩkĩrĩro." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Rĩu nĩndĩkĩmenyeete atĩ gũtirĩ ũndũ mwega harĩ andũ gũkĩra gũkena na gwĩkenia hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe marĩ muoyo. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 O na ngamenya atĩ nĩ kĩheeo kĩa Ngai kũrĩ mũndũ o wothe akarĩa, akanyua, na ageekenia na kĩrĩa anogeire." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ ũndũ o wothe wĩkagwo nĩ Ngai, ũtũũraga tene na tene; gũtirĩ ũndũ ũngĩongererwo harĩ guo, kana ũrutarutwo kuuma harĩ guo. Ngai eekire ũguo nĩ geetha andũ maikarage mamwĩtigĩrĩĩte." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Ũndũ o wothe wĩ kuo kana ũgaakorwo kuo-rĩ, wanakorwo kuo hĩndĩ ĩngĩ. Ngai nĩatũmaga ũndũ ũcio wĩkĩke maita maingĩ." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Makĩria ma ũguo nĩndoonire atĩ gũũkũ thĩ handũ harĩa haagĩrĩirwo gũkorwo na kĩhooto na ũthingu, hakoragwo na waganu." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Nĩndakĩĩĩrire na ngoro atĩrĩ, “Ngai agaatuĩra mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu na ũrĩa mwaganu, amu nĩathuurĩĩte ihinda rĩa ũndũ o wothe, o na rĩa wĩra o wothe.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ũhoro ũkoniĩ andũ, nĩndakĩĩĩrire na ngoro atĩ Ngai amageragia nĩguo amoonie atĩ o no ta nyamũ." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Amu o ũrĩa mũndũ arĩĩkagĩrĩria noguo nyamũ irĩĩkagĩrĩria, na ningĩ o ũrĩa mũndũ akuaga noguo nyamũ ĩkuaga. Mĩhũũmũ ya mũndũ na ya nyamũ no ũndũ ũmwe, na mũndũ ndakoragwo akĩrĩĩte nyamũ, amu muoyo harĩ cierĩ no tũhũ." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Andũ o hamwe na nyamũ meerekeire kũndũ kũmwe; andũ na nyamũ moimire tĩĩriinĩ, na andũ na nyamũ magacooka tĩĩriinĩ rĩngĩ." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Nũũ ũũĩ kana hiihi muoyo wa mũndũ wambataga na igũrũ naguo wa nyamũ ũgaikũrũka na thĩ? 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ngĩkĩmenya atĩ gũtirĩ ũndũ ũngĩ mwega gũkĩra mũndũ akenagĩre wĩra wake, amu rĩu nĩrĩo igai rĩake, na gũtirĩ ũndũ ũngĩtũma mũndũ amenye ũrĩa gũgeekĩka thuutha wa akua." 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Ngĩcooka ngĩrora ngĩona ũrĩa gũũkũ thĩ kwagĩĩte kĩhooto. Arĩa maahinyĩrĩirio nĩmaarĩraga na gũtiarĩ mũndũ wamoomagĩrĩria. Gũtiarĩ mũndũ wamoomagĩrĩria tondũ arĩa maamahinyagĩrĩria maarĩ na hinya. 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Nĩndeciiririe atĩ andũ arĩa makuĩte nĩ eega gũkĩra arĩa me muoyo," 
Ecclesiastes4:3 no arĩa eega makĩria yao oothe nĩ arĩa matarĩ maaciarwo, arĩa matarĩ moona maũndũ mooru marĩa meekagwo gũũkũ thĩ." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 O na ningĩ nĩndoonire atĩ mũndũ arutaga wĩra na akenogia nĩ ũndũ wa kũiguĩra mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ ũiru. O na ũguo no tũhũ na no ũndũ ũmwe na kũhũũra maaĩ na ndĩrĩ. 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Kwĩragwo atĩ mũndũ no akorwo arĩ mũkĩĩgu angĩĩnyiitanĩria ahũũte nginya akue. 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Hiihi ũguo no gũkorwo arĩ ma, no ningĩ-rĩ, nĩ kaba mũndũ akorwo arĩ na tũniini na aiguage aiganĩire, gũkĩra gũkoragwo akĩĩhang'ia na no maaĩ arahũũra na ndĩrĩ." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Ngĩcooka ngĩona o ũndũ ũngĩ wa tũhũ gũũkũ thĩ. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Kũrĩ mũndũ ũtũũraga arĩ wiki, ndarĩ mwana, kana mũndũ maciaranĩirwo, no hingo ciothe akoragwo akĩruta wĩra, na ndarĩ hingo aiguaga aiganĩire ũtongainĩ ũrĩa e naguo. Gũtirĩ hingo eyũragia atĩrĩ, “Ĩ nũũ ndĩrarutĩra wĩra ũũ o na ngeiima gĩkeno nĩ ũndũ wake?” O na ũguo no tũhũ na nĩ mũtũũrĩre ũtarĩ mwega." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Andũ eerĩ nĩ eega gũkĩra ũmwe, amu mũcaara wa wĩra wao nĩ mwega." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Tondũ ũmwe wao angĩgũa, ũcio ũngĩ nĩamuoyaga. No mũndũ angĩkorwo arĩ wiki angĩgũa, ndarĩ mũndũ ũngĩmuoya." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 O na ningĩ andũ eerĩ makoma hamwe nĩmaiguithanagia ũrugarĩ, no mũndũ angĩkoma arĩ wiki-rĩ, angĩĩiguithia ũrugarĩ atĩa?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Ningĩ mũndũ angĩũkĩrĩrwo nĩ mũndũ ũmwe no aremwo nĩkũmwĩtiiria, no marĩ eerĩ ndangĩmahoota. Mũhĩndo wogotheetwo na ndigi ithatũ ndũngĩtuĩka narua." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Nĩ kaba mũndũ mwĩthĩ mũũgĩ o na e mũthĩĩni gũkĩra mũthamaki mũkũrũ mũkĩĩgu ũtathikagĩrĩria mataaro. 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Tondũ mũndũ ũcio mwĩthĩ no oime njeera atuĩke mũthamaki, na ũcio ũngĩ no atige gũthamaka atuĩke mũthĩĩni." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Nĩndagĩĩciiririe ũhoro wa andũ oothe arĩa morũũraga gũũkũ thĩ, na ngĩmenya atĩ gatagatĩinĩ kaao nĩharĩ mũndũ mwĩthĩ ũrĩa ũgaacooka handũ ha mũthamaki." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Andũ arĩa mũthamaki aathaga nĩ aingĩ mũno, no akua, gũtirĩ mũndũ ũkenagĩra ũrĩa aaneeka. Arĩa magooka thuutha matigaakenio nĩ we. O na ũguo no tũhũ, na no ũndũ ũmwe na kũhũũra maaĩ na ndĩrĩ." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Menyerera mũthiĩre waku rĩrĩa ũgũtoonya nyũmba ya Ngai. Gũthiĩ kuo gũthikĩrĩria nĩ kwega gũkĩra magongoona ma irimũ, amu itikoragwo ikĩmenya atĩ nĩireka ũũru." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Tiga kũhiũhaga kwaria, kana kũhiũha kwĩrĩra Ngai kĩndũ. Ngai arĩ igũrũ nawe wĩ thĩ, kwoguo ciugo ciaku reke ikoragwo irĩ nyiinyi." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 O ũrĩa mũndũ akoragwo na mĩtangĩko mĩingĩ, noguo arootaga irooto njũru, na ningĩ o ũrĩa mũndũ araheana ũhoro mũingĩ noguo angiuga ũndũ wa ũrimũ." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Rĩrĩa werĩra Ngai kĩndũ, mũhingĩrie narua, amu we ndakenagio nĩ irimũ. Hingia ũrĩa ũmwĩrĩire." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Nĩ kaba kwaga kũmwĩrĩra kĩndũ gũkĩra kũmwĩrĩra ũcooke wage kũmũhingĩria. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Ndũgaatũme ciugo ciaku wee mwene itũme wĩhie, ndũkaae kwĩra mũrekio wa Ngai atĩ ndũkũgwatĩirie ũkiuga ũguo. Ũgũgĩtũma Ngai araakario nĩ mĩario yaku agĩthũũkangie wĩra wa mooko maaku nĩkĩ?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Amu o ũrĩa mwĩĩro wa ngoro ũrĩ mũingĩ, noguo mawĩra marĩ maingĩ, o na mĩario ya tũhũ. Ũndũ ũrĩa wĩ bata nĩgũtĩĩa Ngai." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ũngĩona thirikaari ĩkĩhinyĩrĩria mũthĩĩni, o na kĩhooto na ũũma ikĩaga kũrũmĩrĩrwo, ndũkagegeare nĩ ũhoro ũcio, amu mũtongoria akoragwo agitĩirwo nĩ ũrĩa mũnene kũmũkĩra, nao eerĩ makoragwo magitĩirwo nĩ ũngĩ mũnene kũmakĩra." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ, mũthamaki angĩrũmbũyania na ũrĩmi nĩagunaga andũ oothe arĩa arathamakĩra." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Mũndũ ũrĩa wendeete mbeeca ndaciiganagia, na ũrĩa wendeete gũtonga ndaiganagwo nĩ uumithio ũrĩa oonaga: o na ũguo no tũhũ." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 O ũrĩa indo cia mũndũ iraingĩha, noguo acirĩi maingĩhaga; na mwene cio ndarĩ uumithio oonaga tiga no kũmenya amenyaga atĩ nĩ mũtongu." 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Mũndũ wa kũrĩmia arĩĩte irio nyingĩ kana nyiinyi nĩakomaga toro mwega, no gĩtonga gĩkoragwo na indo nyingĩ ũguo atĩ ũtukũ kĩraaraga gĩkĩhahũkaga." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Nĩharĩ ũndũ mũũru mũno nyoneete gũũkũ thĩ, naguo nĩ mũndũ kwĩigĩra ũtonga wa gũkaahũthĩra abatara." 
Ecclesiastes5:14 No rĩĩrĩ, gũkagĩa na mũtino akĩonjorithia, ũtonga ũcio ũgathira agatigwo atarĩ kĩndũ gĩa gũkaagaywo nĩ ciana ciake." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 O ũrĩa mũndũ aaciarirwo nĩ nyina atarĩ kĩndũ, noguo agaathiĩ mooko matheri thuutha wa kũruta wĩra wa mĩnoga." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Ũguo nĩ ũũru mũno atĩ o ũrĩa mũndũ ookire noguo agathiĩ. Nĩ uumithio ũrĩkũ agĩaga naguo gũtũũra arutaga wĩra wa kũhũũra maaĩ na ndĩrĩ? 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Atũũraga matukũ maake moothe thĩinĩ wa nduma, kĩeha, mĩtangĩko, maraakara, na mĩrimũ." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, ũndũ ũrĩa nyoneete mwega na mwagĩrĩru nĩ mũndũ arĩe, anyue na ekenie na indo iria arutĩire wĩra gũũkũ thĩ matukũ maake manyiinyi marĩa aheetwo nĩ Ngai; rĩu nĩrĩo igai rĩake." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 O naake mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa Ngai aheete ũtonga, indo, o na hinya wa gwĩkenia nacio, niamũkĩre igai rĩake na ekenie na kĩrĩa arutĩire wĩra; kĩu nĩ kĩheeo kuuma kũrĩ Ngai." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Mũndũ ũcio ndangĩĩtanga na ũrĩa matukũ ma ũtũũro wake marĩ manyiinyi, tondũ Ngai nĩamwĩkĩrĩĩte gĩkeno ngoroinĩ yake." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Nĩharĩ ũndũ mũũru nyoneete gũũkũ thĩ, naguo nĩũritũhagĩra andũ mũno." 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Mũndũ ũrĩa Ngai aheaga ũtonga, gĩtĩĩo na indo atĩ we ndarĩ kĩndũ akoragwo abataire akaaga, Ngai ndamũheaga hinya wa gwĩkenia nacio, no mũndũ ũngĩ nĩ we ũcihũthagĩra. Ũguo no tũhũ na nĩ ũndũ mũũru mũno." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Mũndũ no agĩe na ciana igana, na atũũre matukũ maingĩ, no aage gwĩkenia na maũndũ marĩa makoragwo kuo ũtũũroinĩ na aage gũgaathikwo wega, niĩ ingiuga atĩ mũndũ ũcio nĩakĩrĩĩtwo nĩ kĩhuno." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Kĩhuno gĩtikoragwo kĩrĩ na bata amu kĩũragĩra ndumainĩ gĩkariganĩra. 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Makĩria ma ũguo-rĩ, gĩtikoragwo kĩoneete riũa kana gĩkamenya ũndũ, no nĩkĩonaga ũhuurũko gũkĩra mũndũ ta ũcio," 
Ecclesiastes6:6 o na angĩkorwo atũũrĩĩte mĩaka ngiri igĩrĩ, na aage gwĩkenia na ũndũ mwega o na ũmwe. Githĩ oothe matithiaga o kũndũ kũmwe?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Wĩra ũrĩa wothe mũndũ arutaga, aũrutaga nĩ ũndũ wa nda yake, na nda ndĩrĩ hĩndĩ ĩiganagia." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Mũndũ mũũgĩ akĩrĩĩte kĩrimũ na kĩ? Na ningĩ wega wa mũndũ mũthĩĩni kũmenya ũrĩa mũtũũrĩre wagĩrĩire nĩ ũrĩkũ? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kũiganĩra na kĩrĩa mũndũ arĩ na kĩo nĩ kwega gũkĩra mũndũ gũtũũra eriragĩria kũgĩa na indo makĩria. O na ũguo no tũhũ, na no ta kũhũũra maaĩ na ndĩrĩ." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Ũrĩa wothe wĩkĩkaga watuirwo o tene atĩ nĩũgeekĩka, na nĩkũĩkaine mũndũ nĩ kĩĩ, na ndangĩhota kũng'eng'ana na ũrĩa wĩ na hinya kũmũkĩra." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 O ũrĩa mũndũ aaragia mĩario mĩingĩ, noguo oigaga maũndũ ma tũhũ, nawe ndũrĩ mwega kũrĩ we." 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Amu nũũ ũngĩmenya kĩrĩa kĩega harĩ mũndũ matukũinĩ manyiinyi ma ũtũũro wake, marĩa mahĩtũkaga o ta kĩĩruru? Nũũ gũũkũ thĩ ũngĩmenya ũndũ ũrĩa mũndũ atũnganaga naguo arĩĩkia gũkua?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Ngumo njega nĩkĩrĩĩte maguta manungi wega ma goro, na mũthenya wa gũkua ũgakĩra wa gũciarwo." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Nĩ kaba gũthiĩ mũciĩ wĩ na macakaya gũkĩra gũthiĩ mũciĩ wĩ na iruga, amu andũ oothe maagĩrĩirwo nĩkũririkanaga atĩ marigĩrĩrio maao no gĩkuũ." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kĩeha nĩ kĩega kũrĩ mĩtheko, amu kĩeha gĩtukagia gĩthiithi, no gĩkoohĩgia ngoro." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩciiragia o ũhoro wa gĩkeno nĩ mũkĩĩgu, no mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩeciiragia o na ũhoro wa gĩkuũ." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Nĩ kaba mũndũ kũigua akĩrumwo nĩ mũndũ mũũgĩ gũkĩra kũigua akĩinĩrwo nĩ kĩrimũ. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Mĩtheko ya kĩrimũ ĩhaana ta ũrĩa mĩigua ĩtoorekaga ĩkĩhĩa, na o na ũguo no tũhũ." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ũtuunyani ũtũmaga mũndũ mũũgĩ atuuo kĩrimũ na ihaki nĩrĩthũũkagia ngoro ya mũndũ. 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Mũthia wa ũndũ o wothe nĩ mwega gũkĩra kĩambĩrĩria kĩaguo, na mũndũ mũkirĩrĩria nĩ mwega kũrĩ mũndũ mwĩtĩi." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Ndũkaahiũhage kũraakara, amu irimũ nĩcio ciigaga maraakara." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ndũkaanoorie atĩrĩ, “Maũndũ tene maarĩ meega gũkĩra rĩu nĩkĩ?” Amu ndũrooria ũguo nĩ ũndũ wa kũũhĩga." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Nĩ ũndũ wa bata mũndũ gũkorwo arĩ mũũgĩ, nĩ ũndũ mwega o ta kũheeo igai." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Amu ũũgĩ ũgitagĩra mũndũ o ta ũrĩa angĩgitĩrwo nĩ mbeeca, naguo wega wa ũmenyi nĩ atĩ, nĩũmenyagĩrĩra mũndũ ũrĩa wĩ naguo." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Tawĩciirie ũrĩa Ngai eekĩĩte. Nũũ ũngĩrũngaria kĩrĩa we athondekeete kĩrĩ kĩgonyoku? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Rĩrĩa maũndũ maaku marathiĩ wega-rĩ, kena; rĩrĩa marathiĩ ũũru, ririkana atĩ Ngai nĩ we ũtũmaga maũndũ macio meerĩ, na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ ũrĩa gũgaatuĩka thuuthainĩ." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ũtũũroinĩ wakwa wa tũhũ nĩnyoneete maũndũ moothe. Mũndũ mwega ahota gũkua na mũndũ mũũru atigwo arĩ o muoyo. 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Gĩtige gũtuĩka mũndũ mwega mũno kana mũũgĩ mũno. Ũreniina nĩkĩ? 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Tiga gũtuĩka mũndũ mwaganu mũno, kana mũndũ mũkĩĩgu mũno. Nĩ kĩĩ gĩgũtũma wende gũkua ihinda rĩaku rĩtarĩ ikinyu?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Wagĩrĩirwo nĩkwĩrigĩrĩria gũthiĩ mũno mwenainĩ o wothe wa ĩyo yerĩ. Angĩkorwo nĩũtĩĩĩte Ngai, nĩũkaahootana." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ũũgĩ nĩũtũmaga mũndũ agĩe na hinya gũkĩra athamaki ikũmi marĩ itũũrainĩ. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Nĩ ma thĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ wĩkaga wega hingo ciothe na gũtirĩ ũteehagia. 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Ndũgaathikĩrĩrie maũndũ moothe marĩa maaragio nĩ andũ amu wahota kũigua ndungata yaku ĩgĩkũruma," 
Ecclesiastes7:22 o na wee nĩũũĩ na ngoro yaku atĩ mahinda maingĩ wanaruma andũ angĩ. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Nĩndathuuthuuririe maũndũ macio moothe na ũũgĩ, ngĩkiuga atĩ nĩngũũhĩga, no ũũgĩ warĩ kũraaya na niĩ." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Mũndũ angĩhota kũmenya ũrĩa mũtũũrĩre uugĩĩte atĩa? Nĩ ũndũ mũrikĩru mũno harĩ ithuĩ na nĩ mũritũ mũno ndũngĩtũtaũkĩra. 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Nĩnderutĩire kũmenya, na kũmaatha gĩtũmi kĩa maũndũ, o na kũmenya ũũru wa waganu na ũrimũ ũrĩa arĩ ũgũrũki." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩndoonire ũndũ mũũru gũkĩra gĩkuũ, naguo nĩ mũndũ wa nja. Ngoro yake nĩ mũtego kana rũgara; mooko maake mangĩkũhĩmbĩria no ta bĩngũ. Mũndũ ũrĩa ũkenagia Ngai ndangĩnyiitĩka nĩ we, no mwĩhia nĩanyiitagwo nĩ we." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, ndamenyire ũndũ ũcio kahora o kahora ngĩgeria gũcaria gĩtũmi kĩa maũndũ. Ũguo nĩguo Mũhunjia ekuuga." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Nĩngereetie gwĩciiria ũhoro wa itũmi ingĩ mahinda maingĩ, no ndicionaga. Nĩnyoneete mũndũ mũrũme ũmwe harĩ andũ ngiri mwĩhokeku, no ndirĩ ndoona mũndũ wa nja o na ũmwe mwĩhoko." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, ũndũ ũmwe wiki ũrĩa nyoneete nĩ atĩ Ngai oombire andũ arũngĩrĩru, no o eene mageethombocania." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Nũũ ũtariĩ ta mũndũ mũũgĩ? Na nũũ ũũĩ ũrĩa maũndũ moigĩĩte?Ũũgĩ nĩũtũmaga ũthiũ wa mũndũ ũkenge, na ũthitu wa gĩthiithi gĩake ũgarũrũke." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Athĩkagĩra mawatho ma mũthamaki, na ndũkehĩtage mbere ya Ngai ũtagwatĩirie." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ehagĩrĩra mũthamaki; tiga gũikaraga hakuhĩ naake rĩrĩa maũndũ matarathiĩ wega, amu we eekaga o ũrĩa angĩenda." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Mũthamaki aaragia na ũnene, na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩkararia ũrĩa oiga." 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Mũndũ ũrĩa wathĩkagĩra watho ndarĩ hingo angĩona ũũru, na mũndũ wĩ na ũũgĩ nĩamenyaga ihinda rĩa kũwathĩkĩra na ũrĩa ekũwathĩkĩra." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Ũndũ o wothe nĩũrĩ ihinda rĩrĩa rĩwagĩrĩire na ũrĩa wagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩkwo, no ũmenyo wa mũndũ nĩ mũnyiinyi mũno." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Amu mũndũ ndamenyaga ũrĩa gũgũtuĩka, na gũtirĩ mũndũ wa kũmwĩra." 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Gũtirĩ mũndũ wĩ na hinya wa kũgiria akue, kana oige mũthenya ũrĩa agaakua. Ĩyo nĩ mbaara tũtangĩhota kweherera; na waganu ndũngĩhonokia arĩa meheanĩĩte kũrĩ guo." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Maũndũ maya ndamoonire hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndeciiragia ũhoro wa maũndũ moothe marĩa meekagwo gũũkũ thĩ, kũrĩa andũ amwe marĩ na ũnene, nao arĩa angĩ mahinyagĩrĩrio marĩ rungu rwao." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 O na nĩndoonire andũ aaganu magĩthikwo; o acio maamenyereete gũtoonyaga na kuumaga handũ harĩa hatheru, na nĩmaagĩkumagio o matũũrainĩ kũrĩa meekaga maũndũ mooru, o na ũguo no tũhũ." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Ngoro cia andũ ikoragwo kũna ciĩhaarĩirie gwĩka ũũru tondũ iherithia rĩa gwĩka maũndũ mooru rĩtiherithanagio narua. 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Mũndũ mwĩhia o na angĩĩka ũndũ mũũru maita igana, no athiaga na mbere gũtũũra muoyo. Niĩ nĩnjũũĩ atĩ nĩgũgaakorwo kũrĩ kwega harĩ andũ arĩa matĩĩĩte Ngai," 
Ecclesiastes8:13 no gũtigaakorwo kũrĩ kwega harĩ andũ arĩa aaganu. Matukũ maao magaathira o ta kĩĩruru tondũ matitĩĩĩte Ngai. 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Nĩkũrĩ ũndũ wa tũhũ ũthiaga na mbere thĩinĩ wa thĩ: atĩ andũ athingu makaherithio tondũ wa andũ aaganu, nao andũ aaganu makagaya iheeo cia andũ athingu; o na ũguo nguuga atĩ no tũhũ." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Kwa ũguo nĩnjũũĩ wega atĩ mũndũ aagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩkenia, amu gũtirĩ ũndũ ũngĩ mwega wa mũndũ gũũkũ thĩ tiga arĩe, anyue na ekenie. Maũndũ macio no ameeke ihindainĩ rĩa kwĩnogia matukũinĩ ma ũtũũro wake ũrĩa Ngai amũheete gũũkũ thĩ." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndeciiragia ũrĩa ingĩgĩa na ũũgĩ na menye ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa meekagwo gũũkũ thĩ nĩndamenyire atĩ mũndũ no aage toro ũtukũ na mũthenya 
Ecclesiastes8:17 na aage gũtaũkĩrwo nĩ ũrĩa Ngai areeka gũũkũ thĩ. O na mũndũ angĩgeria na hinya atĩa kũũmenya, ndangĩmenya; o na mũndũ mũũgĩ angiuga nĩoĩ, ndooĩ." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Nĩndeciiririe mũno ihinda iraaya ũhoro wa maũndũ macio moothe na ngĩona atĩ Ngai nĩ we wathaga andũ arĩa oogĩ na arĩa athingu ũrĩa megwĩka, o na angĩkorwo nĩkwendana kwao kana kũmenana kwao. Maũndũ moothe marĩa moonaga nĩ ma tũhũ" 
Ecclesiastes9:2 amu andũ arĩa athingu marĩĩkagĩrĩria o ta arĩa aaganu, arĩa eega na arĩa ooru, arĩa atheru na arĩa matarĩ atheru, arĩa marutaga magongoona na arĩa matarutaga. Mũndũ mwega na mũndũ mũũru nĩmahaanaine, na mũndũ wĩhĩtaga na ũteehĩtaga nĩmahaanaine." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ũyũ nĩguo ũũru ũrĩa ũkoragwo maũndũinĩ moothe marĩa meekagwo gũũkũ thĩ atĩ andũ oothe marĩĩkagĩrĩria o ũndũ ũmwe. Ningĩ ngoro cia andũ ikoragwo ciyũrĩĩtwo nĩ ũũru na ũgũrũki rĩrĩa me muoyo, na thuutha wa ũguo magakua." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 No ũrĩa ũrĩ thiritũ na arĩa marĩ muoyo nĩakoragwo na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro, amu ngui ĩrĩ muoyo nĩ njega kũrĩ mũrũũthi mũkuũ." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Tondũ arĩa me muoyo nĩmooĩ atĩ nĩmagaakua, no arĩa akuũ matirĩ ũndũ mooĩ, na matirĩ na mũcaara ũngĩ nĩmaariganĩire." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Naguo wendo wao, rũthũũro rwao, na merirĩria maao, ciothe ciakuuanĩire nao; na matigaacooka kũnyiitanĩra na andũ maũndũinĩ marĩa meekagwo gũũkũ thĩ." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Gĩthiĩ ũrĩe irio ciaku na gĩkeno, na ũnyue ndibei yaku ngoro ĩcanjamũkĩĩte, tondũ Ngai nĩetĩkĩrĩĩte ciĩko ciaku." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Hingo ciothe koragwo ũkeneete na ũcanjamũkĩĩte. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Wĩkenagie na mũtumia ũrĩa wee wendeete matukũinĩ maaku ma ũtũũro wa tũhũ marĩa Ngai akũheete gũũkũ thĩ, amu rĩu nĩrĩo igai rĩaku ũtũũroinĩ o na wĩrainĩ ũrĩa ũrutaga gũũkũ thĩ." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũrĩĩkaga-rĩ, wĩkage na hinya waku wothe, amu kũrĩa akuũ mathiaga gũtirĩ wĩra, gwĩciiria, ũmenyi, o kana ũũgĩ." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 O na nĩndamenyire atĩ gũũkũ thĩ mũndũ ũrĩa wĩ ihenya ti we ũhootanaga, na mbaara ndĩhootanagwo nĩ ũrĩa wĩ na hinya, na indo itionagwo nĩ andũ arĩa me na ũũgĩ, na ũtonga ndũgĩagwo nĩ arĩa marĩ na ũmenyi, na andũ arĩa marĩ na ũhoti matigĩaga na mũnyaka. No gĩkuũ na mũtino ikoraga andũ oothe." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ ihinda rĩake. Mũndũ anyiitagwo ihindainĩ rĩake rĩũru rĩrĩa aterĩgĩrĩire, o ta ũrĩa thamaki ĩnyiitagwo nĩ neti kana ta ũrĩa nyoni ĩnyiitagwo nĩ gĩkerenge." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 O na nĩndoonire ngerekano ĩno ya ũũgĩ gũũkũ thĩ na ngĩkĩona ĩ nene mũno. 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, nĩkwarĩ gatũũra kaniini kaarĩ na andũ mataarĩ aingĩ. Mũthamaki ũmwe warĩ na hinya nĩagookĩrĩire, agĩgathiũrũrũkĩria na agĩkĩĩhaarĩria kũmomorania thingo ciako." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 No rĩĩrĩ kũu gatũũrainĩ kau nĩgwatũũraga mũndũ ũmwe warĩ mũthĩĩni na mũũgĩ, naake agĩkĩhonokia gatũũra kau na ũũgĩ wake. No gũtirĩ mũndũ wacookire kũririkana mũndũ ũcio mũthĩĩni." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ngũkiuga atĩ ũũgĩ nĩ mwega kwĩ hinya o na gũtuĩka atĩ ũũgĩ wa mũndũ mũthĩĩni nĩũnyararagwo, na angiuga ũndũ, ndathikagĩrĩrio." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Ciugo cia mũndũ mũũgĩ ithikĩrĩirio hatarĩ inegene nĩ njega gũkĩra kũgũũthũka kwa mũthamaki arĩ gatagatĩinĩ ka irimũ. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Ũũgĩ nĩ mwega gũkĩra indo cia mbaara, no mũndũ ũmwe mwĩhia nĩathũũkangagia maũndũ maingĩ meega." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, ngi nguũ nĩtũmaga maguta manungi wega marute kĩheera kĩũru, naguo ũrimũ mũnyiinyi nĩwagithagia ũũgĩ na gĩtĩĩo kĩene." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Ngoro ya mũndũ mũũgĩ ĩmuonagĩrĩria gwĩka wega, no ngoro ya mũndũ mũkĩĩgu ĩmuonagĩrĩria gwĩka ũũru." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Ũkĩĩgu wake wĩyonanagia o na agĩthiĩ na njĩra, na nĩamenyekaga nĩ mũndũ o wothe atĩ nĩ mũkĩĩgu." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ũrĩa ũrathana angĩraakara nĩ ũndũ waku-rĩ, ndũkaae gũtiga wĩra, ũngĩkirĩrĩria no woherwo mahĩtia manene." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Nĩharĩ ũndũ mũũru nyoneete gũũkũ thĩ, na ũndũ ũcio uumanaga na ũrĩa ũrathana." 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, irimũ nĩinengagĩrwo itĩ nene wathaniinĩ, nacio itonga ikaagithio kĩene." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Nĩnyoneete ngombo ikuuĩĩtwo nĩ mbarathi, nao anene magathiĩ na magũrũ ta ngombo." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Mũndũ ũrĩa wenjaga irima nĩ we ũrĩgũaga, na mũndũ ũrĩa ũtũrĩkagĩria rũthingoinĩ nĩarũmagwo nĩ nyoka." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Mũndũ ũrĩa wenjaga mahiga nĩatiihagio nĩ mo, na mũndũ ũrĩa watũraga ngũ nĩatiihagio nĩcio." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ithanwa rĩngĩtuuha rĩage kũnoorwo, no mũhaka mũndũ egũmĩre akĩruta wĩra narĩo. No rĩĩrĩ, ũũgĩ nĩũteithagĩrĩria mũndũ kũhootana." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Nyoka ĩngĩrũma mũndũ mbere ya kũhoorerio, mũhooreria ndakĩrĩ na bata." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mĩario ya mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩtũmaga eendwo, no mĩario ya kĩrimũ nĩ yo ĩkĩrĩaga." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Kĩambagĩrĩria mĩario yakĩo na ciugo cia ũrimũ, na gĩkamĩrĩĩkia na ciugo cia ũgũrũki mũũru mũno." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Kĩrimũ gĩthiaga o na mbere kwaria.Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ ũrĩa gũgũtuĩka, na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngiuga ũrĩa gũgaatuĩka thuuthainĩ." 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Wĩra wa kĩrimũ ũkĩnogagia o nginya gĩkarigwo nĩ njĩra ya kũinũka. 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Bũrũri ũrĩa mũthamaki waguo arĩ mũndũ mwĩthĩ, na atongoria aaguo makoragwo na ndĩa rũũciinĩ kaĩ ũrĩ thĩĩna-ĩ!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Gũkena-rĩ, nĩ bũrũri ũrĩa mũthamaki waguo akoragwo e mũndũ ũheetwo gĩtĩĩo, na atongoria aaguo makoragwo na ndĩa mahindainĩ marĩa maagĩrĩire, nĩguo meyongerere hinya, na ti ũndũ wa ũrĩĩu." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Mũhũthia nĩũtũmaga nyũmba yure, naguo ũgũũta ũgatũma nyũmba ĩmomooke igũrũ." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Ndĩa nĩtũmaga andũ makene, nayo ndibei nĩcanjamũraga andũ, no ciothe ciumaga mbeeca." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Ndũkaanarume mũthamaki, o na ndũkaanamũrume na ngoro, o na ndũkaanarume gĩtonga o na wĩ kanyũmba gaaku ga toro, amu nyoni yahota gũkuua mĩario yaku ĩthiĩ ĩkameere ũrĩa ũroiga." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Onjorithia indo ciaku, na thuutha wa matukũ maniini nĩũkuona uumithio." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Cigayanie maita maingĩ ũcionjorithie haaha na haarĩa, amu ndũũĩ mũtino ũrĩa ũngĩoneka gũũkũ thĩ." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Matu mangĩiyũra mbura, yuraga gũũkũ thĩ, na mũtĩ ũngĩgũa mwena o ũrĩa ũrĩgũa, hau wagũa no ho ũikaraga." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũcũũthagĩrĩria rũhuuho ndangĩhanda, na mũndũ ũrĩa ũroraga matu ndangĩgetha." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 O ta ũrĩa ũtooĩ ũrĩa mũtumia oohaga nda, kaana gakaambĩrĩria gũkũra karĩ thĩinĩ wa nda yake, noguo ũtooĩ wĩra wa Ngai ũrĩa wombire indo ciothe." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Handa rũũciinĩ na hwaĩinĩ, amu ndũũĩ kana nĩ cia rũũciinĩ kana cia hwaĩinĩ ingĩagĩra, kana nĩ ciothe." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Ũtheri nĩ mwega, na kuona ũtheri wa riũa nĩ ũndũ wa gũkenerwo." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Mũndũ o na angĩtũũra muoyo mĩaka mĩingĩ-rĩ, nĩamĩtũũre yothe akeneete, no nĩaririkanage atĩ akua, matukũ ma nduma magaakorwo marĩ maingĩ. Namo maũndũ moothe marĩa mookaga thuutha no tũhũ mũtheri." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Wee mũndũ mwĩthĩ, kenagĩra wĩthĩ waku, matukũinĩ ma wĩthĩ waku ũikarage ũcanjamũkĩĩte. Ĩkaga ũrĩa ũkwenda, na ũhingagie wendi wa ngoro yaku, no ũmenyage wega atĩ Ngai nĩagaagũciirithia nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa wothe wĩkaga." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Eheria kĩeha gĩothe ngoroinĩ yaku, na weherie mathĩĩna moothe mwĩrĩinĩ waku. Amu ũnyiinyi na wĩthĩ no cia tũhũ." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Kwoguo ririkanaga mũkũũmbi matukũinĩ ma wĩthĩ waku, mbere ya matukũ ma ũũru gũkinya, na mĩaka ĩgĩkuhĩrĩrie rĩrĩa ũkoiga atĩrĩ, “Mũtũũrĩre wakwa ndũrangenia.”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ũtheri wa riũa, na wa mweri, o na wa njata ũgaatuĩka nduma, na gũtirĩ hingo gũtagaakorwo kwĩ matu ma mbura." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mooko maaku marĩa wĩgitagĩra namo nĩmakainaina, namo magũrũ maaku marĩa rĩu marĩ na hinya nĩmakaaga hinya, na magego maaku maremwo nĩgũtanuka irio nĩ ũndũ ti maingĩ, na maitho makorwo matekuona wega." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Matũ maaku matigaakorwo makĩigua o na inegene rĩrĩ njĩrainĩ. Ndũgaakorwo ũkĩigua inegene rĩa gĩthĩi gĩgĩthĩa, kana rwĩmbo rũkĩinwo, no inegene rĩa nyoni nĩrĩgaagũkĩria wĩ toro." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Nĩũgeetigagĩra kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru, na gũthiĩ na magũrũ gũgaakoragwo arĩ ũgwati. Njuĩrĩ yaku nĩkaagĩa mbuĩ na nĩũkaaremagwo o na nĩgwĩtwara na magũrũ maaku, merirĩria moothe nĩmagaathira.O mũndũ eerekeire mũciĩ wa tene na tene, na hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩgũgaacakaywo njĩrainĩ." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Mũgathĩ wa betha nĩũgaatuĩka, mbakũri ya thahabu ĩkue, mũhĩndo wa kũguucia maaĩ gĩthima ũtuĩke, nayo ndigithũ ĩgĩkue." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Naguo mwĩrĩ ũcooke tĩĩri o ta ũrĩa warĩ, naguo muoyo ũcooke kũrĩ Ngai ũrĩa waũheanire." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Mũhunjia ekuuga atĩ tũhũ wa tũhũ no tũhũ biũ. 
Ecclesiastes12:9 No tondũ Mũhunjia aarĩ mũũgĩ, nĩathiire na mbere kũruta andũ maũndũ marĩa ameenyeete. Nĩerutire thimo na akĩrora ũhoro wacio amenyereire mũno." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Mũhunjia ũcio nĩacaririe ciugo cia gũkenia andũ, na agĩciandĩka arũngĩrĩirie na i cia ma." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Ciugo cia andũ arĩa oogĩ ihaana ta mĩcengi, ĩrĩa arĩithi mahũthagĩra gũtongoria ng'ondu ciao na thimo icookanĩrĩirio itũũraga ta mĩcumaarĩ mĩhũũrĩre ĩkarũma, na iheanagwo nĩ Ngai, o we mũrĩithi witũ ithuothe." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Mwana wakwa, harĩ ũndũ ũngĩ ũmwe wagĩrĩirwo nĩkwĩmenyerera. Mabuku matitigaga kwandĩkwo, na gũthooma mũno nĩkwĩnogia." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Thuutha wa maũndũ macio moothe harĩ o ũndũ ũmwe tu wa kuuga: tĩyaga Ngai na ũhingagie maathani maake, amu ũcio nĩguo wĩra wothe wa mũndũ." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Tondũ Ngai nĩagaatuĩra ũndũ o wothe twĩkaga, ũrĩ mwega kana ũrĩ mũũru, o na ũndũ o wothe wĩkĩirwo hithoinĩ." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Rũũrũ nĩruo rwĩmbo rwega gũkĩra nyĩmbo ciothe rũrĩa Solomoni ainire. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Taamumunya na kanua gaaku; wendo waku-rĩ, nĩ mwega gũkĩra ndibei." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Maguta macio wĩhakĩĩte me na mũtararĩko mwega; rĩĩtwa rĩaku no ta maguta macio.Hatirĩ mũirĩĩtu o na ũmwe ũtakwendeete. 
SongOfSongs1:4 Njoya ũũre na niĩ; gĩtuĩke mũthamaki wakwa na ũndoonyie o nyũmba thĩinĩ.Kũu nĩkuo tũgũthiĩ gwĩkeneria, tũkĩrikĩrie wendo hatarĩ na itherũ.Hatirĩ na nganja andũ a nja oothe nĩmakwendeete!" 
SongOfSongs1:5 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, andũ aya a nja a Jerusalemu! ndĩ mũirũ, no ndĩ o mũthaka, njirĩĩte o ta hema cia Kedarino ngathakara o ta mbathiya ĩrĩ mũciĩ gwa Solomoni." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Mũtikaamenere ũirũ wakwa, atĩ nĩ ũndũ nĩnjinĩĩtwo nĩ riũa.Nĩ aariũ a maitũ mandaakarĩire,magĩkĩndutithia wĩra mũgũndainĩ wa mĩthabibũ, ngĩkĩaga mahinda ma gwĩthakaria." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Tanjĩĩra atĩrĩ wee mwendwa wakwa, ũrĩrĩithia ũhiũ waku kũ? Ningĩ-rĩ, ũrĩarahia rũũru rwaku ha?Nĩ kĩĩ gĩgũtũma njikare njagaagĩĩte ngĩgũcaria gatagatĩinĩ ka ndũũru cia arĩithi angĩ?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Kaĩ ũtooĩ handũ hau nĩ ha, o wee ũthakarĩĩte kũrĩ andũ a nja oothe?Kiumagare ũrũmĩrĩre rũũru; ũkarĩiithie mbũri ciaku hakuhĩ na hema cia arĩithi." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ we mwendwa wakwa, ũtũmaga arũme mahĩahĩe o ta ũrĩa mbarathi ya mũgoma ĩtũmaga mbarathi cia njamba cia kũguucia ngaari cia mũthamaki wa Misiri ihĩahĩe." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Njuĩrĩ ciaku nĩ thaka mũno igwĩrĩire makai maaku na ikaagĩria ngingo yaku ta mĩgathĩ. 
SongOfSongs1:11 No ithuĩ na ithuĩ nĩtũgũgũthondekera mĩgathĩ ya thahabu ĩgemeetio na tũbungo twa betha. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Mũthamaki wakwa nĩgũkoma arakomeete gĩtandainĩ gĩake. Namo maraaci maakwa maragĩkĩĩyũria kũu arakomeete mũtararĩko mwega. 
SongOfSongs1:13 Mwendwa wakwa e na mũtararĩko ta wa manemane, akomeire nyondo ciakwa." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Mwendwa wakwa atariĩ o ta mahũa ma gĩthaka macanũkĩĩte mĩgũndainĩ ya mĩthabibũ kũu Enigedi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Mwendwa wakwa, ĩ ndũkĩrĩ mũthaka! Maitho maaku maiyũire wendo!" 
SongOfSongs1:16 Ĩ ndũkĩrĩ mũthaka mũraata wakwa; nĩũngenagia mũno!Nyeki nduru nĩ yo ĩgũtuĩka ũrĩrĩ witũ," 
SongOfSongs1:17 mĩtarakwa ĩtuĩke mĩratho ya nyũmba iitũ, nayo mĩkarakaba ĩtuĩke mĩitĩrĩro." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Niĩ ndĩ o ihũa rĩa gĩthaka rĩmereete Sharoni, o gĩtooka kĩrĩ gĩtuambainĩ." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Ta gĩtooka gĩgĩkũra gatagatĩ ka mĩigua, noguo mwendwa wakwa atariĩ e gatagatĩ ka andũ a nja arĩa angĩ." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Ta mũcungwa ũgĩkũra gatagatĩ ka mĩtĩ ya gĩthaka, no taguo mwendwa wakwa atariĩ e gatagatĩ ka arũme arĩa angĩ.Nĩnyendeete gũikara hakuhĩ naake na nĩangenagia mũno." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Nĩ we wandeehire gũũkũ irugainĩ rĩake naguo wendo wake ũgĩkĩingĩha mũno harĩ niĩ. 
SongOfSongs2:5 Heei thabibũ cinjĩkĩre hinya, na macungwa maanyootore tondũ ndĩmũrũarie nĩ wendo." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Guoko gwake kwa ũmotho ta nĩkũũnyiite igoti, nakuo kwa ũrĩo gũkĩĩhĩmbĩrie." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Inyuĩ andũ a nja a Jerusalemu, mwĩhĩteei, na thiiya na thwariga cia werũ, atĩ mũtigũtoonyerera wendo witũ."
