SongOfSongs2:8 Nĩndĩraigua mũgambo wa mwendwa wakwa! Nĩgũũka arooka ookĩĩte akĩrũũgarũũgaga irĩmainĩ, o na agĩcimbicaga ithũngũriinĩ." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Mwendwa wakwa atariĩ ta thwariga, o na ta thiiya ya njamba.Nĩ ũcio wĩhithĩĩte na hau rũthingoinĩ rwa na nja nĩkũrorereria ararorereria na ndirica na agacũũthĩrĩria na mwanya." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Mwendwa wakwa nĩkũnjarĩria aranjarĩria. 
SongOfSongs2:11 Hĩndĩ ya heho nĩ rĩthiru, mbura nĩtigĩĩte kuura;" 
SongOfSongs2:12 thĩ nĩĩrakunũka mahũa, hĩndĩ ya magetha nĩ nginyu,nacio ndutuura nĩiraiguĩka ikĩina." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Ngũyũ-rĩ, nĩciambĩrĩirie kwĩrua, o na ningĩ kwĩ na mũtararĩko mwega wa kĩro kĩa mĩthabibũ.Mũraata wakwa, o wee mwendwa wakwa, gĩũkĩre tũthiĩ." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Wee ũhaana ndutuura ĩhithĩĩte ndwaroinĩ cia mahiga.Takĩreke nyone ũthiũ ũcio waku mũthaka ũguo, o na njigue mũgambo ũcio waku mũnyoroku ũguo." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Nyiita mbwe o na ciana ciacio, itigathũũkie kĩro kĩa mĩthabibũ iitũ." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Mwendwa nĩ wakwa, na niĩ ndĩ wake; arĩithagia ũhiũ wake itookainĩ" 
SongOfSongs2:17 o nginya rĩrĩa kũrĩrura nacio ciĩruru ikorwo ithirĩĩte.Hũndũka mwendwa wakwa, o ta thwariga o na ta thiiya ya njamba ĩrĩ irĩmainĩ cia Betheli." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Ũtukũ o ũtukũ, ndĩ toro, njethaga ũcio mwendwa wakwa, ndĩmũcaragia ngamwaga. ndĩmwĩtaga na ndanjĩtĩkaga" 
SongOfSongs3:2 Njũkagĩra ngacangacanga itũũrainĩ, ngoorũũra barabarainĩ o na njĩrainĩ, ngĩcaria ũcio mwendwa wakwa, ndĩmũcaragia o nakuo ngamwaga." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Arangĩri makĩrangĩra itũũra makangora, ngamooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩmuoneete mwendwa wakwa?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Ndatigana nao o ro ũguo, ngamuona, ngamũhĩmbĩria na ndĩmũrekie, o nginya ngamũtoonyia kwa maitũ nyũmba.Ngakĩmũtoonyia o nyũmba ya thĩinĩ harĩa ndaciarĩirwo." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Inyuĩ andũ a nja a Jerusalemu, mwĩhĩteei na thiiya na thwariga cia werũ, atĩ mũtigũtoonyerera wendo witũ." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Nũũ ũrĩa ũrambata akiuma na werũinĩ acomokeete ta ndoogo ĩgĩthiĩ na igũrũ, arĩ na mũtararĩko wa manenane na ũbaani, o na wa maraaci marĩa meendagio nĩ ahũũri a mbiacara?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Nĩ Solomoni ũrooka akuuĩĩtwo na gĩtĩ gĩake, arangĩirwo nĩ njamba mĩrongo ĩtandatũ, njamba iria cia bata mũno thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Ciothe nĩciũũĩ kũhũthĩra hiũ cia njora wega, ciothe nĩ njoorua cia mbaara,o njamba ĩhotoreete rũhiũ rwayo njohero, ĩhaarĩirie kũrũa kũngĩoneka ũgwati ũtukũ." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Mũthamaki Solomoni nĩatumithĩĩtie gĩtĩ gĩa gũkuuagwo nakĩo. Agĩthondekithĩĩtie na mbaaũ iria njega mũno cia Lebanoni. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Magũrũ maakĩo magemeetio na betha, na mwĩtiiro wa kĩo ũgemeetio na thahabu.Harĩa haikaragĩrwo hagemeetio na gĩtambaya kĩa rangi wa babũ, kĩgemeetio na wendo nĩ andũ a nja a Jerusalemu." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Andũ a nja a Zayuni, gĩũkeei mwĩrorere mũthamaki Solomoni.Ehumbĩĩte thũmbĩ ĩrĩa nyina aamwĩkĩrire mũthenya wa kũhikania, o mũthenya ũrĩa aiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ gĩkeno." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Ĩ mwendwa wakwa ndũkĩrĩ mũthaka; kaĩ wĩ mũthaka-ĩ!Maitho maaku maiyũire wendo ngĩmoonera gĩtambayainĩ kĩu gĩa gĩcungi wĩhumbĩire nakĩo mũtwe.Ũracimbicia njuĩrĩ yaku o ta rũũru rwa mbũri, rũgĩcimbica ruumĩĩte irĩmainĩ cia Gileadi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Magego maaku merũhĩĩte o ta guoya wa ng'ondu warĩĩkia gũthambio na gũcanũrwo.Hatirĩ o na rĩmwe rĩmunye, moothe maiyũire kanua." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Iromo ciaku nĩ nduune wega; ĩ itionekaga irĩ thaka rĩrĩa ũkwaria!Makai maaku marakenga wega makĩonekera, gĩtambayainĩ kĩu gĩa gĩcungi wĩhumbĩire nakĩo mũtwe." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Ngingo yaku ĩtendereete na ikanyoroka ta mũnaara wa Daudi; mũgathĩ ũrĩa wĩkĩrĩĩte no ta ngo ngiri imĩthiũrũrũkĩirie. 
SongOfSongs4:5 Nyondo ciaku itariĩ ta mahatha ma thwariga o na kana mahatha ma thiiya makĩrĩa itookainĩ. 
SongOfSongs4:6 Ngũikara kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa manemane, o kĩu kĩ na mũtararĩko mwega wa ũbaani, o nginya gũkĩe na nduma ithire." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Ĩ mwendwa wakwa ndũkĩrĩ mũthaka; kaĩ wĩ mũthaka-ĩ! 
SongOfSongs4:8 Ũka, mũhiki wakwa, tũikũrũke kuuma irĩmainĩ cia Lebanoni, ũka tũikũrũke kuuma Lebanoni.Ũka tũikũrũke tuume gacũmbĩrĩ ga kĩrĩma kĩa Amana, na tuume gacũmbĩrĩ ga kĩrĩma gĩa Seniru na kĩa Herimoni, kũrĩa mĩrũũthi na ngarĩ itũũraga." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, wee mwendwa wakwa, o we mũhiki wakwa,ndoona maitho maaku o na mũgathĩ ũrĩa wĩkĩrĩĩte, ndoorwo nĩ hinya." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, wee mwendwa wakwa, o wee mũhiki wakwa, wendo waku nĩũnjanjamũraga.Wendo waku wĩ cama gũkĩra ndibei, maraaci maaku maratararĩka wega gũkĩra indo ciothe nungi wega." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Mĩromo yaku ĩtaataga ũũkĩ, wee mwendwa wakwa, rũrĩmĩ rwaku no ta iria na ũũkĩ harĩ niĩ; nguo ciaku irĩ na mũtararĩko o ta wa Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, wee mwendwa wakwa, o we mũhiki wakwa, ũhaana ta mũgũnda mũirĩgĩre, o ta mũgũnda mũgitĩre, o na ta gĩthima kĩirĩgĩre" 
SongOfSongs4:13 kũrĩa mĩmera ĩkũraga wega.Ĩkũraga ĩkahaana o ta mũgũnda wa mĩkongomanga ĩgaciaraga matunda meega mũno. Kũu nĩkũrĩ mĩhanuni, o na mĩmera ĩrĩa yumaga undi," 
SongOfSongs4:14 manjano, irago, mĩndarathini, mĩmera yothe ĩrĩa yumaga ũbaani; manemane na thubiri, hamwe na mĩmera ĩrĩa ĩkĩrĩĩtie ĩrĩa ĩngĩ kũnunga wega." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Ũhaana o ta mũgũnda ũraitĩrĩrio maaĩ nĩ ithima, ithima cia maaĩ maratherera, o tũrũũĩ tũrathothoka irĩmainĩ cia Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Arahũka, wee rũhuuho rwa na rũgongo, nawe rũhuuho rwa na kĩanda huruutana mũgũndainĩ wakwa, nĩguo ũtararĩke wega mũno.Kĩreke mwendwa wakwa ooke mũgũndainĩ wake nĩ geetha ekenie na matunda maaguo marĩ mũrĩo mũno." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, wee mwendwa wakwa, o wee mũhiki wakwa, nĩndĩratoonya mũgũnda wakwa, ndĩramaatha indo nungi wega o na manemane, ngarĩa magua maakwa marĩa me na ũũkĩ, na nganyua ndibei yakwa o na iria." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ndĩrakomeete, no nĩndĩreiguaga. Ndĩraroota mwendwa wakwa akĩringaringa mũrango." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Nĩndutĩĩte nguo, na ndigũcicookia; nĩndĩthambĩĩte magũrũ na ndigũkinya thĩ rĩngĩ." 
SongOfSongs5:4 Mwendwa wakwa aragĩthukia mũrango, na niĩ ndĩrethithimũkwo." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ndĩragĩũkĩra hingũrĩre mwendwa wakwa, ndĩrakĩnyiita karĩnga ka mũrango, na mooko maakwa maiyũire manemane, na ciara irataata manemane o ĩrĩa ndweku." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ndĩrakĩhingũrĩra mwendwa wakwa, no nĩararĩĩkĩĩtie gũthiĩ.Ĩ ndigũkeneete ndaigwa akĩaria!Ndakĩmũcaria no ndinamuona; ndakĩmwĩta no ndananjĩtĩka." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Arangĩri a itũũra makĩrangĩra itũũra mangora, mahũũra mandiihangia,arangĩri arĩa moima hakuhĩ na rũthingo manduta nguo yakwa." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Inyuĩ andũ a nja a Jerusalemu ndamũthaitha mũngĩona ũcio mwendwa wakwa,mwĩreei atĩ ndĩmũrũarie nĩ wendo." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Wee nyarari ĩno, kaĩ mwendwa waku akĩrĩĩte arũme arĩa angĩ na kĩ? Amakĩrĩĩtie kĩ nĩguo ũtwĩhĩtithie?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Mwendwa wakwa nĩ mũthaka na mũrũngarũ, nĩ mwega gũkĩra arũme oothe." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Ũthiũ wake ũkengaga ta thahabu, njuĩrĩ yake nĩ yakĩgondoka nĩ njirũ ciri." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Maitho maake mathakarĩĩte o ta ndutuura ciikaire rũteereinĩ rwa karũũĩ,ihaana ta ithambĩĩtio na iria igathera cua." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Makai maake nĩ mathaka ta mũgũnda ũiyũire indo nungi wega.Mĩromo yake nĩ ta itooka; yororoetio nĩ manemane ndweku. 
SongOfSongs5:14 Mooko maake moombĩĩtwo o ũũ wega, eekĩrĩĩte mbete igemeetio na tũhiga twa goro.Mwĩrĩ wake ũtendereete ta mũguongo, na ũkagemio na mĩgathĩ ya tũhiga twa goro twa rangi wa mburuu." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Magũrũ maake nĩ marũngarũ na matirĩ mbogoro.Maũũthĩ maake mathakarĩĩte ta irĩma cia Lebanoni agakĩrũngara ta mĩtarakwa yakuo. 
SongOfSongs5:16 Mũgambo wake nĩ mũnyoroku mũno, naake nĩ wa kwendeka mũno.Atĩrĩĩrĩ, andũ a nja a Jerusalemu, ũguo nĩguo mwendwa wakwa ahaana." 
SongOfSongs6:1 We nyarari ĩno, kaĩ mwendwa waku agĩthiĩte kũ? Agerire njĩra ĩrĩkũ nĩguo tũgũteithie kũmũcaria?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Mwendwa wakwa nĩathiĩte mũgũnda gwake, kũrĩa akũragia indo nungi wega.Nĩkũrĩithia ararĩithia kuo agĩtuaga itooka." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Mwendwa wakwa nĩ wakwa ki, na niĩ ndĩ wake; nĩkũrĩithia ararĩithia itookainĩ." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, mwendwa wakwa, ũthakarĩĩte o ta itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu, ningĩ ũkaagĩrĩra o ta itũũra rĩa Tiriza, ũgakĩgĩa itua nda o ta matũũra maya manene." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Tiga kũndora, nĩũranguucĩrĩria mũno.Ũracimbicia njuĩrĩ yaku o ta rũũru rwa mbũri rũgĩcimbica ruumĩĩte irĩmainĩ cia Gileadi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Magego maaku merũhĩĩte o ta rũũru rwa ng'ondu rwathambio o ro ũguo.Hatirĩ o na rĩmwe rĩmunye; moothe maiyũire kanua. 
SongOfSongs6:7 Makai maaku marakenga wega makĩonekera gĩtambayainĩ kĩu wĩhumbĩire nakĩo mũtwe. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Mũthamaki e na ngatha mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na atumia a kũigwo mĩrongo ĩnaana o na airĩĩtu matangĩtarĩka! 
SongOfSongs6:9 No rĩĩrĩ, no ũmwe nyendeete. Ũcio nĩwe ngatha yakwa.Nyina ndarĩ mũirĩĩtu ũngĩ, na no ko kaana karĩa nyina eendeete.Andũ a nja mamuona, no kũmũgaathĩrĩria mamũgaathĩrĩria. Naake kwini na atumia a kũigwo a mũthamaki no kũmuugĩra maamuugagĩra ngemi." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Mwarĩ ũyũ nĩ ũrĩkũ ũthakarĩĩte ta ruoro rũgĩtema? Nĩ mũthaka na nĩarakenga; arametameta o ta riũa kana ta mweri. 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ndaikũrũkire mũgũnda wa mĩroothi, ngarore tũmĩtĩ tũrĩa tũmereete kũu kĩandainĩ, ngoone kana mĩthabibũ nĩthundũrĩĩte, na kana mĩkongomanga nĩ mĩrutu kĩro." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Nĩndĩrainaina, ũtũmĩĩte nyootere wendo o ta ũrĩa ndereba wa ngaari ya mbarathi ya ita anyootagĩra mbaara." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Kĩrũũgarũũge ũkĩinaga; kĩrũũgarũũge ũkĩinaga, wee mwarĩ wa Shulamu; kĩrũũgarũũge ũkĩinaga tũkwĩroreire." 
SongOfSongs7:1 Ĩ magũrũ maaku, mwarĩ ũyũ wa mũnene, wĩkĩrĩĩte nyamũga ti mathaka! Ciero ciaku ihaana ta ici ithondekeetwo nĩ mũthondeki njoorua." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Mũkonyo waku no ta kanya gataniaraga ndibei nungĩrĩrie indo nungi wega.Nda yaku na yo ĩhaana ta kĩhumbu kĩa ngano ngonyore gĩthiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ itooka. 
SongOfSongs7:3 Nyondo ciaku itariĩ ta mahatha ma thwariga kana mahatha ma thiiya. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Ngingo yaku ĩcomookeete ta mũnaara wa mũguongo.Namo maitho maaku no ta maaĩ marĩ itũũrainĩ rĩa Heshiboni, o hakuhĩ na kĩhingo gĩa itũũra rĩu inene.Iniũrũ rĩaku narĩo rĩthakarĩĩte o ta mũnaara wa Lebanoni ũrĩa ũrorereirie Damasiki." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Mũtwe waku ũgũthakarĩĩtie o ta kĩrĩma gĩa Karimeli, makundo ma njuĩrĩ ciaku mairĩĩte kiri, ũirũ wamo ũgakĩguucĩrĩria mũthamaki." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Kaĩ wĩ mwega na mũthaka-ĩ! Kaĩ wendo waku nĩũkenagia mũndũ-ĩ! 
SongOfSongs7:7 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, ũrũngarĩĩte o ta mũkĩndũ nacio nyondo ciaku ihaana ta tũmanjika twa ngĩndũ." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Nĩngũhaica o mũkĩndũ igũrũ, ngeetuĩre ngĩndũ.Nyondo ciaku ituĩkĩĩte harĩ niĩ ta tũmanjika twa thabibũ, nayo mĩheehũ yaku ituĩkĩĩte ta mũtararĩko wa macungwa." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Kanua gaaku gatuĩkĩĩte ta ndibei ĩrĩa njega mũno. 
SongOfSongs7:10 Niĩ-rĩ, ndĩ wa mwendwa wakwa, naake nĩ niĩ eriragĩria." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Ũka, mwendwa wakwa, tuumagare tũthiĩ mĩgũndainĩ, tũkaraarĩrĩre matũũrainĩ." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Tũkaarooka gũkĩra rũũciinĩ tene tũthiĩ mĩgũndainĩ ya mĩthabibũ, tũkarore kana mĩthabibũ nĩthundũrĩĩte, kana nĩyambĩrĩirie kũruta kĩro,o na kana mĩkongomanga nĩrutĩĩte kĩro.Kũu nĩkuo ngaakuoneria ũrĩa ngwendeete." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Nĩ hĩndĩ matunda marĩa mahaana nathi maratararĩka, na mũrangoinĩ haitũ haiyũire matunda moothe marĩa meega.Atĩrĩĩrĩ mwendwa wakwa, matunda marĩa ndatuire na marĩa ndatua moothe nĩwe njigĩire." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Naarĩ korwo ũrĩ mũrũ wa maitũ, ũrĩa maitũ oongithirie nyondo ciake!Hĩndĩ ĩyo no ngũmumunye o na ingĩcemania nawe njĩrainĩ,na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩnduĩra." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ingĩgũtoonyia o nyũmba kwa maitũ, kũu nĩkuo ũngĩnjiguithĩria ũhoro wa wendo.Ingĩkũhe ndibei ĩrĩa njĩkĩre indo nungi wega,ũkĩnyue ngogoyo ya ikongomanga rĩakwa." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Guoko gwaku kwa ũmotho gũkĩĩnyiite o igoti, nakuo kwa ũrĩo gũkĩĩhĩmbĩrie." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Inyuĩ andũ a nja a Jerusalemu, ndamũthaitha mwĩhĩteei, atĩ mũtigũtoonyera wendo witũ." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Nũũ ũyũ ũrambata akiuma na werũinĩ anyiitanĩĩte mooko na mwendwa wake? 
SongOfSongs8:6 Wendo waku tanĩũtuĩke o wakwa nyiiki, ndũkaanamumunye mũndũ wa nja ũngĩ o tiga niĩ.Wendo-rĩ, wĩ hinya gwĩ gĩkuũ, wendo wĩ hinya o ta gĩkuũ kĩo kĩnene.Ũrĩrĩmbũkaga ta mwaki, ũgaakana ta mwaki ũtangĩhoreka." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Wendo ndũngĩhorio nĩ maaĩ; o na kana ũtwarwo nĩ kĩguũ.O na mũndũ angĩruta ũtonga wake agũre wendo, no gũconorwo angĩconorwo." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Tũrĩ na kairĩĩtu ka maitũ, nako gatiumĩĩtie nyondo. Rĩu-rĩ, tũgaageeka atĩa rĩrĩa gagaakinya ga kwarĩrio nĩ arũme?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Kangĩgaatuĩka ta rũthingo, tũgaagaakĩrĩra mũnaara wa betha.Kangĩgaatuĩka ta mũrango, tũgaakagitira na rũirigo rwa mbaaũ cia mĩtarakwa." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Niĩ ndĩ o rũthingo, nacio nyondo ciakwa no ta tũmĩnaaratwa rũthingo rũu.Mwendwa wakwa nĩoĩ atĩ tũrĩ naake, nĩnjiguaga njiganĩire na ngoona thaayũ." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomoni-rĩ, arĩ na mũgũnda wake wa mĩthabibũ handũ heetagwo Baali Hamoni. Mũgũnda ũcio aũkomborithĩĩtie andũ a kũrĩma, na o mũndũ amũrĩhaga icunjĩ cia betha ngiri ĩmwe (1,000)." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Solomoni arigagia na icunjĩ cia betha ngiri ĩmwe (1,000), nao arĩmi acio makarigia na betha magana meerĩ (200); no niĩ ndĩ na mũgũnda wakwa kĩũmbe wa mĩthabibũ." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, wee mwendwa wakwa, takĩreke njigue ũkĩnjarĩria ũrĩ mũgũnda; araata aakwa nĩmeetereire kũigua mũgambo waku." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Hiũha, mwendwa wakwa, o ta thiiya kana thwariga ya njamba, yumĩĩte irĩmainĩ kũrĩa gũkũraga indo nungi wega." 
Isaiah1:1 Ibuku rĩĩrĩ rĩ na ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa Isaia mũrũ wa Amozu aaguũrĩirio nĩ Ngai ĩkoniĩ bũrũri wa Juda na Jerusalemu. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩrĩo Uzia, Jothamu, Ahazu, na Hezekia maathamakaga bũrũriinĩ wa Juda." 
Isaiah1:2 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, wee igũrũ, ta thikĩrĩria; o na we thĩ, tatega matũ.Tondũ MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ,“Ndereete ciana ikaigana, nacio nĩinemeete." 
Isaiah1:3 Ndeegwa nĩyũĩ mwene yo, ndigiri nĩyũĩ harĩa mũmĩathi amĩheagĩra irio, no Isiraeli ndooĩ, andũ aakwa matirĩ ũmenyo.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Inyuĩ rũũrĩrĩ rwĩhia, andũ maritũhĩirwo nĩ meehia, kĩruka kĩa eeki naaĩ o na gĩa ciana nemi.Nĩ gũkorwo nĩmũtiganĩirie MWATHANI, mũkamenereria Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli, na mũkamũhuutatĩra o biũ." 
Isaiah1:5 Kaĩ mũkwenda gũtũũra mũhũũragwo? Mũragĩthiĩ na mbere kũrema nĩkĩ?Mũtwe wothe ũiyũire ironda, nayo ngoro ĩkaaga hinya." 
Isaiah1:6 Kuuma ikinya kinya mũtwe hatirĩ handũ hagima tiga o ironda, ironda iroira thakame.Ningĩ ti hihire kana ikoohwo, o na kana igaitĩrĩrio maguta." 
Isaiah1:7 Bũrũri wanyu ũkirĩĩte ihooru, matũũra maanyu namo nĩmacine na mwaki, mĩgũnda yanyu ĩranangwo nĩ ageni mwĩroreire; bũrũri wothe ũkirĩĩte ihooru ta ũng'aũranĩĩtio nĩ andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ." 
Isaiah1:8 No itũũra rĩa Zayuni rĩtigĩĩtwo rĩhaana ta gĩthũnũ mũgũndainĩ wa mĩthabibũ, ta rũtara mũgũndainĩ wa marenge, na ta itũũra rĩrigiicĩirio nĩ thũ." 
Isaiah1:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, tiga MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe aarekire andũ amwe matigare, itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu rĩngĩahaanire o ta Sodomu na Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Wee Jerusalemu, atongoria aaku o hamwe na andũ aaku, mũhaana o ta andũ a Sodomu na Gomora!Thikĩrĩriai ũrĩa MWATHANI aramwĩra, athĩkĩraai ũrutani wa Ngai witũ." 
Isaiah1:11 MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ, “Mũndutagĩra magongoona maingĩ ma kĩ?Nĩnjiganĩĩtie magongoona maanyu ma gũcinwo ma ndũrũme, na ma maguta ma nyamũ cianyu iria noru. Thakame ya ndeegwa, ndũrũme o na ya thenge nĩĩnogeetie." 
Isaiah1:12 Nũũ ũmwĩrĩĩte mũndeehagĩre indo icio ciothe rĩrĩa mũrooka gũũthaathaiya? Nũũ ũmwĩrĩĩte mũrangarangage Hekaarũ yakwa? 
Isaiah1:13 Tigaai kũndutĩra magongoona matarĩ kĩene. Mũnungo wa ũbaani ũrĩa mũcinaga ndũngenagia o na haniini.Ndingĩhota kũũmĩrĩria maruga maanyu ma karũũgamo ka mweri, ma thabatũ cianyu o na marĩa mangĩ maathane.Igomano cianyu ciothe nĩithaahagio nĩ meehia maanyu." 
Isaiah1:14 Nĩthũire na ngoro yakwa yothe maruga maanyu ma karũũgamo ka mweri na maruga marĩa mangĩ maathane. Nĩmatuĩkĩĩte mũrigo harĩ niĩ, na nĩnogeetio nĩkũmakirĩrĩria." 
Isaiah1:15 “Rĩrĩa mwatambũrũkia mooko maanyu mũkĩĩhooya ndĩrĩĩhũgũraga na kũngĩ.O na mũngiuga mahooya maingĩ atĩa, ndikaamũthikĩrĩria, nĩ gũkorwo mooko maanyu maiyũirwo nĩ thakame." 
Isaiah1:16 Wĩthambei mũthere; thengiai ũũru wanyu mbere yakwa na mũtige gwĩka ũũru. 
Isaiah1:17 Mwĩruteei gwĩkaga wega.Rũmagĩrĩraai kĩhooto, na mũteithagie arĩa mahinyĩrĩirio.Heagaai ciana cia ngoriai ihooto ciacio na mũteithagie atumia a ndigwa.”" 
Isaiah1:18 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ,“Ũkaai rĩu twaranĩrie maũndũ macio. O na angĩkorwo meehia maanyu matuunĩhĩĩte o ta thakame, ngaamathambia mathere o ta ira.O na angĩkorwo meehia maanyu matuunĩhĩĩte o ta gakarakũ, ngaameerũhia o ta guoya wa ng'ondu." 
Isaiah1:19 Mũngĩnjĩtĩkia na mũnjathĩkĩre, nĩmũkaarĩa indo iria njega cia mĩgũnda yanyu." 
Isaiah1:20 Mũngĩndega na mũũnemere-rĩ, rũhiũ rwa njora nĩruo rũkaamũrĩa.Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI, njarĩĩtie ũguo na kanua gaakwa.”" 
Isaiah1:21 Itũũra rĩrĩa rĩarĩ rĩhokeku, o rĩu rĩaiyũire ũthingu, rĩtuĩkĩĩte ta mũmaraaya nĩkĩ?Itũũra rĩu rĩathagwo nĩ kĩhooto, no rĩu rĩraathwo nĩ ũũragani." 
Isaiah1:22 Betha yaku ĩiyũirwo nĩ ngaanga na ndibei yaku nĩ ndukanu na maaĩ. 
Isaiah1:23 Anene aaku nĩmatuĩkĩĩte aremi na araata a aici, meendaga o kũhakwo na kũheeo iheeo.Ningĩ maticiiragĩrĩra ciana cia ngoriai igootiinĩ, o na kana magathikĩrĩria atumia a ndigwa." 
Isaiah1:24 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe, o we Ngai ũrĩa ũrĩ ũhoti wa Isiraeli, egũkiuga atĩrĩ,“Maraakara maakwa nĩmagaikũrũkĩra thũ ciakwa, na nĩngeerĩhĩria harĩ cio." 
Isaiah1:25 No rĩĩrĩ, nĩngaakũhũgũkĩra ngũhũũre; nĩngaagũtheria ta ũrĩa cuuma ĩtheragio ĩgathirwo nĩ ngaanga, na thengie gĩko gĩaku gĩothe." 
Isaiah1:26 Nĩngaakũhe athamaki ta arĩa a tene na ngũhe andũ a gũgũtaara ta arĩa maarĩ kuo na hau kabere.Na ũgaagĩcooka gwĩtagwo, ‘Itũũra rĩa Ũthingu’ o na ‘Itũũra Rĩhokeku.’" 
Isaiah1:27 “Ũthingu nĩguo ũkaahonokia Jerusalemu nakĩo kĩhooto kĩhonokie andũ aakuo arĩa mahereete. 
Isaiah1:28 No rĩĩrĩ, andũ arĩa aremi na arĩa meehagia makaaharaganio hamwe, nao arĩa matirikaga MWATHANI nĩkũũragwo makooragwo." 
Isaiah1:29 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, nĩmũkaigua thoni nĩ ũrĩa mwanathaathaiya mĩtĩ na mĩgũnda ĩrĩa maamũrĩire ngai cia mĩhianano." 
Isaiah1:30 Mũgaakĩũma o ta mĩgandi ĩrahũrũrũka mathangũ, o na kana ta mũgũnda ũtarĩ maaĩ." 
Isaiah1:31 Na o ta ũrĩa mahuti magwatagio mwaki nĩ thandĩ, noguo andũ arĩa marĩ hinya makaaniinwo nĩ ciĩko ciao iria njũru, na gũtikooneka wa kũrigĩrĩria matikaaniinwo.”" 
Isaiah2:1 Ũyũ nĩguo ũhoro ũrĩa MWATHANI aaguũrĩirie Isaia mũrũ wa Amozu, ũkoniĩ Jerusalemu na Juda." 
Isaiah2:2 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, matukũ marĩa magooka, kĩrĩma kĩrĩa Hekaarũ yakĩĩtwo gĩgaakorwo kĩrĩ kĩraihu gũkĩra irĩma ciothe, gĩgaakorwo gĩtũũgĩrĩĩte igũrũ wa ithũngũri ciothe.Ndũũrĩrĩ nyingĩ nĩikoomokagĩra kĩrĩmainĩ kĩu." 
Isaiah2:3 Andũ aingĩ magooka moige atĩrĩ, “Ũkaai twambate kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa MWATHANI, ũkaai twambate Hekaarũinĩ ya Ngai wa Isiraeli, nĩguo agatũrute ũrĩa ekwenda twĩkage, nĩ geetha tũthiage na njĩra ciake.Nĩ gũkorwo ũrutani wa MWATHANI uumaga Zayuni, na MWATHANI aaragĩria andũ ũhoro wake arĩ Jerusalemu!”" 
Isaiah2:4 Nĩagaatuithania andũ aingĩ, na nĩakaiguithania ndũũrĩrĩ nyingĩ.Nacio iture hiũ ciacio cia njora ituĩke mĩraaũ, na iture matimũ maacio matuĩke tũhiũ twa gũceeha.Gũtirĩ rũũrĩrĩ rũgaacooka kũrũa na rũrĩa rũngĩ, na itigaacooka kũhaarĩria mbaara." 
Isaiah2:5 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, inyuĩ andũ a nyũmba ya Jakubu, “Ũkaai tũthiĩre ũtheriinĩ wa MWATHANI!”" 
Isaiah2:6 Wee Ngai, nĩũtiganĩirie andũ aaku, o o njiarwa cia Jakubu.Nĩ gũkorwo bũrũri ũiyũire ago a kuuma mwena wa irathĩro, aragũri maragũraga ta Afilisiti, o na andũ arĩa matumĩĩte ũraata na andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ." 
Isaiah2:7 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, bũrũri wao ũiyũire thahabu na betha, ũtonga wao ndũngĩtarĩka; bũrũri wao ũiyũire mbarathi, ningĩ ngaari ciao cia mbarathi itingĩtarĩka." 
Isaiah2:8 Bũrũri wao ũiyũire ngai cia mĩhianano na mathaathayagia indo mathondekeete na mooko maao. 
Isaiah2:9 Mũndũ o wothe nĩakaanyiihio na aconorithio. MWATHANI ndũkamoohere! 
Isaiah2:10 Andũ makoorĩra ngurungainĩ cia mahiga, kana menje marima mehithe, makĩgeria kũũrĩra maraakara ma MWATHANI na riiri wa ũnene wake." 
Isaiah2:11 Mwĩtĩĩo nĩũkaanangwo, na rũng'athio rwa andũ naruo rũniinwo.Mũthenya ũcio no MWATHANI wiki ũgaatũũgĩrio." 
Isaiah2:12 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩaigĩĩte mũthenya: wa gũũkĩrĩra arĩa marĩ na hinya na metũũgagĩria, o na arĩa metĩyagĩra andũ arĩa angĩ." 
Isaiah2:13 Mũthenya wa gũũkĩrĩra mĩtarakwa yothe ya Lebanoni, mĩnene na mĩniini, o na mĩgandi yothe ya Bashani." 
Isaiah2:14 Mũthenya wa gũũkĩrĩra irĩma ciothe iria ndaihu, na tũrĩma tuothe tũraihu." 
Isaiah2:15 Mũthenya wa gũũkĩrĩra mĩnaara yothe mĩraaya na igũrũ, na thingo ciothe njake na hinya." 
Isaiah2:16 Mũthenya wa gũũkĩrĩra meeri ciothe cia mbiacara, o na meeri iria thaka mũno." 
Isaiah2:17 Andũ arĩa aremi nĩmakaarangĩrĩrio, na arĩa etĩĩi manyiihio.Mũthenya ũcio no MWATHANI wiki ũgaatũũgĩrio." 
Isaiah2:18 Ningĩ ngai ciothe cia mĩhianano nĩgũthenga igaathenga o biũ. 
Isaiah2:19 Andũ makoorĩra ngurungainĩ cia mahiga kana meenje marima tĩĩriinĩ meehithe makĩgeria kũũrĩra maraakara ma MWATHANI na riiri wa ũnene wake rĩrĩa akaarũũgama kũinainia thĩ. 
Isaiah2:20 Mũthenya ũcio ngai cia mĩhianano ya thahabu na ya betha, iria andũ meethondekeire maciithaathayagie, magaaciikĩria huko na huuhu." 
Isaiah2:21 Rĩrĩa MWATHANI akaarũũgama kũinainia thĩ, andũ magaatoonya mĩatũkainĩ na ngurungainĩ cia mahiga makĩgeria gũthengera maraakara ma MWATHANI na riiri wa ũnene wake." 
Isaiah2:22 Ndũkaanehoke andũ tondũ matukũ maao nĩmatare.Andũ makĩrĩ a bata ũrĩkũ? 
Isaiah3:1 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩekwehereria andũ a Jerusalemu na a Juda ũteithio wa mĩthemba yothe ũrĩa ũngĩmaguna. Ameehererie ũteithio wa irio na wa maaĩ. 
Isaiah3:2 Njamba ciao na thigari ciao, atuithania aao na anabii aao, ooni maũndũ aao na athamaki aao." 
Isaiah3:3 Atongoria a thigari mĩrongo ĩtaano na andũ a gĩtĩĩo, ataarani na mabundi marĩa moogĩ, o na ago arĩa njoorua." 
Isaiah3:4 Ciana nĩcio igaatuĩka anene aao na magaathagwo nĩ ngeenge. 
Isaiah3:5 Andũ nĩmakaahinyanagĩrĩria: mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ, andũ arĩa eethĩ matigaaconokagĩra arĩa akũrũ, na andũ arĩa matarĩ bata matikeenyiihagĩria arĩa maramaatha." 
Isaiah3:6 Mũndũ akaanyiitaga mũrũ wa nyina, marĩ gwa ithe mũciĩ, akamwĩra atĩrĩ,“Tondũ nĩ we wĩ na nguo ya ũnene, tuĩka mũtongoria witũ ũrũũgamĩrĩre kũndũ gũũkũ kũharaganu.”" 
Isaiah3:7 Mũthenya ũcio naake agaacookia na mũgambo mũnene oige atĩrĩ, “Ndingĩhota gũteithia mũingĩ, o rĩrĩa gwakwa gũtarĩ irio kana nguo.Tigaai gũũthuura nduĩke mũtongoria wa mũingĩ!”" 
Isaiah3:8 Nĩ gũkorwo Jerusalemu nĩ kũharaganu nakuo Juda nĩkũgũa kũraagũa. Tondũ andũ nĩmaraakarĩĩtie MWATHANI na mĩario na ciĩko ciao na makaagĩra riiri wake gĩtĩĩo o akĩonaga. 
Isaiah3:9 Gũthuutũkania nĩkuo kũramathitanga, maanĩkaga meehia maao o ta andũ a Sodomu na matimahithahithaga.Kaĩ marĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Tondũ nĩ o mereehithĩirie ũũru ũcio." 
Isaiah3:10 Ĩraai arĩa athingu atĩ nĩmagaakena nĩ gũkorwo nĩmagaakenera mũcaara wa wĩra wao. 
Isaiah3:11 No rĩĩrĩ, kaĩ arĩa aaganu marĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ Ũrĩa meekire andũ arĩa angĩ, nao noguo mageekwo." 
Isaiah3:12 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, ciana nĩcio irĩhatagĩrĩria andũ aakwa, na marĩathagwo nĩ atumia.Andũ aakwa, atongoria aanyu nĩ o mamũhĩtithagia na makamũturuuria mũkaaga kũmenya njĩra ĩrĩa mũkũgerera." 
Isaiah3:13 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI nĩatwarĩĩte ciira wake igootiinĩ. Nĩokĩrĩĩte aciirithie andũ aake." 
Isaiah3:14 MWATHANI nĩarũũgamanĩĩte na atongoria na anene a andũ aake. Arameera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ nĩmũiyĩte mũgũnda wakwa wa mĩthabibũ; indo iria mũtuunyĩĩte athĩĩni irĩ thĩinĩ wa nyũmba cianyu." 
Isaiah3:15 Mwendaga atĩa rĩrĩa mũkũhinyĩrĩria andũ aakwa na mũkanyariira athĩĩni?”Ũguo nĩguo niĩ MWATHANI Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe ndoiga. 
Isaiah3:16 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ,“Kaĩ andũ a nja a Jerusalemu nĩetĩĩi-ĩ! Mathiaga matiirĩĩte mĩtwe yao, makĩhingahingaga tũitho twao, magĩkinyũkagia na mwĩtĩĩo, o makĩgambagia njingiri cia magũrũ maao.”" 
Isaiah3:17 Kwoguo MWATHANI nĩageekĩra magata mĩtweinĩ ya andũ a nja a kũu Jerusalemu na oonanie njaga yao. 
Isaiah3:18 (18-23) Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI nĩakaamatuunya indo iria meegemagia nacio magũrũ, mĩtwe, ngingo, matũ, mooko, maniũrũ, ciara, na nguoinĩ ciao. Ningĩ nĩakaamatuunya itambaya cia mĩtwe, mĩcibi, maraaci, ithiitũ, nguo cia thigũkũ, nguo cia thĩinĩ, ngũbia, na ibeeti." 
Isaiah3:19 Handũ ha gũkorwo mehakĩĩte maraaci, magaakorwo makĩnunga ũũru; handũ ha kwĩhotora mĩcibi ya goro, magaakorwo mehotoreete ndigi; handũ ha gũkorwo na njuĩrĩ thondeke wega, mĩtwe yao ĩgaakorwo yenjeetwo; handũ ha gũkorwo mehumbĩĩte nguo cia goro, magaakorwo marĩ na nguo ndembũkangu; handũ hagũkorwo marĩ athaka, magaakorwo marĩ ndũti." 
Isaiah3:20 Arũme aanyu magaatemengwo na hiũ cia njora, nacio njamba cianyu ciũragĩrwo mbaarainĩ." 
Isaiah3:21 Ihingo cia ĩtũũra rĩa Jerusalemu nĩigaacakaya na irĩre, narĩo itũũra rĩhaane ta mũtumia ũikarĩĩte thĩ arĩ njaga." 
Isaiah4:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo atumia mũgwanja makeegwatagĩrĩra mũndũ mũrũme ũmwe makamwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũrĩĩcaragĩria irio na tũkeegũrĩra nguo, no rĩĩrĩ, reke tũtuĩke atumia aaku nĩguo twehererwo nĩ gĩconoko kĩrĩa gĩtũkorereire.”" 
Isaiah4:2 Mũthenya ũcio rũhonge rũrĩa MWATHANI agaatũma rũthundũke nĩrũgaathakara na rũgĩe na riiri. Na rĩĩrĩ, magetha ma mĩgũnda magaatuĩka ma gwĩkenagia na gwĩtĩĩaga na andũ a Isiraeli arĩa magaakorwo matigarĩĩte." 
Isaiah4:3 Andũ oothe arĩa magaakorwo matigarĩĩte kũu Jerusalemu, o arĩa Ngai athuurĩĩte matigare, mageetagwo atheru." 
Isaiah4:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI na ũndũ wa hinya wake nĩagaatuanĩra, atherie bũrũri, na athambie thaahu wa Jerusalemu o na athambie thakame ĩrĩa ĩitĩĩtwo kuo." 
Isaiah4:5 MWATHANI nĩakaahumbĩra kĩrĩma gĩa Zayuni na andũ oothe arĩa magomanĩĩte kuo. Akaamahumbagĩra na itu mũthenya, na ndoogo na rũrĩrĩmbĩ ũtukũ. Riiri wa MWATHANI ũkaahumbagĩra na ũgitagĩre itũũra rĩothe." 
Isaiah4:6 Riiri ũcio ũgaatuĩka kĩĩgunyĩ gĩa kwĩgitia riũa mũthenya, na gwa kũũrĩra na kwĩyũa mbura na kĩhuuhũkanio." 
Isaiah5:1 Nĩndekwo nyine rwĩmbo rwa mũraata wakwa, rwĩmbo rũkoniĩ mũgũnda wake wa mĩthabibũ.Mũgũnda ũcio wa mĩthabibũ wa mũraata wakwa warĩ kũndũ kũnoru o kĩrĩma igũrũ." 
Isaiah5:2 Nĩonganirie mahiga na agĩcimba, akĩhanda mĩthabibũ ĩrĩa mĩega mũno.Agĩaka mũnaara wa kũrangĩra gatagatĩ ka mũgũnda ũcio, na agĩthondeka kũndũ gwa kũhihĩra thabibũ.Agĩgĩikara eetereire ũmũhe thabibũ njega, no ũgĩciara thabibũ ndũrũ." 
Isaiah5:3 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, atũũri a Jerusalemu na a Juda, ndamũthaitha ũkaai mũtũtuithanie, niĩ na mũgũnda ũcio wakwa wa mĩthabibũ." 
Isaiah5:4 Nĩ atĩa ingĩekire mũgũnda ũcio wakwa na ndiawĩkire? Rĩrĩa ndeetereire ũciare thabibũ njega, nĩ kĩĩ gĩatũmire ũnjiarĩre thabibũ ndũrũ?" 
Isaiah5:5 Rekeei ndĩmwĩre ũrĩa ngũwĩka; nĩkũũirigũra ngũũirigũra, momore thingo iria iũthiũrũrũkĩirie, ndeke nyamũ cia gĩthaka iũrĩe na iũrange." 
Isaiah5:6 Nĩkũũtiganĩria ngũũtiganĩria, ndũgaacimbwo kana mĩthabibũ icooke gũceehwo.Nĩkũreka ngũreka ũkũre mĩigua na mĩtare, na njathe matu matigaacooke kũurĩria mbura." 
Isaiah5:7 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, inyuĩ andũ aya a Isiraeli, nĩ inyuĩ mũgũnda wa mĩthabibũ wa MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe. Inyuĩ andũ aya a Juda, nĩ inyuĩ mĩthabibũ ĩrĩa MWATHANI aahandire!Na-rĩ, eetereire mwĩke maũndũ ma kĩhooto, no oonire o mũkĩũragana na mũkĩhinyanĩrĩria.Eetereire kuona mũgĩĩka maũndũ ma ũthingu, no aiguire o kĩrĩro na andũ magĩcaaya." 
Isaiah5:8 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ, inyuĩ andũ arĩa mũthiaga mũkĩgũragĩrĩra nyũmba cianyu, na mũkĩgũragĩrĩra mĩgũnda yanyu, o nginya gũkaaga kũndũ gũtigaru kũngĩtũũrwo nĩ andũ angĩ, mũgagĩtuĩka ta arĩ o inyuĩ oiki mũtũũraga bũrũri." 
Isaiah5:9 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩehĩtĩĩte ngĩiguaga, akoiga atĩrĩ,“Nyũmba icio cianyu nene na thaka, ikaamomorwo ciage a gũcitũũra." 
Isaiah5:10 Nĩ gũkorwo ĩĩka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ithaano cia mĩthabibũ ikoimagia o rita inyaanya cia ndibei, nacio kiro igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩnaana cia mbegũ ciahandwo, ikoimagia o kiro ikũmi na inyaanya ciagethwo.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Inyuĩ mwambagĩrĩria kũrĩĩo nĩ njoohi o rũũciinĩ, o inyuĩ mũtiindaga mũgĩcarania na njoohi o nginya ũtukũ." 
Isaiah5:12 Marugainĩ maanyu mũkoragwo na inanda, tamburini, mĩtũũrirũ na ndibei.No mũtiĩciiragia ũrĩa MWATHANI eekĩĩte." 
Isaiah5:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũkaanyiitwo mĩgwate mũthaamio nĩ ũndũ wa kũriita kwanyu.Atongoria aanyu magaakua nĩ ng'aragu, naguo mũingĩ ũkue nĩ nyoota." 
Isaiah5:14 Nĩkĩo kwa arĩa akuũ kũmahũũtĩire na gũgaathamia kanua gatarĩ gĩthimi.Kũrameria andũ a gĩtĩĩo a Jerusalemu, na mũingĩ wothe ũgĩthonjaga." 
Isaiah5:15 Andũ nĩmaconoreetwo, na arĩa oothe etĩĩi makanyiihio." 
Isaiah5:16 No rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe oonanagia ũkaru wake na gwĩka maũndũ ma kĩhooto. Aguũranagĩria ũthingu wake na gũtuĩra andũ aake." 
Isaiah5:17 Ng'ondu ikaarĩithagio maganjoinĩ; o na mbũri nĩikoona ũrĩithio kuo. 
Isaiah5:18 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ!Inyuĩ mũguucagia waganu ta ũguucĩĩtio na mĩkwa ya maheeni, na mũkaguucia meehia ta maguucĩĩtio na mĩkanda ya kũguucia ngaari." 
Isaiah5:19 O inyuĩ muugaga atĩrĩ,“MWATHANI nĩeke ũrĩa egwĩka na ihenya nĩguo twĩyonere!Ngai Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli nĩahingie mĩbango yake nĩguo tũmĩmenye!”" 
Isaiah5:20 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ!Inyuĩ arĩa muugaga atĩ maũndũ marĩa mooru nĩ mo meega, na atĩ marĩa meega nĩ mo mooru.O inyuĩ muugaga atĩ nduma nĩ yo ũtheri, na ũtheri nĩguo nduma.O inyuĩ mũtuaga maũndũ marĩa marũrũ atĩ nĩ mo macamaga wega; namo marĩa macamaga wega mũgatua atĩ nĩ mo marũrũ." 
Isaiah5:21 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Inyuĩ mwĩyonaga mũrĩ oogĩ na mũgetua aara! 
Isaiah5:22 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Inyuĩ mũnyuaga njoohi mũgĩcitukanagia. 
Isaiah5:23 O inyuĩ mũrekagĩrĩria mũndũ ũhĩtĩĩtie mwahakwo, na mũkaima mũndũ ũtahĩtĩĩtie kĩhooto gĩake!" 
Isaiah5:24 Kwoguo o ta ũrĩa mĩtĩ na nyeki nyũmũ ĩhĩaga nĩ mwaki, noguo mĩri yanyu ĩkaabutha, nakĩo kĩro kĩanyu kĩũmbũrwo nĩ rũhuuho o ta rũkũngũ.Tondũ nĩmũreganĩĩte na rĩathana rĩa MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe, na mũkarangĩrĩria matua ma Ngai Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Aisiraeli." 
Isaiah5:25 Maraakara ma MWATHANI nĩmamũũkĩrĩire, inyuĩ andũ aake, agatambũrũkia guoko gwake na akamũhũũra.Irĩma ithingithĩĩte, nacio ciimba cia andũ arĩa mooragĩĩtwo ikahaana ta mahuti matiganĩrie njĩrainĩ.Nĩ gũkorwo maraakara ma MWATHANI matirĩ maranyiihanyiiha, na guoko gwake no gũtambũrũkie." 
Isaiah5:26 MWATHANI nĩagaatũmanĩra rũũrĩrĩ rwa kũraihu, na ahuuhĩre andũ marĩ ituri cia thĩ karumbeeta, nao mooke na ihenya mahanyũkĩĩte." 
Isaiah5:27 Gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wao ũgaakorwo anogeete kana agĩthua, agĩcũnga kana arĩ toro, arĩ na mĩcibi mĩregeru kana kĩraatũ gĩtuĩku." 
Isaiah5:28 Mĩguĩ yao ĩgaakorwo ĩrĩ mĩnoore, namo moota maao makorwo marĩ mageete wega.Mahũngũ ma mbarathi ciao magaakorwo moomĩĩte ta mahiga ma nyaigĩ, na magũrũ ma ngaari ciao cia mbarathi magaateng'eraga o ta kĩhuuhũkanio." 
Isaiah5:29 Thigari ikaararamaga ta mĩrũũthi ĩnyiitĩĩte nyamũ, ĩkĩmĩtwara handũ haraaya hatarĩ mũndũ ũngĩmĩtuunya." 
Isaiah5:30 Mũthenya ũcio wakinya, thigari ikaararamagĩra bũrũri wa Isiraeli, o ta iria rĩkĩhũũrahũũrana.Mũndũ angĩkaarora bũrũri ũcio, akoona o nduma na gĩthĩĩna; ũtheri ũgaakorwo ũhumbĩrĩĩtwo nĩ matu." 
Isaiah6:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, mwaka ũrĩa mũthamaki Uzia aakuire-rĩ, nĩndoonire MWATHANI aikarĩire gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũnene, na kĩaigĩĩtwo handũ hatũũgĩru mũno. Nguo ciake nacio ciaraihĩĩte ikaiyũra Hekaarũ yothe." 
Isaiah6:2 Ndoonire athiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ Aserabi. O Mũserabi aarĩ na mathagu matandatũ, meerĩ ma kwĩhumbĩra ũthiũ, meerĩ ma kũhumbĩra mwĩrĩ na meerĩ ma kũũmbũka namo." 
Isaiah6:3 Ũmwe eetaga ũrĩa ũngĩ, makoiga atĩrĩ,“Mũtheru, Mũtheru, Mũtheru, nĩ MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe.Riiri wake ũiyũire thĩ yothe.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Kayũ ka mĩgambo ya acio maanagĩrĩra nĩgaatũmaga mũthingi wa Hekaarũ yothe ũinaine, na hekaarũ nĩyaiyũraga ndoogo." 
Isaiah6:5 Ngĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ ndĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Nĩndathira, nĩ gũkorwo niĩ ndĩ mũndũ ũtarĩ mĩromo mĩtheru, na mũndũ ũtũũraga gatagatĩ ka andũ matarĩ mĩromo mĩtheru, na maitho maakwa nĩmoona Mũthamaki, MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe!”" 
Isaiah6:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũserabi ũmwe akĩũmbũka agĩũka harĩ niĩ anyiitĩĩte na mĩĩhato ikara rĩakanaga aarutĩĩte kĩgongoonainĩ. 
Isaiah6:7 Naake akĩĩhuutia mĩromo narĩo, akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ, “Tondũ ikara rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩakũhuutia mĩromo-rĩ, mahĩtia maaku nĩmaathengio na nĩwoherwo meehia maaku.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Ngĩgĩcooka ngĩigua Mwathani oiga atĩrĩ, “Nũũ ngũtũma na nũũ ũgũthiĩ handũ haitũ?”Na niĩ ngĩgĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ũyũ haaha! Ndũma!”" 
Isaiah6:9 Naake akĩnjookeria atĩrĩ,“Thiĩ wĩre andũ aya ũũ: Mũrĩthikagĩrĩria, no mũtirĩkuũkagĩrwo. Mũrĩroraga, no mũtirĩmenyaga ũrĩa kũrathiĩ na mbere" 
Isaiah6:10 Reke meciiria ma andũ aya makingitare, matũ maao mathingare, na maitho maao matumane, nĩguo matikoone na maitho maao, matikaigue na matũ maao, na meciiria maao matigataũkĩrwo, makĩgarũrĩre mĩtugo yao na mahonio.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩkĩũria atĩrĩ,“Mwathani, gũgũkorwo kũhaana ũguo itĩĩna rĩigana atĩa?” Naake akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ,“Nĩ nginya bũrũri wanangwo ũtigwo ũtarĩ andũ a gũũtũũra, na nyũmba nacio ikorwo itarĩ andũ; bũrũri wothe ũkorwo ũkirĩĩte ihooru biũ." 
Isaiah6:12 Niĩ MWATHANI nĩngaatwarithia andũ kũndũ kũraaya, na ndũme matũũra maingĩ thĩinĩ wa bũrũri matiganĩrio." 
Isaiah6:13 O na mũndũ ũmwe harĩ andũ ikũmi angĩgaatigara bũrũriinĩ, o naake nĩakaaniinwo, o ta ũrĩa mũgandi kana mũtarakwa ũtemagwo ũgatigara o gĩtina.”(Gĩtina nĩ kĩambĩrĩria kĩerũ kĩa andũ a Ngai.)" 
Isaiah7:1 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũthamaki Ahazu, mũrũ wa Jothamu na mũcũkũrũ wa Uzia, aathaga Juda, itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu nĩrĩatharĩkĩirwo nĩ Rezini, mũthamaki wa Siria marĩ na Peka mũrũ wa Remalia, ũrĩa warĩ mũthamaki wa Isiraeli, no matiahotire kũrĩtuunyana." 
Isaiah7:2 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa mũthamaki wa Juda aiguire atĩ andũ a Siria nĩmatumĩĩte ndũgũ na andũ a Isiraeli, we na andũ aake nĩmaagwatirwo nĩ guoya mũnene na makĩinaina o ta ũrĩa mĩtĩ ya mũtitũ ĩinainagio nĩ rũhuuho." 
Isaiah7:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Isaia atĩrĩ, “Oya mũũrũguo Shearu Jashubu mũthiĩ mũgatũnge mũthamaki Ahazu. Nĩmũkũmũkora barabarainĩ harĩa atumi a nguo marutagĩra wĩra, o mũthiainĩ wa mũtaro ũrĩa ũreehage maaĩ kuuma karia ka na igũrũ." 
Isaiah7:4 Wamũkora mwĩre aikare ahooreire, na ndakaamake kana atangĩke ngoro. Nĩ gũkorwo maraakara ma mũthamaki Rezini na andũ aake a Siria na ma mũthamaki Peka mahaana o ta ndoogo ya icinga igĩrĩ irahora." 
Isaiah7:5 Siria, manyiitanĩĩte na Aisiraeli na mũthamaki wao, nĩmathondekeete mũbango" 
Isaiah7:6 wa gũtharĩkĩra Juda. Mabangĩĩte makirie andũ aakuo ihooru nĩguo meetĩkĩre kũnyiitanĩra nao. Ningĩ macooke marũũgamie mũrũ wa Tabeeli atuĩke mũthamaki wao.” 
Isaiah7:7 No rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ, “Ũndũ ũcio ndũgeekinyĩra na ndũkaahoteka." 
Isaiah7:8 Tondũ-rĩ, Siria gũtirĩ hinya gũkĩra Damasiki, itũũra rĩrĩa rĩayo inene. Ningĩ Damasiki gũtirĩ na hinya gũkĩra Rezini mũthamaki warĩo. Ningĩ mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ĩtaano ĩgĩthira, bũrũri wa Isiraeli ũgaakorwo ũharaganĩĩte na ndũkaahota kwĩrũũgamia." 
Isaiah7:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, Isiraeli gũtirĩ na hinya gũkĩra Samaria itũũra rĩakuo rĩrĩa inene na Samaria gũtirĩ hinya gũkĩra Peka mũthamaki warĩo.“Atĩrĩĩrĩ, mũngĩaga gwĩtĩkia, nĩ ma mũtikaahota kwĩrũũgamia.”" 
Isaiah7:10 Ningĩ MWATHANI, agĩtũma ndũmĩrĩri kũrĩ Ahazu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ĩtia MWATHANI Ngai waku kĩmenyithia" 
Isaiah7:11 kiumĩĩte na thĩ kũrĩa kũriku ta kwa arĩa akuũ o na kana kiumĩĩte matuinĩ kũũrĩa igũrũ.” 
Isaiah7:12 Naake Ahazu agĩcookia atĩrĩ,“Ndigwĩtia kĩmenyithia, nĩndarega, ndikũgeria MWATHANI.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Naake Isaia agĩcookia atĩrĩ,“Inyuĩ, njiarwa cia Daudi, tagĩthikĩrĩriei, mũkuona kũnogia andũ ũrĩ ũndũ mũnyiinyi nĩguo mũkĩnogie o na Ngai?”" 
Isaiah7:14 Mwathani we mwene nĩegũkĩmũhe kĩmenyithia! Mũirĩĩtu nĩakaagĩa nda na nĩagaaciara mwana wa kahĩĩ amwĩte Imanueli, ũguo nĩ ta kuuga, “Ngai hamwe na ithuĩ.”" 
Isaiah7:15 Rĩrĩa mwana ũcio agaakinya wa gũkũũrana wega na ũũru, akaanyuaga iria na arĩage ũũkĩ." 
Isaiah7:16 Na agĩgaakinya wa gũkũũrana wega na ũũru, mabũrũri ma athamaki acio eerĩ arĩa rĩu marakũinainia magaakorwo matiganĩirio." 
Isaiah7:17 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI nĩagaakũreehithĩria, wee mwene, andũ aaku, o na andũ a nyũmba ya thooguo, matukũ ma thĩĩna mũũru gũkĩra ũrĩa wothe wanooka kuuma rĩrĩa bũrũri wa Isiraeli wagayũkanire na wa Juda. Thĩĩna ũcio ũkoima harĩ mũthamaki wa Asiria." 
Isaiah7:18 “Rĩrĩa matukũ macio magooka, MWATHANI akaahuuha coro, nao andũ a Misiri mooke na ũingĩ o ta ngi moimĩĩte tũrũũĩinĩ twa Misiri tũrĩa tũrĩ kũraihu. Nao andũ a Asiria mooke na ũingĩ o ta njũkĩ moimĩĩte bũrũri wao." 
Isaiah7:19 Magooka moomokere irĩmainĩ, ituambainĩ, o na ngurungainĩ cia mahiga, na maarahe ithakainĩ cia mĩigua o na kũrĩa guothe kũrĩithagio." 
Isaiah7:20 “Matukũinĩ macio, Mwathani nĩagaakombora mũthamaki wa andũ a Asiria, ahaana ta mwenjani kuuma mũrĩmo wa rũũĩ rwa Farati. Naake nĩakaamwenja mĩtwe, njuĩrĩ cia magũrũ, o na nderu." 
Isaiah7:21 “No rĩĩrĩ, matukũini macio, mũndũ akaarĩithagia moori ĩmwe na ng'ondu igĩrĩ," 
Isaiah7:22 na tondũ wa ũingĩ wa iria rĩrĩa ikaarutaga, agaakoragwo na kĩrĩa gĩothe akaabataraga. Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũgaatigara akaarĩaga ũũkĩ na anyuage iria." 
Isaiah7:23 “Rĩrĩa matũkũ macio magaakinya, mĩgũnda ya mĩthabibũ ĩrĩa mbere ĩyo yoimagia thabibũ ngiri ĩmwe (1,000) na ĩkeendagio icunjĩ ngiri ĩmwe (1,000) cia betha, ĩgaatuĩka o gĩthaka kĩa mĩigua na mĩtare." 
Isaiah7:24 Andũ magaathiaga kuo kũhĩta marĩ na mĩguĩ na moota, nĩ gũkorwo bũrũri wothe ũgaakorwo ũyũirwo nĩ mĩigua na mĩtare." 
Isaiah7:25 Ningĩ irĩmainĩ kũrĩa kwamenyereete gũciimbagwo na macembe, gũtirĩ ũkaageria gũthiĩ kuo nĩgwĩtigĩra mĩtare na mĩigua. Gũgaatuĩka kũndũ gwa kũrekererio mahiũ na kũrangwo nĩ ng'ondu.”" 
Isaiah8:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ, “Taoya kĩhengere kĩnene ũcooke wandĩke na ndemwa nene atĩrĩ, ‘Hiũha gũtaha, Tharĩkĩra na ihenya.’ ”" 
Isaiah8:2 Oya andũ eerĩ ehokeku, nao nĩ Uria mũthĩnjĩri Ngai, na Zekaria mũrũ wa Jeberekia matuĩke aira." 
Isaiah8:3 Thuutha ũcio, ngĩkoma na mũtumia wakwa, naake akĩgĩa nda, akĩheeo mwana wa kahĩĩ. Gaaciarwo, MWATHANI akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ, “Geete, ‘Hiũha gũtaha, Tharĩkĩra na ihenya.’" 
Isaiah8:4 Tondũ-rĩ, mbere ya kamenye gwĩtana baaba na maitũ, ũtonga wothe wa Damasiki na indo ciothe cia gũtahwo iria irĩ thĩinĩ wa Samaria nĩigaakorwo itahĩĩtwo nĩ mũthamaki wa Asiria.”" 
Isaiah8:5 MWATHANI agĩcooka akĩnjarĩria akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ," 
Isaiah8:6 “Andũ aya nĩmaregeete maaĩ ma karũũĩ ga Shiloa karĩa gaikũrũkaga kahooreire na makaambĩrĩria kũinaina mbere ya mũthamaki Rezini na mũthamaki Peka. 
Isaiah8:7 Kwoguo niĩ MWATHANI nĩngũmareehithĩria mũthamaki wa Asiria na mbũtũ ciake ciothe ahaana o ta maaĩ ma rũũĩ rwa Farati rĩrĩa rũiyũrĩĩte rũkoinĩra ndeere ciothe. 
Isaiah8:8 Mekũiyũrĩrĩra bũrũri wa Juda maũkinye o ngingo na makĩre, mahumbĩre indo ciothe.”Na tondũ MWATHANI arĩ hamwe na ithuĩ, mathagu maake matambarũkĩĩte makaahumbĩra bũrũri wothe." 
Isaiah8:9 Inyuĩ andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ cookanĩrĩriai na no mũkuharaganio! Inyuĩ mabũrũri ma kũraaya tategaai matũ na no mũkũhũũrwo!Tawĩhotoreei kũrũa, ĩĩni, tawĩhotoreei na no mũkũhũũrwo!" 
Isaiah8:10 Thondekaai mĩbango, no ndĩkuumanĩra!Mũngĩaria na mũgambo ũmwe, mũgambo ũcio ndũkũhinga, nĩ gũkorwo Ngai arĩ hamwe na ithuĩ." 
Isaiah8:11 Na rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI nĩangaanirie na hinya mũno ndikaarũmĩrĩre mĩtugo ĩrĩa andũ aya maarũmagĩrĩra, akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ," 
Isaiah8:12 “Ndũkaananyiitanĩre na andũ aya mĩbangoinĩ yao mĩũru, o na ndũgeetigĩre maũndũ marĩa meetigagĩra kana ũmake." 
Isaiah8:13 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe no we ũrĩtuaga mũtheru; no we wiki wagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩtigĩra, na no we wiki ũngĩkũmakia." 
Isaiah8:14 Tondũ wa ũrĩa ndĩ riiri wa kũguoyohia, haana ta ihiga rĩa kũhĩnga andũ. Haana ta mũtego wa kũgwatia andũ a moothamaki ma Juda na Isiraeli, o na andũ a Jerusalemu." 
Isaiah8:15 Andũ aingĩ nĩmakaahĩngwo, magũe, na moinangwo. Magaategwo na mũtego magwatio.”" 
Isaiah8:16 Cookanĩrĩria moohoro macio, ũmahũũre mũhũũri, matuĩke kĩrĩra harĩ arutwo aakwa." 
Isaiah8:17 Niĩ-rĩ, ndĩrĩetagĩrĩra o MWATHANI ũrĩa ũhithĩĩte andũ aake ũthiũ wake, na no we ndĩĩrĩgagĩrĩra." 
Isaiah8:18 Ĩ niĩ ũyũ haaha na ciana iria MWATHANI aheete. MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe, ũrĩa gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũthamaki kĩrĩ kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Zayuni, atũtũmĩĩte kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli tũrĩ ndũmĩrĩri irĩ muoyo." 
Isaiah8:19 No rĩĩrĩ, andũ nĩmakaamwĩra mũtuĩrie ũhoro kuuma kũrĩ ooni maũndũ na ago arĩa maaragia cucucucu na makang'ung'ua. Makoigaga atĩrĩ, “Andũ nĩmaagĩrĩirwo nĩgũtuĩria ũhoro kuuma kũrĩ Ngai wao na kuuma kũrĩ andũ aao arĩa marĩĩkĩĩtie gũkua, handũinĩ ha arĩa marĩ muoyo.”" 
Isaiah8:20 Na inyuĩ mũkaamacookagĩria atĩrĩ, “Athĩkagĩraai ũhoro ũrĩa MWATHANI amũrutĩĩte! Tigaai gũthikagĩrĩria aragũri nĩ gũkorwo maũndũ marĩa maramwĩra matikaamũguna!”" 
Isaiah8:21 Andũ nĩmakoorũũra bũrũriinĩ moorĩĩtwo nĩ hinya na mahũũtiĩ. Nĩmakaaruma mũthamaki wao na Ngai wao nĩ ũrĩa magaakorwo mahũũtiĩ na maraakaire. Ningĩ mangĩkaaroria maitho na igũrũ," 
Isaiah8:22 kana mamarorie na thĩ, matirĩ kĩndũ makoona tiga thĩĩna na nduma. Makeeyona marĩ ndumainĩ ndumanu ya kũmakania." 
Isaiah9:1 Matikoona gwa kũũrĩra hĩndĩ ĩyo ya mathĩĩna macio. 
Isaiah9:2 Andũ arĩa matũire mathiagĩra ndumainĩ nĩmooneete ũtheri mũnene.Arĩa matũũraga bũrũri wĩ nduma ndumanu nĩmaarĩirwo nĩ ũtheri. 
Isaiah9:3 Nĩũingĩhĩĩtie rũũrĩrĩ, ũkaruongerera gĩkeno.Rũrarũũhia mbere yaku rũkeneete o ta ũrĩa andũ marũũhagia hĩndĩ ya magetha, kana ta ũrĩa marũũhagia makĩgayana indo iria matahĩĩte." 
Isaiah9:4 Amu nĩuunangĩĩte icooki rĩrĩa rĩramaritũhĩire, na mũtĩ ũrĩa maraigĩrĩirwo ciande.O na nĩuunangĩĩte rũthanju rwa andũ arĩa maramahinyagĩrĩria, o ta ũrĩa wekire mũthenya ũrĩa wahootire thigari cia Midiani." 
Isaiah9:5 Indo ciothe cia atharĩkanĩri iria ciitĩkĩirwo nĩ thakame nĩigaacinwo na mwaki. 
Isaiah9:6 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩtũciarĩirwo kaana, nĩtũheetwo mwana wa kahĩĩ, naake nĩagaatuĩka mũthamaki witũ.Ageetagwo “Mũheani Kĩrĩra wa Kũgegania, Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe, Ithe wa Andũ wa Mĩndĩ na Mĩndĩ, na Mũthamaki wa Thaayũ.”" 
Isaiah9:7 Ũthamaki wake ũgaathiaga o ũkĩnenehaga, na gũgaakorwo na thaayũ ũtarĩ mũthia.Agaathamakaga ta mũthamaki Daudi, akĩhũthagĩra ũũma na kĩhooto, kuuma rĩu nginya tene na tene.MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩ we ũkaahingia ũndũ ũcio." 
Isaiah9:8 MWATHANI nĩatuĩrĩire ũthamaki wa Isiraeli, o na agaatuĩra njiarwa cia Jakubu." 
Isaiah9:9 Andũ oothe a Isiraeli, o na arĩa matũũraga Samaria nĩmekũmenya ũguo arĩĩkĩĩtie gwĩka.Maaragia na mwĩtĩĩo na rũng'athio makoiga atĩrĩ," 
Isaiah9:10 “Nyũmba cia maturubarĩ nĩmomoku, no tũgũciaka rĩngĩ na mahiga makumuthe wega.Mĩkũyũ nĩmĩteme, no tũgũcookia mĩtarakwa handũ haayo.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio MWATHANI nĩarahũrĩĩte thũ ciao nĩguo imatharĩkĩre. 
Isaiah9:12 Nĩarahũrĩĩte andũ a Siria na mwena wa na irathĩro, na Afilisiti na mwena wa na ithũĩro nĩ geetha matharĩkĩre Isiraeli.No o na eekĩĩte ũguo wothe, MWATHANI ndamathengeirie maraakara maake, no atambũrũkĩĩtie guoko amaherithie." 
Isaiah9:13 Andũ a Isiraeli matiigana kwĩrira, o na MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe aamaherithia; maticookeete kũrĩ we." 
Isaiah9:14 Kwoguo mũthenya o ro ũmwe, MWATHANI nĩakaaherithia atongoria a Isiraeli na andũ aakuo; nĩagaatinia mũtwe na mũting'oe kuuma harĩ o." 
Isaiah9:15 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũkũrũ na ũrĩa mũhe gĩtĩĩo nĩ o mũtwe, naake mũnabii ũrĩa ũrutanaga ũhoro wa maheeni nĩ we mũting'oe." 
Isaiah9:16 Andũ arĩa matongoragia andũ aya nĩmamahĩtithĩĩtie, o na makamaturuuria o biũ." 
Isaiah9:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio MWATHANI ndakeneetio nĩ andũ aao eethĩ, na ndacaaĩre atumia a ndigwa na ciana cia ngoriai.Nĩ gũkorwo andũ oothe matitĩĩaga Ngai na nĩ aaganu, na maaragia o maũndũ ma ũrimũ.No o na eekĩĩte ũguo wothe, MWATHANI ndamathengeirie maraakara maake, no atambũrũkĩĩtie guoko amaherithie." 
Isaiah9:18 Waganu wa andũ wakanaga o ta mwaki ũrĩa ũcinaga mĩtare na mĩigua.Wakanaga o ta mwaki ũracina mũtitũinĩ ũrĩa wambatagia ndoogo na igũrũ. 
Isaiah9:19 Tondũ MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩ mũraakaru, ihera rĩake rĩakanĩĩte o ta mwaki bũrũriinĩ wothe rĩkĩanangaga andũ, nao no gũũkanĩrĩra marookanĩrĩra o eene." 
Isaiah9:20 Bũrũriinĩ wothe andũ marĩhuragia na makarĩa kĩrĩa gĩothe mangĩona na matihũũne; o na mũndũ nĩarĩrĩaga mwana wake. 
Isaiah9:21 Andũ a Manase marĩũkĩrĩra Efiraimu, nao a Efiraimu mookĩrĩre a Manase, macooke manyiitane mookĩrĩre Juda.No o na eekĩĩte ũguo wothe, MWATHANI ndamathengeirie maraakara maake, no atambũrũkĩĩtie guoko amaherithie." 
Isaiah10:1 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ!Inyuĩ mũthondekaga mawatho matarĩ ma kĩhooto nĩguo mũhinyĩrĩrie andũ aakwa. 
Isaiah10:2 Ũguo nĩguo mwagithagia arĩa abataru waragania, na mũgatuunya athĩĩni ihooto ciao!Ũguo nĩguo mũiyaga indo cia atumia a ndigwa, na mũgatuunya ciana cia ngoriai indo ciacio!" 
Isaiah10:3 Mũgaagĩĩka atĩa rĩrĩa MWATHANI akaamũherithia? Mũgaagĩĩka atĩa rĩrĩa akaamũreehithĩria ndirũ yumĩĩte bũrũri wa kũraaya?Mũgaacaria ũteithio kũ, na mũkaahitha ũtonga wanyu kũ?" 
Isaiah10:4 Inyuothe mũkooragĩrwo mbaarainĩ, kana mũguucũrũrio mũtwarwo mũgatuĩke mĩgwate.No o na eekĩĩte ũguo wothe, MWATHANI ndamũthengeirie maraakara maake, no atambũrũkĩĩtie guoko amũherithie." 
Isaiah10:5 Aasiria nĩ rũthanju rwa maraakara maakwa, namo matũkũya maakwa nĩ thiarĩ ĩrĩa manyiitĩĩte na mooko." 
Isaiah10:6 Ndĩmatũmĩĩte magatharĩkĩre rũũrĩrĩ rũtaaheete gĩtĩĩo, andũ mandakarĩĩtie.Ndĩmatũmĩĩte magatahe indo, maiye, na marangĩrĩrie andũ acio o ta mahuti marĩ njĩrainĩ." 
Isaiah10:7 No ũguo tiguo mũthamaki wa Aasiria ataanyĩĩte gwĩka; o na tiguo areciiria.Ataanyĩĩte kwananga ndũũrĩrĩ nyingĩ. 
Isaiah10:8 Areraha atĩrĩ, “Atongoria oothe a mbũtũ cia ita ciakwa nĩ athamaki!" 
Isaiah10:9 Nĩhooteete matũũra ma Kalino na Karikemishi, o na ngatooria matũũra ma Hamathu na Aripadi. Ningĩ nĩndooreetie Samaria na Damasiki." 
Isaiah10:10 Nĩndambũrũkĩĩtie guoko herithie moothamaki marĩa mathaathayagia ngai cia mĩhianano; ngai icio nĩ nyingĩ gũkĩra ngai ciothe ĩrĩa ĩrĩ Jerusalemu na Samaria. 
Isaiah10:11 Nĩharaganĩĩtie Samaria na ngai ciothe cia mĩhianano ciakuo, na ũguo noguo ngwĩka Jerusalemu na mĩhianano ĩrĩa ĩthaathayagio kuo.”" 
Isaiah10:12 No MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ,“Ndarĩĩkia gwĩka ũrĩa ndĩreeka kũu kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Zayuni o na thĩinĩ wa Jerusalemu, nĩngũherithia mũthamaki wa Aasiria nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa areraha agĩĩtĩĩyaga.”" 
Isaiah10:13 Mũthamaki ũcio wa Aasiria areraha akoiga atĩrĩ,“Njĩkĩĩte maũndũ moothe na hinya wakwa mwene, o na ngameeka na ũũgĩ wakwa, tondũ ndĩ mũũgĩ.Nĩnjehereetie mĩhaka gatagatĩ ka ndũũrĩrĩ, na ngataha indo ciothe iria ciĩigĩire.Ndĩ na hinya ta wa ndeegwa na nĩnangĩrĩirie thĩ arĩa maathanaga kuo." 
Isaiah10:14 Guoko gwakwa nĩkũhambatĩĩte ũtonga wa ndũũrĩrĩ gũkaũnyiita, o ta ũrĩa mũndũ ahambatagĩria gĩtara kĩa nyoni agakĩnyiita; ndĩũnganĩĩtie na njĩra hũthũ o ta ũrĩa mũndũ oonganagia matumbĩ matiganĩirio.Gũtirĩ nyoni o na ĩmwe ĩhahũrĩĩte, kana ĩkanjathamĩria kanua ĩnjugĩrĩrie.”" 
Isaiah10:15 Ithanwa no rĩtĩĩĩre ũrĩa ũtemaga narĩo, thoo no ĩĩneneherie mũndũ ũrĩa ũtinagia nayo?Rũthanju no rwambararie mũndũ ũrĩa ũrwambararagia, kana thimbũ yoe na igũrũ mũndũ ũrĩa ũmĩoyaga na igũrũ?" 
Isaiah10:16 Kwoguo, MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe, nĩagaatũma mĩrimũ ĩnyamaarie thigari iria irĩ na hinya.Mĩĩrĩinĩ yacio gũgaakorwo kũrĩ na mwaki ũraakana ũkĩrĩrĩmbũkaga." 
Isaiah10:17 Ngai, ũrĩa arĩ we ũtheri wa Isiraeli, agaatuĩka mwaki.Ngai, ũrĩa mũtheru wa Isiraeli, agaatuĩka rũrĩrĩmbĩ rwa mwaki, rũgaacina na rũniine mĩigua na mĩtare mũthenya o ro ũmwe." 
Isaiah10:18 MWATHANI nĩkũniina akaaniina riiri wa mũtitũ wake, o na wa mũgũnda wake ũrĩa mũnoru. Akaaũniina o biũ o ta ũrĩa mũrimũ ũniinaga mũndũ." 
Isaiah10:19 Mĩtĩ ya mũtitũ wake ĩrĩa ĩgaatigara, ĩgaakorwo ĩrĩ mĩniini ĩgĩtarwo ũguo atĩ, o na kaana no kamĩtare." 
Isaiah10:20 Mũthenya ũcio wakinya-rĩ, matigari ma andũ a Isiraeli, o andũ a nyũmba ya Jakubu arĩa magaakorwo muoyo, matigaacooka kũiga mwĩhoko wao harĩ mũthamaki ũrĩa wamahũũrire. Makeerĩgagĩrĩra MWATHANI, o we Ngai Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli, matekwenyenya." 
Isaiah10:21 Arĩa magaakorwo matigarĩĩte thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli nĩmagaacookerera Ngai Mwene Hinya. 
Isaiah10:22 Isiraeli, andũ aaku o na gũtuĩka nĩ aingĩ o ta mũthanga wa iriainĩ, no andũ aniini aao magaacooka kuuma ithaamĩrioinĩ. Andũ nĩkũniinwo makaaniinwo, o ta ũrĩa maagĩrĩire gwĩkwo." 
Isaiah10:23 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩakareehithia mũthiro bũrũriinĩ wothe, o ta ũrĩa atuĩte nĩegwĩka." 
Isaiah10:24 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe ekuuga atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ andũ aakwa arĩa mũtũũraga Zayuni, tigaai gwĩtigĩra Aasiria, o na mangĩmũhũũra na njũgũma, kana mamuoere rũthanju mamũhũũre ta ũrĩa Amisiri maamũhũũraga." 
Isaiah10:25 Thuutha wa ihinda iniini nĩngũtiga kũmũherithia, hũgũkĩre Aasiria ndĩmaherithie." 
Isaiah10:26 Niĩ, MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe, ngaamahũũra na kĩboko gĩakwa, o ta ũrĩa ndahũũrire Amidiani ihigainĩ rĩa Orebu. Ngaaherithia Aasiria o ta ũrĩa ndaherithirie andũ a Misiri iriainĩ Ituune." 
Isaiah10:27 Ihinda rĩu rĩakinya-rĩ, mũrigo ũrĩa maamũkuithĩĩtie nĩũgaathengio ciandeinĩ cianyu, narĩo icooki rĩrĩa maamwĩkĩrĩĩte ngingo riunangwo rĩthengio.”" 
Isaiah10:28 Mbũtũ cia ita cia thũ nĩinyiitĩĩte itũũra rĩa Ai. Ĩtuĩkanĩirie Migironi, na igatiga indo ciacio Mikimashi." 
Isaiah10:29 Nĩiringĩĩte iriũko, na iraarĩrĩire Geba.Andũ a Rama nĩkũinaina marainaina, nao andũ a Gibea, itũũra rĩa Saũlũ, nĩgwĩthara marethara." 
Isaiah10:30 Andũ a Galimu, ugaai mbu! Andũ a Laisha, tegaai matũ! Andũ a Anathothu, ĩtĩkaai!" 
Isaiah10:31 Andũ a Madimena nĩgwĩthara marethara, nao andũ arĩa matũũraga Gebimu nĩkũũra maroora mehonokie." 
Isaiah10:32 Ũũmũũthĩ ũyũ thũ irĩ o itũũrainĩ rĩa Nobu; ikũnjĩire kĩrĩma gĩa Zayuni ngundi, o kĩo itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu." 
Isaiah10:33 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya wothe ekũmagũithia thĩ o ta honge itemeetwo kuuma mũtĩinĩ; njamba ciao iria irĩ ciũga nene itemengwo igũithio, nao arĩa metũũgĩrĩĩtie manyiihio." 
Isaiah10:34 MWATHANI ekũmatemenga o ta ũrĩa mĩtĩ ya kĩrĩĩti ĩtemagwo na ithanũa, na amarũnde o ta mĩtĩ ĩrĩa mĩtungu ya Lebanoni." 
Isaiah11:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, mũthamaki mwerũ nĩakoima njiarwainĩ cia Daudi, o ta ũrĩa thuuna ĩthundũkaga gĩtinainĩ kĩa mũtĩ, kana ta ũrĩa rũhonge ruumaga mũtĩinĩ." 
Isaiah11:2 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, roho wa MWATHANI agaikara thĩinĩ wa mũthamaki ũcio mwerũ, amũhe ũũgĩ, ũmenyi maũndũ, ũtaarani, na hinya.Naake mũthamaki ũcio nĩakaamenya ũrĩa MWATHANI eendaga, na amũtĩĩyage." 
Isaiah11:3 Gwathĩkĩra MWATHANI nĩkuo gũkaamũkenagia, ndagaatuithanagia maciira abaarĩĩte gĩthiithi kĩa mũndũ, kana arũmĩrĩire ndeto cia mũhuuhu." 
Isaiah11:4 Agaaciirithagia andũ arĩa athĩĩni na waragania. Nĩakaagitagĩra ihooto cia andũ arĩa matangĩĩteithia, na athaane andũ maherithio, na andũ arĩa meekaga ũũru mooragwo." 
Isaiah11:5 Agaathaga andũ aake na waragania na arũmagĩrĩre kĩhooto. 
Isaiah11:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo njũũi na ng'ondu igaatũũranagia itekũũgitana, nacio ngarĩ na tũũri twa mbũri ikomage hamwe itekũũrania.Tũcaũ twa ng'ombe na mĩrũũthi tũkaarĩaga hamwe, na tũkaarĩithagio nĩ ngeenge." 
Isaiah11:7 Ng'ombe na nduba ikaarĩaga hamwe, na tũcaũ twacio tũkaarahaga hamwe na thaayũ.Mĩrũũthi ĩkaarĩaga rũũa o ta ng'ombe." 
Isaiah11:8 Gakenge gagaathaakagĩra irimainĩ rĩa nduĩra, nako kaana kaniini gaikagie guoko irimainĩ rĩa nyoka ĩrĩa ĩrĩ thumu mũno." 
Isaiah11:9 Kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Zayuni, o kĩo kĩrĩma kĩrĩa gĩtheru kĩa Ngai, gũtigaacooka gũtiihanio kana gwĩkanagwo ũũru.Bũrũri ũgaakorwo ũiyũirwo nĩ ũmenyo wa MWATHANI o ta ũrĩa iria rĩiyũire maaĩ." 
Isaiah11:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki ũcio mwerũ kuuma njiarwainĩ cia Daudi akaarũũgamio ta kĩonereria harĩ andũ. Ndũũrĩrĩ igaathiaga itũũrainĩ rĩake rĩrĩa itheru na imũheage gĩtĩĩo. 
Isaiah11:11 Rĩrĩa hĩndĩ ĩyo ĩgaakinya, MWATHANI agaatambarũkia guoko gwake riita rĩngĩ acookanĩrĩrie matigari ma andũ aake amarute Asiria, Misiri, Pathirosi, Ethiopia, Elamu, Babilonia, Hamathu, o na mabũrũriinĩ marĩa maarĩ rũteereinĩ rwa iria." 
Isaiah11:12 MWATHANI nĩagaacuuria bendera ya kuonania kũrĩ ndũũrĩrĩ atĩ, andũ a Isiraeli na a Juda arĩa maahurunjũkĩĩte, nĩaramacookanĩrĩria amarutĩĩte mĩena ĩrĩa ĩna ya thĩ." 
Isaiah11:13 Ũiru nĩũgaathira gatagatĩ ka ũthamaki wa Isiraeli na wa Juda. Ũthamaki wa Juda ndũgaacooka gũtuĩka thũ ya Isiraeli hĩndĩ ĩngĩ. 
Isaiah11:14 Moothamaki macio meerĩ nĩmakaanyiitanĩra mahithũkĩre Afilisiti na mwena wa na ithũĩro, na matahe andũ arĩa matũũraga mwena wa na irathĩro. Ningĩ me hamwe nĩmagaatooria Aedomu na Amoabi, na maathĩkagĩrwo nĩ Aamoni." 
Isaiah11:15 MWATHANI nĩakoomia Iria Ituune acooke areehithie rũhuuho rũrĩ na ũrugarĩ mũingĩ, rũhũithie rũũĩ rwa Farati gũtigare o tũrũũĩ mũgwanja tũrĩa mũndũ o wothe akaahota kũringa." 
Isaiah11:16 Andũ a Isiraeli arĩa matigarĩĩte bũrũri wa Asiria makaagerera barabara nene makiuma kuo, o ta ĩrĩa maithe maao maagereire makiuma Misiri." 
Isaiah12:1 Mũthenya nĩũgooka rĩrĩa mũkaina atĩrĩ,“Nĩtwagũcookeria ngaatho, wee MWATHANI nĩ tondũ warĩ mũraakaru nĩ ithuĩ no rĩu nĩgũtũũmĩrĩria ũratũũmĩrĩria, na nĩũniinĩĩte maraakara maaku." 
Isaiah12:2 Ngai nĩ we Mũhonokia witũ, nĩtũrĩigaga mwĩhoko witũ harĩ we, na tũtigũcooka gwĩtigĩra.MWATHANI nĩarĩtũheaga hinya na ũcamba; nĩ gũkorwo we nĩ we Mũhonokia witu." 
Isaiah12:3 O ta ũrĩa maaĩ mahoro makenagia mũndũ anyootiĩ, noguo andũ a Ngai makenaga rĩrĩa MWATHANI amahonokia.”" 
Isaiah12:4 Mũthenya ũcio mũkaina atĩrĩ,“Cookeriai MWATHANI ngaatho! Mwĩteei amũteithie!Menyithiai ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe maũndũ manene marĩa amwĩkĩire! Meereei ũrĩa we arĩ mũnene." 
Isaiah12:5 Inĩraai MWATHANI mũmũgooce tondũ nĩekĩĩte maũndũ me ngumo nene. Thĩ yothe nĩĩigue ũhoro ũcio. 
Isaiah12:6 Inyuĩ mũtũũraga Zayuni, anĩrĩraai na mũine mũkeneete, amu Ngai Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli nĩ mũnene, na atũũraga hamwe na inyuĩ.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Ĩno nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩrĩa Isaia mũrũ wa Amozu aaheirwo nĩ MWATHANI ĩkoniĩ Babiloni. 
Isaiah13:2 Haiciai bendera ya kwanĩrĩra mbaara kũu kĩrĩmainĩ kĩrĩa gĩtarĩ kĩndũ!Gũũthũkĩraai thigari na mũcihenerie na mooko, mũciĩre itharĩkĩre ihingo cia itũũra rĩrĩa rĩĩtĩi." 
Isaiah13:3 MWATHANI we mwene nĩetĩĩte thigari ciake iria itamakaga, na itarĩ kĩndũ kĩngĩcicookia na thuutha, ithiĩ ikarũe mbaara theru, o na ikaherithie arĩa mamũraakarĩĩtie." 
Isaiah13:4 Taiguai inegene rĩa andũ aingĩ kũũrĩa irĩma igũrũ! Nĩ mũrurumo wa moothamaki na ndũũrĩrĩ ikĩũngana hamwe.MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩkũhaarĩria arahaarĩria thigari ciake ithiĩ ikarũe. 
Isaiah13:5 Irooka ciumĩĩte mabũrũriinĩ ma kũraaya, o kuuma ituri cia thĩ.MWATHANI arooka kũharagania bũrũri wothe, nĩ ũndũ wa maraakara marĩa e namo." 
Isaiah13:6 Girĩkaai nĩ amu mũthenya wa MWATHANI ũrĩ hakuhĩ! Mũthenya ũcio ũgũũka ũhaana o ta mũthiro ũtũmĩĩtwo nĩ Mwene Hinya Wothe. 
Isaiah13:7 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, mooko moothe nĩmakaaregera, na mũndũ o wothe akue ngoro." 
Isaiah13:8 Andũ oothe nĩmakaamaka na makorererwo nĩ ruwo, ruwo o ta rwa mũtumia akĩheeo mwana.Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ makaaroranaga mamakĩĩte na moothiũ maao magaakorwo maiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ thoni." 
Isaiah13:9 Mũthenya wa MWATHANI no ũrooka, ũgũkorwo ũrĩ mũthenya mũũru mũno, ũrĩa MWATHANI ekuonania maraakara na matũkũya maake. Egũũka kũharagania thĩ na kũniina eehia oothe." 
Isaiah13:10 Njata o yothe o na iria ikoragwo gĩtutu itirĩruta ũtheri wacio.Riũa narĩo rĩkĩratha rĩrĩtuĩka o nduma, o naguo mweri ndũrĩara." 
Isaiah13:11 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ,“Nĩndĩrĩherithia thĩ nĩ ũndũ wa ũmaramari wayo, na herithie andũ arĩa aaganu nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maao.Mwĩtĩĩo wa andũ arĩa ang'athia nĩkũũniina ndĩrĩũniina, na mũndũ o wothe wa ngũĩ na ũtarĩ tha nĩkũherithia ndĩrĩmũherithia." 
Isaiah13:12 Nĩndĩrĩtũma andũ moonekage na hinya, o ta ũrĩa thahabu ĩrĩa therie yonekaga na hinya.Nĩndĩrĩtũma rũruka rwa andũ rwage o ta ũrĩa thahabu ya Ofiri yagaga." 
Isaiah13:13 Nĩndĩrĩtũma igũrũ kũinaine na thĩ ĩthingithe, mũthenya ũcio, niĩ MWATHANI Mwene Hinya wothe ndĩrĩonania maraakara maakwa." 
Isaiah13:14 “Andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa matũũraga Babiloni marĩura, mahurunjũke o ta thwariga ĩkĩhĩtwo, kana ta ng'ondu itarĩ na mũrĩithi, macooke kũrĩ andũ aao, na bũrũri ũrĩa moimire." 
Isaiah13:15 Na rĩĩrĩ, arĩa oothe marĩkorererwo manyiitwo, nĩkũũragwo marĩũragwo na hiũ cia njora." 
Isaiah13:16 Ngeenge ciao irĩbacanio thĩ ikue, indo ciao itahwo, na atumia aao manyiitwo na hinya meroreire matarĩ ũndũ mangĩĩka.”" 
Isaiah13:17 No rĩĩrĩ, MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ,“Nĩndĩrĩarahũra Amede mahithũkĩre Babiloni. Matirĩgũrwo na betha o na kana mahakwo na thahabu." 
Isaiah13:18 Marĩtũmĩra moota na mĩguĩ yao moorage andũ eethĩ; matirĩringwo nĩ tha nĩ ũndũ wa ngeenge, o na kana macaaĩre ciana." 
Isaiah13:19 Babiloni nĩguo ũthamaki ũrĩa wĩ riiri mũno, na andũ aakuo metĩĩaga naguo.No rĩĩrĩ, niĩ MWATHANI nĩndĩrĩũng'aũrania o ta ũrĩa ndang'aũranirie Sodomu na Gomora." 
Isaiah13:20 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũgaacooka gũtũũra kuo; gũtirĩ Mũarabu ũgaacooka gũthondeka kĩraaro gĩake kuo, na gũtirĩ arĩithi makaarĩithia mbũri ciao kuo." 
Isaiah13:21 No rĩĩrĩ, nyamũ cia gĩthaka nĩcio igaakomaga kuo, ndundu ciakage itara ciacio kuo, nyaga icangacangage kuo, nacio mbũri cia gĩthaka irũũgarũũgage kuo." 
Isaiah13:22 Hiti ikaarĩraga irĩ mĩnaarainĩ igũrũ, nacio mbwe igambage irĩ thĩinĩ wa nyũmba iria ciarĩ cia athamaki.Itũũra rĩa Babiloni nĩrĩkinyĩrĩirwo nĩ ihinda rĩarĩo, na matukũ maarĩo nĩmatare.”" 
Isaiah14:1 MWATHANI nĩakaaringwo nĩ tha nĩ ũndũ wa Aisiraeli andũ aake na amatue aake kĩũmbe o rĩngĩ. Ningĩ nĩakaamaiga bũrũriinĩ wao kĩũmbe, na andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ nĩmageeturanĩra na matũuranie nao." 
Isaiah14:2 Ndũũrĩrĩ nyingĩ nĩigaateithĩrĩria Aisiraeli gũcooka bũrũri ũrĩa MWATHANI aamaheire. Marĩ bũrũriinĩ wao ndũũrĩrĩ icio, ikaamatungataga ta ngombo. Andũ arĩa maatuĩte Aisiraeli ngombo, magaatuĩka ngombo cia Aisiraeli. Andũ arĩa maatũire mahinyagĩrĩria Aisiraeli, magaathagwo nĩ o." 
Isaiah14:3 MWATHANI nĩagaakũũra andũ aake a Isiraeli, amũrute maruwoinĩ, mathĩĩnainĩ, o na mawĩrainĩ maritũ marĩa maarutithagio." 
Isaiah14:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmakaina magĩthirĩkagia mũthamaki wa Babilonia moige atĩrĩ:“Taoneei ũrĩa ũratũhinyagĩrĩria! Rĩu ndarĩ ho! Ndegũcooka gũtũhinyĩrĩria rĩngĩ! 
Isaiah14:5 MWATHANI nĩaniinĩĩte ũthamaki wa aathani ooru," 
Isaiah14:6 arĩa mahinyagĩrĩria andũ marĩ na maraakara maingĩ, na matatigithagĩria kũnyamaaria arĩa maahootire marĩ na marũrũ maingĩ." 
Isaiah14:7 Rĩu thĩ yothe nĩnogokeete na ĩkagĩa na thaayũ, na andũ nĩkũina maraina makeneete." 
Isaiah14:8 O na mĩthengera na mĩtarakwa ya Lebanoni nĩrakenerera mũthamaki ũcio ũng'aũranĩĩtio, tondũ rĩu nĩathengeetio, na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũgaacooka kũmĩtema!" 
Isaiah14:9 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, gwa akuũ nĩkwĩhaarĩria kũreehaarĩria gũtũnge mũthamaki wa Babilonia.Ngoma cia andũ arĩa maarĩ hinya gũũkũ thĩ nĩirethagathaga; ngoma cia athamaki nĩgũũkĩrĩria irookĩrĩria itĩ." 
Isaiah14:10 Ciothe iramwanĩrĩra ikiugaga atĩrĩ,‘Rĩu ũrĩ ũmwe witũ, na wagĩĩte hinya o ta ithuĩ!" 
Isaiah14:11 Ũratũire ũinagĩrwo na mĩtũũrirũ, no rĩu wĩ gũũkũ kwa arĩa akuũ!Ũrĩkomagĩra gĩtanda kĩa igunyũ, na wĩhumbagĩre na mũrengeti wa mũthũa!’ ”" 
Isaiah14:12 “Ũũi, mũthamaki wa Babilonia! Ũrakengaga ta njata ya Kĩwariĩ, no rĩu ũharũrũkĩĩtio ũkoima igũrũ!Ũratũire ũtooragia ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe, no rĩu ũbacanĩĩtio ũkagũa thĩ!" 
Isaiah14:13 Ũreĩĩraga ũgwĩtũũgĩria, ũthondeke gĩtĩ gĩaku gĩa ũthamaki na kũu igũrũ rĩa njata.Ũreciiragia ũrĩikaraga ta mũthamaki kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa na rũgongo kũrĩa ngai igomanaga." 
Isaiah14:14 Ũroigaga ũkwambata na kũu igũrũ rĩa matu, nĩguo mũiganane na Mwene Hinya Wothe." 
Isaiah14:15 No rĩu ũikũrũkĩĩtio kwa arĩa akuũ, ũgathinĩkanio o kũrĩa kũriku mũno!" 
Isaiah14:16 “Rĩu arĩa akuũ megũkwĩrorera magegeete meyũrie atĩrĩ, ‘Ĩ ũyũ nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũrainainagia thĩ, na agatũma moothamaki meenyenye?" 
Isaiah14:17 Ũyũ-rĩ, nĩ ũrĩa ũraharaganagia matũũra, agatũma thĩ yothe ĩhaane werũ, o na ũtangĩrarekereirie mĩgwate yake ĩinũke kwao?’ ”" 
Isaiah14:18 Athamaki oothe a mabũrũri mathikĩĩtwo na gĩtĩĩo, o mũndũ mbĩĩrĩrainĩ yake?" 
Isaiah14:19 No wee o na mbĩĩrĩra ndũrĩ. Kĩimba gĩaku gĩikanĩĩtio o ro ũguo kĩbuthe na gĩkarangarangwo.Gĩkomeirwo nĩ ciimba cia thigari iria ciũragĩirwo mbaarainĩ, na gĩgaikanio hamwe nacio irimainĩ rĩenjeetwo mahigainĩ." 
Isaiah14:20 Tondũ nĩwanangĩĩte bũrũri waku, na ũkooraga andũ aaku, ndũgũthikwo ta athamaki arĩa angĩ. Gũtirĩ mbeũ yaku o na ĩmwe ĩgũtigara, wee mwaganu ũyũ." 
Isaiah14:21 Tarekeei mbũragano ĩkinye!Ciana cia mũthamaki ũyũ nĩgũkua igũkua nĩ ũndũ wa meehia ma maithe maacio; itigaacooka gwatha thĩ, o na kana ciake matũũra mangĩ gũũkũ thĩ." 
Isaiah14:22 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe aroiga atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũtharĩkĩra itũũra rĩa Babiloni na ndĩrĩharaganie. Ndirĩ kĩndũ ngũtigia; ciana na andũ agima gũtirĩ ũgũtigara. Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI ndoiga ũguo." 
Isaiah14:23 Nĩngaatũma gũtuĩke gwa gũtũũrwo nĩ ngũrũe cia gĩthaka, o na kwarahage maaĩ. Ngaahaata Babiloni na kĩhaato, haate indo ciothe biũ. Niĩ MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩ niĩ ndoiga ũguo.”" 
Isaiah14:24 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩehĩtĩĩte akoiga atĩrĩ, “Ũndũ ũrĩa ndĩciirĩĩtie no ũkaahinga. Ũndũ ũrĩa nduĩte atĩ nĩngwĩka no ũgeekĩka." 
Isaiah14:25 Aasiria arĩa matũũraga bũrũriinĩ wakwa wa Isiraeli nĩngũmaniina na ndĩmarangĩrĩrie irĩmainĩ ciakwa.Nĩngũthengeria andũ aakwa mũtĩ wa ngingo, na mũrigo ũrĩa matũire makuuithĩĩtio nĩ Aasiria." 
Isaiah14:26 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, ũyũ nĩ mũbango ũrĩa bangĩire thĩ yothe, na nĩndambũrũkĩĩtie guoko gwakwa nĩguo herithie andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ.”" 
Isaiah14:27 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩeciirĩĩtie kũhingia ũndũ ũcio. Nũũ ũngĩkĩmũgiria?Nĩatambũrũkĩtie guoko gwake aherithanie. Nũũ ũngĩgĩgũkũnja? 
Isaiah14:28 Ĩno nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩrĩa MWATHANI aaheanire mwaka ũrĩa mũthamaki Ahazu aakuire. 
Isaiah14:29 Andũ a Filisitia, njũgũma ĩrĩa mũrahũũragwo nayo nĩyunangĩĩtwo, no rĩĩrĩ, mũtikaarũũhie.Tondũ-rĩ, nyoka ya mũthemba ũmwe yathenga, hacookaga ĩngĩ njũru makĩria.Itumbĩ rĩayo rĩtũrĩkaga nyamũ ĩngĩ ya thĩ ĩkũũmbũka na ĩgwakana mwaki." 
Isaiah14:30 MWATHANI nĩarĩrĩithagia marigithaathi ma athĩĩni aake, na amaarahagie na thaayũ. No rĩĩrĩ, inyuĩ Afilisiti aya, ekũmũtũmĩra ng'aragu nene mũno, na gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wanyu ũgũtigwo arĩ muoyo." 
Isaiah14:31 Matũũra moothe ma Afilisiti, girĩkaai mũgĩĩtagia ũteithio! Nyiitwoi nĩ guoya inyuothe!Nĩ gũkorwo mbĩĩri ya rũkũngũ nĩrooka yumĩĩte na mwena wa na rũgongo yũmbũrĩĩtwo nĩ thigari, na gũtirĩ o na ĩmwe yacio kĩguoya." 
Isaiah14:32 Tũgũcookeria atĩa njaama iria irooka itũmĩĩtwo kũrĩ ithuĩ nĩ Afilisiti?Tũgũciĩra atĩ MWATHANI nĩ we wakĩĩte Zayuni, na atĩ andũ aake arĩa anyamaarĩku nĩmekuona ũhuurũko kuo." 
Isaiah15:1 Ĩno nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩrĩa yaheanirwo ĩkoniĩ Moabi.Matũũra ma Ari na Kiri maniinĩĩtwo ũtukũ o ũmwe, na bũrũri wa Moabi ũkirĩĩte ihooru ki." 
Isaiah15:2 Andũ a Diboni moorĩire kũndũ gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa mathaathayagĩria makarĩrĩre kuo. Amoabi maragirĩka moigĩrĩirie, makĩrĩrĩra matũũra ma Nebo na Medeba. Oothe nĩmeenjeete njuĩrĩ na nderu moonanie ũrĩa manyiitĩĩtwo nĩ kĩeha." 
Isaiah15:3 Andũ marathiĩ mehumbĩĩte nguo cia makũnia; kũgirĩka na kũrĩra nocio iraiguo ciathĩinĩ na nyũmba igũrũ. 
Isaiah15:4 Andũ a Heshiboni na Eleale no kũrĩra mararĩra; kĩrĩro kĩao kĩraiguuo nĩ andũ marĩ Jahazu. Thigari cia Moabi no kũrĩra irarĩra ciugĩrĩirie ikĩinainaga nĩ guoya. 
Isaiah15:5 Ngoro yakwa nĩkũrĩrĩra ĩrarĩrĩra Moabi, andũ arĩa matigarĩĩte maroorĩra matũũrainĩ ma Zoari na Egilathu Shelishiya. Marambata Luhithu o makĩrĩraga; meerekeire Horonaimu makĩrĩraga moigĩrĩirie nĩ ũrĩa kũniinanĩĩtwo." 
Isaiah15:6 Maaĩ ma karũũĩ ka Nimirimu nĩ mahũu, ndeereinĩ ciako nyeki nĩkũũma ĩrooma; gũtirĩ kĩndũ kĩruru gĩtigarĩĩte." 
Isaiah15:7 Andũ mararinga karũũĩ karĩa ke mĩtĩ hũgũrũrũinĩ ciako makuuĩĩte kĩrĩa gĩothe mahoteete kũhonokia. 
Isaiah15:8 Kĩrĩro nĩkĩhunjĩĩte bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Moabi; nĩkĩiguĩtwo matũũrainĩ ma Egilaimu na Beerelimu. 
Isaiah15:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, itũũrainĩ rĩa Diboni rũũĩ rũiyũire thakame; o na gũtuĩka ũguo, Ngai nĩaigĩire andũ aakuo maũndũ mooru gũkĩra ũguo.Andũ oothe arĩa matigarĩĩte Moabi nĩmekũũragwo." 
Isaiah16:1 Amoabi, marĩ itũũrainĩ rĩa Sela rĩrĩa rĩrĩ werũinĩ, nĩmaatũmĩire ũrĩa wathaga itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu gatũrũme karĩ kĩheeo." 
Isaiah16:2 Meetereire iriũkoinĩ rĩa rũũĩ rwa Arinoni makĩagaagaga o ta nyoni itharũrĩirio itara ciacio, kana ta tũcui twa nyoni tũhurunjĩĩtwo." 
Isaiah16:3 Mareera andũ a Juda atĩrĩ, “Twĩreei ũrĩa twagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩka; rekeei twĩgitie harĩ inyuĩ o ta ũrĩa mũndũ egitagia kĩĩgunyĩinĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa riũa rĩhiũhĩĩte mũno.Tũhitheei kũrĩa tũtangĩonwo nĩ mũndũ, amu nĩgwĩthara twĩtharĩĩte." 
Isaiah16:4 Rekeei tũtũũranie na inyuĩ; tũgitĩreei kuuma harĩ ũrĩa ũrenda gũtũniina.”(Mũhinyanĩrĩria arĩĩkia gũthengio, kũniinana gũthire, na arĩa marananga bũrũri makorwo matarĩ ho," 
Isaiah16:5 ũmwe wa njiarwa cia Daudi nĩagaatuĩka mũthamaki, aathage andũ na wĩhokeku na wendani. Ageekaga o maũndũ ma kĩhooto na oonage atĩ waragania nĩwarũmĩrĩrwo.)" 
Isaiah16:6 Nao andũ a Juda maracookia atĩrĩ,“Nĩtũiguĩte ũrĩa andũ a Amoabi metũũgagĩria, na ũrĩa mang'athagĩria andũ, o na ũrĩa merahaga.No rĩĩrĩ, gwĩtũũgĩria kũu kwao nĩ gwa tũhũ.”" 
Isaiah16:7 Amoabi nĩkũrĩra mararĩra nĩ ũrĩa marathĩĩnĩka. Mararĩra maririkana ũrĩa maarĩaga wega itũũrainĩ rĩa Kiri Heresi.Mathĩĩnĩkĩĩte o nginya makaaga kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro. 
Isaiah16:8 Mĩgũnda ĩrĩa ĩrĩ gũkuhĩ Heshiboni na mĩgũnda ya mĩthabibũ ya Sibimahu, nĩmĩanange.Ndibei ya thabibũ cia mĩgũnda ĩyo ĩratũire ĩtũmaga athamaki a ndũũrĩrĩ matuĩke arĩĩu.Kũrĩ hĩndĩ mĩthabibũ ĩyo yataambĩĩte ĩgakinya o itũũrainĩ rĩa Jazeri.Mwena wa na irathĩro yataambĩĩte ĩkahakana na werũ, naguo mwena wa na ithũĩro yahakanĩĩte na iria rĩa Cumbĩ." 
Isaiah16:9 Rĩu-rĩ, ndĩrarĩrĩra mĩthabibũ ya Sibimahu o ta ũrĩa ndĩrarĩrĩra Jazeri.Ndĩraita maithori nĩ ũndũ wa Heshiboni na Eleale, tondũ gũtirĩ magetha ma gũtũma andũ makene." 
Isaiah16:10 Mĩgũndainĩ ĩyo ĩciaraga mũno-rĩ, gũtirĩ mũndũ ũrarũũhia kuo.Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũraina kana akaanĩrĩra kũu mĩgũndainĩ ya mĩthabibũ.Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũrahiha thabibũ athondeke ndibei.Gũtirĩ ngemi iroigwo." 
Isaiah16:11 Nĩkũgirĩka ndĩragirĩka ndĩ na kĩeha nĩ ũndũ wa Moabi, o na ndĩ na ihooru nĩ ũndũ wa Kiri Heresi." 
Isaiah16:12 Andũ a Moabi nĩkwĩnogia marenogia makĩambata kũndũ gũtũũgĩru gũthaathaiya, o na magĩthiĩ Hekaarũinĩ ciao kũhooya; ũndũ ũcio ndũrĩ wega ũkũmoonera." 
Isaiah16:13 Ĩyo nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa MWATHANI aarĩĩtie o tene ĩkoniĩ Moabi. 
Isaiah16:14 Rĩu MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ, “Mĩaka ĩtatũ ĩgĩthira, ũtonga wa Moabi ũgaakorwo ũthirĩĩte. No andũ aniini a Moabi magaatigara, o na akorwo andũ aakuo nĩ aingĩ mũno. Arĩa magaatigara magaakorwo matarĩ na hinya.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩkoniĩ Damasiki.“Atĩrĩĩrĩ, itũũra rĩa Damasiki rĩtigaacooka gũtuĩka itũũra rĩngĩ; rĩgaatuĩka o iganjo itheri." 
Isaiah17:2 Matũũra ma Siria magaatũũra matarĩ na andũ tene na tene. Ng'ondu na ng'ombe igaatũũra irĩaga na ikaaraha kuo, na itikoona mũndũ wa gũcihahũra." 
Isaiah17:3 Isiraeli gũgaikara gũtarĩ na ũgitĩri, nakuo Damasiki gũikare gũtarĩ na wĩyathi.Andũ a Siria arĩa magaatigara makaagithio kĩene o ta andũ a Isiraeli.Niĩ, MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe, nĩ niĩ ndoiga ũguo.”" 
Isaiah17:4 MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ, “Mũthenya nĩũrooka ũkaru wa Isiraeli ũthire; handũ ha gũtonga andũ nĩgũthĩĩna marĩthĩĩna." 
Isaiah17:5 Isiraeli kũrĩtuĩka o ta mũgũnda ũgetheetwo ngano; kũrĩtuĩka kũndũ gũtiganĩirio o ta mũgũnda ũgetheetwo ngano gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Refaimu. 
Isaiah17:6 No andũ aniini magaatigara; Aisiraeli makaahaana o ta mũtamaiyũ ũgetheetwo ndamaiyũ ciothe, hagatigara o ndamaiyũ igĩrĩ kana ithatũ itangĩkinyĩrĩka, kana o ta mũtunda ũinainĩĩtio, hagatigara o matunda mana kana mataano hongeinĩ ciaguo.Niĩ MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli, nĩ niĩ ndoiga ũguo.”" 
Isaiah17:7 Mũthenya ũcio wakinya-rĩ, andũ nĩmagaacookerera Mũũmbi wao, o we Ngai Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli, amateithie." 
Isaiah17:8 Matigaacooka kwĩhoka igongoona irĩa maathondekeete na mooko maao, kana mehoke indo irĩa maturĩĩte o eene, nacio nĩ mĩhianano ya ngai ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo Ashera, na igongoona cia gũcinĩrwo ũbaani." 
Isaiah17:9 Mũthenya ũcio-rĩ, matũũra maao marĩa magitĩre mũno magaatiganĩrio matuĩke maganjo, o ta matũũra ma Ahivi na ma Aamori marĩa maatiganĩirie rĩrĩa mooragĩra andũ a Isiraeli." 
Isaiah17:10 Wee Isiraeli, nĩũriganĩirwo nĩ Ngai ũrĩa ũkũhonokagia, o we ũkũgitagĩra o ta rwaro rwa ihiga.Nĩkĩo wĩhandĩire mĩmera mĩgũndainĩ wamũrĩire ngai cia mĩhianano, nĩguo ũthaathayagĩrie ngai ng'eni kuo." 
Isaiah17:11 No rĩĩrĩ, o na mĩmera ĩyo ĩngĩmera na ĩrute kĩro mũthenya o ũcio wamĩhanda, gũtirĩ magetha ĩngiuma, tiga o mathĩĩna na ruwo rũtangĩthira." 
Isaiah17:12 Ndũũrĩrĩ irĩ na hinya mũno nĩirooka na mũrurumo ta wa iria rĩrahũũrana, kana ta wa makũmbĩ ma maaĩ marahũyũka." 
Isaiah17:13 Irooka na ihenya o ta ndiihũ cia maaĩ, no Ngai nĩegũcikũũma, nacio ciũre; egũcingatithia o ta rũkũngũ kĩrĩma igũrũ, kana ta mũngũ ũũmbũrĩĩtwo nĩ kĩhuuhũkanio." 
Isaiah17:14 Hwaĩinĩ igũtũma kũgĩe na kĩmako, no gũkĩrooka gũkĩa ikorwo itarĩ ho.Macio nĩ mo marigĩrĩrio ma andũ arĩa matũtharĩkagĩra na makaiya indo ciitũ." 
Isaiah18:1 Mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa njũũĩ cia Ethiopia, nĩkũrĩ bũrũri ũiguagwo mathagu makĩbatabata." 
Isaiah18:2 Bũrũri ũcio nĩũtũmaga arekio magereire maaĩinĩ ma Nailo makuuĩĩtwo nĩ tũtarũ tũthondekeetwo na marura.Cookaai bũrũriinĩ wanyu! Inyuĩ arekio aya mũrĩ ihenya.Cookiai ndũmĩrĩri bũrũriinĩ wanyu ũcio ũtwĩkanĩirio nĩnjũũĩ, na rũũrĩrĩinĩ rwanyu rwa andũ araihu na marĩ ngoothi nyoroku, marĩ hinya na ũhoti mũnene, na meetigĩrĩĩtwo nĩ andũ a thĩ yothe." 
Isaiah18:3 Inyuothe mũtũũraga gũũkũ thĩ tathikĩrĩriai!Etereraai muone bendera ĩkĩhaicio irĩma igũrũ, na mũigue karumbeeta gakĩhuuhwo!" 
Isaiah18:4 MWATHANI anjĩrĩĩte atĩrĩ,“Ngũcũũthĩrĩria ndĩ o gwakwa igũrũ hooreire o ta riũa mathaainĩ ma mĩaraho, kana matu hĩndĩ ya magetha kwĩ na ũrugarĩ." 
Isaiah18:5 Mbere ya magetha ma thabibũ, o rĩrĩa kĩro gĩaitĩka, na thabibũ cierua, nĩrĩo thũ ikaanaananga andũ a Ethiopia na ihenya, o ta ũrĩa honge iceehagwo kuuma mũthabibũinĩ na kahiũ." 
Isaiah18:6 Ciimba cia thigari cia Ethiopia igaatigĩrwo nyoni iria irĩaga nyama na itigĩrwo nyamũ cia gĩthaka.Nyoni igaaciria hĩndĩ ya ũrugarĩ, nacio nyamũ icirie hĩndĩ ya heho.”" 
Isaiah18:7 Hĩndĩ nĩrooka, rĩrĩa MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe arĩamũkĩra magongoona kuuma kũrĩ andũ a rũũrĩrĩ rwa bũrũri ũcio ũtuĩkanĩirio nĩnjũũĩ. Rũũrĩrĩ rũu rwa andũ araihu na marĩ ngoothi nyoroku, marĩ hinya, ũhoti, na meetigĩrĩĩtwo nĩ andũ oothe a thĩ. Rũrĩũka kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Zayuni kũrĩa MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe athaathayagĩrio." 
Isaiah19:1 Ĩno nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩkoniĩ Misiri.MWATHANI arooka Misiri ahaicĩĩte itu rĩrahanyũka mũno.Mĩhianano ya Misiri nĩkũinaina ĩrainaina, nao andũ a Misiri nĩmakuĩte ngoro." 
Isaiah19:2 MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ,“Nĩngũtũma Amisiri mookanĩrĩre o eene, mũndũ ahũũrane na mũrũ wa nyina, na mũndũ ahũũrane na ũrĩa ũngĩ, itũũra rĩhũũrane na rĩrĩa rĩngĩ, na mũthamaki ahũũrane na ũrĩa ũngĩ." 
Isaiah19:3 Nĩngũthũũkia mĩbango ya Amisiri, na ndũme moorwo nĩ hinya.Marĩhooyaga ũteithio kuuma kũrĩ mĩhianano yao, na mahooyage kĩrĩra kuuma kũrĩ ago aao, o na kuuma kũrĩ maroho ma andũ arĩa makuĩte." 
Isaiah19:4 Nĩngũnenganĩra Amisiri maathwo nĩ mũthamaki mũũru. Mũthamaki ũtarĩ tha nĩ we ũrĩmathamakagĩra.Ũguo nĩguo MWATHANI, Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe oiga.”" 
Isaiah19:5 Maaĩ ma rũũĩ rwa Nailo nĩmarĩhũa, rũũĩ rũũme o kahora." 
Isaiah19:6 Mĩtaro yaruo nĩrĩnunga, natuo tũrũũĩ twaruo tũthiĩ o tũkĩhũaga.Marura na mathanjĩ nĩkũhooha marĩhooha," 
Isaiah19:7 nacio irio iria ihandĩĩtwo ndeereinĩ cia Nailo ciũme, ihuurutwo nĩ rũhuuho ciehere." 
Isaiah19:8 Mũndũ o wothe wĩyonagĩra gĩa kũrĩa na njĩra ya gũtega thamaki rũũĩinĩ rwa Nailo, arĩthikĩra na arĩre tondũ ndwano na ngara ciake irĩtuĩka cia tũhũ." 
Isaiah19:9 Mabundi marĩa matumaga nguo cia gataani mwĩhoko wao nĩgũthira ũrĩthira. 
Isaiah19:10 Atumi na aruti wĩra arĩa njoorua nĩmarĩkua ngoro na maigue kĩeha. 
Isaiah19:11 Atongoria a itũũra rĩa Zoani nĩ akĩĩgu! Andũ arĩa mataaraga mũthamaki wa Misiri mamũheaga ũtaari mũhĩtanu.Mangĩhota atĩa kwĩra mũthamaki wa Misiri atĩ o nĩ andũ oogĩ, o na nĩ njiarwa cia athamaki a tene?" 
Isaiah19:12 Wee mũthamaki wa Misiri, andũ aaku arĩa oogĩ rĩu makĩrĩ ha?Matigĩkwĩre na makũmenyithie mĩbango ĩrĩa MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe ahaarĩirie nĩ ũndũ wa Misiri?" 
Isaiah19:13 Atongoria a Zoani na Memufisi nĩ akĩĩgu; handũ ha gũtongoria rũũrĩrĩ nĩkũrũhĩtithia marũhĩtithĩĩtie. 
Isaiah19:14 MWATHANI nĩatũmĩĩte maheane mataaro mahĩngĩcanu. Nĩkĩo Amisiri maagaagĩĩte maũndũinĩ moothe marĩa meekaga, na magatũgũũga o ta ũrĩa mũrĩĩu atũgũũgaga akagwĩra matahĩko maake." 
Isaiah19:15 Gũtirĩ mũndũ, arĩ gĩtonga kana mũthĩĩni, ũrĩ igweta kana ũtarĩ, ũngĩhota gũteithia andũ a Misiri." 
Isaiah19:16 Ihinda nĩrĩrooka, rĩrĩa Amisiri marĩnyiitwo nĩ guoya o ta atumia. Marĩmaka na mainaine moona MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe atambũrũkĩĩtie guoko gwake amaherithie." 
Isaiah19:17 Andũ a Misiri nĩmarĩtuĩka nda rĩrĩa marĩigua Juda kwagwetwo. Magweterwo ũhoro wakuo, nĩmarĩtigĩra maamenya mũbango ũrĩa MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe ahaarĩirie nĩ ũndũ wao." 
Isaiah19:18 Rĩrĩa ihinda rĩu rĩrĩkinya, matũũra mataano ma bũrũri wa Misiri marĩaragia rũthiomi rwa Kĩhibirania, na mehĩtage makĩgwetaga MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe. Itũũra rĩmwe rĩamo rĩrĩĩtagwo “Itũũra rĩa Riũa.”" 
Isaiah19:19 Ihinda rĩu rĩakinya-rĩ, MWATHANI nĩarĩakĩrwo kĩgongoona bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri, o na aakĩrwo mũnaara wĩtanĩĩtio naake mũhakainĩ wa bũrũri ũcio." 
Isaiah19:20 Indo icio irĩonanagia ũrĩa MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe eekĩrĩirwo bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri. Andũ mahinyĩrĩrio makaĩra MWATHANI amateithie, nĩarĩmatũmagĩra mũndũ wa kũmahonokia." 
Isaiah19:21 MWATHANI nĩarĩmenyithia andũ a Misiri, nao mamũmenye, mamũthaathayagie, o na mamũrutagĩre magongoona. Marĩhĩtaga mĩhĩtwa mbere ya MWATHANI na makamĩhingia." 
Isaiah19:22 MWATHANI arĩmahũũraga akĩmahuuhaga; maamũcookerera nĩarĩiguaga mahooya maao, na akamahonia." 
Isaiah19:23 Rĩrĩa ihinda rĩu rĩrĩkinya, nĩkũrĩthondekwo barabara yumĩĩte Misiri nginya Asiria. Aasiria na Amisiri nĩmarĩceeranagĩra na mahooyage hamwe." 
Isaiah19:24 Ihinda rĩu rĩakinya-rĩ, bũrũri wa Isiraeli nĩũrĩnyiitana na bũrũri wa Misiri na wa Asiria. Mabũrũri macio matatũ marĩtuĩkaga kĩraathimo harĩ thĩ yothe." 
Isaiah19:25 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe arĩmaraathimaga akiugaga atĩrĩ, “Nĩndamũraathima inyuĩ Amisiri, andũ aakwa, na inyuĩ Aasiria, andũ arĩa ndoombire, na inyuĩ Aisiraeli, andũ aakwa aamũre.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Sarigoni, mũthamaki wa Asiria, nĩathire mũnene wa mbũtũ ciake cia ita athiĩ agatharĩkĩre itũũra rĩa Afilisiti rĩa Ashidodu arĩnyiite." 
Isaiah20:2 Mĩaka ĩtatũ mbere ĩyo, MWATHANI nĩerĩĩte Isaia mũrũ wa Amozu arute iraatũ na nguo ya ikũnia iria eehumbĩĩte. Isaia nĩathĩkire, agĩikara arĩ njaga na atarĩ na iraatũ." 
Isaiah20:3 Rĩrĩa itũũra rĩa Ashidodu rĩanyiitirwo, MWATHANI akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ndungata yakwa Isaia ĩtũire ĩthiaga njaga na ĩtarĩ iraatũ mĩaka ĩtatũ. Ũndũ ũcio ũgũtuĩka kĩmenyithia kĩa ũrĩa gũkaahaana bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri na wa Ethiopia." 
Isaiah20:4 Mũthamaki wa Aasiria nĩagaathiĩ na andũ arĩa agataha mabũrũriinĩ macio meerĩ marĩ njaga. Athuuri na aanake magaathio nao matina maao makĩonekaga, marĩ njaga, na matarĩ na iraatũ, naguo ũndũ ũcio ũgĩtuĩke gĩconoko harĩ andũ a Misiri." 
Isaiah20:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ arĩa mehokeete andũ a Ethiopia na metĩĩaga na andũ a Misiri nĩmarĩkua ngoro na maturuure. 
Isaiah20:6 Andũ arĩa matũũraga ndeereinĩ cia iria cia bũrũri wa Filisitia mariuga atĩrĩ, ‘Oneei ũrĩa andũ arĩa tũrehokeete matũgitĩre harĩ mũthamaki wa Aasiria meekĩĩtwo! Ithuĩ na ithuĩ tũngĩkĩhonoka atĩa?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Ĩno nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩkoniĩ Babilonia.O ta ũrĩa kĩhuuhũkanio kĩa ngoma cia aka kĩhuuhũkanagia gĩtuĩkanĩirie werũinĩ, noguo mũthiro ũgooka uumĩĩte bũrũriinĩ wa kũmakania." 
Isaiah21:2 Nĩnyoneete kĩoneki kĩrũrũ ma; kĩoneki kĩa andũ magĩkunyananĩra na makĩniinana.Mbũtũ cia Elamu tharĩkĩraai! Mbũtũ cia Amede thiũrũrũkĩraai matũũra!Ngai nĩekũniina mathĩĩna marĩa mareehithĩĩtio nĩ Babiloni. 
Isaiah21:3 Maũndũ marĩa nyoneete na ngaigua kĩonekiinĩ kĩu nĩmanduĩte nda na makanjiguithia ruwo, o ta rwa mũtumia akinyĩrĩirwo kũheeo kaana." 
Isaiah21:4 Meciiria maakwa nĩmaturuurĩĩte na nĩndĩrainaina ndĩ na guoya.Ndĩratheethũkagĩra hwaĩinĩ ũkinye, no ũndeeheire o kĩmako." 
Isaiah21:5 Kĩonekiinĩ kĩu-rĩ, meetha nĩikũhaarĩirio, na mĩgeka ĩkaarĩrwo ageni; ageni nĩkũrĩa mekũrĩaga makĩnyuaga.Ihinda o rĩu mũtongoria wa thigari oiga atĩrĩ, “Thigari! Haarĩriai ngo cianyu!”" 
Isaiah21:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mwathani anjĩĩra atĩrĩ,“Tathiĩ ũige mũrangĩri, na ũmwĩre amenyithanie kĩrĩa ekuona." 
Isaiah21:7 Oona andũ magĩũka mahaicĩĩte mbarathi eerĩ eerĩ, na oona angĩ mahaicĩĩte ndigiri na ngamĩĩra, nĩamabaare wega mũno.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Mũrangĩri aanĩrĩra na kayũ kanene atĩrĩ,“Mũthuuri ũyũ, ngoreetwo ngĩrangĩra ũtukũ na mũthenya ndĩ o gũũkũ mũnaara igũrũ." 
Isaiah21:9 “Rĩu nĩ o aarĩa marooka! Marooka eerĩ eerĩ mahaicĩĩte mbarathi.”Mũrangĩri akiuga atĩrĩ, “Babiloni nĩng'aũranie! Babiloni nĩng'aũranie!Mĩhianano yothe ya ngai ciakuo yunangĩĩtwo ĩkarekanio thĩ.”" 
Isaiah21:10 Andũ aakwa a Isiraeli, mũrahũũrĩĩtwo o ta ngano, no rĩu nĩndamũhe ndeto njega iria njiguĩte harĩ MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe, o we Ngai wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah21:11 Ĩno nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩkoniĩ Edomu.Atĩrĩĩrĩ, kũrĩ mũndũ ũranjĩta arĩ Edomu, akanjũũria atĩrĩ, “Mũrangĩri ũyũ, ũtukũ ũrĩthira rĩ? Kaĩ ũgũikara atĩa ũgĩgaathira?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Na niĩ ngacookia atĩrĩ, “Nĩgũgũkĩa, no ũtukũ nĩũgũcooka o rĩngĩ. Angĩkorwo nĩũkwenda kũũria rĩngĩ-rĩ, ũka o rĩngĩ ũũrie.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Ĩno nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩkoniĩ Arabia.Inyuĩ mĩtongoro ya andũ a Dedani, o inyuĩ mũraaragĩrĩra ihingainĩ cia werũ mũthaatu wa Arabia," 
Isaiah21:14 andũ arĩa mekũmũkora marĩ anyootu maheei maaĩ.Inyuĩ andũ a bũrũri wa Tema, heei andũ arĩa maroora irio." 
Isaiah21:15 Andũ acio maroorĩra hiũ cia njora icomoreetwo imoorage, moota mageeteetwo mamarathe, o na makoorĩra moogwati moothe ma mbaara." 
Isaiah21:16 MWATHANI agĩcooka akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwaka ũmwe ũgĩthira ũguo-rĩ, ũnene wa mĩhĩrĩga ya Kedari ũgaakorwo ũthirĩĩte." 
Isaiah21:17 Andũ arĩa marathaga na mĩguĩ, nĩ o thigari njoorua mũno gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ a Kedari, no nĩ aniini mũno magaakorwo matigarĩĩte. Ũguo nĩguo niĩ, MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli, ndoiga.”" 
Isaiah22:1 Ĩno nĩ ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ikoniĩ gĩtuamba gĩa Kĩoneki.Nĩ kĩĩ kĩrathiĩ na mbere, tondũ inyuothe mũhaicĩĩte nyũmba igũrũ?" 
Isaiah22:2 Mũiyũrĩĩtie itũũra rĩothe inegene, mwagaago, na ndũũhiũ.Andũ aanyu arĩa makuĩte matiũragĩĩtwo na hiũ cia njora, o na kana makooragĩrwo mbaarainĩ." 
Isaiah22:3 Atongoria aanyu moorire oothe hamwe, manyiitirwo mataikĩĩtie mũguĩ o na ũmwe.Arĩa matigarire manyiitirwo hamwe oothe, o na gũkorwo nĩmekũũrĩĩte magathiĩ kũraaya." 
Isaiah22:4 Nĩkĩo ndĩramwĩra atĩrĩ, “Tiganaai na niĩ. Ndĩ na ruwo rũingĩ, nĩndekwo ndĩre. Tigaai kũgeria kũũhoreria, nĩkũrĩrĩra ndĩrarĩrĩra andũ aakwa arĩa makuĩte.”" 
Isaiah22:5 Rĩu nĩ ihinda rĩa mwagaago, rĩa gĩthombocano na rĩa inegene kũu gĩtuambainĩ gĩa Kĩoneki.Thingo cia itũũra riitũ nĩmomore, na mbugĩrĩrio ĩkinyĩĩte o irĩmainĩ.MWATHANI Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩ we ũtũtũmĩire ũhoro ũyũ." 
Isaiah22:6 Thigari cia bũrũri wa Elamu ciũkĩĩte ihaicĩĩte mbarathi irĩ na mĩguĩ na moota, nacio cia bũrũri wa Kiri nĩihaarĩirie ngo ciacio." 
Isaiah22:7 Cianda iria noru cia Juda ciyũire ngaari cia mbarathi, thigari ihaicĩĩte mbarathi nĩcio irangĩrĩĩte o kĩhingoinĩ kĩa Jerusalemu" 
Isaiah22:8 Ũgitĩri wothe wa bũrũri wa Juda nĩũharaganĩĩte. Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũkĩruta indo cia mbaara iria ciarĩ “Thitoo ya matharaita.” 
Isaiah22:9 (9-10) Nĩmuonire mĩanya ĩrĩa yarĩ thingoinĩ cia Jerusalemu ĩrĩa yabataire gũthingwo. Ningĩ nĩmwabaarire nyũmba ciothe thĩinĩ wa Jerusalemu na mũkĩmomora imwe nĩguo muone mahiga ma gũthinga kũrĩa thingo cia itũũra ciarĩ na mĩanya. Nĩguo mũgĩe na gwa kũiga maaĩ," 
Isaiah22:10 nĩmwakire itangi itũũra thĩinĩ rĩa kũiga maaĩ ma karia karĩa ga tene. No nĩmwagire kũmenya Ngai ũrĩa wabangire ũndũ ũcio kuuma o tene, o we watũmire ũhinge." 
Isaiah22:11 MWATHANI Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe aamwĩtaga mũrĩre na mũcakae, mwenjwo mĩtwe, na mwĩhumbe nguo cia makũnia." 
Isaiah22:12 No-rĩ, inyuĩ nĩkũrũũhia mwarũũhirie mũgĩĩkenagia, mũgĩthĩnja ndũrũme na ndeegwa mũrĩe, o na mũkĩnyua ndibei.Mwoigaga atĩrĩ, “Rekeei tũrĩe na tũnyue, amu twetereire o gũkua!”" 
Isaiah22:13 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe aanjĩĩrire atĩrĩ, “Matikooherwo wĩhia ũcio wao kinya magaakua. Ũguo nĩguo niĩ MWATHANI Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe ndoiga.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Ningĩ MWATHANI Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ, “Thiĩ kũrĩ Shebina, mũramati wa nyũmba ya mũthamaki" 
Isaiah22:15 ũmũũrie atĩrĩ, ‘Ũreciiria wee wĩ ũ? Ũrĩ na kĩhooto kĩrĩkũ ũkĩĩyenjera mbĩĩrĩra mahiga igũrũ?" 
Isaiah22:16 Mũndũ ũyũ, o na ũngĩkorwo ũtũũgĩrĩĩtio atĩa, MWATHANI arĩgũkumbaca agũikie kũnene." 
Isaiah22:17 Arĩkuoya o ta mũbiira, agũikie bũrũri mwariĩ. Kũu nĩkuo ũgaakuĩra, na ngaari ciaku cia mbarathi cia ũnene itigwo kuo, nĩ gũkorwo nĩũconorithĩĩtie nyũmba ya mwathi waku." 
Isaiah22:18 MWATHANI nĩarĩkũruta gĩtĩinĩ kĩu gĩaku, akũharũrũkie kuuma ũneneinĩ.’ ”" 
Isaiah22:19 “ Ihinda rĩu rĩakinya, arĩĩta ndungata yake Eliakimu mũrũ wa Hilikia," 
Isaiah22:20 amũhumbe nguo icio ciaku cia ũnene, amuohe mũcibi waku, na amũtue mũnene handũ haaku. Arĩmũtua ithe wa atũũri oothe a Jerusalemu o na a bũrũri wothe wa Juda."
